Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 1
Content:
Ɔwʋlʋ 1pʋ
(Israel Ɩlʋ 1-41)
Aha Yile Bʋ Ansigyi
1Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtamagyi aha lalahɛ asʋnsʋ,
ɔtamabwɛ lakpan abwɛpʋ bwɛhɛ,
ɔtamatsia ɔblɔla abwɛpʋtɔ.
2Tamɛ Nana Bulu atosunahɛsʋgyi tegyi mʋ ansɩ,
ɔtɔgywɩɩn mʋ́ ɩwɩ ɔpa-onye.
3Ogyi fɛ oyiá boswie mʋ́ ntsu ɔnɔ,
itoswie abi mʋ́ swiebɩ,
ɩtamakpa atɛ.
Togyitɔá ɔbwɛ tɔwa alɛ ha mʋ.
4Tamɛ aha lalahɛ bʋtamanya mʋ́ alɩ.
Bʋgyi fɛ ntɛtɛá afu dɛ mʋ́ tsʋn.
5Aha lalahɛ bʋméenya ɔlɩɩkpa Bulu asʋn ogyikpa.
Lakpan abwɛpʋ ɛ bʋméenya otsiakpa yile abwɛpʋtɔ.
6Tsufɛ Nana Bulu tɛkpa yile abwɛpʋ,
tamɛ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ mʋ́ bɛ́ta.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 2
Content:
Owieá Bulu Layaɩ
1Ntogyi sʋ ɔmá-ɔmá banya ɔblɔ,
bwɛ agywɩɩn kʋkʋ kpalɩ?
2Ɔmásʋ agyipʋ badɩda atɔ.
Wulu ahandɛ batɩ aba fia,
kɩta agywɩɩn lalahɛ Nana Bulu mʋa ɔha amʋʋ alada ofuli amʋsʋ.
3Bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Mlɩha alɛ ɩwɩ lɛ amʋ́ ɩbɩtɔ,
adalɩ amʋ́ ɔhɩɛ asɩ.”
4Anɩ Wie tsie ɔsʋsʋ mʋ owie-obiasʋ ɔdɛ amʋ́ mɔsɩ,
bwɛ amʋ́ ɔblɔla.
5Mʋ́ ɔma a, ɔbɛ́bla amʋ́ asʋn ɔblɔsʋ,
wa ɩyɩn wa amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ,
6“Mɩ mʋ́ nayaɩ mɩ owie
mɩ onuto ɩbʋ Sionsʋ.”
7Owie amʋ ɔbɛɛ, nɛ́bla mlɩ asʋn ánɩ́ Nana Bulu lablɩ.
Ɔlɛbla mɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Bi gyi fʋ.
Ndɛ nabwɛ fʋ Sɩ.”
8Kʋlɩ mɩ, nɔ́pʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́ ha fʋ;
fégyi mʋ́sʋ yeyi ɔyɩ ɔka.
9Fɔ́pʋ datɔ bwiebwie amʋ́
blublublu fɛ abʋa.
10Mʋ́ sʋ awie, mlɩtɩn ansɩ.
Ɩsʋ agyipʋ, mlɩkɩ wanklaan.
11Mlɩpʋ ifu sum Nana Bulu.
Ɩwɩ ɩkpɩnkɩ mlɩ, amlɩnya ansigyi.
12Mlɩba ɩwɩasɩ ha Bulu mʋ bi amʋ,
mɛnɩ oméenya ɔblɔ, mlɩmɛ́ɛta ɔkpatɔ.
Tsufɛ mʋ ɔblɔ tɔkɔsɩ wa ɩyɩn.
Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ bʋtɛsrɩ tanʋ mʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 3
Content:
Nana Bulu Ɩbɩtɔ Nkpahɔ Bʋ
Ɩkanfʋ-ɩlʋá Dawid lɔwa brɛá mʋ bi Absalom gya mʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ alupʋ badʋbɩ!
Adʋn bakʋsʋ mɩsʋ!
2Bʋdɛtɔɩ mɩsʋ bɛɛ,
“Bulu mɔ́ɔhɔ mʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ!”
Ɩya.
3Oo Nana Bulu, fʋlegyi ɩban wa mɩ.
Fʋgyi mɩ numnyam,
fʋtotsu mɩ ansɩtɔ fʋa.
4Nosu kpoli Nana Bulu kʋklʋkʋʋ.
Ɔlɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ tsu mʋ onuto ɩbʋ amʋsʋ.
Ɩya.
5Nɛklɛdɩ dɩdɩ.
Nalatsinki,
tsufɛ Nana Bulu togyo mɩ ɩwɩ.
6Alupʋ idu-lafa babomli mɩ,
mmɛdɛ amʋ́ ifu nya.
7Oo Nana Bulu, kʋsʋ. Mɩ Bulu, hɔ mɩ.
Tsufɛ fʋtɛda mɩ alupʋ lɛ da,
kpa awuntɔlɩnpʋ abɩn.
8Nana Bulu, fʋ ɩbɩtɔ nkpahɔ bʋ.
Ha fʋ oyula ɩba fʋ abisʋ.
Ɩya.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 4
Content:
Nokpoli Bulu Ɔtɔsɔ Mɩ Ɔnɔ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ ɔsankuo da mʋ́.
1Oo Bulu, nɩ nosu kpoli fʋ a, sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
Fʋtɛha ntegyi asʋ!
Brɛá mbʋ ɩkplantɔ a, fɛlɛ mɩ.
Wun mɩ nwɛ, afʋsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
2Oo anyankpʋsa, mlɩméesi mɩ kpɔɩ?
Mlɩméesi asʋn ánɩ́ ɩma labi ɔma gya, si afunu buo?
Ɩya.
3Mlɩbɩá Nana Bulu lalɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtamakpa mʋ ɔma yaɩ ha mʋ ɩwɩ.
Nɩ nokpoli mʋ a, ɔtɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
4Ɔblɔ ɩkɩta mlɩ a, ɩmáha amlɩbwɛ lakpan.
Nɩ mlɩda mlɩ ɔklansʋ a, mlɩbwɛ diin amlɩyɔ mlɩ ɩklʋntɔ.
Ɩya.
5Mlɩbɔ afɔdɩɛ wanklaan,
amlɩpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ.
6Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ,
“Ma ɔbɔ́bwɛ yile ha anɩ?”
Oo Nana Bulu, wa awɩtɔlɛ ha anɩ.
7Faha ansɩ lahɩɛ gyi mɩ,
dʋn ansɩá itegyi amʋ́
brɛá amʋ́ atogyihɛ pʋ́ amʋ́ nta labusʋ.
8Nɛ́klɛdɩ iwilwiitɔ, dɩdɩ fɛ́ɛ́.
Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ nkʋlɛ ɔbɛ́ha tɔtɔ mɔ́ɔbwɛ mɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 5
Content:
Nana Bulu Toyula Yile Abwɛpʋ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ ɔtɛntɛ fʋlɩ mʋ́.
1Oo Nana Bulu, yaa asʋ.
Nu mɩ asʋn, afʋnu mɩ isu.
2Mɩ Wie pʋ́ mɩ Bulu,
nu mɩ isu, afʋgyi mɩ bʋalɛ,
tsufɛ fʋ ndesu kpoli.
3Oo Nana Bulu, bakɛ fónu mɩ ɔmɛ.
Nɔ́pʋ mɩ asʋn tswɩ fʋ ansɩtɔ nyankɩ,
si ntsie ndɛ fʋ ansɩtɔ kɩ.
4Oo Bulu, lalahɛbwɛ tamagyi fʋ ansɩ.
Fʋtamafia lalahɛ abwɛpʋ.
5Fʋtamakleá fówun ɩwɩ atsupʋ.
Fʋtekisi lalahɛ abwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
6Fʋteyinta afunupʋ,
fʋtekisi aha amɔpʋ pʋ́ aha amlɛpʋ.
7Tamɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ,
nébitiwie fʋ woyitɔ.
Nɔ́pʋ ifu bun sum fʋ fʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ.
8Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ asʋn da ɔkpa.
Mɩ alupʋ bɔdʋbɩ.
Mʋ́ sʋ kpa mɩ, ambwɛ fʋ ɔdwɛla.
Suna mɩ fʋ ɔkpa, antsʋn mʋ́sʋ.
9Bʋtamablɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ kʋkʋ.
Lalahɛ pɛ bʋ amʋ́ ɩklʋntɔ.
Amʋ́ ɔnɔtɔ asʋn blɩhɛ tobon fɛ fuli ɔbɔtɔ.
Bʋtɔpʋ amʋ́ ɔnɔ mlɛ aha.
10Oo Bulu, ha amʋ́ ɩpɔn!
Amʋ́ onuto agywɩɩn lalahɛ ɩtɩ lowu ha amʋ́.
Amʋ́ lakpan tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ pʋ́ alɩá bakʋsʋ lɩɩ fʋsʋ,
sʋ gya amʋ́ lɛ fʋ ansɩsʋ.
11Tamɛ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋtɛsrɩ tanʋ fʋ fɛ́ɛ́ abʋnya ansigyi.
Ha amʋ́ abʋwa ansigyi ɩlʋ.
Bun amʋ́sʋ, mɛnɩ ansɩ bégyi fʋ adwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
12Tsufɛ Nana Bulu, fʋtoyula yile abwɛpʋ.
Fʋ awɩtɔlɛ legyi ɩban bomli amʋ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 6
Content:
Nana Bulu, Damli Kɩ Mɩ Afʋtsa Mɩ Ɩlɔ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ ɔsankuo ɔmɛ ikwesɩ da mʋ́.
1Oo Nana Bulu, máwa ɩyɩn wa mɩ ɔblɔsʋ.
Mákʋla ɔblɔ bɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ!
2Nahɩɛ pɔn, sʋ wun mɩ nwɛ.
Awútɔ dɛ mɩ dwiindwiin, lawa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn.
3Oo Nana Bulu, ifu dɛ mɩ ɔkla.
Máha mʋ́ ɩwa ɔpá asa afʋtsa mɩ ɩlɔ.
4Nana Bulu, damli kɩ mɩ afʋhɔ mɩ nkpa.
Fʋ ɔdwɛ ma ɔka. Mʋ́ sʋ lɛ mɩ tsu lowutɔ.
5Tsufɛ ɔha owu a, ɔtamatra kaɩn fʋsʋ.
Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ kanfʋ fʋ afulitɔ?
6Ahʋmɩtɩ dɛ mɩ mɔ.
Onyegyionye nɛklɛdɩ ntosu,
fɔ mɩ sumuɛ mɩɔn-mɩɔn-mɩɔn.
7Mɩ alupʋ baha nasu alɩɩ,
mɩ ansibi lapunya tin.
Mmɛdɛ atɔ wun.
8Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ, mlɩnatɩ tɛɩ mɩsʋ,
tsufɛ Nana Bulu lanu mɩ isu.
9Alanu mɩ isu,
ɔbɔ́sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
10Pɛlɩ bɛ́kɩta mɩ alupʋ fɛ́ɛ́, ifu bɛ́kɩta amʋ́.
Bɔ́pʋ nsʋpa yinki ɔma ɔsasʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 7
Content:
Nana Bulu Gyi Aha Fɛ́ɛ́ Asʋn Ogyipʋ
Benyaminyin Kus ɩwɩ awɩrɛhɔ-ɩlʋá Dawid lɔwa ha Nana Bulu.
1Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, fʋ nasrɩ tanʋ.
Hɔ mɩ, afʋlɛ mɩ tsu aha ánɩ́ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbɩtɔ.
2Nɩ megyi alɩ bɛ́kɩta mɩ,
tɩtɩ mɩ fɛ gyata;
mma ɔhɔpʋ.
3Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu,
nɩ nawa ɩbɩ lalahɛtɔ,
4nɩ napʋ lalahɛ ka mɩ ba kɔ,
ntɛ nasisi mɩ olupʋ kʋkʋ kpalɩ.
Nɩ napʋ ɩnɩtɔ ɩkʋ gyi ɔkʋ fiin.
5Mʋmʋ ha mɩ alupʋ abʋdɩnka mɩsʋ, abʋnya mɩ.
Bʋtsatsa mɩsʋ,
abʋsʋpa mɩ fuli.
Ɩya.
6Nana Bulu, pʋ ɔblɔ kʋsʋ lɩɩ.
Mɩ Bulu kʋsʋ, mɩ alupʋ bawa ɩyɩn.
Fʋlɔpʋ asʋngyi ba.
7Ha ɔmá-ɔmá abʋbefia fʋ ansɩtɔ,
afʋtsia fʋ owie-obiasʋ ɔsʋsʋ gyi amʋ́ asʋn.
8Nana Bulu, fʋgyi ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ asʋn ogyipʋ.
Oo Nana Bulu, gyi ha mɩ, tsufɛ mɩ asʋn da ɔkpa.
Ɔlala ɩma mɩ ɩwɩ.
9Bulu, ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ fʋgyi.
Fʋtɛkali anɩ agywɩɩn pʋ́ anɩ ɩklʋntɔ asʋn.
Ka lalahɛ abwɛpʋ tin,
afʋha yile abwɛpʋ abʋlɩɩ.
10Bulu legyi ɩban wa mɩ.
Mʋtɔhɔ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa.
11Asʋn ogyipʋ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ Bulu gyi.
Ɔtɛlɛ mʋ ɔblɔ suna ekekegyiɛkɛ.
12Nɩ bʋmɛtsɛ amʋ́ itsiatɔ a,
ɔbɛ́ya mʋ ɔdayi.
Alabɩtɩ mʋ ɔbɩn dodo.
13Alakʋla mʋ akɔtɔ akinkin tsan,
nɩna mʋ mbɩn pɩɔn-pɩɔn.
14Kɩ alɩá banya lalahɛ ɔmɛ́.
Lakpan ɔmɛ́ ɩdɛ amʋ́ dwiin.
Bɔ́kwɩɩ afunu.
15Bʋtokwi ɔbɔ, loti mʋ́tɔ klukluuklu,
amʋ́ onuto bʋtɛkpa wie mʋ́tɔ.
16Amʋ́ onuto lalahɛ teyinki ba amʋ́sʋ.
Amʋ́ owuntɔlɩn teyinki bobun amʋ́ nwunsʋ.
17Nɛ́da Nana Bulu ɩpan mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩwa sʋ.
Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ Nana Bulu, Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ mʋ Wie ɩda.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 8
Content:
Nana Bulu Ɩda Lɔkʋkʋ Moni
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ Gatfɔ ɔmɛ wa mʋ́.
1Oo anɩ Wie Nana Bulu, fʋ ɩda lɔkʋkʋ moni ɔyɩtɔ o!
Fʋ numnyam lɔfʋa dafa nwʋlʋta.
2Fasuna nyebi mʋ́a abi bɔbwɛ alɩá bʋkanfʋ fʋ.
Ɩlaha fʋ alupʋ bawun fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
Mʋ́ sʋ amʋ́a aha ánɩ́ bʋtamasi ɩla kie bakpa ɔnɔ bun.
3Nɩ notsu ansɩ kɩ ɔsʋsʋ, fʋ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ atɔ bwɛhɛ,
ɔtsra mʋ́a ntsrakpabiá fɔbwɛ dɩnka nwʋlʋtasʋ a,
4ntɛfɩtɛ mɩ ɩwɩ mbɛɛ,
“Ntɔ nyankpʋsa lɔkʋkʋ ogyi, sʋ fʋtɔgywɩɩn mʋ ɩwɩ alɩ?
Ntɔ nyankpʋsa gyi, sʋ fʋtɛkɩ mʋsʋ?”
5Fɛba mʋ asɩ dʋn fʋ abɔpʋ.
Fɔpʋ numnyam pʋ́ obú dɩnka mʋsʋ.
6Fɔbwɛ mʋ fʋ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ atɔ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ ogyipʋ,
fɔpʋ togyitɔ wa mʋ asɩ.
7Akufa, nnantswie pʋ́ pututɔ-mbwɩ fɛ́ɛ́;
8mbubwi mʋ́a ntsutso-aye
pʋ́ ntobiá bʋna ɔpʋtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
9Oo anɩ Wie Nana Bulu, fʋ ɩda lɔkʋkʋ moni ɔyɩtɔ o!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 9
Content:
Nana Bulu Gyi Ɔtanʋkpa Yile
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ obi-lowu ɔmɛ wa mʋ́.
1Nana Bulu, nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ tsu mɩ ɩklʋntɔ.
Nɛ́bla aha ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩá fabwɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
2Fʋ sʋ ansɩ bɛ́hɩɛ gyi mɩ.
Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie, nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɩda.
3Mɩ alupʋ bowun fʋ bʋteyinki ɔma,
dɩda wu,
4tsufɛ asʋn ogyipʋ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ fʋgyi.
Fatsia fʋ obiasʋ, gyi mɩ asʋn wanklaan ha mɩ.
5Bulu, fawa ɩyɩn wa ɔmá ánɩ́ bʋmeyin fʋ.
Faha lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bata,
tsitsi amʋ́ ada lɛ ɩnʋ plɩplɩplɩ.
6Anɩ alupʋ klɛtɔ lata fɛ́ɛ́.
Fabwie amʋ́ awulu fɛ́ɛ́.
Bʋmɛ́ɛtra tɩ amʋ́ ada ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
7Tamɛ Nana Bulu tsie brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Alayaɩ mʋ obia ha asʋngyi.
8Obégyi ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ asʋn mʋ́ ɔkpasʋ.
Obégyi ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́sʋ ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
9Nana Bulu gyi ɔtanʋkpa kinkin ha aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ amʋ́ hɩɛ.
Ɔtanʋkpa kinkin ogyi ha aha ánɩ́ bawie ɩkplantɔ.
10Oo Nana Bulu, aha ánɩ́ bʋyin fʋ ɩda bʋtɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ,
tsufɛ fʋtamatswɛ fʋ adunkapʋ kpʋkpʋ.
11Mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ Nana Buluá otsie Sion!
Mlɩda mʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔkan ɔmágyiɔmátɔ.
12Tsufɛ mʋtɛka ɔha ánɩ́ alawa ɩbɩ obugyatɔ ɩkɔ.
Ɔtamakina ipian awunpʋ isu nu.
13Oo Nana Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ!
Kɩ alɩá mɩ alupʋ bʋdɛ mɩ ipiantɔ wa!
Fʋtɛlɛ mɩ tsu lowu ɔbɔnɔ,
14mɛnɩ nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ Sionfɔ ofiakpa.
Ansɩ bégyi mɩ, tsufɛ fahɔ mɩ nkpa.
15Ɔmá-ɔmá bakpawie amʋ́ ɔbɔ kwihɛtɔ.
Amʋ́ onuto ayibi fɩnɩhɛ lalɛ amʋ́.
16Nana Bulu lalɛ ɩwɩ suna tsʋn mʋ asʋnbua ɔnɔkwalɩtɔ.
Aha lalahɛ amʋ onuto ɩbɩ ɔnɔ gyumagyihɛ lalɛ amʋ́.
Mlɩfʋlɩ ɩkpɛ amʋ kʋklʋ.
Ɩya.
17Afulitɔ ɩda gyo ɔmá lalahɛ
pʋ́ Bulu akisipʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
18Tsufɛ fʋmɛ́ɛtan ahianfɔsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ipian awunpʋ ɔkpakɩ ɛ ɩmɔ́ɔbwɛ kpalɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
19Oo Nana Bulu, kʋsʋ!
Máha nyankpʋsa ɔwa ɔkpayi fʋ ansɩtɔ ɔbɛɛ, magyi ɩsʋ.
Ɔmá-ɔmá bʋgyi ɩpɔn fʋ ansɩtɔ!
20Oo Nana Bulu, pʋ ifu wa amʋ́tɔ,
abʋbɩá anyankpʋsa kɛkɛ bʋgyi.
Ɩya.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 10
Content:
Nana Bulu Gyi Owie Brɛ Fɛ́ɛ́
1Oo Nana Bulu, ntogyi sʋ fawa ɩfɔ alɩ?
Ntogyi sʋ faŋain ɩwɩ brɛá anɩbʋ ɩkplantɔ?
2Aha lalahɛ bapʋ ɩwɩtsu bʋgya ahianfɔ.
Ha amʋ́ agywɩɩn lalahɛ ibufa amʋ́sʋ.
3Tsufɛ aha lalahɛ bʋtɔpʋ amʋ́ ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ tsu ɩwɩ.
Bʋtoyula aha asisipʋ, kpɔɩ Nana Bulu.
4Ɩwɩtsu sʋ bʋtamapʋ Bulu bwɛ tɔtɔ.
Amʋ́ agywɩɩn fɛ́ɛ́ gyi, “Bulu ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋ.”
5Togyitɔ tɔwa alɛ ha amʋ́ bregyibrɛ.
Bulu asʋnbua lɔfʋa dʋn amʋ́,
bʋmɛdɛ mʋ́ wun.
Amʋ́ alupʋ bʋmegyi tɔtɔ amʋ́ ansɩtɔ.
6Bʋtɛblɩ wa nwuntɔ bɛɛ,
“Tɔtɔ mɛ́ɛlɛ anɩ da.
Anɩmóowie ɩkplantɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”
7Ɩlwɩɩ mʋ́a afunu pʋ́ asʋn-sɩnsɩn blɩ bʋtegyi dɩ.
Asʋnkpan mʋ́a asʋn lalahɛ blɩ ma amʋ́ ɔpá.
8Bʋteŋain awulu nkusubisʋ mɔ aha ánɩ́ ɔlala ma amʋ́ ɩwɩ.
Bʋtɛtɛ aha ánɩ́ ɔkla ma amʋ́ ogya.
9Bʋteŋain fɛ ɔtapʋ dɛ ɔbwɩ tɛ,
gyo apɔnpʋ.
Bʋtɛfɩnɩ ayibi kɩta apɔnpʋ, bɩtɩa amʋ́ natɩ.
10Bʋtɛda apɔnpʋ lɛ da,
yia amʋ́ manta ɔsʋlʋtɔ mamaama.
11Aha lalahɛ anfɩ bʋtɛblɩ wa amʋ́ nwuntɔ bɛɛ,
“Bulu ansɩ mɛdɩn mʋ́sʋ.
Alabun ansibi. Omóowun mʋ́ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”
12Oo Nana Bulu, wa ɔsa bɩtɩ aha lalahɛ ɩsʋ,
afʋkaɩn ɩwɩɔsɩn awunpʋsʋ.
13Ntogyi sʋ aha lalahɛ basi Bulu ɔmagya,
bʋdɛblɩ wa nwuntɔ bɛɛ, “Ɔmɛ́ɛbɩtɩ anɩ ɩsʋ?”
14Tamɛ togyitɔ ɩda fʋ ansɩtɔ,
tsufɛ fʋdɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn pʋ́ ipian awunpʋ wun.
Fʋtekleá fɔ́bʋa amʋ́ bregyibrɛ.
Apɔnpʋ bʋtɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ,
fʋtegyi awumbi bʋalɛ bregyibrɛ.
15Kpa aha lalahɛ anfɩ pʋ́ awuntɔlɩnpʋ ɩba.
Bɩtɩ amʋ́ lalahɛá babwɛ ɩsʋ
yɛfʋn brɛá bési bwɛ.
16Nana Bulu gyi Owie brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɔmá bamba bata lɛ mʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
17Oo Nana Bulu, fʋtonu ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ isu.
Fʋtɔwa amʋ́ ɔwʋnlɩn, yaa asʋ nu amʋ́ asʋn.
18Fʋtegyi ha awumbi pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ amʋ́ hɩɛ,
mɛnɩ nyankpʋsa gyi-wʋdɩ, gyi-nfɔlɩ mɛ́ɛtra wa amʋ́ ifu.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 11
Content:
Aha Ánɩ́ Amʋ́ Asʋn Da Ɔkpa Obówun Bulu Ansɩtɔ
Dawid ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Nana Bulu nasrɩ tanʋ.
Ɔkpa mɔmʋsʋ mlɩdɛ mɩ bla mlɩaa,
“Wa ɔsa srɩ ŋain,
fɛ alɩá obubwi tofuli yɔ ɩbʋsʋ?
2Tsufɛ aha lalahɛ baklɩ amʋ́ ɩta, bɩtɩ mʋ́.
Baŋain okluntɔ bɔ́tswɩ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa.
3Nɩ bobwie ntswɩasɩ amʋ bun a,
ntɔ ɔha yile ɔbɛ́talɩ bwɛ?”
4Nana Bulu bʋ mʋ Ɔtswɛkpa.
Otsie mʋ owie-obiasʋ ɔsʋsʋ.
Ɔdɛ anyankpʋsa ánɩ́ bʋbʋ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ kɩ.
Odewun tɔá bʋdɛbwɛ.
5Nana Bulu tɛkapʋ yile abwɛpʋ pʋ́ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ kɩ,
tamɛ otekisi aha ánɩ́ bʋtekle owuntɔlɩn.
6Ɔbɛ́ha atonkodu mʋ́a agyawunuá ɩdɛhɔ bótswie wʋlɩ lakpan abwɛpʋsʋ.
Lɩlɩtɔ afuá mʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn ɔbɔ́pʋnuna amʋ́.
7Tsufɛ yile ɔbwɛpʋ Nana Bulu gyi.
Otekle yile.
Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa obówun mʋ ansɩtɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 12
Content:
Nana Bulu Asʋn Igyi Ɔnɔkwalɩ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ ɔsankuo ɔmɛ ikwesɩ da mʋ́.
1Nana Bulu, hɔ anɩ,
tsufɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋtama dalɩ Bulu ɔma bata!
Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ ɔkʋkʋ tra ɔma ɔyɩtɔ.
2Ɔhagyiɔha dɛ afunu wa suna mʋ ba.
Bʋbʋ ɔnɔwankɩ.
Amʋ́ wʋlɛwʋlɛ bogyoli nfɩ, batsula nana.
3Nana Bulu, ka anɔwankɩpʋ
pʋ́ ɩwɩatsupʋ itin.
4Amʋ́tɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Anɩ ɔdandʋ bɛ́lɛ anɩ.
Anɩbʋ ɔnɔ, ma ɔbɔ́dʋn anɩ?”
5Nana Bulu ɔbɛɛ, “Bʋdɛ owuntɔlɩn wa ahianfɔsʋ,
aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ bʋdesu.
Mʋ́ sʋ nɔ́kʋsʋ ngya!
Négyi ɩban wa nkpa adunkapʋ.”
6Nana Bulu asʋn igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ.
Igyi fɛ sika fututuá baŋlaɩn mʋ́,
dɩnkɩ ipi lɛ mʋ́ ansɩtɔ tse sienɔ.
7Oo Nana Bulu, gyo anɩ ɩwɩ,
afʋlɛ anɩ tsu ndɛmba-abi anfɩ ɩbɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
8Aha bʋbuo lalahɛ.
Mʋ́ sʋ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋdɛtsʋntsʋn.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 13
Content:
Mɩ Bulu, Damli Kɩ Mɩ, Afʋsɔ Mɩ Ɔnɔ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, ɔmɛnkɛ fɛ́damli kɩ mɩ?
Fatan mɩsʋ fɛ́ɛ́?
Ɔmɛnkɛ fɛ́lɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna mɩ?
2Nwa nwɛ mɩ klʋntɔ yɛfʋn ɔmɛnkɛ?
Ngywɩɩn ɔpa mʋ́a onye yɛfʋn ɔmɛnkɛ?
Mɩ alupʋ bʋgyi mɩsʋ yɛfʋn ɔmɛnkɛ?
3Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, damli kɩ mɩ; afʋsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
Ha mɩ ansɩsʋ ɩtɩtɩ mɩ, mɛnɩ mmɛ́ɛdɩdɩ sin mʋ́tɔ.
4Mɛnɩ mɩ olupʋ mɛ́ɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Nadʋn mʋ”,
ansɩ méegyi amʋ́ ánɩ́ nadɩda.
5Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ mɩ ansɩ ɩdɩn fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka amʋsʋ.
Ansɩ bégyi mɩ, tsufɛ fahɔ mɩ nkpa.
6Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ ha Nana Bulu,
tsufɛ alawa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 14
Content:
Ansɩ Ɩhɩɛ Gyi Israelfɔ
Dawid ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Aha mimlahɛ nkʋlɛ dɛ amʋ́ ɩwɩ bla bɛɛ,
“Bulu má ɩnʋ.”
Bayinta. Bamli mbusuo abɔpʋ.
Ɔbakʋlɛ kʋraa mɛ́dalɩ amʋ́tɔ.
2Nana Bulu tɛkɩ anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ sɩsɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ,
kɩ bɛɛ, menya ɔtɩansɩpʋ ɔkʋá
otodunka mʋ ɔkpa.
3Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ badamli ɔma ha Bulu.
Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔkpa motswii.
Yile ɔbwɛpʋ ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋ.
Ɔbakʋlɛ kʋraa mɛ́dalɩ amʋ́tɔ.
4Mʋ́ sʋ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋmóonu asʋn asɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ?
Bʋdɛ mɩ aha wɩ fɛ iye bʋdɛwɩ,
bʋtamasu kpoli mɩ.
5Tamɛ ifu bɛ́hɩɛ kɩta amʋ́ ɩnʋ,
tsufɛ Bulu buo yile abwɛpʋ.
6Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ, mlɩteyinta ahianfɔ nhɩhɩɛ,
tamɛ Nana Bulu gyi amʋ́ okpikplikpa.
7Nhɩɛ ndɛ Nana Bulu kokoli mbɛɛ,
ɔkʋ otsu Sionbʋsʋ bɔhɔ Israelfɔ.
Ɛkɛá Bulu ɔbɛ́latsu mʋ aha kʋsʋ a,
ɩhɩɛ wa Yakob abi-aná ɔdwɛ,
ansɩ ɩhɩɛ gyi Israelfɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 15
Content:
Bulu Ɔtswɛkpa Otsiapʋ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, ma ɔbɔ́swɩɩ fʋ tati-obuto?
Ma obétsia fʋ onuto ɩbʋ amʋsʋ?
2Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlala ma mʋ ɩwɩ,
ɔtɔbwɛ yile;
ɔtɛblɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ tsu mʋ ɩklʋntɔ.
3Ɔtamatsii aha,
ɔtamapʋ lalahɛ gyi mʋ aba.
Ɔtamatɩn mʋ aba ɔnɔ,
4otekisi lalahɛ abwɛpʋ.
Mboun otobu Nana Bulu ifu anyapʋ,
ɔtamaka ntam yinki ɔma, nɩ lowutɔ igyi o.
5Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtamafɛ kɔba,
ɔtamatsula abʋha mʋ nta,
ɔdamli ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa asʋn bun.
Tɔtɔ má ɩnʋá ɩbɛ́ha ɔha ánɩ́ ogyi alɩ ɔbɛ́dɩda ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 16
Content:
Nana Bulu Gyi Mɩ Ogyikpa
Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, hɔ mɩ;
tsufɛ fʋ nasrɩ tanʋ.
2Nabla Nana Bulu mbɛɛ, “Fʋgyi mɩ Wie.
Mma itoyile kʋkʋʋkʋ dʋn fʋ.”
3Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ gyi anumnyampʋá
mɩ ansɩ tɛhɩɛ gyi amʋ́ ɩwɩ.
4Aha ánɩ́ bʋbuo ɩkpɩ
bʋtekle asʋn tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ha amʋ́ ɩwɩ.
Mmɔ́ɔwa ɩbɩ amʋ́ afɔdɩɛ obugyatɔ.
Mmɔ́ɔpʋ amʋ́ ɩkpɩ ada dɩnka mɩ ɔnɔsʋ.
5Nana Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ ogyikpa
pʋ́ togyitɔá ɩbɔ́fʋn mɩ.
Fʋtogyo mɩ ɔsʋlʋ ha mɩ.
6Ɔsʋlʋ amʋʋ bɔbɔɩ ha mɩ amʋ legyi mɩ ansɩ.
Lɛlɛ, mbʋ ogyikpa wanklaan!
7Nɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu, mʋtosuna mɩ asʋn.
Mɩ ɩklʋn ɛ tɔtɔɩ kpla mɩ onye.
8Mɩ ansɩ dɩn Nana Bulusʋ bregyibrɛ.
Ɔlɩɩ mɩ gyɔpɩsʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ tɔtɔ ɩmɛ́ɛlɛ mɩ da.
9Mʋ́ sʋ ansɩ tegyi mɩ,
mɩ ɔkla ɛ dɛ ansigyi nya.
Tɔtɔ mɛdɛ mɩ han,
10tsufɛ fʋméesi mɩ wa afulitɔ.
Mmɔkʋkpa fʋ ɔma.
Mʋ́ sʋ fʋmɛ́ɛha mmɔ́ɔplɔ.
11Fósuna mɩ nkpa ɔkpa.
Fʋ wa ansigyiá ɩlɔfʋn bʋ.
Fʋ gyɔpɩsʋ ansigyiá ɩma ɔka bʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 17
Content:
Bulu, Ŋain Mɩ Fʋ Abambasɩ
Dawid mpaɩ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, nu asʋn ánɩ́ ɩda ɔkpa,
afʋnu mɩ isu!
Nu mɩ mpaɩ,
imotsu ofunupʋ ɔnɔ.
2Gyi mɩ asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ,
afʋpʋ ansɩ kɩ tɔá ɩda ɔkpa.
3Fʋtɛtɛtɛ mɩ klʋntɔ kɩ,
fʋtɛsɩna mɩ onye sɔ mɩ kɩ.
Tamɛ fʋmɔkʋwun tsitsa kʋkʋ mɩtɔ.
Nahɩɛá asʋkpan kʋkʋ ɩmɛ́ɛdalɩ tsu mɩ ɔnɔ.
4Fɛ alɩá akʋ bʋtɔbwɛ a,
mɩ mʋ́ ndɛ fʋ mblatɔ.
Ntamabwɛ awuntɔlɩnpʋ bwɛhɛ.
5Nna fʋ ɔkpasʋ bregyibrɛ.
Mmɔkʋsrɛɩ dalɩ ɔkpa amʋsʋ.
6Oo Bulu, nasu kpoli fʋ,
tsufɛ fɔ́sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
Yaa asʋ, afʋnu mɩ mpaɩ.
7Lɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka suna alɩá ɩbɔ́wa ifu.
Fʋtɔpʋ fʋ gyɔpɩ hɔ aha ánɩ́ basrɩ tanʋ fʋ,
lɛ amʋ́ alupʋá bakʋsʋ lɩɩ amʋ́sʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
8Gyo mɩ ɩwɩ, fɛ alɩá fʋtogyo fʋ nsibi klambi.
Ŋain mɩ fʋ abambasɩ.
9Lɛ mɩ tsu aha lalahɛá bʋgya mɩ ɩbɩtɔ,
tsu adʋn ánɩ́ bakafia mɩ ɩbɩtɔ.
10Nwewun kʋkʋ ɩma amʋ́tɔ.
Bʋtɔtɔɩ ɩwɩtsusʋ.
11Basrɩ gya mɩ, kafia mɩ.
Bʋdɛ ɔkpa dunka ánɩ́ bɛ́lɛ mɩ da kpla.
12Baka gyo mɩ, fɛ gyata ánɩ́ akʋn dɛ mʋ.
Fɛ gyata ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ lafɩnɩ ogyo ɔbwɩ.
13Oo Nana Bulu, kʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩ alupʋsʋ,
afʋba amʋ́ asɩ.
Pʋ fʋ ɔdayi kɔ hɔ mɩ,
tsu aha lalahɛ anfɩ ɩbɩtɔ.
14Pʋ fʋ tumi hɔ mɩ lɛ aha anfɩ ɩbɩ.
Hɔ mɩ tsu aha anfɩ banya ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ ogyikpa anfɩ ɩbɩ.
Amʋ́ lanya ɩwɩ gyi sian amʋ́ abi,
ɩlasian ha amʋ́ aná.
15Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ a, mɩ asʋn da ɔkpa. Mʋ́ sʋ nówun fʋ ansɩtɔ.
Nɩ netsinki wun fʋ tsiatɔ a, nɔ́mwɛ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 18
Content:
Nana Bulu Ɔkpa lɔfʋn, Mʋ Asʋn Fɛ́ɛ́ Bʋ Mʋ́tɔ
Dawid ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Ɩlʋá Nana Bulu osumbi Dawid lɔpʋda mʋ ɩpan brɛá ɔlɛlɛ mʋ tsu mʋ alupʋ pʋ́ Saul ɩbɩ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔwapʋ;
ntɛhɩɛ dwɛ fʋ.
2Fʋgyi mɩ ɩbʋ fʋahɛ, mɩ oŋainkpa kpikpli pʋ́ mɩ ɔlɛpʋ.
Mɩ Bulu, mɩ ɩbʋta ánɩ́ ntɛsrɩ tanʋ.
Mɩ ɩwɩ ɩban, mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ánɩ́ ɔtɔhɔ mɩ nkpa pʋ́ mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin.
3Ntosu kpoli Nana Bulu,
ɩkanfʋ mʋ wie.
Ɔtɔhɔ mɩ lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
4Lowu ɩfla lɔwa kɩta mɩ.
Ntsuá ɩbʋ ɩyɩn lɔbʋla kɩta mɩ.
5Afulitɔ ɔyɔɩ lemli mɩ,
lowu agbla lɛkɩta mɩ.
6Nosu kpoli Nana Bulu brɛá mbʋ ɩkplan anfɩtɔ.
Nɔkplʋn kpoli mɩ Bulu mbɛɛ, ɔlɛ mɩ.
Olonu mɩ isu mʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ.
Mɩ okitikiti lɔtʋ mʋ.
Mɩ isu lowie mʋ asʋtɔ.
7Ɩnʋ ɔsʋlʋ lɛkan ɩwɩ, kpɩnkɩ.
Abʋ tsitsi ɛ lɛka ɩwɩ kpɩnkɩ,
tsufɛ ɔblɔ dɛ mʋ.
8Mʋ ɔwɔntɩtɔ ɩdɛ ogyasi,
ogya plɛnplɛn ánɩ́ mʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn dɛdalɩ tsu mʋ́ ɔnɔtɔ.
Agyawunuá ɩdɛhɔ lɛdalɩ tsu mʋtɔ.
9Ɔlɛnɛ ɔsʋsʋ, kplɩ ba ayasɩ.
Oklun tuun bun mʋ ayabiasɩ.
10Ɔlɛdɩnka kerubsʋ, fuli ba.
Ɔlɛdɩnka afu bambisʋ ba hwim.
11Ɔlɔpʋ oklun bun ɩwɩ.
Nyankpʋ mʋ́a agyinde tuun lobomli mʋ.
12Mʋ ɩwɩ lɔwankɩ.
Nsaɩntɔ lɛkpa ogya, atsufolibi lotswie
tsu mʋ ɩwɩwankɩ amʋtɔ tsʋn agyinde amʋtɔ ba.
13Nana Bulu lɛha ɔprada lɔpʋtɩ ɔsʋsʋ.
Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie ɔmɛ lɛlɩn.
Nsaɩntɔ lɛkpa ogya, atsufolibi lotswie.
14Ɔlɔtswɩ mʋ mbɩn da mʋ alupʋ saɩn.
Ɔlɛha nsaɩntɔ lɛkpa ogya, begyigya.
15Nana Bulu, fɔwa ɩyɩn, si ɔŋɛ da fwɩfwɩ;
ɔpʋ bʋnkpatɔ lɛya.
Ɔsʋlʋ ntswɩasɩ lɛdɩ yaya.
16Fɔtswɩ ɩbɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ kɩta mɩ,
bɩtɩa mɩ lɛ ntsu kluklutɔ.
17Ɔlɛlɛ mɩ tsu mɩ ɔdʋkplakpatɩ ɩbɩtɔ,
lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩ,
tsufɛ bʋhɩɛ bʋdʋn mɩ.
18Bowie mɩtɔ ɛkɛá mbʋ ɩkplantɔ,
tamɛ Nana Bulu lɔbwɛ mɩ ɔma ɔlɩɩpʋ.
19Ɔlɛlɛ mɩ, pʋ mɩ ba ɔtɛɩkpa,
tsufɛ mɩ asʋn tegyi mʋ ansɩ.
20Mɩ yilebwɛ sʋ Nana Bulu legyi mɩ bʋalɛ.
Ɔlala ɩma mɩ ɩwɩ.
Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔpʋ yile ka mɩ ɩkɔ.
21Tsufɛ nagyi Nana Bulu asʋnsʋ.
Mmɔkʋbwɛ lakpan yinki mɩ Bulu ɔma.
22Ntegyi mʋ mblasʋ.
Mmɔkʋsi mʋ amandɩɛ tswɩ.
23Ɔlala ɩma mɩ ɩwɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ.
Ntɛkɩ mɩ ɔtsakpa, mɛnɩ mméegyi ɩpɔn.
24Mɩ yilebwɛ sʋ Nana Bulu lagyi mɩ bʋalɛ.
Ɔlala ɩma mɩ ɩwɩ.
Mʋ́ sʋ alapʋ yile ka mɩ ɩkɔ.
25Fʋtegyi ɔnɔkwalɩ ha ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ.
Fʋma ɔlala ha ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlala ma mʋ ɩwɩ.
26Fʋtɛlɛ fʋ ɩklʋntɔ wankɩhɛ suna ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ ɩklʋntɔ lɔwankɩ.
Fʋyin alɩá fʋtɔpʋkpa ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ ɔkpa lɔnɔ.
27Tsufɛ fʋtɔhɔ ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ nkpa,
tamɛ fʋtɛba ɩwɩ atsupʋ asɩ.
28Lɛlɛ, fʋtɛha mɩ ɔkandɩɛ tɔwankɩ.
Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, fʋtɛha mɩ oklun temli wankɩ.
29Fʋ sʋ ntɛtalɩ gyi adʋnsʋ.
Ɩna fʋ sʋ ntɛtalɩ fuli nyankɩ abuntisʋ bwie awulu.
30Bulu mʋ́ a, mʋ ɔkpa lɔfʋn.
Tɔá ɔlɛhɩɛ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋ mʋ́tɔ.
Otegyi ɩban wa ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛsrɩ tanʋ mʋ.
31Tsufɛ Nana Bulu ɔma a, Bulu ɔmɔmʋ bʋ ɩnʋ?
Bulu ɔma a, bʋta mɔmʋ bʋ ɩnʋ?
32Mʋtɔwa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn,
ɔtɛha ɔkpatɔ tolwii ha mɩ pisii.
33Mʋlɔwa mɩ ayabi ɔwʋnlɩn fɛ nani,
pʋ mɩ lɩɩ ɔfʋakpa.
34Mʋtosuna mɩ ɩbɩ ɩsa kɔ,
ntɛtalɩ nɛ kɔɔbrɩ ɩta.
35Oo Nana Bulu, fʋlegyi ɩban wa mɩ,
hɔ mɩ nkpa.
Fʋ gyɔpɩ ɩbɩ lɛkɩta mɩ lɩɩ.
Fʋlaba ɩwɩasɩ, ha mɩ nabwɛ ɔha kpɔnkpɔntɩ.
36Fɔtɔ ɔkpa ha mɩ,
mɩ otebi mɔtswɩ tsɛlɛ.
37Nɛdɩnka mɩ alupʋsʋ yɛkɩta amʋ́.
Mmeyinki ɔma yɛfʋn brɛá bɛta fɛ́ɛ́.
38Nobwie amʋ́ bun mɩ ayabiasɩ,
bʋmɛtalɩ tra kʋsʋ.
39Tsufɛ fɔwa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ha ɩsakɔ.
Fɛba mɩ adʋn asɩ, pʋ amʋ́ wa mɩ asɩ.
40Fɛha mɩ alupʋ bɛsanki amʋ́ yama srɩ.
Nɔmɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ ɩsa kɔ.
41Bosu kpoli, tamɛ ɔhɔpʋ ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋ.
Bosu kpoli Nana Bulu ɛ, tamɛ ɔmɛkpla amʋ́.
42Nɔkwɛ amʋ́ pukupuku, fɛ otutu afu ansɩtɔ.
Nɛtsɛɩ amʋ́ wʋlɩ, fɛ dɩnsʋ ipi.
43Adʋn bɔkʋsʋ mɩsʋ, fɔhɔ mɩ lɛ amʋ́ ɩbɩ.
Fɛyaɩ mɩ ɔmá-ɔmá ɔkpapʋ.
Aha ánɩ́ mmeyin kʋraa bosum mɩ.
44Afɔɔ bɔwɔ awunu mɩ ansɩtɔ.
Benya nu mɩ ɔmɛ pɛ bagyi mʋ́sʋ.
45Atɛtɔ lowu amʋ́,
bʋdɛkpɩnkɩ kpakpakpakpa wɔ dalɩ amʋ́ oŋainkpa.
46Nana Bulu tsie nkpa!
Bʋkanfʋ mɩ bʋta.
Bʋtsu mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu fʋa.
47Bulu tɛka mɩ alupʋ ɩkɔ.
Ɔtɛba ɔmá-ɔmá asɩ, pʋ amʋ́ wa mɩ asɩ.
48Mʋtɛlɛ mɩ lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩ.
Fotsu mɩ fʋa dʋn amʋ́;
fɛlɛ mɩ lɛ awuntɔlɩnpʋ ɩbɩ.
49Oo Nana Bulu, ɩnɩ sʋ nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ ɔmá-ɔmá ansɩtɔ.
Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɩda.
50Fʋtɛha fʋ owie ɩsʋgyi akpɔnkpɔntɩ.
Fʋtɛlɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka suna mɩ Dawid ánɩ́ fada ofuli
mʋa mʋ abi-aná brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 19
Content:
Nana Bulu mbla lɔfʋn
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Kɩ alɩá ɔsʋsʋ ɩdɛ Bulu numnyam ɔwan lɛ,
pʋ́ alɩá nwʋlʋta lakʋkʋ ɩdɛ Bulu atɔ bwɛhɛ lɛ suna.
2Ekekegyiɛkɛ ɩdɛ mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ.
Onyegyionye ɛ ɩdɛ mʋ lɛ suna.
3Bʋmɛdɛ ɔblɩ kʋkʋ blɩ,
bʋmɛdɛtɔɩ,
tamɛ anɩdɛ mʋ asɩ nu.
4Amʋ́ ɔmɛ towie ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́,
amʋ́ asʋn tɔyɔ ɔyɩ ɔka.
Bulu labwɛ otsiakpa nwʋlʋtasʋ ha owi.
5Ɔtɛdalɩ tsu ɩnʋ fɛ ɔka pɔpwɛ otsiapʋ
dɛdalɩ mʋ obutotɔ.
Ansɩ tegyi mʋ fɛ ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ oyetsii ɔsrɩ.
6Ɔtɔkʋsʋ tsu nwʋlʋta ɔka yewie mʋ́ ɔka.
Ɔtɛkplɩ yewie fʋnka nyɔsɩ.
Tɔtɔ tamaŋain mʋ okunku.
7Nana Bulu atosunahɛ lɔfʋn.
Ɩtɔwa ɔha ɩklʋn ɔwʋnlɩn.
Mʋ ɔnɔlɛ igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ.
Ɩtɛha ɔha mimlahɛ tɛtɩn ansɩ.
8Nana Bulu mbla ɩda ɔkpa,
ɩtɛha ansɩ tegyi ɔha.
Mʋ mbla lɔwankɩ.
Ɩtɛtɩtɩ ɔha ansɩsʋ.
9Nana Bulu ifunya bʋ alɛ.
Ɩbʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ asʋnbua igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ.
Mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ da ɔkpa.
10Ɩbʋ ibia dʋn sika pɛpɛ.
Ɩdʋn sika pɛpɛ onuto-onuto.
Ɩbʋ ɔdwɛ dʋn ɔkwɛn.
Ɩbʋ ɔdwɛ dʋn akwatabitɔ ɔkwɛn.
11Ɩtɛda mɩ fʋ osumbi ɔla.
Mʋ́sʋ gyi ɩhɩɛ bʋ labi kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ.
12Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ wun tsitsa ánɩ́ mabwɛ?
Si mɩ lalahɛá mmowun kie mɩ.
13Máha mɩ fʋ osumbi anfɩ ankɩansɩ bwɛ lakpan.
Máha mʋ́ igyi mɩsʋ, mɛnɩ ɔlala méetsia mɩ ɩwɩ.
Fówun mméegyi ɩpɔn ánɩ́ nabwɛ lakpan kpɔnkpɔntɩ.
14Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ ɩbʋta pʋ́ mɩ ɔkalɛpʋ,
ha mɩ ɔnɔtɔ asʋn pʋ́ mɩ asʋn susuhɛ
igyi fʋ ansɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 20
Content:
Nana Bulu Ɔsɔ Fʋ Ɔnɔ Fʋ Ɔkplankɛ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Nana Bulu ɔsɔ fʋ ɔnɔ fʋ ɔkplankɛ.
Buluá anɩ nain Yakob losum ogyo fʋ ɩwɩ.
2Ɔpʋ mbʋa sɩsɩ fʋ tsu mʋ otsiakpa,
ɔwa fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn tsu Sion.
3Ɔkaɩn fʋ atɔ-abi-afɔdɩɛ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ,
fʋ mbwɩ tɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ ɛ igyi mʋ ansɩ.
Ɩya.
4Ɔha fʋ tɔá fʋ ɩklʋn dedunka,
ɔha tɔá fʋdekle ɩba mʋ́tɔ ha fʋ.
5Fʋ ɩsʋgyi sʋ abɔ́sʋra okitikiti ansigyisʋ.
Abótsu anɩ ɔfranka fʋa anɩ Bulu ɩdatɔ.
Nana Bulu ɔha fʋ fʋ atɔ kʋlɩhɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
6Sei nabɩá Nana Bulu tɔhɔ ɔha ánɩ́ alada mʋ ofuli.
Ɔtɔpʋ mʋ nkpahɔ tumi sɔ mʋ ɔnɔ,
tsu mʋ otsiakpa ɔsʋsʋ.
7Akʋ bʋtɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka mpɔnkɔsʋ,
akʋ bʋtɔpʋdɩnka akekesʋ.
Tamɛ anɩ mʋ́ anɩ ansɩ dɩn Nana Bulu, anɩ Bulu amʋ ɩdasʋ.
8Amʋ́ mʋ́ bɛ́tɩn da,
tamɛ anɩ mʋ́ abɔ́kʋsʋ lɩɩ tikpa.
9Oo Nana Bulu, ha owie ogyi ɩsʋ.
Asu kpoli fʋ a, sɔ anɩ ɔnɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 21
Content:
Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie Ɔdwɛ Ɩma Ɔka
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, owie lanya ansigyi fʋ ɩsʋgyi sʋ.
Kɩ alɩá awútɔ lakʋkʋ sankɩ mʋ.
2Tɔá ɔlɔkʋlɩ tsu mʋ ɩklʋntɔ faha mʋ a.
Fʋmekina tɔá ɔlɛfɩtɛ fʋ.
Ɩya.
3Tsufɛ foyula mʋ, yile lefia mʋ.
Fɔpʋ sika pɛpɛpa bun mʋ nwun.
4Ɔlɔkʋlɩ nkpa, fɛha mʋ nkpa tɩntɩn;
obétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
5Ɩsʋgyiá fɛha mʋ sʋ alahɩɛ nya numnyam.
Fapʋ obú dɩnka mʋsʋ, tsu mʋ ansɩtɔ fʋa.
6Ee, faha mʋ oyula ánɩ́ ɩmɛ́ɛka itin.
Fʋ wa tsia tɛhɩɛ kana mʋ,
7tsufɛ owie lɔpʋ mʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ.
Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ, ɔmɛ́ɛha mʋ ɔmɛ́ɛdɩda ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
8Fʋ ɩbɩ bɛ́da fʋ alupʋ.
Fʋ gyɔpɩ bénya fʋ adʋn.
9Nɩ fɛba a, fɔ́pʋ obuntɔ ogya hɔ amʋ́.
Fɔ́pʋ ɔblɔ mɛ amʋ́, ogya bɔ́hɔ amʋ́.
10Fɛ́ha amʋ́ asɩ bɛ́ta lɛ ɔyɩtɔ.
Amʋ́ abi-aná bʋmɛ́ɛtra tsia anyankpʋsatɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
11Nɩ bosuan fʋsʋ,
ntɛ kʋsʋ fʋsʋ a, bʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ.
12Fɔ́wa amʋ́ ifu, bɛ́srɩ;
tsufɛ fɔ́pʋ fʋ ɔbɩn sʋta amʋ́.
13Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn sʋ, aha bʋtsu fʋ fʋa.
Fʋ hayinhɛgyi sʋ abɔ́wa ɩlʋ, da akwɛ kanfʋ fʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 22
Content:
Nana Bulu Bʋ Iwiegyi
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ bakɛ nani ɔmɛ wa mʋ́.
1Mɩ Bulu, mɩ Bulu, ntogyi sʋ fakpa mɩ ɔma?
Nasu kpoli fʋ nwɛsʋ,
tamɛ mɩ Ɔhɔpʋ Bulu, fawa ɩfɔ mɩ wa.
2Mɩ Bulu, ntokpoli fʋ ɔyɩkɛhɛ,
fʋtamanu mɩ isu.
Ntamasi fʋ kpoli onye,
tamɛ ɩwɩ molwii mɩ.
3Tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ fʋna ɔtsan.
Israelfɔ kanfʋ gyi fʋ obia.
4Fʋsʋ anɩ anain bɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka.
Bɛdɩnka ansɩ fʋsʋ,
fɛlɛ amʋ́ tsu ɩkplantɔ.
5Fʋ bosu kpoli, fɛlɛ amʋ́.
Fʋsʋ bɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka,
pɛlɩ mɛkɩta amʋ́.
6Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ a, nyambi ngyi.
Mmegyi nyankpʋsa.
Ɩwɩ nyankɩla ngyi ha anyankpʋsa.
Ɔhaa tamafia mɩ.
7Ɔhagyiɔha owun mɩ
ɔtɔbwɛ mɩ ɔblɔla.
Bʋtenyankpa ansɩtɔ,
kpʋkpʋ nwuntɔ, blɩ bɛɛ,
8“Mʋ ansɩ dɩn Nana Bulusʋ, ɔhɔ mʋ.
Mʋ ansɩ tegyi mʋ ɩwɩ.
Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛ mʋ!”
9Fʋlɛlɛ mɩ tsu mɩ yin opunitɔ.
Fɛha nɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ brɛá ndenyɔpʋ.
10Besi mɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ tsu brɛá bɔkwɩɩ mɩ.
Tsu mɩ yin iputɔ ɔpá fʋgyi mɩ Bulu.
11Máwa ɩfɔ mɩ ɩwɩ, tsufɛ ɩkplan latʋ mɩ ta.
Ɔhɔpʋ má mɩ ɩnʋ.
12Mɩ alupʋ bakafia mɩ, fɛ nnantswie yinhɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ.
Basan ɔmátɔ nnantswieá bʋbʋ ifu babomli mɩ.
13Mɩ alupʋ anfɩ bayaa ɔnɔ gblaun wa mɩ.
Fɛ gyata ɔtrapʋ dekpoun, ɔdɛ ɔbwɩá alakɩta tɩtɩ.
14Mɩ ntsantsin yɔyɔɔyɔ, fɛ ntsu batsɛɩ wʋlɩ.
Mɩ ɩklʋn labwɛ fɛ okpin, ɩlaŋlaɩn wa mɩ ɩwɩtɔ.
15Ɔwʋnlɩn lata mɩtɔ fɛ planfɔ.
Mɩ ɔdandʋ laklɩ mɩ ɔnɔtɔ.
Faha nda lowu ɔbɔnɔ.
16Akɩaɩ bakafia mɩ.
Aha lalahɛ bada ɔbʋn wa mɩ.
Amʋ́ ayín lafuti mɩ ɩbɩ pʋ́ mɩ ayabi fɛ gyata.
17Nɛ́talɩ kla mɩ awú fɛ́ɛ́.
Mɩ alupʋ bówun mɩ, lɛ ansɩ yi mɩsʋ.
18­­Beye mɩ atadɩɛ ha aba,
bɔtswɩ abi mɩ atadɩɛ tɩntɩnsʋ.
19Oo Nana Bulu, máwa ɩfɔ mɩ ɩwɩ,
mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔwapʋ, wa ɔsa bɔhɔ mɩ.
20Hɔ mɩ lɛ ɔdayi ɔnɔ.
Hɔ mɩ ɔkla ɔkʋkʋnʋ ɔkʋlɛ lɛ akɩaɩ anfɩ ɩbɩ.
21Lɛ mɩ tsu agyata anfɩ ɔnɔ.
Tsú akpokpo anfɩ bʋbʋ ɩyɩn anfɩ nsiebi ɔnɔ.
22Nɛ́kla fʋ bwɛhɛ suna mɩ apio.
Nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ anɩ ɔpasuatɔ.
23Nana Bulu ifu anyapʋ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ.
Yakob abi-aná, mlɩwa mʋ numnyam.
Israel abi-aná, mlɩbu mʋ.
24Tsufɛ ɔtamakɩ ohiani mʋ ipian owunkɛ, ki nwun.
Ɔtamadamli ɔma ha mʋ.
Osu kpoli mʋ a, ɔtɔsɔ mʋ ɔnɔ.
25Fʋtɛha ntɛkanfʋ fʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ anɩ ɔpasuatɔ.
Nɛ́ka fʋ ɩkɔá notsula fʋ ifu anyapʋ ansɩtɔ.
26Aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ bégyi mwɛ.
Fʋ adunkapʋ bɛ́kanfʋ fʋ.
Ɩwa alɛ ha amʋ́ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́!
27Nana Bulu, ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́kaɩn fʋsʋ, damli kɩ fʋ.
Abusuangyiabusuan bósum fʋ.
28Tsufɛ Nana Bulu bʋ iwiegyi.
Mʋdɛ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́sʋ gyi.
29Ɔyɩtɔ ɩwɩ atsupʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́ba ɩwɩasɩ sum mʋ.
Aha ánɩ́ bowun ánɩ́ bʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ hɔ amʋ́ ɩwɩ nkpa fɛ́ɛ́,
pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bóbowu bóbun sum mʋ.
30Abi-aná fɛ́ɛ́ bósum mʋ.
Bɛ́blɩ mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn suna amʋ́ aná.
31Bɛ́da mʋ yilebwɛ ɔkan suna aha ánɩ́ bɛ́bɛlɩn ánɩ́ mʋlabwɛ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 23
Content:
Nana Bulu Gyi Mɩ Ɔkpapʋ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Nana Bulu gyi mɩ ɔkpapʋ.
Tɔtɔ mɛdɛ mɩ hian.
2Ɔtɛkpa mɩ yɔtswɩ atɔ ogyikpa ɩfa mlɔɔtɔ.
Ɔtɛkpa mɩ ya ntsuá ɩdɛtsʋn pʋtɔɔ ɔnɔ.
3Ɔtɛlawa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn.
Ɔtɛkpa mɩ tsʋn ɔkpa wanklaansʋ, mʋ ɩdatɔ.
4Nɩ nna tsonkolitɔ, oklun tuuntɔ kʋraa a,
ntamanya tɔtɔ ifu.
Tsufɛ fʋbʋ mɩ wa.
Fʋtɔpʋ fʋ okpetin pʋ́ fʋ oyi yiahɛ gyo mɩ ɩwɩ,
ɩklʋn tolwii mɩ.
5Fatswɩ ɔpʋnʋ mɩ alupʋ ansɩtɔ ha mɩ.
Faklɩ mɩ aba.
Mɩ onunwe labʋla, idetsitsa.
6Ee, yile mʋ́a ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bóbuo mɩ, mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Fʋ woyi ɔbɔ́bwɛ mɩ otsiakpa mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 24
Content:
Ma Ɔbɔ́dʋ Nana Bulu ɩbʋ Amʋ?
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Nana Bulu bʋ ɔsʋlʋ pʋ́ mʋ́sʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɔyɩ mʋ́a mʋ́tɔ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋgyi mʋ klɛ.
2Tsufɛ ɔlɔwa ɔyɩ ntswɩasɩ dɩnka ɔpʋsʋ,
oleyi mʋ́ dɩnka ntsusʋ.
3Ma ɔbɔ́dʋ Nana Bulu ɩbʋ amʋ?
Ma ɔbɛ́lɩɩ mʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ?
4Ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ ɩbɩ fʋtʋʋ, mʋ ɩklʋntɔ lɛtɩn;
ɔtamatswɛ ɩkpɩ, ntɛ pʋ ɔnɔlɩ ka ntam.
5Mʋgyi ɔha ánɩ́ Nana Bulu obóyula.
Mʋ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu ɔbɛ́ha asʋ.
6Aha anfɩ gyi aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ Nana Bulu dunka,
bʋdekleá bówun Yakob Bulu amʋ nɩ.
Ɩya.
7Bulu ɔtswɛkpa aklʋn, mlɩfinki.
Bɩmbɩ ɔpá aklʋn, mlɩfinki ɩwɩ,
Numnyam Owie obitiwie.
8Ma gyi Numnyam Owie anfɩ?
Mʋgyi Nana Bulu, ɔha yinhɛ pʋ́ ɔwʋnlɩn mʋ wie.
Nana Bulu, ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ otumipʋ amʋ.
9Bulu ɔtswɛkpa aklʋn, mlɩfinki.
Bɩmbɩ ɔpá aklʋn, mlɩfinki ɩwɩ,
Numnyam Owie obitiwie.
10Ma gyi Numnyam Owie anfɩ?
Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu,
gyi Numnyam Owie amʋ nɩ.
Ɩya.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 25
Content:
Nana Bulu, Suna Mɩ Fʋ Ɔtsʋnkpa
Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Oo! Nana Bulu, fʋsʋ napʋ mɩ ɩklʋn dɩnka.
2Oo! mɩ Bulu, fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn.
Máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ.
Máha ansɩ igyi mɩ alupʋ mɩ sʋ.
3Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, pɛlɩ mɛ́ɛkɩta aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ansɩ dɩn fʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Aha ánɩ́ bʋtamagyi amʋ́ asʋn blɩhɛsʋ mboun pɛlɩ bɛ́kɩta.
4Oo Nana Bulu, ha mɩ ambɩ fʋ ɩkpa.
Suna mɩ fʋ ɔtsʋnkpa.
5Kpa mɩ ambuo fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ,
afʋsuna mɩ atɔ,
tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu.
Fʋ ansɩtɔ ndɛkɩ ɔyɩkɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
6Anɩ Wie Bulu, kaɩn fʋ nwewun pʋ́ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔkasʋ,
tsufɛ ɩbʋ nʋ tsu bɩmbɩ ɔpá.
7Nana Bulu, mákaɩn mɩ nyebitɔ lakpan mʋ́a mɩ bwɛhɛ lalahɛ.
Mboun fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ fʋ wanklaan sʋ kaɩn mɩsʋ.
8Ɔha wanklaan Nana Bulu gyi.
Mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa.
Mʋ́ sʋ otosuna lakpan abwɛpʋ ɔkpa.
9Ɔtɛkpa ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ, bʋtɔbwɛ yile.
Otosuna amʋ́ mʋ ɔkpa.
10Nana Bulu ɩkpa fɛ́ɛ́ igyi ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka mʋ́a ɔnɔkwalɩ,
ha mʋ ntam pʋ́ ɔnɔá ɔlɛlɛsʋ agyipʋ.
11Oo Nana Bulu! Fʋ ɩda sʋ si mɩ lalahɛ kie mɩ.
Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá ilomoni dʋbɩ.
12Ma tenya Nana Bulu ifu?
Mʋgyi ɔha ánɩ́ Nana Bulu tosuna ɔtsʋnkpa.
13Mʋ obétsia ɔdwɛtɔ,
mʋ abi-aná bégyi ɔsʋlʋ amʋ.
14Nana Bulu tɛlɛ mʋ nwuntɔ asʋn suna mʋ ifu anyapʋ.
Ɔtɛha bʋtɛbɩ mʋ ntam.
15Mɩ ansɩ dɩn Nana Bulusʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
tsufɛ mʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mɩ ayabi lɛ ayibitɔ.
16Damli ansɩ kɩ mɩ, afʋwun mɩ nwɛ.
Tsufɛ ɔbakʋlɛ ngyi.
Mɩ ɩla bʋ nwɛ.
17Nwɛla ɩtɔ mɩ klʋntɔ.
Lɛ mɩ tsu mɩ ɩkplantɔ.
18Kɩ mɩ ɩkplan pʋ́ mɩ asʋn wunhɛ,
afʋsi mɩ lalahɛ fɛ́ɛ́ kie mɩ.
19Kɩ alɩá mɩ alupʋ bʋhɩɛ bʋtsɔ,
bapʋ owuntɔlɩn bʋdɛ mɩ lu.
20Kpla mɩ ɔkla wa ɩwɩtɔ, afʋlɛ mɩ.
Máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ, tsufɛ fʋ nasrɩ tanʋ.
21Fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn, gyo mɩ ɩwɩ;
tsufɛ mɩ asʋn da ɔkpa, ɔlala ma mɩ ɩwɩ.
22Oo Bulu, lɛ Israelfɔ
lɛ amʋ́ ɩkplan fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 26
Content:
Nana Bulu, Gyi Mɩ Asʋn Ha Mɩ
Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Nana Bulu, gyi mɩ asʋn ha mɩ; tsufɛ ɔlala ma mɩ ɩwɩ.
Fʋsʋ nɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka, mmɛkɩ gyɔpɩ ntɛ bɩna.
2Oo Nana Bulu, sɔ mɩ kɩ.
Kɩ mɩ klʋntɔ, afʋkɩ mɩ nwuntɔ.
3Tsufɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka igya mɩ nkpa,
nna fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
4Mɩa afunupʋ anɩtamanatɩ.
Mmobuo apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ.
5Ntekisi aha lalahɛ ofiakpa yɔ.
Mɩa lalahɛ abwɛpʋ anɩtamatsia.
6Nana Bulu, ntɔfwɩ ɩbɩ pʋsuna ánɩ́ lalahɛ kʋkʋ ma mɩ ɩwɩ,
asa ntɛba bobomli fʋ afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩ,
7wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ kʋklʋkʋʋ,
pʋlɛ fʋ ofula fɛ́ɛ́ suna.
8Nana Bulu, fʋ woyitɔ,
igyi fʋ numnyam otsiakpa bʋ mɩ ɔdwɛ.
9Mámɔ mɩ manta lalahɛ abwɛpʋsʋ.
Mámɔ mɩ manta obugya atsitsapʋsʋ.
10Amʋ́gyi aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔgywɩɩn lalahɛ,
ŋaintɔ-atɔhɔ labʋla amʋ́ gyɔpɩ.
11Mɩ mʋ́ ɔlala ma mɩ ɩwɩ.
Gyi mɩ bʋalɛ, afʋhɔ mɩ.
12Nlɩɩ ɔtantasʋ.
Nɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ anɩ ɔpasuatɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 27
Content:
Nana Bulu, Fʋ Ndedunka
Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Nana Bulu tɔwankɩ mɩ ɔkpasʋ, ɔtɔhɔ mɩ nkpa.
Ma nénya ifu?
Nana Bulu ntɛsrɩ tanʋ mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ma ɔbɛ́ha opuni bétsii mɩ?
2Nɩ aha lalahɛ, alupʋ pʋ́ adʋn bɔkʋsʋ bɛɛ bɔ́wɩ mɩ a,
bósutin dɩda kpla.
3Ɩsa akɔpʋ bɛkafia mɩ kʋraa a, opuni méetsii mɩ.
Nɩ ɩsa ɩda mɩsʋ kʋraa a, nɔ́pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ.
4Toku kʋlɛ pɛ ndɛ Nana Bulu kʋlɩ.
Mʋ́ ɔkpa négya.
Mʋ́gyi; nétsia mʋ woyitɔ mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́,
pʋ mɩ ansibi wun alɩá ɔbʋ alɛ,
gywɩɩn mʋ́ ɩwɩ mʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ.
5Tsufɛ ɔbɔ́pʋ mɩ ŋain mʋ otsiakpa mɩ ɔkplankɛ.
Obéŋain mɩ mʋ woyitɔ.
Obótsu mɩ dɩnka ɩbʋta fʋahɛsʋ, mɛnɩ mɩ alupʋ bʋméenya mɩ.
6Mʋ́ sʋ négyi adʋn amʋʋ bɛkafia mɩ klinklin amʋsʋ.
Nɔ́pʋ ansigyi bɔ afɔdɩɛ mʋ otsiakpa.
Nɔ́pʋ ɔmɛá ɩbʋ anulɛ wa ɩlʋ, da ɔsankuo ha mʋ.
7Nana Bulu, nosu kpoli fʋ kʋklʋkʋʋ a, nu.
Wun mɩ nwɛ, afʋsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
8Mɩ ɩklʋn ɔbɛɛ, “Dunka mʋ!”
Mʋ́ mbɛɛ, “Nana Bulu, fʋ ndedunka.”
9Mápʋ ansɩtɔ ŋain mɩ.
Mápʋ ɔblɔ wuta mɩ fʋ osumbi tɛɩa fʋ ɩwɩ.
Fʋgyi mɩ ɔbʋapʋ.
Mátswɩ mɩ tsalɩfwɩ.
Mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu, mákpa mɩ ɔma.
10Tsufɛ mɩ sɩ mʋa mɩ yin basi mɩ tswɩ,
tamɛ Nana Bulu mʋ́ ɔbɔ́hɔ mɩ.
11Nana Bulu, mɩ alupʋ sʋ suna mɩ fʋ ɔkpa,
afʋkpa mɩ tsʋn ɔkpa tswiihɛsʋ.
12Mási mɩ, ankpa wie mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ,
tsufɛ adansɩfɔ afunupʋ bakʋsʋ mɩsʋ, bʋdɛ mɩ huna.
13Nahogyiá nówun Nana Bulu alɛ
asa nówu.
14Dɩnka ansɩ Nana Bulusʋ,
afʋwa ɩwɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. Nya ɩklʋn, afʋkɩ Nana Bulu ɔkpa!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 28
Content:
Nana Bulu Tɔwa Mʋ Ɔmá Ɔwʋnlɩn
Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Mɩ ɔtanʋkpa Nana Bulu, fʋ ndesu kpoli.
Mátila asʋ.
Nɩ fɛkpa ɔnɔ bun a, nɔ́bwɛ fɛ ɔha wuhɛ.
2Nɩ nosu kpoli fʋ a, wun mɩ nwɛ.
Nɩ nɛtɩnkɩ ɩbɩ sɩsɩ fʋ ɔwankɩkpatɔ-ɔwankɩkpa ɩnʋ a, nu mɩ kokoli.
3Mábɩtɩa mɩ tsɩa lalahɛ agyipʋ, lakpan abwɛpʋ anfɩtɔ natɩ.
Amʋ́a amʋ́ aba bɛkan wanklaan,
tamɛ amʋ́ ɩklʋntɔ tepi ma alɛ.
4Pʋ amʋ́ bwɛhɛ pʋ́ amʋ́ tsiatɔ lalahɛ ka amʋ́ ɩkɔ.
Susu amʋ́ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ agyʋma pʋha amʋ́.
Ka amʋ́ ɩkɔ amʋ́ gyumagyihɛ ɔnɔ.
5Tsufɛ bʋtamawun mʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ pʋ́ mʋ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ gyumagyihɛ.
Obóbwiebwie amʋ́ bun, ɔmɛ́ɛtra lapwɛ amʋ́ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
6Ɩkanfʋ ɩbwɛ Nana Bulu klɛ,
tsufɛ alanu mɩ isu.
7Nana Bulu gyi mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. Mʋtegyi ɩban wa mɩ.
Mʋsʋ mɩ ɩklʋn dɩn, ɔtɔbʋa mɩ.
Ansigyi labʋla mɩ ɩklʋn, napʋ mɩ ɩlʋ ndɛ mʋ ɩpan da.
8Nana Bulu tɔwa mʋ ɔmá ɔwʋnlɩn.
Mʋgyi ɔtanʋkpa ha mʋ owieá alada ofuli.
9Nana Bulu, hɔ fʋ ɔmá!
Ha ɩwa alɛ ha fʋ aha, bʋgyi fʋ ogyikpa amʋ.
Bwɛ amʋ́ ɔkpapʋ, afʋtsu amʋ́ pia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 29
Content:
Nana Bulu Ɩda Bʋ Numnyam
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Ɔsʋsʋ atumipʋ, mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu.
Mlɩpʋ numnyam mʋ́a ɔwʋnlɩn ha mʋ.
2Nana Bulu ɩda bʋ numnyam, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ.
Mlɩda akpawunu ha mʋ, tsufɛ mʋ nkʋlɛ lɔwankɩ.
3Nana Bulu ɔmɛ lalɩn ɔpʋsʋ.
Numnyam Bulu ɔmɛ lapʋtɩ fɛ ɔprada.
Nana Bulu ɔmɛ lapʋtɩ ntsu akpɔnkpɔntɩsʋ.
4Mʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn,
ɩbʋ numnyam.
5Mʋ ɔmɛ tebiabia Lebanon ndum.
Itebiabia Lebanon odum akpɔnkpɔntɩ blublublu.
6Ɔtɛha Lebanon abʋ tofuli kpayi fɛ okufabi.
Sirion ɩbʋ ɛ tofuli kpayi fɛ ɔkpalabi.
7Mʋ ɔmɛ ɩpʋtɩ a,
ogya tɛdalɩ.
8Mʋ ɔmɛ tɔpʋtɩ kpɩnkɩ adimbi ɔsʋlʋ.
Ɩtɛkpɩnkɩ Kades adimbi ɔsʋlʋ ɛ.
9Nana Bulu ɔmɛ tɔpʋtɩ fiala ndum.
Ɩtɛkpakpa nyi atɛ.
Mʋ ɔtswɛkpa atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtɔkplʋn blɩ bɛɛ, “Onumnyampʋ!”
10Nana Bulu dɛ iwiegyi ntsu bʋlahɛsʋ.
Otsie mʋ owie obiasʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
11Nana Bulu tɔwa mʋ ɔmá ɔwʋnlɩn,
ɔtɔpʋ iwilwii yula amʋ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 30
Content:
Bulu Awɩtɔlɛ Ɩtsɔ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋá bɔ́wa pʋfinki Bulu otsiakpa ɔnɔ.
1O Nana Bulu, nótsu fʋ fʋa,
tsufɛ fʋlalɛ mɩ, fʋmɛha mɩ alupʋ abʋmɔsɩ mɩ.
2Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, nosu tɩ fʋ
fɛtsa mɩ ɩlɔ.
3Nana Bulu, fʋlɛlɛ mɩ tsu afulitɔ;
fetsinki mɩ, mmowie ɔbɔtɔ.
4Mlɩá mlɩtamakpa mʋ ɔma, mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ ɩda,
tsufɛ mlɩyin ánɩ́ ogyi ɔtsan.
5Tsufɛ Bulu ɔblɔ tamawa ɔpá.
Mʋ awɩtɔlɛ ɩtsɔ ɔha nkpatsiatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɔha tosu onye, tamɛ ɔtɛlamɔsɩ nyankɩ.
6Brɛá ɩlɔwa alɛ ha mɩ a, nɛblɩ mbɛɛ,
“Tɔtɔ mɛ́ɛtalɩ mɩ.”
7Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ awɩtɔlɛ laha nlɩɩ kinkiinkin fɛ ɩbʋ.
Tamɛ brɛá fɔpʋ fʋ ansɩtɔ ŋain a, opuni letsii mɩ.
8Nana Bulu, fʋ nosu kpoli.
Mɩ Wie, nokokoli fʋ mbɛɛ,
9“Ntɔ labi mɩ lowu ɩbɔ́wa ha fʋ nɩ nɔyɔ afulitɔ?
Mɩ ɩsɩ bɛ́talɩ kanfʋ fʋ?
Ɩbɛ́talɩ da fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɔkan?
10Nana Bulu, nu, afʋwun mɩ nwɛ.
Oo Nana Bulu, gyi mɩ bʋalɛ.”
11Faha mɩ isu lamli ɩtsa.
Fakpa tati bibi lɛ mɩ ɩwɩ, pʋ ansigyi dɩda mɩ.
12Mɛnɩ mɩ ɔkla ɔmɛ́ɛkpa ɔnɔ bun, si ɩlʋ wa kanfʋ fʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, nɛ́da fʋ ɩpan brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 31
Content:
Ɔtanʋkpa Kpikpli
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Nana Bulu, fʋ nasrɩ tanʋ.
Máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Yile ɔbwɛpʋ fʋgyi, sʋ hɔ mɩ.
2Yaa asʋ ha mɩ, afʋwa ɔsa lɛ mɩ!
Bwɛ mɩ ɩbʋta ánɩ́ nɛ́srɩ tanʋ.
Oŋainkpa kpikpliá ɩbɔ́hɔ mɩ nkpa.
3Fʋgyi mɩ ɩbʋta pʋ́ mɩ oŋainkpa kpikpli.
Fʋ ɩda sʋ gya mɩ nkpa, afʋkpa mɩ.
4Lɛ mɩ lɛ yibiá bafɩnɩ mɩtɔ,
tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa.
5Napʋ mɩ ɔŋɛ wa fʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
Oo! Nana Bulu, Bulu Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ, fahɔ mɩ.
6Ntekisi ɩkpɩ atswɛpʋ.
Mɩ mʋ́ ntɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋ Nana Bulusʋ.
7Fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ
ɩwɩ bɛ́sankɩ mɩ, nénya ansigyi.
Tsufɛ fawun mɩ ɩkplantɔ, fabɩ mɩ asʋn wunhɛ.
8Fʋmɔkʋsi mɩ wa mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
Mboun fapʋ mɩ lɩɩ ɔtɛɩkpa.
9Ao Nana Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ, tsufɛ mbʋ ɩkplantɔ.
Nasu punya ansibi,
ɔŋɛ lata mɩ.
10Isu lagyi mɩ nkpasʋ.
Nawa nwɛ mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mɩ lakpan sʋ ɔŋɛ lata mɩ, awútɔ labwiebwie mɩ.
11Mɩ alupʋ sʋ namli tɔá ɩbʋ nyanya.
Nabwɛ ɔfɔɔ mɩ aba ansɩtɔ.
Aha bowun mɩ brɔnʋsʋ bʋsrɩ.
12Batan mɩsʋ fɛ ɔha wuhɛ.
Namli fɛ planfɔ.
13Nanu mɩ ɩwɩ afunu tsɔtsɔɔtsɔá aha bʋdɛwa.
Tɔá ɩbʋ ifu labomli mɩ.
Bakan mɩsʋ ánɩ́ bɛ́ka mɩ nkpa itin.
14Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ a, Oo Nana Bulu, fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn.
Ndɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Fʋgyi mɩ Bulu.”
15Mɩ nkpa bʋ fʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
Lɛ mɩ tsu mɩ alupʋ pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
16Wa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ, fʋ osumbi.
Pʋ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka hɔ mɩ.
17Nana Bulu, máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ.
Tsufɛ fʋ ndekpoli.
Pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha lalahɛ, abʋkpa ɔnɔ bun yɔ afulitɔ.
18Bʋtotsu ɩwɩ, bʋtɔtɔɩ aha yilesʋ, nya amʋ́ nyanya.
Mʋ́ sʋ kpa amʋ́ ɔnɔ bun.
19Atɔ wanklaan ánɩ́ fapʋyaɩ fʋ ifu anyapʋ lɔkʋkʋ moni o.
Fapʋha fʋ atanʋpʋ aha ansɩtɔ.
20Féŋain amʋ́ fʋ wa si aha ánɩ́ basusu amʋ́sʋ,
lɛ amʋ́ lɛ ɩla alɛpʋ ɔnɔ.
21Ɩkanfʋ ɩbwɛ Nana Bulu klɛ,
tsufɛ ɔlɛhɩɛ lɛ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka suna mɩ
brɛá adʋn bɛkafia mɩ wulu, mma tɔtɔ bwɛtɔ.
22Ɩnʋ opuni letsii mɩ nɛblɩ mbɛɛ,
“Alasi mɩ wa ɔkpa”,
tamɛ brɛá nosu kpoli mʋ a, olonu mɩ ɔmɛ.
23Aha ánɩ́ mlɩtamakpa Nana Bulu ɔma fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩdwɛ mʋ.
Bulu tɛkpakpa ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ ɩwɩsʋ ipi,
tamɛ ɔtɛhɩɛ bɩtɩ ɩwɩ atsupʋ ɩsʋ.
24Mlɩ aha ánɩ́ mlɩdɛ Nana Bulu ɔkpa kɩ fɛ́ɛ́,
mlɩwa ɩwɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, mlɩtomi, amlɩwa ɩklʋn.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 32
Content:
Aha Yile Ansɩ Igyi Bulu Ɩwɩ
Dawid atosuna ɩlʋ.
1Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ Bulu lasi mʋ lakpan kie mʋ,
bun ansibi mʋ lakpansʋ.
2Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ Nana Bulu mɔ́hɔ mʋ lalahɛ,
afunu ɩma mʋtɔ.
3Tsufɛ brɛá nekina mɩ lakpan lɛ blɩ a,
nosu ekekegyiɛkɛ alɩɩ wʋlɩ lɛ akankawu.
4Tsufɛ fɛbɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ ɔpa mʋ́a onye.
Ɔŋɛ lɛta mɩ awútɔ, fɛ alɩá ntsu tɛkpɩ awikpanbɩ.
Ɩya.
5Ɩnʋ nɛlɛ mɩ lakpan fɛ́ɛ́ bla fʋ.
Mmesi kʋkʋ ŋain fʋ.
Nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Nɛ́lɛ mɩ lakpan fɛ́ɛ́ bla Nana Bulu.”
Ɩnʋ fesi mɩ ɩsʋbɩtɩ kie mɩ.
Ɩya.
6Mʋ́ sʋ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa fʋ ɔma fɛ́ɛ́ abʋsu kpoli fʋ, brɛá bɛ́talɩ nya fʋ.
Mɛnɩ nɩ ntsu ɩbʋla alɩágyialɩá kʋraa a, ɩmɛ́ɛkɩta amʋ́.
7Oŋainkpa fʋgyi ha mɩ,
fʋtogyo mɩ ɩwɩ ɩkplanbɩ.
Falɛ mɩ, pʋ mʋ́ ɩlʋ bomli mɩ.
Ɩya.
8Ɩnʋ Nana Bulu lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Nósuna fʋ asʋn-asɩnu pʋ́ ɔkpa ánɩ́ fɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ.
Nɔ́tɔɩ kpla fʋ, kɩ fʋsʋ.
9Mábwɛ fɛ ɔpɔnkɔ ntɛ ɔpɔnsʋraá omeyin tɔtɔ.
Nkɛtɩ fapʋ datɔbi mʋ́a mʋ́ ɩwɩ ɔfɛ wa mʋ ɔnɔtɔ, bɩtɩa mʋ asa ɔtɛba fʋ wa.”
10Ɔha lalahɛ ipian ɩhɩɛ tsɔ,
tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ a,
ɔbɔ́pʋ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka gyi ɩban wa mʋ.
11Aha yile, mlɩ ansɩ igyi Bulu ɩwɩ, amlɩtswɩ ope.
Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa, mlɩkplʋn kanfʋ mʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 33
Content:
Nana Bulu Asʋn Da Ɔkpa
1Yile abwɛpʋ, mlɩwa ɩlʋ ansigyisʋ ha Nana Bulu.
Ɩbʋ alɛá aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn ɩda ɔkpa bɛ́kanfʋ mʋ.
2Mlɩpʋ nsankuo kanfʋ mʋ.
Mlɩda ɩfɛ idu ɔsankuo,
amlɩwa ɩlʋ dɛdɛ ha mʋ.
3Mlɩwa ɩlʋ pɔpwɛ ha mʋ.
Mlɩda ɔsankuo amʋ wanklaan,
amlɩkplʋn ansigyisʋ ha mʋ.
4Tsufɛ Nana Bulu asʋn da ɔkpa.
Mʋ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ.
5Otekle yilebwɛ pʋ́ asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka labʋla ɔyɩ.
6Mʋ asʋn blɩhɛ ɔlɔpʋbwɛ ɔsʋsʋ,
Ɔnɔ kɛkɛ ɔlɛlɛ, ntsrakpabi fɛ́ɛ́ bɛdalɩ.
7Ɔlɛkpla ntsu fɛ́ɛ́ wa tsukʋlɛ bwɛ ɔpʋ.
Oletin mʋ́ wa tsukʋlɛ ha mʋ ɩwɩ.
8Ɔsʋlʋsʋ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́, bʋnya Nana Bulu ifu.
Ɔyɩtɔ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́, bʋbu mʋ.
9Tsufɛ ɔlɛblɩ, ɩlɛba mʋ́tɔ.
Ɔlɛlɛ ɔnɔ, ɩlɛlɩɩ kinkiinkin.
10Nana Bulu tɛha ɔmá-ɔmá asʋn tesin amʋ́ ɔnɔ,
oteyinta amʋ́ nhɩhɩɛtɔ.
11Nana Bulu asʋn mʋ́ ɩda brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ nhɩhɩɛ ɛ bʋ ɩnʋ yɛtʋ ɔha abi-aná fɛ́ɛ́.
12Ansɩ igyi ɔmá oduá Nana Bulu gyi amʋ́ Bulu.
Aha ánɩ́ ɔlɛlɛ pʋ́ amʋ́ bwɛ mʋ ogyikpa.
13Otowun atɔ tsu ɔsʋsʋ kein,
ɔdɛ anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ wun.
14Otsie mʋ obiasʋ ɔsʋsʋ,
ɔdɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ wun.
15Mʋlɔbwɛ okugyiɔkʋ ɩklʋn.
Mʋ́ sʋ otonu amʋ́ bwɛhɛ asɩ.
16Megyi ɩsa akɔpʋ ɔdʋdʋɔ tɛha owie tegyi ɩsʋ.
Megyi ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ onuto ɔwʋnlɩn tɛha mʋ ɔtɔyɔ ɩsa ba.
17Ɔpɔnkɔ megyi tɔtɔ ɩsa ɔkɔkɛ.
Mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn kpɔnkpɔntɩ amʋ ɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ hɔ ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ nkpa.
18Kɩ, Nana Bulu ansɩ dɩn aha ánɩ́ bʋtobu mʋsʋ.
Amʋ́gyi aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ansɩ dɩn mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔkasʋ.
19Ɔbɛ́lɛ amʋ́ tsu lowutɔ,
hɔ amʋ́ nkpa akʋnbɩ.
20Anɩdɛ Nana Bulu ɔkpa kɩ.
Mʋgyi anɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ pʋ́ anɩ ɩwɩ ɩban.
21Mʋ sʋ ansɩ dɛ anɩ gyi,
anɩ ansɩ dɩn mʋ ɩda wankɩhɛ amʋsʋ.
22Nana Bulu, ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ibuo anɩ,
fɛ alɩá anɩ ansɩ dɩn fʋsʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 34
Content:
Kɩ Fʋ Ɔnɔ, Ɩmáwa Afunu
Dawid ɩlʋá ɔlɔwa brɛá ɔlɔbwɛ ɩwɩ gbede ɔlɔpʋ Abimelek wa, olegya mʋ.
1Nɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ kanfʋ mɛ́ɛta mɩ ɔnɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
2Mʋ mɩ ɔkla tɔpʋtsu ɩwɩ.
Ipian awunpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋnu, abʋnya ansigyi.
3Mlɩtsa mɩ awa Nana Bulu numnyam.
Mlɩba abwɛ ɩkʋlɛ, atsu mʋ ɩda fʋa.
4Nosu kpoli Nana Bulu, ɔlɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
Ɔlɛlɛ mɩ tsu ifu kugyikʋtɔ.
5Aha ánɩ́ bʋtodunka mʋ ansɩtɔ tɛtɩn.
Pɛlɩ mɛ́ɛkɩta amʋ́ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
6Ɔwʋlaba anfɩ losu kpoli mʋ, olonu mʋ ɔmɛ,
lɛ mʋ tsu mʋ ɩkplan fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
7Nana Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ togyo aha ánɩ́ bʋtenya mʋ ifu ɩwɩ,
lɛ amʋ́ lɛ ɩkplantɔ.
8Da mʋ ɔnɔ kɩ, afʋbɩ alɩá ɔbʋ ɔdwɛ.
Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛtanʋ mʋ.
9Bulu aha, mlɩbu mʋ.
Tsufɛ tɔtɔɔtɔ tamahian aha ánɩ́ bʋtenya mʋ ifu.
10Ɩwɩ tɛklɩ gyata kʋraa, akʋn tɛkɩta mʋ.
Tamɛ itoyile kʋkʋ tamahian ɔha ánɩ́ otodunka Nana Bulu.
11Mɩ abi, mlɩba.
Mlɩyaa asʋ, mɩ ansuna mlɩ alɩá bʋtenya Nana Bulu ifu.
12Mlɩtɔ ma dɛ nkpa kle?
Ma nkpa tɩntɩn tsia tɛpɛ ansɩ,
odekleá obégyi ɔdwɛ mʋ nkpatɔ?
13Mʋmʋ kɩ fʋ ɔdandʋ, ɩmáblɩ asʋn lalahɛ.
Kɩ fʋ ɔnɔ, ɩmáwa afunu.
14Si lakpan bwɛ, afʋbwɛ tɔá ɩbʋ alɛ.
Dunka iwilwii, afʋgya mʋ́ ɔkpa.
15Nana Bulu ansɩ dɩn yile abwɛpʋsʋ,
otonu amʋ́ isu.
16Tamɛ ɔtɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ lalahɛ abwɛpʋsʋ.
Ɔbɔ́mɔ amʋ́ lɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
Ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtra kaɩn amʋ́sʋ.
17Yile abwɛpʋ bosu kpoli Nana Bulu a, otonu.
Ɔtɛlɛ amʋ́ tsu amʋ́ ɩkplantɔ.
18Ɔma ɩfɔ aha ánɩ́ ɩlakpɔn amʋ́ wa.
Ɔtɔhɔ aha ánɩ́ ɔkla lasrɩ amʋ́.
19Yile ɔbwɛpʋ asʋn wunhɛ ɩtsɔ,
tamɛ Nana Bulu tɛlɛ mʋ lɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
20Ɔtɛkɩ mʋsʋ,
mʋ iwu kʋlɛ kʋraa tamabia.
21Lalahɛ ɔbɔ́mɔ lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋ.
Bulu ɔbɛ́ha ɔha ánɩ́ otolu yile ɔbwɛpʋ ɩpɔn.
22Nana Bulu tɔhɔ mʋ aha nkpa.
Ɔtamaha aha ánɩ́ bʋtɛsrɩ tanʋ mʋ ɩpɔn.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 35
Content:
Nana Bulu Ɔma A, Ɔhaa Má Ɩnʋ
Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Nana Bulu, ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɛkʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩsʋ, kʋsʋ lɩɩ mʋsʋ.
Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɛ mɩ kɔ, kɔ mʋ!
2Kʋsʋ tsu fʋ akɔtɔ,
afʋtin amʋ́ ɔkpa!
3Tsu ɩkpan afʋfia aha amʋʋ bʋgya mɩ amʋ.
Bla mɩ ɔkla fɛɛ, “Mɩgyi fʋ nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ.”
4Sʋpa aha ánɩ́ bʋdekleá bɔ́mɔ mɩ,
pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ lalahɛ dunka, abʋyinki ɔma.
5Bʋbwɛ fɛ ntɛtɛá afu dɛ mʋ́ tsʋn,
Nana Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ ogya amʋ́.
6Ɔkpatɔ iklun wa amʋ́.
Mʋ́sʋ ɩwa ɔplɩ, Nana Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ ɔsrɩ gya amʋ́.
7Tsufɛ kʋkʋ kpalɩ bakwi ɔbɔ tswɩ mɩ,
fɩnɩ ɔtsatsii wa mʋ́tɔ.
8Ɩkplan ɩtʋ amʋ́, abʋkpa wie amʋ́ onuto ɔbɔ kwihɛ amʋtɔ,
abʋda yibi amʋtɔ.
9Nana Bulu sʋ ansɩ bégyi mɩ.
Ɩwɩ bɛ́sankɩ mɩ, tsufɛ alahɔ mɩ nkpa.
10Nɛ́lɛ mɩ klʋntɔ blɩ mbɛɛ,
“Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɔma ɔhaa má ɩnʋ.
Fʋtɛlɛ ɔpɔnpʋ lɛ ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ ɩbɩ,
lɛ ɔpɔnpʋ pʋ́ ohiani lɛ amʋ́ asisipʋ ɩbɩ.”
11Adansɩfɔ afunupʋ bakʋsʋ.
Ɩtɔá mmeyin mʋ́ ɩwɩ bʋdɛ mɩ fɩtɛ.
12Bapʋ lalahɛ ka mɩ yile ɩkɔ,
baha nawa nwɛ.
13Tamɛ nɩ amʋ́ mʋ́ bʋdɛlɔ a, ntɛdɩda tatida,
klɩ ɔnɔ, ko nwuntɔ wa bɔ mpaɩ ha amʋ́.
14Ntɔbwɛ fɛ mɩ pio, ntɛ mɩ nyawie ndɛ mpaɩ bɔ ha.
Ntɔwa nwɛ fɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɛ mʋ yin su.
15Tamɛ brɛá nowie ɩkplantɔ a, ɩlɔwa amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔdwɛ.
Bɛtsa bomli, bʋdɛ mɩ ɔblɔla bwɛ.
Aha ánɩ́ mmeyin amʋ́ dɛ mɩ ɔblɔla bwɛ,
bʋdɛ mɩ kpɔɩ kotoo.
16Aha aplɔɩpʋ bɔbwɛ mɩ ɔblɔla,
pɩɛɩ ayin suna mɩ.
17Oo anɩ Wie, mási tsia kɩ amʋ́.
Hɔ mɩ lɛ amʋ́ ɩbɩ,
afʋhɔ mɩ nkpa anfɩ ntamatsula mʋ́sʋ anfɩ lɛ agyata anfɩ ɩbɩ!
18Fówun nɛ́da fʋ ɩpan fʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ,
kanfʋ fʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ anɩ ɔpasuatɔ.
19Máha ansɩ igyi afunupʋá bʋdɛ mɩ lu kʋkʋ kpalɩ.
Máha mɩ alupʋ abʋkɩ mɩ atin brɛá ndesu.
20Tsufɛ bʋtamablɩ iwilwii asʋn.
Bʋtɛha aba ɔnɔ, ka asʋn dɩnka ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ aha lwiihɛsʋ.
21Batɛɩ amʋ́ ɔnɔtɔ gblauun, bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ,
“Ɛhɛɛn, anɩ onuto anɩlapʋ ansibi wun mʋ́!”
22Oo Nana Bulu, yɛ fʋdewun.
Mása ntsu wa ɔnɔ.
Mɩ Wie, máwa ɩfɔ mɩ wa.
23Mɩ Bulu pʋ́ mɩ Wie, kʋsʋ.
Kʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩ ɔma, mɛnɩ négyi asʋ.
24Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ fʋgyi.
Gyi mɩ asʋn ha mɩ.
Fówun ansɩ méegyi mɩ anyaba.
25Máha amʋ́ abʋblɩ wa ɩklʋntɔ bɛɛ,
“Ɛhɛɛn. Ɩnɩ anɩdedunka nɩ. Anɩlatu mʋ asɩ.”
26Pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha ánɩ́ mɩ ɩkplan bʋ amʋ́ ansigyi.
Ha amʋ abʋgyigya,
pɛlɩ mʋ́a nsʋpa ɩtʋ ɩwɩ atsupʋ anfɩ bʋdɛ ɩwɩ tsu suna mɩ anfɩ.
27Ansɩ igyi aha amʋʋ mɩ ɩsʋgyi bʋ amʋ́ ɔdwɛ amʋ.
Bʋkplʋn blɩ lablɩ bɛɛ, “Nana Bulu lomoni.
Mʋ osumbi yile tegyi mʋ ansɩ.”
28Nɛ́da fʋ yilebwɛ ɔkan,
kanfʋ fʋ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 36
Content:
Bulu Ɔdwɛá Ɩma Ɔka Lomoni
Dawid, Nana Bulu osumbi ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Lakpan tɔtɔɩ kpla owuntɔlɩnpʋ ɩklʋn.
Ɔtamatepi nya Bulu ifu.
2Tsufɛ ɩwɩtsu tɛha mʋ ɔtɛmlɛ ɩwɩ.
Ɔtamawun mʋ lakpan,
mɛnɩ obési bwɛ.
3Asʋkpan mʋ́a afunu sɔɔn tɛdalɩ mʋ ɔnɔ.
Ɔtamatra bwɛ ansɩtɩnla, ɔtamatra bwɛ yile.
4Ɔtɔgywɩɩn lalahɛ mʋ ɔklansʋ.
Bregyibrɛ ɔlɛda ɩwɩsʋ ha lalahɛbwɛ.
Mʋ́ sʋ ɔtamakina lalahɛ kʋkʋʋkʋ.
5Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka lɔfʋa wɔ ɔsʋsʋ.
Fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɛ ɩlɔfʋa wɔ nwʋlʋta.
6Fʋ yilebwɛ lɔfʋa fɛ abʋ akpɔnkpɔntɩ.
Fʋ asʋnbuatɔ bʋ oklu fɛ ɔpʋ ibuntɔ.
Oo Nana Bulu, fʋtɛkɩ anyankpʋsa mʋ́a mbwɩ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
7Oo Bulu, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka lɔkʋkʋ moni o.
Anyankpʋsa bʋteŋain fʋ abambasɩ.
8Fʋ woyitɔ atɔ ɩhɩɛ tsɔ. Mʋ́ fʋtɔpʋbʋla amʋ́.
Fʋtɛha amʋ́ bʋtonun fʋ ɔdwɛ-ntsu bregyibrɛ.
9Tsufɛ fʋ wa nkpa otsukpa bʋ.
Fʋ wankɩtɔ anɩtenya wankɩ tsu.
10Ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka itsia aha ánɩ́ bʋyin fʋsʋ,
afʋbwɛ yile ha aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa.
11Máha ɩwɩ atsupʋ abʋtsatsa mɩsʋ,
ntɛ awuntɔlɩnpʋ abʋwuta mɩ sɩsɩ.
12Kɩ awuntɔlɩnpʋ ɔdɩdakpa.
Amʋ́ bawuta da, kʋsʋ ma amʋ́ ɩnʋ a.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 37
Content:
Ɩwɩasɩ Abapʋ Obégyi Ɔsʋlʋ Amʋ
Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Mákpla lakpan abwɛpʋ.
Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ tɔtɔ mápɛ fʋ ansɩ,
2tsufɛ ɩmɔ́ɔwa ɔpá kʋkʋ bɔ́bʋ fɛ ɩfa,
wʋlɩ fɛ ɔsʋlʋkpan.
3Pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ, afʋbwɛ yile.
Tsia ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ, ɩwa alɛ ha fʋ.
4Ansɩ igyi fʋ Nana Bulu ɩwɩ,
mɛnɩ ɔbɛ́ha fʋ tɔá fʋ ɩklʋn dekle.
5Pʋ fʋ ɩwɩ wa Nana Bulu ɩbɩtɔ,
afʋpʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋsʋ, ɔbɔ́bwɛ mʋ́ ha fʋ.
6Ɔbɛ́ha fʋ yilebwɛ ɩbɛ́lɩn ɔwan fɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ,
fʋ asʋngyi ɛ ɩbɔ́wankɩ fɛ ɔpawi.
7Nya ɩklʋn ha Nana Bulu, tsia gyo mʋ.
Nɩ ɩdɛ alɛ wa ha ɔkʋ,
ntɛ ɔkʋ ɔtsʋn ɔkpa lalahɛsʋ nya ɩwɩ a, mákpla mʋ.
8Mánya ɔblɔ. Lɛ ɔblɔkpan lɛ fʋtɔ.
Mákpla mʋ, ɩtɛkpa ɔha wa lalahɛtɔ.
9Tsufɛ aha lalahɛ bɛ́ta,
tamɛ aha ánɩ́ bɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ obégyi ɔsʋlʋ anfɩ.
10Ɩlasi kpalobi aha lalahɛ bʋmɛ́ɛtra tsia.
Fódunka amʋ́ fʋmóowun amʋ́.
11Ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ obégyi ɔsʋlʋ amʋ,
ɩwɩ bɛ́hɩɛ lwii amʋ́.
12Ɔha lalahɛ tɛkan yile ɔbwɛpʋsʋ,
pɩɛɩ ayin suna mʋ,
13tamɛ anɩ Wie dɛ mʋ mɔsɩ,
tsufɛ oyin ánɩ́ mʋ nkɛ lawie woyi ta.
14Aha lalahɛ balɛ amʋ́ ɔflɛtɔ ɔdayi.
Babɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩta, bʋdekleá bɛ́lɛ ahianfɔ pʋ́ apɔnpʋ da;
abʋmɔ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa.
15Bulu ɔbɛ́ha amʋ́ onuto ɔdayi békpie amʋ́ ɩklʋn,
amʋ́ ɩta ɛ bébiabia.
16Atɔ kpalobiá ɔha yile bʋ legyi ansɩ,
dʋn aha lalahɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ atɔ.
17Nana Bulu tɛkpa lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋ ɩba,
tamɛ ɔtɔwa yile ɔbwɛpʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
18Nana Bulu tɛkɩ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlala ma mʋ ɩwɩsʋ ekekegyiɛkɛ.
Mʋ ogyikpa bétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
19Ɔtamawa mʋ pɛlɩtɔ mʋ ɩkplanbɩ.
Akʋnbɩ kʋraa a, ɔtɛha mʋ atɔ otegyi mwɛ.
20Aha lalahɛ bɛ́ta.
Nana Bulu alupʋ bʋgyi fɛ mbwɩ ogyikpa ɩfa ntswɩtswɩ.
Bʋtɔkɔsɩ fwɩ fɛ ogyasi.
21Ɔha lalahɛ ɔpan ɔtamaka,
tamɛ yile ɔbwɛpʋ mʋ́ bʋ awɩtɔlɛ, otekie atɔ.
22Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ Bulu oyula obégyi ɔsʋlʋá alaha mʋ,
tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ Bulu ɔlwɩɩ obówu.
23Nana Bulu tɛkɩ ɔha ayabi ɔtsakpa,
mʋ bwɛhɛ tegyi mʋ ansɩ.
24Nɩ ɔdɩda kʋraa a, ɔtamasin ɔsʋlʋtɔ;
tsufɛ Nana Bulu dɛ mʋ ɩbɩ.
25Tɛkɩ kebi ngyi brɛ amʋ, sei nadan.
Tamɛ mmɔkʋnu ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ bɛɛ, Bulu lakpa ɔha yile ɔma.
Ntɛ mʋ abi bakʋlɩ atogyihɛ.
26Yile ɔbwɛpʋ bʋ awɩtɔlɛ.
Otekie atɔ, ɔtɔpʋ atɔ pan aha.
Mʋ́ sʋ mʋ abi bénya oyula.
27Si lalahɛ bwɛ, afʋbwɛ yile,
mɛnɩ fétsia ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
28Tsufɛ Nana Bulu tekle asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
Ɔmɛ́ɛkpa aha ánɩ́ bʋtamayinki mʋ ɔma, ɔma ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Ɔbɛ́kɩta amʋ́ kɔnkɔn ɩbrɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
tamɛ aha lalahɛ asɩ bɛ́ta.
29Yile abwɛpʋ obégyi ɔsʋlʋ amʋ,
tsia mʋ́sʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
30Nyansa asʋn tɛdalɩ ɔha yile ɔnɔ,
otegyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
31Mʋ Bulu atosunahɛ bʋ mʋ ɩklʋntɔ.
Mʋ́ sʋ ɔtamasrɛɩ dalɩ mʋ ɔkpasʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
32Aha lalahɛ bʋtɛtɛ yile abwɛpʋ,
dunka ɔkpa ánɩ́ bɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ mɔ amʋ́.
33Tamɛ Nana Bulu méesi amʋ́ wa amʋ́ ɩbɩtɔ,
ntɛ ha amʋ́ abʋgyi ɩpɔn asʋn agyipʋ ansɩtɔ.
34Kɩ Nana Bulu ansɩtɔ, afʋkɩta mʋ mblatɔ.
Ɔbɔ́pʋ ɔsʋlʋ amʋ ha fʋ, pʋwa fʋ numnyam.
Fówun aha lalahɛ owukpa.
35Nowun ɔha lalahɛ ɔkʋá ogyi owuntɔlɩnpʋ, alatsu ɩwɩ fʋa,
yɛyɛɩ fɛ Lebanon odum lenya ɔlɩɩkpa.
36Tamɛ nɛlakɩ a, alafwɩ.
Nodunka mʋ kʋraa mmowun mʋ.
37Hɩɛ yile ɔbwɛpʋ nsʋ, afʋlɛ ansɩ kɩ ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa,
tsufɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ololwii asɩ bɛ́klɛɩ.
38Tamɛ mblasʋ magyipʋ bɛ́ta.
Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ asɩ bótu plɩplɩplɩ.
39Nana Bulu ɩbɩtɔ yile abwɛpʋ bʋtenya amʋ́ nkpahɔ tsu.
Ogyi ɔtanʋkpa ha amʋ́ brɛá bʋbʋ ɩkplantɔ.
40Otegyi amʋ́ bʋalɛ, lɛ amʋ́.
Ɔtɛlɛ amʋ́ aha lalahɛ ɩbɩtɔ.
Ɔtɔkɔ ha amʋ́, tsufɛ batanʋ mʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 38
Content:
Lakpan Lɛblɩ
Dawid ɩkaɩn-afɔdɩɛ ɩlʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, mápʋ ɔblɔ wa ɩyɩn wa mɩ!
Mápʋ ansɩpɛpɛ bɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ!
2Fʋ ɔbɩn lakpie yi mɩ,
fayia mɩ manta ɔsʋlʋtɔ.
3Fʋ ɩyɩn sʋ, ɩwɩ ma mɩ ɔnlɩn.
Mɩ lakpan sʋ awútɔ labwiebwie mɩ.
4Mɩ lakpan ladʋbɩ.
Ɩlabwɛ atɔ sʋrahɛá mmɛtalɩ sʋra.
5Mɩ mimla sʋ
mɩ nlɔ laplɔ, idebon.
6Naklo, ndɛ ipian wun.
Nawa nwɛ, ndesu ekekegyiɛkɛ.
7Awútɔ ɩdɛ mɩ okunku,
ɩdɛ mɩ dwindwiin.
8Ɔŋɛ lata mɩ fɛ́ɛ́, awútɔ labwɛ mɩ yɔyɔɔyɔ.
Mɩ klʋn dɛ mɩ han.
Nasu kʋklʋkʋʋ, ndɛkɩmɩ.
9Mɩ Wie, fʋyin tɔá ndedunka.
Tɔá sʋá ndesu wa ɩwɩtɔ ɩda fʋ ansɩtɔ.
10Mɩ klʋn dɛda ɔwʋnlɩnsʋ.
Ɔŋɛ lata mɩ, mɩ ansibi lapunya tin.
11Mɩ ɩlɔ sʋ mɩ adwɛpʋ pʋ́ mɩ anyawie basrɩ mɩ.
Mɩ abusuanfɔ onuto kʋraa bawa ɩfɔ mɩ ɩwɩ.
12Aha ánɩ́ bʋmɛdɛ mɩ yile kle bafɩnɩ mɩ ayibi.
Mɩ lalahɛ adunkapʋ ɛ bʋdekleá bɛ́lɛ mɩ ɩnʋ.
Ɔpa-onye bʋdɛ mɩ ɩwɩ agywɩɩn lalahɛ susu.
13Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ netila asʋ fɛ ɩsʋtin.
Nɛkpa mɩ ɔnɔ bun mwɩ fɛ omumu.
14Nɔbwɛ ɩwɩ ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋ letin,
ɔtamalɛ ɩla ɔnɔ.
15Tsufɛ Nana Bulu, mɩ ansɩ dɩn fʋsʋ.
Oo mɩ Wie, mɩ Bulu, fʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ.
16Mɩ asʋn ánɩ́ nɛblɩ gyi,
“Máha ansɩ igyi mɩ alupʋ nɩ nɛsrɛɩ dɩda.”
17Tsufɛ nna ndɛ afu kɔ,
ndɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn wun ekekegyiɛkɛ.
18Nalɛ mɩ lakpan blɩ.
Ɩlahɔ mɩ ɔsɩn ánɩ́ nabwɛ mʋ́.
19Ɩwɩ bʋ mɩ alupʋ ɔnlɩn, bʋbʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋtolu mɩ kʋkʋ kpalɩ.
20Aha ánɩ́ bɔpʋ lalahɛ ka mɩ yile ɩkɔ bakʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩsʋ,
tsufɛ yile ɔkpa ngya.
21Oo Nana Bulu, mákpa mɩ ɔma.
Mɩ Bulu, máwa ɩfɔ mɩ ɩwɩ.
22Mɩ Wie, mɩ Ɔhɔpʋ,
wa ɔsa bɔhɔ mɩ!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 39
Content:
Mási Mɩ Ha, Aha Mimlahɛ Abʋmɔsɩ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ Yedutun.
1Nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Nɛ́kɩ mɩ natɩtɔ, mɛnɩ tsitsa kʋkʋ móotsu mɩ ɔnɔ.
Nɔ́wa mɩ ɔnɔ ɩkan, tsufɛ aha lalahɛtɔ mbʋ.”
2Ɩnɩá nemli omumu, mmobwii ɔnɔ,
nɛkpa ɔnɔ bun yilesʋ o a,
ɩwɩ mɛsankɩ mɩ.
3Mɩ klʋn lɛblɩ ogya wa mɩ ɩwɩtɔ pɩnpɩɩnpɩn.
Brɛá ndɛ mʋ́ ɩwɩ gywɩɩn kotoo a, iletsii ogya.
Mʋ́ sʋ nɛblɩ mbɛɛ,
4“Nana Bulu, suna mɩ mɩ nkpa ɔfʋnkpa,
pʋ́ nkɛá ɩlasi mɩ.
Suna mɩ alɩá mɩ lowu bɔ́wa ɔsa.
5Kɩ, fɔbwɛ mɩ nkpa ɩfɔtɔ ɩbɩta pɛ.
Mɩ nkɛ megyi tɔtɔ fʋ ansɩtɔ.
Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, nyankpʋsa nkɛ
igyi fɛ ɔtsawʋlɛ ɔŋɛ fʋhɛ fʋ ansɩtɔ.”
Ɩya.
6“Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, nyankpʋsa na ɔdɛtsʋn fɛ yiyi!
Lɛlɛ a, ipian odewun kpalɩ.
Atɔ ɔna odekle yaɩ, omeyin mʋ́ ogyipʋ.”
7“Mɩ Wie, ntɔ ntsie ngyo?
Fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn.
8Lɛ mɩ tsu mɩ lakpan fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
Mási mɩ ha, aha mimlahɛ abʋmɔsɩ mɩ.
9Namli omumu, mma ɔnɔ bwii,
tsufɛ fʋlaha mʋ́ ɩlaba alɩ.
10Kokoli, mátra bɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ!
Tsufɛ fʋ atswɛ ladʋn mɩ.
11Nɩ fɛbɩtɩ nyankpʋsa ɩsʋ mʋ lakpan sʋ a,
fʋteyinta tɔá ɩhɩɛ bʋ labi ha mʋ fɛ tɛplɛ lawɩ tati.
Lɛlɛ mʋ a, nyankpʋsa nkpa igyi fɛ ɔtsawʋlɛ ɔŋɛ fʋhɛ.”
Ɩya.
12“Oo Nana Bulu, nu mɩ mpaɩ, afʋnu mɩ isu.
Mákina nu.
Tsufɛ ɔfɔɔ ngyi, ndɛka tsʋn kɛkɛ fɛ mɩ anain.
13Kalaki ansɩ lɛ mɩsʋ, ansɩ ɩtra kalagyi mɩ
asa mɩ anwu fɛ́ɛ́.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 40
Content:
Bulu Lɔpʋ Mʋ Kanfʋ Ɩlʋ Pɔpwɛ Wa Mɩ Ɔnɔ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Nenya ɩklʋn tsia gyo Nana Bulu.
Ɔlɛyaa asʋ mɩ wa, nu mɩ asʋn, sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
2Olotsu mɩ lɛ lowu ɔbɔtɔ.
Ɔlɛlɛ mɩ lɛ ɔdɩba makpiitɔ.
Ɔlɔpʋ mɩ lɩɩ ɩbʋtasʋ.
Nɩ nna a, ntenya anatɩlɛ.
3Ɔlɔpʋ anɩ Bulu kanfʋ ɩlʋ pɔpwɛ wa mɩ ɔnɔ.
Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bówun nya ifu,
pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ.
4Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ,
ɔmɔpʋdɩnka ɩwɩ atsupʋ ntɛ ɩkpɩ asumpʋsʋ.
5Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, ofula tsɔtsɔɔtsɔá fabwɛ ha mɩ,
pʋ́ atɔá fahɩɛ ha mɩ lɔdʋbɩ.
Tɔtɔ má ɩnʋá nɔ́pʋkapʋ fʋ.
Nɩ mbɛɛ, mbwii ɔnɔ blɩ mʋ́ a, ɩma ɩklatɔ.
6Atɔtɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ mʋ́a lakpan-afɔdɩɛ tamagyi fʋ ansɩ.
Faha nawun ánɩ́ fʋtamakle mbwɩá bapʋ amʋ́ bɔ ogya-afɔdɩɛ pʋ́ lakpan-afɔdɩɛ.
7Mʋʋ nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Nanaa.
Nɛba bɔbwɛ fʋ ɔdwɛla,
fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn wa fʋ asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ.
8Oo mɩ Bulu, ɩbʋ mɩ ɔdwɛá nɔ́bwɛ fʋ ɔdwɛla,
tsufɛ fʋ atosunahɛ ɩdɩn mɩ ɩklʋnsʋ.”
9Nada fʋ yilebwɛ ɔkan fʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ anɩ ɔpasuatɔ.
Nana Bulu, fʋ onuto fʋyin ánɩ́ mmɔkʋkpa ɔnɔ bun.
10Mmesi fʋ yile ŋain mɩ ɩklʋntɔ.
Nɛkpalɩ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩwa pʋ́ fʋ nkpahɔ ɩwɩ asʋn.
Mmesi fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ŋain fʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ, anɩ ɔpasuatɔ.
11Oo Nana Bulu, mákina mɩ nwɛ wun ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɩkpa mɩ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
12Asʋn wunhɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ labomli mɩ,
ɩma klatɔ.
Mɩ lakpan lamli atɔ sʋrahɛ ha mɩ.
Ɩlaha ntra mmɛdɛ atɔ wun.
Ɩtsɔ dʋn mɩ nwunsʋ-imi,
ɩlakpɔn mɩ.
13Oo Nana Bulu, tsula bɔhɔ mɩ!
Nana Bulu, wa ɔsa begyi mɩ bʋalɛ.
14Ha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ lowu kle,
amʋ́ nwun ikotsoli.
Ha aha ánɩ́ bʋdekleá bɔ́pʋ lalahɛ gyi mɩ
abʋpʋ nsʋpa yinki.
15Ha ansɩ iwu aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ bɛɛ,
“Ɛhɛɛn, ɛhɛɛn, anɩlanya mʋ!”
16Tamɛ ha ɩwɩ ɩsankɩ aha ánɩ́ bʋtodunka fʋ fɛ́ɛ́,
abʋnya fʋ ɩwɩ ansigyi.
Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ fʋ nkpahɔ legyi amʋ́ ansɩ,
abʋkplʋn blɩ lablɩ bɛɛ, “Nana Bulu lomoni!”
17Mɩ mʋ́ a, ohiani ngyi, mma tɔtɔ.
Bulu, gywɩɩn mɩ ɩwɩ.
Mɩ Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ pʋ́ mɩ ɔlɛpʋ.
Mási tsia mʋ́sʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 41
Content:
Ɩlɔtsa Mpaɩ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ otosusu ɔpɔnpʋ ɩwɩ.
Nana Bulu tɛlɛ mʋ lɛ ɩkplantɔ.
2Otogyo mʋ ɩwɩ, ɔtɛha mʋ nkpa.
Ɔtɛha ɩtɔwa alɛ ha mʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
Ɔtamasi mʋ wa mʋ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
3Ɔtɛkɩ mʋsʋ mʋ ɩlɔklansʋ,
tsa mʋ ɩlɔ, ɔtɔkʋsʋ ɔna.
4Mɩ mʋ ndɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Oo Nana Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ,
afʋtsa mɩ ɩlɔ; tsufɛ napʋ ɩla gyi fʋ.”
5Mɩ alupʋ bʋtamablɩ mɩ yile dʋn
“Ɔmɛnkɛ kʋraa obówu, mʋ ɩda bɔ́fwɩ?”
6Bʋtɛba bɛkɩ mɩ, fɛ amʋ́ ba.
Tamɛ bɔyɔ a, bapʋ mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn lalahɛ bɛya.
7Mɩ alupʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtetsii mɩ,
blɩ mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn bɛɛ,
8“Ɩlɔ lalahɛ lada mʋ tswɩ.
Ɔmɛ́ɛtra kʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”
9Mɩ nyawie klakla ánɩ́ mɩa mʋnyɔ anɩtɔwa ɩbɩ ɔlɛpɛtɔ kʋraa
lakʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩsʋ.
10Tamɛ Nana Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ, afʋtsa mɩ ɩlɔ;
mɩ anka mɩ alupʋ ɩkɔ!
11Ɩlaha nawun ánɩ́ fʋtekle mɩ asʋn,
tsufɛ fʋmɛ́ɛha mɩ alupʋ abʋnya mɩ ɩwɩ ansigyi.
12Ɔlala ɩma mɩ ɩwɩ, sʋ fatsu mɩ lɩɩ tɩntɩn.
Faha ansɩ dɛ mɩgyi fʋ ansɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
13Bʋkanfʋ Nana Bulu, Israel Bulu amʋ;
tsu brɛá ɩtamata yɛfʋn brɛá ɩtamata.
Ɩbá mʋ́tɔ, ɩtra laba mʋ́tɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 42
Content:
Ɔwʋlʋ 2sɩ
(Israel Ɩlʋ 42-72)
Bulu Dunka Ɩkplanbɩ
Kora abi atosuna ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Alɩá nani tɛnatɩ dunka abʋnkpatɔ ntsu a,
alɩ ntodunka Bulu nɩ.
2Bulu ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ mɩ ɔkla.
Ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ mɩ ha Bulu ɔkɩankpapʋ.
Ɔmɛnkɛ nówun mʋ?
3Ntsú ɩtsan mɩ ɔpa-onye,
tsufɛ mɩ alupʋ bʋdɛ mɩ fɩtɛ bregyibrɛ bɛɛ,
“Nkɩ fʋ Bulu amʋ mɛ?”
4Nɩ nɛkaɩn alɩá mʋ ɔdɔm bʋteyi opiansʋ a,
asʋn tɛhan mɩ ɩklʋn.
Tsufɛ alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ ntegya amʋ́ nkpa,
anɩtɔpʋ ɩpan mʋ́a ope yɔ Bulu woyitɔ brɛá anɩdɛ nkɛ gyi nɩ.
5Mɩ ɔkla, ntogyi sʋ asʋn dɛ fʋ han alɩ?
Ntogyi sʋ fawa nwɛ alɩ?
Pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ,
tsufɛ nɛ́lakanfʋ mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ 6pʋ́ mɩ Bulu.
Asʋn dɛ mɩ ɔkla han.
Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ Yordan ntsu ɔnɔ ɔsʋlʋ,
Hermon ɩbʋ pʋ́ Misar ɩbʋsʋ kaɩn.
7Faha ntsu labʋla wa mɩ, fɛ ntsuá ɩbʋ oklu dɛda,
ntɛ ntsu bʋlahɛá ɩdɛkpayi ɔwʋnlɩnsʋ.
8Ekekegyiɛkɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ Nana Bulu tɔpʋ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sɩsɩ mɩ.
Onyegyionye ntɔwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ.
Ntɔbɔ mpaɩ ha mɩ Bulu. Mʋtɛha mɩ nkpa.
9Nɛfɩtɛ mɩ Bulu, ogyi mɩ ɩbʋta mbɛɛ,
“Ntogyi sʋ fatan mɩsʋ?
Ntogyi sʋ mɩ alupʋ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ,
mʋ́ sʋ nɔ́wa nwɛ natɩ tsʋntsʋn?”
10Ɔblɔla ánɩ́ mɩ alupʋ bʋdɛ mɩ bwɛ,
bʋdɛ mɩ fɩtɛ bregyibrɛ bɛɛ, “Nkɩ fʋ Bulu amʋ mɛ?”
ɩlabwɛ ɔlɔ wa mɩ awútɔ, ɩdɛ mɩ dwiin.
11Mɩ ɔkla, ntogyi sʋ asʋn dɛ fʋ han alɩ?
Ntogyi sʋ fawa nwɛ alɩ?
Pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ,
tsufɛ nɛ́lakanfʋ mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ pʋ́ mɩ Bulu.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 43
Content:
Nana Bulu, Gyi Mɩ Asʋn Ha Mɩ
1Oo Bulu, gyi mɩ asʋn ha mɩ.
Kɔ ɔmá ánɩ́ bʋtɛkpa fʋ ɔma.
Lɛ mɩ tsu afunupʋ pʋ́ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ anfɩ ɩbɩtɔ.
2Tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ Bulu pʋ́ mɩ ɔtanʋkpa.
“Ntogyi sʋ fasi mɩ wa ɔkpa?
Ntogyi sʋ mɩ alupʋ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ,
mʋ́ sʋ nɔ́wa nwɛ natɩ tsʋntsʋn?”
3Ha fʋ ɩwankɩ pʋ́ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɩkpa mɩ ya
fʋ onuto ɩbʋ amʋʋ igyi fʋ otsiakpa amʋsʋ.
4Mɛnɩ nɔ́yɔ Bulu afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩ asɩ ɩnʋ.
Nɔ́yɔ mɩ Buluá ɔtɛhɩɛ ha ansɩ tegyi mɩ wa.
Oo Bulu, mɩ Bulu!
Nɛ́da ɔsankuo kanfʋ fʋ.
5Mɩ ɔkla, ntogyi sʋ asʋn dɛ fʋ han alɩ?
Ntogyi sʋ fawa nwɛ alɩ?
Pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ,
tsufɛ nɛ́lakanfʋ mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ pʋ́ mɩ Bulu.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 44
Content:
Bulu, Kʋsʋ Gyi Anɩ Bʋalɛ
Kora abi atosuna ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Oo Bulu, anɩ onuto anɩlanu.
Anɩ anain babla anɩ gyʋma ánɩ́ fegyi
amʋ́ bɩsʋ bɩmbɩ amʋ.
2Fɔpʋ ɩbɩ gya ɔmá-ɔmá,
tamɛ fɛha anɩ anain mʋ́ bɛlɛ nlin.
Fobwie ɔmá-ɔmá,
tamɛ fɛha amʋ́ mʋ́ bɛklɛɩ.
3Megyi amʋ́ akɔtɔ bɔpʋnya ɔsʋlʋ amʋ.
Megyi amʋ́ ɔwʋnlɩn bɔpʋgyi ɩsʋ ɩsatɔ.
Fʋtɔdwɛ amʋ́.
Mʋ́ sʋ fʋ tumi, fʋ gyɔpɩ pʋ́ fʋ ɩwɩwankɩ legyi ɩsʋ ha amʋ́.
4Fʋgyi anɩ Wie pʋ́ anɩ Bulu.
Tsula, Yakob ogyi ɩsʋ.
5Ɩna fʋsʋ anɩtɛlɛ anɩ alupʋ da.
Fʋ ɩdatɔ anɩtɛtsatsa anɩ adʋnsʋ.
6Anɩtamapʋ ansɩ dɩnka anɩ ɩtasʋ,
anɩ ɔdayi ɛ mɔ́ɔhɔ anɩ.
7Tamɛ falɛ anɩ anɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ,
faha anɩ adʋn basʋpa.
8Bulu, fʋ sʋ anɩtotsu ɩwɩ ɔpa-onye.
Abɛ́da fʋ ɩpan brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɩya.
9Tamɛ sei fasi anɩ wa ɔkpa, anɩlasʋpa.
Fʋmɛkpa anɩ ya ɩsa.
10Faha anɩlakɔ srɩ.
Anɩ alupʋ balupa anɩ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
11Faha fɛɛ, bʋtɩn anɩ fɛ akufa.
Fada anɩ saɩn wa ɔmá-ɔmátɔ.
12Fafɛ fʋ aha ibia pɔnhɛ,
fʋmenya tɔtɔ anɩsʋ.
13Faha anɩlasʋpa apio aba ansɩtɔ.
Aha ánɩ́ bʋtsie bomli anɩ betsia mɔsɩ anɩ, bwɛ anɩ ɔblɔla.
14Anɩlemli blɩbi ha ɔmá-ɔmá.
Ɔmá bambasʋfɔ bowun anɩ bakpʋkpʋ nwuntɔ, bwɛ anɩ ɔblɔla.
15Pɛlɩ dɛ anɩ ɔpa-onye.
Ɩlamli anɩ nsʋpa,
16anɩ ɔblɔla abwɛpʋ pʋ́ anɩsʋ apleipʋ ansɩtɔ;
anɩ alupʋ pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋtamasi ɩla kie ansɩtɔ.
17Anɩlɔtsʋn ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
Mʋ́ o a, anɩmɔkʋtan fʋsʋ,
ntɛ kina fʋ ntamsʋ gyi.
18Anɩmɔkʋdamli ɔma ha fʋ,
ntɛ dalɩ fʋ ɔkpasʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
19Tamɛ febiabia anɩ,
si anɩ tswɩ mkpataku otsiakpa.
Fesi anɩ wa oklun tuuntɔ.
20Nɩ anɩlatan fʋ ɩdasʋ,
ntɛ tsu ɩbɩ fʋa bɔ mpaɩ ha ɔmá bamba ɔkpɩ ɔkʋ a,
21Bulu, tɛkɩ fʋmɛ́ɛbɩ?
Tsufɛ fʋyin anɩ agywɩɩntɔ asʋn ŋainhɛ kugyikʋ.
22Ee! Fʋ sʋ anɩtefia lowu ɔpa-onye,
fɛ akufa bapʋ bɛya ɔmɔkpa.
23Kʋsʋ! Mɩ Wie, ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛdɩdɩ?
Kʋsʋ, mádɩdɩ si anɩ wa ɔkpa fɛ́ɛ́!
24Ntogyi sʋ fadɩnkɩ ansɩ anɩsʋ?
Fatan anɩ ipian pʋ́ alɩá anɩ alupʋ bʋdɛ anɩ yia wa ntsu fɛ́ɛ́?
25Tsufɛ bada anɩ lɛda ɔsʋlʋtɔ tantaantan.
Anɩ ɔyʋlʋ latɛ manta ɔsʋlʋ.
26Kʋsʋ gyi anɩ bʋalɛ!
Fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ ka lɛ anɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 45
Content:
Owie Ɔkatsia Ɩlʋ
Kora abi atosuna ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Dimbisʋ-saprada ɔmɛ bɔ́pʋwa mʋ́. Ɔdwɛ-ɩlʋ.
1Ɩlakɩta mɩ ɩklʋn ánɩ́
nɔ́wanlɩn owie ɩwɩ ɩlʋ.
Mɩ ɔdandʋ bʋ ɔsa, fɛ atɔ ɔwanlɩnpʋ ɩbɩ.
2Nanain, ɔhaa má akɩlɛ ɔyasubi fɛ fʋ!
Asʋn ánɩ́ ɩbʋ anulɛ bɔ fʋ ɔnɔ.
Bulu layula fʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
3Otumipʋ, tsu fʋ ɔdayi tsan.
Kɩta fʋ numnyam pʋ́ fʋ iwiegyitɔ.
4Kɩta fʋ iwiegyitɔ, afʋkɔ yɔ nkpa.
Kɔ ha ɔnɔkwalɩ mʋ́a yilebwɛ pʋ́ ɩwɩasɩba.
Fʋ gyɔpɩ ɩlɛ fʋ ofula ɔwan.
5Fʋ mbɩn pɩɔnpɩɔn ifuti fʋ alupʋ klʋn,
ɔmá-ɔmá abʋba ɩwɩasɩ fʋ ansɩtɔ.
6Oo Bulu, fʋ owie-obia mɛ́ɛta ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Ɔnɔkwalɩ gyi fʋ akɔnfra.
7Fʋtekle yilebwɛ. Lalahɛbwɛ mʋ́ a, fʋtekisi.
Mʋ́ sʋ fʋ Wie Bulu lada fʋ ofuli,
pʋ ansigyi bʋla fʋtɔ dʋn fʋ aba.
8Ohuam, pɩprɩ, ɔhɩɛn pʋ́ atɔ fanfan
ɩdɛ ɔfan wa fʋ atadɩɛ tɩntɩntɔ fanfaanfan.
Owie woyiá bɔpʋ srʋfɔ-ɩsɛn hɩhɩɛ mʋ́tɔ,
ndondo aná dɛ mʋ́tɔ tsia bʋ fʋ ɔdwɛ.
9Awie abi tsɩhɛ bʋbʋ fʋ akatɔ.
Ɔtsɩá owie detsia lɔwa Ofir sika atɔ wanklaan, ɔlɩɩ fʋ gyɔpɩsʋ.
10Ɔtsɩ, kɩ, yaa asʋ afʋnu.
Tan fʋ abusuanfɔ pʋ́ fʋ sɩ woyisʋ,
11mɛnɩ owie ansɩ bégyi fʋ ɩwɩ.
Fʋ wie nɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ ba ɩwɩasɩ ha mʋ.
12Tirofɔ bɔ́sʋra atokiehɛ ba.
Ɔyɩtɔ ɩwɩ anyapʋ bɔ́pɔpɔ fʋ.
13Owie mʋ bi tsɩhɛ onumnyampʋ anfɩ tsie obutotɔ.
Ɔlɔwa atadɩɛ tɩntɩn ánɩ́ bɔpʋ sika pɛpɛ lʋ mʋ́.
14Ɔlɔwa atadɩɛ tɩntɩn ánɩ́ ɩhɩɛ bʋ akɩlɛ, bakpa mʋ bɛya owie amʋ.
Mʋ aba mbitebi bʋbuo mʋ.
15Ansigyi mʋ́a oseyee
bapʋkpa mʋ bɛya owie-woyitɔ.
16Nanain, fʋ abi yinhɛ bétsia fʋ asɩ́ mbiasʋ.
Fɛ́yaɩ amʋ́ awie ɔmá-ɔmátɔ.
17Bulu ɔbɛ́ha abi-aná fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́kaɩn fʋ ɩdasʋ.
Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔmá-ɔmá bɛ́kanfʋ fʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 46
Content:
Bulu Má Ɔka Anɩ Wa Anɩ Ɔkplankɛ
Kora abi ɩlʋá bɔ́pʋha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ mbitebi ɔmɛ wa mʋ.
1Bulu gyi anɩ okpikplikpa pʋ́ anɩ ɔwʋnlɩn.
Ɔma ɔka anɩ wa anɩ ɔkplankɛ.
2Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ ɔyɩ lɛkpɩnkɩ,
abʋ lɛkpa yewie ɔpʋ nsɩnɛ kʋraa a,
anɩméenya ifu.
3Nɩ ɔpʋ lɛda, bwɛ afu kpʋɔkpʋɔ,
ɩlɛkpɩnkɩ abʋ kʋraa a,
anɩméenya ifu.
Ɩya.
4Ntsu tsʋnhɛ ɩkʋ ɩna Bulu wulu amʋtɔ, ɩtɛha ɩnʋ atsiapʋ ansɩ tegyi amʋ́.
Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie amʋ onuto otsiakpa nɩ.
5Bulu bʋ wulu amʋtɔ, ɩmɛ́ɛdɩda.
Ɔbɔ́bʋa mʋ́ bakɛ.
6Kpokiti lɛda ɔmá-ɔmátɔ,
iwie ogyikpa lɛdɩda.
Ɩnʋ Bulu lɛlɛ ɔnɔ, ɔsʋlʋ lɛŋlaɩn.
7Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu bʋ anɩ wa.
Yakob Bulu amʋ gyi anɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin.
Ɩya.
8Mlɩbɛkɩ Nana Bulu gyumagyihɛ.
Alɩá alaha ɔsʋlʋsʋ atɔ layinta.
9Ɔtɛka ɩsa tin ɔyɩtɔ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ.
Otebiabia ɩta, kaka ɩkpantɔ anyɔ;
wa ɩsa akɔtɔ fɛ́ɛ́ ogya.
10Mlɩtsia diin, amlɩbɩá mɩgyi Bulu.
Batsu mɩ fʋa ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
Bawa mɩ numnyam ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
11Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu bʋ anɩ wa.
Yakob Bulu amʋ gyi anɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin.
Ɩya.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 47
Content:
Owie Kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ Bulu Gyi Ɔyɩsʋ
Kora abi kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩpʋ ansigyi da apian,
amlɩtswɩ ope kanfʋ Bulu,
2tsufɛ Nana Bulu, Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ mʋ Wie amʋ ɩwɩ bʋ ifu.
Owie kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ ogyi ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
3Ɔtɛba ɔmá-ɔmá asɩ, pʋ amʋ́ wa anɩ asɩ.
Ɔlɛha anɩlegyi ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
4Otekle anɩ Yakob abi-aná asʋn.
Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛlɛ ɔsʋlʋá igyi anɩ ogyikpa ha anɩ,
anɩtɔpʋtsu ɩwɩ.
Ɩya.
5Bulu lɔpʋ ansigyi dʋ ɔyɔ.
Nana Bulu lɔdʋ ɔyɔ, bʋdɛ okitikiti, ɩkpɛ dɛfʋlɩ.
6Mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ Bulu, amlɩtswɩ ope ha mʋ.
Mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ anɩ Owie.
Mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ,
7tsufɛ Bulu gyi ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́ Owie.
Mlɩwa ɩlʋ sunahɛ ha mʋ.
8Bulu tsie mʋ onuto owie-obiasʋ,
ɔdɛ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́sʋ gyi.
9Ɔmásʋ agyipʋ bafia.
Abraham Bulu aha bafia,
tsufɛ Bulu bʋ́ ɔyɩtɔ awie fɛ́ɛ́.
Batsu mʋ fʋa ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 48
Content:
Bulu Otsiakpa Sion
Kora abi kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Nana Bulu lomoni.
Ɩlɛkana ánɩ́ bɛ́hɩɛ kanfʋ mʋ.
Bɛ́kanfʋ mʋ mʋ wulutɔ,
igyi wuluá ɩdɩn mʋ onuto ɩbʋ amʋsʋ.
2Sion ɩbʋ lɔfʋa, ɩhɩɛ bʋ akɩlɛ.
Ɩbʋ ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ ansigyi.
Sion ɩbʋ igyi Bulu otsiakpa.
Igyi owie otumipʋ kpɔnkpɔntɩ wulu.
3Bulu onuto bʋ awie amʋ woyitɔ.
Alalɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan ánɩ́ mʋgyi ɔtanʋkpa kinkin ha mʋ́.
4Kɩ, awie bɛtɩ aba fia,
kʋsʋ yɔ wulu anfɩ ɔkɔkpa.
5Tamɛ brɛá bowun mʋ́ a, opuni letsii amʋ́.
Begyigya, yinki srɩ.
6Bɛkpɩnkɩ kpakpakpakpa,
fɛ ɩkwɩɩ dɛ ɔtsɩ dwiin.
7Fɛ alɩá atsufu totsu owi ɔdalɩkpa bobwiebwie
Tarsisfɔ ɔpʋsʋ-ayɛn.
8Asʋn amʋʋ anɩlonu amʋ anɩlawun a.
Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu wulu nɩ.
Anɩ Bulu amʋ wulu nɩ.
Ɔbɛ́ha ɩbɛ́lɩɩ kinkin brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɩya.
9Oo Bulu, anɩdɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩwɩ gywɩɩn
fʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ.
10Oo Bulu, alɩ amʋʋ fʋ ɩda bʋ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ amʋ a,
alɩ kɛn bʋtɛkanfʋ fʋ yɛtʋ ɔyɩ ɔka nɩ.
Yilebwɛ labʋla fʋ gyɔpɩ.
11Ha ansɩ igyi Sionbʋsʋ atsiapʋ,
ansɩ igyi Yuda awulu,
tsufɛ fʋtobua asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
12Mlɩnatɩ tsʋntsʋn Sion.
Mlɩki bomli mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́,
amlɩkla mʋ́tɔ mbu fʋahɛ.
13Mlɩlɛ ansɩ kɩ mʋ́ abunti wanklaan.
Mlɩkɩ awie-woyi amʋ wanklaan.
Fówun mlɔ́pʋbla mlɩ abi-aná mlɩaa,
14“Alɩ Bulu gyi nɩ.
Mʋgyi anɩ Bulu brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɔbɛ́kpa anɩ yɛfʋn anɩ owukɛ.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 49
Content:
Nyankpʋsa Onya Atɔ Alɩágyialɩá Oméetsia Nkpa Yɔ
Kora abi kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Mlɩ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩnu asʋn anfɩ!
Ɔyɩtɔ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩyaa asʋ.
2Nyebi-ahandɛ,
ɩwɩ anyapʋ pʋ́ ahianfɔ fɛ́ɛ́!
3Tsufɛ nɛba bɛblɩ nyansala,
mɩ nwuntɔ asʋn ɩbɛ́ha asʋn-asɩnu.
4Nɛ́yaa asʋ nu ayebi.
Nɔ́pʋ ɔsankuo lɛ ɔtɛ kutuklu asɩ.
5Nɩ nowie ɩkplantɔ,
mɩ amlɛpʋ bɛkafia mɩ a,
ntogyi sʋ nénya ifu?
6Ɩwɩ anyapʋ anfɩ bapʋ ansɩ dɩnka amʋ́ ɩnyasʋ,
bʋdɛpʋ amʋ́ atɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ tsu ɩwɩ.
7Ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ ka lɛ mʋ pio.
Ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ ka Bulu ɩkɔ, pʋhɔ mʋ pio nkpa.
8Tsufɛ ɔha ka lɛ ibia mɛda asɩ.
Mátepi bwɛ mʋ́ ɩwɩ agywɩɩn,
9fɛɛ, ilehian ánɩ́ ɔha obétsia nkpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
ɔmɔ́ɔyɔ fuli-ɔbɔtɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
10Ɔhagyiɔha towun ánɩ́ anyansapʋ bʋtowu.
Aha mimlahɛ pʋ́ aha gyɩmɩhɛ ɛ bʋtowu,
si amʋ́ atɔ ha aha bamba.
11Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá bʋtɔpʋ amʋ́ ada dɩnka amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋsʋ,
tamɛ ntsantɔ gyi amʋ́ otsiakpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
12Nyankpʋsa ɔhɩhɩɛ ɩwɩ alɩágyialɩá a, oméetsia nkpa yɔ.
Ogyi fɛ ɔbwɩ, ɔtɔkɔsɩ wu.
13Alɩ ɩtɛba ha aha mimlahɛ anfɩ,
pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋtegyi amʋ́ asʋnsʋ nɩ.
Ɩya.
14Bʋgyi fɛ akufa. Amʋ́ ɔyɔkpa gyi afulitɔ.
Lowu ɔbɔ́bwɛ amʋ́ ɔkpapʋ.
Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa bégyi amʋ́sʋ nyankɩ.
Amʋ́ ɔyʋlʋ bɔ́plɔ fɛ́ɛ́, ɩmɛ́ɛtra dɩ amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
Afulitɔ ɔbɔ́bwɛ amʋ́ woyi.
15Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ a, Bulu ɔbɛ́ka lɛ mɩ afulitɔ,
tsufɛ ɔbɔ́hɔ mɩ.
Ɩya.
16Nɩ ɔkʋ atonyahɛ imoni,
numnyam ɩba mʋ woyisʋ alɩágyialɩá a,
ɩmáhan fʋ.
17Tsufɛ nɩ owu a, omóotsu kʋkʋ natɩ.
Mʋ numnyam ɛ ɩmɛ́ɛkpa mʋ ya.
18Nɩ ɔtɛkɩá mʋbʋ ansigyitɔ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ,
aha bʋtɛkanfʋ mʋ ánɩ́ oyin mʋ ɩwɩsʋ kɩ kʋraa a,
19obówu yɔ mʋ asɩtɔ.
Ɔmɛ́ɛtra wun wankɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
20Nyankpʋsa ɔhɩhɩɛ ɩwɩ alɩágyialɩá a, oméetsia nkpa yɔ.
Ogyi fɛ ɔbwɩ, ɔtɔkɔsɩ wu.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 50
Content:
Ɩpan Gyi Afɔdɩɛá Bulu Tekle
Asaf kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Bulu, Otumipʋ, Nana Bulu dɛtɔɩ.
Alatɔɩ tɩ ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́,
tsu owi ɔdalɩkpa yeyi mʋ́ ɔkplɩwiekpa.
2Bulu tɔwankɩ tsu Sion,
wuluá ɩbʋ akɩlɛ ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
3Anɩ Bulu ɔba, ɔmɛ́ɛkpa ɔnɔ bun.
Ogya plɛnplɛn gya mʋ nkpa, ɩdɛ ntobi hɔ.
Afu kinkiinkin lɛkafia mʋ.
4Alatɩ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ befia
ánɩ́ obégyi mʋ aha asʋn.
5Ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩkpa aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa mɩ ɔma wa abatɔ ha mɩ.
Aha amʋʋ bʋtɔbɔ afɔdɩɛ, ka ntam ha mɩ amʋ!”
6Ɔsʋsʋ ɩdɛ mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɔwan lɛ,
tsufɛ Bulu onuto amʋ gyi asʋn ogyipʋ.
Ɩya.
7“Oo! mɩ ɔmá, mlɩnu asʋn ánɩ́ nɛ́blɩ.
Israelfɔ, nɛ́lɛ mlɩ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ.
Mɩ anfɩ gyi mlɩ Bulu nɩ.
8Megyi afɔdɩɛá mlɩdɛbɔ ha mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn ndɛblɩ.
Mlɩ atɔtɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ ɩbʋ mɩ ansɩtɔ bregyibrɛ.
9Tamɛ hɔ mmɔ́ɔhɔ mlɩ nnantswie
mʋ́a mlɩ akpala,
10tsufɛ pututɔ mʋ́a abʋsʋ mbwɩ fɛ́ɛ́
bʋgyi mɩ klɛ.
11Mɩbʋ afutɔ mbubwi pʋ́ mbwɩá bʋna ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́.”
12“Nɩ akʋn dɛ mɩ a, mmɛ́ɛbla mlɩ,
tsufɛ mɩbʋ ɔyɩ mʋ́a mʋ́tɔ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
13Ntamawɩ nnantswie aye,
ntamanun akpala obugya.
14Pʋ ɩpan bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha mɩ,
afʋka akɔá fotsula ha mɩ Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie.
15Kpoli mɩ fʋ ɔkplankɛ, nɛ́lɛ fʋ;
afʋwa mɩ numnyam.”
16Tamɛ Bulu dɛ ɔha lalahɛ mʋ́ fɩtɛ ɔbɛɛ,
“Ɔkpa ɔmɔmʋ sʋ fʋdɛ mɩ amandɩɛ blɩ,
ntɛ pʋ mɩ ntam dɩnka fʋ ɔnɔsʋ?
17Tsufɛ fʋ mʋ́ fʋtamakleá ntswii fʋ.
Fʋtɔtswɩ mɩ asʋn ɛ tsalɩfwɩ.
18Fowun owikplu fakpla buo mʋ.
Fʋa mbʋa atɔpʋ bʋ mba.
19Asʋkpan kugyikʋ tɛtalɩ dalɩ fʋ ɔnɔ.
Fʋhɩɛ fʋbʋ afunu.
20Fʋtetsia asɩ blɩ fʋ pio ɩwɩ asʋn.
Fʋtɛtalɩ kpɔɩ fʋ yin mʋ bi kʋraa.
21Ɩnɩá fʋdɛ ntobi anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bwɛ
mmɛkpla fʋ sʋ a, fʋkɩ fɛɛ, ngyi fɛ fʋ.
Nɛ́lɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ blɩ,
wa ɩyɩn wa fʋ ngya.”
22“Mɩsʋ atanpʋ, mlɩyi ɩnɩ oyibi.
Nɩ megyi alɩ nɛ́tɩtɩ mlɩtɔ pransapransa,
ɔhɔpʋ ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋá ɔbɔ́hɔ mlɩ.
23Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔpʋ ɩpan bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha mɩ
lawa mɩ numnyam.
Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔna yilebwɛ ɔkpasʋ a,
mʋ nɔ́hɔ nkpa.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 51
Content:
Ɩwɩasɩnu Mpaɩ
Igyi kanfʋ-lʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Ɩlʋá Dawid lɔwa brɛá Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Natan lɛba mʋ wa, mʋ Batseba kle ɔma.
1Oo Bulu, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ
wa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ.
Fʋ nwewun sʋ tsitsi mɩ lalahɛ.
2Fwɩ mɩ tsitsa lɛ mɩ ɩwɩ,
afʋgyʋra mɩ lɛ mɩ lakpantɔ,
3tsufɛ nyin lalahɛá nabwɛ.
Mɩ ansɩ dɩn mɩ lakpansʋ bregyibrɛ.
4Fʋ nkʋlɛ, fʋ nkʋlɛ pɛ napʋ ɩla gyi.
Nabwɛ ɩtɔá igyi lalahɛ fʋ ansɩtɔ.
Mʋ́ sʋ fʋbʋ ɔkpa ha mɩ ɩpɔn,
ɔhaa mɛ́ɛlɛ fʋ ɩla.
5Negyi ɩpɔn brɛá bɔkwɩɩ mɩ.
Brɛá mɩ yin dɛ mɩ ɔmɛ kʋraa a, lakpan ɔbwɛpʋ ngyi.
6Ɔnɔkwalɩá itsu ɩklʋn ɔtɔtɔ fʋtekle.
Mʋ́ sʋ suna mɩ ɩklʋn ɔtɔtɔɔtɔ nyansa.
7Pʋ ɔtsandɩ gyʋra mɩ, mɩ ɩwɩ ɩtɩn.
Bie mɩ ntsu, mɩ anlɩn fɛ atsufolibi.
8Ha mɩ annu asʋn ánɩ́ ɩbɛ́ha ansɩ bégyi mɩ.
Ha ansɩ igyi mɩ awuá fabiabia.
9Bun ansibi mɩ lakpansʋ,
afʋtsitsi mɩ lalahɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
10Oo Bulu, bwɛ ɩklʋn ánɩ́ mʋ́tɔ lɔwankɩ wa mɩtɔ,
afʋlapʋ ɔŋɛ pɔpwɛá ɩbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ wa mɩtɔ.
11Mátswɩ mɩ tsalɩfwɩ.
Máhɔ fʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ lɛ mɩ ɩbɩ.
12Lapʋ ansigyiá ɩbʋ fʋ nkpahɔtɔ wa mɩtɔ.
Ha fʋ asʋnsʋgyi ɩbwɛ mɩ ɔdwɛla.
13Nósuna aha ánɩ́ bʋtamagyi fʋ mblasʋ fʋ ɔkpa,
lakpan abwɛpʋ béyinki ba fʋ wa.
14Oo Bulu, mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu,
natsitsa obugya, sikie mɩ.
Mɛnɩ nɔ́wa fʋ nkpahɔ ɔkpayi.
15Mɩ Wie, bwii mɩ ɔnɔ,
mɩ antswɩ ope kanfʋ fʋ,
16tsufɛ afɔdɩɛ tamagyi fʋ ansɩ.
Nɩ nɔbɔ atɔtɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ ha fʋ kʋraa a, fʋmedekle.
17Afɔdɩɛá fʋtekle gyi ɩklʋn ánɩ́ ɩlanu ɩwɩasɩ.
Oo Bulu, fʋtamakɩ ɔha ánɩ́ alanu ɩwɩasɩ si lakpan bwɛ, ki nwun.
18Bwɛ yile ha Sion, afʋgyi mʋ bʋalɛ.
Layinki yi Yerusalem abunti.
19Mʋmʋ anɩ afɔdɩɛ yile ibégyi fʋ ansɩ,
abɔ́bɔ atɔtɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ pʋ́ atɔ ogya-afɔdɩɛ,
labɔ nnantswie-afɔdɩɛ fʋ afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩsʋ ha fʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 52
Content:
Bulu Asʋngyi Pʋ́ Mʋ Awɩtɔlɛ
Dawid atosuna ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Ɔlɔwa mʋ́ brɛá Edomyin Doeg lɛyɛbla Saul ánɩ́ ɔbʋ Ahimelek woyitɔ.
1Ɔha yinhɛ, ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛ ɩwɩ adabi da,
lalahɛá fʋdɛpʋgyi Bulu aha sʋ?
Ekekegyiɛkɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́, 2fʋdɛ lalahɛ susu.
Ofunupʋ olembiapʋ,
fʋ ɔdandʋ bʋ ogya fɛ ɔdayibi.
3Fʋtekle lalahɛ dʋn yile,
fʋtekle afunu ɛ dʋn ɔnɔkwalɩ.
Ɩya.
4Ofunupʋ, asʋkpan ánɩ́ ɩbɛ́tɩ lowu ha fʋ aba fʋtekle.
5Tamɛ Bulu ɔbɛ́da fʋ lɛ da,
fʋmɛ́ɛtra kʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Ɔbɛ́lɛ fʋ lɛ fʋ tati-obuto,
puli fʋ lɛ akɩankpapʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
Ɩya.
6Aha yile bówun, nya ifu.
Bɔ́mɔsɩ fʋ blɩ bɛɛ,
7“Kɩ, ntɔ dɛ ɔha yinhɛ anfɩ bwɛ?
Ɔtamasrɩ tanʋ Bulu,
ɩnyasʋ ɔlɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka,
pʋ atonyahɛ bwɛ mʋ ɔtanʋkpa.”
8Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ ngyi fɛ olif-oyiá ɩlayɛyɛɩ,
ɩlɩɩ Bulu woyitɔ.
Mɩ ansɩ dɩn Bulu ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔkasʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
9Oo Bulu, nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
fʋ bwɛhɛ sʋ.
Nɛ́da fʋ ɩda ɔkan aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa fʋ ɔma ansɩtɔ,
tsufɛ fʋbʋ alɛ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 53
Content:
Aha Lalahɛ Bɛɛ, Bulu Má Ɩnʋ
Dawid atosuna ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́wa mʋ́ nwɛsʋ.
1Aha mimlahɛ nkʋlɛ dɛ amʋ́ ɩwɩ bla bɛɛ,
“Bulu má ɩnʋ.”
Bayinta, bamli mbusuo abɔpʋ.
Ɔbakʋlɛ kʋraa mɛ́dalɩ amʋ́tɔ.
2Nana Bulu tɛkɩ anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ sɩsɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ,
kɩ bɛɛ, menya ɔtɩansɩpʋ ɔkʋá otodunka mʋ ɔkpa.
3Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ badamli ɔma ha Bulu.
Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bafwɩ ɔkpa.
Yile ɔbwɛpʋ ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋ.
Ɔbakʋlɛ kʋraa mɛ́dalɩ amʋ́tɔ.
4Nana Bulu ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋ́ sʋ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋmóonu asʋn asɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ?
Bʋdɛ mɩ aha wɩ fɛ iye bʋdɛwɩ,
bʋtamasu kpoli mɩ.”
5Ɩnʋ ifu bɛ́kɩta amʋ́ ɔtɩnɛá ifu ɩma,
tsufɛ Bulu ɔbɛ́da Israelfɔ alupʋ awú saɩn.
Pɛlɩ bɛ́kɩta amʋ́, tsufɛ Bulu lakpa amʋ́ ɔma.
6Nhɩɛ ndɛ Bulu kokoli mbɛɛ,
ɔkʋ otsu Sionbʋsʋ bɔhɔ Israelfɔ.
Ɛkɛá Bulu ɔbɛ́latsu mʋ aha kʋsʋ a,
ɩhɩɛ wa Yakob abi-aná ɔdwɛ, ansɩ ɩhɩɛ gyi Israelfɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 54
Content:
Bulu Gyi Bʋalɛ Ogyipʋ
Dawid atosuna ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Ɔlɔwa mʋ́ brɛá Siffɔ bɛyɛbla Owie Saul ánɩ́ alabeŋain amʋ́ wa. Bɛ́da mʋ́ ɔsankuosʋ.
1Oo Bulu, pʋ fʋ ɩda hɔ mɩ,
afʋpʋ fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn gyi mɩ asʋn ha mɩ.
2Oo Bulu, nu mɩ mpaɩ.
Yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ kokoli.
3Afɔɔ bakʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩsʋ.
Awuntɔlɩnpʋá Bulu mégyi tɔtɔɔtɔ amʋ́ ansɩsʋ
bʋdekleá bɔ́mɔ mɩ.
Ɩya.
4Kɩ, Bulu gyi mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ.
Mɩ Wie dɛ mɩ nkpa ɩbɩtɔ.
5Pʋ mɩ alupʋ lalahɛ ka amʋ́ ɩkɔ.
Fʋbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ha mɩ, sʋ mɔ amʋ́.
6Nɔ́bɔ mɩ apɛtɔ-afɔdɩɛ ha fʋ.
Nana Bulu, nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ ɩda, tsufɛ fʋbʋ alɛ.
7Falɛ mɩ lɛ ɩkplan kugyikʋtɔ,
nagyi mɩ alupʋsʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 55
Content:
Mɩ Ɩwɩ Ɔblɔ Laha Bʋdɛ Mɩ Lu
Dawid ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ ɔsankuo da mʋ́.
1Oo Bulu, yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ mpaɩ.
Mákina mɩ kokoli.
2Yaa asʋ nu mɩ isu, afʋsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
Mɩ asʋn wunhɛ ladʋn mɩ.
Nagyigya,
3mɩ alupʋ asʋn blɩhɛ
pʋ́ aha lalahɛ asɩá bʋdɛ mɩ ba sʋ.
Tsufɛ bapʋ ipian dɩnka mɩsʋ,
mɩ ɩwɩ ɔblɔ laha bʋdɛ mɩ lu.
4Mɩ ɩklʋn mɛdɩ mɩ asɩ.
Opuni dɛ mɩ tsii, ndekle anwu.
5Ifu dɛ mɩ, ndɛkpɩnkɩ kpakpakpakpa.
Ɩwɩ mesi mɩ kpɩnkɩ.
6Ao! Tɛkɩ nɩ mbʋ atɛ fɛ lɔpɔ a,
tɛkɩ nófuli yɛda ɔkpʋnʋ ɔtɩnɛkʋ.
7Ee, tɛkɩ nɔ́yɔ tsutsuutsu,
ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ ɔtɩnɛkʋ.
Ɩya.
8Tɛkɩ nɔ́kɔsɩ dunka oŋainkpa ha ɩwɩ,
si afu mʋ́a alankpla anfɩ.
9Mɩ Wie, ha amʋ́ abʋgyigya, amʋ́ ɔdandʋ imlimli,
tsufɛ owuntɔlɩn mʋ́a ɩkɔ́ gyi tɔá ndewun wulu amʋtɔ.
10Bʋtobomli wulu amʋ ɔpa-onye,
lalahɛbwɛ mʋ́a asʋn wunhɛ sɔɔn bʋ mʋ́tɔ.
11Asʋkpangyi bʋ wulu amʋtɔ.
Ahamlɛ pʋ́ ahasisi tamakpa mʋ́ dɩnsʋ.
12Nɩ mɩ olupʋ dɛ mɩ sʋpa a,
tɛkɩ nótomi.
Nɩ mɩ olupʋ dɛ ɩwɩ tsu suna mɩ a,
tɛkɩ nódunka ɩwɩ ɔwakpa.
13Tamɛ fʋ mɩ ba, mɩ nyawie
pʋ́ mɩ ɔbɩsʋfɛá nhɩɛ nyin fʋ, dɛpʋ ɩnɩ gyi mɩ.
14Tɛkɩ mɩa fʋnyɔ tɛbla aba anɩ awuntɔsʋ,
natɩ buo ɔdɔm yɔ Bulu woyitɔ.
15Mɩ alupʋ lowu ifwie amʋ́tɔ.
Bʋyɔ afulitɔ amʋ́ ansɩ bʋya,
tsufɛ lalahɛ labʋla amʋ́ woyi pʋ́ amʋ́ klʋntɔ.
16Mɩ mʋ́ nósu kpoli Bulu.
Nana Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mɩ.
17Nyankɩ, ɔpa, ntʋpwɛ fɛ́ɛ́
nósu kʋklʋkʋʋ bla mʋ mɩ asʋn,
obónu mɩ ɔmɛ.
18Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋdɛ mɩ ɩsa kɔ,
tamɛ ɔbɛ́lɛ mɩ lɛ amʋ́ ɩbɩ.
Tɔtɔɔtɔ mɔ́ɔbwɛ mɩ.
19Bulu dɛ iwiegyi tsu bɩmbɩ ɔpá.
Ɩya.
Obónu mɩ isu, ba amʋ́ asɩ.
Tsufɛ mɩ alupʋ amʋ bʋtamatsɛ,
bʋtamanya Bulu ifu.
20Mɩ nyawie lakpa mʋ nyawie ɔma.
Alatʋn mɩa mʋnyɔ ntam.
21Mʋ asʋn blɩhɛ bʋ ɔdwɛ dʋn ɔkwɛn,
tamɛ ɩsakɔ asʋn bʋ mʋ ɩklʋntɔ.
Mʋ asʋn lɔpɔn dʋn adɔmpɔ,
tamɛ igyi fɛ ɔdayiá bapio mʋ́ lɛ.
22Pʋ fʋ asʋn fɛ́ɛ́ wa Nana Bulu ɩbɩtɔ, ɔbɛ́kpa fʋ.
Ɔmɛ́ɛha ɔha yile mɛ́ɛdɩda.
23Tamɛ fʋ Bulu, fɔ́tswɩ aha lalahɛ amʋ wa ɔbɔ kluklu amʋtɔ dodoodo,
asa amʋ́ nkɛ ɩbɛ́ta fʋn.
Tsufɛ fɛ́kpa aha amɔpʋ pʋ́ afunupʋ tsitsa,
tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ nɔ́pʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 56
Content:
Bulusʋ Ntɔpʋ Ansɩ Dɩnka
Dawid ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ ɔmɛá igyi fɛ lɔpɔa ɔdɩn tsutsu ɔmɛ wa mʋ́. Dawid lɔwa mʋ́ brɛá Filistifɔ bɛkɩta mʋ Gat wulutɔ.
1Oo Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ, tsufɛ aha batsatsa mɩsʋ.
Alupʋ bʋdɛ mɩ yia manta ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
2Mɩ alupʋ batsatsa mɩsʋ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́,
aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋdɛ mɩ kɔ ɩwɩtsusʋ.
3Nɩ ifu ɩkɩta mɩ a,
ntɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ.
4Bulu asʋn ntɛkanfʋ.
Bulusʋ ntɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka,
ifu tamakɩta mɩ.
Ntɔ nyankpʋsa ɔbɛ́talɩ bwɛ mɩ?
5Bʋtɛtsɛ mɩ ɔnɔ ekekegyiɛkɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mɩ ɩwɩ agywɩɩn lalahɛ kotoo bʋtɔbwɛ.
6Bakpa aba bʋdɛ mɩ tɛ,
bʋdɛ yabi kugyikʋá ndɛlɛ kɩ.
Bʋdekleá bɔ́mɔ mɩ kokooko.
7Amʋ́ owuntɔlɩn sʋ ka amʋ́ ɩkɔ.
Oo Bulu, pʋ ɔblɔ lɛ ɔmá-ɔmá anfɩ da.
8Fʋyin mɩ ɩkplan fɛ́ɛ́.
Sʋta mɩ ntsú wa fʋ otuntutɔ.
Megyi fʋ ɔwʋlʋtɔ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋ?
9Mʋmʋ ɛkɛá nokpoli fʋ a,
mɩ alupʋ fɛ́ɛ́ béyinki ɔma.
Nhɩɛ nyin ánɩ́ fʋbuo mɩ.
10Bulu asʋn ntɛkanfʋ.
Nana Bulu asʋn ntɛkanfʋ.
11Bulusʋ ntɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka, ifu tamakɩta mɩ.
Ntɔ nyankpʋsa ɔbɛ́talɩ bwɛ mɩ?
12Oo Bulu, ilehian ánɩ́ nɛ́ka akɔá notsula ha fʋ,
pʋ ɩpan bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha fʋ.
13Tsufɛ fɛlɛ mɩ tsu lowutɔ.
Ee, fʋmɛha mmosutin.
Mʋ́ sʋ nɛ́talɩ natɩ fʋ ansɩtɔ,
fʋ wankɩá ɩtɛha nkpatɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 57
Content:
Buluá Ɔtɔbwɛ Togyitɔ Mɔ Ɔnɔ
Ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Dawid ɩlʋá bɔ́pʋ “Máyinta atɔ” ɔmɛ wa mʋ́. Ɩlʋá Dawid lɔwa brɛá ɔlɛsrɩ si Owie Saul ibwi-ɔbɔtɔ.
1Wun mɩ nwɛ. Oo Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ!
Tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa.
Fʋ abambasɩ naŋain,
yɛfʋn brɛá alankpla anfɩ ɩlaka itin.
2Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie ndesu kpoli.
Buluá ɔtɔbwɛ togyitɔ mɔ ɔnɔ ha mɩ ndesu kpoli.
3Ɔbɔ́wa tsu ɔsʋsʋ bɔhɔ mɩ.
Ɔbɔ́sʋpa aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩsʋ tsatsa.
Ɩya.
Ɔbɔ́wa mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ sɩsɩ.
4Alupʋá bʋgyi fɛ agyata nsɩnɛ nkplan.
Amʋ́tɛtɩtɩ nyankpʋsa aye.
Amʋ́ ayin gyi fɛ ɩkpan mʋ́a mbɩn.
Amʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ogya fɛ ɔdayi.
5Oo Bulu, tsu fʋ ɩwɩ fʋa dafa ɔsʋsʋ,
afʋha fʋ numnyam ɩbʋla ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́!
6Bafɩnɩ ayibi mɩ ɔtsʋnkpa.
Awʋrɛhɔ lada mɩ tswɩ.
Bakwi ɔbɔ mɩ ɔkpasʋ,
tamɛ amʋ́ onuto bakpawie mʋ́tɔ.
Ɩya.
7Fʋ nkʋlɛsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn.
Oo Bulu, mɩ ɩklʋn dɩn fʋsʋ.
Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ, ee nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ.
8Mɩ ɔkla, tsinki.
Akwɛ mʋ́a nsankuo, mlɩtsinki.
Nétsinki bakɛ.
9Mɩ Wie, nɛ́da fʋ ɩpan ahatɔ.
Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɔmá-ɔmátɔ.
10Tsufɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka lɔfʋa dafa ɔsʋsʋ.
Fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ lɔfʋa wɔ nwʋlʋta.
11Oo Bulu, tsu fʋ ɩwɩ fʋa dafa ɔsʋsʋ,
afʋha fʋ numnyam ɩbʋla ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 58
Content:
Bulu Tegyi Aha Asʋn Ɔsʋlʋsʋ
Ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Dawid ɩlʋá bɔ́pʋ “Máyinta atɔ” ɔmɛ wa mʋ́.
1Atumipʋ, lɛlɛ mlɩtɛblɩ asʋn ánɩ́ ɩda ɔkpa?
Mlɩtegyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ ha aha?
2O-o, lalahɛ bʋ mlɩ ɩklʋntɔ.
Owuntɔlɩnla mlɩtɔbwɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
3Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋbʋ ɩwɩtɔ, bɔfwɩ ɔkpa.
Tsu amʋ́ ɩkwɩɩbɩ ɔpá bʋna bʋdɛtsʋntsʋn,
bʋdɛ afunu wa.
4Bʋbʋ elin fɛ ɩwɔ.
Bʋgyi sapa ɔkʋá oletila asʋ.
5Ɔfapʋ ɔkplʋn wa mʋ, ɔtamakpla.
Ɔfapʋá ɔlɛhɩɛ blɩ ɔfa mʋ, ɩtamakɩta mʋ.
6Oo Bulu, kpakpa lalahɛ abwɛpʋ anfɩ ayín.
Oo Nana Bulu, tsii gyata-abi anfɩ ayín-kɩtatɔ!
7Ha abʋŋa fɛ ntsu kpɩhɛ.
Nɩ bɛbɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩta a, amʋ́ mbɩn ɔnɔ iwu.
8Bʋbwɛ fɛ obiɛn ánɩ́ ɔna ɔdɛkpɩkpɩ.
Bʋmáwun owi fɛ ɔmɛtsitsa.
9Fɔ́pʋ ɔblɔ fɛɩ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ tsitsa ɔsasʋ,
dʋn alɩá ntsuá ɩdɩn abotodua ogyasʋ tɔkɔsɩ fu.
10Ɔha yile ansɩ bégyi mʋ nɩ owun ɔha lalahɛ ɩkɔ ɔkakpa.
Ɔbɔ́fwɩ mʋ ayabi ɔha lalahɛ obugyatɔ.
11Aha bɛ́blɩ bɛɛ, “Lɛlɛ, yile ɔbwɛpʋ bʋ mʋ ɩpanda.
Lɛlɛ, Bulu bʋ ɩnʋá otegyi aha asʋn ɔsʋlʋsʋ.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 59
Content:
Bulu, Lɛ Mɩ Lɛ Mɩ Alupʋ Ɩbɩtɔ
Ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Dawid ɩlʋá bɔ́pʋ “Máyinta atɔ” ɔmɛ wa mʋ́. Ɔlɔwa mʋ́ brɛá Saul lɛha aha bogyo mʋ woyi, mɛ́nɩ bɔ́mɔ mʋ.
1Mɩ Bulu, lɛ mɩ lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
Gyi ɩban wa mɩ tsu mɩsʋ akʋsʋlɩɩpʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
2Lɛ mɩ lɛ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ ɩbɩ.
Hɔ mɩ lɛ obugya atsitsapʋ ɩbɩ.
3Kɩ, bʋgyoá bɔ́mɔ mɩ.
Awuntɔlɩnpʋ bafia mɩ nwunsʋ.
Nana Bulu, megyi lalahɛ kʋkʋ nabwɛ,
ntɛ asʋkpan ɩkʋ nagyi.
4Tsufɛ megyi mɩ bwɛhɛ kʋkʋ sʋ
bʋsrɩ bʋdɛ ɩwɩsʋ da.
Kʋsʋ kɩ tɔá ɩdɛ mʋ́sʋ yɔ, afʋbʋa mɩ.
5Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Bulu, Nana Bulu, fʋgyi Israel Bulu!
Kʋsʋ afʋbɩtɩ ɔmá anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩsʋ.
Máwun aha atɔpʋ lalahɛ ɔkʋkʋ nwɛ.
Ɩya.
6Bʋteyinki ba ntʋpwɛ,
bʋdɛkplʋn fɛ akɩaɩ, bomli wulu amʋ.
7Kɩ, bʋtɛkpakpa asiabi bun.
Amʋ́ ɔnɔ klakla fɛ ɔdayi,
bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Ɔhaa medenu.”
8Tamɛ Nana Bulu, mɔsɩ fʋdɛ amʋ́,
fʋdɛ ɔmá anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔblɔla bwɛ.
9Mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, ndɛ fʋ ɔkpa kɩ,
tsufɛ fʋ Bulu gyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin.
10Mɩ Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka befia mɩ.
Ɔbɛ́ha nówun alɩá nagyi mɩ alupʋsʋ.
11Mámɔ amʋ́, mɛnɩ mɩ aha Israelfɔ bʋmɛ́ɛtan mʋ́sʋ.
Pʋ fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn da amʋ́ saɩn, afʋfɩn amʋ́ da.
Oo anɩ Wie, fʋgyi anɩ kʋtʋ.
12Amʋ́ asʋn lalahɛ blɩ, amʋ́ ɔnɔ asʋn sʋ
ha amʋ́ ɩwɩtsu ɩkpa kɩta amʋ́ fɛ agbla.
Amʋ́ ɩlwɩɩ pʋ́ amʋ́ afunuwa sʋ,
13pʋ ɔblɔ mɔ amʋ́.
Mɔ amʋ́ plɩplɩplɩ.
Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ abʋwun ánɩ́ Bulu dɛ iwie gyi Yakob ɔmásʋ.
Ɩya.
14Bʋteyinki ba ntʋpwɛ,
bʋdɛkplʋn fɛ akɩaɩ, bomli wulu amʋ.
15Bʋna bʋdeki dunka atogyihɛ,
tamɛ nɩ bʋmɔmwɛ a, bʋtɔkplʋn.
16Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ nɔ́wa fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn ɩwɩ ɩlʋ.
Nyankɩ-nyankɩ nɔ́pʋ ansigyi kplʋn wa ɩlʋ, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ.
Tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin pʋ́ mɩ oŋainkpa mɩ ɔkplankɛ.
17Mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ,
tsufɛ Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin.
Fʋtɛlɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka suna mɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 60
Content:
Bulu, Pʋ Fʋ Tumi Ha Anɩ Agyi Ɩsʋ
Dawid atosuna ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Dimbisʋ-saprada ntam ɩlʋ. Ɔlɔwa mʋ́ brɛá mʋa Aram-Naharaim pʋ́ Aram-Sobafɔ bɔkɔ, Yoab leyinki bɔmɔ Edomfɔ ɩsa akɔpʋ mpɩm duanyɔ Nfɔlɩ Ɔpʋ bʋnkpatɔ.
1Ao Bulu, fasi anɩ wa ɔkpa, fabwii ɩbɩ anɩsʋ.
Fanya ɔblɔ wa anɩ, lakpa anɩ wa.
2Fʋlɛha ɔsʋlʋ lɛkpɩnkɩ, ɩlɛbaba.
Yinkia mʋ́ tsa aba, tsufɛ idekle ɩmaɩn-maɩn.
3Faha fʋ aha bahɩɛ wun ipian.
Faha anɩ nta anɩlanun bʋ, anɩna anɩdɛ ntinta bɔ.
4Fʋlayi ɔfranka ha fʋ ifu anyapʋ,
mɛnɩ bɛ́srɩ yɔ mʋ́ asɩ,
amʋ́ alupʋ mbɩn mɛ́ɛda amʋ́.
Ɩya.
5Pʋ fʋ tumi ha anɩ agyi ɩsʋ, afʋsɔ anɩ ɔnɔ,
mɛnɩ fɛ́lɛ fʋ adwɛpʋ.
6Bulu latɔɩ tsu mʋ otsiakpa ɔbɛɛ,
“Néye Sekem wulutɔ ansigyisʋ.
Nósusu Sukot tsonkoli, ye mʋ́tɔ.
7Mɩbʋ Gilead pʋ́ Manase.
Efraim gyi mɩ kʋtʋpa.
Yuda ɛ gyi mɩ akɔnfra.
8Tamɛ Moab gyi mɩ atɔ ɔfwɩkpa.
Edom gyi mɩ ntʋkʋta ɔwɔɩtswɩkpa.
Filistifɔsʋ ntɔwa ɔkpayi.”
9Oo Bulu, ma ɔbɛ́kpa mɩ ya wulu anfɩ bɔpwɛ abunti kpekple fʋahɛ wa mʋ́ anfɩtɔ?
Ma ɔbɛ́kpa mɩ négyi Edomsʋ?
10Bulu, megyi fʋlasi anɩ wa ɔkpa?
Fasi anɩ akɔpʋ kpa.
11Tsa anɩ agyi anɩ alupʋsʋ.
Nyankpʋsa mbʋa mʋ́ kpalɩ igyi.
12Anɩ hayinhɛbwɛ itsu Bulu wa,
tsufɛ mʋ ɔbɛ́tsatsa anɩ alupʋsʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 61
Content:
Dɩnka Owie Nkɛsʋ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ ɔsankuo da mʋ́.
1Oo Bulu, nu mɩ isu.
Yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ mpaɩ.
2Nlɩɩ ɔsʋlʋ ɔka tsutsuutsu, ndesu kpoli fʋ.
Asʋn ladʋn mɩ klʋn,
tsu mɩ lɩɩ bʋta fʋahɛsʋ.
3Tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa,
obu fʋahɛá iletri mɩ alupʋ sʋ.
4Ha mɩ antsia fʋ otsiakpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́!
Mɩ anya ɔtanʋkpa fʋ abambasɩ.
Ɩya.
5Tsufɛ Bulu, fanu ɩkɔá notsula ha fʋ.
Fapʋ aha ánɩ́ bʋtenya fʋ ɩda ifu ogyikpa ɩkʋ ha mɩ.
6Dɩnka owie nkɛsʋ,
mʋ abi-aná abʋdan tʋ mʋ.
7Oo Bulu, ha mʋ ogyi iwie fʋ ansɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɩkpa mʋ.
8Mɛnɩ nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɩda brɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
brɛá ndɛ mɩ ɩkɔá notsula ka ekekegyiɛkɛ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 62
Content:
Ɔdwɛá Ɩma Ɔka Igyi Bulu Klɛ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ Yedutun.
1Mɩ ɔkla labwɛ diin, ɔdɛ Bulu ansɩtɔ kɩ wʋlɛ,
tsufɛ mʋ ɩbɩtɔ nénya nkpahɔ tsu.
2Mʋ nkʋlɛ gyi mɩ ɩbʋta,
mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ pʋ́ mɩ okpikplikpa.
Mʋ́ sʋ mmɛ́ɛdɩda ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
3Ɔmɛnkɛ mlési mɩ nkʋlɛ han?
Mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩdekleá mlɛ́lɛ mɩ ɩnʋ,
fɛ bunti ntɛ ɩban bwiehɛ?
4Lɛlɛ, mlɩlabwɛ agywɩɩn kʋlɛ, mlɛ́kplɩ mɩ obiasʋ.
Afunuwa bʋ mlɩ ɔdwɛ.
Mlɩtɔpʋ ɔnɔ yula mɩ,
tamɛ mlɩ ɩklʋntɔ mʋ́ lwɩɩ mlɩdɛ mɩ.
Ɩya.
5Mɩ ɔkla, tsia diin afʋkɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ;
tsufɛ mʋ ɔkpa ndɛkɩ.
6Mʋ nkʋlɛ gyi mɩ ɩbʋta,
mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ pʋ́ mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin.
Mʋ́ sʋ mmɛ́ɛdɩda.
7Mɩ nkpahɔ pʋ́ mɩ numnyam itsu Bulu wa.
Mʋgyi mɩ ɩbʋta kpekple pʋ́ mɩ okpikplikpa.
8Anyankpʋsa, mlɩpʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋsʋ bregyibrɛ.
Mlɩlɛ mlɩ ɩkplan fɛ́ɛ́ bla mʋ,
tsufɛ mʋgyi anɩ okpikplikpa.
Ɩya.
9Lɛlɛ, nyebi-ahandɛ bʋgyi fɛ afu.
Ɩwɩ anyapʋ ɛ bʋmegyi tɔtɔ.
Kali amʋ́ afʋkɩ.
Amʋ́ aku anyɔ anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋgyi fɛ dantapu.
