10Mápʋ ansɩ dɩnka adufudɩɛ atɔsʋ.
Másusuá fénya tɔkʋ tsu owitɔ.
Nɩ fʋ atɔ ɩklɛɩ kʋraa a,
mápʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋ́sʋ.
11Bulu latɔɩ,
nanu mʋ́ lanu ánɩ́ mʋbʋ tumi.
12Mɩ Wie, ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka igyi fʋ klɛ,
tsufɛ fʋtɛka nyankpʋsa ɩkɔ mʋ bwɛhɛ ɔnɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 63
Content:
Bulu Ɩwɩ Ɔmɛwʋlɩ Dɛ Mɩ Ɔkla
Kanfʋ-ɩlʋá Dawid lɔwa brɛá ɔbʋ Yuda ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ.
1O Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ Bulu. Fʋ ndedunka.
Fʋ ɩwɩ ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ mɩ ɔkla.
Fʋ dunka laha ɩwɩ labwɛ mɩ yɔyɔɔyɔ,
fɛ ɔsʋlʋ wʋlɩhɛ dɛ ntsu dunka.
2Brɛ ɩkʋtɔ nowun fʋ fʋ otsiakpa ɩnʋ,
nowun fʋ tumi pʋ́ fʋ numnyam.
3Fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ alɛ dʋn nkpa.
Mʋ́ sʋ nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ.
4Nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́,
tsu ɩbɩ fʋa kpoli fʋ ɩda.
5Mɩ ɔkla lagyi atɔ wanklaan mwɛ.
Nɔ́wa ansigyi-ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ.
6Nɩ nda ɔklansʋ oo ntɛkaɩn fʋsʋ.
Ntɔgywɩɩn fʋ ɩwɩ onye fɛ́ɛ́,
7tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɔbʋapʋ.
Fʋ abambasɩ olulukpa ntɔwa ansigyi-ɩlʋ.
8Mɩ mʋ́ natrʋ kɩta fʋ.
Fʋ gyɔpɩ dɛ mɩ kinkiinkin.
9Tamɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ lowu kle
bɔ́yɔ afulitɔ.
10Bésin ɩsa,
pututɔ-mbwɩ bɔ́wɩ amʋ́.
11Tamɛ Bulu sʋ owie ansɩ bégyi mʋ.
Aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔpʋ Bulu ɩda ka ntam
bɔ́pʋ mʋ tsu ɩwɩ,
tsufɛ ɔbɛ́kpa afunupʋ ɔnɔ bun.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 64
Content:
Bulu, Gyo Mɩ Ɩwɩ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Oo Bulu, nu mɩ kokoli. Mbʋ ɩkplantɔ.
Gyo mɩ ɩwɩ, mɛnɩ mɩ alupʋ bʋmɔ́ɔwa mɩ ifu.
2Ŋain mɩ, mɛnɩ awuntɔlɩnpʋá batsu agywɩɩn lalahɛ mɩsʋ
bʋméenya mɩ.
3Baya amʋ́ ɔnɔ klakla fɛ ɔdayi.
Bama amʋ́ ɔnɔtɔ asʋn kɩtakɩta fɛ mbɩn.
4Bʋteŋain tswɩ ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa.
Bʋtɔtswɩ amʋ́ mbɩn hwim, bʋtamanya ifu.
5Bʋdɛ amʋ́ agywɩɩn lalahɛtɔ kinkiinkin.
Bʋtɛblɩá bɛ́fɩnɩ agbla ŋaintɔ,
bʋtɛfɩtɛ ɩwɩ bɛɛ, “Ma obówun anɩ?”
6Bʋtɔbwɛ agywɩɩn lalahɛ blɩ bɛɛ, “Anɩlahɩɛ bwɛ agywɩɩn wanklaan!”
Tsufɛ nyankpʋsa klʋntɔ mʋ́a mʋ agywɩɩntɔ bʋ oklu.
7Tamɛ Bulu ɔbɔ́tswɩ mbɩn wɔ amʋ́,
bépilan ɔtsawʋlɛ pɛ.
8Amʋ́ onuto ɔnɔtɔ asʋn blɩhɛ sʋ bɛ́dɩda.
Amʋ́ awunpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́kpɩnkɩ kpakpakpa.
9Anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ bénya ifu.
Bɛ́lɛ Bulu gyumagyihɛ blɩ,
gywɩɩn mʋ bwɛhɛ ɩwɩ.
10Aha yile bénya Nana Bulu ɩwɩ ansigyi, srɩ tanʋ mʋ.
Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa fɛ́ɛ́ bʋkanfʋ mʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 65
Content:
Ansɩ Igyi Ɔha Ánɩ́ Bulu Lalɛ, Kpɩa Mʋ Manta Ɩwɩ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ, ɩlʋ wahɛ.
1Oo Bulu, ɩbʋ alɛá bɛ́kanfʋ fʋ Sion wulutɔ.
Bɛ́ka ɩkɔá botsula ha fʋ ɩnʋ.
2Mpaɩ onupʋ,
fʋ wa anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́ba.
3Anɩ lalahɛ legyi anɩsʋ,
tamɛ fesikie anɩ.
4Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ falɛ,
kpɩa mʋ manta ɩwɩ, otsie fʋ wunsɩnɛsʋ.
Fʋ woyitɔ, igyi fʋ onuto ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ
atɔ wanklaan ɩbɔ́mwɛ anɩ.
5Oo anɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu,
fɔsɔ anɩ ɔnɔ, bwɛ ofula lɛ anɩ.
Fʋ ɔkpa ɔyɩtɔ aha bʋdɛkɩ.
Amʋ́á bʋbʋ ɔpʋ ɔbɩn kʋraa.
6Fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn fɔpʋha abʋ lɛlɩɩ kinkiinkin,
fɔpʋ ɔwʋnlɩn saba.
7Fʋtɛha ɔpʋ mʋ́a atsufuá mʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn
pʋ́ ɔmá-ɔmá okitikiti tɔlʋa.
8Aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ ɔyɩ ɔka fɛ́ɛ́
bʋtenya fʋ osuna ifu.
Fʋtɛha aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ owi ɔdalɩkpa yɛdalɩ owi ɔkplɩwiekpa fɛ́ɛ́
bʋtɔkplʋn ansigyisʋ.
9Fʋtɛbɛkɩ ɔsʋlʋ, wʋlɩ ntsu mʋ́sʋ,
ha mʋ́ ɩtɔwa nfɔ.
Fʋtɛha ntsu tɔbʋla fʋ abʋnkpa,
ɩtɛha amʋ́ atɔ-abi tɔwa alɛ.
Tsufɛ alɩ fɛhɩɛ mʋ́ nɩ.
10Fʋtɔwʋlɩ ntsu amʋ́ flɛsʋ, ha mʋ́ ɩtɔwɔɩ.
Fʋtɛha nyankpʋntsubi tɔwɔɩ mʋ́tɔ aklun.
Fʋtoyula amʋ́ atɔ-abi, ɩtɔkɔsɩ dan.
11Atɔ-abi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ fʋtɔpʋmɔ ofi ɔnɔ.
Fʋ oyula tɔwʋlɩ fʋ ɔtsʋnkpa, ɩnʋ atɔ tɔwa alɛ.
12Mbwɩ ogyikpa ánɩ́ ɩbʋ ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ kʋraa bʋ nfɔ,
ansigyi tɛba nkukusʋ.
13Akufa baklɛɩ bʋla amʋ́ atɔ ogyikpa.
Atɔ-abi lahɩɛ wa alɛ ntsu ɔtɩakpa.
Ansɩ ɩdɛ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ gyi, bʋdɛkplʋn wa ɩlʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 66
Content:
Mlɩkanfʋ Bulu Numnyam
Kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩtswɩ ope kanfʋ Bulu.
2Mlɩwa ɩlʋ wa mʋ ɩda numnyam.
Mlɩkanfʋ mʋ numnyam.
3Mlɩbla Bulu mlɩaa, “Fʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ ɩhɩɛ bʋ ifu, ɩbʋ wanwan!
Fʋ tumi lɛhɩɛ moni.
Mʋ́ sʋ fʋ alupʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔ́pʋ ifu da akpawunu fʋ ansɩtɔ.
4Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bósum fʋ.
Bɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ,
wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɩda.”
Ɩya.
5Mlɩyɛkɩ tɔá Bulu labwɛ.
Alabwɛ ofula ha anyankpʋsa.
6Ɔlɛha ɔpʋ lɛdamli ɔsʋlʋ wʋlɩhɛ,
anɩ anain bɛfa mʋ́ ayabitɔ.
Ɩnʋ mʋ ɩwɩ lɔwa anɩ ansigyi.
7Ɔdɛ iwie gyi brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ mʋ tumitɔ.
Mʋ ansɩ dɩn ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
Mʋsʋ akʋsʋlɩɩpʋ bʋmátsu ɩwɩ.
Ɩya.
8Ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ anɩ Bulu.
Mlɩkanfʋ mʋ aha abʋnu.
9Mʋ sʋ anɩtsie nkpa,
ɔmɔkʋha anɩ ayabi ɩsrɛɩ.
10Oo Bulu, fʋlɔsɔ anɩ kɩ.
Fɔsɔ anɩ kɩ fɛ alɩá bʋtɔpʋ ogya
ŋlaɩn sika fututu, dɩnkɩ ipi lɛ mʋ́ ansɩtɔ.
11Fʋlɔpʋ mpʋsa lɛ anɩ,
fɔpʋ atodwindwin sʋra anɩ.
12Fɛha anɩ alupʋ bɛtsatsa anɩsʋ.
Anɩlɔtsʋn ntsutso, tsʋn ogyatɔ,
tamɛ séi fapʋ anɩ ba ɔtɩnɛá atɔ labusʋ.
13Nɔ́pʋ atɔtɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ ba fʋ otsiakpa.
Nɛ́ka ɩkɔá notsula ha fʋ,
14tɔá nobwii ɔnɔ blɩ;
brɛá mbʋ ɩkplantɔ.
15Nɔ́bɔ mbwɩá bawa nfɔ bɔ atɔtɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ,
pʋ nkpokpo ogyasi bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha fʋ.
Pʋ nnantswie yinhɛ mʋ́a atrʋkpa bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha fʋ.
Ɩya.
16Bulu ifu anyapʋ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩbonu.
Nɛ́blɩ tɔá alabwɛ ha mɩ.
17Nosu kpoli mʋ.
Mʋ kanfʋ ɩdɩn mɩ ɔnɔsʋ.
18Nɩ nesi lalahɛ wa mɩ ɩklʋntɔ a,
tɛkɩ mɩ Wie mónu mɩ isu,
19tamɛ lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, Bulu lanu mɩ isu,
sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
20Nɛ́kanfʋ mʋ, tsufɛ omekina mɩ isu nu,
ntɛ kina mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka lɛ suna mɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 67
Content:
Bulu Owun Anɩ Nwɛ, Oyula Anɩ, Wa Awɩtɔlɛ Ha Anɩ
Ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ ɔsankuo da mʋ, wa mʋ́.
1Bulu owun anɩ nwɛ, oyula anɩ.
Ɔwa awɩtɔlɛ ha anɩ.
Ɩya.
2Mɛnɩ bɛ́bɩ fʋ ɔdwɛla ɔsʋlʋsʋ;
pʋ́ fʋ aha nkpahɔ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
3Oo Bulu, ha ɔmá-ɔmá abʋkanfʋ fʋ.
Ha ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́ abʋkanfʋ fʋ!
4Ha ansɩ igyi ɔmá-ɔmá, abʋwa ansigyi ɩlʋ,
tsufɛ fʋtegyi ɔmá-ɔmá asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
Fʋtɛkpa ɔmágyiɔmá ánɩ́ ɩbʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
Ɩya.
5Oo Bulu, ha ɔmá-ɔmá abʋkanfʋ fʋ.
Ha ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́ abʋkanfʋ fʋ!
6Ɔsʋlʋsʋ-atɔ lawa alɛ.
Bulu, anɩ Bulu layula anɩ.
7Bulu layula anɩ,
ɩlaha ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bóbu mʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 68
Content:
Bulu Kʋsʋ, Fʋ Alupʋ Abʋdasaɩn
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Bulu kʋsʋ, fʋ alupʋ abʋdasaɩn.
Ha fʋ alupʋ abʋsrɩ dalɩ fʋ ansɩtɔ.
2Fɛ alɩá afu tɔtsʋan ogyasi natɩ a, alɩ fʋgya amʋ́ nɩ.
Fɛ alɩá ogya tɛŋlaɩn okpin a,
alɩ aha lalahɛ bʋhɔ fʋ ansɩtɔ nɩ.
3Tamɛ ha aha yile abʋgyi ɔdwɛ.
Bʋfuli kpayi ansigyisʋ fʋ ansɩtɔ,
hɩɛ nya ansigyi.
4Mlɩwa ɩlʋ ha Bulu. Mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ ɩda.
Mlɩtswɩ ɩlʋ ha ɔha amʋʋ ɔna nwʋlʋtasʋ amʋ.
Mʋ ɩda gyi Nana Bulu.
Mlɩtswɩ ope mʋ ansɩtɔ.
5Bulu tsie mʋ onuto otsiakpa.
Mʋgyi awumbi ɔsɩ, otegyi bʋa asʋrapʋ.
6Ɔtɛha ɔha ánɩ́ ɔma ɔhaa tenya abusuan.
Ɔtɛlɛ obu adɩpʋ, ha bʋtegyi ɩwɩ.
Tamɛ ɔtɛha mʋsʋ akʋsʋlɩɩpʋ bʋtetsia ɔsʋlʋ wʋlɩhɛsʋ.
7Oo Bulu, brɛá fʋgya fʋ aha nkpa,
mlɩna ɔsʋlʋkpan amʋsʋ a,
Ɩya.
8fɛha ɔsʋlʋ lɛkpɩnkɩ, nyankpʋ lotswie tsu ɔsʋsʋ,
Sinai Bulu ansɩtɔ,
Israel Bulu ansɩtɔ.
9Fɛha nyankpʋ lɛhɩɛ tswie,
latsinki fʋ siadɩɛá idewu.
10Fʋ aha bɔpʋ ɩnʋ bwɛ otsiakpa.
Oo Bulu, fʋ awɩtɔlɛ sʋ fɔbʋla ahianfɔ.
11Anɩ Wie lɛlɛ ɔnɔ,
atsɩ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛblɩ asʋn wanklaan amʋ.
12Bɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Ɩsa ɔnɔ alɩɩpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛsrɩ!”
Atsɩá bʋbʋ ɩnʋ beye atɔá besi bun.
13Aha ánɩ́ bʋda akufa ɩbantɔ kʋraa
bʋgyi fɛ lɔpɔá sika fututu bun mʋ abambasʋ,
sika pɛpɛ ɩdɛ ogya kpa mʋ ɩwɩ.
14Brɛá Bulu Otumipʋ amʋ lɛda awie saɩn a,
Salmonbʋsʋ lofuli fɛ dantapu.
15Basanbʋ lɛhɩɛ fʋa,
ɩbʋ nsiebi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ!
16Basanbʋá fʋbʋ nsiebi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ,
ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛ Sionbʋá Bulu lalɛ, otsie mʋ́sʋ lu?
Kɩ, ɩnʋ Nana Bulu onuto obétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ nɩ!
17Bulu akeke akinkin ɩdʋn mpɩm-du lafa.
Mʋ́ anɩ Wie lɔpʋtsua Sinai ba mʋ otsiakpa nɩ.
18Brɛá ɔlɔdʋ ɩbʋ fʋahɛ amʋ a, ɔlɛkpa ndoun buo ɩwɩ.
Aha bekie mʋ atɔ.
Mʋsʋ akʋsʋlɩɩpʋ kʋraa bekie mʋ atɔ.
Nana Bulu obétsia ɩnʋ.
19Mlɩkanfʋ anɩ Wie.
Mʋtɔsʋra anɩ atɔ sʋrahɛ ekekegyiɛkɛ.
Bulu gyi anɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ.
Ɩya.
20Nkpa ɔhɔpʋ anɩ Bulu gyi.
Anɩ Wie Nana Bulu tɛlɛ anɩ tsu lowutɔ.
21Tamɛ obésisri mʋ alupʋ nwun.
Amʋ́ na bʋdɛ ɩpɔngyila bwɛ nɩ.
22Anɩ Wie ɔbɛɛ,
“Nɛ́lakpa mlɩ alupʋ tsu Basan ba.
Nɛ́lɛ amʋ́ tsu ɔpʋ-ibuntɔ ba.
23Mɛnɩ mlɛ́tsatsa mlɩ alupʋ amʋ obugyatɔ,
mlɩ akɩaɩ ɛ béyinta amʋ́ obugya.”
24Oo Bulu, bawun fʋa fʋ ɔdɔm amʋ ɔnatɩ.
Alɩá mɩ Bulu pʋ́ mɩ Wie, fɔpʋ fʋna fɔyɔ fʋ otsiakpa ɩnʋ.
25Ɩlʋ awapʋ bʋgyankpa, nkpɛ afʋlɩpʋ bʋgya ɔma,
mbitebi bʋbʋ amʋ́ nsɩnɛ bʋdɛ akatsa kpɩnkɩ.
26Bʋdɛ ɩlʋ wa bɛɛ, “Mlɩkanfʋ Bulu mʋ ɔmá amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ofiakpa.
Mlɩ Israel abi-aná, mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!”
27Amʋ́tɔ ɔtrahɛ Benyamin abusuan igyankpa,
Yuda abusuan ahandɛ pʋ́ amʋ́ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋbuo,
Sebulon mʋa Naftali abusuan ahandɛ ɛ bʋgya ɔma.
28Oo Bulu, suna fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
Suna fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn, fɛ alɩá fɔbwɛ ha anɩ brɛ amʋ.
29Fʋ ɔtswɛkpa ánɩ́ ɩbʋ Yerusalem sʋ
awie bʋtekie fʋ atɔ.
30Wa ɩyɩn wa Egyipte, ogyi fɛ ntsu-ɔnɔ ɔbwɩ
mʋ́a ɔmá-ɔmá ánɩ́ bʋgyi fɛ nnantswie yinhɛá bʋbʋ amʋ́ abitɔ anfɩ.
Tsatsa aha anfɩ bʋtekle dutɛ hɔ anfɩsʋ,
afʋda ɔmá anfɩ bʋtekle ɩsa kɔ anfɩ saɩn.
31Ha abʋpʋ kɔɔbrɩ tsua Egyipte ba.
Etiopiafɔ abʋba ɩwɩasɩ ha fʋ Bulu.
32Mlɩ ɔsʋlʋsʋ iwie ogyikpa, mlɩwa ɩlʋ ha Bulu.
Mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ anɩ Wie,
Ɩya.
33bɩmbɩ ɔpá ɔsʋsʋsʋ ɔdɩnkapʋ amʋ.
Kɩ, mʋ ɔmɛ lalɩn. Mʋ ɔmɛ kpɔnkpɔntɩ amʋ lalɩn.
34Mlɩbla aha alɩá Bulu tumi gyi.
Mʋ numnyam ibun Israelsʋ,
mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn ɩlɛlɩn ɔwan nwʋlʋtatɔ.
35Bulu ɩwɩ bʋ ifu mʋ otsiakpa ɩnʋ.
Israel Bulu tɔpʋ mʋ tumi mʋ́a ɔwʋnlɩn ha amʋ́.
Mlɩkanfʋ Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 69
Content:
Bulu, Hɔ Mɩ, Ndɛmɛ Wie Ɔdɩba Kluklutɔ
Dawid ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Dimbisʋ-saprada ɔmɛ bɔ́pʋwa mʋ́.
1Oo Bulu, hɔ mɩ.
Ntsu labʋla wie mɩ ɔmɛtɔ.
2Ndɛmɛ wie ɔfrɔdɔtɔ,
mmenya yabi oyikpa.
Nakpawie ntsu-ibuntɔ,
ntsu lamuna mɩ.
3Nasu kpoli alɩɩ, ɩlapian mɩ.
Mɩ ɔmɛ lapin.
Nakɩ mɩ Bulu ɔkpa alɩɩ,
mɩ ansibi lawu mɩ.
4Aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ lu kʋkʋ kpalɩ
bʋtsɔ dʋn mɩ nwunsʋ-imi.
Alupʋá bʋdɛ ofunu wa dɩnka, abʋmɔ mɩ bʋhɩɛ bʋdʋn mɩ.
Bʋdɛ mɩ ka hɩɛ bɛɛ, mpʋ tɔá mmɔkʋtsu ba.
5Oo Bulu, fʋyin mɩ mimlatɔ.
Mɩ lakpan meŋain fʋ.
6Oo anɩ Wie, Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ, Nana Bulu,
mɩ sʋ máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta fʋ ɔkpa akɩpʋ.
Oo Israel Bulu, mɩ sʋ máha fʋ adunkapʋ abʋsʋpa.
7Tsufɛ fʋ sʋ besia mɩ,
pɛlɩ lɛkɩta mɩ.
8Namli ɔfɔɔ mɩ apiotɔ.
Nabwɛ fɛ ɔha ánɩ́ bʋmeyin mɩ mɩ yin abitɔ.
9Fʋ otsiakpa ɩnʋ asʋn ɩhɩɛ bʋ mɩ ogya.
Fʋ asiabi fɛ́ɛ́ lɛbɛdɩnka mɩsʋ.
10Brɛá nɛklɩ ɔnɔ su kpoli fʋ Nana Bulu a,
besia mɩ.
11Brɛá nɔpʋ kpekpe bwɛ mɩ tati dɩdahɛ a,
nemli blɩbi dɩnka amʋ́ ɔnɔsʋ.
12Mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn sɔɔn betsia blɩ dɩnsʋ.
Nta abʋpʋ bɔwa mɩ ɩlʋtɔ.
13Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ fʋ Nana Bulu netsia su kpoli.
Oo Bulu, brɛá iletsia fʋ a,
pʋ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ fʋ nkpahɔá igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
14Lɛ mɩ lɛ ɔfrɔdɔ anfɩtɔ, mási mɩ ammɛ.
Lɛ mɩ lɛ mɩ alupʋ anfɩ ɩbɩ.
Bɩtɩa mɩ lɛ ntsu-ibun anfɩtɔ.
15Máha ntsu anfɩ ɩbʋla kɩta mɩ,
ankpada wie ntsu-ibuntɔ,
ntɛ lowu ɩpʋ mɩ.
16Nana Bulu, sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ,
tsufɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ alɛ.
Fʋ nwewun kpɔnkpɔntɩ amʋ sʋ
damli kɩ mɩ.
17Mápʋ ansɩtɔ ŋain fʋ osumbi.
Ɩladʋn mɩ, wa ɔsa sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
18Kpʋkpɛ ba bɛka lɛ mɩ.
Ka mɩ lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
19Fʋyin mɩ asiabi, fʋyin mɩ pɛlɩ
pʋ́ mɩ nsʋpa.
Fawun mɩ adʋn fɛ́ɛ́.
20Amʋ́ asiabi labwiebwie mɩ,
ɩlatu mɩ awútɔ.
Nkɩ mbɛɛ, ɔkʋ obówun mɩ nwɛ,
ntɛ kɩta ɩklʋn wa mɩ ɩwɩtɔ,
tamɛ mmenya ɔhaa.
21Brɛa akʋn dɛ mɩ a, bɔwa atɔ atɔtɔ ha mɩ bɛɛ, ngyi.
Brɛá ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ mɩ a, bɔpʋ nta-ɔdaɩ ha mɩ bɛɛ nnun.
22Amʋ́ ɔpʋnʋ tswɩhɛ ɩbwɛ yibi, ɩkɩta amʋ́.
Amʋ́ ɔdwɛ ogyikpa ɩbwɛ agbla, ɩkpa kɩta amʋ́.
23Ansɩtɔ iklun amʋ́, mɛnɩ bʋmɛ́ɛtra wun atɔ;
amʋ́ osietɔ ɩkpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
24Fʋ ɔblɔ ɩba amʋ́sʋ.
Nya ɔblɔ kpitii amʋ́sʋ.
25Amʋ́ woyi ɩdɩ kpan,
amʋ́ abuntisʋ ɩkwɛ ɩfa,
26tsufɛ bʋdɛ ɔha amʋʋ fɛda lɛ da amʋ sia.
Bɛla bʋdɛ ɔha amʋʋ fepilan amʋ ɔyɩya kaɩn.
27Lɛ amʋ́ ɩla, afʋlalɛ amʋ́ ɩla.
Bʋmánya ɔlɩɩkpa fʋ asʋn ogyikɛ.
28Tsitsi amʋ́ ada lɛ nkpa ɔwʋlʋtɔ.
Amʋ́ ada mátsia yile abwɛpʋ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩtɔ.
29Mɩ mʋ́ a, nawa nwɛ, ɩwɩ dɛ mɩ ɔsɩn.
Oo Bulu, ha fʋ nkpahɔ ɩbwɛ mɩ okpikplikpa.
30Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ Bulu ɩda.
Nɔpʋ ɩpan tsu mʋ fʋa.
31Ɩnɩ bégyi Nana Bulu ansɩ,
dʋn ɔnantswie yinhɛá ɔbʋ nsiebi mʋ́a awatɛ.
32Aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ bʋwun mʋ́, nya ansigyi.
Bulu adunkapʋ, ɩklʋn ɩdɩ mlɩ asɩ,
33tsufɛ Nana Bulu tɛyaa asʋ nu aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ isu.
Ɔtamakɩ mʋ aha ánɩ́ bʋda obu, ki nwun.
34Ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ.
Ɔpʋ mʋ́a mʋ́tɔ ntobiá bʋkɩ nkpa fɛ́ɛ́ bʋkanfʋ mʋ,
35tsufɛ Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ Sion nkpa.
Ɔbɛ́lada Yuda awulu.
Mʋ aha bétsia ɩnʋ, gyi ɔsʋlʋ amʋ.
36Mʋ asumpʋ abi-aná obégyi ɔsʋlʋ amʋ,
mʋ adwɛpʋ ɛ bétsia ɩnʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 70
Content:
Bulu, Gyi Mɩ Bʋalɛ Ogyipʋ Pʋ́ Mɩ Ɔlɛpʋ
Dawid ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Ɩkaɩn-afɔdɩɛ ɩlʋ.
1Oo Bulu, bɔhɔ mɩ.
Nana Bulu, wa ɔsa begyi mɩ bʋalɛ!
2Ha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ lowu kle,
amʋ́ nwun ikotsoli.
Ha aha ánɩ́ bʋdekleá bɔ́pʋ lalahɛ gyi mɩ
abʋpʋ nsʋpa yinki.
3Ha ansɩ iwu aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ bɛɛ,
“Ɛhɛɛn, ɛhɛɛn, anɩlanya mʋ!”
4Tamɛ ha ɩwɩ ɩsankɩ aha ánɩ́ bʋtodunka fʋ fɛ́ɛ́,
abʋnya fʋ ɩwɩ ansigyi.
Aha ánɩ́ fʋ nkpahɔ bʋ amʋ́ ɔdwɛ,
bʋkplʋn blɩ lablɩ bɛɛ, “Bulu lomoni!”
5Mɩ mʋ́ a, ohiani ngyi, mma tɔtɔ.
Oo Bulu, ha mʋ́ ɩwa ɔsa ha mɩ.
Oo Nana Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ pʋ́ mɩ ɔlɛpʋ.
Mási tsia mʋ́sʋ!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 71
Content:
Bulu, Mási Mɩ Wa Ɔkpa
1Nana Bulu, fʋ nasrɩ tanʋ.
Máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
2Fʋ yilebwɛ sʋ lɛ mɩ.
Yaa asʋ, afʋhɔ mɩ nkpa!
3Bwɛ mɩ ɩbʋta ánɩ́ nɛ́talɩ srɩ beŋain fʋ alʋntɔ bregyibrɛ.
Fʋlɛblɩ fɛɛ, fɔ́hɔ mɩ nkpa,
tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɩbʋta pʋ́ mɩ oŋainkpa kpikpli.
4Oo mɩ Bulu, hɔ mɩ tsu aha lalahɛ ɩbɩtɔ;
tsu owuntɔlɩnpʋ pʋ́ lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
5Tsufɛ mɩ Wie Nana Bulu, fʋ ɔkpa ndɛkɩ.
Fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn tsu mɩ nyebitɔ bɩmbɩ ɔpá.
6Fʋsʋ nkpɛn tsu mɩ ɔkwɩɩkɛ.
Fʋlɛlɛ mɩ tsu mɩ yin ɩwɩtɔ.
Fʋ nɛ́kanfʋ bregyibrɛ.
7Mɩ ɩwɩ bʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ wanwan,
tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ okpikplikpa.
8Mʋ́ sʋ mméesi fʋ kanfʋ,
si fʋ numnyam wa ekekegyiɛkɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
9Mátswɛ mɩ kpʋkpʋ, brɛ anfɩ nadan.
Mási mɩ wa ɔkpa, brɛ anfɩ napɔn;
10tsufɛ mɩ alupʋ bʋdɛ mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ.
Aha ánɩ́ bʋdekleá bɔ́mɔ mɩ bakan mɩsʋ.
11Bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Mlɩsrɩ gya mʋ, amlɩkɩta mʋ.
Bulu lakpa mʋ ɔma,
ɔma ɔhɔpʋ.”
12Oo Bulu, máwa ɩfɔ mɩ ɩwɩ.
Mɩ Bulu, kokoli wa ɔsa bɔhɔ mɩ!
13Ha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ ɩla lɛ, abʋfwɩ.
Pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ lalahɛ dunka fɛ́ɛ́, abʋsʋpa.
14Nɛ́kɩ fʋ ɔkpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ, lakanfʋ fʋ.
15Nɛ́blɩ yileá fʋdɛbwɛ, pʋhɔ aha nkpa ekekegyiɛkɛ,
tsufɛ tɔá fabwɛ lɔdʋbɩ,
mmɛ́ɛtalɩ blɩ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́.
16Nɛ́ba bɛkanfʋ anɩ Wie Nana Bulu gyumagyihɛ akpɔnkpɔntɩ.
Nɛ́kanfʋ mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ.
Mʋ nkʋlɛ klɛ nɛ́kanfʋ.
17Oo Bulu, fasuna mɩ atɔ tsu mɩ nyebitɔ.
Ntɛbla aha ofula ánɩ́ fabwɛ bɔfʋn ndɛ.
18Oo Bulu, ɩnɩá nadan, mɩ nwun lafuli o a, mási mɩ wa ɔkpa.
Yɔfʋn brɛá nada fʋ tumi ɔkan suna abi-aná,
pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bɛ́tra bɛlɩn fɛ́ɛ́.
19Oo Bulu, fʋ yilebwɛ lɔfʋa da nwʋlʋta ɩfa.
Fʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ lɔdʋbɩ.
Mɩ Bulu, ma lɔfʋn fʋ.
20Faha nawun ipian dʋbɩ.
Fʋ ɔbɛ́lawa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn,
lɛ mɩ tsu afulitɔ.
21Fɛ́lawa mɩ numnyam dʋn,
lalwii mɩ klʋn.
22Mɩ Bulu, mɩ ɛ nɛ́da akwɛ kanfʋ fʋ,
fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩwa sʋ.
Israel Ɔha Wankɩhɛ, nɔ́wa ɩlʋ da ɔsankuo ha fʋ.
23Nɔ́kplʋn wa ɩlʋ ansigyisʋ ha fʋ.
Faka lɛ mɩ ɔkla, mɩ ɛ nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ.
24Nɛ́da yileá fʋdɛbwɛ ha mɩ ɔkan ekekegyiɛkɛ.
Tsufɛ pɛlɩ lakɩta aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ lalahɛ dunka, basʋpa.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 72
Content:
Bulu Ha Fʋ Yilebwɛ Itsia Owiesʋ
Salomo ɩlʋ.
1Oo Bulu, ha owie fʋ asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ,
afʋha fʋ yilebwɛ itsia mʋsʋ.
2Ha mʋ ɔpʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ gyi fʋ ɔmá asʋn,
ogyi ahianfɔ asʋn wanklaan ha amʋ́.
3Atɔ ɩkwɛ abwisʋ, ɩkwɛ ayintisʋ;
yile ɩba ɔmá amʋtɔ.
4Ogyi ɔmá amʋtɔ ahianfɔ asʋn wanklaan ha amʋ́.
Ɔlɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ,
ɔkwɛ nuna aha asisipʋ.
5Ɩnɩá owi mɔkʋsi lɩn,
ɔtsra ɛ mɔkʋsi fɛɩ anfɩ mʋ́ a,
amʋ́a amʋ́ abi-aná bʋmási fʋ ifu nya ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
6Ha owie iwiegyi ɩbwɛ fɛ nyankpʋ latswie wʋlɩ ɔsʋlʋá badɔ tswɩsʋ.
Fɛ nyankpʋ latswie pʋtɔɔ kɩta ɔsʋlʋ.
7Ɩwa alɛ ha yile abwɛpʋ mʋ bɩsʋ.
Iwilwii ɩhɩɛ tsia yɛfʋn brɛá ɔtsra obési fɛɩ.
8Ogyi iwie tsu ɔpʋ ɔnɔ yɛfʋn ɔpʋ ɔnɔ.
Tsu Eufrate bʋnkpa ɔnɔ yɛfʋn ɔsʋlʋ amʋ ɔka.
9Dimbisʋ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋba ɩwɩasɩ ha mʋ,
mʋ alupʋ abʋwɩ ɩsɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ.
10Tarsis awie pʋ́ ntsu agbemgbesʋ awie bʋsʋra atokiehɛ ba mʋ.
Saba mʋ́a Seba awie bʋkie mʋ atɔ.
11Awie fɛ́ɛ́ bʋda akpawunu ha mʋ,
ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́ abʋsum mʋ,
12tsufɛ ɔtɛlɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ, bʋdesu kpoli mʋ,
pʋ́ ahianfɔá bʋma ɔhaa.
13Otowun ipian owunpʋ pʋ́ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔma tɔtɔ nwɛ,
ɔtɔhɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ nkpa.
14Ɔtɛlɛ amʋ́ ɔkla lɛ awuntɔlɩnpʋ mʋ́a asisipʋ ɩbɩtɔ,
tsufɛ amʋ́ nkpa bʋ ibia mʋ ansɩtɔ.
15Ɔdan fuli nwun fututuutu,
abʋpʋ sika pɛpɛ tsua Seba ba mʋ.
Aha bʋbɔ mpaɩ ha mʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
abʋkʋlɩ oyula ha mʋ ekekegyiɛkɛ.
16Ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ atɔ ɩhɩɛ wa alɛ,
ɩbʋla abʋsʋ.
Iswie wanklaan fɛ alɩá itoswie Lebanon ɔsʋlʋsʋ,
awulu amʋtɔ atsiapʋ abʋklɛɩ fɛ ɩfa.
17Ɩnɩá owi mɔkʋsi lɩn anfɩ mʋ́ a,
bʋmási mʋ ɩda tɩ.
Ɔbwɛ oyula ha ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́,
abʋkʋlɩ oyula ha mʋ.
18Bʋkanfʋ Nana Bulu, Israel Bulu amʋ.
Mʋ nkʋlɛ tɔbwɛ ofula.
19Bʋkanfʋ mʋ numnyam ɩda brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ numnyam ɩbʋla ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɩbá mʋ́tɔ, ɩtra laba mʋ́tɔ.
20Alɩ Yisai mʋ bi Dawid lɔpʋmɔ mʋ mpaɩ ɔnɔ nɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 73
Content:
Ɔwʋlʋ 3sɩ
Israel Ɩlʋ 73-89
Bulu Gyi Mɩ Ɔwʋnlɩn
Asaf kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Lɛlɛ, Bulu bʋ awɩtɔlɛ ha Israelfɔ,
ha aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ɩklʋntɔ lɛtɩn.
2Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ a, ɩlasi hlɛ tɛkɩ natsa pan.
Ɩlasi tukuriibi, tɛkɩ nasrɛɩ dɩda.
3Tsufɛ ɩwɩ atsupʋ asʋn lɛpɛ mɩ ansɩ,
brɛá nowun ánɩ́ amʋ́ lalahɛ ɔma o, ɩdɛ alɛ wa ha amʋ́.
4Bʋmɛdɛ ipian kʋkʋ wun.
Awútɔ bʋ amʋ́ alɛ, bʋbʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
5Asʋn tamatʋ amʋ́, fɛ aha atrahɛ.
Ɩkplan tamatʋ amʋ́ wa aba, fɛ aha bamba.
6Ɩwɩtsu gyi amʋ́ ɔmɛtɔ-atɔ,
owuntɔlɩn gyi amʋ́ tati dɩdahɛ.
7Bawa nfɔ, ha amʋ́ ansibi-aklambi ladalɩ hlɔtɩɩ.
Mimlala labʋla amʋ́ ɩklʋn.
8Bʋtɔbwɛ ɔblɔla, blɩ nyanyala.
Bʋtotsu ɩwɩ, sisi aha.
9Bʋtɛblɩ Bulu ɩwɩ abususʋ.
Amʋ́ asʋn blɩhɛ labʋla ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
10Mʋ́ sʋ Bulu aha bakpla buo amʋ́,
bʋmɛdɛ lalahɛ kʋkʋ wun amʋ́ ɩwɩ.
11Bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Bulu mɛ́ɛbɩ.
Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie móowun.”
12Tamɛ kɩ, ɩwɩ lalwii aha lalahɛ anfɩ.
Togyitɔ ɩdɛ alɛ wa ha amʋ́.
13Kʋkʋ kpalɩ nawankɩ mɩ klʋntɔ,
fwɩ ɩbɩ lɛ lalahɛtɔ,
14tsufɛ faha ndɛ ipian wun ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Fʋtɛbɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ nyankɩgyinyankɩ.
15Nɩ mɩ ɛ ntɛblɩ asʋn lalahɛ alɩ a,
tɛkɩ mmɔwa ɔnɔkwalɩ ha fʋ abi-aná.
16Nɔbɔ mbɔdɩá nónu asʋn anfɩ asɩ,
tamɛ ɩlɛhɩɛ wa ɔnlɩn wa mɩ!
17Yɔfʋn ɛkɛá nɔyɔ fʋ otsiakpa,
asa nɛbɩ tɔá ɩbɔ́tʋ aha lalahɛ.
18Lɛlɛ, ɔsrɛɩkpa fɔpʋ amʋ́ lɩɩ.
Fʋtɛha bʋtɛdɩda, kʋsʋ ma amʋ́ ɩnʋ.
19Bʋtɔkɔsɩ ta,
ifu tɛkpa amʋ́ natɩ!
20Bʋgyi fɛ okudeá ɔha lakun tan mʋ́sʋ ɔyɩkɛhɛ nyankɩ.
O mɩ Wie, fɔkʋsʋ fʋtamakaɩn amʋ́sʋ.
21Brɛá mɩ klʋn lɔtɔ mɩ,
ɩlɔhɔ mɩ ɔsɩn a,
22nemimla, mmeyin tɔtɔ.
Nemli fɛ ɔbwɩ fʋ ansɩtɔ.
23Tamɛ fʋmɔkʋdamli ɔma ha mɩ kɩ.
Fʋdɛ mɩ gyɔpɩ ɩbɩ.
24Fʋtɔpʋ fʋ atosunahɛ kpa mɩ.
Mʋ́ ɔma a, fɔ́hɔ mɩ wa numnyamtɔ.
25Mma ɔhaa ɔsʋsʋ ɩnʋ dʋn fʋ.
Mmehian tɔtɔ ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ tsɩa fʋtɔ.
26Nɩ nɔpɔn, ɔyɩtɔ ɩkpɔn mɩ o a,
Bulu gyi mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn
pʋ́ mɩ ogyikpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
27Lɛlɛ, aha ánɩ́ bawa ɩfɔ fʋ ɩwɩ bɔ́fwɩ.
Kɩ, fɛ́lɛ aha ánɩ́ badalɩ fʋ ɔma fɛ́ɛ́ ɩnʋ.
28Tamɛ ɩbʋ mɩ alɛá nétsia Bulu wa.
Mɩ Wie Nana Bulu napʋbwɛ mɩ ɔtanʋkpa.
Nɛ́bla aha mʋ gyumagyihɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 74
Content:
Bulu, Fʋgyi Owie Bɩmbɩ Ɔpá, Fʋdɛ Nkpa Hɔ Ɔsʋlʋsʋ
Asaf atosuna ɩlʋ.
1Oo Bulu, ntogyi sʋ fakina anɩ plɩplɩplɩ?
Ntogyi sʋ fahɩɛ nya ɔblɔ fʋ ɩbantɔ akufasʋ alɩ?
2Kaɩn ɔpasua amʋʋ fɛka lɛ,
bʋgyi fʋ ogyikpa tsu bɩmbɩ ɔpá amʋsʋ!
Kaɩn fʋ otsiakpa Sion ɩbʋ amʋsʋ.
3Olupʋ layinta fʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Bɛkɩ mʋ́ abunti bwiebwiehɛá ɩma tɔtɔ bwɛtɔ.
4Ansɩ legyi fʋ alupʋ, bʋdɛ okitikiti.
Beyiyi ɩsʋgyi ɔfranka fʋ ofiakpa ɩnʋ.
5Ɩnʋ lɔbwɛ fɛ ɩpʋdayiá bapʋ ɛfɛ kun nyi mʋ́tɔ.
6Bɔpʋ ɛfɛ mʋ́a ɔpɛwa mamaɩn
ɩnʋ atosrehɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
7Bɔwa fʋ otsiakpa ɩnʋ ogya plɩplɩplɩ,
pʋ ifin da mʋ́.
8Amʋ́ wʋlɛwʋlɛ bɛblɩ wa amʋ́ ɩklʋntɔ bɛɛ, “Ahɩɛ ba amʋ́ asɩ.”
Ɩnɩ sʋ bɔwa Bulu ofiakpa fɛ́ɛ́ ogya ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ.
9Anɩmɛdɛ osuna kʋkʋ wun.
Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ ɔkʋkʋ ɛ tra ɔma ɩnʋ.
Anɩmeyin ɛkɛá ɩbɔ́mɔ ɔnɔ.
10Oo Bulu, ɔmɛnkɛ kʋraa olupʋ osi fʋsʋ plei?
Alɩ ɔbɔ́kpɔɩ fʋ ɩda brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ nɩ?
11Ntogyi faya fʋ gyɔpɩ-ɩbɩ ɔma?
Lɛ fʋ ɩbɩ ayatɔ, afʋmɔ amʋ́.
12Mɩ Bulu, fʋgyi owie bɩmbɩ ɔpá,
fʋdɛ nkpa hɔ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
13Fʋlɔpʋ fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn bɔɩ ɔpʋtɔ,
fobwiebwie ntsutso-awɔ nwun.
14Fobwiebwie ntsutso-ɔbwɩ Leviatan nwun,
pʋ́ mʋ́ bwɛ atogyihɛ bʋla dimbitɔ-mbwɩ.
15Fɛha abun pʋ́ abʋnkpa letii,
fɛha ntsu akpɔnkpɔntɩ lɛkpɩ.
16Fʋbʋ ɔpa mʋ́a onye,
fʋlɛlɛ owi mʋ́a ɔtsra.
17Fʋlɔwa ɔka ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́,
fɔbwɛ lɩlɩ mʋ́a nyankpʋtswiebɩ.
18Oo Nana Bulu, kaɩn ánɩ́ olupʋ amʋ dɛ fʋsʋ plei.
Ɔmá mimlahɛ dɛ fʋ ɩda kpɔɩ.
19Anɩgyi fʋ alɔpɔ, mási anɩ wa mbwɩkɩtatɔ ɩbɩtɔ.
Mátan fʋ ahianfɔ nkpasʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
20Kaɩn fʋ ntamsʋ,
tsufɛ owuntɔlɩn labʋla ɔsʋlʋ amʋ okoklobigyiokoklobitɔ.
21Máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ amʋ́ sisi.
Ha ahianfɔ pʋ́ ipian awunpʋ anfɩ abʋkanfʋ fʋ ɩda.
22Oo Bulu, kʋsʋ kɔ fʋ ɩkɔ!
Kaɩn alɩá aha mimlahɛ anfɩ bʋdɛ fʋsʋ plei ekekegyiɛkɛ.
23Mátan kʋsʋ anfɩ fʋ alupʋ bakʋsʋ lɩɩ fʋsʋ anfɩsʋ.
Mátan olu mʋ́a okitikitiá fʋ alupʋ bʋdɛsʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 75
Content:
Bulu Tegyi Asʋn
Asaf kanfʋ-ɩlʋá bɔ́pʋha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ “Máyinta” ɔmɛ wa mʋ́.
1Oo Bulu, anɩdɛ fʋ ɩpan da.
Anɩdɛ fʋ ɩpan da, fʋma ɩfɔ.
Aha bʋdɛ atɔ akpɔnkpɔntɩá fʋdɛbwɛ blɩ.
2Bulu ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ mɩ brɛá nahɩɛ ɩfʋn a,
négyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
3Brɛá ɔsʋlʋ mʋ́a mʋ́sʋ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋdɛkpɩnkɩ a,
mɩtɛkɩta mʋ́ nkpabi lɩɩ kinkiinkin.”
Ɩya.
4“Ɩwɩ otsupʋ, ndɛ fʋ bla mbɛɛ, ‘Mátsu ɩwɩ.>
Ɔha lalahɛ, ndɛ fʋ ɛ bla mbɛɛ, ‘Mákanfʋ ɩwɩ.
5Mákanfʋ ɩwɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ,
ntɛ ka ɔnɔtɔ.> ”
6Tsufɛ megyi owi ɔdalɩkpa, owi ɔkplɩwiekpa,
gyɔpɩsʋ ntɛ bɩnasʋ ɔha tsufʋa totsu.
7Mboun Bulu tegyi asʋn.
Mʋtɛha ɔkʋ ɩpɔn, ɔtɛha ɔkʋ asʋ.
8Nana Bulu dɛ ɛwɛ,
nta ánɩ́ bafra mʋ́tɔ, idefu pɔpɔpɔ bʋ mʋ́tɔ.
Ɔbɛ́tsɛɩ mʋ ha ɔyɩtɔ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́
bónun mʋ́ kplɔkplɔkplɔ, tu mʋ́ opo.
9Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ nɛ́da tɔá Bulu labwɛ ɔkan brɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ Yakob Bulu.
10Ɔbɛ́da aha lalahɛ ɩbɩ bia,
wa aha yile ɔwʋnlɩn.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 76
Content:
Ma Ɔbɛ́talɩ Lɩɩ Bulu Ɔblɔ Ɔnɔ?
Asaf kanfʋ-ɩlʋá bɔ́pʋha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ ɔsankuo da mʋ́.
1Bʋyin Bulu Yuda ɔmátɔ,
bʋtobu mʋ ɩda Israel ɔmátɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
2Mʋ woyi bʋ Salem,
Sionbʋsʋ.
3Ɩnʋ olebiabia mʋ alupʋ mbɩn pɩɔnpɩɔn,
amʋ́ akʋtʋ, ndayi pʋ́ amʋ́ akɔtɔ nɩ.
Ɩya.
4Oo Bulu, fɛhɩɛ wankɩ.
Fʋbʋ numnyam dʋn ɩbʋá mbwɩ bʋbʋ mʋsʋ bregyibrɛ.
5Faswɩɩ amʋ́ ɩsa akɔpʋ akinkin atɔ,
bawu yɔɩ.
Amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋkʋ mɛ́talɩ tsu ɩbɩ.
6Oo Yakob Bulu, fʋ ɩyɩn sʋ
mpɔnkɔ mʋ́a amʋ́sʋ adɩnkapʋ bawu si bʋda.
7Tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ a, fʋ ɩwɩ bʋ ifu!
Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ lɩɩ fʋ ɔblɔ ɔnɔ?
8Fobua amʋ́ asʋn tsu ɔsʋsʋ.
Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ benya ifu, kpa ɔnɔ bun mwɩ.
9Brɛá fɔkʋsʋ fóbua amʋ́ asʋn a,
fɔhɔ ɔsʋlʋsʋ ahianfɔ fɛ́ɛ́ nkpa.
Ɩya.
10Lɛlɛ, nyankpʋsa ɔblɔ tɔwa fʋ numnyam,
fʋtɔpʋ ɔblɔ amʋ trahɛ dɩda.
11Mlɩtsula ɩkɔ Nana Bulu, mlɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ, amlɩgyi mʋ́sʋ.
Mlɩha nsɩnɛ ɩnʋ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́
abʋpʋ atokiehɛ ba ɔha anfɩ mʋ ɩwɩ bʋ ifu anfɩ.
12Ɔtɛha ɔmásʋ agyipʋ ɔkla tɛsrɩ amʋ́,
ɔtɔpʋ ifu wa ɔyɩtɔ awietɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 77
Content:
Bulu Ɔkpa Lɔwankɩ
Asaf kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ Yedutun.
1Ntosu kpoli Bulu kʋklʋkʋʋ.
Ntɔkplʋn kʋklʋkʋʋ mbɛɛ, ɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
2Ntodunka mɩ Wie mɩ ɔkplankɛ.
Ntotsu ɩbɩ fʋa onye fɛ́ɛ́, ndɛ mpaɩ bɔ ha mʋ,
tamɛ ɩklʋn mɛdɩ mɩ ɩwɩtɔ.
3Ntɛkaɩn Bulusʋ, ahʋmɩtɩ tɛkɩta mɩ.
Ntɔgywɩɩn mʋ ɩwɩ, ɔkla tɛsrɩ mɩ.
Ɩya.
4Fʋmɛha mmɛdɩdɩ onye fɛ́ɛ́.
Asʋn ladʋn mɩ, mmɛtalɩ tɔɩ.
5Nosusu nkɛá ɩlatsʋn ɩwɩ.
Nɛkaɩn bɩmbɩ ɔpá nfiá ɩlatsʋnsʋ.
6Nɛkaɩn onye ɩlʋá ntɔwasʋ.
Nɔgywɩɩn mʋ́ ɩwɩ, fɩtɛ ɩwɩ mbɛɛ,
7“Mɩ Wie obékina ɔha fɛ́ɛ́,
ɔmɛ́ɛtra wun mʋ nwɛ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ?
8Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka laka itin fɛ́ɛ́?
Ɔmɛ́ɛtra bwɛ tɔá ɔlɛhɩɛ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́?
9Alatan mʋ nwewunsʋ?
Ntɛ ɔblɔ lahɔ mʋ awɩtɔlɛ otsiakpa?”
Ɩya.
10Ɩnʋ nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Mʋ́á ɩdɛ mɩ han gyi,
Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie amʋ tumi latsɛ.”
11Oo Nana Bulu, nɛ́kaɩn fʋ atɔ bwɛhɛsʋ.
Ee, nɛ́kaɩn fʋ ofula ánɩ́ fɔbwɛ bɩmbɩsʋ.
12Nɔ́gywɩɩn fʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩwɩ,
gywɩɩn atɔ akpɔnkpɔntɩá fabwɛ ɩwɩ.
13Oo Bulu, fʋ ɔkpa lɔwankɩ.
Ɔkpɩ ɔmɔmʋ lomoni fɛ anɩ Bulu?
14Fʋgyi Buluá fʋtɔbwɛ ofula.
Falɛ fʋ tumi suna ɔmá-ɔmátɔ.
15Fʋlɔpʋ fʋ tumi ka lɛ fʋ aha,
Yakob mʋa Yosef abi-aná.
Ɩya.
16Ɔpʋ lowun fʋ.
Oo Bulu, brɛá ɔpʋ lowun fʋ a, olekikini.
Ee, mʋ́ okluklukpa lɛkpɩnkɩ.
17Agyinde lotswie ntsu,
ɔprada lɔpʋtɩ nwʋlʋtasʋ.
Ɩlɛkpa ogya yɔ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ.
18Fʋ ɔprada lotsula wa kpankpantrudutɔ.
Ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́ lɛkpa ogya,
ɔsʋlʋ lɛkpɩnkɩ kpakpakpa.
19Fʋ ɔkpa ɩna ɔpʋtɔ.
Fɛnatɩ tsʋn ntsu akpɔnkpɔntɩtɔ,
tamɛ bʋmowun fʋ ɔtsakpa.
20Fɔtsʋn Mose mʋa Aaronsʋ
kpa fʋ aha fɛ akufa.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 78
Content:
Bulu, Aha Nwɛ Owunpʋ Mʋ́a Lakpan Osikiepʋ
Asaf atosuna ɩlʋ.
1Oo mɩ ɔmá, mlɩyaa asʋ amlɩnu mɩ atosunahɛ.
Mlɩnu mɩ ɔnɔtɔ asʋn!
2Nɔ́tɔɩ ayebisʋ,
pʋlɛ bɩmbɩ asʋn ŋaɩnhɛ ɔwan.
3Asʋn ánɩ́ anɩ anain bɛbla anɩ,
anɩlanu, anɩlabɩ.
4Anɩméesi ŋain amʋ́ abi-aná.
Abɛ́bla abi-aná ánɩ́ bɛ́ba bɛlɩn Nana Bulu tumi,
mʋ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩ pʋ́ mʋ bwɛhɛ.
5Bulu lɛlɛ ɔnɔ suna Yakob abi-aná.
Ɔlɔpʋ mʋ atosunahɛ ha Israelfɔ,
ɔlɛbla anɩ anain ɔbɛɛ, bʋpʋsuna amʋ́ abi.
6Mɛnɩ otuntufla pɔpwɛ abi ɛ bɛ́bɩ mʋ́,
pʋsuna amʋ́ abi,
7abʋpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ.
Bʋmátan mʋ atɔ bwɛhɛsʋ,
bʋgyi mʋ mblasʋ.
8Mɛnɩ bʋmɔ́ɔbwɛ fɛ amʋ́ anain
ánɩ́ bɔwa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn, kʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulusʋ.
Bʋmɔpʋ amʋ́ ɩklʋn dɩnka mʋsʋ,
bʋmɔwa ɔnɔkwalɩ ɛ ha mʋ.
9Efraim mbɩn atswɩpʋ bɛdɩda atɔ,
tamɛ bɔkɔ srɩ ɩsa ɔkɔkɛ.
10Bʋmegyi amʋ́a Bulu nsɩnɛ ntamsʋ,
bekina mʋ atosunahɛsʋ gyi.
11Bɛtan mʋ bwɛhɛ
pʋ́ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩá ɔlɔbwɛ suna amʋ́sʋ.
12Bɛtan mʋ́á ɔlɔbwɛ ha amʋ́ anain Soan ɔsʋlʋsʋ,
Egyipte ɔmátɔ kʋraasʋ.
13Oleye ɔpʋtɔ anyɔ ha amʋ́ bɔtsʋn,
ɔlɛha ɔpʋ ntsu lɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ fɛ bunti.
14Ɔlɛha agyinde legya amʋ́ nkpa,
kpa amʋ́ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ,
ogya plɛnplɛn lɛkpa amʋ́ onye fɛ́ɛ́.
15Ɔlɛmaɩn abʋta ɔsʋlʋkpan amʋtɔ,
ntsu kpɔnkpɔntɩ lɛdalɩ, bonun.
16Ɔlɛha ntsu kpɔnkpɔntɩ lɛdalɩ tsu bʋta amʋtɔ,
bʋla, ɩdɛtsʋn.
17Mʋ́ ɔma oo, bɛtra tsia bwɛ lakpan
pʋkʋsʋ lɩɩ Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wiesʋ ɔsʋlʋkpan amʋsʋ.
18Bɔsɔ Bulu kɩ amʋ́ ɩklʋntɔ bɛɛ,
ɔha amʋ́ atogyihɛá amʋ́ onuto bʋdekle.
19Bɔtɔɩ Bulusʋ bɛɛ,
“Bulu ɔbɛ́talɩ tswɩ ɔpʋnʋ ha anɩ ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ nfɩ?
20Ɔlɔpʋ oyi pɩtɩ bʋta, ntsu lɛfɛn dalɩ,
bʋla, ɩhɩɛ dɛtsʋn.
Ɔbɛ́talɩ nya iye mʋ́a atogyihɛ ɛ ha mʋ aha?”
21Brɛá Nana Bulu lonu asʋn anfɩ a,
ɔblɔ lɛhɩɛ kɩta mʋ.
Ɔlɛha ogya letsii wa Yakob abi-anátɔ.
Olenya ɔblɔ kɩtakɩta Israelfɔsʋ,
22tsufɛ bʋmɔhɔ mʋ gyi,
bʋmɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋ nkpahɔ tumisʋ.
23Tamɛ mʋ́ o a, ɔlɛlɛ ɔnɔ wa nwʋlʋta,
ɔsʋsʋ lefinki.
24Ɔlɛha mana lotswie bun amʋ́ begyi,
ɔlɛha amʋ́ ɔsʋsʋ atogyihɛ.
25Anyankpʋsa begyi Bulu-abɔpʋ atogyihɛ.
Ɔlɛha amʋ́ atogyihɛ, begyi alɩá bɛ́talɩ.
26Ɔlɛha owi ɔdalɩkpa afu lɔtsʋn ɔsʋsʋ,
ɔlɔpʋ mʋ tumi bɩtɩa ɔsasɩ afu ba.
27Ɔlɛkpakpa mbubwi bun amʋ́,
benya aye tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ fɛ ɔpʋ ɔnɔ ɩsɩ.
28Ɔlɛha bɛkpakpa bun amʋ́ ɔswɩɩkpa,
bomli amʋ́ otsiakpa.
29Ɔlɛha amʋ́ tɔá bʋdekle.
Mʋ́ sʋ amʋ́tɔ okugyiɔkʋ legyi mwɛ.
30Tamɛ botsutsua abʋgyi amʋ́ awɔlɩtɔ amʋ ta,
atogyihɛ amʋ mɛta amʋ́ ɔnɔtɔ,
31Bulu lenya ɔblɔ amʋ́sʋ,
mɔ amʋ́tɔ nyasubi awʋnlɩnpʋ,
ba Israel asɩ.
32Tamɛ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔma a, bʋmesi lakpan bwɛ.
Bowun ofula ánɩ́ ɔdɛbwɛ, tamɛ bʋmɔhɔ mʋ gyi.
33Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛha amʋ́ nkɛ lɛta fɛ ɔŋɛ fʋhɛ.
Betsia tɩn wu amʋ́ nkpatɔ.
34Brɛá ɔdɛ amʋ́ mɔ a, bodunka mʋ ɔkpa.
Bɛdamli ɩklʋntɔ, dunka mʋ ɔkpa kinkiinkin.
35Bɛkaɩn ánɩ́ Bulu gyi amʋ́ ɩbʋta.
Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie Bulu gyi amʋ́ Ɔkalɛpʋ.
36Tamɛ mlɛ bɛmlɛ mʋ,
wa afunu suna mʋ.
37Bʋmɛhɩɛ pʋ amʋ́ ɩklʋn dɩnka mʋsʋ.
Bʋmegyi mʋa amʋ́nyɔ nsɩnɛ ntamsʋ.
38Tamɛ ɔbʋ nwewun.
Mʋ́ sʋ olesi amʋ́ lakpan kie,
ɔmɔmɔ amʋ́.
Oletsia kɩta ɩwɩ,
ɔmɛlɛ mʋ ɔblɔ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔwan.
39Ɔlɛkaɩn ánɩ́ ɔyʋlʋ bʋgyi.
Bʋtɔkɔsɩ wu, fɛ afuá ɩtsʋn ɩtamayinki ba.
40Betsia kʋsʋ lɩɩ mʋsʋ ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ ɩnʋ,
ahʋmɩtɩ lɛkɩta Bulu!
41Bɔsɔ mʋ kɩ, lasɔ mʋ kɩ,
pʋwa Israel Ɔha Wankɩhɛ amʋ ɔblɔ.
42Bʋmɛkaɩn mʋ tumi,
ntɛ ɛkɛá ɔlɛlɛ amʋ́ tsu adʋn ɩbɩsʋ.
43Nkɛá ɔlɛlɛ mʋ osuna ɔwan Egyipte
pʋ́ ofula ánɩ́ ɔlɔbwɛ Soan ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
44Ɔlɛha amʋ́ ntsu abʋnkpa lɛdamli obugya,
bʋmɛtalɩ tra nun ntsu.
45Ɔlɛlɛ awʋlʋ wa amʋ́tɔ, bodundun amʋ́,
lɛ nkle bʋla amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋsʋ, beyinta atɔ.
46Ɔlɛha adumpu bɔwɩ amʋ́ ndɔtɔ-atɔ,
atsantsankʋ beyinta amʋ́ atɔ-abi fɛ́ɛ́.
47Ɔlɛha atsufolibi lɛkpa tɩntɩn amʋ́ waɩn-afla.
Ɔlɛha ɔsʋlʋtɔ lolwii tsʋn, amʋ́ apɔntɔ lowu.
48Ɔlɛha atsufolibi lɛda amʋ́ mbwɩ yaɩhɛ mɔ,
ɔprada lɔtswɩ mɔmɔ amʋ́ nnantswie.
49Ɔlɛha mʋ ɔblɔ kpitii lɛba amʋ́sʋ,
mʋ ansɩpɛpɛ, mʋ ɩyɩn pʋ́ mʋ asʋn wunhɛ,
bʋgyi atoyinta-abɔpʋ ɔdɔm bɛba.
50Ɔlɛlɛ mʋ ɔblɔ ɔkpa.
Ometin amʋ́ lowu ɔkpa.
Ɔlɛha ɩlɔ lalahɛ lɛda amʋ́sʋ.
51Ɔlɔmɔ Egyiptefɔ woyigyiwoyitɔ bitɩ.
Amʋ́ yasʋtɔ abi gyankpapʋ, igyi Ham abi-aná ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
52Ɔlɛkpa mʋ aha dalɩ fɛ akufa.
Ologyo amʋ́ ɩwɩ, kpa amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋkpan amʋtɔ.
53Ɔlɛkpa amʋ́ kɔnkɔn, bʋmenya ifu,
tamɛ ɔpʋ lɛkɩta amʋ́ alupʋ mʋ́.
54Ɔlɛkpa amʋ́ bowie mʋ onuto ɔsʋlʋ ɔnɔ.
Abʋ ɔsʋlʋá ɔlɔpʋ mʋ tumi nyasʋ.
55Brɛá mʋ aha bɛba a,
olegya ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ atsiapʋ.
Oleye ɔsʋlʋ amʋ pʋbwɛ ogyikpa ha Israel abusuan-abusuan amʋ.
Ɔlɔhɔ amʋ́ yaɩ, ɩnʋ lɔbwɛ amʋ́ otsiakpa.
56Tamɛ mʋ́ oo bɔsɔ Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie Bulu kɩ,
kʋsʋ lɩɩ mʋsʋ,
bʋmegyi mʋ ɔnɔá ɔlɛlɛsʋ.
57Bɛdamli ɔma ha mʋ,
kina ɔnɔkwalɩwa ha mʋ fɛ amʋ́ anain.
Amʋ́ ɔkpa lɔnɔ fɛ ɩta wɔɩhɛá
bʋtamapʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋ́sʋ.
58Bɔpʋ amʋ́ ɩkpɩ ɔtswɛkpa wa mʋ ɔblɔ.
Ɩlɛha ɔlɔwa nunklun amʋ́ atunkusʋ.
59Brɛá Bulu lowun mʋ́ alɩ a, ɔlɛhɩɛ nya ɔblɔ,
wuna kina Israelfɔ plɩplɩplɩ.
60Ɩnʋ olesi mʋ otsiakpa ánɩ́ ɩbʋ Silo tswɩ.
Mʋ ɔtɩnɛá oletsia anyankpʋsatɔ.
61Ɔlɛha bɛkɩta mʋ Ntam-daka ndoun.
Alupʋ bɔhɔ mʋ numnyam anfɩ lɛ amʋ́ ɩbɩ.
62Ɔlɛha mʋ ɔmá lesin ɔdayi ɔnɔ,
ɔlɛhɩɛ nya ɔblɔ mʋ ogyikpa anfɩsʋ.
63Ogya lɔhɔ amʋ́ nyasubi fɛ́ɛ́,
amʋ́ mbitebi bʋmenya aklu tsia.
64Amʋ́ igyi ahapʋ besin ɔdayi ɔnɔ,
amʋ́ aka bʋmɛtalɩ su.
65Anɩ Wie lɔkʋsʋ fɛ ɔha ánɩ́ alawan tsinki,
fɛ ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ labʋ, ɔdɛkplʋn.
66Ɔlɛda mʋ alupʋ saɩn,
sʋpa amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́.
67Olekina Yosef abi-aná,
ɔmɛlɛ mʋ bi Efraim abusuan ɛ.
68Yuda abusuan mboun ɔlɛlɛ,
tsu ɩnʋ ɔlɛlɛ Sionbʋá ɔtɔdwɛ.
69Ɔlɔpwɛ mʋ otsiakpa fʋa fɛ ɔsʋsʋ.
Ɩlɩɩ kinkin fɛ ɔsʋlʋ, ibétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
70Ɔlɛlɛ mʋ osumbi Dawid,
ɔlɛkpa mʋ tsu akufa ɩbantɔ.
71Akufa mʋ́a amʋ́ abi ɔkpakpa ɔlɛlɛ mʋ tsu ɔbɛɛ,
ɔbɛkpa mʋ aha Yakob abi-aná Israelfɔ, bʋgyi mʋ ogyikpa.
72Dawid lɔpʋ ɩklʋn wanklaan kpa amʋ́,
damli ɩbɩ amʋ́sʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 79
Content:
Nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ Bulu, Gyi Anɩ Bʋalɛ
Asaf kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Oo Bulu, ɔmá-ɔmá babitiwie fʋ siadɩɛtɔ.
Bapʋ ifin da fʋ ɔtswɛkpa,
bwiebwie Yerusalem.
2Bapʋ fʋ asumbi afuli ha mbubwi,
pʋ aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa fʋ ɔma aye ha pututɔ-mbwɩ.
3Batsɛɩ amʋ́ obugya wʋlɩ fɛ ntsu bomli Yerusalem,
opulapʋ má ɩnʋ.
4Faha anɩlasʋpa apio aba ansɩtɔ.
Aha ánɩ́ bʋtsie bomli anɩ betsia mɔsɩ anɩ,
bwɛ anɩ ɔblɔla.
5Oo Nana Bulu, yɛfʋn ɔmɛnkɛ?
Fénya ɔblɔ si tsia kɩ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́?
Ɔmɛnkɛ fési ɔkabagya wa?
6Pʋ fʋ ɔblɔ gya ɔmá anfɩ bʋmeyin fʋ,
pʋ́ iwie ogyikpa anfɩ bʋtamatɩ fʋ ɩda anfɩ,
7tsufɛ bamɔ Yakob asɩfɔ,
bwie anɩ ɔmá.
8Mápʋ anɩ anain lakpan ka anɩ ɩkɔ.
Kɔsɩ wun anɩ nwɛ,
tsufɛ bayia anɩ manta ɔsʋlʋtɔ tantaantan!
9Anɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu, gyi anɩ bʋalɛ,
fʋ ɩda numnyam sʋ!
Lɛ anɩ, afʋsi anɩ lalahɛ kie anɩ,
fʋ ɩda amʋ sʋ.
10Ntogyi sʋ ɔmá-ɔmá bɛ́fɩtɛ bɛɛ,
“Nkɩ amʋ́ Bulu amʋ mɛ?”
Anɩ obugya amʋʋ ɔmá-ɔmá batsitsa amʋ sʋ,
ka amʋ́ ɩkɔ anɩ ansɩtɔ.
11Nu obu adɩpʋ isu!
Suna fʋ tumi kpɔnkpɔntɩ,
afʋlɛ aha ánɩ́ baha amʋ́ lowu ɩpɔn.
12Oo anɩ Wie, sʋpa ɔmá-ɔmá amʋʋ basʋpa fʋ amʋ,
ka amʋ́ ɩkɔ tse sienɔ.
13Mʋmʋ anɩá anɩgyi fʋ ɔmá pʋ́ fʋ ɩbantɔ akufa abɛ́da fʋ ɩpan,
anɩa anɩ abi-aná ánɩ́ bɛ́ba bɛlɩn fɛ́ɛ́ abétsia kanfʋ fʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 80
Content:
Nana Bulu, Yinkia Anɩ Ba Fʋ Wa
Asaf kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Dimbisʋ-saprada ɩwɩ ntam ɩlʋ.
1Oo Israel Ɔkpapʋ, yaa asʋ!
Fʋtɛkpa Yosef abi-aná fɛ akufa!
Fʋá fʋtsie akerubsʋ, wankɩ.
2Lɛ fʋ tumi ɔwan Efraim, Benyamin mʋa Manase abusuantɔ,
afʋbɔhɔ anɩ!
3Oo Bulu, yinkia anɩ ba fʋ wa.
Wa awɩtɔlɛ ha anɩ, afʋhɔ anɩ nkpa.
4Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ, Nana Bulu,
ɔmɛnkɛ fʋ aha mpaɩ bési fʋ ɔblɔ wa?
5Fʋlɛha ntsú lemli amʋ́ atogyihɛ,
fɔpʋ ntsú bʋla onunwe ha amʋ́ bonun.
6Faha aha ánɩ́ bʋtsie bomli anɩ bʋdɛkɔ anɩ ɔsʋlʋ sʋ,
alupʋ bʋdɛ anɩ mɔsɩ.
7Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Bulu, yinkia anɩ ba fʋ wa.
Wa awɩtɔlɛ ha anɩ, afʋhɔ anɩ nkpa.
8Fʋletsii Israel fɛ waɩn-ɩfla tsu Egyipte ba.
Fegya ɔmá-ɔmá, swie mʋ.
9Fʋlɛla ɔsʋlʋ ha mʋ,
ɔlɛlɛ nlin, yɛɩ bun mʋ́sʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
10Ɩlɔbwɛ olulukpa bun abʋsʋ.
Mʋ́ abambi lɛyɛɩ bun Lebanon ndum akpɔnkpɔntɩsʋ.
11Mʋ́ abambi lɛklɛɩ yɔ Mediteranea ɔpʋ ɔnɔ,
klɛɩ yewie Eufrate ntsu ɔnɔ.
12Ntɔ mɛɛ sʋ fabwie ɩban lɛ mʋ́,
mʋ́ asɩ atsʋnpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋdɛ mʋ́ abi kpɔtɩ?
13Abatafɔ bʋtɛdalɩ bɛtɩntɩn mʋ́,
mbwɩá bʋtɔtsʋn ndɔ amʋtɔ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtɔwɩ mʋ́.
14Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Bulu, kokoli damli kɩ.
Ko nwuntɔ wa kɩ waɩn-ɩfla anfɩ sɩsɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ,
afʋkɩ mʋ́sʋ.
15Fʋlɔpʋ fʋ gyɔpɩ swie mʋ,
obi anfɩ fawa mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn ha fʋ ɩwɩ anfɩ.
16Alupʋ bawa mʋ ogya mɔ, kun mʋ da.
Pʋ ɔblɔ damli kɩ amʋ́, afʋmɔ amʋ́.
17Tamɛ kpa fʋ gyɔpɩsʋ otsiapʋ anfɩ.
Ɔha anfɩ fɔwa mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn ha fʋ ɩwɩ anfɩ.
18Mʋmʋ anɩmɛ́ɛtra damli ɔma ha fʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Lawa anɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, asu kpoli fʋ.
19Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Bulu, Nana Bulu, yinkia anɩ ba fʋ wa.
Wa awɩtɔlɛ ha anɩ, afʋhɔ anɩ nkpa.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 81
Content:
Mɩ Aha, Mlɩyaa Asʋ Antɔɩ Kpla Mlɩ
Asaf ɩlʋá bɔ́pʋha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ Gatfɔ ɔmɛ da mʋ́.
1Mlɩtswɩ ope ha Bulu. Mʋgyi anɩ ɔwʋnlɩn.
Mlɩpʋ ansigyi sʋra okitikiti ha Yakob Bulu.
2Mlɩtswɩ ɩlʋ, mlɩkpɩnkɩ akatsa,
amlɩda nsankuoá ɩbʋ anulɛ.
3Mlɩfʋlɩ ɔkpɛ ɔtsra tsɔdalɩbɩ
pʋ́ mʋ́ danbɩ, brɛá anɩdɛ nkɛ gyi.
4Tsufɛ mbla igyi ha Israelfɔ,
Yakob Bulu amandɩɛ nɩ.
5Brɛá ɔlɛkpa amʋ́ dalɩ Egyipte ɔsʋlʋsʋ,
ɔlɛlɛ ɔnɔ anfɩ suna amʋ́ abi-aná.
Ɔkʋ lɛblɩ ɔblɩá ntamanutɔ ɔbɛɛ,
6“Nadɩnkɩ ipian lɛ mlɩsʋ,
lɛ mlɩ lɛ agyʋma kpekpletɔ.
7Mlɩlokpoli mɩ brɛá mlɩbʋ ipiantɔ, nɛlɛ mlɩ.
Ɔprada otsukpa oŋainkpa, notsula ha mlɩ.
Nɔsɔ mlɩ hogyi kɩ Meriba ɔsʋlʋsʋ.”
Ɩya.
8“Mɩ aha, mlɩyaa asʋ antɔɩ kpla mlɩ.
Israelfɔ, tɛkɩ nɩ mlónu mɩ asʋn a,
9mlɩmáha ɔkpɩ ɔkʋkʋ otsia mlɩtɔ.
Mlɩmáda akpawunu ha ɔmá bamba kʋkʋ ɔkpɩ.
10Mɩgyi Nana Bulu, mlɩ Buluá nɛkpa mlɩ dalɩ Egyipte ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
Mlɩyaa ɔnɔ, ampʋ atɔ wanklaan bʋla mʋ́.”
11“Tamɛ mɩ aha bʋmonu mɩ ɔmɛ.
Israelfɔ bʋmotsula ba ɩwɩasɩ ha mɩ.
12Amʋ́ asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn sʋ nesi ɔkpa ha amʋ,
bɔbwɛ tɔá bʋdekle.”
13“Ao, tɛkɩ nɩ mɩ aha bónu mɩ asʋn,
Israelfɔ bótsu mɩ ɔkpa a!
14Tɛkɩ ɩmɔ́ɔwa ɔpá, nɛ́ba amʋ́ alupʋ asɩ,
bɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ.
15Tɛkɩ mɩ alupʋ bɛ́da akpawunu ha mɩ ifusʋ,
nɛ́bɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
16Tɛkɩ nɔ́pʋ atogyihɛ wanklaan bʋla mlɩ,
ha mlónun ɔkwɛn mwɛ.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 82
Content:
Bulu, Kʋsʋ Afʋgyi Ɔyɩtɔ Aha Fɛ́ɛ́ Asʋn
Asaf kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Bulu tsie mʋ asʋngyi-obiasʋ mʋ ahatɔ,
ɔdɛ ɩkpɩá bafia ɩnʋ asʋn gyi.
2Ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔmɛnkɛ mlési asʋn lalahɛ gyi,
mlési lalahɛ abwɛpʋ ansɩtɔ kɩ gyi asʋn ha amʋ́?”
Ɩya.
3“Mlɩgyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ nwɛ pʋ́ awumbi.
Mlɩgyi bʋa ahianfɔ pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ bwɛtɔ.
4Mlɩhɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ nwɛ pʋ́ amʋ́á bʋma tɔtɔ.
Mlɩlɛ amʋ́ lɛ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ ɩbɩ.”
5“Ɩkpɩ amʋ bʋmeyin tɔtɔ, bʋtamanu kʋkʋ asɩ.
Bʋna okluntɔ, ɔsʋlʋ ntswɩasɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩlakpɩnkɩ.
6Mɩlɛblɩ mbɛɛ, ‘Mlɩgyi fɛ Bulu.
Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie amʋ abi mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩgyi.
7Tamɛ mlówu fɛ anyankpʋsa.
Mlɩ nkpa ɩbɛ́ka itin fɛ ɩsʋ ogyipʋ okugyiɔkʋ.> ”
8Oo Bulu, kʋsʋ afʋgyi ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ asʋn,
tsufɛ fʋbʋ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 83
Content:
Bulu, Mákpa Ɔnɔ Bun
Asaf kanfʋ-ɩlʋ mʋ́a ɩlʋ wahɛ.
1Oo Bulu, mákpa ɔnɔ bun.
Mábwɛ diin, si tsia kɩ!
2Kɩ, kpokiti lada fʋ alupʋtɔ.
Aha amʋʋ bʋtamabu fʋ amʋ ansɩ lapɛ fʋsʋ.
3Baŋain bʋdɛ agywɩɩn lalahɛ bwɛ fʋ ahasʋ.
Bafia kɩta agywɩɩn aha amʋʋ fapʋwa ikpu amʋsʋ.
4Bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Mlɩba abwie ɔmá anfɩ,
fówun bʋmɛ́ɛtra kaɩn Israel ɩdasʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”
5Babwɛ ɩkʋlɛ, bwɛ agywɩɩn fʋsʋ,
ka fʋ ɩwɩ ntam.
6Amʋ́gyi Edomfɔ, Ismael abi-aná, Moabfɔ pʋ́ Hagar abi-aná,
7Gebalfɔ, Amonfɔ, Amalekfɔ,
Filistifɔ pʋ́ Tiro wulutɔ atsiapʋ.
8Asiriafɔ ɛ bayɛmanta amʋ́sʋ.
Amʋ́gyi Lot abi-aná ɔwʋnlɩn nɩ.
Ɩya.
9Bwɛ amʋ́ fɛ alɩ amʋʋ fɔbwɛ Midianfɔ,
pʋ́ alɩ amʋʋ fɔbwɛ Sisera mʋa Yabin, Kison ntsu ɔnɔ amʋ.
10Fɔmɔ amʋ́ En-dor,
amʋ́ afuli bɔplɔ bun ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ, fɛ wuna.
11Ha amʋ́ aha titriu abʋwu fɛ Oreb mʋa Seeb,
afʋha amʋ́ ɔnɔ alɩɩpʋ abʋbwɛ fɛ Seba mʋa Salmuna.
12Amʋ́lɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Mlɩha apʋ Bulu ɔsʋlʋ
bwɛ anɩ klɛ.”
13Mɩ Bulu, ha amʋ́ abʋdasaɩn fɛ alɩá kpankpantrudu totsu ɩsɩ,
ntɛ fɛ alɩá afu tɔtsʋan ntɛtɛ.
14Bʋhɔ fɛ alɩá ɩpʋ tetsii ogya,
hɔ abʋ.
15Alɩ fʋha atsufu ɩsrɩ gya amʋ́,
afʋpʋ alankpla wa amʋ́ ifu nɩ.
16Oo Nana Bulu, ha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta amʋ́,
abʋdunka fʋ ɔkpa.
17Pɛlɩ ɩkɩta amʋ́, abʋnya ifu brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Bʋsʋpa, abʋwu.
18Ha amʋ́ abʋbɩá fʋ nkʋlɛ gyi Nana Bulu,
Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wieá fʋdɛ ɔsʋlʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ gyi.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 84
Content:
Bulu Otsiakpa Wunsɩnɛsʋ Tsia Ɛkɛwʋlɛ
Kora abi kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́pʋ Gatfɔ ɔmɛ da mʋ́.
1Oo ɩsa ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu,
fʋ otsiakpa ɩhɩɛ bʋ mɩ ansigyi o!
2Fʋ otsiakpa wunsɩnɛsʋ yɔ ɩhɩɛ dɩn mɩ ɔwɔlɩ.
Mɩ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ndɛ ɩlʋ wa
kanfʋ Bulu Ɔkɩankpapʋ.
3Ɩsa ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu, mɩ Owie pʋ́ mɩ Bulu,
akensire kʋraa babwɛ asia,
anampesekie babwɛ amʋ́ ɔkakpa fʋ afɔdɩɛ-ɩswɩasɩ.
4Ansɩ lagyi aha ánɩ́ bʋtsie fʋ woyitɔ,
bʋdɛ ɩlʋ wa kanfʋ fʋ bregyibrɛ.
Ɩya.
5Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ɔwʋnlɩn itsu fʋtɔ,
amʋ́ ansɩ dɩn Sion ɔkpasʋ.
6Brɛá bʋna Baka tsonkolitɔ a,
ntsu lɔwɩ dalɩ,
nyankpʋ gyankpapʋ ɛ lɛha ntsu letitii ɩnʋ.
7Fʋ aha bɔ́wa ɔwʋnlɩn, lawa ɔwʋnlɩn dɩnka.
Bówun Buluá ɔdʋn ɩkpɩ fɛ́ɛ́ Sion.
8Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Bulu, Nana Bulu,
nu mɩ isu.
Yakob Bulu, nu mɩ mpaɩ!
Ɩya.
9Oo Bulu, kɩ anɩ kʋtʋ.
Ogyi ɔha anfɩ fada mʋ ofuli anfɩ, afʋwun mʋ nwɛ.
10Fʋ otsiakpa wunsɩnɛsʋ tsia ɛkɛwʋlɛ
bʋ alɛ dʋn ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ tsia nfi ɔpɩm (1,000).
Ɩbʋ mɩ alɛá nɔ́bwɛ fʋ woyi ɔnɔ ogyopʋ,
dʋn ánɩ́ nétsia lalahɛ abwɛpʋ otsiakpa.
11Nana Bulu, fʋgyi fɛ owi mʋ́a kʋtʋ.
Fʋtɔpʋ awɩtɔlɛ mʋ́a numnyam kpa anɩ.
Fʋtamakina yile bwɛ ha
aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa.
12Oo Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu,
ansɩ dɛ ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ mʋ ansɩ dɩn fʋsʋ gyi.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 85
Content:
Nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ Bulu, Yinkia Anɩ Ba Fʋ Wa
Kora abi kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, fagyi fʋ ɔsʋlʋ bʋalɛ.
Fʋlalɛ Yakob abi-aná ndountɔ.
2Fesi fʋ aha lalahɛ kie amʋ́,
bun ansibi amʋ́ lakpan fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
Ɩya.
3Fesi ɔblɔ fɛ́ɛ́,
si fʋ ɔblɔ kinkiinkin ɔmagya.
4Anɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu, yinkia anɩ ba fʋ wa,
afʋtswɩ anɩ ɩwɩ ɔblɔ tsalɩfwɩ.
5Fénya ɔblɔ anɩsʋ alɩɩ yɔ?
Fɛ́ha ɔblɔ bɛ́kɩta fʋ yɛtʋ anɩ abi-aná fɛ́ɛ́?
6Fʋmɛ́ɛlawa anɩ ɔwʋnlɩn,
mɛnɩ fʋ aha bénya fʋ ɩwɩ ansigyi?
7Oo Nana Bulu, ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩba anɩsʋ,
afʋhɔ anɩ nkpa.
8Ha mɩ annu asʋn ánɩ́ Nana Bulu ɔbɛ́blɩ,
tsufɛ ɔbɛ́bla mʋ aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa ɔma ha mʋ iwilwii asʋn,
tamɛ máha amʋ́ abʋtra bwɛ mimlala.
9Lɛlɛ, mʋ nkpahɔ ɩma ɩfɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋtenya mʋ ifu wa,
fówun mʋ numnyam bétsia anɩ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
10Bulu ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka mʋ́a mʋ aha ɔnɔkwalɩwa béfia aba.
Aha yilebwɛ mʋ́a Bulu iwilwii ɛ bɛ́lata aba puta.
11Aha bɔ́wa ɔnɔkwalɩ ha Bulu ɔsʋlʋsʋ,
yile Ɔbwɛpʋ Bulu ɔbɛ́kɩ amʋ́ tsu ɔsʋsʋ.
12Ee, Nana Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋ atoyile sɩsɩ,
anɩ ɔsʋlʋsʋ atɔ bɔ́wa alɛ.
13Yilebwɛ bégya mʋ nkpa,
ɩbɔ́tɔ ɔkpa ha mʋ yabi ɔtsakpa.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 86
Content:
Damli Kɩ Mɩ, Afʋwa Awɩtɔlɛ Ha Mɩ
Dawid mpaɩ.
1Oo Nana Bulu yaa asʋ nu, afʋsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ,
tsufɛ ɩlahian mɩ, nawa nwɛ.
2Gyo mɩ ɩwɩ, tsufɛ ntamakpa fʋ ɔma.
Hɔ fʋ osumbiá mʋ ɩklʋn dɩn fʋsʋ,
tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ Bulu.
3Oo mɩ Wie, wa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ.
Fʋ ndesu kpoli ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
4Ha ansɩ igyi fʋ osumbi,
tsufɛ fʋsʋ napʋ mɩ klʋn dɩnka.
5Tsufɛ anɩ Wie, fʋhɩɛ fʋbʋ alɛ, fʋtesi ɩla kie.
Fʋbʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ha aha ánɩ́ bʋtosu kpoli fʋ.
6Nana Bulu, yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ isu,
afʋnu mɩ kokoli.
7Ntosu kpoli fʋ mɩ ɔkplankɛ,
tsufɛ fʋtɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
8Oo mɩ Wie, ɔkpɩ ɔkʋkʋ mɔ́fʋn fʋ!
Amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋkʋ mɛ́ɛtalɩ bwɛ fʋ bwɛhɛ.
9Mɩ Wie, ɔmá amʋʋ fɔbwɛ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́
bɛ́ba bɛda akpawunu fʋ ansɩtɔ,
wa fʋ ɩda numnyam,
10tsufɛ fomoni, fʋtɔbwɛ ofula.
Fʋ nkʋlɛ gyi Bulu.
11Nana Bulu, suna mɩ fʋ ɔkpa,
mɩ anatɩ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋsʋ.
Ha mɩ ampʋ ɩklʋn dɩnka fʋ nkʋlɛsʋ,
annya fʋ ɩda ifu.
12Mɩ Wie Bulu, nɔ́pʋ mɩ klʋn fɛ́ɛ́ kanfʋ fʋ.
Nɔ́wa fʋ ɩda numnyam brɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
13tsufɛ ɔdwɛá fʋbʋ ha mɩ ɩma ɔka.
Falɛ mɩ ɔkla tsu lowutɔ.
14Oo Bulu, ɩwɩ atsupʋ bakʋsʋ mɩsʋ.
Awuntɔlɩnpʋ ɔdɔm bʋdekleá bɔ́mɔ mɩ.
Fʋmegyi tɔtɔ amʋ́ ansɩsʋ.
15Tamɛ fʋ mɩ Wie Bulu mʋ́ a, nwɛ owunpʋ pʋ́ awɩtɔlɛpʋ fʋgyi.
Fʋtamakɔsɩ nya ɔblɔ, fʋ ɔdwɛ ɩma ɔka, fʋbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ.
16Damli kɩ mɩ, afʋwa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ.
Wa fʋ osumbi ɔwʋnlɩn.
Fʋ osumbi tsɩhɛ mʋ bi ngyi, hɔ mɩ nkpa.
17Bwɛ tɔkʋ isuna ánɩ́ ɩlawa alɛ ha mɩ;
mɩ alupʋ abʋwun, pɛlɩ ɩkɩta amʋ́.
Tsufɛ fʋ Nana Bulu lagyi mɩ bʋalɛ,
faha ɩklʋn ladɩ mɩ asɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 87
Content:
Bulu Tɔdwɛ Mʋ Wulu Sion
Kora abi kanfʋ-ɩlʋ mʋ́a ɩlʋ wahɛ.
1Bulu lɔwa mʋ wulu ntswɩasɩ
dɩnka mʋ onuto ɩbʋ amʋsʋ.
2Ɔtɔdwɛ mʋ wulu Sion,
dʋn awulu trahɛá ɩbʋ Yakob ɔmátɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
3O Bulu wulu,
kɩ alɩá bʋhɩɛ bʋdɛ fʋ numnyam wa.
Ɩya.
4Nɛkla Egyiptefɔ mʋ́a Babilonfɔ wa mɩ abɩpʋtɔ.
Filistifɔ, Tirofɔ pʋ́ Etiopiafɔ mʋ́ a, aha bʋtɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Sion, amʋ́ opulu da.”
5Sion mʋ́ a, bɛ́blɩ bɛɛ, “Ɩnʋ aha anfɩ opulu da.”
Tsufɛ Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie amʋ onuto ɔbɛ́ha mʋ́ ɩbɛ́lɛ nlin.
6Nɩ Nana Bulu dɛ aha ada wanlɩn a, ɔbɔ́wanlɩn ɔbɛɛ,
“Ɩnʋ aha anfɩ opulu da.”
Ɩya.
7Ɩlʋ awapʋ pʋ́ atsapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́blɩ bɛɛ,
“Mɩ yile fɛ́ɛ́ itsu Sion.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 88
Content:
Nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ Bulu Ntosu kpoli
Kora abi atosuna ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ. Bɔ́wa mʋ́ nwɛsʋ. Heman ánɩ́ otsu Esra abi lɛlɛ mʋ́.
1Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu,
ntosu kpoli fʋ ɔpa mʋ́a onye.
2Ha mɩ mpaɩ iwie fʋ wa.
Yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ isu.
3Asʋn ladʋn mɩ.
Nata wu ta.
4Bakla mɩ wa awupʋtɔ.
Nabwɛ fɛ ɔwʋnlɩnpʋá ɔwʋnlɩn lata mʋ́tɔ.
5Bapʋ mɩ wa awupʋtɔ,
fɛ ɔtɔfɔá ɔda ntsantɔ.
Fʋtamatra kaɩn mʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ,
tsufɛ aladalɩ fʋ ɩbɩ.
6Fatswɩ mɩ wa ntsan klukluukluá
mʋ́tɔ lɛhɩɛ klun ayasɩ.
7Fahɩɛ nya ɔblɔ wa mɩ.
Ɩlabun mɩsʋ fɛ ɔpʋ dɛda.
Ɩya.
8Falɛ mɩ aba lɛ mɩ ɩwɩ,
ndɛ amʋ́ nyanya wa.
Fafin mɩ wa, mmɛ́ɛtalɩ srɩ.
9Ɩwɩɔsɩn laha nasu alɩɩ,
mɩ ansibi lapɛ kɔɔ.
Oo Nana Bulu, ntokpoli fʋ ekekegyiɛkɛ.
Natsu ɩbɩ fʋa, ndesu kpoli fʋ.
10Awupʋ fʋtɔbwɛ ofula suna?
Bʋtɔkʋsʋ kanfʋ fʋ?
Ɩya.
11Bʋtɛda fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩwɩ ɔkan ntsantɔ?
Ntɛ bʋtɛblɩ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɩwɩ asʋn atɔ oyintakpa?
12Bówun fʋ ofula okluntɔ ɩnʋ?
Ntɛ afuliá bʋma ɔkaɩn amʋ bɛ́lɛ fʋ yilebwɛ ɔwan?
13Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ mʋ́ a, fʋ nósu kpoli.
Mɩ mpaɩ bɔ́tʋ fʋ nyankɩgyinyankɩ.
14Oo Nana Bulu, ntogyi sʋ fadamli ɔma ha mɩ,
fatan mɩsʋ?
15Mɩ nyebitɔ ɔpá mɩ ɩla bʋ nwɛ, ndekle anwu.
Asʋn wunhɛá faha natsʋn mʋ́tɔ ɩlaha ifu dɛ mɩ,
ntra mma tɔtɔ bwɛtɔ.
16Fʋ ɔblɔ layia mɩ manta.
Fʋ ɩwɩ ifu lamɔ mɩ ta.
17Fʋ ɔblɔ tɔbʋla kɩta mɩ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́,
fɛ ntsu labomli mɩ.
18Falɛ mɩ adwɛpʋ pʋ́ mɩ anyawie fɛ́ɛ́ mɩ ɩwɩ,
nasin ɔyɩ adende.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 89
Content:
Bulu Mʋa Dawid Nsɩnɛ Ntam
(2 Samuel 7:8-16)
Esrayin Etan atosuna ɩlʋ.
1Nana Bulu, nɔ́wa fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩwɩ ɩlʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Nɛ́da fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩwa ɩwɩ ɔkan suna otuntufla fɛ́ɛ́.
2Nablɩ mbɛɛ, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ibétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ibétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́, fɛ ɔsʋsʋ ɩnʋ.
3Fʋlɛblɩ fɛɛ, “Naka ntam ha mɩ osumbi Dawid amʋʋ nalɛ amʋ.
Ntam ánɩ́ naka ha mʋ gyi:
4‘Nɛ́ha fʋ abi-aná bégyi iwie brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Nɛha fʋ owie-obia ibétsia ha fʋ abi-aná ánɩ́ bɛlɩn fɛ́ɛ́.> ”
Ɩya.
5“Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ abɔpʋ bʋkanfʋ fʋ ofula,
mʋ́a fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ́ ɔpasuatɔ.
6Ma bʋ ɔsʋsʋ ɩnʋá bɔ́pʋ mʋ kapʋ fʋ?
Fʋ abɔpʋtɔ ɔmɔmʋ lɔfʋn fʋ?
7Fʋ abɔpʋ ɔpasua bʋtenya fʋ ifu.
Fʋdʋn ɔsʋsʋ atumipʋá bobomli fʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
8Oo Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Bulu, Nana Bulu,
ma bʋ tumi fɛ fʋ?
Ɔnɔkwalɩ labomli fʋ.
9Fʋdɛ ɔpʋá ɩdɛdasʋ gyi.
Nɩ ɩdɛda alɩágyialɩá a, fʋtɛha mʋ́ ɩtɔlʋa.
10Fʋlɛda ntsutso-ɔbwɩ lalahɛ Rahab amʋ mɔ,
fɔpʋ tumi da fʋ alupʋ saɩn.
11Fʋbʋ ɔsʋsʋ, fʋbʋ asɩ.
Fʋlotsua ɔyɩ pʋ́ mʋ́tɔ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ asɩ.
12Fʋlɔbwɛ gyɔpɩ mʋ́a bɩnasʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
Tabor pʋ́ Hermon abʋ bʋdɛ ɩlʋ wa kanfʋ fʋ ɩda.
13Fʋ ɩbɩ bʋ tumi, ɩbʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
Fʋ gyɔpɩ ɩbɩ lɔfʋa.
14Yilebwɛ mʋ́a asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ
fɔpʋwa fʋ obia.
Ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka mʋ́a ɔnɔkwalɩ tegya fʋ nkpa.”
15“Oo Nana Bulu, aha ánɩ́ bʋyin ope tswɩ,
bʋna fʋ ansɩtɔ wankɩ amʋtɔ bʋnya ansigyi.
16Ansɩ bégyi amʋ́ fʋ ɩdatɔ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Fʋ yilebwɛ sʋ fatsu amʋ́ fʋa,
17tsufɛ fʋgyi amʋ́ ɔwʋnlɩn numnyam.
Fʋ awɩtɔlɛ tɛha anɩ tumi.
18Tsufɛ fʋ Nana Bulu bʋ anɩ kʋtʋ.
Fʋ Israel ɔha Wankɩhɛ bʋ anɩ owie.”
19Ɛkɛ ɔkʋ fɔtɔɩ tsʋn atowunhɛtɔ,
suna aha ánɩ́ bʋtamadalɩ fʋ ɔma fɛɛ,
“Nawa ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ ɔkʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
Nalɛ mʋ tsu aha amʋtɔ, tsu mʋ fʋa.
20Nawun mɩ osumbi Dawid anfɩ.
Napʋ mɩ ofobi kpa mʋ, pʋda mʋ ofuli.
21Mɩ tumi bɛ́lɩɩ mʋ ɔma,
mɩ ɩbɩ ɛ bɔ́wa mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
22Mʋ olupʋ ɔkʋkʋ mɛ́ɛtalɩ gyi mʋsʋ ɩsatɔ.
Ɔha lalahɛ ɔkʋkʋ mɛ́ɛtalɩ ba mʋ asɩ.
23Nɔ́mɔ adʋn lɛ mʋ ansɩtɔ,
da mʋ alupʋ lɛ da.
24Mɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ pʋ́ mɩ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bóbuo mʋ.
Mɩ ɩda sʋ obénya ɔwʋnlɩn.
25Nɛ́ha mʋ iwie ogyikpa bótsu ɔpʋ ɔnɔ
yɔwɔ ntsu bʋnkpa.
26Ɔbɛ́bla mɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Fʋgyi mɩ Sɩ,
mɩ Bulu pʋ́ mɩ nkpahɔ bʋta!>
27Nɔ́bwɛ mʋ mɩ bitɩ,
ɔbɔ́bwɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ awie fɛ́ɛ́ nwun.
28Mɩ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ibétsia mʋsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mɩa mʋnyɔ nsɩnɛ ntam bɛ́lɩɩ kinkiinkin.
29Iwiegyi mɛ́ɛdalɩ mʋ woyitɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Alɩ amʋʋ ɔsʋsʋ bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ amʋ a,
alɩ mʋ owie-obia ɛ ibétsia nɩ.”
30“Tamɛ nɩ mʋ abi bekina mɩ atosunahɛ,
bʋmɛnatɩ mɩ amandɩɛ ɔkpasʋ,
31bʋmobu mɩ amandɩɛ,
bʋmɛkɩta mɩ mblatɔ a,
32mʋmʋ nɛ́hɩɛ pɩtɩ amʋ́ oyibibi amʋ́ lakpan sʋ,
wɛn amʋ́ mplɩ amʋ́ lalahɛ sʋ.
33Tamɛ mmɛ́ɛdɩnkɩ mɩ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka lɛ mʋsʋ,
ntɛ kina ɔnɔkwalɩwa ha mʋ.
34Mmɔ́ɔtʋn mɩ ntam ánɩ́ nɛka ha mʋ,
ntɛ tsɛ mɩ asʋn blɩhɛ ha mʋ.
35Naka mɩ ɩda ntam ɔtsawʋlɛ pɛ,
ánɩ́ mmɔ́ɔwa afunu suna Dawid ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
36Iwiegyi bétsia mʋ woyitɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ owie-obia bétsia mɩ ansɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́, fɛ owi.
37Ibétsiá fɛ ɔtsra,
mʋ́gyi ɔdansɩyin ɔnɔkwalɩpʋá ɔbʋ nwʋlʋtasʋ nɩ.”
Ɩya.
38“Oo Bulu, tamɛ fakina mʋ, gya mʋ.
Ɔblɔ ɩhɩɛ dɛ fʋ ɔha anfɩ fada ofuli anfɩsʋ.
39Fatʋn ntam amʋʋ fɛka ha fʋ osumbi amʋ,
falɛ ntʋkʋta mʋ yabitɔ.
40Fabwiebwie mʋ abunti fɛ́ɛ́ bun,
fayinta mʋ oŋainkpa fɛ́ɛ́.
41Ɩnʋ atsʋnpʋ bʋdɛ mʋ atɔ wi.
Ɔmá bambasʋfɔ bʋdɛ mʋ ɔblɔla bwɛ.
42Faha mʋ anyaba banya ɔwʋnlɩn mʋsʋ,
ansɩ dɛ mʋ alupʋ fɛ́ɛ́ gyi.
43Faha mʋ ɔdayi ɔnɔ lawu,
fʋmɛha mʋ ɔtalɩ lɩɩ ɩsa ɔnɔ.
44Faswɩɩ mʋ mʋ akɔnfra,
kpa mʋ owie-obia da.
45Faka mʋ nkpa itin,
pʋ́ pɛlɩ dɩda mʋ.”
Ɩya.
46“Oo Nana Bulu, ɔmɛnkɛ? Féŋain ɩwɩ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́?
Ɔmɛnkɛ fʋ ɩklʋn bési ogya tsii?
47Kaɩn ánɩ́ mɩ nkpa igyi ɔbɩlɔ pɛ.
Mʋ́ sʋ kpalɩ fɔbwɛ nyankpʋsa?
48Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ tsia nkpa, lowu mɔ́ɔpʋ mʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ?
Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ srɩ si lowu?”
Ɩya.
49Anɩ Wie, bɩmbɩ ɔpá
fɔpʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ka fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩwɩ ntam ha Dawid.
Nkʋnʋ ɩbʋ?
50Mátan ɔblɔla ánɩ́ bʋdɛ fʋ asumbi bwɛsʋ,
alɩá nahɔ ɔmá bambasʋfɔ asiabi dɩnka mɩ klʋnsʋ.
51Nana Bulu, fʋ alupʋ bʋdɛ owieá fɛda mʋ ofuli ɔblɔla bwɛ.
Ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛá ɔyɔ a, bʋdɛ mʋ ɔblɔla bwɛ.
52Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu brɛ fɛ́ɛ́!
Ɩbá mʋ́tɔ, ɩtra laba mʋ́tɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 90
Content:
Ɔwʋlʋ 4sɩ
(Israelfɔ Ɩlʋ 90--106)
Bulu, Ha Fʋ Awɩtɔlɛ Ibuo Anɩ
Bulu ɔha Mose mpaɩ.
1Oo anɩ Wie, tsu ɔyɩ ɔpá
fʋgyi otsiakpa ha anɩ otuntufla fɛ́ɛ́.
2Asa fɛlɛ abʋ, lɛ ɔyɩ a,
fʋgyi Bulu tsu brɛá ɔyɩ mɔkʋlɩn yɛfʋn brɛá ɩtamata.
3Fʋteyinkia anɩ anyankpʋsa ya ɩsɩtɔ,
fʋtɛblɩ fɛɛ, “Anyankpʋsa, mlɩyinki.”
4Nfi ɔpɩm (1,000) igyi fɛ igye ɔyɩkɛhɛá ɩlɔtsʋn fʋ wa,
ntɛ onye itinbi.
5Fʋtɛha amʋ́ nkpa tɔmɔ ɔnɔ, fɛ okude.
Bʋgyi fɛ ɩfa, ɩtɔbwɛ mlɔɔ nyankɩ.
6Nyankɩ ɩtɔwa ntswɩtswɩ bwɛ mlɔɔ,
tamɛ ntʋpwɛsʋ ɩtɔbʋ, kpada.
7Fʋ ɔblɔ tɔmɔ anɩ,
fʋ ɩyɩn ɛ bʋ anɩ ifu.
8Faha anɩ lakpan fɛ́ɛ́ ɩda fʋ ansɩtɔ.
Fʋyin mʋ́á anɩlabwɛ ŋain kʋraa.
9Fʋ ɔblɔ laka anɩ nkpa itin.
Anɩ nkɛ tɛta fɛ ɔŋɛ lʋn fʋhɛ.
10Anɩ nkɛ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi nfi aduesienɔ (70),
nɩ anɩlɔwa ɔwʋnlɩn a, nfi adukwe (80).
Mʋ́ o a, asʋn wunhɛ mʋ́a ipian sɔɔn bʋ mʋ́tɔ.
Ɩtɔtsʋn, anɩtɔfwɩ.
11Ma yin alɩá fʋ ɔblɔ ɔnɔ ɩbʋ ɔnlɩn,
pʋ́ ɩyɩn ánɩ́ fʋbʋ, mɛnɩ obénya fʋ ifu?
12Mʋ́ sʋ suna alɩá abɛ́kla anɩ nkɛ,
mɛnɩ abénya nyansa.
13Nana Bulu, kokoli damli kɩ anɩ.
Ɔmɛnkɛ fési ɔblɔ tswɩ?
Wun fʋ asumbi nwɛ!
14Ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩbʋla anɩ nyankɩ,
mɛnɩ abɔ́wa ɩlʋ nya ansigyi anɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
15Faha ɩlapian anɩ wa ɔpá.
Ha ansɩ igyi anɩ nfi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔá anɩlatsia ɩkplantɔ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔnɔ.
16Pʋ fʋ agyʋma suna fʋ asumpʋ,
afʋha amʋ́ abi abʋwun fʋ numnyam.
17Anɩ Wie Bulu, fʋ awɩtɔlɛ ibuo anɩ,
anɩ gyumagyihɛ ɩwa alɛ ha anɩ.
Ee! Ɩwa alɛ ha anɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 91
Content:
Bulu, Gyi Mɩ Ɔtanʋkpa Pʋ́ Mɩ Oŋainkpa Kpikpli
1Ɔha ánɩ́ otsie Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie amʋ oŋainkpa,
Bulu Otumipʋ amʋ yiyi bun mʋsʋ,
2ɔbɛ́bla Nana Bulu ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa pʋ́ mɩ oŋainkpa kpikpli,
mɩ Buluá mɩ ansɩ dɩn fʋsʋ.”
3Mʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ fʋ lɛ ɔfɩnɩpʋ yibi
pʋ́ ɩlɔ lalahɛá ɩtɔmɔtɔ.
4Ɔbɔ́pʋ mʋ atɛ bun fʋsʋ.
Fénya ɔtanʋkpa mʋ abamba asɩ.
Mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɩbɔ́bwɛ fʋ kʋtʋ,
ibégyi ɩban wa fʋ.
5Fʋméenya atɔ lalahɛ kʋkʋ ifu onye,
ntɛ mbɩn ánɩ́ bʋdɛtswɩ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ,
6ɩlɔ tsankɩhɛá ɩna okluntɔ,
ntɛ mʋ́á ɩtɔmɔ aha ɔpa gyein.
7Ɔpɩm (1,000) bɛ́dɩda fʋ abɩntɔ,
mpɩmdu (10,000) ɛ bɛ́dɩ fʋ gyɔpɩsʋ,
tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ ɩbɔ́tsʋn fʋsʋ.
8Ansibi wʋlɛ fɔ́pʋwun
alɩá Bulu ɔbɛ́ka lalahɛ abwɛpʋ ɩkɔ.
9Fapʋ Nana Bulu bwɛ fʋ ɔtanʋkpa,
pʋ Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie amʋ bwɛ fʋ otsiakpa.
10Mʋ́ sʋ tɔtɔɔtɔ mɔ́ɔbwɛ fʋ,
tsitsa kʋkʋ ɛ mɛ́ɛba fʋ woyisʋ,
11tsufɛ Bulu ɔbɛ́ha mʋ abɔpʋ bɛ́kpa fʋ,
fʋ ɔtsʋnkpa fɛ́ɛ́.
12Bɛ́kpata fʋ ɩbɩtɔ,
mɛnɩ fʋ yabi mɛ́ɛda ibwi.
13Fɛ́tsatsa gyata mʋ́a sapasʋ,
dʋ lɩɩ gyata ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ mʋa ɩwɔsʋ.
14Bulu ɔbɛɛ, “Nɛ́lɛ mʋ,
tsufɛ ɔtɛhɩɛ dwɛ mɩ.
Nótsu mʋ lɩɩ ɔwanklaankpa,
tsufɛ oyin mɩ ɩda.
15Osu kpoli mɩ a, nɔ́sɔ mʋ ɔnɔ.
Nétsia mʋ wa ɩkplanbɩ.
Nɛ́lɛ mʋ, wa mʋ numnyam.
16Nɛ́ha mʋ nkpa tɩntɩn,
obówun mɩ nkpahɔ.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 92
Content:
Ɩbʋ Alɛá Bɛ́da Bulu Ɩpan
Ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Oo! Nana Bulu, Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie,
ɩbʋ alɛá bɛ́da fʋ ɩpan, wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɩda.
2Ɩbʋ alɛá bɛ́da fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩwɩ ɔkan nyankɩ,
pʋ́ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɔkan onye,
3da nsankuo pʋ́ akwɛ ɔtsan-ɔtsan,
wa ɩlʋ dɛdɛ tsɩa mʋ́tɔ.
4tsufɛ Nana Bulu, fʋ gyumagyihɛ lawa mɩ ansigyi.
Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ ɩlʋ wa ansigyisʋ.
5Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ gyumagyihɛ lomoni.
Fʋ agywɩɩntɔ bʋ oklu.
6Ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ agywɩɩn mɔfʋn mɛ́ɛbɩ ɩnɩ.
Ɔha mimlahɛ ɛ móonu ɩnɩ asɩ.
7Aha lalahɛ bʋtɔpɔɩ fɛ ɩfa,
ɩtɔwa alɛ ha lalahɛ abwɛpʋ,
tamɛ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́ta plɩplɩplɩ.
8Nana Bulu, fɔfʋa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
9Oo Nana Bulu,
fʋ alupʋ bɛ́ta,
fɛ́da lalahɛ abwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ saɩn,
10tsufɛ fawa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn fɛ kpʋkpʋ,
faklɩ mɩ aba.
11Nawun mɩ alupʋ ɔdɩdakpa.
Nanu alɩá aha lalahɛá bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩsʋ bata.
12Yile ɔbwɛpʋ tɔwa alɛ fɛ mpute.
Ɔtɛdan, wa ɔwʋnlɩn fɛ Lebanon odum.
13Baswie mʋ Nana Bulu woyitɔ.
Ɔtɛdan wa akɩlɛ anɩ Bulu wunsɩnɛsʋ.
14Nɩ ɔdan kʋraa a, otoswie abi.
Mʋ atɛtɔ tebi, ntsu tetsia mʋtɔ,
15pʋsuna ánɩ́ Nana Bulu asʋn da ɔkpa.
Mɩ bʋta ogyi, lalahɛ kʋkʋ ɩma mʋtɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 93
Content:
Bulu, Fʋ Asʋn Tamatsɛ
1Nana Bulu gyi Owie. Ɔdɩdɩ numnyam.
Nana Bulu dɩdɩ numnyam, ɔlɔpʋ ɔwʋnlɩn klɩ mʋ́sʋ.
Alaha ɔyɩ lalɛ nlin, ɩmɛ́ɛkpɩnkɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
2Oo Nana Bulu, fɛyaɩ fʋ owie-obia bɩmbɩ ɔpá.
Fʋbʋ ɩnʋ asa ɔyɩ lɛta bɛlɩn.
3Oo Nana Bulu, ntsu bʋlahɛ lakʋsʋ.
Ee, ntsu bʋlahɛ lalɛ ɔnɔ.
Ɩlawa ɩyɩn, ɩdɛda ɔwʋnlɩnsʋ.
4Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Nana Bulu, fʋbʋ tumi.
Fʋdʋn ntsu akpɔnkpɔntɩ ɔmɛ.
Fʋ tumi dʋn ɔpʋá ɩlawa ɩyɩn, ɩdɛda.
5Oo Nana Bulu! Fɛlɛ ɔnɔ ɩtamatsɛ.
Lɛlɛ, fʋ otsiakpa lɔwankɩ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 94
Content:
Ɩkɔ Ɔkapʋ Bulu
1Oo ɩkɔ Ɔkapʋ Nana Bulu,
ɩkɔ Ɔkapʋ Bulu, kʋsʋ lɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan!
2Ɔyɩtɔ asʋn Ogyipʋ, kʋsʋ.
Kʋsʋ, afʋka ɩwɩ atsupʋ ɩkɔá ɩlɛkana.
3Oo Nana Bulu, ɔmɛnkɛ?
Ɔmɛnkɛ aha lalahɛ bési ansigyi nya?
4Bʋdɛ ɔnɔtɔ ka,
lalahɛ abwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋdɛ ɩwɩ tsu.
5Oo Nana Bulu, bʋdɛ fʋ aha mɔ,
bʋdɛ fʋ ogyikpa ɩtɔ sɩnsɩn bwɛ.
6Bʋdɛ asʋrapʋ mʋ́a afɔɔ tɩn,
mɔ awumbi.
7Bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Nana Bulu médewun,
Yakob Bulu mɛ́dɛbɩ.”
8Ɔmá amʋtɔ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ agywɩɩn ɩma ɔsa,
aha mimlahɛ, ɔmɛnkɛ mlɛ́tɩn ansɩ?
9Buluá ɔlɔbwɛ asʋ, nkalɩ omóonu asʋn?
Mʋá ɔlɔbwɛ ansibi, nkalɩ omóowun atɔ?
10Mʋtotswii ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́,
nkalɩ ɔmɛ́ɛbɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ?
Mʋá otosuna aha atɔ, nkalɩ ɔmɛ́ɛbɩ asʋn?
11Nana Bulu yin nyankpʋsa asʋn susuhɛ,
ánɩ́ itepi ma labi.
12Oo Nana Bulu, ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ fabɩtɩ mʋ ɩsʋ,
pʋ fʋ atosunahɛ suna mʋ.
13Fótsu ipian kʋsʋ mʋsʋ ipian owunkɛ amʋ,
yɛfʋn brɛá bakwi ɔbɔ tswɩ ha aha lalahɛ.
14Nana Bulu méekina mʋ aha,
tswɩ mʋ ogyikpa anfɩ tsitsa,
15tsufɛ bɛ́lagyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ,
aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa fɛ́ɛ́ bóbuo mʋ́.
16Ma ɔbɛ́lɩɩ mɩ ɔma nɩ aha lalahɛ bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩsʋ?
Ma ɔbɔ́kʋsʋ lɩɩ lalahɛ abwɛpʋsʋ ha mɩ?
17Nɩ megyi Nana Bulu gyi mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ a,
tɛkɩ nayɔ nda ɔtɩnɛá ɔhaa tamatɔɩ.
18Brɛá mbɛɛ ansrɛɩ a,
oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka tɛkɩta mɩ lɩɩ.
19Nɩ asʋn ɩdʋn mɩ a,
fʋteyia mɩ ɩklʋn, ansɩ tɛlagyi mɩ.
20Iwie ogyikpa ánɩ́ bʋtotsula asʋkpan, wa amandɩɛ lalahɛ a,
fʋa amʋ́nyɔ mlɛ́talɩ bwɛ ɩkʋlɛ?
21Babwɛ ɔnɔ-ɔkʋlɛ, kɩklɩ yile ɔbwɛpʋ nwunsʋ.
Bʋtɛha aha ánɩ́ ɔlala ɩma amʋ́ ɩwɩ lowu ɩpɔn.
22Tamɛ Nana Bulu gyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin.
Mɩ Bulu gyi mɩ ɩbʋta kpikpli.
23Ɔbɛ́ka amʋ́ owuntɔlɩn amʋsʋ ɩkɔ.
Ɔbɔ́mɔ amʋ́ amʋ́ lalahɛ amʋ sʋ.
Nana Bulu anɩ Bulu amʋ ɔbɔ́mɔ amʋ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 95
Content:
Mlɩba, Abun Sum Bulu
1Mlɩba apʋ ansigyi wa ɩlʋ ha Nana Bulu.
Mlɩha atswɩ ope ha anɩ bʋta, ɔtɔhɔ anɩ nkpa.
2Mlɩha apʋ ɩpan ba mʋ ansɩtɔ,
atswɩ ope kanfʋ mʋ,
3tsufɛ Bulu kpɔnkpɔntɩ Nana Bulu gyi.
Owie kpɔnkpɔntɩ, ɔdʋn ɔkpɩgyiɔkpɩ.
4Mʋ ɩbɩtɔ ɔsʋlʋ ɔtɔtɔ bʋ,
Abʋ ɔfʋakpa ɛ igyi mʋ klɛ.
5Mʋbʋ ɔpʋ, tsufɛ mʋlɔbwɛ mʋ́.
Mʋ ɩbɩ lɔbwɛ ɔsʋlʋ sɛhɛ.
6Mlɩba abun, asum mʋ.
Mlɩha ada akpawunu anɩ Ɔbwɛpʋ Nana Bulu ansɩtɔ,
7tsufɛ mʋgyi anɩ Bulu,
anɩgyi mʋ ɩbantɔ akufa ánɩ́ ɔdɛ anɩ kpa.
Nɩ mlónu mʋ ɔmɛ ndɛ a,
8mlɩmáwa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn fɛ alɩá mlɩlɔbwɛ Meriba
pʋ́ Masa ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ ɛkɛ amʋ.
9Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá bowun tɔá nabwɛ bɔtsʋn,
tamɛ mlɩ anain bɔwa mɩ tɔɩ, sɔ mɩ kɩ.
10Amʋ́ asʋn metepi wa mɩ ɔdwɛ nfi adʋana (40) kɛkɛ.
Nɛblɩ mbɛɛ,
“Aha anfɩ bʋtɛdalɩ mɩ ɔma bregyibrɛ.
Bʋtamakleá bégyi mɩ asʋnsʋ.”
11Mʋ́ sʋ nenya ɔblɔ ka ntam mbɛɛ,
“Nɩ bówie mɩ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ɩnʋ fiin!
Nɛka nɔtʋn.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 96
Content:
Bulu Gyi Owie
1Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩwa ɩlʋ pɔpwɛ ha Nana Bulu.
Mlɩwa ɩlʋ ha Nana Bulu.
2Mlɩwa ɩlʋ ha Nana Bulu, amlɩkanfʋ mʋ ɩda!
Ekekegyiɛkɛ mlɩda mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn wanklaan ɔkan, ánɩ́ alahɔ anɩ nkpa!
3Mlɩda mʋ numnyam ɔkan ɔmá-ɔmásʋ.
Mlɩda mʋ ofulabwɛ ɔkan suna ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́,
4tsufɛ Nana Bulu lomoni.
Ɩkanfʋ letsia mʋ.
Ilehian ánɩ́ aha bénya mʋ ifu dʋn ɩkpɩ fɛ́ɛ́.
5Ɔmá-ɔmá ɩkpɩ bʋmegyi tɔtɔ,
tamɛ Nana Bulu lɔbwɛ ɔsʋsʋ.
6Obú pʋ́ numnyam bʋ mʋsʋ.
Ɔwʋnlɩn pʋ́ alɛ ɩbʋ mʋ otsiakpa.
7Ɔyɩtɔ abusuan fɛ́ɛ́,
mlɩpʋ numnyam mʋ́a ɔwʋnlɩn ha Nana Bulu.
8Mlɩpʋ obuá ɩlɛkana Nana Bulu ɩda ha mʋ.
Mlɩpʋ afɔdɩɛ ba mʋ wunsɩnɛsʋ.
9Mlɩda akpawunu ha mʋ; tsufɛ mʋ nkʋlɛ lɔwankɩ.
Ɔsʋlʋsʋ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́, bʋba ɩwɩasɩ ha mʋ.
10Mlɩbla ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩaa,
“Nana Bulu gyi owie!
Ee, ɔyɩ lalɛ nlin, ɩmɛ́ɛkpɩnkɩ.
Obégyi ɔmá-ɔmá asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.”
11Ɔsʋsʋ inya ansigyi,
ɔsʋlʋ ɩwɩ ɩsankɩ mʋ.
Ɔpʋ mʋa mʋ́tɔ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩlɛ ɔnɔ.
12Ndɔ pʋ́ mʋ́tɔ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ inya ansigyi.
Apʋtɔ-nyi bʋpʋ ansigyi wa ɩlʋ
13Nana Bulu ansɩtɔ, tsufɛ ɔbá.
Ɔbá begyi ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́ asʋn.
Obégyi mʋ́ yilebwɛ ɔkpasʋ,
gyi ɔmá-ɔmá asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 97
Content:
Bulu Lɔfʋa Dʋn Ɔyɩ Fɛ́ɛ́
1Nana Bulu gyi Owie.
Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bʋnya ansigyi,
ɩwɩ ɩsankɩ ɔpʋ gbemgbesʋ awulu fɛ́ɛ́.
2Agyinde mʋ́a oklun tuun lobomli mʋ.
Yilebwɛ mʋ́a asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ
ɔlɔpʋwa mʋ obia.
3Ogya igya mʋ nkpa,
ɩdɛ mʋ alupʋ hɔ fia.
4Mʋ nyankpʋ ɔfwɩ ɩbɩ a,
ɩtɔwankɩ nsaɩntɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɔsʋlʋ towun mʋ́ kpɩnkɩ.
5Abʋ tɛŋlaɩn fɛ okpin Nana Bulu ansɩtɔ,
ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́ Owie amʋ ansɩtɔ.
6Ɔsʋsʋ tɛlɛ mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɔwan,
aha fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtowun mʋ numnyam.
7Bawa ɩkpɩ asumpʋá bʋtɔpʋ ɩkpɩ tsu ɩwɩ fɛ́ɛ́ pɛlɩtɔ.
Atunku fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩba ɩwɩasɩ ha mʋ!
8Oo Nana Bulu, Sionfɔ bonu a, ansɩ tegyi amʋ́.
Yudafɔ ɛ bʋtenya ansigyi,
fʋ asʋnbua sʋ,
9tsufɛ fʋ Nana Bulu fɔfʋa dʋn ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́.
Fʋdʋn ɔkpɩgyiɔkpɩ.
10Mlɩ aha ánɩ́ mlɩtɔdwɛ Nana Bulu, mlɩkisi lalahɛ.
Ɔtɛkɩ aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa mʋ ɔmasʋ,
lɛ amʋ́ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ ɩbɩ.
11Wankɩ ladalɩ ha yile abwɛpʋ.
Ansigyi labʋla aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa ɩklʋntɔ.
12Aha yile, mlɩ ansɩ igyi Nana Bulu ɩwɩ,
amlɩkanfʋ mʋ ɩda wankɩhɛ!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 98
Content:
Bulu Ɔba Begyi Ɔyɩ Asʋn
Kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Mlɩwa ɩlʋ pɔpwɛ ha Nana Bulu,
tsufɛ alabwɛ ofula!
Mʋ tumi pʋ́ mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn
lagyi ɩsʋ ha mʋ.
2Nana Bulu laha babɩ mʋ nkpahɔ.
Alalɛ mʋ yilebwɛ suna ɔmá-ɔmá.
3Ɔmɛtan mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka
pʋ́ ɔnɔkwalɩá ɔbʋ ha Israel woyisʋ.
Aha bawun anɩ Bulu ɩsʋgyi yewie ɔyɩ ɔka.
4Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩtswɩ ope ha Nana Bulu,
amlɩkplʋn ansigyisʋ wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ.
5Mlɩda ɔsankuo, wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ.
Mlɩda ɔsankuo, amlɩpʋ ɔmɛ dɛdɛ wa ɩlʋ ha mʋ.
6Mlɩfʋlɩ ɩkpɛ mʋ́a akufa-nsiebi,
amlɩpʋ ansigyi tswɩ ope Owie Nana Bulu ansɩtɔ.
7Ɔpʋ mʋ́a mʋ́tɔ atɔ ɩlɛ ɔnɔ.
Ɔyɩ pʋ́ mʋ́tɔ atsiapʋ ɛ fɛ́ɛ́ abʋsʋra okitikiti.
8Ntsu akpɔnkpɔntɩ bʋda apian,
abʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩwa ɩlʋ wa abatɔ,
9Nana Bulu ansɩtɔ,
tsufɛ ɔba begyi ɔyɩ asʋn.
Obégyi mʋ́ yilebwɛ ɔkpasʋ,
gyi ɔmá-ɔmá asʋn kɛkɛ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 99
Content:
Anɩ Bulu Amʋ Lɔwankɩ
1Nana Bulu gyi owie, ɔmá-ɔmá bʋkpɩnkɩ.
Otsie mʋ obiasʋ akerubsʋ.
Ɔsʋlʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩkpɩnkɩ kpakpakpa.
2Nana Bulu lomoni Sion wulutɔ.
Ɔlɔfʋa dʋn ɔmá-ɔmá.
3Bʋkanfʋ fʋ ɩda ánɩ́ ɩbʋ ifu,
ɩbʋ wanwan.
Fʋ mʋ́ fɔwankɩ!
4Owie Otumipʋ, fʋtekle asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ,
Fayaɩ asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ mʋ́a yilebwɛ Yakob ɔmátɔ.
5Mlɩtsu Nana Bulu, anɩ Bulu amʋ fʋa.
Mlɩda akpawunu mʋ ayabiasɩ.
Ɔlɔwankɩ!
6Mose mʋa Aaron bɔbwɛ mʋ igyi ahapʋ.
Samuel lɔbwɛ aha amʋʋ bosu kpoli mʋ amʋtɔ ɔkʋlɛ.
Bosu kpoli Nana Bulu, ɔlɔsɔ amʋ́ ɔnɔ.
7Ɔlɔtɔɩ tsʋn agyindeá ilotswii lɩɩ fɛ ɔkpabitɔ ha amʋ́.
Begyi ɔnɔá ɔlɛlɛ pʋ́ amandɩɛá ɔlɔpʋha amʋ́sʋ.
8Oo Nana Bulu, anɩ Bulu, fɔsɔ amʋ́ ɔnɔ.
Buluá otesikie fʋgyi ha amʋ́,
tamɛ nɩ bɔpʋ lalahɛ gyi fʋ a, fʋtɛka amʋ́ ɩkɔ.
9Mlɩtsu Nana Bulu anɩ Bulu amʋ fʋa.
Mlɩsum mʋ mʋ onuto ɩbʋ amʋsʋ.
Tsufɛ Nana Bulu anɩ Bulu amʋ lɔwankɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 100
Content:
Mlɩpʋ Ɩpan Ba Bulu Woyi Ɔnɔ
Ɩpanda-afɔdɩɛasɩ ɩlʋ.
1Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́,
mlɩtswɩ ope ha Nana Bulu!
2Mlɩpʋ ansigyi sum mʋ,
amlɩpʋ ɩlʋ ba mʋ wa.
3Mlɩbɩá Nana Bulu gyi Bulu!
Mʋlɔbwɛ anɩ, mʋbʋ anɩ.
Mʋ ɔmá pʋ́ mʋ ɩbantɔ akufa anɩgyi.
4Mlɩpʋ ɩpan ba mʋ woyi ɔnɔ,
amlɩpʋ ɩkanfʋ bitiwie mʋ wunsɩnɛ.
Mlɩda mʋ ɩpan, amlɩkanfʋ mʋ ɩda,
5tsufɛ Nana Bulu bʋ alɛ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɩbʋ ɩnʋ ha aha ánɩ́ bɛ́ba bɛlɩn fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 101
Content:
Nana Bulu, Fʋ Nɔ́wa Ɩlʋ Kanfʋ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Nɔ́wa fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ fʋ asʋnbua ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ ɩwɩ ɩlʋ.
Nana Bulu, fʋ nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ.
2Nɛ́kɩá nétsia nkpa ánɩ́ ɔlala ɩma mʋ́ ɩwɩ.
Oo, ɔmɛnkɛ fɛ́ba mɩ wa?
Nɔ́pʋ tsiatɔ wanklaan
tsia mɩ woyitɔ.
3Mmɛ́ɛha tɔá ɩma labi
itsia mɩ ansɩsʋ.
Ntekisi aha ánɩ́ bʋmɔhɔ Bulu gyi bwɛhɛ.
Mmɛ́ɛha mʋ́ isin mɩsʋ.
4Mméetsia manta aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ɔkpa motswii,
mmóotsula bwɛ lalahɛ.
5Néyinta ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ otetsii mʋ aba.
Mɩa ɩwɩ otsupʋ anɩméetsia.
6Nɛ́lɛ ansɩ kɩ anɔkwalɩpʋá bʋbʋ ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ,
mɛnɩ bétsia mɩ wa.
Aha ánɩ́ ɔlala ma amʋ́ natɩtɔ obósum mɩ.
7Aha ɔmlɛpʋ ɔkʋkʋ méetsia mɩ woyitɔ.
Ofunupʋ ɔkʋkʋ méenya ɔlɩɩkpa mɩ ansɩtɔ.
8Nɛ́lɛ aha lalahɛ lɛ ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ ekekegyiɛkɛ nyankɩ,
lɛ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ lɛ Nana Bulu wulu anfɩtɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 102
Content:
Bulu, Máka Mɩ Nkpa Itin
Ipian owunpʋ ɔkʋ mpaɩá ɔlɔbɔ ha Nana Bulu.
1Oo Nana Bulu, nu mɩ isu,
afʋhɔ mɩ mpaɩ.
2Nɩ mbʋ ɩkplantɔ a, máŋain mɩ.
Yaa asʋ ha mɩ, nɩ nosu kpoli fʋ,
afʋkɔsɩ sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
3Tsufɛ mɩ nkɛ dɛta fɛ ogyasi.
Awútɔ ɩdɛ mɩ ogya tsii fɛ ɔswɩtɔ ogya.
4Nabwɛ fɛ ɩfa bʋhɛá batsatsa mʋ́sʋ.
Atogyihɛ mɛdɩn mɩ ɔwɔlɩ.
5Mɩ kɩmɩ kʋklʋkʋʋ sʋ nawʋlɩ,
si awú kpan.
6Nabwɛ fɛ ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ-kpawu,
fɛ wulu bwiehɛtɔ lasa.
7Nda nkɩ,
fɛ obubwiá ɩlasi mʋ nkʋlɛ obusʋ.
8Mɩ alupʋ bʋtesia mɩ ekekegyiɛkɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ.
Bʋtɔpʋ mɩ ɩwɩ abususʋ lwɩɩ aha.
9Nwɛla lamli mɩ atogyihɛ,
ntsú ɛ lafra mɩ ntsu nunhɛ.
10Fʋ ansɩpɛpɛ mʋ́a fʋ ɔblɔ sʋ,
fatswɩ mɩ tsalɩfwɩ.
11Mɩ nkpa dɛtsʋn fɛ ntʋpwɛ yiyi.
Nabʋ fɛ ɩfa.
12Tamɛ fʋ Nana Bulu fʋtsie fʋ owie-obiasʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Otuntufla fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́kaɩn fʋ ɩdasʋ.
13Fɔ́kʋsʋ wun Sionfɔ nwɛ.
Brɛá fɔ́pʋwa awɩtɔlɛ ha amʋ́ nɩ.
Ee, brɛ amʋ ɩlafʋn.
14Fʋ asumbi bʋtamatsula ɩnʋ abwisʋ.
Ɩnʋ osublu ɛ bʋ amʋ́ nwɛ.
15Ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́ bénya Nana Bulu ɩda ifu.
Ɔyɩtɔ awie fɛ́ɛ́ ɛ bénya mʋ numnyam ifu.
16Tsufɛ Nana Bulu ɔbɛ́lada Sion wulu.
Ɔbɛ́lɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan numnyamtɔ.
17Obónu aha ánɩ́ bʋtra bʋma tɔtɔ mpaɩ.
Ɔmɔ́ɔkpʋkpʋ nwuntɔ brɛá bʋdɛ mʋ kokoli.
18Bʋwanlɩn asʋn anfɩ tswɩ ha aha ánɩ́ bɛ́ba bɛlɩn fɛ́ɛ́,
mɛnɩ abi-aná fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu bɛɛ,
19Nana Bulu tsie ɔsʋsʋ mʋ otsiakpa,
ɔdɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ kɩ sɩsɩ,
20mɛnɩ obónu obu adɩpʋ isu,
ɔha aha ánɩ́ baha lowu-ɩpɔn abʋgyi ɩwɩ.
21Mʋ́ sʋ bɛ́da mʋ ɩda ɔkan Sion,
kanfʋ mʋ Yerusalem,
22brɛá ɔyɩtɔ aha pʋ́ iwie ogyikpa fɛ́ɛ́ bafia
ánɩ́ bósum mʋ.
23Alaha napɔn mɩ yasʋtɔ,
aladɩnkɩ mɩ nkɛsʋ.
24Ndɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Mɩ Bulu,
máka mɩ nkpa itin.
Fʋtsie nkpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ!”
25“Fʋlɔwa ɔsʋlʋ ntswɩasɩ ɔyɩ asɩtsuabɩ.
Fʋ onuto ɩbɩ fɔpʋbwɛ ɔsʋsʋ.
26Mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́ta,
tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ fétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔ́bwɛ dada, fwɩ fɛ tatida,
27tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ fʋtamatsɛ.
Fʋ nkpa mɔ́ɔmɔ ɔnɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ!
28Fʋ asumpʋ abi-aná bénya atsialɛ,
amʋ́ abi-aná bɛ́lɛ nlin fʋ ansɩtɔ.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 103
Content:
Mɩ Ɔkla, Kanfʋ Nana Bulu
Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Oo mɩ ɔkla, kanfʋ Nana Bulu.
Mɩ ɩklʋn fɛ́ɛ́
ɩkanfʋ mʋ ɩda wankɩhɛ.
2Oo mɩ ɔkla, kanfʋ Nana Bulu.
Mátan mʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ wanklaan ánɩ́ ɔdɛbwɛ ha mɩsʋ.
3Mʋtesi mɩ lakpan fɛ́ɛ́ kie mɩ,
ɔtɛtsa mɩ ɩlɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
4Mʋtɛlɛ mɩ tsu afulitɔ,
ɔtɔpʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka mʋ́a nwewun tɔ mɩ nwun.
5Mʋtɔpʋ atɔ wanklaan bʋla mɩ, mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́,
ntɛlabwɛ ɔyasubi fɛ oyitsu.
6Nana Bulu tegyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ,
ɔtɛha aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ amʋ́ sisi asʋ.
7Ɔlɛha Mose lɛbɩ mʋ ɩkpa,
ɔlɛha Israelfɔ bowun mʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ.
8Nwɛ owunpʋ pʋ awɩtɔlɛpʋ Nana Bulu gyi.
Ɔtamakɔsɩ nya ɔblɔ,
mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩhɩɛ tsɔ.
9Ɔtamatsia lɛ aha ɩla,
ntɛ hɔ asʋn wa ɩwɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
10Ɔtamabɩtɩ anɩ ɩsʋ anɩ lakpan ɔnɔ,
ntɛ pʋ anɩ lakpan ka anɩ ɩkɔ.
11Tsufɛ alɩ amʋʋ ɔsʋsʋ lɛhɩɛ fʋa tsu ɔsʋlʋsʋ amʋ a,
alɩ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɛ lɛhɩɛ moni ha mʋ ifu anyapʋ nɩ.
12Alɩ amʋʋ owi ɔdalɩkpa
ɩbʋ ɩfɔ tsu owi ɔkplɩwiekpa amʋ a,
alɩ ɔtɛha anɩ lalahɛ tɔwa ɩfɔ anɩ ɩwɩ nɩ.
13Alɩ amʋʋ ɔsɩ towun mʋ abi nwɛ amʋ a,
alɩ Nana Bulu towun mʋ ifu anyapʋ nwɛ nɩ.
14Tsufɛ oyin alɩá ɔlɔpwɛ anɩ.
Ɔtɛkaɩn ánɩ́ ɩsɩ anɩgyi.
15Nyankpʋsa mʋ́ a, mʋ nkɛ igyi fɛ ɩfa.
Ɔtɔwa akɩlɛ fɛ ɩfa ntswɩtswɩ.
16Afu ɩnya tsʋan mʋ́ pɛ a,
mʋ́ klɛtɔ lata.
Bʋtamatra kaɩn mʋ́sʋ.
17Tamɛ Nana Bulu ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ
ha mʋ ifu anyapʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ yilebwɛ ɛ bʋ ɩnʋ ha amʋ́ abi-aná.
18Ɩbʋ ɩnʋ ha mʋ ntamsʋ agyipʋ
pʋ́ mʋ mblasʋ akaɩnpʋá bʋtegyi mʋ́sʋ.
19Nana Bulu layaɩ mʋ owie-obia ɔsʋsʋ.
Mʋdɛ togyitɔsʋ gyi.
20Bulu-abɔpʋ, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ,
mlɩ mʋ atumipʋá mlɩtonu mʋ ɔmɛ,
mlɩtegyi mʋ asʋnsʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
21Bulu-abɔpʋá mlɩtɔkɔ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ,
mʋ asumbiá mlɩtɔbwɛ mʋ ɔdwɛla.
22Nana Bulu atɔ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́, ɩkanfʋ mʋ
ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛá ɔdɛ iwie gyi.
Mɩ ɔkla, kanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 104
Content:
Bulu Numnyam Itsia Brɛ Fɛ́ɛ́
1Oo mɩ ɔkla, kanfʋ Nana Bulu.
Nana Bulu mɩ Bulu, fɔkʋkʋ moni o!
Fʋdɩdɩ obú mʋ́a numnyam.
2Fʋdɩdɩ wankɩ fɛ tati.
Fʋlɛtɛɩ nwʋlʋtatɔ fɛ fʋ tati-obu.
3Feyi fʋ woyi dɩnka ɔsʋsʋ ntsusʋ,
pʋ́ agyinde bwɛ fʋ keke,
fʋtɛnatɩ afu abambasʋ.
4Fɔpʋ afu bwɛ fʋ abɔpʋ,
bwɛ ogya plɛnplɛn fʋ asumpʋ.
5Fɔwa ɔyɩ ntswɩasɩ,
mɛnɩ ɩmɛ́ɛkpɩnkɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
6Fɔpʋ ɔpʋ okluklukpa tɛɩ bun mʋ́sʋ fɛ tati.
Ntsu lɔbʋla dɩnka abʋsʋ.
7Brɛá fɛlɛ ɔnɔ a, ntsu amʋ ɩlɛsrɩ.
Ɩlɛsrɩ natɩ brɛá fʋ ɔmɛ lɛlɩn fɛ ɔprada.
8Ntsu amʋ lɔbʋla dɩnka abʋsʋ,
kplɩ bowie abʋnkpatɔ,
ɔtɩnɛá fɛha mʋ́ fɛɛ, ɩdɩ.
9Fɔtswɩ ɔka ha mʋ́,
mɛnɩ ɩmɛ́ɛdafa mʋ́sʋ.
Fowun ɩmɛ́ɛtra tsu ɔsʋlʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
10Fɛha ntsu letii wa abʋnkpatɔ,
ɩdɛtsʋn abʋ nsɩnɛ.
11Ilemli ntsu nunhɛ ha pututɔ-mbwɩ.
Pututɔ mpɔnsʋra aná ɛ
bʋtɔpʋka amʋ́ ɔmɛwʋlɩ itin.
12Ntsu amʋ ɔnɔ nyi abambitɔ
mbubwi bɔbwɛ amʋ́ asia wa,
bʋtɛdɩnka mʋ́tɔ wa ɩlʋ.
13Fʋtɛha nyankpʋ totswie tsu fʋ woyitɔ ɔsʋsʋ wʋlɩ abʋsʋ.
Fʋ gyumagyihɛtɔ-abi labʋla ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
14Fʋtɛha ɩfa tɔkwɛ ha woyitɔ-mbwɩ.
Fʋtɛha nyankpʋsa atɔ abi otodu,
pʋnya atogyihɛ tsu ɔsʋlʋtɔ,
15nta ánɩ́ ɩbɛ́ha mʋ ansɩ bégyi,
ofobiá ɔbɛ́kpa wa akɩlɛ
pʋ́ atogyihɛá ɩbɔ́wa mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
16Fʋ nyi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ tenya ntsu bregyibrɛ.
Lebanon ndum ánɩ́ foswie ɛ.
17Mbubwi bʋtɔlʋ amʋ́ asia wa nyi amʋtɔ.
Ntsusʋ-akpakpa bʋtetsia kwɩan nyitɔ.
18Abrɛ ɔdɩkpa gyi abʋ amʋsʋ,
awɩa bʋteŋain abwi mbɔtɔ.
19Fɔbwɛ ɔtsra ánɩ́ isuna ɩbrɛtɔ,
owi yin brɛá ɔtɔpʋkplɩ wie.
20Fɔbwɛ oklun, igyi onye.
Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ pututɔ-mbwɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtɛdalɩ nɩ.
21Agyata bʋtokpoun dunka tɔá bɛ́kɩta,
pʋnya atogyihɛ tsu Bulu wa.
22Owi ɩdalɩ a,
bʋteyinki yɔ amʋ́ ɔdɩkpa,
23nyankpʋsa ɛ tɛdalɩ yɔyɔ mʋ agyʋma
alɩɩ yɛfʋn ntʋpwɛsʋ.
24Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ gyumagyihɛ ɩhɩɛ tsɔ o!
Nyansa fɔpʋbwɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́.
Fʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ labʋla ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
25Ɔpʋ da a. Ilomoni, ɩlɛtɛɩ.
Mʋ́tɔ mbwɩ ayile mʋ́a akusubi
bʋma ɩklatɔ.
26Ntsusʋ-yibi na mʋ́sʋ, ɩdɛyɔ ɩdɛba.
Fɔbwɛ Leviatan, oteplei mʋ́tɔ.
27Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋkɩ fʋ ansɩtɔá
fɛ́ha amʋ́ atogyihɛ mʋ́ brɛtɔ.
28Fʋtɛsankɩ ɩbɩtɔ,
pʋ atɔ wanklaan sɩsɩ amʋ́,
bʋtɔtɔsɩ gyi mwɛ.
29Nɩ fɛdamli ɔma ha amʋ́ a,
ifu tɛkɩta amʋ́.
Nɩ fepio amʋ́ ɔŋɛ lɛ a,
bʋtowu yinki yɔ ɩsɩtɔ.
30Fʋtɔpʋ fʋ ɔŋɛ sɩsɩ, bʋtɛbɛlɩn.
Fʋtɛla ɔsʋlʋ bwɛ.
31Nana Bulu numnyam itsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ ansɩ igyi mʋ gyumagyihɛ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩwɩ.
32Ɔdamli kɩ ɔsʋlʋ a, ɩtɛkpɩnkɩ.
Ɔpʋ ɩbɩ da abʋ a, ogyasi tɛdalɩ tsu mʋ́tɔ!
33Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ ha Nana Bulu mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mɩ Bulu brɛ anfɩ ntsie nkpa anfɩ.
34Mɩ agywɩɩn anfɩ ɩwa mʋ ɔdwɛ,
tsufɛ mʋtɛha ansɩ tegyi mɩ.
35Ha lakpan abwɛpʋ abʋta lɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋmátra tsia!
Mɩ ɔkla, kanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 105
Content:
Mlɩda Bulu Gyumagyihɛ Ɔkan
(1 Brɛsʋ Asʋn 16:8-22)
1Mlɩda Nana Bulu ɩpan,
amlɩsu kpoli mʋ.
Mlɩda mʋ gyumagyihɛ ɔkan suna ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́.
2Mlɩwa ɩlʋ ha mʋ.
Mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ.
Mlɩblɩ mʋ ofula ánɩ́ alabwɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
3Mlɩnya mʋ ɩda wankɩhɛ amʋ ɩwɩ ansigyi.
Nana Bulu adunkapʋ, mlɩnya ansigyi.
4Mlɩdunka Nana Bulu mʋa mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
Mlɩdunka mʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
5Mlɩkaɩn mʋ ofulabwɛ,
pʋ́ mʋ asʋnbuasʋ.
6Mʋ osumbi Abraham abi-aná,
Yakob abiá alalɛ.
7Mʋgyi Nana Bulu, anɩ Bulu amʋ nɩ.
Mʋtegyi ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́ asʋn.
8Ɔtamatan mʋ ntam amʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ,
asʋn ánɩ́ ɔlɔpʋha otuntufla mpɩm-mpɩm.
9Ɩnɩgyi ntam ánɩ́ mʋa Abraham bɛka,
pʋ́ mʋ́á ɔlɛka ha Isakɩ nɩ.
10Ɔlɛdɩnka ibwi mʋ́sʋ, ɩlɔbwɛ amandɩɛá ɩda ha Yakob ɔmá.
Igyi ntam ánɩ́ ibétsia ha Israel brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
11Ɔbɛɛ, “Fʋ nɔ́pʋ Kanaan ɔsʋlʋ ha,
ɩbɔ́bwɛ mɩ siadɩɛ ogyikpa ánɩ́ fénya.”
12Brɛá bʋmɔtsɔ bʋgyi kpalobi ɩkʋ,
bʋgyi afɔɔ ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ,
13bɛnatɩ ki tsʋn ɔmá-ɔmátɔ,
tsu iwie ogyikpa yɔ iwie ogyikpa.
14Nana Bulu mɛ́ha ɔhaa ɔkpa osisi amʋ́.
Amʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔwa ɩyɩn wa awie
15ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩmápʋ ɩbɩ da aha anfɩ nada ofuli.
Mlɩmábwɛ mɩ ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ tɔtɔ.”
16Ɔlɛha akʋn lɛba ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ,
oletin amʋ́ atogyihɛ otsukpa ɔkpa fɛ́ɛ́.
17Ɔlɔwa oyin ɔkʋ gya amʋ́ nkpa,
mʋgyi Yosef amʋʋ bɛfɛ, oleyemli ɔkpábi amʋ.
18Bɔwa mʋ ayabi kplakitsi,
wa mʋ ɔmɛtɔ ɩkan.
19Nana Bulu asʋn lɔsɔ Yosef kɩ,
yɛfʋn ɛkɛá mʋ asʋn blɩhɛ amʋ lɛba mʋ́tɔ.
20Ɩnʋ Egyipte owie lɛha bɛlɛ mʋ obú.
Ɔmásʋ ogyipʋ anfɩ lɛha mʋ olegyi ɩwɩ.
21Ɔlɔpʋ mʋ bwɛ mʋ woyi pʋ́ mʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ ɔkɩpʋ.
22Ɔlɛlɛ mʋ ɔkpa ánɩ́ ɔhɩɛ mʋ ahandɛ abʋbwɛ tɔá odekle,
isuna amʋ́ nyansa.
23Ɩnʋ mʋ sɩ Israel lɛba Egyipte.
Yakob mʋa mʋ aha bemli afɔɔ Ham ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
24Nana Bulu lɛha amʋ́ bɛhɩɛ klɛɩ,
wa ɔwʋnlɩn dʋn amʋ́ alupʋ.
25Ɔlɛha Egyiptefɔ agywɩɩn lɛdamli, bolu Israelfɔ,
bɔgywɩɩn amʋ́ ɩwɩ lalahɛ.
26Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔwa mʋ osumbi Mose
pʋ́ Aaron amʋʋ ɔlɛlɛ amʋ.
27Bɔbwɛ mʋ ofula Egyiptefɔtɔ,
bwɛ osuna Ham ɔsʋlʋsʋ ɩnʋ.
28Ɔlɛha oklun ɩlɛba, ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ ilebi tuun,
bʋmegyi mʋ asʋnsʋ.
29Ɔlɛha amʋ́ ntsu lɛdamli obugya,
aklɛmɛtɩ bowu.
30Nkle bɔbʋla ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ,
bowie yɔ amʋ́ awie obutotɔ aná fɛ́ɛ́.
31Ɔlɛlɛ ɔnɔ, awʋlʋ mʋ́a ntsʋnkɩ
bɔbʋla amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
32Ɔlɛha atsufolibi lotswie si nyankpʋ,
ɔprada lɔpʋtɩ ɔsʋlʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
33Oleyinta amʋ́ waɩn afla pʋ́ amʋ́ apɔntɔ,
biabia amʋ́ oyi kugyikʋ.
34Ɔlɛlɛ ɔnɔ, atsantsankʋá bʋma ɩklatɔ bɛdalɩ.
35Bɔwɩ ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ ɩfa pʋ́ amʋ́ ndɔtɔ-atɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
36Ɔlɔmɔ amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋsʋ abitɩ fɛ́ɛ́,
amʋ́ yasʋtɔ fɛ́ɛ́ abi gyankpapʋ.
37Ɔlɛha Israelfɔ bɔpʋ Egyiptefɔ sika pɛpɛ mʋ́a fututu dalɩ ɔmá amʋtɔ.
Ɔpɔnpʋ ɔkʋkʋ métsia abusuan anfɩtɔ.
38Amʋ́ natɩ lɔwa Egyiptefɔ ɔdwɛ,
tsufɛ amʋ́ ɩwɩ lɔwa amʋ́ ifu.
39Ɔlɛtɛɩ agyinde bun amʋ́sʋ fɛ tati,
ha ogya lɔwankɩ ha amʋ́ onye.
40Bɛfɩtɛ mʋ iye, ɔlɛha amʋ́ apʋtsatsa.
Ɔlɔpʋ ɔsʋsʋ atogyihɛ ɛ bʋla amʋ́.
41Olefinki bʋta, ntsu lɛfɛn dalɩ mʋ́tɔ,
ɩna ɔsʋlʋ wʋlɩhɛsʋ fɛ ntsu tsʋnhɛ,
42tsufɛ ɔlɛkaɩn mʋ ntam amʋʋ
ɔlɛka ha mʋ osumpʋ Abraham amʋsʋ.
43Ɔlɛkpa mʋ ɔmá ansigyisʋ dalɩ Egyipte.
Aha amʋʋ ɔlɛlɛ amʋ, bʋna bʋdɛ ɩlʋ wa kʋklʋkʋʋ.
44Ɔlɔpʋ ɔmá-ɔmá ɔsʋlʋ ha amʋ́.
Ɔlɛha botsu amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋsʋ atɔ bwɛ amʋ́ klɛ.
45Alɩá bégyi mʋ amandɩɛ pʋ́ mʋ atosunahɛsʋ,
sʋ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ lɛba mʋ́tɔ.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 106
Content:
Bulu, Nɩ Fʋdɛ Fʋ Ɔmá Nkpa Hɔ A, Gyi Mɩ Bʋalɛ
1Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Mlɩda mʋ ɩpan, tsufɛ ɔbʋ alɛ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛ ɩma ɔka!
2Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ blɩ ntobi akpɔnkpɔntɩá Nana Bulu labwɛ?
Ntɛ ma ɔbɛ́talɩ kanfʋ mʋ, ɩbɔ́fʋn?
3Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ bʋtegyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ,
bʋtɔbwɛ tɔá ɩda ɔkpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
4Nana Bulu, nɩ fʋdɛ fʋ ɔmá bʋalɛ gyi a, kaɩn mɩsʋ.
Nɩ fʋdɛ amʋ́ nkpa hɔ a, gyi mɩ bʋalɛ.
5Mɛ́nɩ nówun siadɩɛá faha aha amʋʋ falɛ amʋ.
Mɩa fʋ ɔmá amʋ anya ansigyi,
mɩa fʋ siadɩɛ akanfʋ fʋ.
6Anɩa anɩ anain anɩlapʋ ɩla gyi fʋ.
Anɩlabwɛ lalahɛ, wa owuntɔlɩn kpan.
7Brɛá anɩ anain betsia Egyipte a, bʋmowun fʋ ofula labi.
Bʋmɛkaɩn fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka tsɔtsɔɔtsɔá fɔwa ha amʋ́sʋ.
Ɩnɩ sʋ bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ fʋsʋ Ɔpʋ Pɛpɛ ɔnɔ.
8Mʋ́ o a, ɔlɔhɔ amʋ́ nkpa mʋ ɩda amʋ sʋ,
mɛnɩ ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ tumi kpɔnkpɔntɩ ɔwan.
9Ɔlɛlɛ ɔnɔ, Ɔpʋ Pɛpɛ lɛkpɩ.
Ɔlɛkpa amʋ́ tsʋn bʋnkpa kluklutɔ fɛ ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ bʋna.
10Alɩ ɔlɛlɛ amʋ́ alupʋ ɩbɩ,
ka amʋ́ lɛ adʋn tumi asɩ nɩ.
11Ntsu lɛmɛ amʋ́ alupʋ.
Amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋlɛ kʋraa mésian.
12Ɩnʋ bɔhɔ mʋ asʋnsʋ gyi,
wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ.
13Ɩmɔwa ɔpá kʋkʋ bɛtan mʋ gyumagyihɛsʋ,
bʋmetsia gyo mʋ otswii amʋ́.
14Atɔ lɛhɩɛ tsia dɩnka amʋ́ ɔwɔlɩ ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ ɩnʋ.
Mʋ́ sʋ bɔsɔ Bulu kɩ ɔsʋlʋ wʋlɩhɛ amʋsʋ.
15Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔlɔbwɛ tɔá bɛfɩtɛ ha amʋ́,
tamɛ ɔlɛha amʋ́ bɔlɔ ɩlɔ lalahɛ.
16Brɛá bʋtsie amʋ́ ɔswɩɩkpa a, amʋ́ ansɩ lɛpɛ
Mose mʋa Nana Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ Aaronsʋ.
17Ɔsʋlʋ lɛyaa ɔnɔ mɛ Datan,
pula Abiram mʋa mʋ aha.
18Ogya ɛ lɛda amʋ́ abuopʋtɔ,
ɩlɔhɔ awuntɔlɩnpʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
19Bɛŋlaɩn sika pɛpɛ bwɛ ɔnantswiebi,
sum mʋ́ Hɔrɛb ɩbʋasɩ.
20Bɔpwɛ ɔnantswieá ɔtɔwɩ ɩfa tunku,
pʋtsɛ Buluá ogyi amʋ́ numnyam.
21Bɛtan amʋ́ Ɔhɔpʋ Bulusʋ.
Mʋlɔbwɛ atɔ akpɔnkpɔntɩ Egyipte,
22bwɛ tɔá ɩbʋ ifu Ham ɔsʋlʋsʋ
pʋ́ tɔá ɩbʋ wanwan Ɔpʋ Pɛpɛ ɔnɔ.
23Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
mɔ́mɔ amʋ́,
tamɛ Moseá ɔlɛlɛ lɔkʋsʋ kokoli amʋ́ nwunsʋ,
ha mʋ ɔblɔ lɛka itin,
ɔmɛtra mɔ amʋ́.
24Ɩnʋ bekina ɔsʋlʋ wanklaan amʋsʋ yɔ,
tsufɛ bʋmɔhɔ tɔá ɔlɛhɩɛ ha amʋ́sʋ gyi.
25Botsu ɔnɔ mʋsʋ amʋ́ tati-obuto ɩnʋ,
tsufɛ bʋmobu mʋ asʋn amʋ.
26Ɩnɩ sʋ olotsu ɩbɩ fʋa ka ntam bun amʋ́sʋ ɔbɛɛ,
mɛha amʋ́ bówu ɔsʋlʋkpan amʋsʋ.
27Mɛ́ha amʋ́ abi-aná bɛ́da saɩn yɔ ɔmá-ɔmátɔ,
ntɛ wie aputu.
28Ɩnʋ bɔpʋ ɩwɩ yɛmanta Peor ɔkpɩsʋ,
bʋdɛ atogyihɛá bapʋha afuli gyi.
29Bɔpʋ amʋ́ bwɛhɛ anfɩ wa Bulu ɔblɔ.
Mʋ́ sʋ ɩlɔ lalahɛ lɛkpa wie amʋ́tɔ, bʋdewu.
30Tamɛ Finehas lɔkʋsʋ kɔ ha Bulu amʋ́ nwunsʋ,
ɩlɔ amʋ lɛka itin.
31Mʋ́ sʋ Nana Bulu lotsu mʋ
ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
32Bɛtra wa Bulu ɔblɔ Meriba,
bɛha Mose lenyaa asʋn amʋ́ sʋ,
33tsufɛ bɛha mʋ olenya ɔblɔ tsʋn,
ɩlɛha mʋ ɔlɛblɩ mimlala.
34Israelfɔ bekina bʋmɔmɔ ɔmá-ɔmá amʋ,
fɛ alɩá Nana Bulu lɛblɩ.
35Mboun amʋ́a ɔmátɔfɔ amʋ bɔbwɛ ɩkʋlɛ,
bɛkasɩ amʋ́ amandɩɛ.
36Bosum amʋ́ ɩkpɩ,
ilemli agbla kɩta amʋ́.
37Bɔpʋ amʋ́ abi yinhɛ mʋ́a abi tsɩhɛ kʋraa ha ɩkpɩ igyi.
38Bɛtsɛɩ obugya ánɩ́ ɔlala ma mʋ́ ɩwɩ wʋlɩ asɩ,
tsufɛ bɔpʋ amʋ́ abi ha Kanaanfɔ ɩkpɩ igyi,
ɩlɛha ifin lɛda ɔsʋlʋ amʋ.
39Amʋ́ bwɛhɛ anfɩ lɛha bɔkpɔɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ,
mli mbʋa atɔpʋ ɔŋɛtɔ.
40Ɩnʋ Nana Bulu lɛhɩɛ nya ɔblɔ mʋ ɔmásʋ,
mʋ ogyikpa lɔwa mʋ nyanya.
41Olesi amʋ́ ha ɔmá-ɔmá,
amʋ́ alupʋ begyi amʋ́sʋ.
42Amʋ́ alupʋ bɛkpa amʋ́ manta,
ha betsia amʋ́ tumi asɩ.
43Oletsia lɛ amʋ́,
tamɛ bɛhɩɛá bɔ́wa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn.
Mʋ́ sʋ amʋ́ lalahɛbwɛ lɛba amʋ́ asɩ.
44Mʋ́ alɩ o a, olowun amʋ́ nwɛ,
brɛá olonu amʋ́ isu.
45Ɔlɛkaɩn ntam ánɩ́ ɩbʋ mʋa amʋ́nyɔ nsɩnɛsʋ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ,
ilowie mʋ ɩwɩtɔ.
46Ɔlɛha amʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bɛkɩta amʋ́ ndoun
bowun amʋ́ nwɛ.
47Oo Nana Bulu anɩ Bulu, gyi anɩ bʋalɛ!
Lɛ anɩ tsu ɔmá-ɔmátɔ befia,
mɛnɩ abɛ́da fʋ ɩpan,
kanfʋ fʋ ɩda ansigyisʋ.
48Bʋkanfʋ Nana Bulu, Israel Bulu,
tsu brɛá ɔyɩ mɔkʋlɩn yɛfʋn brɛá ɩtamata.
Ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́ bʋblɩ bɛɛ, “Ɩba mʋ́tɔ!”
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 107
Content:
Ɔwʋlʋ 5sɩ
(Israelfɔ Ɩlʋ 107--150)
Bulu Totsu Aha Ánɩ́ Bʋma Tɔtɔ Lɛ Amʋ́ Ɩkplantɔ
1Mlɩda Nana Bulu ɩpan,
tsufɛ ɔbʋ alɛ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛ ɩma ɔka.
2Aha ánɩ́ Nana Bulu laka lɛ
amʋ́ alupʋ ɩbɩ bʋblɩ alɩ.
3Alakpa amʋ́ tsu owi ɔdalɩkpa
mʋ́a owi ɔkplɩwiekpa ɔsʋlʋsʋ,
tsu ɔsʋsʋ mʋ́a ɔsasɩ befia.
4Amʋ́tɔ akʋ bɛnatɩ tsʋntsʋn adimbitɔ.
Bʋmenya ɔkpa tsʋn yɔ wulu kʋkʋtɔá bétsia.
5Akʋn mʋ́a ɔmɛwʋlɩ lɛkɩta amʋ́,
ɔkla lɛsrɩ amʋ́.
6Ɩnʋ bosu kpoli Nana Bulu amʋ́ ɩkplantɔ,
ɔlɛlɛ amʋ́ lɛ amʋ́ asʋn wunhɛtɔ.
7Ɔlɛkpa amʋ́ tsʋn ɔkpa tswiihɛsʋ,
yɛfʋn brɛá bowie wuluá bétsia mʋ́tɔsʋ.
8Bʋda Nana Bulu ɩpan,
mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ mʋ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩá alabwɛ
ha anyankpʋsa sʋ,
9tsufɛ ɔtɛha aha ánɩ́ ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ amʋ́ ntsu,
pʋ atɔ wanklaan bʋla amʋ́á akʋn dɛ amʋ́.
10Amʋ́tɔ akʋ betsia oklun mʋ́a oklun tuuntɔ,
bʋda ɩwɩɔsɩn mʋ́a ɩkantɔ,
11tsufɛ bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulu asʋnsʋ.
Bekina Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie afutuo nu.
12Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔlɛha amʋ́ bɔyɔ agyʋma kpekple pʋba amʋ́ asɩ.
Bɛdɩda, bʋmenya ɔbʋapʋ.
13Ɩnʋ bosu kpoli Nana Bulu amʋ́ ɩkplantɔ,
ɔlɛlɛ amʋ́ lɛ amʋ́ asʋn wunhɛtɔ.
14Ɔlɛbɩtɩa amʋ́ lɛ oklun mʋ́a oklun tuun amʋtɔ,
tɩntɩn ɩkan amʋ lɛ amʋ́ ɩwɩ.
15Bʋda Nana Bulu ɩpan,
mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ mʋ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩá alabwɛ
ha anyankpʋsa sʋ,
16tsufɛ olobwiebwie kɔɔbrɩ aklʋn,
biabia adatɔtɔ anyɔ.
17Bemimla kʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulusʋ.
Mʋ́ sʋ bowun ɩwɩɔsɩn amʋ́ bwɛhɛ lalahɛ sʋ.
18Atogyihɛ kʋkʋ mɛdɩnka amʋ́ ɔwɔlɩ,
besian wu.
19Ɩnʋ bosu kpoli Nana Bulu amʋ́ ɩkplantɔ,
ɔlɛlɛ amʋ́ lɛ amʋ́ asʋn wunhɛtɔ.
20Ɔlɔpʋ mʋ asʋn sɩsɩ, ɩlɛtsa amʋ́ ɩlɔ,
lɛ amʋ́ lɛ lowutɔ.
21Bʋda Nana Bulu ɩpan,
mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ mʋ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩá alabwɛ
ha anyankpʋsa sʋ,
22abʋpʋ ɩpan bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha mʋ,
wa ɩlʋ ansigyisʋ pʋda mʋ bwɛhɛ ɔkan.
23Amʋ́tɔ akʋ bʋdɩn ɔpʋsʋ-ɩyɛntɔ,
bʋdɛ ibia gyi,
24bowun Nana Bulu gyumagyihɛ
pʋ́ mʋ ofula ánɩ́ ɔlɔbwɛ ɔpʋ okluklukpa;
25tsufɛ ɔlɛlɛ ɔnɔ,
afu kpɔnkpɔntɩ lɔtsʋn,
ɔpʋ lɛda ɔwʋnlɩnsʋ.
26Ilotsu amʋ́ ntsusʋ-yibi amʋ dʋ,
kpa amʋ́ wa,
ɔkla lɛsrɩ amʋ́.
27Bʋna bʋdɛ ntinta bɔ fɛ nta abʋpʋ.
Amʋ́ agywɩɩn lotu pupu.
28Ɩnʋ bosu kpoli Nana Bulu amʋ́ ɩkplantɔ,
ɔlɛlɛ amʋ́ lɛ amʋ́ asʋn wunhɛtɔ.
29Ɔlɛha afu amʋ ɩlɛka itin,
ɔpʋ amʋ ɩlɔlʋa.
30Ansɩ legyi amʋ́, tsufɛ ɔpʋ amʋ ilesi da.
Ɔlɛlɛ amʋ́ yeyi otsubunɔá bʋdekle.
31Bʋda Nana Bulu ɩpan,
mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ mʋ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩá alabwɛ
ha anyankpʋsa sʋ.
32Bʋtsu Nana Bulu fʋa mʋ aha ɔpasuatɔ,
abʋkanfʋ mʋ ahandɛ ansɩtɔ.
33Mʋtɛha ntsu tsʋnhɛ temli ɔsʋlʋkpan,
ntsu ɔwɩkpa tɔwʋlɩ.
34Ɔtɛha ɔsʋlʋ wanklaan temli nfɔlɩ ɔkwɛkpa,
mʋ́sʋ atsiapʋ bwɛhɛ lalahɛ sʋ.
35Ɔtɛladamli adimbi bwɛ patɩ,
ɔtɛha ntsu tɔwɩ ɔsʋlʋ wʋlɩhɛsʋ.
36Ɔtɔpʋ aha ánɩ́ akʋn dɛ amʋ́ yaɩ ɩnʋ,
bʋtɛda wulu tsia mʋ́tɔ.
37Bʋtɔdɔ, wa atɔ, du waɩn-abi,
kpɔtɩ atɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ.
38Otoyula amʋ́ bʋtɛhɩɛ klɛɩ,
amʋ́ mbwɩ yaɩhɛsʋ tamadɩnkɩ.
39Nɩ ɔhɩɛ, asʋn wunhɛ mʋ́a isu ɩba a,
ɩtɛha ɔmá amʋ́sʋ tɛdɩnkɩ,
40amʋ́ wulu ahandɛ bʋtɔsʋpa,
natɩ ki dimbiá ɔkpa mɛda mʋ́sʋsʋ.
41Tamɛ ototsu aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ lɛ amʋ́ ɩkplantɔ,
ha amʋ́ abusuan tɛklɛɩ yɛɛ fɛ akufa.
42Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa bʋtowun mʋ́, nya ansigyi,
tamɛ ɔnɔ tobwie aha lalahɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
43Ɔtɩansɩpʋ okugyiɔkʋ ɔkɩ ɩnɩ yaɩ,
osusu Nana Bulu ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩwɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 108
Content:
Bulu, Fʋ Nkʋlɛsʋ Mɩ Ansɩ Dɩn
(Israelfɔ Ɩlʋ 57:7-11; 60:5-12)
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ mʋ́a ɩlʋ wahɛ.
1Oo Bulu, fʋ nkʋlɛsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn.
Mɩ ɔkla dɩn fʋsʋ.
Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ, ee nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ.
2Akwɛ mʋ́a nsankuo, mlɩtsinki.
Nétsinki bakɛ.
3Nana Bulu, nɛ́da fʋ ɩpan ahatɔ.
Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɔmá-ɔmátɔ.
4Tsufɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka lɔfʋa dafa ɔsʋsʋ.
Fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ lɔfʋa wɔ nwʋlʋta.
5Oo Bulu, bʋtsu fʋ fʋa dafa ɔsʋsʋ,
fʋ numnyam ɩbʋla ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́!
6Pʋ fʋ tumi ha anɩ agyi ɩsʋ, afʋsɔ anɩ ɔnɔ,
mɛnɩ fɛ́lɛ fʋ adwɛpʋ.
7Bulu latɔɩ tsu mʋ otsiakpa ɔbɛɛ,
“Néye Sekem wulutɔ ansigyisʋ.
Nósusu Sukot tsonkoli, ye mʋ́tɔ.
8Mɩbʋ Gilead pʋ́ Manase.
Efraim gyi mɩ kʋtʋpa.
Yuda ɛ gyi mɩ akɔnfra.
9Tamɛ Moab gyi mɩ atɔ ɔfwɩkpa.
Edom gyi mɩ ntʋkʋta ɔwɔɩtswɩkpa.
Filistifɔsʋ ntɔwa ɔkpayi.”
10Oo Bulu, ma ɔbɔ́pʋ wulu bɔpwɛ abunti kpekple fʋahɛ wa mʋ́ anfɩ wa mɩ ɩbɩtɔ?
Ma ɔbɛ́kpa mɩ négyi Edomsʋ?
11Bulu, megyi fʋlasi anɩ wa ɔkpa?
Fasi anɩ akɔpʋ kpa.
12Tsa anɩ agyi anɩ alupʋsʋ.
Nyankpʋsa mbʋa mʋ́ kpalɩ igyi.
13Anɩ hayinhɛbwɛ itsu Bulu wa,
tsufɛ mʋ ɔbɛ́tsatsa anɩ alupʋsʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 109
Content:
Bulu Tɛlɩɩ Ohiani Ɔma
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Mɩ Buluá ntɛkanfʋ,
mási tsia kɩ,
2tsufɛ aha lalahɛ pʋ́ afunupʋ ɔnɔ dɛ mɩsʋ,
bʋdɛ asʋn ka dɩnka mɩsʋ.
3Baka asʋn fia mɩ,
bʋdɛ mɩ kɔ kʋkʋ kpalɩ.
4Balɛ mɩ ɩla pʋka ɔdwɛá mbʋ ha amʋ́ ɩkɔ,
tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ ntɔbɔ mpaɩ ha amʋ́.
5Bʋtɔpʋ lalahɛ ka mɩ yile ɩkɔ,
pʋ olu ka ɔdwɛá mbʋ ha amʋ́ ɩkɔ.
6Bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Ha ɔha lalahɛ ɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ mʋsʋ,
ɩla ɔlɛpʋ ɔbwɛ mʋ ɔma ɔlɩɩpʋ.
7Begyi mʋ asʋn a, ogyi ɩpɔn.
Mʋ mpaɩ kʋraa ɩbwɛ tsitsa.
8Mʋ nkɛsʋ ɩdɩnkɩ,
ɔha bamba otsia mʋ otsiakpa.
9Mʋ abi bʋbwɛ awumbi,
mʋ ka ɔbwɛ ɔsʋrapʋ.
10Mʋ abi bʋbwɛ ahakpan, natɩ kʋlɩ atɔ.
Bʋgya amʋ́ lɛ amʋ́ abuntisʋ.
11Mʋ akɔ awie bʋswɩɩ mʋ mʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ wa amʋ́ akɔ nwun.
Afɔɔ bʋwan mʋ atonyahɛ.
12Ɔhaa máwa awɩtɔlɛ ha mʋ,
ntɛ wun mʋ awumbi nwɛ.
13Mʋ abi-aná bʋwu,
mʋ ɩda ɩfwɩ lɛ mʋ ɔma, aha ánɩ́ bɛ́ba bɛlɩntɔ.
14Nana Bulu, fʋ ansɩ ɩdɩnka mʋ anain lalahɛsʋ.
Mátsitsi mʋ yin ɛ klɛ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
15Dɩnka ansɩ amʋ́ lalahɛ amʋsʋ ekekegyiɛkɛ.
Ɔhaa ɛ mátra kaɩn mʋsʋ ɔyɩtɔ.”
16“Tsufɛ ɔmɛkaɩn wa awɩtɔlɛ,
mboun ɔtɛdɩnka aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ nwɛ, bʋma tɔtɔ, ɩladʋn amʋ́sʋ,
kleá mɔ́mɔ amʋ́.
17Olekle aha lwɩɩ,
ɩlwɩɩ ɩkɩta mʋ.
Omekle oyula.
Mʋ́ sʋ oyula ɩwa ɩfɔ mʋ wa.
18Aha lwɩɩ lemli mʋ atadɩɛ wahɛ,
imli mʋ ntsu nunhɛ,
iwie mʋ awútɔ fɛ nfɔ.
19Ɩlwɩɩ ibun mʋsʋ fɛ tati,
ɩklɩ mʋ osiesʋ fɛ abɔsʋɔ,
ɩmásankɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”
20Alɩ Nana Bulu ɔka mɩ ɩla alɛpʋ
mʋ́a mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn ablɩpʋ ɩkɔ nɩ.
21Mɩ Wie Nana Bulu,
fʋ ɩda sʋ bwɛ yile ha mɩ.
Fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ alɛ,
mʋ́ sʋ hɔ mɩ,
22tsufɛ mɩ ɩla bʋ nwɛ, mma tɔtɔ.
Mɩ klʋn lahɔ ɔlɔ.
23Nabwɛ fɛ ntʋpwɛ yiyiá ɩdɛtsʋn.
Bakpʋkpʋ mɩ tsitsa, fɛ tsantsankʋ.
24Akʋndɩ sʋ mɩ akpawunutɔ labwɛ yɔyɔɔyɔ,
nawʋlɩ si awú.
25Namli tɔkʋ odu ha mɩ ɩla alɛpʋ.
Benya wun mɩ bawa nwuntɔ kpʋkpʋ bɩ.
26Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, gyi mɩ bʋalɛ.
Fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ hɔ mɩ.
27Oo Nana Bulu, ha amʋ́ abʋbɩá fʋlahɔ mɩ.
28Bʋlwɩɩ mɩ, fʋ mʋ́ afʋyula mɩ.
Nɩ bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩsʋ a, pɛlɩ ɩkɩta amʋ́,
tamɛ mɩ fʋ osumbi mʋ́ a, ansɩ igyi mɩ.
29Nsʋpa ɩbwɛ mɩ ɩla alɛpʋ tati dɩdahɛ,
pɛlɩ ɩbwɛ amʋ́ atadɩɛ tɩntɩn,
30tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ mméesi ɩpan kpɔnkpɔntɩ pʋha Nana Bulu,
kanfʋ mʋ brɛá mʋ aha befia,
31tsufɛ ɔtɛlɩɩ ohiani ɔma,
mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́hɔ mʋ lɛ mʋ ɩpɔn ahapʋ ɩbɩtɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 110
Content:
Igyi ɔhapʋ Bulu Gyi Brɛ Fɛ́ɛ́
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Nana Bulu lɛbla mɩ Wie ɔbɛɛ,
“Tsia mɩ gyɔpɩsʋ,
yɛfʋn brɛá nɔ́pʋ fʋ alupʋ bwɛ fʋ ayabi oyikpa.”
2Nana Bulu ɔha fʋ iwiegyi ɩklɛɩ tsu Sion,
afʋgyi iwie fʋ alupʋsʋ!
3Fʋ aha bótsula dalɩ bobuo fʋ,
fʋ abʋ amʋsʋ ɩsa ɔyɔkɛ.
Fʋ nyasubi amʋ bɛ́dalɩ bɔtʋ fʋ, fɛ bakɛ obétsu.
4Nana Bulu laka ntam,
ɔmɛ́ɛtsɛ mʋ agywɩɩn.
Ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ fʋgyi brɛ fɛ́ɛ́, fɛ Melkisedek.”
5Anɩ Wie lɩɩ fʋ ɔma.
Obóbwiebwie awie nwun mʋ ɔblɔ onyakɛ.
6Obégyi ɔmá-ɔmá asʋn, mɔ aha bun ɔmá amʋtɔ,
bwiebwie awie ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
7Obónun ɔkpa ɩwɩ ɔbʋnkpabitɔ ntsu.
Mʋ́ sʋ obégyi ɩsʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 111
Content:
Nɔ́pʋ Mɩ Klʋn Fɛ́ɛ́ Da Nana Bulu Ɩpan
1Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Nɔ́pʋ mɩ klʋn fɛ́ɛ́ da Nana Bulu ɩpan,
brɛá aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa befia.
2Nana Bulu gyumagyihɛ lomoni.
Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ansɩ tegyi mʋ́ ɩwɩ fɛ́ɛ́,
bʋtɛkasɩ atɔ tsu mʋ́tɔ.
3Mʋ gyumagyihɛ lɛlɛ mʋ obú pʋ́ mʋ numnyam ɔwan.
Mʋ yilebwɛ bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
4Ɔtɛha bʋtɛkaɩn mʋ ofulasʋ.
Awɩtɔlɛpʋ pʋ́ nwɛ owunpʋ Nana Bulu gyi.
5Ɔtɛha aha ánɩ́ bʋtenya mʋ ifu atogyihɛ.
Ɔtamatan mʋ ntam amʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
6Ɔlɔpʋ ɔmá-ɔmá ɔsʋlʋ ha mʋ aha,
pʋsuna mʋ tumiá ɔbʋ mʋ gyumagyihɛsʋ.
7Mʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ, ɩda ɔkpa.
Aha bɛ́talɩ pʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋ mbla fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
8Ɔlɔbwɛ mʋ́ ɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Bɔ́pʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ mʋ́a yilebwɛ gyi mʋ́sʋ.
9Ɔlɛka lɛ mʋ aha,
ka mʋ ntam tswɩ ha brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɔlɔwankɩ, mʋ ɩda bʋ ifu.
10Nyansa otsuakpa gyi Nana Bulu ifunya.
Aha ánɩ́ bʋtegyi mʋ́sʋ bʋtonu asʋn asɩ wanklaan.
Aha bʋkanfʋ mʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 112
Content:
Ansɩ Igyi Ɔha Ánɩ́ Otenya Nana Bulu Ifu
1Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ otenya Nana Bulu ifu,
mʋ ansɩ tegyi mʋ mbla ɩwɩ.
2Mʋ abi-aná bénya tumi ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ.
Nana Bulu obóyula ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa abi-aná.
3Obénya atɔ, nya ɩwɩ mʋ woyitɔ.
Yilebwɛ mɛ́ɛkpa mʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
4Wankɩ tɔwankɩ okluntɔ ha ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa.
Awɩtɔlɛpʋ, nwɛ owunpʋ pʋ́ yile ɔbwɛpʋ ogyi.
5Ɩtɔwa alɛ ha awɩtɔlɛpʋá ɔtɔpʋ atɔ pan ɔha,
ɔtɔbwɛ mʋ togyitɔ ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
6Tsufɛ yile ɔbwɛpʋ ɔmɛ́ɛdɩda ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Aha bɛ́kaɩn mʋsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
7Ɩwɩklɩ tamawa mʋ ifu.
Mʋ klʋn dɩn Nana Bulusʋ kinkiinkin.
8Opuni tamatsii mʋ, ifu tamakɩta mʋ;
yɛfʋn brɛá obówun ánɩ́ alagyi mʋ alupʋsʋ.
9Ɔtɛlɛ ɩwɩtɔ kie ahianfɔ atɔ, mʋ yilebwɛ tamata.
Bulu ɔbɔ́wa mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn, wa mʋ numnyam.
10Ɔha lalahɛ obówun nya ɔblɔ,
wɩ ayín, yɛ.
Mʋ nhɩhɩɛ tamawa alɛ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 113
Content:
Ilehian Ánɩ́ Bɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu Ɩda
1Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Nana Bulu asumpʋ, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu ɩda.
2Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu ɩda,
tsu sei pʋya brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
3Ilehian ánɩ́ bɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu ɩda,
tsu owi ɔdalɩkpa yeyi mʋ́ ɔkplɩwiekpa.
4Nana Bulu lɔfʋa dʋn ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́,
mʋ numnyam lɛdafa ɔsʋsʋ.
5Ma gyi fɛ anɩ Bulu, Nana Bulu,
otsie mʋ owie-obiasʋ ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ.
6Alaba nwun asɩ ɔdɛ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ kɩ.
7Ototsu ɔha ánɩ́ ɔma tɔtɔ kʋsʋ ɔsʋlʋtɔ,
ɔtɛlɛ ohiani tsu wunasʋ,
8pʋ amʋ́ yaɩ wulu ahandɛ otsiakpa,
Amʋ́gyi wulu ahandɛá bʋbʋ mʋ ahatɔ.
9Mʋtɛha ɔtsɩá ɔma opuni tɔkwɩɩ,
ansɩ tegyi mʋ mʋ woyitɔ.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 114
Content:
Israelfɔ Dalɩ Tsu Egyipte
1Brɛá Israelfɔ bɛdalɩ Egyipte,
Yakob abi-aná bɛdalɩ afɔɔ-ndɩ a,
2Yuda lɔbwɛ Bulu otsiakpa,
Israel lɔbwɛ mʋ iwie ogyikpa.
3Ɔpʋ Pɛpɛ lowun mʋ srɩ.
Yordan leyinki mʋ yama.
4Abʋ benya ifu, fuli kpayi fɛ okpokpo!
Nkuku ɛ bofuli kpayi fɛ okufabi.
5Ɔpʋ, nkalɩ igyi fʋsrɩ?
Yordan, ntogyi fasanki fʋ yama?
6Abʋ, ntogyi mlɩdefuli kpayi fɛ okpokpo?
Nkuku, ntogyi mlɩdefuli kpayi fɛ okufabi?
7Ɔsʋlʋ, ɩwɩ ɩkpɩnkɩ fʋ Nana Bulu ansɩtɔ.
Ɩwɩ ɩkpɩnkɩ fʋ Yakob Bulu ansɩtɔ.
8Mʋlɛha ɩbʋta lemli patɩ,
akpankplansɩ lemli ntsu ɔwɩkpa.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 115
Content:
Atunku Bʋbʋ Ɔnɔ Bʋtamatɔɩ
1Megyi anɩ o. Oo Nana Bulu, megyi anɩ bɔ́wa numnyam.
Fʋ ɩda lɛkana ánɩ́ bɔ́wa numnyam,
tsufɛ fʋ ɔdwɛ ɩma ɔka, fʋbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ.
2Ntogyi sʋ ɔmá-ɔmá bɛ́fɩtɛ anɩ bɛɛ,
“Nkʋnʋ mlɩ Bulu bʋ?”
