3Anɩ Bulu bʋ ɔsʋsʋ,
togyitɔá odekle ɔtɔbwɛ,
4tamɛ amʋ́ atunku mʋ́ a,
anyankpʋsa lɔpʋ sika fututu mʋ́a pɛpɛ bwɛ amʋ́.
5Bʋbʋ ɔnɔ, bʋtamatɔɩ.
Bʋbʋ ansibi, bʋtamawun atɔ.
6Bʋbʋ asʋ, bʋtamanu asʋn.
Bʋbʋ ɔwɔntɩ, bʋtamahɔ atɔ afu.
7Bʋbʋ ɩbɩ, bʋtamakɩta atɔ,
Bʋbʋ ayabi, bʋtamanatɩ,
amʋ́ ɔmɛ ɛ tamalɩn.
8Atunku amʋ abwɛpʋ,
pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka amʋ́sʋ bʋbwɛ fɛ atunku amʋ.
9Israelfɔ, mlɩpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ.
Mʋtegyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, otegyi ɩban wa mlɩ.
10Aaron woyi, mlɩpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ.
Mʋtegyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, otegyi ɩban wa mlɩ.
11Nana Bulu ifu anyapʋ, mlɩpʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋsʋ.
Mʋtegyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, otegyi ɩban wa mlɩ.
12Nana Bulu ansɩ dɩn anɩsʋ, obóyula anɩ.
Obóyula Israel woyi,
obóyula Aaron woyi.
13Obóyula akpʋnkpʋ-akaka fɛ́ɛ́á
bʋtenya mʋ ifu.
14Nana Bulu ɔha mlɩa mlɩ abi-aná amlɩhɩɛ klɛɩ.
15Nana Bulu, ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ Ɔbwɛpʋ
amʋ oyula mlɩ.
16Nana Bulu bʋ ɔsʋsʋ,
ɔlɔpʋ ɔsʋlʋ ha anyankpʋsa.
17Awupʋ bʋtamakanfʋ Nana Bulu,
amʋ́ mʋ́ bʋbʋ ɔtɩnɛá ɔha tamatɔɩ.
18Tamɛ anɩ akɩankpapʋ mʋ́ abɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu,
tsu sei pʋya brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 116
Content:
Mméesi Su Kpoli Bulu Mɩ Nkpatɔ
1Ntɔdwɛ Nana Bulu,
tsufɛ alanu mɩ ɔmɛ pʋ́ mɩ atɔ kʋlɩhɛ.
2Ɔtɛyaa asʋ ha mɩ.
Mʋ́ sʋ mméesi su kpoli mʋ mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
3Lowu lɛfɩnɩ ayibi bomli mɩ,
afulitɔyɔ lɔwa mɩ ifu.
Ɩkplan mʋ́a ahʋmɩtɩ lɔdʋn mɩ.
4Ɩnʋ nosu kpoli Nana Bulu mbɛɛ,
“Ao Nana Bulu, kokoli lɛ mɩ!”
5Awɩtɔlɛpʋ pʋ́ yile ɔbwɛpʋ Nana Bulu gyi.
Nwɛ owunpʋ anɩ Bulu gyi.
6Otegyi ɩban wa aha ánɩ́ bʋmeyin ɔlala.
Ɩlɔdʋn mɩ, ɔlɔhɔ mɩ nkpa.
7Mɩ ɔkla, yinki yɛda ɔkpʋnʋ,
tsufɛ Nana Bulu lahɩɛ wa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ,
8tsufɛ alalɛ mɩ tsu lowutɔ,
Alatsitsi mɩ ntsú,
kɩta mɩ lɩɩ, mmɛdɩda.
9Mɛnɩ nétsia nkpa wanklaan ha Nana Bulu,
akɩankpapʋ ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ.
10Brɛá nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Nhɩɛ ndɛ ipian wun”
kʋraa nɔhɔ fʋ gyi nɩ.
11Brɛá ɔkla lɛsrɩ mɩ a, nɛblɩ mbɛɛ,
“Afunupʋ anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ bʋgyi.”
12Ntɔ nɛ́talɩ pʋda Nana Bulu ɩpan,
mʋ awɩtɔlɛ kpɔnkpɔntɩ anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ sʋ?
13Nótsu nkpahɔ-ɛwɛ fʋa,
su kpoli mʋ, pʋda mʋ ɩpan.
14Nɛ́ka ɩkɔá notsula ha Nana Bulu,
mʋ aha fɛ́ɛ́ ansɩtɔ.
15Aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa Nana Bulu ɔma
lowu ɩhɩɛ bʋ bia mʋ ansɩtɔ.
16Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ osumbi ngyi.
Fʋ osumbi tsɩhɛ mʋ bi ngyi,
falɛ mɩ lɛ ɩkantɔ.
17Oo Nana Bulu, nósu kpoli fʋ,
pʋ ɩpan bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha fʋ.
18Nɛ́ka ɩkɔá notsula ha Nana Bulu,
mʋ aha fɛ́ɛ́ ansɩtɔ,
19mʋ ɔtswɛkpa nwunsɩnɛsʋ Yerusalem wulu nsɩnɛ.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 117
Content:
Nana Bulu Ɔnɔkwalɩ Ɩda Brɛ Fɛ́ɛ́
1Ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩtsu mʋ fʋa,
2tsufɛ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka lebiayi ha anɩ.
Nana Bulu ɔnɔkwalɩ ɛ ɩda brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 118
Content:
Bulu Ɔdwɛá Ɩma Ɔka Bʋ Ɩnʋ Brɛ Fɛ́ɛ́
1Mlɩda Nana Bulu ɩpan, tsufɛ ɔbʋ alɛ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́!
2Israelfɔ bʋblɩ bɛɛ,
“Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.”
3Aaron woyi bʋblɩ bɛɛ,
“Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.”
4Nana Bulu ifu anyapʋ bʋblɩ bɛɛ,
“Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.”
5Brɛá nowie ɩkplantɔ a, nokpoli Nana Bulu,
ɔlɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ,
pʋ mɩ lɩɩ ɔtɛɩkpa.
6Nana Bulu bʋ mɩ wa, tɔtɔ mɔ́ɔwa mɩ ifu.
Ntɔ nyankpʋsa ɔbɛ́talɩ bwɛ mɩ?
7Nana Bulu bʋ mɩ wa. Obégyi mɩ bʋalɛ.
Négyi ɩsʋ, pʋ mɩ ansibi kɩ mɩ alupʋ.
8Ɩbʋ alɛá nɛ́tanʋ Nana Bulu,
dʋn ánɩ́ nɔ́pʋ ansɩ dɩnka anyankpʋsasʋ.
9Ɩbʋ alɛá nɛ́tanʋ Nana Bulu,
dʋn ánɩ́ nɔ́pʋ ansɩ dɩnka wulu ahandɛsʋ.
10Ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́ bɛkafia mɩ,
tamɛ néyinta amʋ́ Nana Bulu ɩdatɔ plɩplɩplɩ!
11Bɛkafia mɩ,
tamɛ neyinta amʋ́ Nana Bulu ɩdatɔ plɩplɩplɩ!
12Bɛkpa bun mɩsʋ fɛ awʋnsa.
Bodun fɛ akpokplofwɩ ogya,
Neyinta amʋ́ Nana Bulu ɩdatɔ plɩplɩplɩ.
13Bowuta mɩ, sian mɩ lɛ da,
tamɛ Nana Bulu legyi mɩ bʋalɛ.
14Nana Bulu gyi mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ.
Alahɔ mɩ nkpa.
15Ansigyi ɩlʋ mʋ́a ope dɛlɩn
yile abwɛpʋ obun ɔwakpa bɛɛ,
“Nana Bulu gyɔpɩ labwɛ hayinhɛsʋ.
16Nana Bulu lawa ɔkpayi.
Mʋ gyɔpɩ lagyi hayinhɛsʋ.”
17Mmóowu, nétsia nkpa,
da Nana Bulu gyumagyihɛ ɔkan suna aha.
18Nana Bulu lahɩɛ bɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ,
tamɛ ɔmɔpʋ mɩ ha lowu.
19Mlɩfinki yilebwɛ aklʋn ha mɩ,
ambitiwie yɛda Nana Bulu ɩpan.
20Nana Bulu ɔtswɛkpa ɔnɔ klʋn nɩ.
Yile abwɛpʋ ɔbɔ́tsʋn mʋ́tɔ wie.
21Fabwɛ atɔá fasɔ mɩ ɔnɔ,
fahɔ mɩ nkpa.
22Ibwi amʋʋ obu ayipʋ bekina amʋ
lebemli okonkisʋbwi nɩ.
23Nana Bulu lɔbwɛ mʋ́ alɩ.
Ɩbʋ wanwan.
24Ndɛ gyi ɛkɛá Nana Bulu labwɛ nɩ.
Mlɩha ansɩ igyi anɩ, ɩwɩ ɩsankɩ anɩ.
25Oo Nana Bulu, abwii ɩpa hɔ anɩ!
Oo Nana Bulu, kokoli ha ɩwa alɛ ha anɩ!
26Nana Bulu oyula ɔha anfɩ ɔba mʋ ɩdatɔ anfɩ!
Anɩdɛ mlɩ yula tsu Nana Bulu woyitɔ.
27Nana Bulu gyi Bulu,
mʋlaha anɩlawa alɛ.
Mlɩkɩta mbla, amlɩpʋ ansigyi yi opian yɔ
Bulu afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩ nsiebi asɩ.
28Fʋgyi mɩ Bulu, nɛ́da fʋ ɩpan.
Fʋgyi mɩ Bulu, nótsu fʋ fʋa.
29Mlɩda Nana Bulu ɩpan, tsufɛ ɔbʋ alɛ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 119
Content:
Ansɩ Igyi Aha Ánɩ́ Ɔlala Ma Amʋ́ Ɩwɩ (Alɛf)
1Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ ɔlala ma amʋ́ ɩwɩ,
bʋtɛnatɩ Nana Bulu atosunahɛ ɔkpasʋ.
2Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ ɔlɛ ɔnɔ bʋtegyi mʋ́sʋ,
bʋtɔpʋ amʋ́ ɩklʋn fɛ́ɛ́ dunka mʋ,
3bʋtamabwɛ lalahɛ,
bʋtɛnatɩ mʋ ɔkpasʋ.
4Fɔpʋ fʋ mbla ha anɩ fɛɛ,
agyi mʋ́sʋ wanklaan.
5Oo, tɛkɩ nɩ nɛ́talɩ natɩ
fʋ amandɩɛ amʋsʋ wanklaan,
6hɩɛ gywɩɩn fʋ mbla amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩwɩ wanklaan a,
tɛkɩ pɛlɩ mɛ́ɛkɩta mɩ.
7Nɔ́pʋ ɩklʋn wanklaan kanfʋ fʋ.
Fʋ amandɩɛ ɩda ɔkpa nɩ ndɛ mʋ́ kasɩ.
8Nɔ́bwɛ dɩnka fʋ amandɩɛsʋ,
mási mɩ wa ɔkpa ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Suna Mɩ Fʋ Amandɩɛ (Bɛt)
9Nkalɩ ɔyasubi ɔbɛ́ha mʋ tsiatɔ bɛ́tɩn?
Nkɛtɩ ɔdɛ fʋ asʋnsʋ gyi.
10Napʋ mɩ klʋn fɛ́ɛ́ ndɛ fʋ dunka.
Máha mɩ ampan fʋ mbla amʋsʋ.
11Naŋain fʋ asʋn mɩ klʋntɔ,
mɛnɩ mmɔ́ɔpʋ ɩla gyi fʋ.
12Oo Nana Bulu, kanfʋ ɩbwɛ fʋ klɛ.
Suna mɩ fʋ amandɩɛ.
13Napʋ ɔnɔ kla amandɩɛá
fɔpʋ fʋ ɔnɔ wa fɛ́ɛ́.
14Mɩ ansɩ tegyi ɔnɔá fɛlɛ ɩwɩ,
fɛ alɩá mɩ ansɩ tegyi atonyahɛ ɩwɩ.
15Ntɛhɩɛ gywɩɩn fʋ mbla amʋ ɩwɩ,
pʋ ansɩ yi fʋ ɔkpa amʋsʋ.
16Fʋ amandɩɛ sʋ awútɔ bɛ́sankɩ mɩ,
mmɛ́ɛtan fʋ asʋnsʋ.
Finki Mɩ Ansibi (Gimɛl)
17Bwɛ yile ha mɩ fʋ osumbi, antsia nkpa.
Mɩ angyi fʋ asʋnsʋ.
18Finki mɩ ansibi,
fówun nówun ofula ánɩ́ ɩbʋ fʋ atosunahɛ amʋtɔ.
19Ɔfɔɔ ngyi ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ,
mápʋ fʋ mbla ŋain mɩ.
20Ɩklʋn mɛdɩ mɩ asɩ,
tsufɛ fʋ amandɩɛ ɩdɩn mɩ klʋnsʋ bregyibrɛ.
21Fʋtɔwa ɩyɩn wa aha ánɩ́ bʋtamabu atɔ, fʋ ɩlwɩɩ dɩn amʋ́sʋ,
bafwɩ dalɩ fʋ mbla ɔkpasʋ.
22Dɩnkɩ amʋ́ nsʋpa pʋ́ amʋ́ pɛlɩ lɛ mɩsʋ,
tsufɛ ndɛ ɔnɔá fɛlɛsʋ gyi.
23Nɩ wulu ahandɛ befia bʋdɛ mɩ ɩwɩ agywɩɩn kɩta o a,
mɩ fʋ osumbi mʋ́ ntɔgywɩɩn fʋ amandɩɛ ɩwɩ.
24Fʋ ɔnɔá fɛlɛ tɛha awútɔ tɛsankɩ mɩ.
Mʋ́tosuna mɩ nyansa.
Ha Mɩ Annu Fʋ Mbla Amʋ Asɩ (Dalɛt)
25Nda asɩ tantaantan,
laha mɩ nkpa alɩá fʋ asʋn lɛblɩ.
26Nɛlɛ mɩ tsiatɔ suna fʋ, fɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
Mʋ́ sʋ suna mɩ fʋ amandɩɛ.
27Ha mɩ annu fʋ mbla amʋ asɩ,
mɛnɩ nɔ́gywɩɩn fʋ ofula ɩwɩ.
28Mɩ ɔkla dɛ awɩrɛhʋ su.
Lawa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn fʋ asʋn amʋ ɔnɔ.
29Ha afunu ɔkpa ɩwa ɩfɔ mɩ wa,
afʋpʋ awɩtɔlɛ suna mɩ fʋ atosunahɛ amʋ.
30Natsu ɔnɔkwalɩ ɔkpa amʋ.
Napʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋ amandɩɛsʋ.
31Oo Nana Bulu, ndɛ ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋtɔ kinkiinkin.
Máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ.
32Nsrɩ fʋ mbla ɔkpa amʋsʋ,
tsufɛ faha nhɩɛ ndɛ mʋ́ asɩ nu.
Suna Mɩ Angyi Fʋ Amandɩɛsʋ (He)
33Oo Nana Bulu, suna mɩ angyi fʋ amandɩɛsʋ,
mɛnɩ nɛ́kɩta mʋ́tɔ yɛfʋn mʋ́ ɔnɔmɔ.
34Ha mɩ annu asʋn asɩ, ankɩta fʋ atosunahɛtɔ,
ampʋ mɩ ɩklʋn fɛ́ɛ́ gyi mʋ́sʋ.
35Kpa mɩ tsʋn fʋ mbla ɔkpa amʋsʋ,
tsufɛ ɩtɛha ɩwɩ tɛsankɩ mɩ.
36Damli mɩ klʋn dɩnka ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋsʋ,
megyi sika ɔnsɩpɛsʋ.
37Dɩnkɩ mɩ ansɩ lɛ atɔá ɩma labisʋ,
afʋha mɩ antsʋn fʋ ɔkpa amʋsʋ nya nkpa.
38Bwɛ tɔ amʋʋ fɛhɩɛ yaɩ ha fʋ ifu anyapʋ amʋ
ha mɩ, fʋ osumbi.
39Lɛ mɩ lɛ nsʋpa ánɩ́ ntenya ifutɔ,
tsufɛ fʋ amandɩɛ ɩbʋ alɛ.
40Kɩ, ndekleá négyi fʋ mbla amʋsʋ.
Yile ɔbwɛpʋ fʋgyi, sʋ laha mɩ nkpa.
Máhɔ Fʋ Ɔnɔkwalɩ Asʋn Amʋ Lɛ Mɩ Ɔnɔ (Waw)
41Oo Nana Bulu, ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka
pʋ́ nkpahɔ amʋʋ fɛhɩɛ yaɩ mɩ amʋ ɩba mɩsʋ,
42mɛnɩ nényaa asʋankʋ kpla mɩ ɔblɔla abwɛpʋ,
tsufɛ mɩ ansɩ dɩn fʋ asʋnsʋ.
43Máhɔ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋ lɛ mɩ ɔnɔ plɩplɩplɩ,
tsufɛ mɩ ansɩ dɩn fʋ amandɩɛsʋ.
44Nétsia gyi fʋ atosunahɛsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mméesi mʋ́sʋ gyi ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
45Nɛ́natɩ iwilwiitɔ,
tsufɛ nakasɩ fʋ mbla.
46Nɛ́lɩɩ awie ansɩtɔ tɔɩ tsu ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋ ɩwɩ,
pɛlɩ mɛ́ɛkɩta mɩ.
47Fʋ mbla amʋ sʋ awútɔ tɛsankɩ mɩ,
tsufɛ ntekle mʋ́.
48Ntobu fʋ mbla amʋ, tsufɛ ntekle mʋ́.
Nɔ́gywɩɩn fʋ amandɩɛ ɩwɩ.
Mmɔkʋsi Fʋ Atosunahɛ Amʋ Tswɩ (Sayin)
49Kaɩn asʋn ánɩ́ fɛhɩɛ ha mɩ fʋ osumbisʋ,
ɩlaha ndɛ mʋ́ ɔkpa kɩ.
50Nɩ nowie ɩkplantɔ a,
tɔ amʋʋ fɛhɩɛ yaɩ ha mɩ amʋ ɩtɛlalwii mɩ ɩklʋn.
51Ɩwɩ atsupʋ bʋhɩɛ bʋdɛ mɩ ɔblɔla bwɛ,
tamɛ mmɔkʋsi fʋ atosunahɛ amʋ tswɩ.
52Oo Nana Bulu, nɔgywɩɩn fʋ bɩmbɩ amandɩɛ amʋ ɩwɩ a,
ɩklʋn tolwii mɩ.
53Ɔblɔ tɛhɩɛ kɩta mɩ
aha lalahɛ amʋʋ bakina fʋ atosunahɛsʋ gyi amʋ sʋ.
54Ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛá nɔswɩɩ a,
fʋ amandɩɛ amʋ gyi ɩlʋá ɩdɩn mɩ ɔnɔsʋ nɩ.
55Oo Nana Bulu, ntɛkaɩn fʋ ɩdasʋ onye,
gyi fʋ atosunahɛsʋ.
56Ɩnɩ lada mɩ ɩbɩ nɩ,
tsufɛ ndɛ fʋ mbla amʋtɔ.
Nana Bulu, Fʋgyi Mɩ Ogyikpa (Hɛt)
57Nana Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ ogyikpa.
Nahɩɛá négyi fʋ asʋn amʋsʋ.
58Ndɛpʋ mɩ klʋn fɛ́ɛ́ kokoli fʋ,
wun mɩ nwɛ fɛ alɩá fɛhɩɛ.
59Nɩ nɔgywɩɩn alɩá mɩ ɔkpa gyi a,
ntɛdamli begyi fʋ ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋsʋ.
60Ntamaba yabi ɔma,
ntɔwa ɔsa gyi fʋ mbla amʋsʋ.
61Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bafɩnɩ ayibi bomli mɩ o a,
ntamatan fʋ atosunahɛ amʋsʋ.
62Ntɔkʋsʋ ɔyɩnsɩnɛ da fʋ ɩpan,
tsufɛ fʋ amandɩɛ amʋ ɩda ɔkpa.
63Mɩa fʋ ifu anyapʋ pʋ́ fʋ mblasʋ agyipʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋ mba.
64Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka labʋla ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́.
Suna mɩ fʋ amandɩɛ.
Suna Mɩ Nyansa Pʋ́ Asʋn-asɩnu (Tɛt)
65Nana Bulu, fabwɛ yile ha mɩ, fʋ osumbi,
fʋ asʋn amʋ ɔnɔ.
66Suna mɩ nyansa pʋ́ asʋn-asɩnu,
tsufɛ nahɔ fʋ mbla amʋsʋ gyi.
67Nɔfwɩ dalɩ fʋ ɔkpasʋ, fɛbɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ,
tamɛ sei ndɛ fʋ asʋn amʋsʋ gyi.
68Fʋbʋ alɛ, fʋtɔbwɛ yile,
suna mɩ fʋ amandɩɛ.
69Ɩwɩ atsupʋ baka asʋn dɩnka mɩsʋ fia,
tamɛ mɩ mʋ ntɔpʋ mɩ klʋn fɛ́ɛ́ gyi fʋ mblasʋ.
70Amʋ́ klʋntɔ bʋ odwin fɛ nfɔkpin,
tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ fʋ atosunahɛ tɛha awútɔ tɛsankɩ mɩ.
71Ɩbʋ mɩ alɛá fɛha ɩkplan lɔtʋ mɩ,
mɛnɩ nɛ́kasɩ fʋ amandɩɛ.
72Fʋ atosunahɛ bʋ mɩ labi,
dʋn sika fututu mʋa sika pɛpɛ mpɩmpɩm.
Ha Fʋ Ɔdwɛá Ɩma Ɔka Ilwii Mɩ Klʋn (Yod)
73Ɩbɩ fɔpʋpwɛ mɩ, damli ɩbɩ mɩsʋ.
Ha mɩ annu fʋ asʋn asɩ, mɛnɩ nɛ́kasɩ fʋ mbla.
74Fʋ ifu anyapʋ bówun mɩ nya ansigyi,
tsufɛ ndɛ fʋ asʋn amʋ ɔkpakɩ.
75Oo Nana Bulu, nyin ánɩ́ fʋtobua asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
Ɔnɔkwalɩ ɔkpasʋ fɛha ɩkplan lɔtʋ mɩ.
76Ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ilwii mɩ klʋn,
fɛ alɩá fɛhɩɛ ha mɩ, fʋ osumbi.
77Wun mɩ nwɛ, fówun nénya nkpa.
Tsufɛ fʋ atosunahɛ tɛha awútɔ tɛsankɩ mɩ.
78Wa ɩwɩ atsupʋ anfɩ pɛlɩtɔ,
tsufɛ kʋkʋ kpalɩ bʋdɛ mɩ ɔnɔ tɩn.
Mɩ mʋ́ ndɛ fʋ mbla ɩwɩ gywɩɩn.
79Ha fʋ ifu anyapʋá bʋyin ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋ
abʋdamli ba mɩ wa.
80Fʋ amandɩɛ amʋ sʋ maha ɔlala itsia mɩ ɩwɩ,
mɛnɩ pɛlɩ mɛ́ɛkɩta mɩ.
Fʋ Nkpahɔ Ladɩnka Mɩ Ɔwɔlɩ (Kaf)
81Fʋ nkpahɔ ladɩnka mɩ ɔwɔlɩ alɩɩ, ɩlapian mɩ.
Fʋ asʋn amʋ ɔkpa ndɛkɩ.
82Nakɩ fʋ ɔkpa fɛ alɩá fɛhɩɛ alɩɩ, ansibi lawu mɩ.
Ndɛfɩtɛ mbɛɛ, “Ɔmɛnkɛ fólwii mɩ klʋn?”
83Nabi tuun fɛ ɔtsabitɔ-akpankogyo,
tamɛ mmɔkʋtan fʋ amandɩɛsʋ.
84Mɩ, fʋ osumbi nkɛ igyi afɩnɩ?
Ɔmɛnkɛ fégyi aha anfɩ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ anfɩ asʋn?
85Ɩwɩ atsupʋ anfɩ bʋtekina fʋ atosunahɛsʋ gyi anfɩ
bakwi ɔbɔ tswɩ mɩ.
86Fʋ mbla amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ.
Kʋkʋ kpalɩ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ.
Mʋ́ sʋ gyi mɩ bʋalɛ.
87Basian mɩ mɔ,
tamɛ mmɔkʋsi fʋ mblasʋ gyi.
88Lapʋ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka wa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn,
mɛnɩ négyi fʋ ɔnɔá fɛlɛsʋ.
Fʋ Mbla Amʋ Lɛhɩɛ Tɛɩ (Lamed)
89Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ asʋn lɛlɛ nlin ɔsʋsʋ,
ɩbʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
90Fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ bʋ ɩnʋ ha otuntufla fɛ́ɛ́.
Fɛyaɩ ɔsʋlʋ asɩ, ɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin.
91Ɩlɩɩ fʋ amandɩɛsʋ bɔtʋ ndɛ,
tsufɛ fʋ togyitɔ desum.
92Nɩ fʋ atosunahɛ mɛha ɩwɩ mɛsankɩ mɩ a,
tɛkɩ nowu sin mɩ asʋn wunhɛtɔ.
93Mmɛ́ɛtan fʋ mbla amʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ,
tsufɛ mʋ́sʋ fɔtsʋn laha mɩ nkpa.
94Fʋbʋ mɩ, hɔ mɩ nkpa.
Tsufɛ ntekleá nɛ́kasɩ fʋ mbla.
95Aha lalahɛ bawa oputu gyo mɩ ánɩ́ bɔ́mɔ mɩ,
tamɛ ntɛhɩɛ susu ɔnɔá fɛlɛ ɩwɩ.
96Nawun yile fɛ́ɛ́ ɔfʋnkpa,
tamɛ fʋ mbla amʋ mʋ́ lɛhɩɛ tɛɩ.
Fʋ Atosunahɛ Tɛhɩɛ Wa Mɩ Ɔdwɛ (Mem)
97Oo, fʋ atosunahɛ tɛhɩɛ wa mɩ ɔdwɛ.
Ntɔgywɩɩn mʋ́ ɩwɩ ɔyɩkɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
98Fʋ mbla laha natɩn ansɩ dʋn mɩ alupʋ,
tsufɛ ɩda mɩ wa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
99Ntonu asʋn asɩ dʋn mɩ asunapʋ fɛ́ɛ́,
tsufɛ ntɔgywɩɩn ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋ ɩwɩ.
100Ntonu asʋn asɩ dʋn ahandɛ,
tsufɛ ntegyi fʋ mblasʋ.
101Nalɛ ɩwɩ lɛ lalahɛ kugyikʋ ɔkpasʋ,
mɛnɩ négyi fʋ asʋn amʋsʋ.
102Fʋ onuto losuna mɩ fʋ amandɩɛ.
Mʋ́ sʋ ntamasi mʋ́ tswɩ.
103Fʋ asʋn ɩhɩɛ bʋ mɩ ɔdwɛ.
Ɩbʋ mɩ ɔdwɛ debidebi dʋn ɔkwɛn.
104Fʋ mbla tɛha ntonu asʋn asɩ.
Mʋ́ sʋ nakisi afunu kugyikʋ.
Fʋ Asʋn Gyi Mɩ Ayabiasɩ Ɔkandɩɛ (Nun)
105Fʋ asʋn gyi mɩ ayabiasɩ ɔkandɩɛ,
ɩtɔwankɩ wʋlɩ mɩ ɔtsʋnkpa.
106Naka ntam, tsula dɩnka mʋ́sʋ ánɩ́
négyi fʋ amandɩɛsʋ, tsufɛ ɩda ɔkpa.
107Oo Nana Bulu, lakʋsʋa mɩ fɛ alɩá fɛblɩ,
tsufɛ nhɩɛ ndɛ asʋn wun.
108Nana Bulu, hɔ fʋ kanfʋ-afɔdɩɛ,
afʋsuna mɩ fʋ amandɩɛ.
109Ndɛ mɩ nkpa ɩbɩtɔ,
tamɛ ntamatan fʋ atosunahɛ amʋsʋ.
110Aha lalahɛ bafɩnɩ mɩ yibi,
tamɛ mmɔkʋfwɩ fʋ mbla ɔkpasʋ.
111Ɔnɔá fɛlɛ igyi mɩ siadɩɛ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɩtɛha mɩ ɩklʋn tenya ansigyi.
112Nabwɛ agywɩɩn mbɛɛ,
kugyikʋá igyi négyi fʋ amandɩɛsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Fʋgyi Mɩ Ɔtanʋkpa Pʋ́ Mɩ Ɩwɩ Ɩban (Samɛk)
113Ntekisi aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ agywɩɩn tamalɩɩ tsukʋlɛ,
tamɛ fʋ atosunahɛ bʋ mɩ ɔdwɛ.
114Fʋgyi mɩ oŋainkpa pʋ́ mɩ kʋtʋ.
Fʋ asʋn ɔkpa ndɛkɩ.
115Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ, mlɩkpʋkpɛ tɛɩ mɩsʋ,
mɛnɩ nɛ́talɩ gyi mɩ Bulu mblasʋ.
116Ha mɩ anlɩɩ kinkin fɛ alɩá fɛhɩɛ, mɛnɩ nétsia nkpa.
Fʋ ɔkpa ndɛkɩ, máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ.
117Kɩ mɩsʋ wanklaan, mɛnɩ nénya nkpa,
fówun négyi fʋ amandɩɛsʋ bregyibrɛ.
118Fekina aha ánɩ́ bafwɩ fʋ amandɩɛ ɔkpa.
Kpalɩ bʋdɛ amʋ́ ɩwɩ mlɛ.
119Fʋtɔtswɩ ɔyɩtɔ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ tsitsa fɛ ipi.
Mʋ́ sʋ fʋ ɔnɔlɛ bʋ mɩ alɛ.
120Fʋ ɩwɩ ifu tɛha awútɔ tɔkpɩnkɩ mɩ.
Fʋ asʋnbua bʋ mɩ ifu.
Ntekle Fʋ Mbla Asʋn Dʋn Sika Pɛpɛ (Ayin)
121Nabwɛ tɔá ɩda ɔkpa, ɩbʋ alɛ.
Mási mɩ wa mɩ asisipʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
122Lɩɩ fʋ osumbi ɔma kinkin.
Maha ɩwɩ atsupʋ abʋsisi mɩ.
123Nakɩ ɔkpa ha fʋ nkpahɔ pʋ́ yileá fɛhɩɛá fɔ́bwɛ ha mɩ alɩɩ,
ansibi lawu mɩ.
124Pʋ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka kpa mɩ, fʋ osumbi,
afʋsuna mɩ fʋ amandɩɛ.
125Fʋ osumbi ngyi, ha mɩ asʋn-asɩnu,
fówun nɛ́bɩ ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋ.
126Oo Nana Bulu, ɩlafʋn ánɩ́ fɔ́kʋsʋ asɩ,
tsufɛ batswɩ fʋ atosunahɛ tsalɩfwɩ.
127Ntekle fʋ mbla asʋn dʋn sika pɛpɛ,
dʋn sika pɛpɛ onuto kʋraa.
128Mʋ́ sʋ natsu mʋ́á fʋ mbla amʋtɔ kugyikʋ bʋ alɛ,
ntekisi afunu kugyikʋ.
Damli Kɩ Mɩ, Afʋwa Awɩtɔlɛ Ha Mɩ (Pe)
129Ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋ ɩbʋ wanwan.
Mʋ́ sʋ ntegyi mʋ́sʋ nɩ.
130Nɩ bɛsankɩ fʋ asʋn amʋtɔ a, mʋ́tɔ tɔwankɩ.
Ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ agywɩɩn ma ɔsa kʋraa tonu mʋ́ asɩ.
131Nayaa ɔnɔ gblaun,
tsufɛ fʋ mbla dɩn mɩ ɔwɔlɩ.
132Damli kɩ mɩ, afʋwa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ,
fɛ alɩá fʋ amandɩɛ igyi ha fʋ adwɛpʋ.
133Ha mɩ annatɩ dɩnka tɔá fɛhɩɛsʋ.
Máha lalahɛ kʋkʋ igyi mɩsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
134Hɔ mɩ lɛ mɩ asisipʋ ɩbɩtɔ,
mɛnɩ négyi fʋ mblasʋ.
135Wa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ fʋ osumbi,
afʋsuna mɩ fʋ amandɩɛ.
136Mɩ ansɩ ntsú ɩsrɩ dɛtsʋn blablabla,
tsufɛ aha bʋmɛdɛ fʋ atosunahɛsʋ gyi.
Nana Bulu Asʋnbua Da Ɔkpa (Sade)
137Nana Bulu, fʋtɔbwɛ yile.
Fʋ asʋnbua ɩda ɔkpa.
138Yilebwɛ mʋ́a ɔnɔkwalɩwasʋ
ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋ ɩlɩɩ.
139Fʋ asʋn amʋ sʋ ɔblɔ ɩhɩɛ dɛ mɩ,
tsufɛ mɩ alupʋ batan mʋ́sʋ.
140Fɛhɩɛ sɔ tɔá fɛhɩɛ yaɩ kɩ.
Mɩ, fʋ osumbi ntekle mʋ́ asʋn.
141Kebikʋsʋ ngyi, bʋtamabu mɩ wa tɔtɔɔtɔtɔ,
tamɛ mmɔkʋtan fʋ mblasʋ.
142Fʋ yilebwɛ da ɔkpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
fʋ atosunahɛ ɛ igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ.
143Ɩkplan mʋ́a asʋn wunhɛ latʋ mɩ,
tamɛ fʋ mbla tɛha awútɔ tɛsankɩ mɩ.
144Ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋ ɩda ɔkpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ha mɩ annu mʋ́ asɩ, mɛnɩ nénya nkpa.
Fʋ Mbla Amʋ Fɛ́ɛ́ Ɩbʋ Mʋ́tɔ (Kof)
145Oo Nana Bulu, ndɛ fʋ kpoli tsu mɩ klʋntɔ, sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
Négyi fʋ amandɩɛsʋ.
146Ndɛ fʋ kpoli, hɔ mɩ nkpa.
Négyi ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋsʋ.
147Ntɔkʋsʋ asa nsaɩntɔ tɔwankɩ, ndesu kpoli fʋ
ndɛ fʋ asʋn amʋ ɔkpa kɩ.
148Onye fɛ́ɛ́ mmɛdɩdɩ,
ndɛ tɔá fɛhɩɛ ɩwɩ susu.
149Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ nu mɩ isu.
Fʋ asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ ɩlaha mɩ nkpa.
150Aha ánɩ́ bapʋ agywɩɩn lalahɛ bʋgya mɩ batʋ mɩ ta.
Bʋbʋ ɩfɔ fʋ atosunahɛ ɩwɩ,
151tamɛ Oo Nana Bulu, fʋbʋ mɩ wa.
Fʋ mbla amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔ.
152Nɛbɩ ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋ dodoodo.
Nowun ánɩ́ fɔbwɛ mʋ́ ánɩ́ ibétsiá brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Fʋ Asʋn Blɩhɛ Fɛ́ɛ́ Nwun Gyi Ɔnɔkwalɩ (Rɛs)
153Kɩ ipian ánɩ́ ndewun, afʋlɛ mɩ,
tsufɛ mmɔkʋtan fʋ atosunahɛsʋ.
154Lɩɩ mʋ́tɔ ha mɩ, afʋka lɛ mɩ.
Lakʋsʋa mɩ fɛ alɩá fɛhɩɛ.
155Nkpahɔ bʋ ɩfɔ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ wa,
tsufɛ bʋmegya fʋ amandɩɛ ɔkpa.
156Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ nwewun ɩtsɔ.
Fʋ asʋnbua ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ sʋ lakʋsʋa mɩ.
157Aha ánɩ́ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ pʋ́ mɩ adʋn bʋtsɔ,
tamɛ mmɔkʋkina ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋ.
158Aha ánɩ́ bʋtɛdalɩ fʋ ɔma ɩwɩ tɔwa mɩ ɔblɔ,
tsufɛ bʋtamagyi fʋ asʋnsʋ.
159Kɩ alɩá ntekle fʋ mbla,
afʋlapʋ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ha mɩ nkpa.
160Fʋ asʋn blɩhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ nwun gyi ɔnɔkwalɩ.
Fʋ amandɩɛ kugyikʋ da ɔkpa, ibetsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Nana Bulu, Fʋsʋ Mɩ Ansɩ Dɩn (Sin)
161Wulu ahandɛ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ kʋkʋ kpalɩ,
tamɛ ntenya fʋ asʋn amʋ ifu tsu mɩ ɩklʋntɔ.
162Fʋ asʋn amʋ tegyi mɩ ansɩ,
fɛ ɔha ánɩ́ alamɛntɩ itoyile tsu ɩsatɔ.
163Ntamafia afunu, ɩbʋ mɩ nyanya,
tamɛ ntekle fʋ atosunahɛ amʋ asʋn.
164Ntɛkanfʋ fʋ tse sienɔ ɛkɛwʋlɛ,
tsufɛ fʋ amandɩɛ da ɔkpa.
165Fʋ atosunahɛ adwɛpʋ bʋtenya iwilwii kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ,
tɔtɔ ɩmɛ́ɛha amʋ́ abʋsrɛɩ.
166Oo Nana Bulu, fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn ánɩ́ fɔ́hɔ mɩ nkpa.
Ntegyi fʋ mblasʋ.
167Ntegyi ɔnɔ amʋʋ fɛlɛ amʋsʋ,
ilegyi mɩ ansɩ.
168Ntegyi fʋ mbla pʋ́ ɔnɔá fɛlɛsʋ,
tsufɛ mɩ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩda fʋ ansɩtɔ.
Dunka Mɩ Fʋ Osumbi (Taw)
169Oo Nana Bulu, nu mɩ isu,
afʋha mɩ annu asʋn asɩ, fɛ alɩá fɛblɩ.
170Nu mɩ kokoli,
afʋhɔ mɩ fɛ alɩá fɛhɩɛ yaɩ.
171Mɩ ɔnɔ ɩbɛ́kanfʋ fʋ, lakanfʋ fʋ,
tsufɛ fasuna mɩ fʋ amandɩɛ.
172Nɔ́wa atɔá fɛhɩɛ yaɩ ɩwɩ ɩlʋ,
tsufɛ fʋ mbla fɛ́ɛ́ ɩda ɔkpa.
173Da ɩwɩsʋ afʋgyi mɩ bʋalɛ,
tsufɛ fʋ mbla nalɛ.
174Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ nkpahɔ dɩn mɩ ɔwɔlɩ.
Fʋ atosunahɛ tɛha awútɔ tɛhɩɛ sankɩ mɩ.
175Ha mɩ antsia nkpa, mɛnɩ nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ,
afʋha mɩ anya mbʋa tsu fʋ amandɩɛtɔ.
176Nabwɛ fɛ kufa fwɩhɛ. Dunka mɩ fʋ osumbi,
tsufɛ mmɔkʋtan fʋ mblasʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 120
Content:
Nokpoli Nana Bulu Brɛá Mbʋ Ɩkplantɔ
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ.
1Nokpoli Nana Bulu brɛá mbʋ ɩkplantɔ,
ɔlɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
2Oo Nana Bulu, lɛ mɩ lɛ ofunupʋ ɔnɔ
pʋ́ aha ɔmlɛpʋ ɩbɩ.
3Aha ɔmlɛpʋ, ntɔ fénya tsu Bulu wa?
Ntɔ ɛ ɔbɛ́tra ha fʋ?
4Obékpie ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ mbɩn pɩɔnpɩɔn yi mlɩ,
pʋ ɔdɔm agyawunuá ɩhɩɛ idetsii wa mlɩ ogya.
5Ngyɔwɩ ánɩ́ nabɔswɩɩ Mesek ɔmátɔ,
ntsie Kedarfɔtɔ!
6Nayinta brɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ tsia
aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakle iwilwiitɔ.
7Mɩ mʋ́ a, iwilwii ntekle,
tamɛ nɔtɔɩ a, nalɛ ɩsa.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 121
Content:
Mɩ Mbʋa Itsu Nana Bulu
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ.
1Natsu ansɩ fʋa kɩ abʋ.
Nkʋnʋ nénya mbʋa tsu?
2Mɩ mbʋa itsu Nana Bulu,
ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ ɔbwɛpʋ amʋ wa.
3Ɔmɛ́ɛha fʋmɛ́ɛsrɛɩ.
Fʋsʋ ɔkɩpʋ mɔ́ɔgyɔsɩ.
4Kɩ, Israelsʋ ɔkɩpʋ amʋ mɔ́ɔgyɔsɩ,
ɔmɛ́ɛdɩdɩ.
5Nana Bulu gyi fʋsʋ ɔkɩpʋ.
Mʋlɩɩ fʋ gyɔpɩsʋ, ɔdɛ olulukpa hɔ wʋlɩ fʋ.
6Owi mɔ́ɔtɔ fʋ ɔpa,
ɔtsra ɛ mɛ́ɛlɩɩ fʋsʋ onye.
7Nana Bulu mɛ́ɛha lalahɛ kʋkʋ ɩba fʋsʋ.
Ɔbɛ́kɩ fʋ nkpasʋ.
8Nana Bulu ɔbɛ́kɩ fʋsʋ fʋyɔ batɔ,
tsu sei pʋya brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 122
Content:
Mlɩkʋlɩ Iwilwii Ha Yerusalem
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ. Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Ansɩ legyi mɩ brɛá bɛbla mɩ bɛɛ,
“Ba ayɔ Nana Bulu woyitɔ!”
2Oo Yerusalem,
anɩlɩɩ fʋ nfʋnʋ.
3Yerusalem wuluá bɛda,
ɩtsa aba wanklaan.
4Ɩnʋ abusuan amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtɔdʋ yɔ.
Nana Bulu abusuan amʋ fɛ́ɛ́,
bʋtɛyɛda mʋ ɩpan,
igyi fʋ ɔnɔlɛá ɩda yaɩ ha Israelfɔ.
5Ɩnʋ bɛyaɩ awie-mbia ha asʋngyi nɩ,
Dawid woyitɔ awie-mbia.
6Mlɩkʋlɩ iwilwii ha Yerusalem wulu.
“Yerusalem, togyitɔ ɩwa alɛ ha fʋ adwɛpʋ.
7Iwilwii itsia wulu amʋtɔ,
ɩwa alɛ ha awie-woyitɔ atsiapʋ.”
8Mɩ apio aba sʋ ndɛ Bulu kokoli mbɛɛ,
“Iwilwii itsia wulu amʋtɔ.”
9Oo Yerusalem, Nana Bulu, anɩ Bulu woyi amʋ sʋ
nɔ́kʋlɩ yile ha fʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 123
Content:
Wun Anɩ Nwɛ, Oo Nana Bulu
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ.
1Ɔsʋsʋ owie-obiasʋ otsiapʋ,
fʋ natsu ansɩ fʋa ndɛkɩ!
2Anɩlatsu ansɩ fʋa anɩdɛ Nana Bulu, anɩ Bulu kɩ,
yɛfʋn brɛá obówun anɩ nwɛ,
fɛ alɩá osumbi totsu ansɩ fʋa kɩ mʋ yin ɩbɩ ɔnɔ.
3Wun anɩ nwɛ, oo Nana Bulu, wun anɩ nwɛ,
tsufɛ bakpɔɩ anɩ dafa.
4Ɩwɩ anyapʋ babwɛ anɩ ɔblɔla alɩɩ ɩlakpɔn anɩ,
ɩwɩ atsupʋ ɛ baha ɩwɩ lawu anɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 124
Content:
Ɔsʋ Mʋ́a Asɩ Ɔbwɛpʋ Amʋ Gyi Anɩ Bʋalɛ Ogyipʋ
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ. Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Israelfɔ bʋblɩ.
Nɩ megyi Nana Bulu lɛlɩɩ anɩ ɔma a,
2nɩ Nana Bulu mɛlɩɩ anɩ ɔma,
brɛá anɩ alupʋ bowie anɩtɔ a,
3tɛkɩ bɛmɛ anɩ bɔ́bwɛ,
brɛá amʋ́ ɔblɔ lɔkʋsʋ anɩsʋ.
4Tɛkɩ ntsu amʋ lɔbʋla kɩta anɩ,
ntsu amʋ lɔtsʋan anɩ natɩ.
5Tɛkɩ ntsu bʋlahɛ
lɔsʋra anɩ natɩ.
6Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu ánɩ́ omesi abʋwɩ anɩ fɛ iye.
7Anɩladalɩ amʋ́ ɩbɩ fɛ obubwi lɛdalɩ ayibi ɔfɩnɩpʋ yibitɔ.
Yibi amʋ ɩlabiabia, anɩladalɩ srɩ.
8Nana Bulu, ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ ɔbwɛpʋ amʋ
gyi anɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 125
Content:
Nana Bulu Lobomli Mʋ Aha
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ.
1Aha ánɩ́ bɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ bʋgyi fɛ Sion ɩbʋ.
Ɩtamakpɩnkɩ, ɩlɩɩ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
2Alɩ amʋʋ abʋ lobomli Yerusalem amʋ a,
alɩ Nana Bulu lobomli mʋ aha tsu sei pʋya brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ nɩ.
3Tsufɛ ɔmɛ́ɛha lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋméegyi iwie ɔsʋlʋá beye ha yile abwɛpʋsʋ,
mɛnɩ aha yile bʋmɔ́ɔwa ɩbɩ lalahɛtɔ.
4Oo Nana Bulu, bwɛ yile ha aha yile
pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa.
5Tamɛ aha ánɩ́ babaɩ yɔ amʋ́ onuto ɔkpa lalahɛsʋ mʋ́ a,
Nana Bulu ɔbɔ́wa amʋ́ aputu tsɩa lalahɛ abwɛpʋtɔ.
Iwilwii ɩtʋ Israelfɔ!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 126
Content:
Aha Ánɩ́ Bɔpʋ Isu Du Atɔ A, Bɔ́pʋ Ansigyi-ɩlʋ Kpɔtɩ Mʋ́
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ.
1Brɛá Nana Bulu leyinkia mʋ aha tsu ndountɔ ba Sion a,
ɩlɔbwɛ anɩ fɛ okudetɔ.
2Anɩlɔmɔsɩ, wa ɩlʋ ansigyisʋ.
Ɩnʋ ɔmá bambasʋfɔ bɛblɩ bɛɛ,
“Nana Bulu labwɛ itoyile ha amʋ́.”
3Lɛlɛ, Nana Bulu labwɛ itoyile ha anɩ,
ansɩ ɩdɛ anɩ gyi.
4Oo Nana Bulu, ha ɩlawa alɛ ha anɩ,
abwɛ fɛ ɔsʋlʋ wʋlɩhɛsʋ abʋnkpa.
5Aha ánɩ́ bɔpʋ isu du atɔ a,
bɔ́pʋ ansigyi-ɩlʋ kpɔtɩ mʋ́.
6Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔpʋ isu yodu atɔ a,
ɔbɔ́pʋ ansigyi-ɩlʋ sʋra mʋ atɔ ba woyitɔ kokooko.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 127
Content:
Ɩpanda Atɔ Opunitɔ-abi Bʋgyi Tsu Bulu Wa
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ. Salomo ɩlʋ.
1Nɩ Nana Bulu méyi obu a,
kpalɩ obu ayipʋ bʋdɛ ipian wun.
Nɩ Nana Bulu mógyo wulu a,
kpalɩ ogyopʋ dɛ mʋ́ gyo.
2Kpalɩ mlɩtɔkʋsʋ bakɛ,
yinki yɛklɛdɩ ɔyɩnsɩnɛ,
mlɩdɛ ipian wun dunka tɔá mlégyi,
tsufɛ Nana Bulu tɛkɩ aha ánɩ́ ɔtɔdwɛsʋ brɛá bʋda bʋdɛdɩdɩ.
3Nana Bulu tɔpʋ abi yula ɔha.
Ɩpanda atɔ opunitɔ-abi bʋgyi tsu mʋ wa.
4Yasʋtɔ abi tsɔtsɔ kwɩɩ
igyi fɛ ɩsa ɔkɔpʋá ɔbʋ mbɩn tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ.
5Ansɩ bégyi oyin oduá ɔbʋ abi tsɔtsɔ alɩ mʋ woyitɔ.
Pɛlɩ mɛ́ɛkɩta mʋ nɩ ofia mʋ anyaba wulu ɔnɔ, amʋ́ asʋn ogyikpa.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 128
Content:
Iwilwii Ɩtʋ Israelfɔ
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ.
1Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ otenya Nana Bulu ifu,
ɔtɛnatɩ mʋ ɔkpasʋ.
2Fégyi fʋ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ gyumagyihɛ.
Ansɩ bégyi fʋ, ɩbɔ́wa alɛ ha fʋ.
3Fʋ ka ɔbɔ́kwɩɩ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ fʋ woyitɔ, fɛ oyiá ɩlahɩɛ swie kɔtsɔɔ.
Fʋ abi bóbomli fʋ ɔpʋnʋ, fɛ ɔbɛá ɩbʋ awaimbi tsɔtsɔ.
4Alɩ Nana Bulu obóyula ɔha
ánɩ́ otenya mʋ ifu nɩ.
5Nana Bulu oyula fʋ bregyibrɛ tsu Sion,
afʋwun alɩá ɩbɔ́wa alɛ ha Yerusalem, fʋ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
6Ɔha afʋwun fʋ aná,
iwilwii ɩtʋ Israelfɔ!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 129
Content:
Pɛlɩ Ɩkɩta Sion Alupʋ Fɛ́ɛ́
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ.
1Israelfɔ mlɩblɩ mlɩaa,
“Tsu mɩ nyebitɔ ɔpá mɩ alupʋ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ.”
2“Tsu mɩ nyebitɔ ɔpá mɩ alupʋ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ,
tamɛ bʋmɔkʋtalɩ gyi mɩsʋ kɩ.
3Balɛlɛ apintinplin dɩnka mɩ ɔma,
fɛ ndɔtɔ bawɔ flɛ.”
4Yile ɔbwɛpʋ Nana Bulu gyi,
alatɩntɩn lalahɛ abwɛpʋ nfɛ lɛ mɩ ɩwɩ.
5Pɛlɩ ɩkɩta Sion alupʋ fɛ́ɛ́,
abʋdɩda lala.
6Bʋbwɛ fɛ ɩbʋtasʋ ɩfa,
ɩtamadan asa itowu,
7mʋ́ abi tamabʋla ɔbɩlɔ,
ntɛ moni mʋ́ ɔklɩpʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
8Mʋ́ asɩ atsʋnpʋ ɛ bʋmábla agyʋma ayɔpʋ amʋ bɛɛ,
“Nana Bulu oyula mlɩ.
Ayula mlɩ Nana Bulu ɩdatɔ!”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 130
Content:
Israelfɔ, Mlɩkɩ Nana Bulu Ɔkpa
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, mbʋ ɩkplan kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩtɔ,
ndɛ fʋ kpoli.
2Mɩ Wie, nu mɩ ɔmɛ!
Yaa asʋ, afʋnu mɩ kokoli.
3Oo Nana Bulu, nɩ fɔkʋla lalahɛ a,
ma obésian?
4Tamɛ fʋtesikie,
mɛnɩ abénya fʋ ifu.
5Ngyo Nana Bulu,
mɩ ɔkla gyo mʋ.
Mʋ asʋn ɔkpa ndɛkɩ.
6Mɩ ɔkla gyo mɩ Wie dʋn onye agyopʋá
ɔdɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ ɔkpa kɩ.
Dʋn onye agyopʋá ɔdɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ ɔkpa kɩ.
7Israelfɔ, mlɩkɩ Nana Bulu ɔkpa,
tsufɛ Nana Bulu ɔdwɛ ɩma ɔka.
Ɔtɛhɩɛ ka lɛ aha.
8Mʋ ɔbɛ́ka lɛ Israelfɔ
amʋ́ lalahɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 131
Content:
Nabwɛ Diin Fɛ Kebi
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ. Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, ɩwɩtsu ma mɩtɔ,
ntamatsu ɩwɩ dʋbɩ.
Ntamaka ipin dʋn mɩ ɔnɔ.
2Naba ɩwɩasɩ, bwɛ diin fɛ kebiá
batɩn mʋ nyɔpʋ, ɔdɩn mʋ yinsʋ,
alɩ nabwɛ diin nɩ.
3Israelfɔ, mlɩkɩ Nana Bulu ɔkpa
tsu sei pʋya brɛ fɛ́ɛ́!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 132
Content:
Nana Bulu Lalɛ Sion
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, kaɩn Dawid ipian fɛ́ɛ́sʋ,
afʋgyi mʋ bʋalɛ.
2Ɔlɛka ntam ha Nana Bulu,
olosuan suna Yakob Bulu Ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ,
3“Mméebitiwie mɩ woyitɔ,
ntɛ klɛdɩ mɩ ɔklansʋ.
4Mmɛ́ɛha dɩdɩ ɩkɩta mɩ,
ntɛ kpa ɔsɩkɛtɛ bun, gyɔsɩ.
5Yɔfʋn brɛá nanya ɔtɩnɛkʋ ha Nana Bulu,
nya otsiakpa ha Yakob Bulu Ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ.”
6Anɩlonu Ntam-daka amʋ nka Efrata,
anɩlowun mʋ́ Yaar adɔbʋtɔ.
7Mlɩha ayɔ mʋ otsiakpa ɩnʋ,
ayɛwɔ awunu mʋ ansɩtɔ.
8Oo Nana Bulu, kʋsʋ, fʋa fʋ Ntam-daka,
igyi fʋ tumi osuna amʋ,
amlɩyɔ fʋ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ɩnʋ.
9Ha fʋ igyi ahapʋ abʋdɩda yilebwɛ fɛ tati,
aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa fʋ ɔma abʋkplʋn wa ɩlʋ ansigyisʋ.
10Fʋ osumbi Dawid sʋ
makina ɔha amʋʋ fada mʋ ofuli amʋ.
11Nana Bulu lɛka ntam, dɩnka ibwi mʋ́sʋ ha Dawid. Ɔbɛɛ,
“Fʋ ɩwɩtɔ-obi nɔ́pʋyaɩ fʋ obiasʋ.
12Nɩ fʋ abi-aná begyi mɩ ntam
pʋ́ ɔnɔá nɛlɛsʋ a,
mʋmʋ amʋ́ abi obégyi obia amʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.”
13Tsufɛ Nana Bulu lalɛ Sion.
Ɩnʋ olekleá ɩbwɛ mʋ woyi.
14Ɔbɛɛ, “Kɩ, nfɩ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mɩ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ nɩ.
Nfɩ nétsia, tsufɛ nfɩ ndekle nɩ.
15Nɔ́pʋ atogyihɛ bʋla Sionfɔ,
amʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ bégyi mwɛ.
16Nɔ́pʋ nkpahɔ dɩda amʋ́ igyi ahapʋ, fɛ tati.
Mʋ́tɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa Bulu ɔma
bɔ́kplʋn wa ɩlʋ ansigyisʋ.
17Nɛ́ha owie otumipʋ ɔbɛ́dalɩ tsu Dawid abusuantɔ.
Nala ɔkandɩɛ yaɩ ha ɔha amʋʋ nɛda ofuli amʋ.
18Nɔ́pʋ pɛlɩ dɩda mʋ alupʋ,
tamɛ mʋ mʋ́ mʋ owiepa bɔ́wankɩ.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 133
Content:
Nana Bulu Oyula
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ. Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Kɩ alɛ pʋ́ ansigyiá ɩbʋ
nɩ apio babwɛ ɩkʋlɛ, bʋtsie abatɔ!
2Igyi fɛ ofobiá ɩbʋ bia, batsɛɩ wʋlɩ Aaron ɔtantra,
ɩdɛbɔlɩ tsʋn mʋ ikwitɔ,
kplɩ wie mʋ atadɩɛ tɩntɩn ɔmɛtɔ.
3Igyi fɛ onyeluluá itsu Hermonbʋsʋ,
idetswie wʋlɩ Sion abʋsʋ,
tsufɛ ɩnʋ Nana Bulu lɛhɩɛ mʋ oyula,
igyi nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata nɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 134
Content:
Mlɩba Akanfʋ Nana Bulu
Yerusalem-yɔ ɩlʋ.
1Mlɩ Nana Bulu asumpʋ fɛ́ɛ́á mlɩtosum mʋ woyitɔ onye,
mlɩba akanfʋ mʋ.
2Mlɩtɩnkɩ ɩbɩ sɩsɩ Ɔwankɩkpatɔ-Ɔwankɩkpa ɩnʋ,
amlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu.
3Nana Bulu, ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ ɔbwɛpʋ amʋ
oyula mlɩ tsu Sion.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 135
Content:
Nana Bulu Asumpʋ, Mlɩkanfʋ Mʋ
1Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Mlɩkanfʋ mʋ ɩda.
Nana Bulu asumpʋ, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ.
2Mlɩ aha ánɩ́ mlɩtosum Nana Bulu woyitɔ,
anɩ Bulu amʋ wunsɩnɛsʋ,
3mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu, tsufɛ ɔbʋ alɛ.
Mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ ɩda, tsufɛ ɩbʋ ɔdwɛ,
4tsufɛ alalɛ Yakob abusuan ha mʋ ɩwɩ.
Alapʋ Israel bwɛ mʋ siadɩɛ.
5Nyin ánɩ́ Nana Bulu lomoni.
Anɩ Wie dʋn ɩkpɩ fɛ́ɛ́.
6Tɔá odekle ɔtɔbwɛ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ,
ɔpʋ pʋ́ mʋ́ abuntɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
7Mʋtɛha agyinde tɔkʋsʋ tsu ɔyɩ ɔka,
ɔtɛha nyankpʋ tɔfwɩ ɩbɩ tswie,
ɔtɛlɛ afu tsu mʋ atɔ ɔyaɩkpa.
8Ɔlɔmɔ Egyiptefɔ abitɩ,
pʋ́ amʋ́ mbwɩ tsɔkwɩɩ fɛ́ɛ́.
9O Egyipte, ɔlɔwa osuna mʋ́a ofula, ɩlɛba mlɩsʋ,
owie mʋa mʋ asumpʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
10Ɔlɛda ɔmá-ɔmá bwie,
mɔ awie atumipʋ:
11Amorifɔ owie Sihon, Basanfɔ owie Og
pʋ́ Kanaan ɔsʋlʋsʋ awie fɛ́ɛ́.
12Ɔlɔpʋ amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋ bwɛ siadɩɛ
ha mʋ aha Israelfɔ.
13Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɩda bétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Bɛ́kaɩn fʋsʋ amʋ́ otuntufla fɛ́ɛ́.
14Nana Bulu obówun mʋ asumpʋ nwɛ,
ha mʋ aha asʋ.
15Ɔmá bambasʋfɔ bʋtɔpʋ sika pɛpɛ mʋ́a fututu bwɛ atunku.
Anyankpʋsa ɩbɩ ɔnɔ gyumagyihɛ igyi.
16Atunku amʋ bʋbʋ ɔnɔ, bʋtamatɔɩ;
bʋbʋ ansibi, bʋtamawun atɔ.
17Bʋbʋ asʋ, bʋtamanu asʋn;
bʋtamafʋ ɔŋɛ.
18Atunku amʋ apwɛpʋ pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋ́sʋ fɛ́ɛ́
bɔ́bwɛ fɛ atunku amʋ.
19Israel woyi, mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Aaron woyi, mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
20Lewi woyi, mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Mlɩá mlɩtenya Nana Bulu ifu, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ.
21Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu Sion wulutɔ.
Mʋá otsie Yerusalem.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 136
Content:
Bulu Ɔdwɛá Ɩma Ɔka Bʋ Ɩnʋ Brɛ Fɛ́ɛ́
1Mlɩda Nana Bulu ɩpan, tsufɛ ɔbʋ alɛ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
2Mlɩda Buluá ɔdʋn ɩkpɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩpan.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
3Mlɩda awietɔ-owie ɩpan.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
4Mʋ nkʋlɛ tɔbwɛ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
5Mʋlɔpʋ mʋ asʋn-asɩnu bwɛ ɔsʋsʋ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
6Mʋlɛtɛɩ ɔsʋlʋ dɩnka ntsusʋ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
7Mʋlɔbwɛ owi mʋ́a ɔtsra dɩnka nwʋlʋtasʋ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
8Mʋlɔbwɛ owi ánɩ́ igyi ɔyɩkɛhɛsʋ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
9Ɔlɔbwɛ ɔtsra mʋ́a ntsrakpabi ánɩ́ bʋgyi onyesʋ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
10Mʋlɔmɔ Egyiptefɔ abitɩ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
11Mʋlɛkpa Israel dalɩ amʋ́tɔ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
12Mʋlɛtɩnkɩ mʋ tumi ɩbɩ pʋlɛ amʋ́.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
13Mʋlɔbɔɩ Ɔpʋ Pɛpɛtɔ anyɔ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
14Mʋlɛha Israelfɔ bɔtsʋn mʋ́tɔ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
15Mʋlɛkpa Farao mʋa mʋ ɩsa akɔpʋ wa Ɔpʋ Pɛpɛtɔ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
16Mʋlɛkpa mʋ aha tsʋn ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
17Mʋlɔmɔ awie akpɔnkpɔntɩ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
18Mʋlɔmɔ awieá bʋbʋ ɩda.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
19Mʋlɔmɔ Amorifɔ owie Sihon.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
20Mʋlɔmɔ Basanfɔ owie Og.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
21Mʋlɔpʋ amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋ bwɛ siadɩɛ.
Tsufɛ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
22Mʋlɔpʋbwɛ siadɩɛ ha mʋ osumbi Israel.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
23Mʋlɛkaɩn anɩsʋ brɛá bɛba anɩ asɩ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
24Mʋlɛlɛ anɩ lɛ adʋn ɩbɩ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
25Mʋtɛha togyitɔ atogyihɛ.
Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
26Mlɩda ɔsʋsʋ Bulu ɩpan,
tsufɛ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 137
Content:
Sionsʋ Kaɩn
1Babilon ntsu ɔnɔ anɩletsia su,
brɛá anɩlɛkaɩn Sionsʋ.
2Anɩlesi anɩ nsankuo sian
ɩnʋ nyisʋ,
3tsufɛ ɩnʋ anɩ ndoun akɩtapʋ Babilonfɔ bodunka ɩlʋ tsu anɩ wa nɩ.
Anɩ ɩwɩɔsɩn awapʋ anfɩ bɛblɩ bɛɛ,
“Mlɩwa Sion ɩlʋ kʋlɛ pʋwa anɩ ansigyi!”
4Nkalɩ abɔ́wa Nana Bulu ɩlʋ ɔdɩ?
5Oo Yerusalem, nɩ nɛtan fʋsʋ a,
Bulu ɔha mɩ gyɔpɩ ɩtan ɔsankuodasʋ!
6Nɩ mmɛkaɩn Yerusalemsʋ,
ntɛ nekina mʋ dwɛ dʋn tɔá ɩhɩɛ bʋ mɩ ansigyi a,
mɩ ɔdandʋ ibiabia, ɩmátalɩ tra wa ɩlʋ.
7Nana Bulu, mátan tɔá Edomfɔ bɔbwɛ
ɛkɛá Yerusalem lɛdɩdasʋ.
Bɔkplʋn bɛɛ, “Mlɩbwie mʋ́ da! Mlɩbwie mʋ́ da!
Mlɩbwie mʋ́ yɛkɩta mʋ́ ntswɩasɩ fɛ́ɛ́ da!”
8Oo Babilonfɔ, Bulu obéyinta mlɩ.
Bulu oyula ɔha amʋʋ alapʋ
tɔá mlɩlapʋ gyi anɩ ka mlɩ ɩkɔ amʋ!
9Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ bɛ́kɩta mlɩ abi bɔbwɛ,
fɩn da abʋtasʋ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 138
Content:
Bulu, Fʋ Gyɔpɩ Ɩbɩ Tɔhɔ Mɩ Nkpa
Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, nɔpʋ mɩ klʋn fɛ́ɛ́ da fʋ ɩpan.
Ɩkpɩ amʋ ansɩtɔ ndɛ ɩlʋ wa kanfʋ fʋ.
2Nóko nwuntɔ wa sɩsɩ fʋ ɔtswɛkpa,
da fʋ ɩpan fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ sʋ,
tsufɛ fatsu fʋ ɩda mʋ́a fʋ asʋn fʋa dafa togyitɔsʋ.
3Ɛkɛá nokpoli fʋ a, fɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
Fɛha mɩ ɔkla lenya ɔwʋnlɩn tsɩa.
4Oo Nana Bulu, ɔsʋlʋsʋ awie fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́kanfʋ fʋ,
tsufɛ banu fʋ ɔnɔtɔ asʋn blɩhɛ.
5Bɔ́wa fʋ bwɛhɛ wanklaan ɩwɩ ɩlʋ,
tsufɛ fʋ numnyam lɛhɩɛ moni.
6Ɩnɩá Nana Bulu bʋ ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ kʋraa a,
ɔtɛlɛ ansɩ kɩ ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ,
tamɛ ɔbʋ ɩfɔ ɩwɩ atsupʋ wa.
7Asʋn wunhɛ lobomli mɩ,
tamɛ fɛ́lawa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn.
Fɔ́tswɩ ɩbɩ kɩta mɩ lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɔblɔ ɔnɔ.
Fʋ gyɔpɩ ɩbɩ tɔhɔ mɩ nkpa.
8Nana Bulu, fégyi fʋ nhɩhɩɛsʋ ha mɩ.
Fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Fʋ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ atɔbwɛhɛ anɩgyi, makina anɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 139
Content:
Bulu, Tɛtɛ Mɩ Klʋntɔ Kɩ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, fatɛtɛ mɩ ɩklʋntɔ kɩ,
fabɩ mɩ.
2Fʋyɩn mɩ asɩtsia pʋ́ mɩ kʋsʋbɩ.
Fʋbʋ tsutsuutsu fʋyin mɩ agywɩɩn kugyikʋ.
3Fʋtɛkɩ mɩ natɩ pʋ́ mɩ klɛdɩsʋ,
fʋyin mɩ ɩkpa fɛ́ɛ́ wanklaan.
4Oo Nana Bulu, asa asʋankʋ bɛ́dalɩ tsu mɩ ɔnɔ a,
fʋyin mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ dodo.
5Fakpa mɩ wa ɩwɩtɔ,
pʋ ɩbɩ bun mɩsʋ.
6Asʋn anfɩ bɩ ɩhɩɛ bʋ mɩ ifu!
Ɩlɛhɩɛ fʋa dʋn mɩ, mmɛtalɩ nu mʋ́ asɩ.
7Nkʋnʋ nɛ́talɩ natɩ si fʋ Ɔŋɛ amʋ yɔ?
Ntɛ nkʋnʋ nɛ́srɩ si fʋ yɔ?
8Nɩ nɔdʋ yɔ ɔsʋsʋ a, fʋtsie ɩnʋ.
Nɩ nɛyɛklɛdɩ afulitɔ kʋraa a, fʋbʋ ɩnʋ.
9Nɩ nɔkʋsʋ nyankɩ kwɛ atɛ,
fuli yetsia ɔpʋ ɔbɩn kʋraa a,
10fʋ kɛn ɔbɛ́kpa mɩ.
Fʋ tumi ɔbɛ́kɩta mɩ kinkin.
11Nɩ nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Oklun ibun mɩsʋ,
wankɩá olobomli mɩ iklun bwɛ onye kʋraa a”,
12oklun amʋ imoklun ha fʋ.
Ɩlɔwankɩ fɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ,
tsufɛ oklun mʋ́a wankɩ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi ɩkʋlɛ fʋ ansɩtɔ.
13Fʋlɔbwɛ mɩ ɩwɩ atɔ kugyikʋ,
fɔpʋtsa aba mɩ yin iputɔ.
14Ntɛkanfʋ fʋ, tsufɛ alɩá fɔpʋbwɛ mɩ bʋ ifu,
ɩbʋ wanwan.
Fʋ gyumagyihɛ bʋ ifu,
nhɩɛ nyin mʋ́ alɩ.
15Mɩ awú kʋkʋ meŋain fʋ
brɛá fɔbwɛ mɩ ŋaintɔ.
Fɛhɩɛ trʋ mɩ wa abatɔ mɩ yin iputɔ.
16Fɔpʋ ansibi wun mɩ brɛá ngyi obugya-klun.
Fɔwanlɩn nkɛá négyi fɛ́ɛ́ wa fʋ ɔwʋlʋtɔ dodoodo
asa bɛtakwɩɩ mɩ.
17Oo Bulu, fʋ agywɩɩn bʋ mɩ labi dʋbɩ!
Ɩdʋn mɩ kla.
18Nɩ nɔbɔ mbɔdɩá nɛ́kla mʋ́ a, ɩdʋn ɩsɩ.
Brɛá nɔkʋsʋ nyankɩ a, fʋ wa ntra mbʋ.
19Oo Bulu, mɔ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ,
obugya atsitsapʋ abʋdalɩ mɩ ɩwɩ.
20Bʋtɛtɩ fʋ ɩda lalahɛ bregyibrɛ,
bwɛ lalahɛ kʋsʋ lɩɩ fʋsʋ!
21Oo Nana Bulu, yɛ fʋyin ánɩ́ ntɛhɩɛ lu aha ánɩ́ bʋtolu fʋ,
ntekisi aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ fʋsʋ?
22Ntɛhɩɛ lu amʋ́,
nakla amʋ́ wa mɩ alupʋtɔ.
23“Oo Bulu, tɛtɛ mɩ klʋntɔ kɩ, afʋbɩ alɩá ngyi.
Sɔ mɩ kɩ, afʋbɩ mɩ agywɩɩn kugyikʋ.
24Kɩ bɛɛ, agywɩɩn lalahɛ ɩkʋ bʋ mɩtɔ,
afʋkpa mɩ tsʋn ɔkpa wanklaansʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.”

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 140
Content:
Maha Mɩ Alupʋ Abʋgyi Mɩsʋ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ ha ɩlʋ osunapʋ.
1Nana Bulu, lɛ mɩ tsu lalahɛ abwɛpʋ ɩbɩ,
afʋgyi ɩban wa mɩ tsu awuntɔlɩnpʋ ɩbɩtɔ.
2Bʋtɔgywɩɩn agywɩɩn lalahɛ,
lɛ ɩsa bregyibrɛ.
3Amʋ́ ɔdandʋ bʋ ogya fɛ ɩwɔ.
Amʋ́ ɔnɔtɔ asʋn blɩhɛ tɔmɔ fɛ ɩbɛ-elin.
Ɩya.
4Oo Nana Bulu, lɛ mɩ tsu aha lalahɛ ɩbɩ,
afʋgyi ɩban wa mɩ tsu awuntɔlɩnpʋ anfɩ
bʋdekleá bɛ́lɛ mɩ da anfɩ ɩbɩtɔ.
5Ɩwɩ atsupʋ bafɩnɩ mɩ ayibi ŋain,
bawa ɔyɔɩ ha mɩ.
bafɩnɩ agbla mɩ ɔkpasʋ ha mɩ.
Ɩya.
6Nana Bulu, ndɛ fʋ bla mbɛɛ, “Fʋgyi mɩ Bulu.
Oo Nana Bulu, nu mɩ ɔmɛ. Yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ kokoli.”
7Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ Wie, mɩ Ɔwʋnlɩnpʋá ɔtɔhɔ mɩ nkpa,
fʋlɔpʋ atɔ bun mɩ nwunsʋ ɩsa ɔkɔkɛ.
8Mábwɛ tɔá aha lalahɛ bʋdekle ha amʋ́.
Máha agywɩɩn ánɩ́ bʋdɛkɩta ɩba mʋ́tɔ, mɛnɩ bʋmóotsu ɩwɩ.
Ɩya.
9Maha mɩ alupʋ amʋ abʋgyi mɩsʋ.
Ha amʋ́ onuto ɔnɔtɔ asʋn lalahɛ amʋ iyinki yɔ amʋ́sʋ.
10Ha agyawunuá ɩdɛhɔ ibun amʋ́sʋ.
Tsɛɩ amʋ́ wa ɩlantɔ, ɔtɩnɛá bʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ dalɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ!
11Máha ahasʋ atɔɩpʋ abʋnya atsialɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
Ha lalahɛ itsia tʋ awuntɔlɩnpʋ amʋ ɔsasʋ.
12Nyin ánɩ́ Nana Bulu tegyi bʋa aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ.
Otegyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ ha ahianfɔ.
13Ee, aha yile bɛ́kanfʋ fʋ ɩda.
Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa bétsia fʋ wa.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 141
Content:
Bulu, Ndɛ Fʋ Kpoli
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ndekpoli, kɔsɩ ba mɩ wa.
Yaa asʋ nu mɩ ɔmɛ, afʋsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
2Mɩ mpaɩ ɩwa fʋ ɔfan fɛ ɔhɩɛn,
afʋhɔ mɩ ɩbɩá natsu fʋa fɛ ntʋpwɛsʋ afɔdɩɛ.
3Oo Nana Bulu, kɩ mɩ tɔɩtɔ,
mɛnɩ mmɛ́ɛblɩ asʋn lalahɛ,
afʋgyo mɩ ɔnɔ.
4Máha lalahɛbwɛ ɩdɩnka mɩ ɔwɔlɩ,
antsia bwɛ lalahɛ.
Máha mɩ antsia lalahɛ abwɛpʋ ɔpasuatɔ,
amʋ́ atɔ debidebi ɩdɩnka mɩ ɔwɔlɩ.
5Ha ɔha yile ɔpɩtɩ mɩ atɔ,
awɩtɔlɛ alawa ha mɩ.
Ha ɔha yile otswii mɩ, dwɛ ɔtɔdwɛ mɩ.
Máha mɩ ankina mʋ́,
tsufɛ mɩ mpaɩ tɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ lalahɛ abwɛpʋsʋ.
6Nɩ bɛkpa amʋ́sʋ agyipʋ tsu abʋtasʋ bɛda a,
lalahɛ abwɛpʋ amʋ bónu mɩ asʋn, wun ánɩ́ ɔnɔkwalɩ igyi.
7Alɩ amʋʋ bʋtobwie abwi, ɩtɛdasaɩn wʋlɩ ɔsʋlʋsʋ amʋ a,
alɩ amʋ́ awú bɛ́dasaɩn, bʋmóopula amʋ́ nɩ.
8Tamɛ mɩ Wie Nana Bulu, mɩ ansɩ dɩn fʋsʋá fɛ́kpa mɩ.
Fʋ natanʋ, máha abʋmɔ mɩ.
9Máha mɩ ankpa wie ayibiá bafɩnɩ mɩ,
pʋ́ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ amʋ agblatɔ.
10Ha amʋ́ onuto awʋlɛ ɩlɛ amʋ́tɔ,
afʋha mɩ annyankɩ mʋ́sʋ tsʋn.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 142
Content:
Bulu, Fʋgyi Mɩ Ɔtanʋkpa Akɩankpapʋ Ɔsʋlʋ Anfɩsʋ
Dawid atosuna ɩlʋá ɔlɔwa brɛá ɔbʋ ibwi-ɔbɔtɔ.
1Ntosu kpoli Nana Bulu,
pʋ mɩ ɔmɛ kokoli mʋ.
2Ntɛbla mʋ mɩ ɩkplan,
pʋ mɩ asʋn wunhɛ tswɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ.
3Nɩ ɩkpɔn mɩ ɔkla a,
fʋyin ɔtɩnɛá nɔ́tsʋn.
Bafɩnɩ ayibi
mɩ ɔkpa tsʋnhɛ kugyikʋsʋ.
4Nɩ nɛdamli kɩ mɩ gyɔpɩsʋ a,
mma ɔha bɩhɛ ɔkʋkʋ.
Ɔtanʋkpa kʋkʋ ɩtrama mɩ ɩnʋ.
Ɔhaa tamatsu kʋkʋ lɛ mɩ asʋntɔ.
5Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ndesu kpoli.
Ndɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa
pʋ́ mɩ ogyikpa, akɩankpapʋ ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ.”
6Kokoli, yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ isu,
tsufɛ bahɩɛ ba mɩ asɩ.
Hɔ mɩ lɛ mɩsʋ adɩnkapʋ ɩbɩtɔ,
tsufɛ bʋhɩɛ bʋbʋ ɔnlɩn dʋn mɩ.
7Lɛ mɩ obu anfɩ nda anfɩtɔ,
mɛnɩ nɛ́da fʋ ɩpan.
Aha yile bóbomli mɩ,
tsufɛ fɛ́ha ɩbɔ́wa alɛ ha mɩ.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 143
Content:
Bulu, Fʋsʋ Mɩ Ansɩ Dɩn
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Oo Nana Bulu, nu mɩ kokoli.
Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ fʋgyi. Mʋ́ sʋ yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ ɩpabwii.
Fʋ yilebwɛ sʋ sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
2Fʋ osumbi ngyi, mágyi mɩ asʋn,
tsufɛ nyankpʋsa ɔkʋkʋ mégyi yile ɔbwɛpʋ fʋ ansɩtɔ.
3Tsufɛ mɩ olupʋ amʋ dɩn mɩsʋ,
alayia mɩ manta ɔsʋlʋtɔ.
Alaha ntsie okluntɔ, fɛ ɔha ánɩ́ olowu dodoodo.
4Ɩnɩ sʋ ɩlakpɔn mɩ ɔkla,
mɩ klʋn lakpawie mɩ ɩwɩtɔ.
5Nakaɩn bɩmbɩsʋ.
Nagywɩɩn fʋ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
pʋ́ fʋ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ gyumagyihɛ ɩwɩ.
6Natsu ɩbɩ fʋa sɩsɩ fʋ,
tsufɛ fʋ ɩwɩ ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ mɩ ɔkla,
fɛ ɔsʋlʋ dɛ ntsu dunka lɩlɩtɔ.
Ɩya.
7Kokoli Nana Bulu, wa ɔsa sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.
Tɔtɔ bwɛ ma mɩ ɩnʋ.
Mádamli ɔma ha mɩ,
nɩ megyi alɩ nɔ́bwɛ fɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋda afulitɔ.
8Ha mɩ anwun fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka nyankɩgyinyankɩ,
tsufɛ fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn.
Suna mɩ ɔtɩnɛá ntsʋn,
tsufɛ fʋ ɩbɩtɔ napʋ mɩ ɔkla wa.
9Oo Nana Bulu, kokoli lɛ mɩ mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ,
fʋ nasrɩ tanʋ.
10Fʋgyi mɩ Bulu,
suna mɩ fʋ ɔdwɛla.
Fʋ Ɔŋɛ wanklaan ɔkpa mɩ tsʋn ɔkpa tswiihɛsʋ.
11Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɩda sʋ laha mɩ nkpa.
Fʋ yilebwɛ sʋ lɛ mɩ tsu ɩkplantɔ.
12Fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɩnʋ,
afʋmɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ,
tsufɛ fʋ osumbi ngyi.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 144
Content:
Bulu Tɛha Awie Ɩsʋgyi
Dawid ɩlʋ.
1Bʋkanfʋ Nana Bulu, mʋgyi mɩ bʋta.
Mʋtosuna mɩ ɩsa kɔ.
2Mʋgyi mɩ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ mɩ oŋainkpa kpikpli,
mɩ okpikplikpa pʋ́ mɩ ɔlɛpʋ.
Mʋgyi mɩ ɩban ánɩ́ nteŋain mʋtɔ,
ɔtɛba ɔmá-ɔmá asɩ wa mɩ asɩ.
3Oo Nana Bulu, ntɔ ɔha gyi, mʋ asʋn tehian fʋ alɩ?
Ntɛ ntɔ nyankpʋsa gyi, sʋ fʋtɔgywɩɩn mʋ ɩwɩ alɩ?
4Nyankpʋsa gyi fɛ afu,
mʋ nkpa igyi fɛ yiyiá ɩdɛka tsʋn.
5Oo Nana Bulu, nɛ fʋ ɔsʋsʋ ba ayasɩ, afʋkplɩ ba.
Pʋ ɩbɩ da abʋ, ogyasi ɩdalɩ tsu mʋ́tɔ.
6Ha nsaɩntɔ ɩkpa ogya, fʋ alupʋ abʋdasaɩn.
Tswɩ fʋ mbɩn wɔ amʋ́, abʋgyigya.
7Tswɩ ɩbɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ,
bɩtɩa mɩ lɛ ntsu kluklutɔ,
afʋhɔ mɩ lɛ afɔɔ ɩbɩ.
8Amʋ́ ɔnɔ tamablɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ.
Bɛka ntam, bʋtamagyi mʋ́sʋ.
9Oo Bulu, nɔ́wa ɩlʋ pɔpwɛ ha fʋ,
da ɩfɛ idu ɔsankuo kanfʋ fʋ.
10Fʋtɛha awie bʋtegyi ɩsʋ,
fʋtɛlɛ fʋ osumbi Dawid ɔdayi ɔnɔ.
11Lɛ mɩ, afʋhɔ mɩ lɛ afɔɔ anfɩ,
amʋ́ ɔnɔ tamablɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ,
bɛka ntam, bʋtamagyi mʋ́sʋ anfɩ ɩbɩtɔ.
12Ha anɩ abi yinhɛ yasʋtɔ ɩbwɛ fɛ iyi danhɛá ɩbʋ alɛ.
Anɩ abi tsɩhɛ abʋwa akɩlɛ fɛ owie-woyi okonkisʋ-ɔkpabi.
13Atɔ-abi ɔtsantsan ɩbʋla anɩ ɩdan,
anɩ akufa mʋ́a akpala abʋklɛɩ yɛɛ,
bwɛ mpɩmdu-lafa anɩ mbwɩ ogyikpa.
14Anɩ nnantswie bʋklɛɩ yɛɛ.
Ɔmɛtsitsa mʋ́ ɩyɔ tsutsuutsu, ɔkʋkʋ mákina kwɩɩ.
Bʋmatra nu bubu anɩ abrɔnʋsʋ.
15Ansɩ igyi ɔmá ánɩ́ bénya oyula anfɩ odu.
Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ Nana Bulu gyi amʋ́ Bulu.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 145
Content:
Nana Bulu Tegyi Mʋ Asʋn Fɛ́ɛ́sʋ
Dawid kanfʋ-ɩlʋ.
1Mɩ Bulu pʋ́ mɩ Wie, nótsu fʋ fʋa,
kanfʋ fʋ ɩda brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
2Nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ ekekegyiɛkɛ,
wa fʋ ɩda numnyam brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
3Nana Bulu, fomoni,
ɩkanfʋ letsia fʋ.
Ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ bɩ alɩá fomoni.
4Otuntufla kugyikʋ bɛ́lɛ fʋ gyumagyihɛ bla amʋ́ abi-aná.
Bɛ́lɛ fʋ gyumagyihɛ akpɔnkpɔntɩ ɔwan.
5Nétsia gywɩɩn fʋ numnyam kpɔnkpɔntɩ
pʋ́ fʋ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩ ɩwɩ.
6Ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɛ́da fʋ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩ ɔkan.
Mɩ ɛ nɛ́blɩ alɩá fɔkʋkʋ moni.
7Bɛ́lɛ fʋ awɩtɔlɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ amʋ blɩ;
kplʋn wa ɩlʋ ansigyisʋ kanfʋ fʋ yilebwɛ.
8Awɩtɔlɛpʋ mʋ́a nwɛ owunpʋ Nana Bulu gyi.
Ɔtamakɔsɩ nya ɔblɔ, mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩhɩɛ tsɔ.
9Nana Bulu bʋ alɛ ha ɔhagyiɔha.
Mʋ nwewun ɩdɩn mʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
10Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́da fʋ ɩpan.
Aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa fʋ ɔma ɛ bɛ́kanfʋ fʋ.
11Bɛ́blɩ fʋ iwie ogyikpa numnyam
pʋ́ fʋ tumi ɩwɩ asʋn.
12Ɩbɛ́ha ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɛ́lɛ fʋ gyumagyihɛ akpɔnkpɔntɩ blɩ,
fʋ iwie ogyikpa numnyam pʋ́ obúá ɩbʋ mʋ́sʋ.
13Fʋ iwie ogyikpa bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Abi-aná bɛ́ba bɔtʋ fʋ iwiegyi.
Nana Bulu tegyi mʋ asʋn fɛ́ɛ́sʋ
ɔbʋ awɩtɔlɛ mʋ gyumagyihɛ kugyikʋtɔ.
14Ɔtɔwa aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛdɩda ɔwʋnlɩn,
tswii aha ánɩ́ baklowa lɩɩ.
15Aha fɛ́ɛ́ bʋkɩ fʋ ansɩtɔá
fɛ́ha amʋ́ atogyihɛ mʋ́ brɛtɔ.
16Fʋtɛsankɩ ɩbɩtɔ ha akɩankpapʋ fɛ́ɛ́,
pʋ́ tɔá bʋdekle bʋla amʋ́.
17Nana Bulu bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩda ɔkpa.
Ɔbʋ awɩtɔlɛ mʋ gyumagyihɛ kugyikʋtɔ.
18Ɔma ɩfɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋtokpoli mʋ wa,
aha ánɩ́ bʋtokpoli mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
19Ɔtɔbwɛ mʋ ifu anyapʋ atɔá bʋdekle ha amʋ́.
Otonu amʋ́ isu, hɔ amʋ́ nkpa.
20Nana Bulu tɛkɩ ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔdwɛ mʋsʋ,
tamɛ ɔbɔ́mɔ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
21Nóbwii ɔnɔ kanfʋ Nana Bulu.
Ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɛ́kanfʋ mʋ ɩda wankɩhɛ amʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 146
Content:
Bulu Tɛkɩ Afɔɔsʋ, Kpa Awumbi Mʋ́a Asʋrapʋ
1Kanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Oo mɩ ɔkla, kanfʋ Nana Bulu!
2Ɩnɩá ntsie nkpa a, nɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu.
Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
3Mlɩmápʋ ansɩ dɩnka awie pʋ́ anyankpʋsasʋ.
Bʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ hɔ mlɩ nkpa.
4Nɩ anyankpʋsa ɔŋɛ ɩdalɩ amʋ́tɔ a, bʋteyinki yɔ ɩsɩtɔ.
Amʋ́ nhɩhɩɛ fɛ́ɛ́ tɔfwɩ ɛkɛ amʋ ɛkɛ amʋ.
5Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ Yakob Bulu gyi amʋ́ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ,
bʋdɛ amʋ́ Bulu ɔkpa kɩ.
6Mʋlɔbwɛ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ,
ɔpʋ mʋ́a atɔá ɩbʋ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ,
ɔdɛ mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
7Otegyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ amʋ́ sisi,
ɔtɛha aha ánɩ́ akʋn dɛ amʋ́ atogyihɛ.
Nana Bulu tɛlɛ obu adɩpʋ obu.
8Mʋtobwii ansibi abwiepʋ ansibi,
ototsu aha ánɩ́ baba amʋ́ asɩ kʋsʋ.
Otekle yile abwɛpʋ asʋn.
9Ɔtɛkɩ afɔɔsʋ, kpa awumbi mʋ́a asʋrapʋ;
tamɛ oteyinta lalahɛ abwɛpʋ nhɩhɩɛ.
10Nana Bulu dɛ iwie gyi brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Sionfɔ, mlɩ Bulu amʋ obégyi iwie otuntufla fɛ́ɛ́.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 147
Content:
Bulu Lala Ɔdɛ Yerusalem Wulu Da
1Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Ɩbʋ alɛá abɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ anɩ Bulu.
tsufɛ ɩbʋ ɔdwɛ, iletsia mʋ.
2Nana Bulu lala ɔdɛ Yerusalem wulu da.
Ɔdɛ Israelfɔá olegya wa aputu kpa ba.
3Ɔtɛtsa aha ánɩ́ asʋn ladʋn amʋ́,
yia amʋ́ ɔlɔ, wa mʋ́ afa.
4Oyin ntsrakpabi ɔdʋdʋɔ,
ɔlɛha okugyiɔkʋ ɩda.
5Anɩ Wie lomoni, ɔhɩɛ ɔbʋ tumi!
Mʋ asʋn-asɩnu ɩma ɔka.
6Ɔtɛkpa ahianfɔ,
ɔtɛfɩn awuntɔlɩnpʋ da ɔsʋlʋtɔ.
7Mlɩwa ansigyi ɩlʋ da Nana Bulu ɩpan.
Mlɩda nsankuo ha anɩ Bulu amʋ.
8Ɔtɔpʋ agyinde tin nwʋlʋta,
ha nyankpʋ totswie wʋlɩ ɔsʋlʋsʋ,
ɔtɛha ɩfa tɔkwɛ abʋsʋ.
9Ɔtɛha mbwɩ atogyihɛ,
ha klankpa-abi atɔ bʋtegyi nɩ bʋdesu.
10Mʋ ansɩ tamagyi ɔpɔnkɔá ɔbʋ ɔwʋnlɩnsʋ,
ɔsrɩpʋ ayabi ɔsa tamagyi mʋ ansɩ.
11Aha ánɩ́ bʋtenya Nana Bulu ifu,
bʋtɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔkasʋ
mboun ɩwɩ tegyi mʋ ansɩ.
12Oo Yerusalemfɔ, mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu.
Sionfɔ, mlɩkanfʋ mlɩ Bulu!
13Tsufɛ mʋtɛha mlɩ wulu ɔnɔ aklʋn tɔwa ɔnlɩn,
otoyula wulu amʋtɔ abi.
14Mʋtɛha mlɩ ɔmátɔ tolwii,
ɔtɔpʋ atogyihɛ wanklaan bʋla mlɩ.
15Mʋ ɔlɛ ɔnɔ,
ɩtɔkɔsɩ ba mʋ́tɔ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
16Ɔtɛha atsufɔlɩ tesin ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ opuli-mputɔ.
Ɔtɛda obétsu saɩn fɛ nsuo.
17Mʋtɛha atsufolibi tɛkpa tsu ɔsʋsʋ.
Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ lɩɩ mʋ atsalɩ ɔnɔ?
18Ɔlɛ ɔnɔ ɩtɛyɛ.
Ɔha afu tsʋn a, ɩlamli ntsu tsʋnhɛ.
19Ɔlɔpʋ mʋ asʋn ha Yakob abi-aná,
pʋ mʋ mbla mʋ́a mʋ amandɩɛ ha Israelfɔ.
20Ɔmɔkʋbwɛ mʋ́ odu ha ɔmá bamba kʋkʋ kɩ.
Mʋ́ sʋ bʋmeyin mʋ amandɩɛ.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 148
Content:
Mlɩ Fɛ́ɛ́, Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu Ɩda
1Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Mlɩkanfʋ mʋ tsu ɔsʋsʋ.
Mlɩkanfʋ mʋ ɔfʋakpa ɩnʋ!
2Mʋ abɔpʋ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ.
Ɔsʋsʋ ɩsa akɔpʋ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ!
3Owi mʋ́a ɔtsra, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ.
Ntsrakpabiá ɩtɔwankɩ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ!
4Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ, kanfʋ mʋ.
Nwʋlʋtasʋ ntsu, kanfʋ mʋ.
5Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́, bʋkanfʋ Nana Bulu ɩda,
tsufɛ mʋlɛlɛ ɔnɔ, bɛlɩn.
6Ɔlɛyaɩ amʋ́ ha brɛ fɛ́ɛ́,
ɔlɔtswɩ ɔka ha amʋ́, bʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ dafa mʋ́sʋ.
7Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu ɔsʋlʋsʋ.
Ɔpʋtɔ-mbwɩ akpɔnkpɔntɩ pʋ́ mʋ́ ibuntɔ ntobi fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ.
8Ogya mʋ́a atsufolibi, atsufɔlɩ pʋ́ ogyasi tuun,
pʋ́ atsufu fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtegyi mʋ asʋnsʋ!
9Abʋ mʋ́a nkuku fɛ́ɛ́,
nyi swie-abi mʋ́a Lebanon ndum,
10pututɔ mʋ́a woyitɔ-mbwɩ,
mbwɩ wɔlɩhɛ pʋ́ mbubwi fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
11Ɔsʋlʋsʋ awie pʋ́ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́,
wulu ahandɛ pʋ́ ɔmásʋ agyipʋ fɛ́ɛ́,
12nyasubi mʋ́a mbitebi,
nyebi-ahandɛ fɛ́ɛ́!
13Mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu ɩda,
tsufɛ mʋ ɩda nkʋlɛ pɛ lɔfʋa.
Mʋ numnyam lɔfʋa dʋn ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ.
14Alawa mʋ ɔmá ɔwʋnlɩn.
Mʋ aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa mʋ ɔma
pʋ́ mʋ ɩklʋnsʋ aha Israelfɔ bʋkanfʋ mʋ.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 149
Content:
Aha Ánɩ́ Bʋtamakpa Mʋ Ɔma Numnyam
1Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Mlɩwa ɩlʋ pɔpwɛ ha mʋ,
amlɩkanfʋ mʋ aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa mʋ ɔma ɔpasuatɔ.
2Israelfɔ, ɩwɩ ɩsankɩ mlɩ mlɩ Ɔbwɛpʋ ɩwɩ.
Sionfɔ, mlɩnya mlɩ Owie ɩwɩ ansigyi.
3Mlɩtsa, amlɩda nsankuo ɔtsantsan.
Mlɩwa ɩlʋ, amlɩkpɩnkɩ akatsa kanfʋ mʋ ɩda.
4Tsufɛ Nana Bulu ansɩ tegyi mʋ aha ɩwɩ.
Ɔtɔpʋ nkpahɔ dɩda ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ.
5Mlɩá mlɩtamakpa mʋ ɔma, mlɩnya ansigyi,
tsufɛ alawa mlɩ numnyam.
Mlɩwa ansigyi ɩlʋ mlɩ ɔklansʋ.
6Bulu-kanfʋ ɩhɩɛ dɩnka mlɩ ɔnɔsʋ,
ɔdayi ɩya anyɔ itsia mlɩ ɩbɩtɔ,
7mɛnɩ mlɔ́pʋka ɔmá-ɔmá ɩkɔ,
bɩtɩ aha ɩsʋ.
8Mlɔ́wa amʋ́ awie kplakitsi,
wa amʋ́ aha ánɩ́ numnyam bʋ amʋ́sʋ datɔ-ɩkan.
9Mlɔ́pʋ asʋn ánɩ́ bɔwanlɩn tswɩ bɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ.
Ɩnɩgyi aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa mʋ ɔma fɛ́ɛ́ numnyam nɩ.
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: ISRAELFƆ ƖLƲ 150
Content:
Akɩankpatɔ Okugyiɔkʋ Ɔkanfʋ Nana Bulu
1Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Mlɩkanfʋ Bulu mʋ otsiakpa.
Mlɩkanfʋ mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn nwʋlʋtasʋ!
2Mlɩkanfʋ mʋ, mʋ gyumagyihɛ akpɔnkpɔntɩ sʋ.
Mlɩkanfʋ mʋ, mʋ moniá ɩdʋn blɩ sʋ!
3Mlɩfʋlɩ ɩkpɛ kanfʋ mʋ,
amlɩda nsankuo kanfʋ mʋ!
4Mlɩkpɩnkɩ akatsa, amlɩtsa.
Mlɩda akwɛ, amlɩfʋlɩ ntɛntɛ kanfʋ mʋ.
5Mlɩpʋ tsɛɩntsɛɩn,
pʋ́ mʋ́á mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɩhɩɛ bʋ ɔnlɩn kanfʋ mʋ!
6Akɩankpatɔ okugyiɔkʋ ɔkanfʋ Nana Bulu!
Mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu!

Title: MATEO 1
Content:
Yesu Anain Otuntufla
(Luka 3:23-38)
1Yesu Kristo, Owie Dawid mʋ na, Abraham mʋ na amʋ otuntufla nɩ.
2Abraham lɔkwɩɩ Isakɩ. Isakɩ lɔkwɩɩ Yakob. Yakob lɔkwɩɩ Yuda mʋa mʋ apio yinhɛ 3Yuda lɔkwɩɩ Peres mʋa Sera. Amʋ́ yin gyi Tamar. Peres lɔkwɩɩ Hesron. Hesron lɔkwɩɩ Ram. 4Ram lɔkwɩɩ Aminadab. Aminadab lɔkwɩɩ Nahson. Nahson lɔkwɩɩ Salmon. 5Salmon lɔkwɩɩ Boas. Boas mʋ yin gyi Rahab. Boas lɔkwɩɩ Obed. Obed mʋ yin gyi Rut. Obed lɔkwɩɩ Yisai. 6Yisai lɔkwɩɩ Owie Dawid.
Owie Dawid lɔkwɩɩ Salomo. Salomo mʋ yin gyi ɔtsɩ ɔkʋá tɛkɩ ogyi Uria mʋ ka. 7Salomo lɔkwɩɩ Rehabeam. Rehabeam lɔkwɩɩ Abia. Abia lɔkwɩɩ Asa. 8Asa lɔkwɩɩ Yehosafat. Yehosafat lɔkwɩɩ Yoram. Yoram lɔkwɩɩ Usia. 9Usia lɔkwɩɩ Yotam. Yotam lɔkwɩɩ Ahas. Ahas lɔkwɩɩ Hiskia. 10Hiskia lɔkwɩɩ Manase. Manase lɔkwɩɩ Amon. Amon lɔkwɩɩ Yosia. 11Yosia lɔkwɩɩ Yekonia mʋa mʋ apio yinhɛ. Mʋ brɛsʋ bɛkɩta Israelfɔ, hɩɛ amʋ́ bɛɛ bʋyetsia Babilon ɔmátɔ nɩ.
12Amʋ́ Babilon yɔtɔ a, Yekonia lɔkwɩɩ Sealtiel. Sealtiel lɔkwɩɩ Serubabel. 13Serubabel lɔkwɩɩ Abihud. Abihud lɔkwɩɩ Eliakim. Eliakim lɔkwɩɩ Asor. 14Asor lɔkwɩɩ Sadok. Sadok lɔkwɩɩ Akim. Akim lɔkwɩɩ Elihud. 15Elihud lɔkwɩɩ Eleasar. Eleasar lɔkwɩɩ Matan. Matan lɔkwɩɩ Yakob. 16Yakob lɔkwɩɩ Yosef, Yosef letsia Maria. Maria lɔkwɩɩ Yesu. Yesu gyi Kristo, (ɔha amʋʋ Bulu lada mʋ ofuli amʋ) nɩ.
17Mʋ́ sʋ tsu Abrahamsʋ bɔtʋ Owie Dawidsʋ bʋgyi anain otuntufla duana. Tsu Dawidsʋ bɔtʋ brɛá bɔyɔ Babilon ɔmátɔ ɛ bʋgyi anain otuntufla duana. Asa tsu amʋ́ Babilon yɔtɔ bɔtʋ Kristo, (ɔha amʋʋ Bulu lada mʋ ofuli amʋ) kwɩɩsʋ ɛ bʋgyi anain otuntufla duana.
Yesu Kristo Kwɩɩ
(Luka 2:1-7)
18Ɔkpa anfɩsʋ Yesu Kristo kwɩɩ lɔtsʋn nɩ. Bɔpʋ Maria ha Yosef bɛɛ otsia. Tamɛ asa bétsia, abʋfia ɔtsɩ mʋa oyin a, bowun ánɩ́ Maria dɛ ɔmɛ́ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ tumitɔ. 19Mʋ klu Yosef a, mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa, tamɛ omekleá ɔbɔ́wa mʋ pɛlɩtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔbwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ obékina mʋ ŋaintɔ. 20Tamɛ brɛá ɔdɛ mʋ́ agywɩɩn bwɛ a, kɩ, Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ ɔkʋ lɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna mʋ okudetɔ, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Yosef, Dawid mʋ na, mánya pɛlɩá fɛ́kpa fʋ ka Maria ba fʋ wa, tsufɛ ɔmɛ́ amʋʋ ɔdɛ amʋ itsu Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ tumitɔ. 21Ɔbɔ́kwɩɩ obiyimbi, bɛ́dɩnka mʋ ɩda Yesu. (Mʋ́ asɩ gyi, ‘Ɔlɛpʋ.>) Tsufɛ mʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ aha tsu amʋ́ lakpantɔ nɩ.”
22Ɩnɩ lɛha Bulu asʋn amʋʋ ɔlɛblɩ tsʋn mʋ ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋsʋ amʋ ɩlɛba mʋ́tɔ. 23Ɔbɛɛ, “Kɩ, obitebiá ɔmɔkʋyɔ oyin wa kɩ obénya ɔmɛ́. Ɔbɔ́kwɩɩ obiyimbi, bɛ́dɩnka mʋ ɩda Imanuel.” (Mʋ́ asɩ gyi, “Bulu bʋ anɩ wa.”)
24Brɛá Yosef letsinki a, olegyi asʋn amʋʋ Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ amʋ lɛbla mʋ amʋsʋ. Oletsia Maria, kpaɩn mʋ. 25Tamɛ ɔmɔpʋ ɩbɩ da Maria, kpɛfʋn brɛá ɔlɔkwɩɩ mʋ bi yinhɛ gyankpapʋ, ɔlɛdɩnka mʋ ɩda Yesu.

Title: MATEO 2
Content:
Anyansapʋ Akʋ Ba
1Brɛá Owie Herode dɛ iwie gyi Yudea ɔmátɔ bɔkwɩɩ Yesu wulu kʋá bʋtɛtɩ mʋ́ Betlehem, ɩbʋ Yudea ɔmátɔ ɩnʋ. Mʋ́ ɔma a, anyansapʋ akʋá bʋtowun atɔ ntsrakpabitɔ botsu owi ɔdalɩkpa ɔmá kʋtɔ ba Yerusalem wulutɔ. 2Bɛfɩtɛ bɛɛ, “Nkʋnʋ bakwɩɩ Yudafɔ owie amʋ? Anɩlowun mʋ osuna ánɩ́ igyi ɔtsrakpabi owi ɔdalɩkpa ɩnʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ aba bosum mʋ.”
3Owie Herode lonu asʋn anfɩ a, opuni letsii mʋa Yerusalemfɔ fɛ́ɛ́. 4Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛtɩ Yudafɔ Bulu igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ fia, fɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔtɩnɛá bɔ́kwɩɩ Kristo, (ɔha amʋʋ Bulu lada mʋ ofuli amʋ).
5Bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ “Betlehem wuluá ɩbʋ Yudea ɔmátɔ. Alɩ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ ɔkʋ lɔwanlɩn tswɩ nɩ. 6Ɔbɛɛ,
‘Fʋ Betlehem, Yudea wulu,
fʋmegyi wulu tukuriibi ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ Yudea awulu yile amʋtɔ.
Tsufɛ ɔmásʋ ogyipʋ ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́dalɩ tsu fʋtɔá
ɔbɛ́kpa Bulu aha Israelfɔ.> ”
7Mʋ́ sʋ Owie Herode lɛtɩ anyansapʋ amʋ nkʋlɛ, fɩtɛ amʋ́ brɛá bowun osuna ɔtsrakpabi amʋ, bɛbla mʋ. 8Mʋʋ ɔlɔwa amʋ́ Betlehem ɔbɛɛ, bʋyodunka kebi amʋ wanklaan. Nɩ bowun mʋ a, bʋyinki bɛbla mʋ, mɛnɩ mʋ ɛ moyesum mʋ.
9Olenya bla amʋ́ ta alɩ bɛnatɩ. Ɔtsrakpabi amʋʋ bowun owi ɔdalɩkpa amʋ, lɛkpa amʋ́ alɩɩ yɛlɩɩ ɔtɩnɛá kebi amʋ bʋ. 10Brɛá bowun ɔtsrakpabi amʋ a, ansɩ lɛhɩɛ gyi amʋ́. 11Bowie-woyitɔ ɩnʋ a, bowun kebi amʋ mʋa mʋ yin Maria, bɛda akpawunu sum kebi amʋ. Bɛsankɩ amʋ́ akentebi, bekie mʋ sika pɛpɛ, ɔhɩɛn pʋ́ ohuam.
12Mʋ́ ɔma a, Bulu lɔwa mbla ha amʋ́ okudetɔ ɔbɛɛ, bʋmáyinki yɔtsʋn Herode wa. Mʋ́ sʋ bɔtsʋn ɔkpa bambasʋ yɔ amʋ́ wulutɔ.
Yesu Mʋa Mʋ Akwɩɩpʋ Egyipte Ɔmátɔ Yɔ
13Brɛá anyansapʋ amʋ bɛnatɩ a, Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ lɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna Yosef okudetɔ, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Kʋsʋ, afʋkpa kebi amʋ mʋa mʋ yin srɩ ya Egyipte ɔmátɔ. Mlɩtsia ɩnʋ yɔfʋn brɛá nɛ́bla fʋ mbɛɛ mlɩyinki ba, tsufɛ Owie Herode obódunka kebi amʋ, mɔ mʋ.”
14Mʋ́ sʋ Yosef lɔkʋsʋ onye-onye amʋ, kpa Maria mʋa kebi amʋ srɩ ya Egyipte ɔmátɔ. 15Betsia ɩnʋ yɔfʋn brɛá Herode lowu. Ɩnɩ lɛha Bulu asʋn ánɩ́ ɔlɛblɩ tsʋn mʋ ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ ɔkʋsʋ lɛba mʋ́tɔ. Ɔbɛɛ, “Nɛtɩ mɩ bi amʋ tsu Egyipte ɔmátɔ.”
Betlehemfɔ Abi Mɔ
16Brɛá Owie Herode lowun ánɩ́ anyansapʋ amʋ bamlɛ mʋ a, ɔblɔ lɛhɩɛ kɩta mʋ. Ɔlɔwa mʋ ɩsa akɔpʋ ɔbɛɛ, bʋyɔ Betlehem wulutɔ pʋ́ mʋ́ nkudasɩ, abʋyɛmɔ abi yinhɛá bahɔ tsu nfinyɔ ba ayasɩ fɛ́ɛ́. Tsufɛ anyansapʋ amʋ bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, begyankpa wun ɔtsrakpabi amʋ nfinyɔ nɩ.
17Ɩnɩ lɛha Bulu asʋn ánɩ́ ɔlɛblɩ tsʋn mʋ ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yeremiasʋ lɛba mʋ́tɔ. 18Ɔbɛɛ,
“Bonu isu mʋ́a olu kʋá ɩmɛka tin Rama wulutɔ.
Rahel dɛ mʋ abi su. Omotsula ánɩ́ bʋkpata mʋ,
tsufɛ bʋtra bʋma ɩnʋ.”
Yesu Mʋa Mʋ Akwɩɩpʋ Yinki Tsu Egyipte
19Owie Herode lowu ɔma a, Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ lɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna Yosef okudetɔ Egyipte ɩnʋ, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, 20“Kʋsʋ, afʋkpa kebi amʋ mʋa mʋ yin, amlɩyinki yɔ Israel ɔmátɔ. Tsufɛ aha amʋʋ bodunka ánɩ́ bɔ́mɔ kebi amʋ bawu.” 21Mʋ́ sʋ Yosef lɔkʋsʋ kpa kebi amʋ mʋa mʋ yin, beyinki yɔ Israel ɔmátɔ.
22Tamɛ brɛá bowie ɩnʋ a, olonu ánɩ́ Arkelao latsia mʋ sɩ Herode obiasʋ, ɔdɛ Yudea ɔmásʋ gyi. Mʋ́ sʋ olenya ifuá ɔbɔ́pʋ kebi amʋ ya ɩnʋ. Bulu lɛlawa mbla ha mʋ okudetɔ ɔbɛɛ, ɔpʋ mʋ ya Galilea ɔmátɔ. 23Mʋ́ sʋ bɔyɔ yetsia Nasaret wulutɔ. Ɩnɩ lɛha Bulu asʋn amʋʋ ɔlɛblɩ tsʋn mʋ ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋsʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Bɛ́tɩ mʋ Nasaretyin” amʋ ɩlɛba mʋ́tɔ nɩ.

Title: MATEO 3
Content:
Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane Bulu Asʋn Ɔkanda
(Marko 1:1-8; Luka 3:1-18; Yohane 1:19-28)
1Brɛ kʋtɔ a, Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane lɛba ɔdɛ Bulu asʋn ɔkan da Yudea ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ. 2Ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩdamli klʋntɔ amlɩsi lakpan bwɛ, tsufɛ Bulu iwiegyi lawie woyi ta.” 3Yohane ɩwɩ asʋn Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yesaia lɔwanlɩn ɔbɛɛ,
“Ɔkʋ dɛkplʋn ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ ɔbɛɛ,
‘Mlɩla anɩ Wie ɔkpa.
Mlɩtswii ɩkpa ha mʋ> ” amʋ nɩ.
4Yohane lɔwa kpɔsɔ-imi atadɩɛ, ɔlɔpʋ ɔwʋlʋ-kpakpa ɔfɛ klɩ mʋ́sʋ. Atsantsankʋ pʋ́ ɔkwɛn otegyi. 5Aha botsu Yerusalem wulutɔ, Yudea ɔmátɔ pʋ́ Yordan bʋnkpa ɔnɔ awulu fɛ́ɛ́sʋ ba bonu mʋ asʋn blɩhɛ. 6Bɛlɛ amʋ́ lakpan blɩ, ɔlɔbɔ amʋ́ asu Yordan ntsutso.
7Tamɛ brɛá Farisifɔ pʋ́ Sadukifɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛba bɛɛ ɔbɔ amʋ́ asu a, ɔlɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Abɛ abi-aná, ntɔ gya mlɩ, mlɩsrɩ Bulu ɩsʋbɩtɩ amʋʋ ɩba amʋ? 8Mʋmʋ mlɩswie abiá ibósuna ánɩ́ lɛlɛ mlɩladamli klʋntɔ. 9Mlɩmákɩ mlɩaa, mlɩ nain gyi Abraham. Mʋ́ sʋ Bulu mɛ́ɛbɩtɩ mlɩ ɩsʋ. Ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, Bulu ɔbɛ́talɩ ha abwi anfɩ ɩbɛ́damli Abraham abi-aná. 10Sei a, Bulu lapʋ ɛfɛ yi nyi-atsitsitɔ. Oyigyioyiá imoswie abi wanklaan a, bókun mʋ́ da, wa mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ogya. 11Mɩ mʋ́ a, ntsu ndɛpʋbɔ mlɩ asu pʋsuna ánɩ́ mlɩladamli klʋntɔ. Tamɛ ɔkʋá ɔdʋn mɩ bʋ ɔma ɔba. Mmɔfʋn ánɩ́ nɔ́sʋra mʋ ntʋkʋta kʋraa. Mʋ ɔbɔ́pʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ pʋ́ ogya bɔ mlɩ asu nɩ. 12Ɔdɛ mʋ ɩlɩn, ɔbɔ́pʋfuni ntɛtɛ lɛ ayo amʋtɔ. Ɔbɛ́kpa ayo amʋ wa mʋ odudutɔ, tamɛ ɔbɛ́fɛɩ ofunikpa ɩnʋ wanklaan; kpa ntɛtɛ amʋ wa ogya ánɩ́ ɩtamaduntɔ.”
Yesu Asubɔ
(Marko 1:9-11; Luka 3:21-22)
13Yesu lotsu Galilea ɔmátɔ ba Yordan ntsu ɔnɔ Yohane wa ɔbɛɛ, ɔbɔ mʋ asu. 14Tɛkɩ Yohane motsula ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́bɔ mʋ asu. Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔlɛbla Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ ilehian ánɩ́ fɔ́bɔ asu. Nkalɩ igyi sʋ faba fɛɛ, mɩ ɔbɔ fʋ asu?”
15Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Sei a, ha atsu mʋ́ alɩ asa, tsufɛ ilehian ánɩ́ abɔ́bwɛ togyitɔá ɩda ɔkpa Bulu ansɩtɔ.”
Mʋ́ sʋ Yohane lotsula. 16Brɛá ɔlɔbɔ Yesu asu ta, Yesu lɛdalɩ ntsu amʋtɔ alɩ nwʋlʋta lefinki, olowun Bulu Ɔŋɛ dɛkplɩ fɛ lɔpɔ, ilobogyonka mʋsʋ. 17Ɩnʋ ɔmɛ kʋ tsu ɔsʋsʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔ́nɩ gyi mɩ Biá ntɔdwɛ mʋ, mɩ ansɩ tɛhɩɛ gyi mʋ ɩwɩ nɩ.”

Title: MATEO 4
Content:
Yesu Ɩsɔkɩ
(Marko 1:12-13; Luka 4:1-13)
1Ɩnʋnʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ lɛkpa Yesu ya ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ, mɛnɩ Ɔbʋnsam ɔbɔ́sɔ mʋ kɩ. 2Oletsia ɩnʋ klɩ ɔnɔ ɔyɩkɛhɛ mʋ́a onye adʋana (40). Mʋ́ sʋ akʋn lɛhɩɛ kɩta mʋ. 3Ɩnʋ Ɔbʋnsam lɔsɔ mʋ kɩ, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ Bulu mʋ Bi fʋgyi a, mʋmʋ ha abwi anfɩ ɩdamli bwɛ bodobodo.”
4Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, ‘Megyi atogyihɛ wʋlɛ nyankpʋsa obégyi tsia nkpa, tamɛ ɔpʋ Bulu asʋn blɩhɛ ɛ tsia nkpa.> ”
5Ɔbʋnsam lɛkpa mʋ ya Yerusalem wulu wankɩhɛ amʋtɔ. Ɔlɔpʋ mʋ yɛlɩɩ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa obu amʋ ɔtantra. 6Ɩnʋ ɔlɛbla Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ Bulu mʋ Bi fʋgyi lɛlɛ a, tu kpayi. Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
‘Bulu ɔbɛ́ha mʋ abɔpʋ bɛ́kpata fʋ ɩbɩtɔ,
mɛnɩ fʋ yabi mɛ́ɛda ibwi kʋkʋsʋ.> ”
7Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Bɛtra wanlɩn bɛɛ, ‘Mákapʋ fʋ Wie Bulu kɩ.> ”
8Mʋ́ ɔma a, Ɔbʋnsam lɔpʋ mʋ ya ɩbʋ fʋahɛ kʋsʋ, olosuna mʋ ɔyɩtɔ iwie ogyikpa fɛ́ɛ́ pʋ́ mʋ́ numnyam. 9Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ fɛda akpawunu sum mɩ a, nɔ́pʋ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ha fʋ.”
10Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔbʋnsam, natɩ tɛɩ mɩsʋ! Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, ‘Da akpawunu ha fʋ Wie Bulu. Mʋ nkʋlɛ fʋ sum.> ”
11Ɩnʋ Ɔbʋnsam lɛnatɩ mʋ wa, Bulu-abɔpʋ bɛba bɛkɩ mʋsʋ.
Yesu Gyumagyihɛ Asɩtsua Galilea Ɔmátɔ
(Marko 1:14-15; Luka 4:14-15)
12Mʋ́ ɔma a, Yesu lonuá bakɩta Yohane tswɩ obu, oleyinki ba Galilea ɔsʋlʋsʋ. 13Olotu tsu Nasaret wulutɔ yɔ Kapernaum wuluá ɩbʋ manta Galilea ɔpʋ ɔnɔ, Sebulon mʋ́a Naftali ɔsʋlʋsʋ. 14Mʋ ɩnʋ yɔ lɛha asʋn amʋʋ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yesaia lɛblɩ amʋ ɩlɛba mʋ́tɔ. Ɔbɛɛ,
15“Sebulon pʋ́ Naftali
ɔsʋlʋá ɩda Yordan bʋnkpa ɔnɔ, manta Galilea ɔpʋ.
Galilea ɔmátɔ ɔmá bambasʋfɔ bʋtsie.
16Aha anfɩ bʋtsie okluntɔ anfɩ
bawun wankɩ kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ kʋ.
Bʋtsie ɔsʋlʋá lowu dɛ iwie gyi mʋ́sʋ.
Wankɩ kʋ lawankɩ wʋlɩ amʋ́sʋ.”
17Tsu ɩnʋ Yesu lefi asɩ ɔdɛ Bulu asʋn ɔkan da, blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩdamli klʋntɔ, Bulu iwiegyi lawie woyi ta.”
Akasɩpʋ Abana Lɛ
(Marko 1:16-20; Luka 5:1-11)
18Ɛkɛ ɔkʋá Yesu na Galilea ɔpʋ ɔnɔ, olowun apio abanyɔ akʋ. Simon ánɩ́ bʋtɛtɩ mʋ Petro mʋa mʋ gyama Andrea, bʋdɛ asawu tswɩ, tsufɛ aye alɛpʋ bʋgyi. 19Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩba bobuo mɩ. Nɔ́bwɛ mlɩ anyankpʋsa alɛpʋ.” 20Ɩnʋnʋ besi amʋ́ asawu aná tswɩ, kpla buo mʋ.
21Ɔlɛnatɩ yɔ nkpa kpalobi, olowun apio abanyɔ akʋ ɛ, Yakobo mʋa mʋ gyama Yohane. Amʋ́a amʋ́ sɩ Sebedeo bʋbʋ ɔklʋntɔ, bʋdɛ amʋ́ asawu bɩn; Yesu lɛtɩ amʋ́. 22Ɩnʋnʋ amʋ́ ɛ bɛnatɩ si amʋ́ sɩ mʋa ɔklʋn amʋ bobuo mʋ.
Yesu Atosuna, Mʋ Asʋn Ɔkanda Pʋ́ Ɩlɔtsa
(Luka 6:17-19)
23Yesu leki Galilea ɔmátɔ fɛ́ɛ́, suna atɔ Yudafɔ ofiakpa. Ɔlɛda Bulu iwiegyi amʋ ɩwɩ asʋn wanklaan ɔkan. Ɔlɛtsa ɔŋɛtɔ mʋ́a awutɔ ɩlɔ kugyikʋ. 24Ɩnɩ sʋ mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn lɛklɛɩ yɔ Siria ɔmátɔ fɛ́ɛ́. Bɔpʋ alɔpʋ tsua ntɩnɛ-ntɩnɛ ba mʋ. Ɔlɛtsa ɩlɔ kugyikʋ, aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn wun, amʋ́á ɔŋɛ lalahɛ dɛ amʋ́ han, amʋ́á ɩlɔ dɩdahɛ bʋ amʋ́sʋ pʋ́ abubupʋ aná fɛ́ɛ́. 25Mʋ́ sʋ ɔdɔm kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ bobuo mʋ. Aha ánɩ́ botsu Galilea ɔmátɔ pʋ́ Dekapoli awulu amʋsʋ, Yerusalem wulutɔ, Yudea ɔmátɔ pʋ́ Yordan ntsu ɔbɩn ɔsʋlʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.

Title: MATEO 5
Content:
Ɩbʋsʋ Atosunahɛ
1Brɛá Yesu lowun ɔdɔm amʋ a, ɔlɔdʋ yɔ ɩbʋ kʋsʋ yetsia asɩ, mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛba mʋ wa. 2Ɩnʋ olosuna amʋ́ atɔ ɔbɛɛ,
Oyula Asʋn
(Luka 6:20-23)
3“Bulu layula aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ansɩ mɛdɩn tɔtɔsʋ dʋn mʋ Bulu,
tsufɛ amʋ́bʋ mʋ iwiegyi amʋ.
4Bulu layula awɩrɛhɔ agyipʋ,
tsufɛ obólwii amʋ́ klʋn.
5Bulu layula ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ,
tsufɛ amʋ́ obégyi ɔsʋlʋ amʋ.
6Bulu layula aha ánɩ́ mʋ apɛbwɛ akʋn mʋ́a ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ amʋ́,
tsufɛ ɔbɛ́ha amʋ́ bɔ́mwɛ.
7Bulu layula nwɛ awunpʋ,
tsufɛ obówun amʋ́ nwɛ.
8Bulu layula aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ klʋntɔ lɔwankɩ,
tsufɛ amʋ́ obówun mʋ.
9Bulu layula aha nsɩnɛ alapʋ,
tsufɛ ɔbɛ́tɩ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ mʋ abi.
10Bulu layula aha ánɩ́ bʋdɩn amʋ́sʋ mʋ apɛbwɛ sʋ,
tsufɛ amʋ́bʋ mʋ iwiegyi amʋ nɩ.
11“Bulu layula mlɩ, nɩ bʋdɛ mlɩ sia, bʋdɩn mlɩsʋ, bʋdɛ afunu wa dɩnka mlɩsʋ. 12Ansɩ igyi mlɩ, ɩwɩ ɩsankɩ mlɩ; tsufɛ mlɩ ɩkɔka tsɔ ɔsʋsʋ. Alɩ bɔbwɛ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ agyankpapʋ amʋ nɩ.
Nfɔlɩ Mʋ́a Wankɩ
(Marko 9:50; Luka 14:34-35)
13“Mlɩgyi ɔyɩtɔ nfɔlɩ nɩ. Nɩ nfɔlɩ ɩta ɔdwɛ a, ntɔ bɛ́lapʋwa mʋ́ ɔdwɛ? Ɩtra ma alɛ ha tɔtɔɔtɔ bwɛ. Tsɛɩ bʋtɛtsɛɩ mʋ́ tsitsa, aha bʋtɛtsatsa mʋ́sʋ tsʋn.
14“Mlɩgyi ɔyɩtɔ wankɩ ɛ nɩ. Wuluá ɩdɩn bʋsʋ tamaŋain. 15Bʋtamanywɛ ɔkandɩɛ, pʋ ɔlɔ bun mʋ́sʋ. Ɔfʋakpa bʋtɔpʋbian, mɛnɩ ɩbɔ́wankɩ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋtsie woyi amʋtɔ fɛ́ɛ́. 16Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha mlɩ bwɛhɛ ɩwankɩ alɩ, mɛnɩ aha bówun mlɩ bwɛhɛ wanklaan amʋ, fówun bɛkanfʋ mlɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ.
Mose Mbla Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
17“Mlɩmákɩ mlɩaa, nɛba Mose Mbla ntɛ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ amʋ atosunahɛtɔ ɔkakpa. Mmɛba mʋ́tɔ ɔkakpa, mboun nɛba bɔbwɛ mʋ́ ɩfʋn. 18Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ bɔ́mɔ ɔnɔ, tamɛ itoduahɛ ntɛ asʋnbi kʋlɛ kʋraa ɩmɛ́ɛdalɩ Mbla amʋtɔ, yɔfʋn brɛá mʋ́tɔ asʋn fɛ́ɛ́ laba mʋ́tɔ. 19Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ omobu mbla amʋtɔ tukuriibi kʋ, olosuna mʋ aba ɛ ɔbɛɛ bʋmábu mʋ́ a, bɛ́tɩ mʋ kebi tukuriibi ɔsʋsʋ iwie ogyikpa ɩnʋ. Tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ olegyi mbla amʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ, suna mʋ aba ánɩ́ bʋgyi mʋ́sʋ a, bɛ́tɩ mʋ ɔha yile ɔsʋsʋ iwie ogyikpa ɩnʋ. 20Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, nɩ mlɩmɔbwɛ Bulu apɛ dʋn Mose mbla asunapʋ pʋ́ Farisifɔ amʋ a, mlɩmóowie Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Ɔblɔ Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
(Luka 12:57-59)
21“Mlɩlanuá bɛbla mlɩ anain atɩtɩfɔ amʋ bɛɛ, ‘Mámɔ ɔha. Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔmɔ ɔha a, Bulu obégyi mʋ asʋn, ha mʋ ɩpɔn.> 22Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ olenya ɔblɔ wa mʋ ba a, Bulu obégyi mʋ asʋn. Ɔha ánɩ́ olesia mʋ ba ɔbɛɛ, ‘Ɔhakpan!> a, obégyi ɩpɔn Yudafɔ asʋn agyipʋ ansɩtɔ. Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɛbla mʋ ba ɛ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Raka!> a, obégyi ɩpɔn yɔ ɩsʋbɩtɩ ogya ánɩ́ ɩtamaduntɔ. 23Ɩnɩ sʋ nɩ fotsu atɔ hahɛ fɔyɔ afɔdɩɛ ɔbɔkpa, fɛkaɩn ánɩ́ fapʋ asʋn lalahɛ kʋ gyi fʋ ba a, 24si fʋ atɔ amʋ́ dɩnka afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩsʋ ɩnʋ. Yɔ fʋa mʋnyɔ amlɩla mlɩ nsɩnɛ, asa afʋba bɔbɔ afɔdɩɛ amʋ ha Bulu.
25“Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔsama fʋ a, wa ɔsa ha abʋyebwii ɩpa ha mʋ asa asʋn amʋ ogyikɛ ɩfʋn, mɛnɩ fʋ onyaba amʋ ɔmɛ́ɛha asʋn agyipʋ bʋmɔ́ɔpʋ fʋ ha obu adɩpʋsʋ ɔkɩpʋ, ɔwa fʋ obu. 26Mbla fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ, nkɛtɩ faka ɩkɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ta asa fɛ́dalɩ ɩnʋ.
Otsiaba Ɔmadalɩ Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
27“Mlɩlanu ánɩ́ bɛbla mlɩ bɛɛ, ‘Mákle ɔkʋ otsiaba.> 28Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, oyingyioyin ánɩ́ olowun ɔtsɩ, ɔlɔbwɛ mʋ kle ɩwɩ agywɩɩn a, alatɔ mbʋa dodo mʋ klʋntɔ. 29Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ fʋ gyɔpɩ nsibi tɛha fʋtɔbwɛ lakpan a, loti mʋ́ lɛ tswɩ tsalɩfwɩ. Ɩbʋ alɛá fʋ ɩwɩ ɔtɩnɛkʋ má ɩnʋ, dʋn ánɩ́ bɔ́tswɩ fʋ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ wa ɩsʋbɩtɩ ogya ánɩ́ ɩtamaduntɔ. 30Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ fʋ gyɔpɩ ɩbɩ tɛha fʋtɔbwɛ lakpan a, ka mʋ́ tswɩ tsalɩfwɩ. Ɩbʋ alɛá fʋma ɩbɩ kʋlɛ, dʋn ánɩ́ bɔ́tswɩ fʋ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ wa ɩsʋbɩtɩ ogya ánɩ́ ɩtamaduntɔ.
Ɔkakina Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
(Mateo 19:9; Marko 10:11-12; Luka 16:18)
31“Bɛtra bla mlɩ bɛɛ, ‘Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ obékina ɔka a, ɔwanlɩn ɔkakina ɔwʋlʋ ha mʋ asa.> 32Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, nɩ oyin okina mʋ ka ánɩ́ ɔmɔkʋdalɩ mʋ ɔma a, mʋlaha sʋ ɔtsɩ amʋ ɔbɛ́dalɩ mʋ ɔma. Oyingyioyin ánɩ́ otsia ɔtsɩ anfɩ mʋ klu lakina mʋ anfɩ ɛ latɔ mbʋa.
Ntamka Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
33“Mlɩlɛtra nu ánɩ́ bɛbla mlɩ anain atɩtɩfɔ amʋ bɛɛ, ‘Máka ntam kpaalɩ. Mboun bwɛ dɩnka ntam amʋʋ fɛka ha Bulu amʋsʋ.> 34Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, máka tɔtɔɔtɔ kʋraa. Mápʋ ɔsʋsʋ ka ntam, tsufɛ Bulu owie obia igyi. 35Mápʋ ɔsʋlʋ ka ntam. Bulu ayabi oyikpa igyi. Mápʋ Yerusalem wulu ka ntam. Awietɔ Owie wulu kpɔnkpɔntɩ nɩ. 36Mlɩmápʋ mlɩ nwun ka ntam, tsufɛ mlɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ bwɛ imi kʋlɛ fututu ntɛ bibi. 37Mboun fʋ ‘Iin!> ɩbwɛ ‘Iin!> Fʋ ‘O-o!> ɛ ɩbwɛ ‘O-o!> Kugyikʋá fɛtra blɩ tsɩa mʋ́tɔ itsu Ɔbʋnsam wa.
Lalahɛ Ɩkɔka Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
(Luka 6:29-30)
38“Mlɩlanuá bɛblɩ bɛɛ, ‘Ɔha obwie mʋ ba nsibi a, bʋbwie mʋ ɛ mʋ klɛ ka ɩkɔ. Ɔha otsii mʋ ba iyin ɛ a, bʋtsii mʋ klɛ ka ɩkɔ.> 39Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, mlɩmákpla ɔha lalahɛ. Mboun nɩ ɔha ɔda fʋ ɩsʋtɔ a, damli nyɔsɩ ɛ ha mʋ ɔda. 40Nɩ ɔha dekleá ɔbɛ́sama fʋ hɔ fʋ atadɩɛ a, pʋ fʋ tati ɛ ha mʋ. 41Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdʋn fʋ ɔhɩɛ fʋ ɔbɛɛ, fʋsʋra mʋ atɔ maɩlɩ kʋlɛ ha mʋ a, sʋra mʋ́ maɩlɩ anyɔ. 42Ɔha ɔkʋlɩ fʋ atɔ a, ha mʋ. Nɩ ɔkʋ ɛ ɔbɛɛ fʋpan mʋ tɔkʋ a, mákina.
Alupʋdwɛ Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
(Luka 6:27-28, 32-36)
43“Mlɩlonuá bɛblɩ bɛɛ, ‘Dwɛ fʋ ba, afʋlu fʋ olupʋ.> 44-45Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, mlɩdwɛ mlɩ alupʋ. Mlɩbɔ mpaɩ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋdɩn mlɩsʋ, mɛnɩ mlɔ́bwɛ mlɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ abi. Tsufɛ mʋtɛha owi tɛlɩn, ɔtɛha nyankpʋ ɛ itotswie wʋlɩ aha wanklaan pʋ́ aha lalahɛ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ. 46Nɩ fʋ adwɛpʋ nkʋlɛ fʋtɔdwɛ a, ɩpan mɔmʋ fénya? Lampoo ahɔpʋ kʋraa bʋtɔbwɛ alɩ. 47Nɩ fʋ anyawie nkʋlɛ fʋtɔwa ɔnɔ a, ntɔ fakʋkʋ bwɛ dʋbɩ? Alɩ kɛn ɔmátɔfɔ bʋtɔbwɛ nɩ. 48Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩfʋn fɛ alɩá mlɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ lɔfʋn.

Title: MATEO 6
Content:
Yilebwɛ Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
1“Mlɩkɩ wanklaan ánɩ́ mlɩmɔ́ɔbwɛ mlɩ yile aha ansɩtɔ. Nɩ mlɔbwɛ mʋ́ alɩ a, mlɩméenya ɩkɔka mlɩ Sɩá ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ wa.
2“Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ fɔbwɛ yile ha ohiani a, máda mʋ́ ɔkan fɛ alɩá apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ bʋtɔbwɛ Yudafɔ ofiakpa pʋ́ dɩnsʋ, mɛnɩ aha bɛ́kanfʋ amʋ́. Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, banya amʋ́ ɩkɔ dodo. 3Tamɛ nɩ fɔbwɛ yile ha ohiani a, máha fʋ bɩna ɔbɩ tɔá gyɔpɩ labwɛ. Bwɛ mʋ́ ŋaintɔ, 4mɛnɩ fʋ Sɩ okluntɔ atɔ owunpʋ amʋ ɔbɛ́ka fʋ ɩkɔ.
Mpaɩbɔ Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
(Luka 11:2-4)
5“Nɩ mlɔ́bɔ mpaɩ a, mlɩmábwɛ fɛ apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ. Amʋ́tekle Yudafɔ ofiakpa pʋ́ dɩnsʋ lɩɩ bɔ mpaɩ, mɛnɩ aha bówun amʋ́. Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, Bulu laka amʋ́ ɩkɔ dodo. 6Tamɛ nɩ fɔ́bɔ mpaɩ a, bitiwie fʋ obutotɔ, afʋfin obu wa ɩwɩ, bɔ mpaɩ ha fʋ Sɩ ŋaintɔ. Fʋ Sɩ ŋaintɔ atɔ owunpʋ amʋ ɔbɛ́ka fʋ ɩkɔ.
7“Nɩ mlɩdɛ mpaɩ bɔ a, mlɩmátsia pla mʋ́tɔ ha mʋ́ ɩwa swɩ fɛ ɔmátɔfɔ. Bʋtosusu bɛɛ, nɩ bɔbɔ mʋ́ ɩwa swɩ asa Bulu obónu mʋ́ ha amʋ́. 8Mlɩmábwɛ fɛ amʋ́, tsufɛ mlɩ Sɩ Bulu yin tɔá ɩdɛ mlɩ hian asa mlɩdɛ mʋ kʋlɩ. 9Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩbɔ mpaɩ mlɩaa,
‘Anɩ Sɩá fʋbʋ ɔsʋsʋ.
Aha bʋbu fʋ ɩda.
10Ba begyi iwie.
Aha bʋbwɛ fʋ apɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ, fɛ alɩá bʋtɔbwɛ mʋ́ ɔsʋsʋ.
11Ha anɩ atogyihɛá ɩbɔ́fʋn anɩ ndɛ.
12Si anɩ lakpan kie anɩ,
fɛ alɩá anɩtesikie aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔpʋ ɩla gyi anɩ.
13Mákpa anɩ wa ɩsɔkɩtɔ, mboun lɛ anɩ tsu Ɔbʋnsam ɩbɩtɔ.>
14“Tsufɛ nɩ mlesi aha lakpan kie amʋ́ a, mlɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ ɛ obési mlɩ klɛ kie mlɩ. 15Tamɛ nɩ mlɩmesikie aha a, mlɩ Sɩ amʋ ɛ oméesikie mlɩ.
Ɔnɔklɩ Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
16“Nɩ mlɩdɛ ɔnɔ klɩ a, mlɩmábwɛ mlɩ ɩwɩ bʋmblaan fɛ alɩá akʋ bʋtepina bwɛ. Alɩá aha bówun ánɩ́ bʋdɛ ɔnɔ klɩ sʋ bʋtɔbwɛ ɩwɩ alɩ. Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, banya amʋ́ ɩkɔ dodo. 17Mboun nɩ mlɩdɛ ɔnɔ klɩ a, mlɩbie ntsu, amlɩfunya nwun, 18mɛnɩ aha bʋmóowun ánɩ́ mlɩdɛ ɔnɔ klɩ. Tamɛ mlɩ Sɩ okluntɔ atɔ owunpʋ amʋ mʋ́ obówun mlɩ, ka mlɩ ɩkɔ.
Atonyahɛ Pʋyaɩ Ɔsʋsʋ
(Luka 12:33-34)
19“Mlɩmákle atɔ yaɩ ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ, ɔtɩnɛ anfɩ atɛplɛ bʋtɔwɩ atɔ, ɩkʋ aná tɔwɩ nkanʋ yinta, awikplu ɛ bʋtobwie wie obuto wi atɔ anfɩ. 20Mboun mlɩkle atɔ yaɩ ɔsʋsʋ. Ɩnʋ mʋ́ a, atɛplɛ bʋtamawɩ atɔ, ɩtamawɩ nkanʋ, awikplu ɛ bʋtamabwie wie obuto wi atɔ. 21Tsufɛ ɔtɩnɛá fʋ siadɩɛ bʋ a, ɩnʋ fʋ agywɩɩn tetsia.
Nyankpʋsa-oyi Ɔkandɩɛ
(Luka 11:34-36)
22“Ansibi igyi ɔkandɩɛ ha nyankpʋsa-oyi. Nɩ fʋ ansibi bʋ alɛ a, fʋ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔ́wankɩ. 23Tamɛ nɩ fʋ ansibi ma alɛ a, fʋ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbʋ okluntɔ. Nɩ ɔkandɩɛ amʋʋ ɩbʋ fʋtɔ amʋ idun a, mʋmʋ fawie oklun kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩtɔ.
Bulu Mʋa Atonyahɛ Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
(Luka 16:13; 12:22-31)
24“Ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ sum awie anyɔ. Ɔbɔ́dwɛ ɔkʋlɛ, lu ɔkʋlɛ. Ntɛ obóbu ɔkʋlɛ, omóobu ɔkʋlɛ. Fʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ sum Bulu, sum kɔba.
25“Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, mlɩmáhan ɩwɩ tɔá mlégyi, tɔá mlónun tsia nkpa pʋ́ tɔá mlɛ́dɩda sʋ. Mbɛɛ, nkpa medehian dʋn atogyihɛ? Ntɛ ɔyʋlʋ medehian dʋn atɔ dɩdahɛ? 26Mlɩkɩ mbubwi, bʋtamadu, bʋtamasɩɛtɩ wa ɩdantɔ, tamɛ mlɩ Sɩá ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ tɛha amʋ́ atogyihɛ. Mlɩmá labi dʋn amʋ́? 27Mlɩtɔ ma ɔbɛ́talɩ han ɩwɩ, pʋ brɛ kpalobi tsɩa mʋ nkɛtɔ?
28“Ntogyi sʋ mlɩdɛ ɩwɩ han mlɩ atɔ dɩdahɛ sʋ? Mlɩkɩ alɩá pututɔ-oyi ntswɩtswɩ tɛdan. Ɩtamayɔ agyʋma ntɛ lʋ atati. 29Tamɛ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, Owie Salomo, mʋ inya fɛ́ɛ́tɔ a, ɔmɛtalɩ hɩhɩɛ ɩwɩ, wa akɩlɛ fɛ oyi ntswɩtswɩ anfɩtɔ kʋkʋ. 30Nɩ Bulu dɛ ɩfa ánɩ́ ndɛ ɩlɩɩ, ɔkɛ ɩlawu, bawa mʋ́ ogya tati dɩda a, ntogyi sʋ ɔmɛ́ɛtalɩ dɩda mlɩ atati dʋn mʋ́? Mlɩ hogyi mɔtsɔ!
31“Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmáhan ɩwɩ fɩtɛ mlɩaa, ‘Ntɔ abégyi?> ntɛ ‘Ntɔ abónun?> ntɛ ‘Ntɔ abɛ́dɩda?> 32Ɩnɩ aná ɔmátɔfɔ bʋtɛsrɩ gya nɩ. Mlɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ yin ánɩ́ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ dɛ mlɩ hian. 33Atɔá mlɩgyankpa dunka gyi, Bulu iwiegyi pʋ́ mʋ yilebwɛ; fówun Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ tsɩa mʋ́tɔ ha mlɩ. 34Mlɩmásusu ɔkɛ ɩwɩ. Ɔkɛtɔ asʋn igyi ɔkɛ klɛ. Ekekegyiɛkɛtɔ asʋn wunhɛ ɩtsɔ ha ɛkɛ amʋ.

Title: MATEO 7
Content:
Ɩlalɛ
(Luka 6:37-38, 41-42)
1“Mlɩmálɛ aha ɩla, mɛnɩ Bulu ɔmɛ́ɛlɛ mlɩ ɩla. 2Tsufɛ alɩ amʋʋ mlɩdɛ aha ɩla lɛ amʋ a, alɩ Bulu ɛ ɔbɛ́lɛ mlɩ ɩla nɩ. Ɩtɔá fɔpʋsusu ha fʋ ba a, mʋ́ kɛn Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋsusu ha fʋ nɩ. 3Ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛ ipi tukuriibi wun fʋ ba nsibisʋ, tamɛ fʋmɛdɛ ogyakpatin ánɩ́ ɩdɩn fʋ klɛsʋ mʋ́ wun? 4Ntɛ ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛ fʋ ba bla fɛɛ, ‘Ha mɩ andɩnkɩ ipi fʋ nsibisʋ?> brɛá ogyakpatin dɩn fʋ klɛsʋ? 5Apinabwɛbi ɔbwɛpʋ! Gyankpa dɩnkɩ ogyakpatin amʋ fʋ nsibisʋ, mɛnɩ fówun atɔ wanklaan, talɩ dɩnkɩ ipi amʋ fʋ ba klɛsʋ.
6“Mlɩmápʋ Bulu atɔ wankɩhɛ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋgyi fɛ akɩaɩ. Bulu asʋn tamawa amʋ́ ogya. Bénya ɔblɔ damli dun mlɩ. Alɩ kɛn mlɩmápʋ mlɩ abuto wʋlɩhɛ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋgyi fɛ mprakuo nɩ. Tsufɛ bɛtsatsa mʋ́sʋ, tsɩa mʋ́ wa ɔdɩbatɔ.
Atɔkʋlɩ Tsu Bulu Wa
(Luka 11:9-13)
7“Mlɩkʋlɩ Bulu, ɔbɛ́ha mlɩ. Mlɩdunka, mlówun. Mlɩda mʋ klʋnsʋ, obéfinki mʋ́ ha mlɩ. 8Tsufɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔkʋlɩ atɔ tenya. Ɔha ánɩ́ otodunka atɔ towun. Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛda klʋnsʋ bʋtefinki ha. 9Ma bʋ mlɩtɔá mʋ bi ɔkʋlɩ mʋ bodobodo a, obótsu ibwi wa mʋ ɩbɩtɔ? 10Ntɛ nɩ ɔkʋlɩ mʋ iye a, ɔbɛ́kɩta ɩwɔ wa mʋ ɩbɩtɔ? 11Mlɩ lakpan abwɛpʋ kʋraa mlɩyin alɩá bʋtɔpʋ atɔ wanklaan ha mlɩ abi. Ntogyi sʋ mlɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ mʋ́ mɔ́ɔpʋ atɔ wanklaan ha aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mʋ kʋlɩ?
12“Bwɛ ha aha alɩá fʋdekle fɛɛ, bʋbwɛ ha fʋ. Ɩnɩ Mose Mbla pʋ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ amʋ atosunahɛ dɛblɩ nɩ.
Ɔkpa Kplanhɛ Mʋ́a Tɛɩhɛ
(Luka 13:24)
13-14“Mlɔtsʋn ɔkpa kplanhɛ amʋsʋ a, mlɔ́yɔ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamatatɔ. Aha kpalobi pɛ tɛbɩ mʋ́. Tamɛ nɩ mlɔtsʋn tɛɩhɛ amʋʋ ɩbʋ atsʋnlɛ amʋsʋ a, mlɔ́yɔ ɔhɩkpa. Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ tɔtsʋn mʋ́sʋ.
Oyi Pʋ́ Mʋ́ Abi Swiehɛ
(Luka 6:43-44)
15“Mlɩkɩ wanklaan aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔwa afunu bɛɛ, Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ bʋgyisʋ. Bʋtepina bwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ akufa ba mlɩ wa, tamɛ nkpatakuá bʋbʋ ɩyɩn bʋgyi. 16Amʋ́ bwɛhɛ mlɔ́pʋbɩ amʋ́. Bʋtamakpɔtɩ kankaba okploto oyisʋ, bʋtamakpɔtɩ tsɔkpʋn ɛ tʋnkpa ɩflasʋ. 17Oyi wanklaan toswie abi wanklaan. Oyi lalahɛ ɛ toswie abi lalahɛ. 18Oyi wanklaan mɛ́ɛtalɩ swie abi lalahɛ, alɩ kɛn oyi lalahɛ ɛ mɛ́ɛtalɩ swie abi wanklaan nɩ. 19Oyiá ɩtamaswie abi wanklaan a, kun bʋtokun mʋ́ da, wa mʋ́ ogya. 20Mʋ́ alɩ sʋ a, ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ afunupʋ anfɩ bwɛhɛ mlɔ́pʋbɩ amʋ́.
Bulu Iwiegyi Amʋtɔ Awiepʋ
(Luka 13:25-27)
21“Megyi ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛtɩ mɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩ Wie, mɩ Wie> obówie Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ. Mboun ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔbwɛ mɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ apɛ ɔbɔ́yɔ ɩnʋ. 22Bulu asʋn ogyikɛ amʋ a, aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛ́fɩtɛ mɩ bɛɛ, ‘Mɩ Wie, megyi fʋ ɩdatɔ anɩlɛblɩ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋn, gya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ lɛ ahatɔ, bwɛ ofula ɛ nɩ?> 23Ɩnʋ nɛ́lɛ bla amʋ́ mbɛɛ, ‘Mmeyin mlɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. Mlɩnatɩ tɛɩ mɩsʋ, mlɩ lakpan abwɛpʋ!>
Bʋtasʋ Pʋ́ Osublutɔ Obuyi
(Luka 6:47-49)
24“Mʋ́ sʋ ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ olonu mɩ asʋn blɩhɛ anfɩ, olegyi mʋ́sʋ a, ogyi fɛ ɔtɩansɩpʋá oleyi mʋ obu dɩnka bʋtasʋ. 25Nyankpʋ lotswie, ntsu lɔbʋla wa mʋ́, atsufu lɔtsʋn wʋlɩ mʋ́sʋ, tamɛ imobwie. Tsufɛ oleyi mʋ́ dɩnka bʋtasʋ.
26“Tamɛ ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ olonu mɩ asʋn blɩhɛ anfɩ, omegyi mʋ́sʋ a, ogyi fɛ ɔha mimlahɛ ánɩ́ oleyi mʋ obu osublutɔ. 27Nyankpʋ lotswie, ntsu lɔbʋla wa mʋ́, atsufu ɛ lɔtsʋn wʋlɩ mʋ́sʋ. Obu amʋ lobwie da asɩ gbloo!”
Túmiá Yesu Bʋ
28Brɛá Yesu lɛblɩ asʋn anfɩ ta a, mʋ atosunahɛ lɛha ɔnɔ lobwie ɔdɔm amʋ. 29Tsufɛ olosuna amʋ́ atɔ tumisʋ. Omosuna mʋ́ fɛ Mose mbla asunapʋ amʋ.

Title: MATEO 8
Content:
Ɩlɔ Pɛpɛ Ɔlɔpʋ Ɔkʋ Tsa
(Marko 1:40-45; Luka 5:12-16)
1Brɛá Yesu lɛkplɩ tsu ɩbʋ amʋsʋ a, ɔdɔm kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ bobuo mʋ. 2Ɩnʋ a, ɩlɔ pɛpɛ ɔlɔpʋ ɔkʋ lɛba bɛda akpawunu mʋ ayabitɔ, kokoli mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Owie! Nɩ fótsula a, fɛ́talɩ ha mɩ ɩwɩ bɛ́plɩ.”
3Mʋʋ Yesu lɛtɩnkɩ ɩbɩ da mʋ, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Natsula, fʋ ɩwɩ ɩplɩ!” Ɩnʋnʋ mʋ ɩwɩ lɛplɩ. 4Mʋʋ Yesu lɛda mʋ ɔla ɔbɛɛ, “Mábla ɔhaa asʋn anfɩ. Natɩ laa afʋpʋ fʋ ɩwɩ yesuna Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ, afʋha mʋ ɩwɩgyʋratɔ amʋʋ Mose mbla losuna tsu ɩlɔ-pɛpɛtsa ɩwɩ amʋ. Igyi adansɩɛ suna aha ánɩ́ fʋ ɩwɩ laplɩ.”
Romafɔ Ɩsa Akɔpʋ Ɔhandɛ Osumpʋ Ɔkʋ Ɩlɔ Tsa
(Luka 7:1-10)
5Yesu lowie Kapernaum wulutɔ. Romafɔ ɩsa akɔpʋ ɔhandɛ ɔkʋ lɛba mʋ wa, bobwii ɩpa ha mʋ ɔbɛɛ, 6“Owie, mɩ osumpʋ dɛlɔ. Alasin tsukʋlɛ. Ɔda woyitɔ ɔdɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn wun dʋbɩ.”
7Mʋʋ Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɛ́ba bɛtsa mʋ ɩlɔ.”
8-9Tamɛ ɔhandɛ amʋ lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Owie, mmɔfʋn ánɩ́ fɛ́ba mɩ woyitɔ. Fʋ mʋ́ blɩ asʋankʋ, ɩwɩ bɔ́wa mɩ osumpʋ amʋ ɔnlɩn. Tsufɛ mɩ ɛ mbʋ ahandɛ akʋ asɩ, ɩsa akɔpʋ akʋ ɛ bʋbʋ mɩ asɩ. Nɛlɛ ɔnɔ mbɛɛ amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋ ɔnatɩ a, ɔtɛnatɩ. Nɩ mbɛɛ ɔba ɛ a, ɔtɛba. Togyitɔá nɛbla mɩ osumpʋ mbɛɛ ɔbwɛ a, ɔtɔbwɛ.”
10Brɛá Yesu lonu asʋn anfɩ a, ɔnɔ lobwie mʋ, ɔlɛdamli bla aha amʋʋ bʋbuo mʋ amʋ, ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla, mmɔkʋwun ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ hogyi kpɔnkpɔntɩ anfɩ odu Israelfɔtɔ kʋraa kɩ!” 11Ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, “Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bótsu owi ɔdalɩkpa pʋ́ owi ɔkplɩwiekpa ba, betsia atɔ ogyikpa Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ. Amʋ́a anɩ anain Abraham, Isakɩ pʋ́ Yakob aná bɔ́wa ɩbɩ gyi atɔ. 12Tamɛ bɛlɛ Israelfɔ amʋʋ tɛkɩ bʋgyi Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ atsiapʋ amʋ lɛ ɩnʋ, tswɩ amʋ́ wa okluntɔ. Ɩnʋ isu mʋ́a kpisi bʋ nɩ.” 13Mʋʋ ɔlɛlabla ɩsa akɔpʋ ɔhandɛ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Natɩ, ɩba mʋ́tɔ ha fʋ fʋ hogyi ɔnɔ.”
Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ pɛpɛɛpɛ osumpʋ amʋ ɩwɩ lɔwa mʋ ɔnlɩn.
Alɔpʋ Tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ Tsa
(Marko 1:29-34; Luka 4:38-41)
14Yesu lɔyɔ Petro woyitɔ. Ɔlɔyɔ a, owisʋ lakɩta Petro mʋ sia tsɩhɛ, ɔda. 15Mʋʋ ɔlɛyɛkɩta ɔtsɩ amʋ ɩbɩ. Ɩnʋnʋ owisʋ amʋ lɔkʋsʋ mʋsʋ, ɔlɔbwɛ Yesu afɔɔtɔ.
16Mʋ́ ntʋpwɛsʋ a, bɔpʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔá ɔŋɛ lalahɛ dɛ amʋ́ han ba Yesu. Ɔlɔtɔɩ gya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ amʋ, tsa alɔpʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́. 17Ɩnɩ lɛha asʋn amʋʋ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yesaia lɛblɩ amʋ lɛba mʋ́tɔ. Ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋlɛtsa anɩ ɩlɔ, tsu ipian kʋsʋ anɩsʋ.”
Aha Ánɩ́ Bɛɛ Bɔ́bwɛ Yesu Abuopʋ
(Luka 9:57-62)
18Yesu lowun ánɩ́ ɔdɔm babomli mʋ, ɔlɛbla mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩha afa Galilea ɔpʋ yɔ mʋ́ ɔbɩn.” 19Ɩnʋ Mose mbla osunapʋ ɔkʋ lɛba mʋ wa, bɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Osunapʋ, nóbuo fʋ yɔ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛá fɔ́yɔ.”
20Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Awɩa bʋbʋ mbɔ, mbubwi ɛ bʋbʋ asia. Tamɛ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ mʋ́ mma ɔtɩnɛá nɔ́pʋ mɩ nwun tswɩ.”
21Aha amʋʋ bʋbuo mʋ amʋtɔ ɔkʋ lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Owie, ha mɩ anyopula mɩ sɩ asa ambobuo fʋ.”
22Tamɛ Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Bobuo mɩ, afʋsi awupʋ abʋpula amʋ́ afuli.”
Atsufu Asɩba
(Marko 4:35-41; Luka 8:22-25)
23Yesu lowie ɔklʋntɔ, mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ ɛ bowie buo mʋ. 24Brɛá bɔyɔ a, afu kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ kʋ lɔwa tsʋn bɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ ntsu dɛda wie ɔklʋn amʋtɔ, idekle ɩmɛ, tamɛ Yesu mʋ́ da ɔdɛdɩdɩ. 25Akasɩpʋ amʋ betsinki mʋ, bla mʋ bɛɛ, “Anɩ Wie lɛ anɩ. Anɩdɛ ntsu wie!”
26Mʋʋ ɔlɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ mlɩdɛ ifu nya alɩ? Mlɩ hogyi mɔtsɔ!” Ɩnʋ ɔlɔkʋsʋ lɛ ɔnɔ wa afu mʋ́a ntsu amʋ, ɩnʋ fɛ́ɛ́ lɔlʋa.
27Ifu lɛhɩɛ kɩta amʋ́, bɛfɩtɛ aba bɛɛ, “Nyankpʋsa ɔmɔmʋ nɩ, afu mʋ́a ntsu kʋraa tonu mʋ ɔmɛ alɩ?”
Ɔŋɛ Lalahɛ Gya Lɛ Agbedepʋ Abanyɔtɔ
(Marko 5:1-20; Luka 8:26-39)
28Brɛá Yesu lowie Galilea ɔpʋ ɔbɩn, Gadarafɔ ɔsʋlʋsʋ a, ayin abanyɔ akʋá ɔŋɛ lalahɛ bʋ amʋ́tɔ bɛdalɩ tsu afuli opulakpa befia mʋ. Amʋ́ ɩyɩn sʋ ɔhaa tamatalɩ tsʋn ɔkpa amʋsʋ. 29Ɩnʋnʋ bɔkplʋn fɩtɛ Yesu bɛɛ, “Bulu mʋ Bi, amansʋ igyi? Fɛba bɛpɩtɩ anɩ atɔ asa Bulu ɩsʋbɩtɩbɩ ɩfʋn?”
30Mprakuo tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ akʋ bʋdegyi ɩnʋ fʋn. 31Mʋ́ sʋ ɔŋɛ lalahɛ amʋ bokokoli Yesu bɛɛ, “Nɩ fégya anɩ lɛ aha anfɩtɔ a, ha ayowie mprakuo anfɩtɔ.”
32Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩyɔ.” Ɩnʋnʋ bɛdalɩ ayin amʋtɔ yowie mprakuo amʋtɔ. Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛsrɩ kplɩ okuku kʋ wie ɔpʋ amʋtɔ, wuwu.
33Mprakuo amʋ akpapʋ bɛsrɩ yɔ wulutɔ, yɛbla aha togyitɔá ɩlaba aha amʋʋ tɛkɩ ɔŋɛ lalahɛ bʋ amʋ́tɔ amʋsʋ. 34Mʋ́ sʋ wulu amʋtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bɛdalɩ ba Yesu wa. Brɛá bowun mʋ a, bokokoli mʋ bɛɛ, ɔdalɩ amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.

Title: MATEO 9
Content:
Tsukʋlɛ Osinpʋ Tsa
(Marko 2:1-12; Luka 5:17-26)
1Mʋ́ sʋ Yesu leyinki wie ɔklʋntɔ, fa ɔpʋ amʋ yɔ wulu amʋʋ otsie mʋ́tɔ amʋsʋ. 2Ɩnʋ a, akʋ bɔsʋra tsukʋlɛ osinpʋ akpasʋ ba mʋ. Brɛá Yesu lowun ánɩ́ bahɔ mʋ gyi a, ɔlɛbla tsukʋlɛ osinpʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ bi, klʋn ɩdɩ fʋ asɩ. Nasi fʋ lakpan kie fʋ.”
3Ɩnʋ Mose mbla asunapʋ akʋá bʋtsie ɩnʋ bɛblɩ wa nwuntɔ bɛɛ, “Oyin anfɩ labɔ mbusuo.”
4Yesu lɛbɩ amʋ́ agywɩɩn. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ mlɩdɛ ɩnɩ odu gywɩɩn? 5Mɔmʋ bɔ́wa ablɩlɛ dʋn? ‘Nasi fʋ lakpan kie fʋ.> ntɛ ‘Kʋsʋ tsu fʋ akpa afʋnatɩ?> 6Tamɛ ndekleá mlɩbɩ ánɩ́ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ mbʋ tumi ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ si aha lakpan kie amʋ́.” Ɩnʋ ɔlɛbla tsukʋlɛ osinpʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ndɛ fʋ bla mbɛɛ, kʋsʋ. Tsu fʋ akpa afʋnatɩ yɔ woyitɔ!”
7Ɩnʋ ɔlɔkʋsʋ natɩ yɔ woyitɔ. 8Ɩnɩ lɔwa amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ wanwan, bɛkanfʋ Bulu ánɩ́ alapʋ tumiá igyi alɩ ha anyankpʋsa.
Mateo Tɩ
(Marko 2:13-17; Luka 5:27-32)
9Brɛá Yesu lɔpʋ ɔyɔ a, olowun lampoo ɔhɔpʋ ɔkʋá bʋtɛtɩ mʋ Mateo tsie lampoo ɔhɔkpa. Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Bobuo mɩ.”
Ɩnʋnʋ Mateo lɔkʋsʋ buo mʋ.
10Mateo lɛtɩ Yesu mʋa mʋ akasɩpʋ atɔ ogyikpa mʋ woyitɔ. Lampoo ahɔpʋ pʋ́ lakpan abwɛpʋ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛba atɔ amʋ ogyikpa. 11Farisifɔ amʋ benya wun amʋ́ alɩ, bɛfɩtɛ mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ mlɩ osunapʋ mʋa aha anfɩ odu bʋtɔwa ɩbɩ gyi atɔ?”
12Yesu lonu asʋn anfɩ, ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Alɔpʋ lehian ɩlɔ ɔtsapʋ, megyi aha ánɩ́ ɩwɩ bʋ amʋ́ ɔnlɩn. 13Mlɩyɔ amlɩyɛfɩtɛ Bulu asʋn anfɩ bɔwanlɩn tswɩ anfɩ asɩ. Bɛɛ, ‘Nwewun ntekle, megyi igyiha.> Mmɛba aha wanklaan ɔtɩkpa, lakpan abwɛpʋ ɔtɩkpa nɛba.”
Ɔnɔklɩ Ɩwɩ Asʋn Fɩtɛhɛ
(Marko 2:18-22; Luka 5:33-39)
14Ɛkɛ ɔkʋ Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane akasɩpʋ bɛba Yesu wa bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ anɩa Farisifɔ anɩtɛklɩ ɔnɔ, tamɛ fʋ akasɩpʋ mʋ́ bʋtamaklɩ ɔnɔ?”
15Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔtsɩ ɔkpaɩnpʋ anyawieá bʋbʋ mʋ wa bégyi awɩrɛhɔ? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Tamɛ ɛkɛ kʋ bɛ́ba ánɩ́ bɛ́kpa ɔka otsiapʋ amʋ natɩ si amʋ́. Alɩ nkɛ amʋtɔ bɛ́klɩ ɔnɔ nɩ.”
16“Ɔhaa tamapʋ tati pɔpwɛ tan tati dada. Tsufɛ tati pɔpwɛ amʋ bɛkpɩkpɩ tsii dada amʋ kʋ lɛ, ha ɔtankpa ɩnʋ bɛ́latɛɩ tsɩa. 17Alɩ kɛn bʋtamapʋ nta pɔpwɛ wa ɔwʋlʋ-kpakpa kɛntɛ wuhɛtɔ nɩ. Nta pɔpwɛ amʋ ibófu fa kɛntɛ amʋ, tsitsa, ibéyinta kɛntɛ amʋ ɛ. Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔwʋlʋ-kpakpa kɛntɛ pɔpwɛtɔ bʋtɔpʋ nta pɔpwɛ wa, mɛnɩ mʋ́ anyɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bétsia.”
Ɔhandɛ Ɔkʋ Mʋ Bi Mʋa Ɔtsɩ Ɔkʋ Ɩlɔ Tsa
(Marko 5:21-43; Luka 8:40-56)
18Brɛá Yesu dɛtɔɩ a, Yudafɔ ofiakpa ɔhandɛ ɔkʋ lɛba bɛda akpawunu mʋ ayabitɔ, kokoli mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ bi tsɩhɛ lawu seseesei, tamɛ ba afʋbɔpʋ ɩbɩ dɩnka mʋsʋ onya nkpa.”
19Mʋ́ sʋ Yesu lɔkʋsʋ, mʋa mʋ akasɩpʋ bobuo ɔhandɛ amʋ.
20Ɔtsɩ ɔkʋá obugya dɛ mʋ wʋlɩ nfi duanyɔ nɩ lɔtsʋn yɔ Yesu ɔma, pʋ ɩbɩ da mʋ tati osiebi. 21Tsufɛ ɔlɛblɩ wa mʋ nwuntɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ nɔpʋ ɩbɩ da mʋ tati kpan a, ɩlɔ bési mɩ.”
22Yesu lɛdamli kɩ mʋ, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ bi, klʋn ɩdɩ fʋ asɩ. Fʋ hogyi latsa fʋ ɩlɔ.” Ɩnʋnʋ ɔtsɩ amʋ ɩwɩ lɔwa mʋ ɔnlɩn.
23Brɛá olowie ɔhandɛ amʋ woyitɔ a, olowun ɩkpɛ afʋlɩpʋ, nu awɩrɛhɔ agyipʋ amʋ okitikiti. 24Olegya amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩdalɩ nfɩ! Otsibi amʋ mɔkʋwu, dɩdɩ ɔdɛ.” Aha amʋ bɔmɔsɩ mʋ. 25Brɛá amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛdalɩ ba wunsɩnɛsʋ a, Yesu lebitiwie obu amʋʋ otsibi amʋ da mʋ́tɔ amʋtɔ yɛkɩta mʋ ɩbɩ, ɔlɔkʋsʋ. 26Asʋn anfɩ lɛklɛɩ wa ɔmá amʋtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
Ansibi Abwiepʋ Ɩlɔ Tsa
27Yesu lɛdalɩ ɔyɔ a, ansibi abwiepʋ abanyɔ akʋ bobuo mʋ, bʋdɛ okitikiti sʋra kpoli mʋ bɛɛ, “Owie Dawid mʋ na, wun anɩ nwɛ!”
28Brɛá olowie-woyitɔ a, ansibi abwiepʋ amʋ bɛba mʋ wa. Yesu lɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩlahogyi mlɩaa, nɛ́talɩ ha mlɩ ansibi bóbwii?”
Bɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ bɛɛ, “Anɩ Wie, Ee!”
29Mʋʋ ɔlɔpʋ ɩbɩ dada amʋ́ ansibi, bla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɩba mʋ́tɔ ha mlɩ, mlɩ hogyi ɔnɔ.” 30Ɩnʋ bɔwa atɔ wun bɩ. Yesu lɛda amʋ́ ɔla ɔbɛɛ, bʋmábla ɔhaa.
31Tamɛ brɛá bɛdalɩ bɔyɔ a, bɛda mʋ ɔkan ɔmá amʋ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
Omumu Ɩlɔ Tsa
32Benya natɩ alɩ, bɔpʋ oyin ɔkʋá ɔŋɛ lalahɛ bʋ mʋtɔ, sʋ alatɔ omumu ba Yesu. 33Olenya gya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ amʋ lɛ oyin amʋtɔ alɩ, ɔlɔwa tɔɩ bɩ. Aha amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bowun, sʋ ɔnɔ lobwie amʋ́. Mʋ́ sʋ bɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Anɩmɔkʋwun ɩnɩ odu Israelfɔtɔ kɩ!”
34Farisifɔ amʋ bɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Ɔŋɛ lalahɛ owie tumi ɔdɛpʋgya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ lɛ ahatɔ.”
Aha Nwewun
35Yesu leki awulu pʋ́ nkuda fɛ́ɛ́ asɩ, suna atɔ Yudafɔ ofiakpa. Ɔlɛda Bulu iwiegyi amʋ ɩwɩ asʋn wanklaan ɔkan, ɔlɛtsa ɩlɔ kugyikʋ fɛ́ɛ́. 36Brɛá olowun ɔdɔm amʋ a, amʋ́ asʋn lɔwa mʋ nwɛ. Bʋgyi fɛ akufa ánɩ́ bʋma ɔkpapʋ, tsufɛ asʋn dɛ amʋ́ han, bʋma tɔtɔ bwɛtɔ. 37Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛbla mʋ akasɩpʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Atɔ kpɔtɩhɛ amʋ ɩtsɔ, tamɛ mʋ́ akpɔtɩpʋ bʋmɔtsɔ. 38Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩkokoli ndɔ mʋ wie, ɔwa atɔ akpɔtɩpʋ tsɔtsɔ abʋba bɔkpɔtɩ atɔ amʋ.”

Title: MATEO 10
Content:
Akasɩpʋ Amʋ Ada
(Marko 3:13-19; Luka 6:12-16; 9:1-6)
1Yesu lɛtɩ mʋ akasɩpʋ duanyɔ amʋ, ɔlɛha amʋ́ tumi ánɩ́ bʋgyi ɔŋɛ lalahɛsʋ. Bʋgya amʋ́ lɛ ahatɔ, abʋtsa ɩlɔ mʋ́a ɩwɩɔsɩn kugyikʋ. 2Sumbi ayɔpʋ duanyɔ amʋ ada nɩ: Ogyankpapʋ gyi Simon ánɩ́ bʋtɛtɩ mʋ Petro mʋa mʋ pio Andrea. Yakobo mʋa mʋ pio Yohane ánɩ́ bʋgyi Sebedeo abi; 3Filipo, Bartolomeo, Toma, lampoo ɔhɔpʋ Mateo, Alfeo mʋ bi Yakobo, Tadeo, 4Simon ánɩ́ ogyi ɩwɩsʋtsia adunkapʋ ɔpasuatɔ ɔha pʋ́ Yuda Iskariot ánɩ́ ɔlɛlɛ Yesu ha.
Akasɩpʋ Duanyɔ Amʋ Sumbiwa
(Marko 6:7-13; Luka 9:1-6)
5Ɔlɔwa sumbi ayɔpʋ duanyɔ amʋ sɩsɩ, wa mbla ha amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩmáyɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ ɔsʋlʋ pʋ́ Samariafɔ awulu kʋkʋsʋ. 6Mboun mlɩyɔ Israelfɔ wa. Bʋgyi fɛ akufa ánɩ́ bafwɩ. 7Nɩ mlɔyɔ a, mlɩda asʋn amʋ ɔkan mlɩaa, ‘Bulu iwiegyi amʋ lawie woyi ta.> 8Mlɩtsa ɩlɔ, amlɩtsinki afuli. Mlɩtsa ɩlɔ pɛpɛ alɔpʋ, amlɩgya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ lɛ ahatɔ. Mlɩmáhɔ amʋ́ tɔtɔ. Mlɩbwɛ mʋ́ pʋkie amʋ́, fɛ alɩá napʋkie mlɩ. 9Mlɩmátsu sika kʋkʋʋkʋ wa mlɩ akɛntɛtɔ. 10Mlɩmátsu akpankogyo ánɩ́ mlɔ́pʋ atɔ wa mʋ́tɔ ha ɔkpa amʋ tu. Mlɩmátsu atadɩɛ nyɔsɩ, ntʋkʋta pʋ́ oyi yiahɛ. Tsufɛ agyʋma ɔyɔpʋ bʋtɛha atogyihɛ.
11“Nɩ mlɔyɔswɩɩ wulu kugyikʋsʋ a, mlɩdunka ɔha wanklaan, amlɩswɩɩ mʋ wa. Mlɩtsia ɩnʋ kpɛfʋn ɛkɛá mlɛ́natɩ. 12-13Nɩ mlowie-woyitɔ ɩnʋ a, mlɩha amʋ́ itsia mlɩaa, ‘Bulu ɔha mlɩ iwilwii.> Nɩ woyi amʋtɔfɔ bɔhɔ mlɩ a, mlɩ oyula amʋ isin amʋ́sʋ. Tamɛ nɩ bʋmɔhɔ mlɩ a, mʋmʋ mlɩ oyula amʋ ɩsanki ba mlɩsʋ. 14Nɩ bʋmɔhɔ mlɩ, ntɛ nu mlɩ asʋn a, mlɩdalɩ woyi ntɛ wulu amʋtɔ, amlɩkpakpa mlɩ ayabitɔ-ɩsɩ wʋlɩ ɩnʋ. 15Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, Bulu ɔbɛ́bɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ dʋn Sodom mʋ́a Gomorafɔ mʋ asʋn ogyikɛ amʋ.”
Ɩwɩɔsɩn Ánɩ́ Ɩbɛ́ba Sumbi Ayɔpʋ Amʋsʋ
(Marko 13:9-13; Luka 21:12-17)
16Ɔlɛtra bla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩbɩá ndɛ mlɩ wa fɛ akufa ánɩ́ bɔyɔ nkpatakutɔ. Mlɩfwifwi ansɩ fɛ awɔ, amlɩha mlɩ ɩwɩ ɩtɩn fɛ alɔpɔ. 17Mlɩkɩ mlɩ ɩwɩ wanklaan anyankpʋsasʋ. Tsufɛ bɛ́kɩta mlɩ yaa asʋn ogyikpa, nwɛn mlɩ atɔ amʋ́ ofiakpa. 18Mɩ sʋ bɛ́kpa mlɩ ya ɔmásʋ agyipʋ pʋ́ awie ansɩtɔ, mɛnɩ mlégyi mɩ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ suna amʋ́a ɔmátɔfɔ. 19Nɩ bɛkɩta mlɩ ya a, mlɩmágywɩɩn asʋn ánɩ́ mlɛ́blɩ pʋ́ alɩá mlɛ́lɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ. Bɔ́pʋ asʋn ánɩ́ mlɛ́blɩ brɛ amʋtɔ wa mlɩ ɔnɔ. 20Tsufɛ megyi mlɩ ɔbɔ́tɔɩ. Mlɩ Sɩ Ɔŋɛ amʋ ɔbɔ́tɔɩ tsʋn mlɩsʋ.
21“Apio bɛ́lɛ amʋ́ apio ha lowu. Abi asɩ bɛ́lɛ amʋ́ abi ha. Abi ɛ bɔ́kʋsʋ lɩɩ amʋ́ akwɩɩpʋsʋ, ha bɔ́mɔ amʋ́. 22Mɩ sʋ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bólu mlɩ, tamɛ nɩ mlɛ́talɩ wa klʋn lɩɩ kinkiinkin yɔfʋn mʋ́ ɔnɔmɔ a, Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mlɩ nkpa. 23Nɩ bʋdɩn mlɩsʋ wulu kʋtɔ a, mlɩsrɩ yɔ wulu bambatɔ. Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Mlɩméeki Israel awulu amʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ ta asa mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ néyinki ba.
24“Ɔkasɩpʋ tamadʋn mʋ osunapʋ. Osumpʋ ɛ tamadʋn mʋ wie. 25Ɩbɔ́wa alɛ nɩ ɔkasɩpʋ ɔbɔ́bwɛ fɛ mʋ osunapʋ, osumpʋ ɛ ɔbɔ́bwɛ fɛ mʋ wie. Nɩ batalɩ bʋdɛ woyi mʋ wie amʋ tɩ bɛɛ, ‘Ɔbʋnsam> ntɛ ‘Beelsebul> a, mʋmʋ ɩda lalahɛ mɔmʋ bʋmɔ́ɔpʋtɩ mʋ woyitɔ atsiapʋ mʋ́?
Ɔha Ánɩ́ Abénya Ifu
(Luka 12:2-7)
26“Tamɛ mlɩmánya ifu. Tɔtɔ má ɩnʋá babun atɔ mʋ́sʋ ánɩ́ Bulu móobwii mʋ́sʋ. Togyitɔ ɛ ma ɩnʋá ileŋain ánɩ́ ɩmɛ́ɛlɩn ɔwan. 27Nɩ nɛlɛ atɔ suna mlɩ onye a, mlɩkplʋn blɩ mʋ́ ɔpa. Mlɩda asʋn ánɩ́ nɛbla mlɩ nklobitɔ ɛ ɔkan. 28Mlɩmánya nyankpʋsa ifu. Ɔbɛ́talɩ mɔ mlɩ ɔyʋlʋ, tamɛ ɔmɛ́ɛtalɩ mɔ mlɩ ɔkla. Mboun ɔha ánɩ́ mlɩnya ifu gyi Bulu. Mʋ ɔbɛ́talɩ yinta ɔyʋlʋ mʋ́a ɔkla amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩsʋbɩtɩ ogya ánɩ́ ɩtamaduntɔ. 29Megyi kaplɛ bʋtɛfɛ akensire anyɔ kɛkɛ? Tamɛ amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋkʋ tamakpada ɔsʋlʋtɔ ánɩ́ mlɩ Sɩ amʋ meyin mʋ́ ɩwɩ. 30Tsufɛ Bulu yin mlɩ nwunsʋ-imi kʋraa klatɔ. 31Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmánya ifu, tsufɛ mlɩbʋ ibia dʋn akensire tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ.”
Adansɩɛgyi Pʋ́ Asʋnkina
(Luka 12:8-9)
32“Nɩ ɔkʋ lɛtalɩ gyi mɩ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ ahatɔ a, mɩ ɛ négyi mʋ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ suna mɩ Sɩ ɔsʋsʋ. 33Tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ lekina mɩ ahatɔ a, mɩ ɛ nékina mʋ mɩ Sɩ ansɩtɔ ɔsʋsʋ.
Ipian Yesu Lɔpʋba, Megyi Iwilwii
(Luka 12:51-53; 14:26-27)
