34“Ɩmábwɛ mlɩ fɛ iwilwii nɔpʋba ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ. Megyi iwilwii, mboun ɔdayi ɩya anyɔ nɔpʋba. 35Tsufɛ abi yinhɛ mʋ́a amʋ́ asɩ nsɩnɛ béyinta. Abi tsɩhɛ mʋ́a amʋ́ ayin ɛ nsɩnɛ béyinta. Osia tsɩhɛ mʋ́a mʋ sia tsɩhɛnyɔ ɛ nsɩnɛ béyinta. 36Ɔha alupʋ bótsu mʋ woyitɔ.
37“Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔdwɛ mʋ sɩ ntɛ mʋ yin dʋn mɩ mɔfʋn ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mɩ ɔkasɩpʋ. Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔdwɛ mʋ bi tsɩhɛ, ntɛ mʋ bi yinhɛ dʋn mɩ ɛ mɔfʋn ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mɩ ɔkasɩpʋ. 38Ɔha ánɩ́ omotsu mʋ oyikpalihɛ bobuo mɩ ɛ mɔfʋn ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mɩ ɔkasɩpʋ. 39Nɩ ɔkʋ lɛprɩ mʋ nkpa a, ɔbɔ́hʋlɩ mʋ́. Nɩ ɔkʋ ɛ lɔhʋlɩ mʋ nkpa mɩ sʋ a, obénya mʋ́.
Yilebwɛ Ɩwɩ Ɩkɔka
(Marko 9:41)
40“Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔhɔ mlɩ lahɔ mɩ. Nɩ ɔkʋ lɔhɔ mɩ ɛ a, alahɔ mɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔlɔwa mɩ amʋ. 41Nɩ fɔhɔ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ ɔfɔɔ a, Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ oyula fénya. Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔhɔ yile ɔbwɛpʋ ɛ ɔfɔɔ obénya yile ɔbwɛpʋ oyula. 42Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɛha mɩ akasɩpʋtɔ ɔkʋsʋ kʋraa ntsu-owebi ɔbɔ olonun a, ɔmɔ́ɔhʋlɩ mʋ ɩpan.”

Title: MATEO 11
Content:
Yesu Mʋa Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane
(Luka 7:18-35)
1Brɛá Yesu lɔpʋ agyʋma anfɩ wa mʋ akasɩpʋ duanyɔ amʋ ɩbɩtɔ ta a, ɔlɔyɔ yeki Galilea awulusʋ, suna aha atɔ, da asʋn amʋ ɛ ɔkan.
2-3Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane da obu, olonu Kristo bwɛhɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔwa mʋ akasɩpʋ abanyɔ sɩsɩ Yesu ɔbɛɛ, bʋyɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Fʋgyi ɔha amʋʋ ɔbɛ́ba amʋ nɩ, ntɛ akɩ ɔha bamba ɔkpa?”
4Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩyinki yɛbla Yohane asʋn ánɩ́ mlɩlabonu pʋ́ atɔá mlɩlabowun. 5Mlɩlabowun ánɩ́ ansibi abwiepʋ bʋdɛ atɔ wun, abɔ bʋna. Ɩlɔ pɛpɛ alɔpʋ ɩwɩ dɛplɩ. Ɩsʋ atinpʋ bʋdɛ asʋn nu. Afuli bʋdetsinki, ahianfɔ ɛ bʋdɛ asʋn wanklaan amʋ nu. 6Bulu obóyula ɔha ánɩ́ mɩ bwɛhɛ ɩmɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ mʋsʋ.”
7Brɛá Yohane akasɩpʋ amʋ beyinki bɔyɔ a, Yesu lɔwa tɔɩ tsu Yohane ɩwɩ suna ɔdɔm amʋ bɩ. Ɔbɛɛ, “Brɛá mlɩlɛdalɩ yɔ ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ ɩnʋ a, ntɔ ɔkɩkpa mlɩlɔyɔ? Fɩta ánɩ́ afu dɛ mʋ́ tsʋn loo? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! 8Nɩ megyi mʋ́ a, ntɔ koun ɔkɩkpa mlɩlɔyɔ? Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɩdɩ ntsrim? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Awie woyi atati amʋ odu adɩdapʋ bʋtetsia. 9Mlɩbla mɩ! Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ mlɩlɛdalɩ yɛkɩ? Ee, Yohane nɩ. Ɔdʋn Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ. 10Mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn Bulu lɛblɩ bɔwanlɩn mʋ́ tswɩ bɛɛ, ‘Kɩ, ndɛ obi wa gya fʋ nkpa. Mʋ ɔbɛ́la ɔkpa ha fʋ nɩ.> 11Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔha tsɩhɛ lakɛn kwɩɩ mɔfʋn Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane, tamɛ mʋ ɛ ɔmɔfʋn Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ ɔkʋsʋ kʋraa. 12Tsu Yohane brɛsʋ bɔtʋ ndɛ a, aha bʋdɛ Bulu iwiegyi amʋ prɩ ɔwʋnlɩnsʋ. Awʋnlɩnpʋ bʋdɛ mʋ́ prɩ. 13Tsufɛ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ amʋ pʋ́ Mose Mbla ánɩ́ ɩda bɔfʋn Yohanesʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔtɔɩ tsu Bulu iwiegyi amʋ ɩwɩ. 14Nɩ mlɔ́hɔ asʋn amʋ gyi a, mʋmʋ mlɛ́bɩ ánɩ́ mʋgyi Elia. Mʋ ɔbɛ́ba nɩ. 15Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ asʋ onu.
16“Sei anfɩ a, amɛndɩ nɔ́pʋ ndɛmba-abi anfɩ kapʋ? Bʋgyi fɛ nyebiá bʋtsie dɩnsʋ bʋdɛ aba kpoli, 17blɩ bɛɛ, ‘Anɩlaplei ansigyisʋ, mlɩmɛtsa. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩlala wa awɩrɛhɔ ɩlʋ, tamɛ mlɩmosu.> 18Mlɩgyi fɛ nyebi anfɩ, tsufɛ Yohane lɛba a, oletsia klɩ ɔnɔ, omonun nta, tamɛ mlɩaa, ‘Ɔŋɛ lalahɛ bʋ mʋtɔ!> 19Tamɛ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ mʋ́ naba ndɛ atɔ gyi, ndɛ nta nun. Mʋ́ ɛ mlɩaa, ‘Mlɩkɩ opotsuapʋ pʋ́ nta ɔbʋpʋ, lakpan abwɛpʋ pʋ́ lampoo ahɔpʋ onyawie.> Tamɛ Bulu ɔha tsiatɔ tɛlɛ mʋ nyansa ɔwan.”
Aha Ánɩ́ Bʋmɛdamli Klʋntɔ Asʋngyi
(Luka 10:13-15)
20Yesu lɔpʋ ɔblɔ tɔɩ tsu awulu akʋ ɩwɩ. Awulu amʋá ɔlɔbwɛ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩ mʋ́tɔ, tamɛ bʋmɛdamli klʋntɔ amʋ. 21Ɔbɛɛ, “Korasinfɔ, mlɩgyɔwɩ. Betsaidafɔ, mlɩgyɔwɩ nɩ. Nɩ Tiro pʋ́ Sidon awulu lalahɛ amʋtɔ nɔbwɛ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩ anfɩ nɔbwɛ mlɩtɔ a, tɛkɩ bɛdamli klʋntɔ dodoodo. Tɛkɩ bʋda akpekpetɔ, bakpa nsuo wa nwuntɔ pʋsuna ánɩ́ badamli klʋntɔ. 22Mlɩbɩá Bulu ɔbɛ́bɩtɩ mlɩ ɩsʋ mʋ asʋn ogyikɛ dʋn Tiro mʋ́a Sidonfɔ. 23Mlɩ Kapernaumfɔ, mlɩdekle mlɩaa mlotsu ɩwɩ fʋa alɩɩ yɔwɔ ɔsʋsʋ? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Bulu ɔbɛ́ba mlɩ asɩ yowie afulitɔ. Tsufɛ nɩ Sodom wulutɔ nɔbwɛ ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩ anfɩ odu a, tɛkɩ wulu amʋ ɩtra bʋ ɩnʋ bɔtʋ ndɛ. 24Mlɩkaɩn ánɩ́ Bulu obówun Sodomfɔ nwɛ asʋn ogyikɛ amʋ dʋn mlɩ.”
Mlɩbɛda Ɔkpʋnʋ Mɩ Wa
(Luka 10:21-22)
25Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, Yesu lɔbɔ mpaɩ blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Sɩ, ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ Owie! Nɛda fʋ ɩpan ánɩ́ falɛ tɔá fɔpʋŋain anyansapʋ pʋ́ asʋn abɩpʋ ɔwan suna aha ánɩ́ bʋmeyin ɔlala, bʋgyi fɛ nyebi. 26Ee, Mɩ Sɩ! Alɩ fʋdekle fɛɛ ɩba mʋ́tɔ nɩ.”
27“Mɩ Sɩ lɔpʋ togyitɔ wa mɩ ɩbɩtɔ. Ɔhaa meyin Obi amʋ, nkɛtɩ Ɔsɩ amʋ nkʋlɛ. Ɔhaa meyin Ɔsɩ amʋ ɛ, nkɛtɩ Obi amʋ pʋ́ ɔha ánɩ́ Obi amʋ latsula ánɩ́ ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ suna.”
28“Mlɩba mɩ wa, mlɩ aha ánɩ́ ɩlapian mlɩ, mlɩ atɔ sʋrahɛ dɛ mlɩ dʋn. Nɛ́ha mlɛ́da ɔkpʋnʋ. 29Mlɩba ɩwɩasɩ ha mɩ, amlɩsuan mɩ, tsufɛ nɛba ɩwɩasɩ, nolwii, mɛnɩ mlénya iwilwii. 30Tsufɛ mɩ wa tsia ɩbʋ atsialɛ. Mɩ atɔ sʋrahɛ ɛ mɔ́ɔdʋn mlɩ sʋra.”

Title: MATEO 12
Content:
Ɔkpʋnʋ Ɔdakɛ Mʋ Wie
(Marko 2:23-28; Luka 6:1-5)
1Yesu mʋa mʋ akasɩpʋ bɔtsʋn ayo ndɔ kʋtɔ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ. Akʋn dɛ akasɩpʋ amʋ, sʋ bɔpʋsa ayo amʋ kʋ wɩ. 2Farisifɔ akʋ bowun amʋ́, bɛbla Yesu bɛɛ, “Kɩ, fʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bʋdɛ tɔá mbla mɛha ɔkpa bwɛ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ!”
3Yesu lɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩmɔkʋkla nu tɔá Owie Dawid lɔbwɛ brɛá akʋn dɛ mʋa mʋ abuopʋ kɩ? 4Olebitiwie Bulu osumkpa yotsu bodobodoá bapʋha Bulu igyi ba, mʋa mʋ abuopʋ amʋ begyi. Bulu igyi ahapʋ nkʋlɛ bɛha ɔkpa, bʋtegyi alɩ bodobodo amʋ. 5Mlɩlakla Mose Mbla, nu ánɩ́ Bulu igyi ahapʋ amʋ bʋtɔyɔ agyʋma Bulu ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ, tamɛ bʋtamaha amʋ́ ɩpɔn. 6Ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdʋn Bulu ɔtswɛkpa amʋ bʋ nfɩ a. 7Bulu asʋn lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Nwewun ntekle, megyi igyiha.> Nɩ mlɩyin mʋ́ asɩ a, tɛkɩ mlɩmɛ́ɛha aha anfɩ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa anfɩ ɩpɔn. 8Tsufɛ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ gyi ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ mʋ wie nɩ.”
Ɩlɔtsa Ɔkpʋnʋ Ɔdakɛ
(Marko 3:1-6; Luka 6:6-11)
9Yesu lɛnatɩ ɩnʋ, ɔlɔyɔ Yudafɔ ofiakpa. 10Olowun oyin ɔkʋá mʋ ɩbɩ kʋlɛ lawu ɩnʋ. Farisifɔ amʋ bʋdɛ Yesu tɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Mbla lɛha ɔkpa ánɩ́ bʋtsa ɩlɔ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ?”
11Mʋʋ Yesu lɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋ bʋ kufa, alakpada wie ibuntɔ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ a, ɔmɛ́ɛlɛ mʋ? 12Yɛ nyankpʋsa bʋ labi dʋn kufa a? Mʋ́ sʋ mbla lɛha ɔkpa ánɩ́ ɔha ɔbɔ́bwɛ yile ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ.” 13Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla oyin amʋʋ mʋ ɩbɩ lawu amʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Tɩnkɩ fʋ ɩbɩ amʋ.”
Olenya tɩnkɩ mʋ́ alɩ pɛ, ɔŋɛ lowie mʋ́tɔ fɛ nyɔsɩ amʋ. 14Tamɛ mʋ́ o a, Farisifɔ amʋ bɛdalɩ yɛkɩta agywɩɩn alɩá bɔ́bwɛ bɔ́mɔ Yesu.
Osumbiá Bulu Lɛlɛ
15Yesu lɛbɩ amʋ́ agywɩɩn. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛnatɩ ɩnʋ. Ɔdɔm bobuo mʋ, ɔlɛtsa amʋ́tɔ alɔpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩlɔ. 16Mʋʋ ɔlɛda amʋ́ ɔla ɔbɛɛ, bʋmáha aha abʋbɩ mʋ. 17Ɩnɩ lɛha asʋn amʋʋ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yesaia lɛblɩ yaɩ amʋ lɛba mʋ́tɔ nɩ. 18Ɔbɛɛ,
“Kɩ, mɩ osumpʋá nalɛ nɩ.
Ntɔdwɛ mʋ, mɩ ansɩ tegyi mʋ ɩwɩ.
Nɔ́pʋ mɩ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ wa mʋtɔ.
Ɔbɛ́bla ɔmátɔfɔ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Négyi amʋ́ asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.>
19Oméegyi nwɛn, ɔmɔ́ɔkplʋn.
Ɔhaa móonu mʋ ɔnɔ brɔnʋsʋ.
20Obénya klʋn ha aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ hogyi ɔnɔ ma ɔnlɩn,
babwɛ fɛ oyiá ɩlata bia ta.
Ɔbɔ́wa awɩtɔlɛ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋma ɔwʋnlɩn,
babwɛ fɛ ɔkandɩɛá nfɔ lata mʋ́tɔ,
yɔfʋn brɛá bɛ́bɩ ánɩ́ ntegyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.
21Aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ bɔ́pʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋsʋ.”
Yesu Mʋa Beelsebul
(Marko 3:20-30; Luka 11:14-23)
22Ɩnʋ bɔpʋ oyin ɔkʋ ba Yesu, ɔŋɛ lalahɛ bʋ mʋtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩlɛha mʋ ansibi lobwie; alatɔ omumu ɛ. Yesu lɛtsa mʋ ɩlɔ, ɔdɛ atɔ wun, ɔdɛtɔɩ ɛ. 23Ɔnɔ lobwie aha amʋ fɛ́ɛ́, bɛfɩtɛ bɛɛ, “Megyi Dawid mʋ na amʋ nɩ?”
24Tamɛ Farisifɔ amʋ bonu asʋn anfɩ a, bɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Ɔŋɛ lalahɛ owie Beelsebul tumi ɔdɛpʋgya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ lɛ ahatɔ.”
25Yesu lɛbɩ amʋ́ agywɩɩn. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Iwie ogyikpa ánɩ́ ɩlaye anyɔ, bʋdɛ aba kɔ bɛ́dɩda. Alɩ kɛn wulu ntɛ woyi oduá mʋ́tɔ atsiapʋ bʋdɛ aba kɔ ɛ itobwie nɩ. 26Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ Ɔbʋnsam dɛ mʋ ɩwɩ gya a, mʋ iwiegyi bɛ́dɩda. 27Nɩ Beelsebul tumi ndɛpʋgya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ lɛ ahatɔ a, mʋmʋ ma tumi mlɩ abi ɛ bʋdɛpʋgya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ lɛ ahatɔ? Mlɩ abi amʋ onuto obégyi mlɩ asʋn. 28Tamɛ ɩnɩá Bulu Ɔŋɛ ndɛpʋgya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ sʋ a, mlɩbɩá Bulu iwiegyi amʋ laba mlɩ wa dodo.”
29Ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ wie ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ woyitɔ yɛkʋla mʋ atɔ, nkɛtɩ alagyankpa kɩklɩ mʋ tswɩ, asa ɔbɛ́talɩ kʋla mʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́.
30Ɔha ánɩ́ omobuo mɩ dɛ mɩ lu. Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔmɛdɛ mɩ tsa akpa aha ba Bulu ɛ dɛ amʋ́ gya tɛɩa mɩ. 31Ɩnɩ sʋ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, Bulu obési aha lakpan pʋ́ abususʋ kugyikʋ kie amʋ́. Tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ ɔblɩ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ ɩwɩ abususʋ a, Bulu méesikie mʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 32Nɩ ɔkʋ lɛblɩ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ɛ ɩwɩ asʋn lalahɛ a, Bulu ɔbɛ́talɩ sikie mʋ. Tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ lɛblɩ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ ɩwɩ asʋn lalahɛ mʋ́ a, Bulu méesikie ɔha amʋ ndɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ, ntɛ brɛ amʋʋ ɩba amʋtɔ.
Tsiatɔ Itsu Ɩklʋntɔ
(Luka 6:43-45)
33Oyi abi bʋtɔpʋbɩ mʋ́. Oyi wanklaan toswie abi wanklaan. Oyi lalahɛ ɛ toswie abi lalahɛ. 34Mlɩ awɔ abi-aná! Nkalɩ mlɩ aha lalahɛ mlɛtalɩ blɩ asʋn wanklaan? Tsufɛ tɔá ɩdʋn ɔha klʋn a, mʋ́tɛdalɩ tsu mʋ ɔnɔ. 35Ɔha wanklaan tɛblɩ asʋn wanklaan tsu mʋ klʋntɔ, ɔha lalahɛ ɛ tɛblɩ asʋn lalahɛ tsu mʋ klʋntɔ.
36Ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɛ́lɛ asʋn lalahɛ kugyikʋá ɔlɛblɩ ɔnɔ Bulu asʋn ogyikɛ amʋ. 37Tsufɛ ɔha asʋn blɩhɛ Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋha mʋ asʋ ntɛ ɩpɔn.
Bodunka Ofula
(Marko 8:11-12; Luka 11:29-32)
38Mʋʋ Farisifɔ pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ amʋ akʋ bɛbla Yesu bɛɛ, “Osunapʋ, anɩdekle anɩaa fʋbwɛ osuna kʋ suna anɩ.”
39Ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ “Mlɩ ndɛmba-abi lalahɛá mlɩladalɩ Bulu ɔma. Mlɩdɛ osuna dunka amlɩwun, tamɛ mlɩmóowun kʋkʋʋkʋ dʋn Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yona osuna amʋ. 40Alɩ amʋʋ Yona letsia bonsu ɩwɩtɔ nkɛnsa, ɔpa mʋ́a onye amʋ a, alɩ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ɛ nétsia ɔsʋlʋ ɔtɔtɔ nkɛnsa, ɔpa mʋ́a onye nɩ. 41Niniwefɔ ɛ bɔ́kʋsʋ Bulu asʋn ogyikɛ amʋ, ha mlɩ ndɛmba-abi anfɩ ɩpɔn. Tsufɛ brɛá Yona lɛda Bulu asʋn ɔkan suna amʋ́ a, bɛdamli klʋntɔ ba Bulu wa. Mlɩkɩ, ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdʋn Yona onuto lɩɩ nfɩ a. 42Seba owie tsɩhɛ ɔbɔ́kʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulu asʋn ogyikɛ, ha mlɩ ndɛmba-abi anfɩ ɩpɔn. Tsufɛ olotsu ɔsasɩ ɔmá ɩkʋtɔ kein gya ɔkpa ba, bonu Salomo nyansa atosunahɛ. Mlɩkɩ, ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdʋn Salomo lɩɩ nfɩ a.”
Ɔŋɛ Lalahɛ Yinki Ba Ɔhatɔ
(Luka 11:24-26)
43“Nɩ ɔŋɛ lalahɛ ɩdalɩ ɔhatɔ a, iteyeki ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ dunka ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa, tamɛ ɩtamanya. 44Ɩnʋ ɩtɛblɩ ánɩ́ ibéyinki yɔ mʋ́ woyi dadatɔ. Nɩ ɩsanki yɔ a, itowun ánɩ́ bafɛɩ mʋ́tɔ, la mʋ́tɔ wanklaan, ɩda kpan. 45Iteyinki yɛkpa mʋ́ aba asienɔ ánɩ́ bʋtɔbwɛ lalahɛ dʋn mʋ́, bʋtɛba betsia ɩnʋ. Ɩnʋ ɔha amʋ tsiatɔ teyinta dʋn alɩá igyi yaɩ. Alɩ ɩbɛ́ba ha mlɩ ndɛmba-abi lalahɛ anfɩ nɩ.”
Yesu Abusuanfɔ Onuto
(Marko 3:31-35; Luka 8:19-21)
46Brɛá Yesu tra ɔdɛ aha amʋ asʋn bla a, mʋ yin mʋa mʋ apio bɛba bɛlɩɩ kpankpa, bʋdedunka ánɩ́ bɛ́bla mʋ asʋn. 47Aha amʋtɔ ɔkʋ lɛbla Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Kɩ, fʋ yin mʋa fʋ apio bʋlɩɩ kpankpa. Bʋdɛ fʋ dunka, abʋbla fʋ asʋn.”
48Mʋʋ Yesu lɛfɩtɛ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Amɛndɩ gyi mɩ yin mʋ́a mɩ apio?” 49Ɩnʋ ɔlɛtɩnkɩ ɩbɩ sɩsɩ mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ, blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩkɩ, mɩ yin mʋ́a mɩ apio gyi aha anfɩ a. 50Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔbwɛ mɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ apɛ a, mʋgyi mɩ yin mʋ́a mɩ pio nɩ.”

Title: MATEO 13
Content:
Atɔ-abi Owunyapʋ Ɩwɩ Yebi
(Marko 4:1-9; Luka 8:4-8)
1Ɛkɛ amʋ kɛn a, Yesu lɛdalɩ tsu woyitɔ yetsia ɔpʋ ɔnɔ. 2Ɔdɔm kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ bɛba befia bomli mʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔdʋ wie ɔklʋntɔ, yetsia ɔpʋ amʋsʋ, aha amʋ ɛ bʋlɩɩ ɔpʋ ɔnɔ ɩnʋ. 3Ɩnʋ olosuna amʋ́ atɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ayebitɔ ɔbɛɛ,
“Ɔdɔtɔpʋ ɔkʋ lɔyɔ atɔ-abi owunyakpa. 4Brɛá ɔdɛ mʋ́ wunya a, ɩkʋ lɔwʋlɩ ɔkpatɔ, mbubwi bɛba bɔtswɛtswɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́. 5Ɩkʋ ɛ lɔwʋlɩ abʋtasʋ, ɔtɩnɛá ɩsɩ kpalobi dɩn. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩlɔwa ɔsa kwɛ, 6tamɛ brɛá owi lɛlɩn a, ɩlɔtɔ mʋ́ mɔ, tsufɛ mʋ́ nlin mɔyɔ ɔtɔtɔ. 7Abi amʋ kʋ lobun awutɔ, awu amʋ lɔbʋla kɩta mʋ́. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩmɛdan. 8Tamɛ abi amʋ kʋ ɛ lobun ɔsʋlʋ wanklaansʋ, ɩlɔkwɛ, dan, swie abi. Ɩkʋ lafa (100), ɩkʋ aduesie (60), ɩkʋ ɛ adʋasa (30).”
9Yesu lɔmɔ mʋ asʋn ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ asʋ onu!”
Tɔá Sʋá Yesu Lɔtɔɩ Ayebisʋ
(Marko 4:10-12; Luka 8:9-10)
10Mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛba bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛ amʋ́ asʋn bla ayebisʋ?”
11Mʋʋ ɔlɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩ mʋ́ a, Bulu laha mlɩ ɔkpa ɔbɛɛ, mlɩbɩ mʋ iwiegyi amʋ ɩwɩ asʋn ŋainhɛ, tamɛ ɔmɛha amʋ́ mʋ́ alɩ. 12Tsufɛ ɔha ánɩ́ odekleá obónu mɩ atosunahɛ amʋ asɩ a, Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋ ɩkʋ tsɩa mʋ́tɔ ha mʋ, mɛnɩ ɔbɛ́tra bɩ tsɩa mʋ́tɔ. Tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ omedekleá obónu mʋ́ asɩ a, Bulu ɔbɔ́swɩɩ mʋ kpalobi amʋʋ alabɩ amʋ kʋraa. 13Tɔá sʋá ndɛ amʋ́ asʋn bla ayebisʋ gyi, bʋdɛ mʋ́ nu, tamɛ bʋmɛdɛ mʋ́ asɩ nu. Bʋdɛ mʋ́ wun, tamɛ bʋmɛdɛ mʋ́ bɩ. 14Aha anfɩ sʋ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yesaia asʋn ánɩ́ ɔlɛblɩ tswɩ laba mʋ́tɔ nɩ. Ɔbɛɛ,
‘Bónu lanu, tamɛ bʋmóonu mʋ́ asɩ.
Bɛ́kɩ lakɩ, tamɛ bʋmóowun mʋ́.
15Tsufɛ amʋ́ agywɩɩn lawu.
Batila asʋ, bun ansibi ɛ.
Ɩnɩ sʋ bʋmóonu, bʋmóowun ɛ.
Nɩ megyi alɩ a, tɛkɩ bówun atɔ,
bónu asʋn, amʋ́ agywɩɩn bóbwii,
bɛ́damli ba mɩ wa, nɛ́tsa amʋ́ ɩlɔ.>
16“Tamɛ mlɩ mʋ́ a, Bulu layula mlɩ. Mlɛ́talɩ pʋ ansibi wun atɔ, pʋ asʋ nu asʋn. 17Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ pʋ́ yile abwɛpʋ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bekleá bɔ́pʋ amʋ́ ansibi wun atɔ anfɩ, abʋpʋ amʋ́ asʋ nu asʋn anfɩ mlɩdenu, tamɛ bʋmenya mʋ́ alɩ.
Atɔ-abi Owunyapʋ Yebi Amʋ Asɩ
(Marko 4:13-20; Luka 8:11-15)
18“Mlɩnu atɔ-abi owunyapʋ yebi amʋ asɩ ngya. 19Aha ánɩ́ bonu Bulu iwiegyi ɩwɩ asʋn amʋ, tamɛ bʋmonu mʋ́ asɩ a, bʋgyi fɛ abi amʋʋ ilobun ɔkpatɔ amʋ. Ɔbʋnsam tɛba bɛlɛ asʋn amʋʋ bodu wa amʋ́ klʋntɔ amʋ natɩ. 20Abi amʋʋ ɩlɔwʋlɩ abʋtasʋ amʋ gyi aha amʋʋ bonu asʋn amʋ pɛ, bahɔ mʋ́ ansigyisʋ, 21tamɛ ɩnɩá bʋma nlin sʋ a, ɩtamatsia amʋ́tɔ yɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ bʋdɩn amʋ́sʋ ntɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn kʋ ɩtʋ amʋ́ asʋn amʋ sʋ a, ɩnʋnʋ bʋtɛdɩda. 22Abi amʋʋ ɩlɔwʋlɩ awutɔ amʋ gyi aha amʋʋ bonu asʋn amʋ a, bahɔ mʋ́, tamɛ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ atohianhɛ ɩwɩ gywɩɩn pʋ́ mʋ́tɔ atonyahɛ ɩwɩ ɔnsɩpɛ tegyi Bulu asʋn amʋsʋ. Ɩnɩ sʋ bʋtamaswie abi. 23Abi amʋʋ ɩlɔwʋlɩ ɔsʋlʋ wanklaansʋ amʋ gyi aha amʋʋ bʋtonu asʋn amʋ, nu mʋ́ asɩ. Ɩnɩ sʋ ɩtɛha bʋtɔbwɛ yile fɛ alɩá atɔ-abi amʋ loswie, ɩkʋ lafa (100), ɩkʋ aduesie (60), ɩkʋ ɛ adʋasa (30) amʋ.”
Atɔ-abi Wanklaan Pʋ́ Ɩfa Lalahɛ Ɩwɩ Yebi
24Yesu lɛtra ha aha amʋ yebi kʋ ɛ ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu iwiegyi amʋ igyi fɛ ɔdɔtɔpʋ ɔkʋá oloyodu ayo wanklaan mʋ ndɔtɔ. 25Tamɛ onye, brɛá aha bɛdɩ a, mʋ olupʋ loyodu ɩfa lalahɛ ánɩ́ ɩlɛlɩan ayo amʋ wa mʋ́tɔ, ɔlɛnatɩ. 26Brɛá ayo amʋ lɛdan, ɩdɛkwɩɩ a, ɩfa amʋ ɛ lɛlɩn ɔwan mʋ́tɔ. 27Ɔdɔtɔpʋ amʋ apafɔ botsu ndɔ amʋtɔ ba bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, ‘Anɩ wie, megyi ayo fodu wa fʋ ndɔ amʋtɔ? Nkʋnʋ ɩfa lalahɛ ɛ itsu mʋ́tɔ?> 28Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩ olupʋ bwɛhɛ nɩ.> Ɩnʋ bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, ‘Nɩ fótsula a, ha ayetsitsi mʋ́ lɛ ayo amʋtɔ.> 29Ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, ‘O-o! Mlɩha mʋ́ itsia. Nɩ mlɩdɛ mʋ́ tsii a, mlétsii mɩ ayo amʋ ɛ kʋ tsitsa. 30Mlɩsi mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩlɩɩ yɔfʋn mʋ́ tɩnbɩ. Nɩ ɩfʋn a, nɛ́bla mʋ́ atɩnpʋ mbɛɛ, bʋgyankpa saɩn ɩfa lalahɛ amʋ, abʋklɩ mʋ́ tswɩ ha mʋ́ ogya wa, asa abʋtɩn ayo amʋ yɛwa mɩ odudutɔ.> ”
Takyi-akpin Ibi Yebi
(Marko 4:30-32; Luka 13:18-19)
31Yesu lɛtra ha amʋ́ yebi ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu iwiegyi amʋ igyi fɛ takyi-akpin ibi, oyin ɔkʋ lodu wa mʋ ndɔtɔ. 32Mʋ́gyi tukuriibi nyi-abi fɛ́ɛ́tɔ nɩ, tamɛ nɩ ɩdan a, ɩtɔbwɛ ɩfa fʋahɛ dʋn ɩfa kugyikʋ. Mʋ́ abambi tekpikpli, mbubwi bʋtogyonka mʋ́sʋ.”
Bodobodotu-afa Yebi
(Luka 13:20-21)
33Yesu lɛtra ha amʋ́ yebi kʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu iwiegyi amʋ igyi fɛ bodobodotu-afa ánɩ́ ɔtsɩ ɔkʋ lɔpʋtsɩa bodobodo nfuo kɛntɛ kʋlɛ, ɩlɛha mʋ́ lotu.”
Yesu Lɔtɔɩ Ayebisʋ
(Marko 4:33-34)
34Ayebi anfɩ odu tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ oletsia pʋbla ɔdɔm amʋ asʋn nɩ. Ɔmɛbla amʋ́ asʋn kʋkʋá imegyi ayebi ɔlɔpʋtɔɩ. 35Ɩnɩ lɛha asʋn amʋʋ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ ɔkʋ lɛblɩ yaɩ amʋ lɛba mʋ́tɔ. Ɔbɛɛ,
“Nɔ́tɔɩ ayebisʋ
pʋlɛ asʋn ánɩ́ Bulu lɔpʋŋain tsu ɔyɩ asɩtsuabɩ ɔwan.”
Ɩfa Lalahɛ Yebi Amʋ Asɩ
36Yesu lɛnatɩ ɔdɔm amʋ wa ba woyitɔ. Mʋʋ mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɔyɔ mʋ wa yɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, “Lɛ ndɔ amʋtɔ ɩfa lalahɛ ɩwɩ yebi amʋ asɩ suna anɩ.”
37Mʋʋ Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ gyi atɔ-abi wanklaan odupʋ amʋ nɩ. 38Ndɔ amʋ gyi ɔyɩ anfɩ. Atɔ-abi wanklaan amʋ gyi Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ abi. Ɩfa lalahɛ amʋ gyi Ɔbʋnsam abi. 39Olupʋ amʋʋ olodu ɩfa lalahɛ abi amʋ gyi Ɔbʋnsam. Atɔtɩnbɩ amʋ gyi ɔyɩ ɔnɔmɔkɛ. Atɔ atɩnpʋ amʋ ɛ gyi Bulu-abɔpʋ.
40“Alɩ amʋʋ bɛsaɩn ɩfa lalahɛ amʋ wa mʋ́ ogya amʋ a, alɩ kɛn ɩbɛ́ba ha aha lalahɛ ɔyɩ ɔnɔmɔkɛ amʋ nɩ. 41Mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ nɔ́wa mɩ abɔpʋ bɛ́kpa togyitɔá ɩtɛha ɔha tɔbwɛ lakpan pʋ́ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ lɛ mɩ iwiegyi amʋtɔ. 42Bɔ́tswɩ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ wa ogya kpɔnkpɔntɩtɔ. Ɩnʋ isu mʋ́a kpisi bʋ nɩ. 43Tamɛ yile abwɛpʋ mʋ́ bɔ́wankɩ fɛ owi amʋ́ Sɩ Bulu iwie ogyikpa ɩnʋ. Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ asʋ onu.”
Siadɩɛ Mɛntɩhɛ Ɩwɩ Yebi
44Yesu lɛtra ha amʋ́ yebi kʋ ɛ ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu iwiegyi amʋ igyi fɛ siadɩɛ kʋá bopula ɔsʋlʋ kʋsʋ. Oyin ɔkʋ lɛyɛmɛntɩ mʋ́, laŋain mʋ́. Mʋ́ ɩwɩ ansigyi sʋ a, ɔlɛyɛfɛ mʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ pʋbɔhɔ ɔsʋlʋ amʋ.”
Abuto Wʋlɩhɛ Ɩwɩ Yebi
45Bulu iwiegyi amʋ ɩtra gyi fɛ ibia ogyipʋ ɔkʋá ɔna ɔdɛ abuto wʋlɩhɛ dunka ɔhɔ. 46Brɛá olowun butobi wʋlɩhɛ kʋlɛ pɛá ɩhɩɛ bʋ ibia a, ɔlɛfɛ mʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ pʋyɛhɔ butobi amʋ.
Asawu Ɩwɩ Yebi
47Bulu iwiegyi amʋ lɛla igyi fɛ asawu ánɩ́ bɔtswɩ wa ɔpʋtɔ lɛ aye ɔtsan-ɔtsan. 48Brɛá aye lɔbʋla mʋ́ a, aye alɛpʋ amʋ bɛbɩtɩa mʋ́ ba ɔpʋ ɔnɔ. Betsia asɩ, tɔsɩ gyihɛ amʋ wa blanwɛtɔ, tswɩ mʋ́á bʋtamagyi tsitsa. 49Alɩ ɩbɛ́ba ɔyɩ ɔnɔmɔkɛ amʋ nɩ. Bulu-abɔpʋ bɛ́ba bɔtɔsɩ aha lalahɛ lɛ aha wanklaantɔ. 50Fówun batswɩ aha lalahɛ amʋ wa ogya kpɔnkpɔntɩtɔ. Ɩnʋ isu mʋ́a kpisi bʋ nɩ.
Atonyahɛ Pɔpwɛ Mʋ́a Dada
51Yesu lɛfɩtɛ mʋ akasɩpʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩlanu mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ asɩ?”
Bɛɛ, “Ee, anɩlanu mʋ́ asɩ.”
52Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋmʋ mbla osunapʋ oduá alakasɩ Bulu iwiegyi amʋ ɩwɩ asʋn ɛ bɩ a, ogyi fɛ woyi mʋ wie oduá ɔtɛlɛ atɔ pɔpwɛ mʋ́a dada fɛ́ɛ́ tsu mʋ atɔ ɔyaɩkpa.”
Bʋmɔhɔ Yesu Mʋ Wulutɔ
(Marko 6:1-6; Luka 4:16-30)
53Yesu lenya mɔ mʋ ayebi amʋ ɔnɔ alɩ, ɔlɛnatɩ ɩnʋ. 54Oleyinki yɔ mʋ onuto wulutɔ Nasaret, oloyesuna atɔ Yudafɔ ofiakpa. Mʋ atosunahɛ lɛha ɔnɔ lobwie aha amʋ fɛ́ɛ́. Mʋ́ sʋ bɛfɩtɛ aba bɛɛ, “Nkʋnʋ olenya nyansa mʋ́a ofulabwɛ tumi anfɩ ɛ tsu? 55Megyi atɔ osrepʋ mʋ bi amʋ nɩ? Megyi mʋ yin gyi Maria, mʋ apio yinhɛ gyi Yakobo mʋa Yosef pʋ́ Simon mʋa Yuda? 56Yɛ anɩa mʋ apio tsɩhɛ tsie nfɩ a? Mʋʋ nkʋnʋ olenya ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ tsu?” 57Ɩnɩ sʋ mʋ asʋn lɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ amʋ́sʋ.
Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Aha bʋtobu Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ, tamɛ mʋ onuto wulutɔfɔ pʋ́ mʋ woyitɔ aha mʋ́ bʋtamabu mʋ.” 58Ɩnɩá bʋmɔhɔ mʋ gyi sʋ a, ofula kpalobi kʋ pɛ ɔlɔbwɛ ɩnʋ.

Title: MATEO 14
Content:
Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane Lowu
(Marko 6:14-29; Luka 9:7-9)
1Galilea ɔmásʋ ogyipʋ Herode lonu Yesu ɩwɩ asʋn alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ. 2Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla mʋ asumpʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane amʋ nɩ. Mʋlakʋsʋ tsu afulitɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔdɛ ofula anfɩ odu bwɛ nɩ.”
3-4Brɛ kʋtɔ a, Yohane letsia bla Owie Herode ɔbɛɛ, mbla mɛha ɔkpa ánɩ́ otsia mʋ pio Filipo mʋ ka Herodia. Ɩnɩ sʋ Herode lɛha bɛkɩta Yohane, wa mʋ ɩkan, pʋ mʋ wa obu. 5Ɔlɔbwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́mɔ Yohane, tamɛ olenya aha amʋ ifu, tsufɛ bʋtobu Yohane ánɩ́ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ ogyi.
6Tamɛ ɛkɛ ɔkʋá Owie Herode dɛ mʋ ɔkwɩɩkɛ gyi a, mʋ ka Herodia mʋ bi tsɩhɛ lobowie ɔbʋntɔ tsa Herode mʋa mʋ ahandɛ ansɩtɔ. Mʋ tsa amʋ lɔwa owie amʋ ansigyi. 7Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛka ntam ɔbɛɛ, ɔbɛ́ha mʋ togyitɔá odekle.
8Otsibi amʋ mʋ yin lɛha mʋ ɔlɛbla Herode ɔbɛɛ, “Ndekleá fʋpʋ Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane nwun dɩnka ɩlɩnsʋ ha mɩ seseesei.”
9Asʋn anfɩ lɛhɩɛ han Herode, tamɛ mʋ ntam amʋʋ ɔlɛka, pʋ́ aha amʋʋ bʋbʋ ɩnʋ amʋ sʋ a, ɔlɛha mʋ aha ɔtɩnpʋ ɔkpa ɔbɛɛ, ɔbwɛ tɔá otsibi amʋ lafɩtɛ ha mʋ. 10Aha ɔtɩnpʋ amʋ lɛyɛtɩn Yohane nwun obu ɔdɩkpa ɩnʋ. 11Mʋʋ ɔlɔpʋ nwun amʋ dɩnka ɩlɩnsʋ ba otsibi amʋ, mʋ ɛ ɔlɔpʋya mʋ yin Herodia. 12Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane akasɩpʋ bɛba botsu mʋ satin yopula. Mʋ́ ɔma a, bɔyɔ yɛbla Yesu asʋn ánɩ́ ɩlaba.
Aha Mpɩm-nu Atogyihɛ Ha
(Marko 6:30-44; Luka 9:10-17; Yohane 6:1-14)
13Yesu lenya nu asʋn amʋ alɩ, olowie ɔklʋntɔ, fa ntsu yetsia ɔtɩnɛkʋ mʋ nkʋlɛ. Tamɛ ɔdɔm amʋ bɛbɩ ɔtɩnɛá ɔyɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ bɛnatɩ ayabitɔ tsu amʋ́ awulusʋ gya mʋ nkpa. 14Brɛá ɔlɛkplɩ dalɩ ɔklʋn amʋtɔ, wun ɔdɔm kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ a, amʋ́ asʋn lɔwa mʋ nwɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛtsa amʋ́tɔ alɔpʋ.
15Owi lɔpɔn a, akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛba mʋ wa bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, “Dimbisʋ nfɩ gyi, owi ɛ dɛta. Mʋ́ sʋ ha amʋ́ abʋyɔ awuluá ɩbʋ bomli nfɩ asɩ yɛhɔ tɔkʋ gyi.”
16Tamɛ Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Imehian ánɩ́ bɔ́yɔ. Mlɩdunka tɔkʋ ha amʋ́ abʋgyi.”
17Mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, “Tɔá anɩbʋ fɛ́ɛ́ gyi bodobodo apin anu pʋ́ ntsutso iye bwahɛ anyɔ pɛ.”
18Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩtsu ba mɩ.” 19Mʋʋ ɔlɛha aha amʋ betsiatsia ɩfa bɔbwɛ amʋsʋ. Ɩnʋ olotsu bodobodo anu pʋ́ ntsutso iye bwahɛ anyɔ amʋ. Olotsu ansɩ fʋa kɩ ɔsʋsʋ, ɔlɛda Bulu ɩpan. Mʋʋ olebiabia bodobodo amʋtɔ ha akasɩpʋ amʋ, amʋ́ ɛ beye mʋ́ ha aha amʋ fɛ́ɛ́. 20Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ begyi mwɛ sian. Akasɩpʋ amʋ bɔtɔsɩ sianhɛ amʋ. Ɩlɔbʋla alakpa duanyɔ. 21Ayin ánɩ́ begyi atɔ amʋ nkʋlɛ bʋgyi fɛ mpɩm-nu (5,000). Bʋmɛkla atsɩ mʋ́a nyebi mʋ́.
Ɔpʋsʋ Natɩ
(Marko 6:45-52; Yohane 6:15-21)
22Mʋʋ Yesu lɛha akasɩpʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, bʋwie ɔklʋntɔ, abʋgyankpa fa ɔpʋ amʋ yɔ mʋ́ ɔbɩn. Mʋ mʋ́ olesin ɔma si aha amʋ ɔkpa. 23Brɛá olesi amʋ́ ɔkpa ta a, ɔlɔdʋ yɔ bʋsʋ yɔbɔ mpaɩ. Mʋ nkʋlɛ oletsia ɩnʋ yɔfʋn owi tahɛ. 24Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, ɔklʋn amʋ lawie ntsu nsɩnɛ. Ilefia afu kpɔnkpɔntɩ kʋ, ɔpʋ amʋ lɔwa dabɩ.
25Bakɛ-bakɛ a, Yesu lɛnatɩ ntsu amʋsʋ ayabitɔ buo amʋ́. 26Brɛá bowun mʋ, ɔna ɔpʋ amʋsʋ a, benya ifu sʋra okitikiti, blɩ bɛɛ, “Fuli ogyi.”
27Tamɛ ɔlɔwa ɔsa bla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩwa klʋn. Mɩ nɩ. Mlɩmánya ifu.”
28Petro lɛbla Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Wie, nɩ fʋ nɩ mʋ́ a, ha mɩ ɛ annatɩ ɔpʋ amʋsʋ bɔtʋ fʋ.”
29Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Natɩ ba.” Petro lɛdalɩ ɔklʋn amʋtɔ ɔna ɔpʋ amʋsʋ ɔyɔ Yesu wa. 30Tamɛ brɛá olowun alɩá afu amʋ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn a, ifu lowie mʋ ayetɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔwa mɛ bɩ. Mʋʋ ɔlɔkplʋn kpoli Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Wie, hɔ mɩ!”
31Ɩnʋnʋ Yesu lɛtɩnkɩ ɩbɩ kɩta mʋ, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Fʋ hogyi mɔtsɔ. Ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛ nwɛn gyi?”
32Benya dʋ wie ɔklʋn amʋtɔ alɩ, afu amʋ lɛka itin. 33Ɩnʋ aha amʋʋ bʋbʋ ɔklʋn amʋtɔ amʋ bɛda akpawunu Yesu ayabitɔ, blɩ bɛɛ, “Lɛlɛ, Bulu mʋ Bi fʋgyi.”
Genesaretfɔ Alɔpʋ Tsa
(Marko 6:53-56)
34Yesu mʋa amʋ́nyɔ bɛfa ɔpʋ amʋ yesi Genesaret otsubunɔ. 35Brɛá ɩnʋfɔ bɛbɩá mʋ nɩ a, bɔwa abi ya amʋ́ awulu fɛ́ɛ́sʋ, ha amʋ́ bɔpʋ alɔpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ba mʋ. 36Bokokoli Yesu bɛɛ, ɔha alɔpʋ amʋ abʋpʋ ɩbɩ da mʋ atadɩɛ ɔdanʋ kpan. Amʋ́á bɔpʋ ɩbɩ da mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ benya ɩlɔtsa.

Title: MATEO 15
Content:
Atɩtɩfɔ Amandɩɛ
(Marko 7:1-13)
1Mʋ́ ɔma a, Farisifɔ pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ akʋ botsu Yerusalem ba Yesu wa, bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, 2“Ntogyi sʋ fʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bʋtamagyi anɩ anain amandɩɛsʋ. Bʋtamafwɩ ɩbɩ amandɩɛ ɔkpasʋ asa bʋtegyi atɔ?”
3Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ mlɩ ɛ mlɩ anain amandɩɛ sʋ mlɩmɛdɛ Bulu mbla amʋsʋ gyi? 4Mose lɔwanlɩn wa Bulu mbla amʋtɔ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Bu fʋ sɩ mʋ́a fʋ yin,> ɔlɛtra wanlɩn ɔbɛɛ, ‘Nɩ ɔkʋ lɛblɩ asʋkpan tsu mʋ sɩ ntɛ mʋ yin ɩwɩ a, bʋmɔ mʋ?> 5-6Tamɛ mlɩ mʋ́ mlɩaa, ɔha ɔbɛ́talɩ bla mʋ sɩ ntɛ mʋ yin ɔbɛɛ, ‘Tɔá tɛkɩ nɔ́pʋha fʋ a, napʋha Bulu. Imehian ánɩ́ nɛ́tra kɩ fʋ.> Mlɩ anain amandɩɛ sʋ mlɩtra mlɩmɛdɛ Bulu mblasʋ gyi. 7Apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ! Ɔnɔkwalɩ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yesaia lɛblɩ tsu mlɩ ɩwɩ tswɩ ɔbɛɛ,
8‘Aha anfɩ bʋdɛpʋ amʋ́ ɔnɔ bu mɩ,
tamɛ amʋ́ klʋn bʋ ɩfɔ mɩ wa.
9Kpaalɩ bʋdɛ mɩ sum,
tsufɛ basi Bulu mbla tswɩ, yɔ bʋdɛ anyankpʋsa mbla suna.> ”
Tɔá Ɩtɔkpɔɩ Ɔha Bulu Ansɩtɔ
(Marko 7:14-23)
10Yesu lɛtra tɩ ɔdɔm amʋ ba mʋ ɩwɩ wa, ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩyaa asʋ, mɛnɩ mlónu ɩnɩ asɩ. 11Megyi tɔá ɔha tegyi tɔkpɔɩ mʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ, mboun mʋ́á ɩtɛdalɩ tsu mʋ ɔnɔ tɔkpɔɩ mʋ.”
12Ɩnʋ mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛba mʋ wa bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Fʋyin ánɩ́ fʋ asʋn blɩhɛ anfɩ lawɔ Farisifɔ amʋ?”
13Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Bópuli oyigyioyiá megyi mɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ loswie tsitsa. 14Mlɩsi Farisifɔ amʋ asʋn. Ansibi abwiepʋ bʋgyi, bʋdɛ ansibi abwiepʋ kpa. Nɩ nsibi obwiepʋ dɛ nsibi obwiepʋ kpa a, ɔbɔtɔ amʋ́ abanyɔ bʋtɛkpa wie.”
15Mʋʋ Petro lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Lɛ yebi anfɩ asɩ suna anɩ.”
16Yesu lɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩ ɛ mlɩtamanu asʋn asɩ? 17Mlɩmeyin ánɩ́ tɔá iwie ɔha ɔnɔ a, mʋ iputɔ itowie, ɔtɛyɛlɛ mʋ́ wa ɔkpʋntɔ? 18Asʋngyiasʋn ánɩ́ ɩtɛdalɩ tsu ɔha ɔnɔ a, mʋ klʋntɔ ɩtɛdalɩ tsu. Mʋ́tɔkpɔɩ mʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ nɩ. 19Tsufɛ ɔha klʋntɔ agywɩɩn lalahɛ tɛdalɩ tsu. Mʋ́tɛha ɔtɔmɔ ɔha, ɔtɔtɔ mbʋa, ɔtɔwa atsɩ mʋa ayin asʋn, otowi atɔ, ɔtɔwa afunu, otetsii ɔha. 20Ɩnɩ aná tɔkpɔɩ ɔha, tamɛ nɩ ɔha mɔfwɩ ɩbɩ amandɩɛ ɔkpasʋ asa olegyi atɔ a, ɩtamakpɔɩ mʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ.”
Ɔtsɩ Ɔkʋá Omegyi Yudayin Hogyi
(Marko 7:24-30)
21Yesu lɛnatɩ ɩnʋ yɔ Tiro mʋa Sidon nsaɩntɔ. 22Kanaanyintse ɔkʋá otsie ɩnʋ lɛba Yesu wa. Ɔdɛ okitikiti sʋra, olokokoli Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Dawid mʋ na, wun mɩ nwɛ! Ɔŋɛ lalahɛ bʋ mɩ bi tsɩhɛtɔ. Ɩdɛ mʋ han dʋbɩ.”
23Tamɛ Yesu mɛkpla mʋ. Ɩnʋ mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bobwii ɩpa ha mʋ bɛɛ “Ha ɔtsɩ anfɩ ɔnatɩ, tsufɛ obuo anɩ ɔdɛ okitikiti sʋra dʋbɩ.”
24Yesu lɛbla ɔtsɩ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Israel akufa fwɩhɛ pɛ wa Bulu lɔwa mɩ.”
25Tamɛ ɔtsɩ amʋ lɛda akpawunu mʋ ayabitɔ, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Wie, gyi mɩ bʋalɛ.”
26Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɩma alɛá fɔ́swɩɩ nyebi atogyihɛ pʋha akɩaɩ.”
27Ɔtsɩ amʋ lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Owie, ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔ alɩ, tamɛ akɩaɩ ɛ bʋtegyi atogyihɛ mpupubiá ɩtɛkpakpa bun amʋ́ wie ɔpʋnʋasɩ.”
28Mʋʋ Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔtsɩ, fʋ hogyi lomoni. Ɩba mʋ́tɔ ha fʋ alɩá fʋdekle.” Ɩnʋnʋ ɩwɩ lɔwa mʋ bi amʋ ɔnlɩn.
Aha Tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ Ɩlɔ Tsa
29Tsu ɩnʋ a, Yesu lɔtsʋn Galilea ɔpʋ ɔnɔ, dʋ yetsia okuku kʋsʋ. 30Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɔpʋ abubupʋ, ansibi abwiepʋ, abɔ, amumu pʋ́ ɩlɔ bamba alɔpʋ bobun Yesu ayabiasɩ, ɔlɛtsa amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́. 31Aha amʋ ɔnɔ lobwie amʋ́ brɛá bowun amumu bʋdɛtɔɩ, abubupʋ ɩwɩ lawa amʋ́ ɔnlɩn, abɔ bʋna, ansibi abwiepʋ ɛ bʋdɛ atɔ wun, bɛkanfʋ Israel Bulu amʋ.
Aha Mpɩm-na Atogyihɛ Ha
(Marko 8:1-10)
32Yesu lɛtɩ mʋ akasɩpʋ, bla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Aha anfɩ asʋn dɛ mɩ nwɛ wa. Ndɛ ɛkɛ sasɩ ɔpá bʋbuo mɩ, bʋtra bʋma tɔtɔá bégyi. Nɩ nɛha amʋ́ bɔpʋ akʋn natɩ a, ansɩtɔ béyebi amʋ́ ɔkpatɔ.”
33Mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Nkʋnʋ abénya atogyihɛ ha ɔdɔm anfɩ ɔsʋlʋkpan anfɩsʋ?”
34Yesu lɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Bodobodo afɩnɩ mlɩbʋ?”
Bɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ bɛɛ, “Asienɔ pʋ́ aye putuputu kpalobi kʋ.”
35Yesu lɛha ɔdɔm amʋ betsia asɩ. 36Mʋʋ olotsu bodobodo asienɔ pʋ́ aye amʋ, da Bulu ɩpan, olebiabia mʋ́tɔ ha akasɩpʋ amʋ, beye ha amʋ́. 37Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ begyi mwɛ. Bɔtɔsɩ sianhɛ amʋ bʋla alakpa yile asienɔ. 38Ayin ánɩ́ begyi atɔ amʋ nkʋlɛ bʋgyi mpɩm-na (4,000). Bʋmɛkla atsɩ mʋ́a nyebi.
39Ɩnʋ Yesu lesi aha amʋ ɔkpa, olowie ɔklʋntɔ fa ɔpʋ yɔ Magadanfɔ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.

Title: MATEO 16
Content:
Farisifɔ Bodunka Ofula
(Marko 8:11-13; Luka 12:54-56)
1Ɛkɛ ɔkʋ Farisifɔ pʋ́ Sadukifɔ akʋ bɛba Yesu ɔsɔkɩkpa. Mʋ́ sʋ bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, ɔbwɛ osuna pʋsuna amʋ́ ánɩ́ lɛlɛ otsu Bulu wa. 2Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ owi ɩpɔn, nsaɩntɔ ɩpɛ a, mlɩtɛblɩ mlɩaa, ‘Ɔkɛ nsaɩntɔ bɛ́dɩ.> 3Nɩ nyankpʋ obila tuun nyankɩ a, mlɩtɛblɩ mlɩaa, ‘Ndɛ nyankpʋ obótswie tsʋn afu.> Mlɩtɛtalɩ kɩ nsaɩntɔ, bɩ tɔá ɩbɛ́ba. Ntogyi sʋ mlɩmɛtalɩ nu tɔá mlɩdewun sei anfɩ mʋ́ asɩ. 4Mlɩ ndɛmba-abi lalahɛ ánɩ́ mlɩladalɩ Bulu ɔma, mlɩdɛ osuna dunka amlɩwun, tamɛ mlɩmóowun kʋkʋʋkʋ dʋn Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yona osuna amʋ odu.”
Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔlɛnatɩ si amʋ́.
Farisifɔ Pʋ́ Sadukifɔ Bodobodotu-afa
(Marko 8:14-21)
5Yesu akasɩpʋ amʋ bʋmɛkaɩn tsu bodobodo kɩta asa bɛfa ɔpʋ amʋ yɔ ɔbɩn. 6Yesu lɛda amʋ́ ɔla ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩkɩ wanklaan Farisifɔ pʋ́ Sadukifɔ bodobodotu-afasʋ.”
7Akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛfɩtɛ aba bɛɛ, “Bodobodo amʋʋ anɩmɛdɛ amʋ sʋ ɔdɛ asʋn anfɩ blɩ loo?”
8Yesu lonu asʋn ánɩ́ bʋdɛblɩ. Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Oo, mlɩ hogyi mɔtsɔ. Ntogyi sʋ mlɩdɛblɩ mlɩaa, bodobodo amʋʋ mlɩmɛdɛ amʋ sʋ? 9Ɩmɔkʋwankɩ mlɩ kɩ? Mlɩlatan bodobodo apin anu amʋʋ nɛha aha mpɩm-nu (5,000) begyi amʋsʋ? Alakpa afɩnɩ lesian mlɩlɔtɔsɩ? 10Ntɛ mlɩlatan bodobodo apin asienɔ amʋʋ nɛha aha mpɩm-na (4,000) begyi amʋsʋ? Alakpa afɩnɩ lesian mlɩlɔtɔsɩ?” 11Ntogyi sʋ ɩmɔkʋwankɩ mlɩ ánɩ́ megyi bodobodo ɩwɩ asʋn ndɛblɩ? Bla ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, “Mlɩkɩ wanklaan Farisifɔ pʋ́ Sadukifɔ bodobodotu-afasʋ.”
12Ɩnʋ asa ɩlɔwankɩ amʋ́ ánɩ́ megyi Bodobodotu-afa asʋn ɔdɛblɩ, mboun amʋ́ atosunahɛ.
Ɔha Ánɩ́ Yesu Gyi
(Marko 8:27-30; Luka 9:18-21)
13Brɛá Yesu lowie Kaesarea Filipi nsaɩntɔ a, ɔlɛfɩtɛ mʋ akasɩpʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ma aha bɛɛ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ngyi?”
14Bɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ bɛɛ, “Akʋ bɛɛ, fʋgyi Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane. Akʋ bɛɛ, Bulu Ɔnɔsʋ Ɔtɔɩpʋ Elia. Akʋ ɛ bɛɛ, Yeremia ntɛ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ bamba ɔkʋ.”
15Mʋʋ ɔlɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩ ɛ mɛ? Mlɩa mɩgyi ma?”
16Simon Petro lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Fʋgyi Kristo, (ɔha amʋʋ Bulu lada mʋ ofuli amʋ) nɩ. Bulu Ɔkɩankpapʋ amʋ mʋ Bi.”
17Ɩnʋ Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu layula fʋ Simon, Yona mʋ bi, tsufɛ megyi nyankpʋsa ɔkʋkʋ lɛlɛ ɔnɔkwalɩ anfɩ ɔwan suna fʋ. Mɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ nɩ. 18Ɩnɩ sʋ mɩ ɛ ndɛ fʋ bla mbɛɛ, fʋ ɩda gyi Petro. Mʋ́ asɩ gyi, ‘Bʋta.> Bʋta anfɩsʋ néyi mɩ ɔpasua dɩnka nɩ. Lowu tumi mɛ́ɛtalɩ gyi mʋ́sʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 19Nɔ́pʋ Bulu iwiegyi amʋ asaafɩ wa fʋ ɩbɩtɔ. Asʋngyiasʋn ánɩ́ fékina ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ a, Bulu ɛ obékina mʋ́ ɔsʋsʋ. Mʋ́á fótsula a, Bulu ɛ obótsula mʋ́sʋ ɔsʋsʋ.”
20Ɩnʋ ɔlɛda amʋ́ ɔla kpakpaakpa ɔbɛɛ, bʋmábla ɔhaa ánɩ́ mʋgyi Kristo amʋ.
Yesu Ɩwɩɔsɩn Pʋ́ Mʋ Lowu Ɩwɩ Asʋn Blɩ
(Marko 8:31--9:1; Luka 9:22-27)
21Tsu brɛ amʋsʋ a, Yesu lefi asɩ ɔdɛ asʋntɔ lɛ suna amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ilehian ánɩ́ mɔ́yɔ Yerusalem yowun ɩwɩɔsɩn tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ Yudafɔ ahandɛ, Bulu igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ ɩbɩtɔ. Bɔ́mɔ mʋ, tamɛ Bulu ɔbɛ́lakʋsʋa mʋ ɛkɛ sasɩ tsu afulitɔ.”
22Mʋ́ sʋ Petro lɛtɩ mʋ ya ɩtsɛtɔ, yɛka mʋ itin ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Wie, Bulu ogya mʋ́ tɛɩa fʋ ɩwɩ. Ɩnɩ mába fʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”
23Ɩnʋ ɔlɛdamli bla Petro ɔbɛɛ, “Satan, natɩ tɛɩ mɩsʋ! Fʋdɛ mɩ ɔkpa tin. Megyi tɔá Bulu dɛgywɩɩn fʋdɛgywɩɩn, anyankpʋsa klɛ fʋdɛgywɩɩn.”
24Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ ɔkʋ dekleá obóbuo mɩ a, osi tɔá otekle bwɛ, otsu mʋ oyikpalihɛ bobuo mɩ. 25Tsufɛ nɩ ɔkʋ lɛprɩ mʋ nkpa a, ɩbɔ́hʋlɩ mʋ. Tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ lesi mʋ nkpa ha mɩ sʋ a, ɔbɛ́lanya nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata. 26Nɩ ɔkʋ onya ɔyɩtɔ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́, tamɛ ɔhʋlɩ mʋ ɔkla a, labi mɔmʋ ɩlɔwa ha mʋ? Ntɛ ntɔ ɔha ɔbɛ́talɩ pʋtsɛ mʋ nkpa? 27Tsufɛ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ nɛ́ba mɩ Sɩ numnyamtɔ, mɩa mʋ abɔpʋ. Ɩnʋ nɛ́ka ɔhagyiɔha ɩkɔ alɩá mʋ tsiatɔ gyi nɩ. 28Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Akʋ bʋbʋ mlɩtɔ nfɩá bʋmóowu, yɔfʋn brɛá bawun ánɩ́ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ nɛba mɩ iwie ogyikpa.”

Title: MATEO 17
Content:
Yesu Ɩwɩtsɛ
(Marko 9:2-13; Luka 9:28-36)
1Nkensie ɔma a, Yesu lɛkpa Petro mʋa Yakobo pʋ́ mʋ pio Yohane, bɔdʋ yɔ ɩbʋ kʋsʋ. 2Amʋ́ ansɩtɔ ɩnʋ a, Yesu ɩwɩ lɛtsɛ. Mʋ ansɩtɔ lɔwankɩ fɛ owi, mʋ atadɩɛ ɛ lɛdamli fututuutu. 3Ɩnʋnʋ mʋ akasɩpʋ abasa amʋ bowun ánɩ́ Mose mʋa Elia bɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan, amʋ́a Yesu bʋdɛtɔɩ. 4Mʋʋ Petro lɛbla Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Wie, ɩbʋ alɛá abétsia nfɩ. Nɩ fótsula a, ha ada abu asa. Fʋ klɛ kʋlɛ, Mose klɛ kʋlɛ, Elia ɛ klɛ kʋlɛ.”
5Brɛá ɔdɛ asʋn anfɩ blɩ a, agyinde wankɩhɛ kʋ lobobun amʋ́sʋ. Ɩnʋ ɔmɛ kʋ lɛdalɩ tsu agyinde amʋtɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔ́nɩ gyi mɩ Bi ɔdwɛpʋá olegyi mɩ ansɩ nɩ. Mlɩnu mʋ ɔmɛ.”
6Ifu lɛhɩɛ kɩta amʋ́ brɛá bonu asʋn anfɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ bɔwa ɔsa mli bun ɔsʋlʋtɔ. 7Mʋʋ Yesu lɛba bɔpʋ ɩbɩ dada amʋ́, bla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩkʋsʋ, mlɩmánya ifu.” 8Ɩnʋ bɔwa ansɩ kɩ a, bʋmɛtra wun ɔhaa dʋn Yesu nkʋlɛ.
9Brɛá bʋdɛ ɩbʋ amʋ kplɩ a, Yesu lɛda amʋ́ ɔla ɔbɛɛ, bʋmábla ɔhaa tɔá bayowun, yɔfʋn ɛkɛá Bulu ɔbɔ́kʋsʋa Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi amʋ tsu afulitɔ.
10Mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ Mose mbla asunapʋ amʋ bɛɛ, ilehian ánɩ́ Elia obéyinki ba asa Kristo amʋ ɔbɛ́ba?”
11Ɔlɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔnɔkwalɩ igyi. Elia obégyankpa ba bɛla togyitɔ yaɩ wanklaan. 12Ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, Elia layinki ba dodoodo, tamɛ ɔhaa mɛbɩ mʋ. Bɔwa mʋ amʋmʋyɔ. Alɩ kɛn mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ɛ nówun ɩwɩɔsɩn amʋ́ ɩbɩtɔ nɩ.”
13Ɩnʋ a, ɩlɔwankɩ akasɩpʋ amʋ ánɩ́ Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane ɩwɩ asʋn ɔdɛblɩ.
Ɩlɔ Dɩdahɛ Ɔlɔpʋ Tsa
(Marko 9:14-29; Luka 9:37-43a)
14Brɛá beyinki kplɩ bowie ɔdɔm amʋ wa a, oyin ɔkʋ lɛba bɛda akpawunu Yesu ayabitɔ, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, 15“Mɩ Wie, wun mɩ bi anfɩ nwɛ, tsufɛ ɩlɔ dɩdahɛ dɛ mʋ han. Otetsia dɩda wie ntsu mʋ́a ogyatɔ. 16Nɔpʋ mʋ ba fʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ, tamɛ bʋmɛtalɩ tsa mʋ ɩlɔ.”
17Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Ndɛmba-abiá mlɩmá hogyi, mlɩ tsiatɔ ma alɛ. Alɩ nétsia mlɩ wa yɔ ekekegyiɛkɛ nɩ? Nnya klʋn ha mlɩ yɔfʋn ɔmɛnkɛ? Mlɩkpa kebi amʋ ba mɩ!” 18Ɩnʋ ɔlɔkplʋn gya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ amʋ. Ɩlɛdalɩ kebi amʋtɔ, ɩwɩ lɔwa mʋ ɔnlɩn.
19Mʋ́ ɔma a, akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛfɩtɛ Yesu ɩtsɛtɔ bɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ anɩ mʋ́ anɩmɛtalɩ gya ɔŋɛ lalahɛ amʋ dalɩ kebi amʋtɔ?”
20-21Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩ hogyi mɔtsɔ kʋraa. Mbla mlɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ. Nɩ mlɩ hogyi lomoni fɛ takyi-akpin ibi a, tɛkɩ mlɛtalɩ bla ɩbʋ anfɩ mlɩaa ipuli. Lɛlɛ ibópuli, tɔtɔɔtɔ mɔ́ɔdʋn mlɩ bwɛ.”
Yesu Lowu Ɩwɩ Asʋn Blɩ Otse Nyɔsɩ
(Marko 9:30-32; Luka 9:43b-45)
22-23Brɛá akasɩpʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛba befia Galilea ɔmátɔ a, Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Bɛ́lɛ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ha adʋn bɔ́mɔ mɩ, tamɛ Bulu ɔbɔ́kʋsʋa mɩ ɛkɛ sasɩ.”
Asʋn anfɩ lɛhɩɛ han akasɩpʋ amʋ.
Bulu Ɔtswɛkpa Ofi Ɩkɔka
24Yesu mʋa mʋ akasɩpʋ bɛba Kapernaum wulutɔ. Ɩnʋ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa ofikɔ ahɔpʋ akʋ bɛba bɛfɩtɛ Petro bɛɛ, “Fʋ wie tɛka Bulu ɔtswɛkpa ofi ɩkɔ?”
25Petro lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔtɛka.”
Brɛá Petro lɔyɔ woyitɔ a, Yesu legyankpa fɩtɛ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Simon, nkalɩ gyi fʋ agywɩɩn? Amɛndɩ tɛka dutɛ mʋ́a lampoo ha awie? Afɔɔ ntɛ wulu awie?”
26Petro lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Afɔɔ tɛka.”
Mʋʋ Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Yɛ mʋmʋ wulu awie bagyi ɩwɩ nɩ? 27Tamɛ mmedekle mbɛɛ, abɔ́kʋsʋ lɩɩ amʋ́sʋ sʋ a, tsu ɔdadʋwa afʋyɔ ɔpʋ ɔnɔ yɔtswɩ. Kɩ klɛmɛtɩ gyankpapʋá fɛ́lɛ ɔnɔtɔ. Fénya kɔba ánɩ́ ɩbɔ́fʋn anɩ abanyɔ ofikɔ amʋ ka. Lɛ mʋ́, afʋyɛka ha amʋ́.”

Title: MATEO 18
Content:
Ma Ɔbɔ́bwɛ Ɔhandɛ?
(Marko 9:33-37; Luka 9:46-48)
1Bɛba Kapernaum wulutɔ, akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛba Yesu wa bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Ma gyi ɔhandɛ Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ?”
2Yesu lɛtɩ kebi ɔkʋ bɛlɩɩ amʋ́ ansɩtɔ, 3ɔlɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Nɩ mlɩmɛtsɛ, bwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ nyebi a, mlɩmóowie Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ. 4Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɛba ɩwɩasɩ fɛ kebi anfɩ a, mʋgyi ɔhandɛ Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ nɩ. 5Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔhɔ kebiá ogyi alɩ mɩ ɩdatɔ lahɔ mɩ.
Ɔha Kpa Wa Lakpantɔ
(Marko 9:42-48; Luka 17:1-2)
6“Nɩ ɔkʋ lɛha aha anfɩ bʋmɔkʋdan mɩsʋ hogyitɔ anfɩtɔ ɔkʋ lɔbwɛ lakpan a, nɩ bɛda nfuokwɛbʋ sian mʋ ɔmɛtɔ, tswɩ mʋ wa ɔpʋ okluklukpa, mɔ mʋ po a, ɩbʋ alɛ dʋn. 7Ɔyɩtɔ atsiapʋ bʋgyɔwɩ nɩ. Tsufɛ ɩtɔá ɩtɛha ɔha tɔbwɛ lakpan bʋ ɩnʋ. Ɩbɛ́ba alɩ, tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɩna mʋsʋ mʋ ba lɔbwɛ lakpan ɔgyɔwɩ nɩ.
8“Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ fʋ ɩbɩ ntɛ fʋ yabi tɛha fʋtɛdɩda hogyitɔ a, ka mʋ́ lɛ, afʋtswɩ mʋ́ tsalɩfwɩ. Ɩbʋ alɛá fɔ́pʋ ɩbɩ kʋlɛ ntɛ yabi kʋlɛ nya nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata, dʋn ánɩ́ fɔ́pʋ ɩbɩ anyɔ ntɛ ayabi anyɔ wie ogya ánɩ́ ɩtamaduntɔ. 9Nɩ fʋ nsibi tɛha fʋtɔbwɛ lakpan a, loti mʋ́ lɛ, afʋtswɩ mʋ́ tsalɩfwɩ. Ɩbʋ alɛá fɔ́pʋ nsibi kʋlɛ nya nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata, dʋn ánɩ́ fɔ́pʋ ansibi anyɔ wie ɩsʋbɩtɩ ogya ánɩ́ ɩtamaduntɔ.
Kufa Fwɩhɛ
(Luka 15:3-7)
10-11“Mlɩkɩ wanklaan ánɩ́ mlɩmɛ́ɛkɩ nyebi putuputu anfɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋ ansɩtɔ kotikoti. Ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, bʋbʋ Bulu-abɔpʋá bʋtɔkɔsɩ pʋ amʋ́ asʋn ya mɩ Sɩ ɔsʋsʋ.
12“Mlɩyɔ asʋn anfɩtɔ amlɩkɩ. Nɩ ɔkʋ bʋ akufa lafakʋlɛ (100), amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋlɛ ɔfwɩ a, ntɔ ɔha amʋ tɔbwɛ? Megyi si otesi adukweba-kweba (99) atrahɛ amʋ lɩɩ okuku amʋsʋ, yodunka ɔkʋlɛ pɛ amʋʋ alafwɩ amʋ? 13Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Nɩ owun mʋ a, mʋ ansɩ bégyi mʋ ɩwɩ dʋn adukweba-kweba atrahɛ amʋʋ bʋmɔfwɩ amʋ. 14Alɩ kɛn mlɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ medekle ɔbɛɛ, nyebi putuputu anfɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋ ɛ ɔfwɩ nɩ.
Nɩ Fʋ Ba Ɔpʋ Ɩla Gyi Fʋ
15“Nɩ fʋ ba ohogyipʋ ɔpʋ ɩla gyi fʋ a, yɔ mʋ wa, mlɩ abanyɔ pɛ amlɩblɩ mʋ́. Nɩ olonu ɩwɩasɩ a, falanya opio. 16Tamɛ nɩ omonu ɩwɩasɩ a, kpa ɔbakʋlɛ ntɛ abanyɔ manta ɩwɩsʋ amlɩyɔ mʋ wa, mɛnɩ bégyi asʋngyiasʋn ánɩ́ mlɛblɩ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ fɛ alɩá Bulu asʋn lɛblɩ. 17Nɩ omonu amʋ́ asʋn ɛ a, pʋ asʋn amʋ ya mlɩ ɔpasuafɔ. Tamɛ nɩ omonu amʋ́ asʋn ɛ a, mʋmʋ bu mʋ ɔmátɔyin ntɛ lampoo ɔhɔpʋ.
Asʋnkina Pʋ́ Mʋ́sʋ Tsula
18“Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Asʋngyiasʋn ánɩ́ mlékina ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ a, Bulu obékina mʋ́ ɔsʋsʋ. Mʋ́á mlótsula a, Bulu obótsula mʋ́sʋ ɔsʋsʋ.
19“Ntra ndɛblɩ mbɛɛ, nɩ mlɩ abanyɔ mlɔbwɛ agywɩɩn kʋlɛ ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ kʋlɩ tɔkʋ a, mɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mʋ́ ha mlɩ. 20Tsufɛ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛá aha abanyɔ-abasa befia mɩ ɩdatɔ a, mbʋ amʋ́ wa.”
Osumpʋ Owuntɔlɩnpʋ Ɩwɩ Yebi
21Mʋʋ Petro lɛba bɛfɩtɛ Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Wie, tsefɩnɩ nsikie mɩ ba nɩ ɔpʋ ɩla gyi mɩ? Tse sienɔ loo?”
22Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “O-o, megyi tse sienɔ fésikie mʋ, tse aduesienɔ (70) aku asienɔ. 23Ɩnɩ sʋ Bulu iwiegyi amʋ igyi fɛ asʋn anfɩ. Owie ɔkʋ lɔbwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ mʋa mʋ asumpʋ bóbu akunta. 24Brɛá olefi mʋ́ asɩ a, mʋ asumpʋ bɛkpa amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋá ɔdɛ mʋ ɩkɔ mpɩm-mpɩmtɔ ba mʋ. 25Tamɛ osumpʋ amʋ má tɔtɔá ɔbɔpʋka ɩkɔ amʋ sʋ a, owie amʋ lɛha ɔbɛɛ bʋfɛ mʋa mʋ ka, mʋ abi pʋ́ mʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ pʋkɩta ɩkɔ amʋtɔ. 26Ɩnʋ a, osumpʋ amʋ lɔkʋsʋ da akpawunu owie amʋ ayabitɔ, bwii ɩpa ha mʋ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩ Wie, nya klʋn ha mɩ. Ɩbwɛ nɛ́ka fʋ ɩkɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́.> 27Mʋ asʋn lɔwa mʋ wie amʋ nwɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ olesi ɩkɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ kie mʋ, ha mʋ ɔlɛnatɩ.
28“Tamɛ brɛá osumpʋ amʋ lɛdalɩ ɩnʋ a, ɔlɔyɔtʋ mʋ osumba ɔkʋá ɔdɛ mʋ ɩkɔ kpalobi kʋ. Ɔlɛkɩta mʋ ba amʋ ɔmɛtɔ kinkiinkin, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Pʋ mɩ kɔba ha mɩ!> 29Mʋ osumba amʋ ɛ lɛda akpawunu bwii ɩpa ha mʋ, bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Nya klʋn ha mɩ. Ɩbwɛ nɛka fʋ kɔ.> 30Tamɛ osumpʋ anfɩ mʋ́ motsula. Ɔlɛha ánɩ́ bʋpʋ mʋ yɛwa obu yɔfʋn ɛkɛá ɔbɛ́ka mʋ ɩkɔ amʋ. 31Mʋ asumba bowun tɔá alapʋgyi mʋ ba amʋ a, ilowie amʋ́ ɩwɩtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ bɔyɔ yɛbla amʋ́ wie asʋn amʋ fɛ́ɛ́. 32Mʋʋ amʋ́ wie amʋ lɛha bɛtɩ osumpʋ amʋ ba, ɔlɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Osumpʋ owuntɔlɩnpʋ, fʋ ɩpabwii sʋ nesi ɩkɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ amʋʋ fʋdɛ mɩ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ kie fʋ. 33Ɩma alɛá fʋ mʋ́ fówun fʋ ba amʋ nwɛ fɛ alɩá nowun fʋ nwɛ?> 34Ɔblɔ lɛkɩta owie amʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛha ɔbɛɛ, bʋwa mʋ obu, abʋpɩtɩ mʋ atɔ yɔfʋn ɛkɛá ɔbɛ́ka ɩkɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
35“Alɩ mɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mlɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋá omesi mʋ ba lakpan kie mʋ tsu mʋ klʋntɔ nɩ.”

Title: MATEO 19
Content:
Ɔkakina Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
(Marko 10:1-12)
1Brɛá Yesu lɔtɔɩ ta a, ɔlɛnatɩ Galilea ɔmátɔ yɔ Yudea ɔmátɔ Yordan ntsu amʋ ɔbɩn. 2Ɔdɔm kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ bobuo mʋ, ɔlɛtsa amʋ́ ɩlɔ ɩnʋ.
3Farisifɔ akʋ bɛba mʋ wa bɔsɔ mʋ kɩ, fɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Anɩ Mbla lɛha ɔkpa ánɩ́ oyin ɔbɛ́talɩ kina mʋ ka ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ?”
4Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩmɔkʋkla Bulu asʋn amʋ kɩ ánɩ́ brɛ amʋʋ Bulu lefi ɔyɩ asɩ a, ɔtsɩ mʋ́a oyin ɔlɔbwɛ? 5Bulu lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Ɩnɩ sʋ oyin obótu si mʋ sɩ mʋa mʋ yin yɛmanta mʋ kasʋ, amʋ́ abanyɔ bɔ́bwɛ ɔyʋlʋ kʋlɛ nɩ.> 6Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, bʋtra bʋmegyi abanyɔ, tamɛ babwɛ ɔbakʋlɛ. Aha ánɩ́ Bulu labwɛ amʋ́ ɩkʋlɛ a, ɔhaa mámaɩn amʋ́ abasʋ.”
7Farisifɔ amʋ bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ Mose lɔwa mbla ɔbɛɛ, oyin ɔbɛ́talɩ wanlɩn ɔkakina ɔwʋlʋ pʋkina mʋ ka?”
8Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩ klʋntɔ odwin sʋ Mose lɛha mlɩ ɔkpa ɔbɛɛ, mlɩkina mlɩ aka. Tɛkɩ megyi alɩ Bulu lɔbwɛ mʋ́ brɛá olefi ɔyɩ amʋ asɩ nɩ. 9Tamɛ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, nɩ oyin okina mʋ ka layetsia ɔtsɩ bamba a, alatɔ mbʋa. Ɔkpa oduá sʋá oyin ɔbɛ́talɩ kina mʋ ka pɛ gyi aladalɩ mʋ ɔma.”
10Mʋʋ mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Nɩ alɩ oklu mʋ́a ɔka abatsiatɔ asʋn igyi nɩ mʋ́ a, mʋmʋ ɩma alɛá oyin mʋa ɔtsɩ bétsia aba po.”
11Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Megyi aha fɛ́ɛ́ ɔbɛ́talɩ hɔ atosunahɛ anfɩ. Nkɛtɩ aha ánɩ́ Bulu lɔpʋha amʋ́ pɛ. 12Tsufɛ ɩna ɔkpa tsɔtsɔɔtsɔsʋ ayin akʋ bʋtamatsia aka. Ayin amʋ akʋ a, alɩ bɔkwɩɩ amʋ́ nɩ. Akʋ ɛ anyankpʋsa laflo amʋ́. Akʋ ɛ basin kpankʋ Bulu iwiegyi amʋ sʋ. Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbɛ́talɩ a, ɔhɔ mɩ atosunahɛ anfɩ.”
Nyebi Yula
(Marko 10:13-16; Luka 18:15-17)
13Aha akʋ bɛkpa nyebi ba Yesu bɛɛ, ɔpʋ ɩbɩ dɩnka amʋ́sʋ, ɔkʋlɩ Bulu oyula ha amʋ́. Tamɛ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɔwa ɩyɩn wa amʋ́. 14Mʋʋ Yesu lɛbla akasɩpʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩha nyebi amʋ ɔkpa abʋba mɩ wa. Mlɩmátin amʋ́ ɔkpa, tsufɛ aha anfɩ odu bʋ Bulu iwiegyi amʋ nɩ.”
15Mʋʋ ɔlɔpʋ ɩbɩ dɩndɩnka amʋ́sʋ, ɔlɛnatɩ ɩnʋ a.
Atonyahɛ Ɩwɩ Atosunahɛ
(Marko 10:17-31; Luka 18:18-30)
16Ɛkɛ ɔkʋ oyin ɔkʋ lɛba Yesu wa bɛfɩtɛ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Osunapʋ, yile mɔmʋ nɔ́bwɛ asa nénya nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata?”
17Yesu lɛfɩtɛ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛ mɩ yile ɩwɩ asʋn fɩtɛ? Ɔbakʋlɛ pɛ gyi ɔha yile. Mʋgyi Bulu. Tamɛ nɩ fʋdekleá fʋnya nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata a, mʋmʋ gyi Bulu mbla asʋn amʋsʋ.”
18Oyin amʋ lɛlafɩtɛ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋ́tɔ mɔmʋ?”
Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Mámɔ ɔha, mátɔ mbʋa, máwi atɔ, máka asʋn dɩnka fʋ basʋ. 19Bu fʋ sɩ mʋ́a fʋ yin, afʋdwɛ fʋ ba fɛ fʋ ɩwɩ.”
20Ɔyasubi amʋ lɛbla Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Ntegyi mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ. Ntɔ ɛ ntra bwɛ?”
21Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ fʋdekleá fɔ́fʋn mʋ́ a, yɛfɛ fʋ ɩwɩsʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́, afʋye kɔba amʋ ha ahianfɔ; mɛnɩ fénya siadɩɛ ɔsʋsʋ. Fɔbwɛ mʋ́ ta a, ba afʋbobuo mɩ.”
22Brɛá ɔyasubi amʋ lonu asʋn anfɩ a, ɩlɛhɩɛ han mʋ, ɔlɛnatɩ diin, tsufɛ ɔhɩɛ ɔbʋ atɔ.
23Mʋʋ Yesu lɛbla mʋ akasɩpʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, ɩbɛ́hɩɛ wa ɔnlɩn asa ɩwɩ onyapʋ obówie Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ. 24Ntra ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, ɩlɔpɔn ha kpɔsɔ ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́tsʋn ɔbɩn-atɔ ɔbɔtɔ, dʋn ánɩ́ ɩwɩ onyapʋ obówie Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ.”
25Akasɩpʋ amʋ bonu asʋn anfɩ a, ɔnɔ lobwie amʋ́. Ɩnɩ sʋ bɛfɩtɛ bɛɛ, “Mʋmʋ ma mɛɛ Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ nkpa?”
26Ɩnʋ Yesu lɛlɩɩ kɩ amʋ́ alɩɩ. Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Anyankpʋsatɔ mʋ́ a, ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ bwɛ ɩnɩ, tamɛ Bulu mʋ́ tɛtalɩ bwɛ togyitɔ.”
27Mʋʋ Petro lɛfɩtɛ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɩnɩá anɩlasi togyitɔ tswɩ bobuo fʋ a, ntɔ abénya tsu fʋ buotɔ?”
28Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Brɛá Bulu ɔbwɛ ɔyɩ pɔpwɛ amʋ, mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ netsia mɩ numnyam owie obia amʋsʋ a, mlɩ aha anfɩ mlɩbuo mɩ anfɩ ɛ mlétsia awie mbia duanyɔsʋ, gyi Israel abusuan duanyɔ amʋ asʋn. 29Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ alanatɩ si mʋ woyi, mʋ apio, mʋ sɩ mʋa mʋ yin, mʋ abi ntɛ ɔsʋlʋ mɩ sʋ a, Bulu ɔbɛ́la ha mʋ mʋ́ tse du tse lafa, tra laha mʋ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata. 30Tamɛ agyankpapʋ akʋ bɛba bemli amapʋ, amapʋ amʋ akʋ ɛ bébemli agyankpapʋ.”

Title: MATEO 20
Content:
Ndɔtɔ Agyʋma Ayɔpʋ Ɩwɩ Yebi
1Yesu lɛtra bla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋ́ sʋ Bulu iwiegyi amʋ igyi fɛ asʋn anfɩ. Ɔdɔtɔpʋ ɔkʋ letsia. Ɛkɛ ɔkʋ ɔlɔkʋsʋ nyankɩ-nyankɩ ɔyɔ ɩpa agyipʋ odunkakpa, abʋyɛyɔ agyʋma mʋ ndɔtɔ. 2Mʋa amʋ́nyɔ begyi bia ánɩ́ ɔbɛ́ka amʋ́ alɩá bʋtɔhɔ ɛkɛwʋlɛ, ɔlɔpʋ amʋ́ sɩsɩ agyʋma amʋ ɔyɔkpa. 3Dokwebatɔ a, ɔlɛdalɩ yɔ dɩnsʋ, oloyowun akʋ ɛ bʋlɩɩ, bʋmɛdɛ tɔtɔ bwɛ. 4Olotsu amʋ́ ɛ ɔbɛɛ, bʋyɔyɔ agyʋma mʋ ndɔtɔ ha mʋ. Ɩbwɛ ɔbɛ́ka amʋ́ tɔá ɩbʋ alɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ bɔyɔ. 5Doduanyɔ pʋ́ dɔsatɔ ɛ a, ɔlɛtra pʋ akʋ sɩsɩ ndɔ amʋtɔ. 6Ntʋpwɛ donutɔ brɛá ɔlɛdalɩ a, ɔlɛtra wun akʋá bʋlɩɩ kpaalɩ. Mʋʋ ɔlɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Ntogyi sʋ ndɛ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩlɩɩ nfɩ, mlɩmɛdɛ tɔtɔ bwɛ?> 7Bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, ‘Ɔhaa mɔkʋbɔ anɩ ɩpa.> Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mʋmʋ mlɩ ɛ mlɩbɔtsʋn yɔyɔ agyʋma mɩ ndɔtɔ.>
8“Brɛá owi lɔpɔn a, ɔdɔtɔpʋ amʋ lɛtɩ mʋ agyʋmasʋ ɔkɩpʋ bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, ɔtɩ ɩpa agyipʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́, ɔka amʋ́ akɔ. Ɔka amʋ́ tsu amapʋ amʋsʋ alɩɩ bɔtʋ agyankpapʋ amʋ. 9Brɛá ɩpa agyipʋ amʋ bɛba a, agyʋmasʋ ɔkɩpʋ amʋ lɛka aha amʋʋ bɔyɔ donutɔ amʋ alɩá bʋtɔhɔ ɛkɛwʋlɛ. 10Brɛá ɩlɔtʋ agyankpapʋ amʋ a, bʋkɩ bɛɛ bénya dʋn alɩ, tamɛ alɩ kɛn ɔlɛka amʋ́ ɛ nɩ. 11Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛka amʋ́ akɔ ta a, agyankpapʋ amʋ bɔwa tɔtɔɩ ɔdɔtɔpʋ amʋsʋ bɩ. 12Bɛblɩ bɛɛ, ‘Amapʋ anfɩ mʋ́ a, dɔnhwɩrɩ kʋlɛ pɛ bɔyɔ agyʋma. Anɩ mʋ́ anɩlalɩɩ owi-kpankpli anfɩsʋ yɔ agyʋma, tamɛ faka anɩa amʋ́nyɔ fɛ́ɛ́ akɔ kʋlɛ.>
13“Ɔdɔtɔpʋ amʋ lɛbla amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋlɛ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Agya, yɛ mmɔkʋtafa fʋ o! Megyi ɩtɔ amʋʋ mɩa fʋnyɔ anɩlɛblɩ amʋ napʋha fʋ a? 14Pʋ fʋ atɔ natɩ. Mɩdekle mbɛɛ, nɛ́ha amapʋ amʋ alɩá naka fʋ. 15Mma ɔkpa pʋ mɩ kɔba bwɛ tɔá ndekle? Ntɛ mɩ awɩtɔlɛwa dɛ fʋ ɩwɩtɔ wie?>
16“Alɩ amapʋ bɔ́bwɛ agyankpapʋ, agyankpapʋ ɛ bɔ́bwɛ amapʋ nɩ.”
Yesu Lowu Ɩwɩ Asʋn Blɩ Otse Sasɩ
(Marko 10:32-34; Luka 18:31-34)
17Brɛá Yesu ɔyɔ Yerusalem a, ɔlɛkpa akasɩpʋ duanyɔ amʋ ya ɩtsɛtɔ bla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, 18“Mlɩnu! Ayɔ Yerusalem. Ɩnʋ a, bɛlɛ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ha Bulu igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ. Bɛha mɩ lowu ɩpɔn. 19Bɔ́pʋ mɩ wa aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ ɩbɩtɔ bɔ́bwɛ mɩ ahinla, nwɛn mɩ mplɩ, da mɩ manta oyikpalihɛsʋ. Tamɛ Bulu ɔbɛ́lakʋsʋa mɩ ɛkɛ sasɩ tsu afulitɔ.”
Abi Oyin Ɔkʋ Atɔ Kʋlɩhɛ
(Marko 10:35-45)
20Mʋʋ Sebedeo mʋ ka lɛkpa mʋ abi anyɔ bɛba. Ɔlɛda akpawunu Yesu ayabitɔ, kʋlɩ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, ɔbwɛ tɔkʋ ha mʋ.
21Yesu lɛfɩtɛ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ntɔ fʋdekle?”
Ɔtsɩ amʋ lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ha mɩ abi anyɔ anfɩtɔ ɔkʋlɛ otsia fʋ gyɔpɩsʋ, ɔkʋlɛ ɛ otsia fʋ bɩnasʋ brɛá fʋdɛ iwie gyi.”
22Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩmeyin tɔá mlɩdɛkʋlɩ.” Ɔlɛfɩtɛ Yohane mʋa Yakobo ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɛ́talɩ wun ɩwɩɔsɩn amʋʋ nɛba bowun amʋ?”
Bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, “Ee, abɛ́talɩ.”
23Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlówun ɩwɩɔsɩn amʋ mʋ́, tamɛ mma tumiá nɛ́lɛ aha ánɩ́ bétsia mɩ gyɔpɩsʋ ntɛ mɩ bɩnasʋ. Otsiakpa ɩnʋ ɩda gyo aha amʋʋ mɩ Sɩ Bulu lala ɩnʋ yaɩ ha amʋ.”
24Brɛá akasɩpʋ du atrahɛ amʋ bonu asʋn anfɩ a, Yakobo mʋa Yohane ɩwɩ lɔwa amʋ́ ɔblɔ. 25Mʋʋ Yesu lɛtɩ amʋ́, bla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩyin ánɩ́ ɔmátɔfɔsʋ agyipʋ bʋtɛhɩɛ amʋ́ aha, amʋ́ ahandɛ ɛ bʋtenya tumi amʋ́sʋ. 26Tamɛ mlɩtɔ mʋ́ a, ɩmába alɩ. Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ odekleá ɔbɔ́bwɛ mlɩtɔ ɔhandɛ ɔbwɛ mʋ ɩwɩ osumpʋ ha mʋ aba atrahɛ. 27Ɔha ánɩ́ odekleá ɔbɔ́bwɛ mlɩ nkpa ogyapʋ ɔbwɛ mlɩ ɔkpábi. 28Alɩ kɛn mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ɛ mmɛba mbɛɛ, bʋsum mɩ nɩ. Aha osumkpa nɛba, ampʋ mɩ nkpa hɔ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ nkpa.”
Ansibi Abwiepʋ Abanyɔ Ɩlɔ Tsa
(Marko 10:46-52; Luka 18:35-43)
29Brɛá Yesu mʋa mʋ akasɩpʋ bʋdɛdalɩ Yeriko wulutɔ bɔyɔ a, ɔdɔm kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ bobuo amʋ́. 30Ansibi abwiepʋ abanyɔ akʋ bʋtsie ɔkpa amʋtɔ, bonuá Yesu dɛtsʋn. Ɩnʋ bɔkplʋn blɩ bɛɛ, “Anɩ Wie, Dawid mʋ na, wun anɩ nwɛ.”
31Ɔdɔm amʋ bɔkplʋn wa amʋ́ bɛɛ, bʋkpa ɔnɔ bun. Tamɛ bɛlakplʋn dʋn alɩ bɛɛ, “Anɩ Wie, Dawid mʋ na, wun anɩ nwɛ!”
32Mʋʋ Yesu lesi lɩɩ, tɩ amʋ́, ɔlɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ntɔ mlɩdekle mlɩaa, mbwɛ ha mlɩ?”
33Bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, “Anɩ Wie, ha anɩ awun atɔ.”
34Ɩnʋ amʋ́ asʋn lɔwa Yesu nwɛ, ɔlɔpʋ mʋ ɩbɩ dada amʋ́ ansibi. Ɩnʋnʋ bowun atɔ, bɛkpla buo mʋ.

Title: MATEO 21
Content:
Bɔhɔ Yesu Fɛ Owie Yerusalem
(Marko 11:1-11; Luka 19:28-40; Yohane 12:12-19)
1-2Brɛá Yesu mʋa mʋ akasɩpʋ bɛbɛn Yerusalem wulu, bɛta Betfage wuluá ɩbʋ Olif ɩbʋsʋ amʋ asɩ wie ta a, ɔlɔwa mʋ akasɩpʋ abanyɔ gyankpa. Ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩyɔ wulu anfɩ ɩda mlɩ ansɩtɔ anfɩsʋ. Nɩ mlowie wulu amʋ ɔnɔ a, mlówun afrimu tsɩhɛ ɔkʋá ɔda ɔfɛtɔ, mʋ bi lɩɩ mʋ wa. Mlɩsankɩ mʋ, amlɩkpa amʋ́ ba mɩ. 3Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔfɩtɛ mlɩ asʋankʋ a, mlɩbla mʋ mlɩaa, ‘Anɩ Wie dɛ amʋ́ hian.> Ɩnʋnʋ ɔbɛ́ha mlɔ́pʋ amʋ́ ba mɩ.”
4Ɩnɩ lɛha Bulu asʋn amʋʋ ɔlɛblɩ tsʋn mʋ ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋsʋ amʋ lɛba mʋ́tɔ. Ɔbɛɛ,
5“Mlɩbla Sionfɔ mlɩaa,
Mlɩkɩ, mlɩ Wie ɔba mlɩ wa.
Ololwii, ɔdɩn afrimusʋ.
Ɔdɩn afrimu ibi yinhɛsʋ ɔba.”
6Yesu akasɩpʋ abanyɔ amʋ bɔyɛbwɛ alɩ amʋʋ Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ amʋ. 7Bɛkpa afrimu mʋa mʋ bi amʋ ba, bɛyaɩ amʋ́ atati dɩnka amʋ́sʋ, ɔlɔdʋ bian mʋsʋ. 8Ɔdɔm kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ bɛyaɩ amʋ́ atati tswɩ ɔkpatɔ, akʋ ɛ bebiabia afɩta bunbun ɔkpa amʋtɔ. 9Ɔdɔm amʋʋ bʋgya Yesu nkpa mʋ́a ɔma amʋ bɔsʋra okitikiti bɛɛ, “Hosiana ha Dawid mʋ na amʋ! Bulu oyula owie anfɩ ɔba mʋ ɩdatɔ anfɩ! Hosiana bʋ ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ!”
10Brɛá Yesu lowie Yerusalem a, wulu amʋtɔ fɛ́ɛ́ lɛda kpokiti, bʋdɛfɩtɛ bɛɛ, “Ma gyi ɔha anfɩ?”
11Ɔdɔm amʋʋ bʋbuo mʋ amʋ bɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ bɛɛ, “Ɔ́nɩ gyi Yesu, Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ amʋʋ otsu Nasaret wuluá ɩbʋ Galilea ɔmátɔ amʋ nɩ.”
Yesu Bulu Ɔtswɛkpa Yɔ
(Marko 11:15-19; Luka 19:45-48; Yohane 2:13-22)
12Mʋʋ Yesu lɔyɔ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa wunsɩnɛsʋ ɩnʋ, yegya atɔ afɛpʋ pʋ́ atɔ ahɔpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ dalɩ. Olowuwuta kɔba atsɛpʋ mpʋnʋ da, sunsunki alɔpɔ afɛpʋ ɛ mbia da. 13Ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, ‘Bɛtɩ mɩ ɔtswɛkpa bɛɛ, mpaɩ ɔbɔkpa.> Tamɛ mlɩlapʋ ɩnʋ mli awikplu oŋainkpa.”
14Ansibi abwiepʋ pʋ́ abubupʋ akʋ bɛba mʋ wa Bulu ɔtswɛkpa wunsɩnɛsʋ ɩnʋ, ɔlɛtsa amʋ́ ɩlɔ. 15Brɛá Bulu igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ amʋ bowun ofula ánɩ́ Yesu dɛbwɛ, pʋ́ alɩá nyebi bʋdɛkplʋn Bulu ɔtswɛkpa wunsɩnɛsʋ ɩnʋ bɛɛ, “Hosiana ha Dawid mʋ na amʋ!” a, ɔblɔ lɛkɩta amʋ́. 16Mʋ́ sʋ bɛfɩtɛ Yesu bɛɛ, “Fʋmedenu asʋn ánɩ́ nyebi anfɩ bʋdɛblɩ?”
Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Ndenu. Mlɩmɔkʋkla asʋn ánɩ́ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ? Ɔbɛɛ, ‘Fasuna nyebi pʋ́ amʋ́á bʋmɔkʋtɩn nyɔpʋ alɩá bʋkanfʋ fʋ.> ”
17Yesu lɛdalɩ wulu amʋtɔ si amʋ́ yɔ Betania. Ɩnʋ ɔlɛdɩ ɛkɛ amʋ nɩ.
Pɔntɔ Oyi Lwɩɩ
(Marko 11:12-14, 20-24)
18Ɔyɩ kɛhɛ nyankɩ, brɛá Yesu leyinki ɔba Yerusalem a, akʋn dɛ mʋ. 19Mʋ́ sʋ brɛá olowun pɔntɔ kʋá ɩlɩɩ manta ɔkpa a, ɔlɛbaɩ yɔ mʋ́ asɩ. Ɔlɔyɔ a, omowun abi kʋkʋ mʋ́tɔ. Afɩta sɔɔn bʋ mʋ́sʋ. Ɩnʋ ɔlɛbla pɔntɔ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Tsu ndɛ, fʋmɛ́ɛtra swie abi ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ!” Ɩnʋnʋ oyi amʋ lowu.
20Mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bowun alɩá oyi amʋ labwɛ a, ɔnɔ lobwie amʋ́. Mʋ́ sʋ bɛfɩtɛ bɛɛ “Ntogyi sʋ oyi anfɩ lawu ɔtsawʋlɛ pɛ alɩ?”
21Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Nɩ mlɔhɔ Bulu gyi, mlɩmegyi nwɛn a, mlɛ́talɩ bwɛ ɩtɔ anfɩ nabwɛ oyi anfɩ pʋ́ mʋ́á ɩdʋn mʋ́. Mlɛ́talɩ bla ɩbʋ anfɩ mlɩaa, ‘Puli yowie ɔpʋtɔ.> Ibópuli yɔ. 22Nɩ mlɔhɔ Bulu gyi, mlɔkʋlɩ mʋ togyitɔ a, mlɩ ɩbɩ bɛ́da mʋ́.”
Yesu Tumi Ɩwɩ Asʋn Fɩtɛhɛ
(Marko 11:27-33; Luka 20:1-8)
23Yesu leyinki bowie Bulu ɔtswɛkpa wunsɩnɛsʋ ɩnʋ. Brɛá ɔdɛ atɔ suna a, Bulu igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn pʋ́ Yudafɔ ahandɛ amʋ bɛba mʋ wa. Bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Ma lɛha fʋ ɔkpa, fʋdɛ ntobi anfɩ bwɛ? Ma lɛha fʋ tumi?”
24Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ ɛ nfɩtɛ mlɩ asʋn kuakʋlɛ. Nɩ mlɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ a, nɛ́bla mlɩ tumi oduá ndɛpʋbwɛ ntobi anfɩ. 25Bulu wa Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane lenya tumi pʋbɔ aha asu, ntɛ nyankpʋsa?”
Amʋ́ wʋlɛwʋlɛ bɔyɔ asʋn anfɩtɔ bɛɛ, “Nɩ ablɩ anɩaa itsu Bulu wa a, ɔbɛ́fɩtɛ anɩ ɔbɛɛ, mʋ́ ntogyi sʋ anɩmɔhɔ mʋ gyi? 26Ntɛ ablɩ anɩaa, anyankpʋsa wa itsu?” Tamɛ bʋdɛ tɔá ɔdɔm amʋ bɔ́bwɛ amʋ́ ifu nya. Tsufɛ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bohogyi ánɩ́ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yohane gyi. 27Mʋ́ sʋ bɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ bɛɛ, “Ohwee! Anɩmeyin ɔtɩnɛá olenya mʋ tumi tsu.”
Mʋʋ Yesu ɛ lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋmʋ mɩ ɛ mmɛ́ɛbla mlɩ tumi oduá ndɛpʋbwɛ ntobi anfɩ.”
Oyin Ɔkʋ Abi Anyɔ Ɩwɩ Yebi
28“Mlɩyɔ asʋn anfɩtɔ amlɩkɩ. Oyin ɔkʋ mʋa mʋ abi anyɔ betsia. Ɛkɛ ɔkʋ ɔlɔyɔ yɛbla ɔdɛhɛn ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩ bi, ndɛ yɔyɔ agyʋma mɩ ndɔtɔ ha mɩ.> 29Ɔlɛbla mʋ sɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mmɔ́ɔyɔ.> Mʋ́ ɔma a, ɔlɛlatsɛ mʋ agywɩɩn, yɔ ndɔ amʋtɔ. 30Amʋ́ sɩ lɛnatɩ yɔ ɔkʋsʋ amʋ ɛ wa yɛbla mʋ alɩ kɛn. Ɔkʋsʋ amʋ lotsula ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩ sɩ, nɔ́yɔ.> Tamɛ ɔmɔyɔ.” 31Ɩnʋ Yesu lɛfɩtɛ aha amʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Abi anyɔ anfɩtɔ ɔmɔmʋ lɔbwɛ dɩnka mʋ sɩ asʋnsʋ?”
Yudafɔ igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn pʋ́ Yudafɔ ahandɛ amʋ bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, “Ɔdɛhɛn amʋ.”
Mʋʋ Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Lampoo ahɔpʋ pʋ́ obu-ɔnɔ atsiapʋ bówie Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ si mlɩ. 32Tsufɛ Asu Ɔbɔpʋ Yohane lobosuna mlɩ tsiatɔ oduá ɩda ɔkpa Bulu ansɩtɔ, tamɛ mlɩmɔhɔ mʋ gyi. Lampoo ahɔpʋ pʋ́ obu-ɔnɔ atsiapʋ bɔhɔ mʋ gyi. Ɔma mlɩlowun ánɩ́ amʋ́ kʋraa batsɛ a, mlɩmɛtsɛ mlɩ agywɩɩn hɔ mʋ gyi.
Apafɔ Lalahɛ Akʋ
(Marko 12:1-12; Luka 20:9-19)
33“Mlɩnu yebi ɩkʋ ɛ. Ɔdɔtɔpʋ ɔkʋ lɔdɔ waɩn ndɔ. Olegyi ɩban bomli mʋ́. Olokwi waɩn amʋ onyimɛkpa. Ɔlɔpwɛ obu fʋahɛ kʋ ha ndɔ amʋ agyopʋ. Mʋʋ ɔlɔpʋ ndɔ amʋ wa apafɔ ɩbɩtɔ, olotu ɔkpa yɔ ɔmá ɩkʋtɔ. 34Brɛá waɩn-abi amʋ kpɔtɩbɩ lɔfʋn a, ɔlɔwa mʋ asumpʋ apafɔ amʋ wa ɔbɛɛ, bʋyɛhɔ mʋ ogyikpa ba mʋ. 35Tamɛ apafɔ amʋ bɛkɩta amʋ́, da ɔkʋlɛ, mɔ ɔkʋlɛ, da ɔkʋlɛ ɛ abwi. 36Ndɔ mʋ wie amʋ lɛtra wa mʋ asumpʋ bamba ánɩ́ bʋtsɔ dʋn agyankpapʋ amʋ. Apafɔ amʋ bɔbwɛ amʋ́ ɛ alɩ kɛn. 37Mʋ́ trahɛ kʋraa a, ɔlɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Oo, bóbu mɩ bi kwɩɩhɛ mʋ́.> Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔwa mʋ ɛ. 38Tamɛ brɛá apafɔ amʋ bowun mʋ bi amʋ sɩsɩ a, bɛbla aba bɛɛ, ‘Ɔ́nɩ obégyi mʋ sɩ atɔ nɩ. Mlɩha amɔ mʋ, mɛnɩ ndɔ amʋ ibémli anɩ klɛ.> 39Mʋ́ sʋ bɛkɩta mʋ, bɩtɩa mʋ dalɩ ndɔ amʋtɔ yɔmɔ mʋ.”
40“Nɩ ndɔ mʋ wie ɔba a, ntɔ mlɩlahogyi mlɩaa, ɔbɔ́bwɛ apafɔ anfɩ?”
41Yudafɔ igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn pʋ́ Yudafɔ ahandɛ amʋ bɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ bɛɛ, “Ɔbɛ́ha aha lalahɛ anfɩ bówu lowu-sɩnsɩn, ɔbɛ́lapʋ ndɔ amʋ wa apafɔ bamba ɩbɩtɔ. Amʋ́á bétsia pʋ mʋ atɔ-abi ba mʋ mʋ́ kpɔtɩbɩ.”
42Mʋʋ Yesu lɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ntɛ mlɩmɔkʋkla Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ kɩ? Bɔwanlɩn bɛɛ,
‘Ibwi amʋʋ obu ayipʋ bekina amʋ
lebemli okonkisʋbwi nɩ.
Bulu lɔbwɛ mʋ́ alɩ,
ɩbʋ wanwan.>
43“Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mʋ iwiegyi amʋ lɛ mlɩ ɩbɩtɔ pʋha ɔmá ánɩ́ bɔ́bwɛ tɔá otekle.
44“Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɛdɩda ibwi amʋsʋ obébiabia blublublublu. Nɩ ibwi amʋ isunki da ɔkʋsʋ ɛ a, ɩbɔ́kwɛ mʋ fɩkɔfɩkɔfɩkɔ fɛ nfuo.” 45Brɛá Bulu igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn pʋ́ Farisifɔ amʋ bonu Yesu ayebi anfɩ a, ɩlɔwankɩ amʋ́ ánɩ́ amʋ́ ɔdɛ. 46Tɛkɩ bekleá bɛ́kɩta mʋ, tamɛ benya ifu, tsufɛ ɔdɔm amʋ bʋtobu Yesu ánɩ́ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ ogyi.

Title: MATEO 22
Content:
Ɔtsɩkpaɩn Ɩwɩ Yebi
(Luka 14:15-24)
1-2Yesu lɛtra bla Yudafɔ igyi ahapʋ pʋ́ Yudafɔ ahandɛ amʋ asʋn yebitɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu iwiegyi amʋ igyi fɛ asʋn anfɩ. Owie ɔkʋ dɛ ɔtsɩ kpaɩn ha mʋ bi, 3ɔlɛtɩ aha ɔbɛɛ, bʋba nkɛ amʋ asɩ. Brɛá owie amʋ lɔbwɛ ta a, ɔlɔwa mʋ asumpʋ ɔbɛɛ, bʋyɛtɩ aha amʋ abʋba, tamɛ bekina ba. 4Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛlawa mʋ asumpʋ bamba ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mlɩtra yɛbla aha amʋ mlɩaa, nabwɛ togyitɔ ta. Bamɔ mɩ nnantswie akpɔnkpɔntɩ amʋ pʋ́ amʋ́á bawa nfɔ, nɩna atɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ta. Mʋ́ sʋ bʋba ɔtsɩ ɔkpaɩnkpa ɩnʋ.> 5Tamɛ aha amʋʋ bɛyɛtɩ amʋ bʋmɛkpla amʋ́. Bɛnatɩ si amʋ́ yɔ amʋ́ agyʋmasʋ. Akʋ bɛnatɩ yɔ amʋ́ ndɔtɔ, akʋ ɛ bɛnatɩ yɔ amʋ́ ibia ogyikpa. 6Amʋ́ atrahɛ bɛkɩta asumpʋ amʋ, da amʋ́, mɔ amʋ́. 7Brɛá owie amʋ lonu asʋn anfɩ a, ɔblɔ lɛhɩɛ kɩta mʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔwa mʋ ɩsa akɔpʋ, bɔyɔmɔ aha amʋʋ bɔmɔ mʋ asumpʋ amʋ, wa amʋ́ wulu ogya. 8Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla mʋ asumpʋ bamba ɔbɛɛ, ‘Banɩna ɔtsɩkpaɩn atogyihɛ amʋ ta, tamɛ aha amʋʋ nɛtɩ amʋ bʋmɔfʋn ha mɩ woyitɔ ba. 9Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩwie awulutɔ, amlɩtɩ ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ mlówun, ɔba ɔtsɩ ɔkpaɩnkpa ɩnʋ.> 10Ɩnʋ asumpʋ amʋ bowie awulutɔ. Bɛtɩ ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ bowun, aha wanklaan pʋ́ aha lalahɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Mʋ́ sʋ aha bɔbʋla ɔtsɩ ɔkpaɩnkpa ɩnʋ dɛdɛɛdɛ.
11“Tamɛ brɛá owie amʋ lɛbɛkɩ aha amʋʋ batɩ amʋ a, olowun oyin ɔkʋá ɔmɔwa ɔtsɩkpaɩn nkɛtɔ atadɩɛ. 12Mʋʋ ɔlɛfɩtɛ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Agya, nkalɩ ɩlɔbwɛ fʋmɔwa ɔtsɩkpaɩn nkɛtɔ atadɩɛ asa fɛba nfɩ?> Oyin amʋ mɛtalɩ lɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ. 13Mʋʋ owie amʋ lɛla bla mʋ asumpʋ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mlɩklɩ mʋ ayabi pʋ́ mʋ ɩbɩ, amlɩtswɩ mʋ wa oklun amʋtɔ. Ɩnʋ isu mʋa kpisi bʋ nɩ.> ”
14Yesu lɔmɔ mʋ asʋn ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu tɛtɩ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ, tamɛ aha kpalobi pɛ ɔtɛlɛ.”
Lampooka
(Marko 12:13-17; Luka 20:20-26)
15Farisifɔ amʋ bɔyɛbwɛ ɔnɔ-ɔkʋlɛ ánɩ́ bɛtɛtɛ Yesu ɔnɔtɔ asʋn nu, abʋnya mʋ akɩtalɛ. 16Mʋ́ sʋ bɔwa amʋ́ akasɩpʋ pʋ́ Owie Herode aha Yesu wa bɛɛ, bʋyɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Osunapʋ, anɩyin ánɩ́ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ fʋgyi, fʋtosuna Bulu asʋn amʋ ɛ ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ. Fʋtamaha ɔhaa ɔtsɛ fʋ agywɩɩn, tsufɛ fʋtamakɩ ɔhaa ansɩtɔ. 17Mʋ́ sʋ anɩdɛ fʋ fɩtɛ anu. Anɩ mbla lɛha ɔkpa ánɩ́ aka lampoo ha Roma owie dɛhɛn Kaesare, ntɛ anɩmáka?”
18Tamɛ Yesu lowun amʋ́ agywɩɩn lalahɛ amʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ, ntogyi sʋ mlɩdɛ mɩ sɔ kɩ? 19Mlɩtsu kɔba amʋʋ bʋtɔpʋka lampoo amʋ ɩkʋ ba mɩ ankɩ.”
Bɔpʋba mʋ, 20ɔlɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ma nwun pʋ́ mʋ ɩda dɩn mʋ́sʋ?”
21Bɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ bɛɛ, “Kaesare.”
Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋmʋ mlɩpʋ tɔá igyi Kaesare klɛ ha Kaesare, amlɩpʋ mʋ́á igyi Bulu klɛ ɛ ha Bulu.”
22Yesu mbuaɩ anfɩ lobwie amʋ́ ɔnɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ bɛnatɩ.
Kʋsʋ Tsu Afulitɔ Ɩwɩ Asʋn Fɩtɛhɛ
(Marko 12:18-27; Luka 20:27-40)
23Ɛkɛ amʋ kɛn a, Sadukifɔ akʋ bɛba Yesu wa. Bʋgyi ɔpasua kʋá bʋtɛblɩ bɛɛ, kʋsʋ tsu afulitɔ má ɩnʋ. Bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, 24“Osunapʋ, Mose lɔwanlɩn tswɩ anɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Nɩ ɔkʋ mʋa mʋ ka bʋmɔkwɩɩ asa olowu si mʋ ka amʋ a, mʋ pio otsu mʋ ka amʋ tsia, fɛkɩ ɔkwɩɩ ha owupʋ amʋ.> 25Oyin ɔkʋlɛ abi abasienɔ akʋ betsia. Amʋ́tɔ ogyankpapʋ letsia ɔka, tamɛ ɔmɔkwɩɩ asa olowu. Mʋ pio lotsu ɔsʋrapʋka amʋ tsia, 26tamɛ mʋ ɛ ɔmɔkwɩɩ. Ɔsasɩ lotsu ɔtsɩ amʋ tsia. Mʋ ɛ ɔmɔkwɩɩ. Alɩɩ yɔtʋ osienɔsɩ amʋ. 27Ɔma-ɔma a, ɔsʋrapʋ mʋ ɛ lobowu. 28Afuli ɔkʋsʋkɛ a, amʋ́tɔ ɔmɔmʋ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mʋ klu? Tsufɛ amʋ́ abasienɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ betsia mʋ.”
29Mʋʋ Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Megyi mlɩ ologyi. Mlɩmeyin Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ ntɛ Bulu tumi. 30Nɩ afuli bɔkʋsʋ a, bɔ́bwɛ fɛ Bulu-abɔpʋ. Bʋméetsia aka mʋ́a aklu. 31Mlɩmɔkʋkla asʋn ánɩ́ Bulu onuto lɛbla mlɩ tsu afulikʋsʋ ɩwɩ? 32Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩgyi mlɩ anain Abraham mʋa Isakɩ pʋ́ Yakob Bulu amʋ nɩ.> Ɩnɩ sʋ megyi awupʋ Bulu ogyi, akɩankpapʋ Bulu ogyi.”
33Brɛá ɔdɔm amʋ bonu asʋn anfɩ a, mʋ atosunahɛ anfɩ lɛha ɔnɔ lobwie amʋ́.
Bulu Mbla Amʋtɔ Mʋ́á Ɩdʋn
(Marko 12:28-34; Luka 10:25-28)
34Brɛá Farisifɔ bowun ánɩ́ Yesu lalɛ Sadukifɔ amʋ asʋn ɔnɔ, asʋn lawu wa amʋ́ ɔnɔ a, bɛkpa aba ya Yesu wa. 35Amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋlɛá ogyi mbla osunapʋ lɛfɩtɛ Yesu asʋn, ɔpʋsɔ mʋ kɩ. 36Ɔlɛfɩtɛ Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Osunapʋ, Bulu mbla amʋtɔ mɔmʋ dʋn?”
37Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “ ‘Pʋ fʋ klʋn, fʋ ɔkla pʋ́ fʋ agywɩɩn fɛ́ɛ́ dwɛ fʋ Wie Bulu.> 38Ɩnɩgyi mbla amʋtɔ gyankpapʋ ánɩ́ ɩdʋn mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ nɩ. 39Nyɔsɩ ɛ igyi fɛ mʋ́. ‘Dwɛ fʋ ba fɛ fʋ ɩwɩ.> 40Mose Mbla pʋ́ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ amʋ atosunahɛ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩlɩɩ mbla anyɔ anfɩsʋ.”
Ma Gyi Kristo Amʋ?
(Marko 12:35-37; Luka 20:41-44)
41Ɩnɩá Farisifɔ amʋ bebefia si bʋlɩɩ sʋ a, Yesu lɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, 42“Nkalɩ mlɩdɛ Kristo, (ɔha amʋʋ Bulu lada mʋ ofuli amʋ) ɩwɩ gywɩɩn? Ma mʋ na nɩ?”
Bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, “Owie Dawid mʋ na nɩ.”
43Ɔlɛlafɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋ́ ntogyi sʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ lɛha Owie Dawid lɛtɩ mʋ ɔbɛɛ ‘Mɩ Wie?> Tsufɛ Owie Dawid lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
44‘Anɩ Wie Bulu lɛbla mɩ Wie ɔbɛɛ,
Tsia mɩ gyɔpɩsʋ nfɩ,
yɔfʋn brɛá nɛ́ha fɛ́tsatsa fʋ alupʋsʋ?>
45Nɩ Owie Dawid onuto lɛtɩ ɔha anfɩ Bulu lada ofuli anfɩ ɔbɛɛ, mʋ wie a, nkalɩ sʋ ɔtra ogyi mʋ na?”
46Amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋkʋ mɛtalɩ lɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ. Tsu ɛkɛ amʋ a, ɔhaa mɛtra wa klʋn fɩtɛ mʋ asʋansʋ.

Title: MATEO 23
Content:
Mose Mbla Asunapʋ Pʋ́ Farisifɔ Tsiatɔ
(Marko 12:38-39; Luka 11:43, 46; 20:45-46)
1Asʋn anfɩ ɔma a, Yesu lɛbla ɔdɔm amʋ pʋ́ mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, 2“Mose mbla Farisifɔ pʋ́ Mbla asunapʋ amʋ bʋdesuna. 3Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩgyi amʋ́ asʋn blɩhɛ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ, tamɛ mlɩmátsia amʋ́ atsiabi. Tsufɛ bʋtamagyi amʋ́ onuto asʋn blɩhɛsʋ. 4Bʋtɔpʋ atɔ dwindwin sʋra aha, tamɛ amʋ́ onuto bʋtamapʋ osrebi ɔkʋlɛ kʋraa tsa amʋ́ tsu. 5Bʋtɔbwɛ amʋ́ togyitɔ aha ansɩsʋ. Bʋtɔwanlɩn Bulu asʋn dɩnka tati tɛɩhɛsʋ, pʋklɩ amʋ́ ɔsʋkpɩ pʋ́ amʋ́ bɩna ɩbasʋ. Bʋtɔlʋ nfɛ tɩntɩntɩn siansian amʋ́ atadɩɛ ɔnɔ. 6Bʋtekle otsiakpa yile tsia nkɛ ogyikpa pʋ́ Yudafɔ Ofiakpa. 7Bɛdalɩ yɔ dɩnsʋ a, bʋtekle bɛɛ aha bʋtɩ amʋ́ bɛɛ, ‘Asunapʋ,> abʋbun ha amʋ́ itsia. 8Mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ a, apio mlɩgyi. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmáha abʋtɩ mlɩtɔ ɔhaa osunapʋ. Ɔbakʋlɛ pɛ gyi mlɩ osunapʋ. 9Alɩ kɛn mlɩmátɩ ɔhaa mlɩ sɩ ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ nɩ. Tsufɛ Ɔsɩ ɔkʋlɛ pɛ mlɩbʋ, ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ. 10Trahɛ-trahɛ a, mlɩtɔ ɔhaa máha abʋtɩ mʋ nkpa ogyapʋ. Tsufɛ nkpa ogyapʋ ɔkʋlɛ pɛ mlɩbʋ. Mʋgyi Kristo, (ɔha amʋʋ Bulu lada mʋ ofuli amʋ). 11Mlɩtɔ ɔhandɛ ɔbwɛ mlɩ osumpʋ. 12Tsufɛ fʋa fotsu ɩwɩ a, Bulu ɔbɛ́ba fʋ asɩ. Fʋa fɛba ɩwɩasɩ ɛ a, Bulu obótsu fʋ fʋa.
Apinabwɛbi Abwɛpʋ
(Marko 12:40; Luka 11:39-42, 44, 52; 20:47)
13-14“Mlɩ Farisifɔ pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ, apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ, mlɩgyɔwɩ nɩ. Mlɩlatin Bulu iwiegyi amʋ ɔkpa wa aha. Mlɩ onuto mlɩmedekleá mlówie ɩnʋ, mlɩdɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mbɔdɩ bɔá bówie ɩnʋ ɛ ɔkpa tin.
15“Mlɩ Farisifɔ pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ, apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ, mlɩgyɔwɩ nɩ. Tsufɛ mlɩtɛfa ɩlɩn fa ɔpʋ, dʋ ɩbʋ kplɩ ɩbʋ ha ɔha tɛdamli klʋntɔ. Tamɛ nɩ ɔdamli klʋntɔ ta a, mlɩtɛlabwɛ mʋ otemli ɩsʋbɩtɩ ogya ánɩ́ ɩtamaduntɔ ɔyɔpʋ dʋn mlɩ onuto.
16“Ansibi abwiepʋ ánɩ́ mlɩdɛ aha kpa, mlɩgyɔwɩ nɩ. Mlɩtɛblɩ mlɩaa, ‘Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔka Bulu ɔtswɛkpa obu amʋ ntam a, imehian ánɩ́ obégyi mʋ́sʋ. Tamɛ nɩ ɔka sika pɛpɛ atɔá ɩbʋ ɔtswɛkpa obuto ɩnʋ mʋ́ ntam a, ilehian ánɩ́ obégyi mʋ́sʋ.> 17Ansibi abwiepʋ! Aha mimlahɛ! Mʋ́tɔ mɔmʋ bʋ labi dʋn? Sika pɛpɛ atɔ amʋ loo, ntɛ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa obu amʋʋ ɩlaha sika amʋ lamli Bulu klɛ amʋ? 18Mlɩtɛtra blɩ mlɩaa, ‘Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔka afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩ ntam a, imehian ánɩ́ obégyi mʋ́sʋ. Tamɛ nɩ ɔka afɔdɩɛ-abɔtɔ amʋ ntam mʋ́ a, ilehian ánɩ́ obégyi mʋ́sʋ.> 19Ansibi abwiepʋ! Mʋ́tɔ mɔmʋ bʋ labi dʋn? Afɔdɩɛ-abɔtɔ amʋ ntɛ afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩ amʋʋ ɩlaha mʋ́ ɩlamli Bulu klɛ amʋ? 20Nɩ fɛka afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩ amʋ ntam a, faka ɔswɩ amʋ pʋ́ atɔá ɩdɩn mʋ́sʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ntam. 21Nɩ fɛka Bulu ɔtswɛkpa amʋ ntam a, faka Bulu mʋa mʋ otsiakpa ntam. 22Nɩ fɛka ɔsʋsʋ ntam a, faka Bulu mʋa mʋ owie obia ntam.
23“Mlɩ Farisifɔ pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ, apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ, mlɩgyɔwɩ nɩ. Mlɩteye mlɩ ɔtsʋtsʋ pʋ́ kpantankplama aná fɛ́ɛ́tɔ idu, pʋ idusɩ ha Bulu. Tamɛ mlɩmɛdɛ Bulu mbla amʋʋ ɩhɩɛ dehian, igyi asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ, aba nwewun pʋ́ ɔnɔkwalɩwa amʋsʋ gyi. Mʋ́dehian nɩ, tamɛ mlɩmákina iyetɔ dusɩ amʋ ɛ ha. 24Ansibi abwiepʋá mlɩdɛ aha kpa, mlɩgyɔwɩ nɩ. Mlɩtɔtsrɔ mbepi lɛ oputsutɔ, tamɛ mlɩtɛmɛ mbewun.
25“Mlɩ Farisifɔ pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ, apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ, mlɩgyɔwɩ nɩ. Tsufɛ mlɩtɔfwɩ mlɩ nwɛ pʋ́ mlɩ nlɛpɛ ɔma wanklaan, tamɛ atɔá mlɩlapʋ owi mʋ́a ɔnsɩpɛ swɩɩ aha sɔɔn bʋ mʋ́tɔ. 26Farisifɔ ansibi abwiepʋ, mlɩgyankpa fwɩ nwɛ mʋ́a nlɛpɛ amʋtɔ, mʋ́ ɔma ɛ bɛ́tɩn.
27“Mlɩ Farisifɔ pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ, apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ, mlɩgyɔwɩ nɩ. Mlɩlabwɛ fɛ ntsan ánɩ́ bakpa mʋ́ afa fututuutu, mʋ́ ɩwɩ lawa akɩlɛ. Tamɛ mʋ́tɔ mʋ́ a, afuli awú pʋ́ atɔ plɔhɛ sɔɔn bɔ mʋ́. 28Alɩ kɛn mlɩgyi nɩ. Aha bʋtɛkɩ mlɩ ánɩ́ mlɩgyi yile abwɛpʋ. Tamɛ mlɩ klʋntɔ mʋ́ a, apinabwɛbibwɛ mʋa lalahɛbwɛ sɔɔn bɔ mʋ́.
Bulu Ɩsʋbɩtɩ
(Luka 11:47-51)
29-30“Mlɩ Farisifɔ pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ, apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ, mlɩgyɔwɩ nɩ. Tsufɛ mlɩtɔpwɛ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ pʋ́ yile abwɛpʋ amʋʋ betsia amʋ ntsan, la mʋ́ ɩwɩ wanklaan, blɩ mlɩaa, ‘Nɩ anɩletsia anɩ anain brɛsʋ asa bɔmɔ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ anfɩ a, tɛkɩ anɩmɔwa ɩbɩ mʋ́tɔ.> 31Mlɩ asʋn blɩhɛ anfɩ desuna ánɩ́ mlɩgyi Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ amɔpʋ amʋ abi-aná nɩ. 32Mlɩwuna yɔ mʋ́sʋ, amlɩmɔ mlɩ anain bwɛhɛ amʋ ɔnɔ. 33Awɔ, abɛ abi-aná! Mlɛ́talɩ srɩ si ɩpɔn amʋʋ Bulu ɔbɛ́ha mlɩ, kpa mlɩ wa ɩsʋbɩtɩ ogya amʋʋ ɩtamaduntɔ amʋ? 34Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ, anyansapʋ pʋ́ Mose mbla asunapʋ wa sɩsɩ mlɩ. Tamɛ mlɔ́mɔ akʋ, da amʋ́tɔ akʋ manta oyikpalihɛsʋ. Mlɔ́nwɛn amʋ́tɔ akʋ mplɩ mlɩ ofiakpa, dɩnka akʋsʋ tsu awulusʋ yɔ awulusʋ. 35Ɩnɩ sʋ yile abwɛpʋ amʋʋ mlɩa mlɩ anain mlɩlamɔ tsu Habelsʋ bɔfʋn Sakaria, ogyi Barakia mʋ bi amʋʋ mlɩlɔmɔ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa obu mʋ́a afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩ amʋ nsɩnɛ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ obugya bɛ́ba mlɩsʋ. 36Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Ɩnɩ aná fɛ́ɛ́ sʋ Bulu ɩsʋbɩtɩ bɛ́ba mlɩ ndɛmba-abi anfɩsʋ nɩ.
Yerusalemfɔ Ɩwɩ Ɔdwɛ
(Luka 13:34-35)
37“Oo, Yerusalemfɔ, Yerusalemfɔ! Mlɩtɔmɔ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ, da abi ánɩ́ Bulu lawa sɩsɩ mlɩ abwi mɔ nɩ. Ntekleá nóbun mlɩ abisʋ bregyibrɛ, fɛ alɩá batɛ tobun mʋ abisʋ, tamɛ mlɩtamaha mɩ ɔkpa. 38Mlɩkɩ, Bulu obési mlɩ ɔtswɛkpa tswɩ mlɩ, ɩbɛ́dɩ kpan. 39Tsufɛ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, mlɩmɛ́ɛtra wun mɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ, yɔfʋn ɛkɛá mlɛblɩ mlɩaa, ‘Bulu oyula ɔha amʋʋ ɔba mʋ ɩdatɔ.> amʋ.”

Title: MATEO 24
Content:
Bulu Ɔtswɛkpa Amʋ Bwie
(Marko 13:1-2; Luka 21:5-6)
1Brɛá Yesu lɛdalɩ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ ɔyɔ a, mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛnatɩ yɔtʋ mʋ, suna mʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ mbu amʋ. 2Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩlawun mbu akpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́? Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Bóbwie mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bun. Ibwi kʋlɛ kʋraa méesian dɩnka mʋ́ basʋ.”
Ɩwɩɔsɩn Mʋ́a Ɩkplan
(Marko 13:3-13; Luka 21:7-19)
3Brɛá Yesu tsie Olif ɩbʋ amʋsʋ, ɔdɛ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa amʋ kɩ a, mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ nkʋlɛ bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Bla anɩ, brɛ mɔmʋtɔ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́ba? Osuna mɔmʋ ɛ ɔbɛ́ba, ibósuna ánɩ́ fʋ babɩ pʋ́ ɔyɩ ɔnɔmɔkɛ lafʋn?”
4Ɩnʋ Yesu lɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩkɩ wanklaan, mɛnɩ ɔhaa mɛ́ɛmlɛ mlɩ. 5Tsufɛ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɔ́pʋ mɩ ɩda ba bɛɛ, amʋ́gyi Kristo, (ɔha amʋʋ Bulu lada mʋ ofuli amʋ) nɩ. Bɛ́mlɛ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɔ́fwɩ ɔkpa. 6Nɩ mlonuá ɩsa lada manta mlɩ ntɛ ɔtɩnɛkʋ a, opuni mátsii mlɩ. Tsufɛ lehian ánɩ́ ɩnɩ aná fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́ba, tamɛ imedesuna ánɩ́ ɔyɩ ɔnɔmɔkɛ amʋ lafʋn. 7Tsufɛ ɔmá bɔ́kɔ aba. Awie bɔ́kʋsʋ lɩɩ abasʋ. Akʋn bɛ́ba, ɔsʋlʋ bɛ́kpɩnkɩ ntɩnɛ-ntɩnɛ. 8Ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi fɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn ánɩ́ ɔtsɩ towun brɛá ɩkwɩɩ dɛ mʋ dwiin.
9“Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, mɩ sʋ ɔmá-ɔmá bólu mlɩ. Bɛ́dɩnka mlɩsʋ, pʋ mlɩ ha bɔ́wa mlɩ amʋmʋyɔ, mɔ mlɩ. 10Mlɩtɔ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛ́dɩda hogyitɔ. Bólu aba, lɛ aba ha. 11Afunu awapʋá bɛ́blɩ bɛɛ, Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ bʋgyi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛ́ba bɛmlɛ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ, ha amʋ́ bɔ́fwɩ ɔkpa. 12Lalahɛbwɛ bómoni. Mʋ́ sʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋmɛ́ɛtra dwɛ aba. 13Tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɛtalɩ lɩɩ kinkiinkin yɔfʋn ɔyɩ ɔnɔmɔkɛ a, Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mʋ nkpa. 14Mʋ́ oo a, aha bɛ́da Bulu iwiegyi amʋ ɩwɩ asʋn wanklaan anfɩ ɔkan ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́, mɛnɩ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bónu mʋ́ asa ɔyɩ bɔ́mɔ ɔnɔ.
Ɩwɩɔsɩn Wunbɩ
(Marko 13:14-23; Luka 21:20-24)
15“Nɩ mlowun akisitɔá itobwie ɔmá, ɩda Ɔwankɩkpa ɩnʋ, ɩdɛ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ kpɔɩ, fɛ alɩá Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Daniel lɛblɩ tswɩ a,---Aklapʋ, mlɩnu mʋ́ asɩ!--- 16Mʋmʋ aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ Yudea ɔmátɔ bʋsrɩ yɔ abʋsʋ. 17Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɩn obusʋ mákplɩ ɔbɛɛ, móyotsu tɔtɔ obuto. 18Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ ndɔtɔ ɛ ɔmáyinki ba woyitɔ botsu mʋ tati. 19Amenyapʋ pʋ́ abi-ayín ánɩ́ bʋpia abi bɔbwɛ alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ bʋgyɔwɩ nɩ. 20Mlɩkokoli Bulu mlɩaa, mlɩ ɔsrɩkɛ amʋ ɩmábwɛ nyankpʋ mʋ́a atsalɩbɩ ntɛ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ. 21Tsufɛ tsu ɔyɩ asɩtsuabɩ a, asʋn wunhɛ ánɩ́ ɩbɛ́ba alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ odu kʋkʋ mɔkʋba kɩ. Mʋ́ odu kʋkʋ ɛ mɛ́ɛtra ba ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 22Nɩ Bulu mɛdɩnkɩ nkɛ amʋsʋ a, tɛkɩ ɔhaa méesian ɔyɩtɔ. Tamɛ aha amʋʋ alalɛ pʋbwɛ mʋ klɛ amʋ sʋ aladɩnkɩ nkɛ amʋsʋ.
23“Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, nɩ ɔkʋ lɛbla fʋ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Kɩ, Kristo (ɔha amʋʋ Bulu lada mʋ ofuli amʋ) bʋ nfɩ ntɛ nana> a, máhogyi. 24Tsufɛ aha ánɩ́ bɛɛ amʋ́gyi Kristo amʋ pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bɔ́wa afunu bɛɛ, Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ bʋgyi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛ́ba ɔyɩtɔ. Bɔ́bwɛ ofula pʋ́ osuna akpɔnkpɔntɩ pʋmlɛ aha. Nɩ bɛ́talɩ kʋraa a, bɛ́mlɛ aha amʋʋ Bulu lalɛ amʋ ɛ. 25Mlɩnu, ndɛ mlɩ ɔla da yaɩ asa ɩba.
26“Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔbla mlɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Kɩ, Kristo amʋ laba ɔbʋ ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ> a, mlɩmádalɩ yɛkɩ. Alɩ kɛn nɩ bɛblɩ bɛɛ, ‘Ɔbʋ obutotɔ> ɛ a, mlɩmáhogyi nɩ. 27Tsufɛ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ɔbakɛ ɩbɔ́bwɛ fɛ alɩ amʋʋ nyankpʋ tɔfwɩ ɩbɩ, bʋtowun mʋ́ tsu owi ɔdalɩkpa yɛdalɩ owi ɔkplɩwiekpa amʋ.
28“Ɔtɩnɛá ɩtɔ wuhɛ da a, ɩnʋ alasa bʋtefia.
Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi Amʋ Ɩbabɩ
(Marko 13:24-27; Luka 21:25-28)
29“Ɩwɩɔsɩn-wun amʋ ɔma a, owi ɔbɛ́ta, ɔtsra ɛ ɔmɛ́ɛtra fɛɩ. Ntsrakpabi bɛ́kpa tsu ɔsʋsʋ bɛda. Nwʋlʋta mʋ́a mʋ́tɔ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́kpɩnkɩ. 30Mʋ́ ɔma a, mlówun mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ɩba ɩwɩ osuna ɔsʋsʋ. Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bósu. Ɔhagyiɔha obówun ánɩ́ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ napʋ tumi mʋ́a numnyam kpɔnkpɔntɩ mbʋ nwʋlʋtatɔ tsu ɔsʋsʋ nɛba. 31Ɩnʋ a, ɔkpɛ kʋ ɩbɛ́lɩn kʋklʋkʋʋ, Bulu ɔbɔ́wa mʋ abɔpʋ bɛ́yɛkpa mʋ aha amʋʋ alalɛ amʋ tsu ɔyɩ afʋnka ana amʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
Ɔyɩ Ɔnɔmɔ Ɩwɩ Osuna
(Marko 13:28-31; Luka 21:29-33)
32“Mlɩpʋkɩ pɔntɔ oyi. Nɩ mʋ́ abambi dɛpɔɩ, ɩdɛ atɛ pɔpwɛ lɛ a, mlɩtɛbɩ ánɩ́ awikpan brɛ lafʋn. 33Alɩ kɛn, nɩ mlowun ánɩ́ ntobi anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩdɛ mʋ́tɔ ba a, mlɛbɩ ánɩ́ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ɩbabɩ lafʋn ta nɩ. Nawie woyi amʋ ɔnɔ ta. 34Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, ndɛmba-abi anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋmóowu ta asa ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛba mʋ́tɔ. 35Ɔsʋ mʋa asɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔ́tsʋn, tamɛ mɩ asʋn blɩhɛ mɔ́ɔtsʋn ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.
Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi Amʋ Ɔbakɛ
(Marko 13:32-37; Luka 17:26-30, 34-36)
36“Ɔhaa meyin ɛkɛ ntɛ brɛá ntobi anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbɛ́ba. Bulu-abɔpʋ bʋmeyin. Bulu mʋ Bi amʋ ɛ meyin, nkɛtɩ anɩ Sɩ amʋʋ ɔbʋ ɔsʋsʋ amʋ nkʋlɛ pɛ yin. 37Alɩ amʋʋ ilegyi Noa brɛsʋ amʋ a, alɩ ibégyi mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ɛ ɩbabɩ nɩ. 38Tsufɛ asa ntsubʋlabɩ amʋ lɔfʋn a, aha betsia bʋdɛ atɔ gyi, bʋdɛ nta nun, bʋdɛ aka tsia, bʋdɛ atsɩ kɩta ha aklu alɩɩ yɔfʋn ɛkɛá Noa lowie mʋ daka kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ amʋtɔ. 39Ɔhaa mɛbɩ tɔá ɩdɛ mʋ́sʋ yɔ, kpɛfʋn brɛá ntsu amʋ lɔbʋla sʋra amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ natɩ. Alɩ kɛn bʋmɛ́ɛbɩ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ɩbabɩ nɩ. 40Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, nɩ ayin abanyɔ bʋlɩɩ ndɔ kʋlɛtɔ bʋdɛ agyʋma yɔ a, Bulu obótsu ɔkʋlɛ si ɔkʋlɛ. 41Nɩ atsɩ abanyɔ bʋdɛ nfuo kwɛ a, Bulu obótsu ɔkʋlɛ si ɔkʋlɛ.
42“Mlɩdɩnka ansɩ ɩwɩsʋ, tsufɛ mlɩmeyin ɛkɛá mlɩ Wie ɔbɛ́ba. 43Tamɛ mlɩnu asʋn anfɩ. Nɩ woyi mʋ wie yin onye brɛá owikplu ɔbɛ́ba mʋ woyitɔ a, tɛkɩ ologyo mʋ woyi, owikplu mobwie wie, wi mʋ atɔ. 44Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩ ɛ mlɩgyo, tsufɛ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ nɛ́ba brɛá mlɩ ansɩ mɛdɩn mɩsʋ.
Osumpʋ Wanklaan Pʋ́ Ɔlalahɛ
(Luka 12:41-48)
45“Ma mɛɛ gyi osumpʋá ɔlɛtɩn ansɩ, ɔbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ? Mʋ ɩbɩtɔ mʋ wie tɔpʋ mʋ aba atrahɛ wa, ɔbɛɛ ɔha amʋ́ atogyihɛ dɩnka brɛsʋ. 46Ansɩ bégyi osumpʋ amʋ, nɩ mʋ wie amʋ ɔba bowun ánɩ́ lɛlɛ ɔdɛ mʋ́ bwɛ. 47Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Mʋ wie amʋ ɔbɔ́pʋ mʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ wa mʋ ɩbɩtɔ. 48Tamɛ nɩ osumpʋ lalahɛ ogyi, ɔlɛblɩ wa nwuntɔ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩ wie mɛ́ɛba sei.> 49Ɩnɩ sʋ olefi asɩ ɔdɛ mʋ aba asumpʋ da, mʋa nta abʋpʋ bʋdɛ atɔ gyi si amʋ́, bʋdɛ nta nun bʋ a, 50mʋ wie amʋ ɔbɛ́ba bofwie mʋtɔ ɛkɛá ɔmɛdɩn ansɩ. 51Mʋ wie amʋ ɔbɛ́hɩɛ tɩtɩ mʋtɔ, tra bɩtɩ mʋa apinabwɛbifɔ amʋ asʋ kɛkɛ. Ɩnʋ isu mʋ́a kpisi bʋ nɩ.

Title: MATEO 25
Content:
Mbitebi Du Akʋ Ɩwɩ Yebi
1“Bulu iwiegyi amʋ ɩbɔ́bwɛ fɛ mbitebi du akʋá botsu amʋ́ nkandɩɛ dalɩ beyefia ɔka pɔpwɛ otsiapʋ ɔkʋ. 2Amʋ́tɔ abanu bemimla, abanu ɛ bɛtɩn ansɩ. 3Aha mimlahɛ amʋ botsu amʋ́ nkandɩɛ, tamɛ bʋmotsu nfɔ kʋkʋ kɩta. 4Tamɛ atɩansɩpʋ amʋ botsu nfɔ wa atɔtɔ kɩta. 5Ɔka otsiapʋ amʋ mɔkɔsɩ ba. Mʋ́ sʋ mbitebi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔgyɔsɩ, tsʋn mʋ́tɔ dɩdɩ.
6“Ɔyɩ-nsɩnɛ a, ɔkʋ lɔsʋra okitikiti ɔbɛɛ, ‘Anɩ pɩ, ɔka otsiapʋ amʋ ɔba o! Mlɩdalɩ yefia mʋ!> 7Ɩnʋ mbitebi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔkʋsʋ nywɛ amʋ́ nkandɩɛ. 8Aha mimlahɛ amʋ bɛbla atɩansɩpʋ amʋ bɛɛ, ‘Anɩ nkandɩɛ dedun. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha anɩ nfɔ kpalobi awa anɩ klɛtɔ.> 9Mʋʋ atɩansɩpʋ amʋ bɛbla amʋ́ bɛɛ, ‘O-o, ɩmɔtsɔ. Ɩmɔ́ɔfʋn anɩa mlɩnyɔ. Mlɩyɔ afɛpʋ wa, amlɩyɛhɔ mlɩ klɛ.> 10Brɛá aha mimlahɛ amʋ bɔpʋ ɔkpa bɔyɔ a, ɔka otsiapʋ amʋ lɛba. Amʋ́ amʋʋ bɛda ɩwɩsʋ amʋ bobuo ɔka otsiapʋ amʋ wie ɔka otsiakpa ɩnʋ, oyin amʋ asumpʋ befin obu amʋ.
11“Mʋ́ ɔma a, mbitebi atrahɛ amʋ ɛ bɛba bɛlɩɩ klʋn ɔma, blɩ bɛɛ, ‘Anɩ sɩ, finki ha anɩ awie.> 12Tamɛ ɔka otsiapʋ amʋ lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla, mmeyin mlɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ.> ”
13Yesu lɔmɔ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩda ɩwɩsʋ. Tsufɛ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ nɛ́ba brɛá mlɩ ansɩ mɛdɩn mɩsʋ.
Asumpʋ Abasa Ɩwɩ Yebi
(Luka 19:11-27)
14“Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi amʋ ɩbabɩ bɔ́bwɛ fɛ ɔkʋá ɔdɛ ɔkpa tu, ɔlɛtɩ mʋ asumpʋ, ye mʋ atɔ ha amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, bʋkɩ mʋ́sʋ yaɩ mʋ. 15Ɔlɔpʋ sika pɛpɛ akɛntɛ anu ha ɔkʋlɛ, pʋ akɛntɛ anyɔ ha onyɔsɩ; ɔlɔpʋ kɛntɛ kʋlɛ ɛ ha ɔsasɩ. Ɔlɛha okugyiɔkʋ mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔnɔ asa ɔlɛnatɩ. 16Osumpʋ amʋʋ olenya akɛntɛ anu amʋ lɔwa ɔsa pʋ kɔba amʋ fi ibiagyi asɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩmɔwa ɔpá kʋkʋ, olenya akɛntɛ anu dɩnka mʋ́sʋ. 17Onyɔsɩ amʋ ɛ lɛdamli ɩbɩ mʋ sika pɛpɛ akɛntɛ anyɔ amʋsʋ alɩ kɛn. Mʋ́ sʋ olenya akɛntɛ anyɔ dɩnka mʋ́sʋ. 18Tamɛ ɔsasɩ amʋʋ olenya kɛntɛ kʋlɛ amʋ mʋ́ loyokwi ɔbɔ, pʋ mʋ wie sika pɛpɛ amʋ ŋain mʋ́tɔ.
19“Ɩlɔwa ɔpá asa amʋ́ wie amʋ lotsu mʋ ɔkpa amʋ ba, ɔlɛtɩ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, mʋa amʋ́nyɔ bóbu akunta. 20Osumpʋ amʋʋ olenya sika pɛpɛ akɛntɛ anu amʋ lotsu mʋ́a mʋ́sʋ ɔdɩnka akɛntɛ anu amʋ ba mʋ wie, bɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩ wie, fɛha mɩ sika pɛpɛ akɛntɛ anu. Mɩ ɛ nanya akɛntɛ anu dɩnka mʋ́sʋ. Mʋ́ nɩ.> 21Mʋ wie amʋ lɛda mʋ ɩpan, blɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Fabwɛ atɔ. Osumpʋ wanklaan fʋgyi. Ɩnɩá fawa ɔnɔkwalɩ atɔ tukuriibi anfɩtɔ sʋ a, nɔ́pʋ fʋ yaɩ mɩ atɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ɔnɔ. Ba afʋbetsia mɩ wa, anya ansigyi.>
22“Osumpʋ onyɔsɩ amʋʋ olenya sika pɛpɛ akɛntɛ anyɔ amʋ ɛ lɛbla mʋ wie ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩ wie, sika pɛpɛ akɛntɛ anyɔ fɛha mɩ. Mɩ ɛ nanya anyɔ dɩnka mʋ́sʋ. Mʋ́ nɩ.> 23Mʋ wie amʋ lɛda mʋ ɩpan, blɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Fabwɛ atɔ. Osumpʋ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ fʋgyi. Ɩnɩá fawa ɔnɔkwalɩ atɔ tukuriibi anfɩtɔ sʋ a, nɔ́pʋ fʋ yaɩ mɩ atɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ɔnɔ. Ba afʋbetsia mɩ wa, anya ansigyi.>
24“Mʋʋ osumpʋ amʋʋ olenya sika pɛpɛ kɛntɛ kʋlɛ amʋ ɛ lɛbɛbla mʋ wie ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩ wie, nyin ánɩ́ fʋ asʋn bʋ ɔnlɩn. Fʋtɔkpɔtɩ atɔ ɔtɩnɛá fʋmodu; fʋtɛkpa atɔ-abi ɔtɩnɛá fʋmɛfɩta. 25Mʋ́ sʋ nenya ifu pʋ fʋ sika pɛpɛ amʋ ŋain ɔbɔtɔ. Mʋ́ nɩ, hɔ fʋ atɔ.>
26“Ɩnʋ mʋ wie amʋ lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Osumpʋ lalahɛ, ɔwʋlɩyɔpʋ fʋgyi. Fʋyin ánɩ́ ntɔkpɔtɩ atɔ ɔtɩnɛá mmodu, ntɛkpa atɔ-abi ɔtɩnɛá mmɛfɩta atɔ. 27Ɩnɩá fʋyin mʋ́ alɩ a, tɛkɩ fɔpʋ yɔtswɩ sika ɔyaɩkpa. Ɩnɩá naba a, tɛkɩ nɔ́yɛhɔ mʋ́a mʋ́sʋ abi.> 28Mʋʋ oyin amʋ lɛbla mʋ asumpʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mlɩswɩɩ mʋ sika pɛpɛ kɛntɛ kʋlɛ amʋ ha ɔmʋamʋʋ alanya akɛntɛ idu amʋ. 29Tsufɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ tsɔtsɔ a, bɛtra pʋ ɩkʋ tsɩa mʋ́tɔ ha mʋ, obénya tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ. Tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔma a, bɔ́swɩɩ mʋ kpalobibiá ɔbʋ, 30amlɩtswɩ osumpʋ anfɩ ɔma labi anfɩ wa okluntɔ. Ɩnʋ isu mʋ́a kpisi bʋ nɩ.>
Asʋngyi
31“Nɩ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ nɛba mɩ iwie ogyikpa, Bulu-abɔpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋbuo mɩ a, nétsia mɩ ɔsʋsʋ numnyam owie obiasʋ. 32Bɛ́kpa ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ befia mɩ ansɩtɔ. Ɩnʋ nɔ́tɔsɩ amʋ́tɔ, fɛ alɩá mbwɩ ɔkpapʋ tɔtɔsɩ akufa lɛ akpalatɔ. 33Fówun naha akufa amʋ balɩɩ mɩ gyɔpɩsʋ, akpala amʋ ɛ balɩɩ mɩ bɩnasʋ. 34Ɩnʋ mɩ anfɩ ngyi Owie anfɩ nɛ́bla aha amʋʋ bʋlɩɩ mɩ gyɔpɩsʋ amʋ mbɛɛ, ‘Mlɩ aha anfɩ mɩ Sɩ layula anfɩ mlɩba, amlɩbetsia iwiegyi amʋʋ ɔlɛla yaɩ ha mlɩ tsu ɔyɩ asɩtsuabɩ ɔpá amʋtɔ. 35Tsufɛ akʋn lɛkɩta mɩ a, mlɩlɛha mɩ atɔ negyi. Ɔmɛwʋlɩ lɛkɩta mɩ, mlɩlɛha mɩ ntsu nonun. Nɔbwɛ ɔfɔɔ, mlɩlɔhɔ mɩ ɔfɔɔ. 36Nɛnatɩ yaya, mlɩlɛha mɩ tati nɛdɩda. Nɔlɔ, mlɩlɛkɩ mɩ. Nɛdɩ obu, mlɩlɛba bɛkɩ mɩ.>
37“Ɩnʋ yile abwɛpʋ amʋ bɛfɩtɛ mɩ bɛɛ, ‘Anɩ Wie, ɔmɛnkɛ anɩlowun ánɩ́ akʋn dɛ fʋ, anɩlɛha fʋ atɔ fegyi? Ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ fʋ, anɩlɛha fʋ ntsu fonun? 38Fɔbwɛ ɔfɔɔ, anɩlɔhɔ fʋ ɔfɔɔ? Ɔmɛnkɛ fɛnatɩ yaya, anɩlɛha fʋ tati fɛdɩda? 39Ɔmɛnkɛ fɔlɔ, ntɛ fɛdɩ obu, anɩlɛba bɛkɩ fʋ?>
40“Ɩnʋ mɩ anfɩ ngyi Owie anfɩ nɛ́bla amʋ́ mbɛɛ, ‘Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Togyitɔá mlɩlɔbwɛ ha mɩ apio anfɩ aha bʋtamabu amʋ́ wa ahatɔ anfɩtɔ ɔkʋ a, mɩ mlɩlɔbwɛ mʋ́ ha a.>
41“Ɩnʋ nɛ́bla aha amʋʋ bʋlɩɩ mɩ bɩnasʋ amʋ ɛ mbɛɛ, ‘Mlɩkpʋkpɛ tɛɩ nfɩ. Bulu lalwɩɩ mlɩ. Mlɩyɔ ogya amʋʋ ɩtamadun, Bulu lɛla yaɩ ha Ɔbʋnsam mʋa mʋ abɔpʋ amʋtɔ. 42Tsufɛ akʋn lɛkɩta mɩ, mlɩmɛha mɩ atogyihɛ. Ɔmɛwʋlɩ lɛkɩta mɩ, mlɩmɛha mɩ ntsu annun. 43Nɔbwɛ ɔfɔɔ, mlɩmɔhɔ mɩ ɔfɔɔ. Nɛnatɩ yaya, mlɩmɛha mɩ tati andɩda. Nɔlɔ, nɛdɩ obu; mlɩmɛkɩ mɩ.>
44“Ɩnʋ amʋ́ ɛ bɛfɩtɛ mɩ bɛɛ, ‘Anɩ Wie, ɔmɛnkɛ anɩlowun ánɩ́ akʋn dɛ fʋ, ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ fʋ, fʋgyi ɔfɔɔ, fʋna yaya, fʋdɛlɔ ntɛ fʋda obu; anɩmɛbɛkɩ fʋ?> 45Ɩnʋ mɩ anfɩ ngyi Owie anfɩ nɛ́bla amʋ́ mbɛɛ, ‘Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Alɩ amʋʋ mlɩmɔbwɛ mʋ́ ha mɩ apio anfɩ aha bʋtamabu amʋ́ wa ahatɔ anfɩtɔ ɔkʋ a, mɩ mlɩmɔbwɛ ha a.> 46Bulu ɔbɛ́ha amʋ́ bɔ́yɔ ɩwɩɔsɩn ánɩ́ ɩtamatatɔ, tamɛ yile abwɛpʋ amʋ mʋ́ bénya nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata.”

Title: MATEO 26
Content:
Yesu Nwunsʋ Kɩklɩ
(Marko 14:1-2; Luka 22:1-2; Yohane 11:45-53)
1Brɛá Yesu losuna atɔ anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ta a, ɔlɛbla mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, 2“Mlɩyin ánɩ́ ɩlasi nkenyɔ bégyi Israelfɔsʋ Katsʋn Nkɛ. Nkɛ amʋtɔ a, ɔkʋ ɔbɔ́pʋ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ wa mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ, bɛ́da mɩ manta oyikpalihɛsʋ.”
3-4Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, Yudafɔ Bulu igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn pʋ́ amʋ́ ahandɛ befia igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn Kaiafa woyitɔ, kɩta agywɩɩn ɔkpa ánɩ́ bɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ kɩta Yesu ŋaintɔ, mɔ mʋ. 5Tamɛ bɛblɩ bɛɛ, bʋmɔ́ɔbwɛ mʋ́ nkɛ amʋtɔ, mɛnɩ kpokiti mɛ́ɛda ɔmá amʋtɔ.
Ofobi Fanfaanfan Pʋwʋlɩ Yesu
(Marko 14:3-9; Yohane 12:1-8)
6Brɛá Yesu bʋ Betania wulutɔ, Simon ɔkʋá alalɔ ɩlɔ pɛpɛ kɩ woyitɔ ɔdɛ atɔ gyi a, 7ɔtsɩ ɔkʋ lɛba mʋ wa. Ɔdɛ prɛntʋa wanklaan kʋá ofobi fanfan ánɩ́ ɩbʋ bia bɔ mʋ́, ɔlɛtsɛɩ ofobi amʋ wʋlɩ Yesu nwuntɔ. 8Yesu akasɩpʋ amʋ benya ɔblɔ brɛá bowun ɩnɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ bɛfɩtɛ bɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ ɔtsɩ anfɩ layinta ofobi fanfan anfɩ? 9Abɛ́talɩ fɛ mʋ́ ibia kpekple, pʋ kɔba amʋ ha ahianfɔ.”
10Yesu lɛbɩá ɔblɔ lakɩta amʋ́. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ mlɩdɛ mʋ han? Ɩtɔ yile alabwɛ ha mɩ. 11Ahianfɔ bétsia mlɩtɔ ekekegyiɛkɛ, tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ mméetsia mlɩ wa yɔ. 12Alatsɛɩ ofobi fanfan anfɩ wʋlɩ mɩ, pʋla mɩ ɔyʋlʋ yaɩ ha mɩ opulakɛ. 13Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Ɔyɩtɔ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛá bɛ́da Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan a, bɛ́blɩ tɔ anfɩ ɔtsɩ anfɩ labwɛ anfɩ pʋkaɩn mʋsʋ.”
Yuda Iskariot Lotsula Ánɩ́ Ɔbɛ́lɛ Yesu Ha
(Marko 14:10; Luka 22:3-6)
14Mʋ́ ɔma a, mʋ akasɩpʋ duanyɔ amʋtɔ ɔkʋá bʋtɛtɩ mʋ Yuda Iskariot lɔyɔ Bulu igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn amʋ wa. 15Ɔlɛyɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ nɛlɛ Yesu ha mlɩ a, ntɔ mlɛha mɩ?” Mʋ́ sʋ bɛkla sika fututu adʋasa (30) wa mʋ ɩbɩtɔ. 16Tsu brɛ amʋtɔ ɔlɔwa ɔkpa dunka ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ lɛ Yesu ha amʋ́.
Katsʋn Atogyihɛ Gyi
(Marko 14:12-21; Luka 22:7-14, 21-23; Yohane 13:21-30)
17Israelfɔ Bodobodo Mátuhɛ Nkɛ amʋtɔ ɛkɛ gyankpapʋ a, akasɩpʋ amʋ bɛba Yesu wa bɛfɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Anɩ Wie, obu mɔmʋtɔ ayɛla ha fʋ, afʋgyi Israelfɔsʋ Katsʋn Nkɛ atogyihɛ amʋ?”
18Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩyɔ asimasi wa wulutɔ, amlɩyɛbla mʋ mlɩaa, ‘Osunapʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, mɩ brɛ lafʋn. Ɩnɩ sʋ mɩa mɩ akasɩpʋ aba begyi Israelfɔsʋ Katsʋn Nkɛ amʋ fʋ woyitɔ.> ”
19Mʋ́ sʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ bɔyɛbwɛ alɩ amʋʋ Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ amʋ pɛpɛɛpɛ. Bɛla obu amʋtɔ, bwɛ Katsʋn Nkɛtɔ atogyihɛ amʋ yaɩ ɩnʋ.
20Brɛá nsaɩntɔ deklun a, Yesu mʋa mʋ akasɩpʋ bɛba betsia ɔpʋnʋ amʋ asɩ. 21Atɔ amʋ ogyikpa a, Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla, mlɩtɔ ɔkʋlɛ ɔbɛ́lɛ mɩ ha.”
22Asʋn anfɩ lɛhɩɛ han akasɩpʋ amʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ befi asɩ bʋdɛ mʋ fɩtɛ ɩkʋlɛ-kʋlɛ bɛɛ, “Mɩ Wie, mɩ nɩ loo?”
23Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔha amʋʋ mɩa mʋnyɔ anɩdɛ ɩbɩ wa ɔlɛpɛ ɔkʋlɛtɔ amʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mɩ ha. 24Mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ nówu fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn tswɩ, tamɛ ɔha amʋʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mɩ ha amʋ ɔgyɔwɩ nɩ. Nɩ bʋmetepi kwɩɩ mʋ kʋraa a, tɛkɩ ɩbʋ alɛ ha mʋ.”
25Yuda Iskariot amʋʋ ɔlɛlɛ mʋ ha amʋ ɛ lɛfɩtɛ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Osunapʋ, mɩ nɩ loo?” Mʋʋ Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ee, fablɩ.”
Yesu Ntʋpwɛ Atogyihɛ Trahɛ
(Marko 14:22-26; Luka 22:14-20; 1 Korintofɔ 11:23-25)
26Brɛá bʋdɛ atɔ amʋ gyi a, Yesu lɛlɛ bodobodo ipin, ɔlɛda Bulu ɩpan, biabia mʋ́tɔ pʋha mʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ, blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩhɔ amlɩgyi. Mɩ ɔyʋlʋ nɩ.”
27Ɩnʋ olotsu nta-ɛwɛ, ɔlɛda Bulu ɩpan, pʋha amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩhɔ amlɩnun. 28Mɩ obugya nɩ. Mʋ́ Bulu dɛpʋsi mʋ ntam ánɩ́ alaka ha ahasʋ nɩ. Bɛ́tsɛɩ mʋ́ wʋlɩ asɩ, mɛnɩ obési aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ lakpan kie amʋ́. 29Ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, mmɛ́ɛtra nun waɩn-abi nta anfɩ alɩɩ yɔfʋn ɛkɛá mɩa mlɩnyɔ abɛ́lanun mʋ́ pɔpwɛ mɩ Sɩ iwiegyi amʋtɔ.”
30Benya wa ɩlʋ da Bulu ɩpan ta alɩ, bɛnatɩ yɔ Olif ɩbʋ amʋsʋ.
Petro Ɔbɔ́swɩɩ Ɔbɛɛ, Mʋmeyin Yesu
(Marko 14:27-31; Luka 22:31-34; Yohane 13:36-38)
31Brɛá bowie Nfɔ-nyibʋ amʋsʋ a, Yesu lɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ “Mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mléyinki mɩ ɔma onyenɩ. Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, ‘Nɛ́da akufa ɔkpapʋ amʋ lɛda, mʋ akufa bɛ́dasaɩn.> ” 32Mʋʋ ɔlɛtra blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Tamɛ nɩ Bulu ɔkʋsʋa mɩ tsu afulitɔ a, négya mlɩ nkpa yɔ Galilea ɔmátɔ. Ɩnʋ mlɔ́bɔtʋ mɩ nɩ.”
33Petro lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ beyinki fʋ ɔma kʋraa a, mɩ mʋ́ mméeyinki ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”
34Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ fʋ bla. Onyenɩ, asa batɛ ɔbɛ́lɛ ɔnɔ a, fɔ́swɩɩ pʋ ɩbɩ wa ogya tse sa fɛɛ fʋmeyin mɩ.”
35Ɩnʋ Petro lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ lowu igyi kʋraa a, mméekina fʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.” Alɩ kɛn akasɩpʋ atrahɛ amʋ ɛ bɛblɩ nɩ.
Mpaɩbɔ Getsemane
(Marko 14:32-42; Luka 22:39-46)
36Yesu mʋa mʋ akasɩpʋ bɔyɔ ɔtɩnɛkʋá bʋtɛtɩ ɩnʋ Getsemane. Brɛá bowie ɩnʋ a, ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩtsia nfɩ, nɔyɔ nkpa yɔbɔ mpaɩ.” 37Ɔlɛkpa Sebedeo abi anyɔ, bʋgyi Yakobo mʋa mʋ pio Yohane pʋ́ Petro ya. Ɩnʋ asʋn lɛhɩɛ han mʋ, mʋ ansɩ lɛpɛ. 38Mʋʋ ɔlɛbla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Asʋn ɩhɩɛ dɛ mɩ han, idekle ɩmɔ mɩ. Mlɩtsia nfɩ, mɩa mlɩnyɔ agyo.”
39Ɩnʋ ɔlɛnatɩ yɔ nkpa kpalobi, ɔlɛda akpawunu pʋ ansɩtɔ bun ɔsʋlʋtɔ, kokoli Bulu ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Sɩ, nɩ bɔ́wa alɛ a, ha nta-ɛwɛ anfɩ ɩtsʋn mɩsʋ. Tamɛ megyi tɔá ndekle, mboun mʋ́á fʋdekle ɩba mʋ́tɔ.”
40Mʋʋ oleyinki ba akasɩpʋ amʋ wa bowun ánɩ́ bʋdɛdɩdɩ. Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔlɛfɩtɛ Petro ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmɛtalɩ tsia, mɩa mlɩnyɔ agyo dɔnhwɩrɩ kʋlɛ kpan? 41Mlɩgyo amlɩkokoli Bulu, mɛnɩ mlɩmóowie ɩsɔkɩtɔ, tsufɛ mlɩ ɔŋɛ dekle, tamɛ nyankpʋsa-oyi lɔpɔn.”
42Yesu lɛtra yokokoli Bulu ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Sɩ, nɩ nta-ɛwɛ anfɩ mɔ́ɔtsʋn mɩsʋ, ɩbwɛ alɩágyialɩá nónun mʋ́ a, mʋmʋ tɔá fʋdekle ɩba mʋ́tɔ.” 43Ɔlɛtra yinki ba bowun ánɩ́ akasɩpʋ amʋ bʋtra bʋdɛdɩdɩ, tsufɛ dɩdɩ dɛ amʋ́ bʋ.
44Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛnatɩ si amʋ́, tra yokokoli Bulu otse sasɩ, blɩ asʋn amʋ kɛn. 45Oleyinki ba akasɩpʋ amʋ wa, bɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩlatra si mlɩda mlɩdɛ ɔkpʋnʋ da? Mlɩkɩ, brɛ amʋ lafʋn ánɩ́ bɔ́pʋ mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ wa lakpan abwɛpʋ ɩbɩtɔ. 46Mlɩkʋsʋ ayɔ. Mlɩkɩ, ɔha amʋʋ ɔdɛ mɩ lɛ ha amʋ na a.”
Yesu Kɩta
(Marko 14:43-50; Luka 22:47-53; Yohane 18:3-12)
47Yesu ɔnɔ mesi asa akasɩpʋ duanyɔ amʋtɔ ɔkʋlɛ bʋtɛtɩ mʋ Yuda lobowie ɩnʋ. Ɔdɔm kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩá bʋdɛ ndayi pʋ́ nkpoti bʋbuo mʋ. Bulu igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn pʋ́ Yudafɔ ahandɛ amʋ lɔwa amʋ́. 48Yuda amʋʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ Yesu ha amʋ lɛbla ɔdɔm amʋ yaɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔha amʋʋ nɛ́lata puta amʋ gyi ɔha amʋ nɩ. Mlɩkɩta mʋ.”
49Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔlɛnatɩ laa yɛha Yesu itsia ɔbɛɛ, “Osunapʋ, tsia nɩ!” Ɔlɛlata mʋ puta.
50Mʋʋ Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Agya, bwɛ tɔá ɔbwɛkpa fɛba.”
Ɩnʋ aha amʋ bɛnatɩ tʋ Yesu, kɩta mʋ kinkiinkin. 51Ɩnʋ Yesu akasɩpʋ amʋtɔ ɔkʋlɛ lɔtswɩ mʋ ɔdayi, kpa Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn osumbi ɔkʋ ɩsʋ lɛ. 52Mʋʋ Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Yinkia fʋ ɔdayi wa mʋ́ ɔflɛtɔ. Tsufɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛnatɩ kɩta ɔdayi a, ɔdayi ɔnɔ otesin. 53Fʋmeyin fɛɛ, nɛ́talɩ kokoli mɩ Sɩ ɔbɛ́ha mʋ abɔpʋ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ aku duanyɔ bɛ́ba bɔkɔ hɔ mɩ? 54Tamɛ nɩ ɩba alɩ a, nkalɩ ɩbɔ́bwɛ asa Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ ɩbɛ́ba mʋ́tɔ?”
55Ɩnʋ Yesu lɛfɩtɛ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Ogyo otswapʋ ngyi, sʋ mlɩlatsu nkpoti pʋ́ ndayi mlɛba mɩ ɔkɩtakpa? Ntsie mlɩ wa Bulu ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ ekekegyiɛkɛ ndɛ mlɩ atɔ suna, mlɩmɛkɩta mɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 56Tamɛ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ laba mʋ́tɔ, mɛnɩ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ ɩbɛ́ba mʋ́tɔ.”
Ɩnʋ akasɩpʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛsrɩ si mʋ.
Yudafɔ Ahandɛ Ansɩtɔ Lɩɩ
(Marko 14:53-65; Luka 22:54-55, 63-71; Yohane 18:13-14, 19-24)
57Mʋʋ Yesu akɩtapʋ amʋ bɛkpa mʋ ya Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn Kaiafa. Ɩnʋ mʋa Mose mbla asunapʋ pʋ́ Yudafɔ ahandɛ amʋ befia nɩ. 58Tamɛ Petro lɛpɛtɩ obuo amʋ́ ɔma tsutsuutsu alɩɩ bowie igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn woyitɔ ɩnʋ. Oleyetsia amʋ́ agyopʋ wa, mɛnɩ obówun alɩá asʋn amʋ ɩbɔ́mɔ ɔnɔ. 59Ɩnʋ Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn amʋ mʋa Yudafɔ asʋn agyipʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bodunka aha ánɩ́ bɛka asʋn dɩnka Yesusʋ, mɛnɩ bɛ́lɩɩ mʋ́sʋ mɔ mʋ. 60Afunupʋ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛdalɩ ba, tamɛ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔnɔ lɔtsʋn ɔtsan. Mʋ́ ɔma a, aha abanyɔ bɛdalɩ bɛlɩɩ ahandɛ amʋ ansɩtɔ, 61blɩ bɛɛ, “Oyin anfɩ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, ‘Nɛ́talɩ bwie Bulu ɔtswɛkpa amʋ, lapʋ nkɛnsa yi mʋ́.> ”
62Mʋʋ Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn amʋ lɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ fɩtɛ Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Fʋma ɔnɔ lɛ? Fʋma asʋansʋ blɩ pʋlɛ fʋ ɩwɩ?” 63Tamɛ Yesu mobwii ɔnɔ. Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn amʋ lɛla bla Yesu ɔbɛɛ, “Nɛka Bulu Ɔkɩankpapʋ amʋ, nɩ fʋgyi Kristo, (ɔha amʋʋ Bulu lada mʋ ofuli), ogyi Bulu mʋ Bi amʋ a, bla anɩ.”
64Mʋʋ Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋ́ fablɩ a. Tamɛ mlɩbɩá tsu ndɛ pʋya a, mlówun mɩ, Nyankpʋsa-Mʋ-Bi anfɩ ntsie Bulu Otumipʋ gyɔpɩsʋ anfɩ ndɩn ɔsʋsʋ nwʋlʋtasʋ nɛba.”
65Mʋʋ Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn amʋ lɛkɩta mʋ atadɩɛ balɩ mʋ́ kɩaan, blɩ ɔbɛɛ “Alabɔ mbusuo! Adansɩɛ mɔmʋ anɩtra anɩgyo? Yɛ mlɩlanu abususʋ ánɩ́ alablɩ. 66Nkalɩ gyi mlɩ agywɩɩn?”
Bɛbla mʋ bɛɛ, “Ilehian ánɩ́ obówu!”
67Ɩnʋ botutu atsʋnɔ wʋlɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ, wɔwɔ mʋ atswɛ. Akʋ ɛ bɛdada mʋ asʋtɔ, 68fɩtɛ mʋ bɛɛ, “Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Kristo, ma lada fʋ? Bla anɩ.”
Petro Lɔswɩɩ Ɔbɛɛ Mʋmeyin Yesu
(Marko 14:66-72; Luka 22:56-62; Yohane 18:15-18, 25-27)
69Petro tsie wunsɩnɛsʋ ɩnʋ, otsibi ɔkʋ lɔbɔtʋ mʋ bla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Fʋa Yesu Galileayin amʋ nyɔ na.”
70Tamɛ Petro lɔwa ɔnɔlɩ aha amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ansɩtɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Mmeyin asʋn anfɩ fʋdɛblɩ anfɩ ɩwɩ kʋkʋʋkʋ.” 71Mʋ́ ɔma woyi-ɔnɔ ɩnʋ ɛ a, otsibi ɔkʋ ɛ lɛbɩ Petro. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛbla aha ánɩ́ bʋlɩɩ ɩnʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Oyin anfɩ mʋa Yesu Nasaretyin amʋ nyɔ tɛnatɩ.”
72Ɩnʋ Petro lɔpʋ ɔnɔlɩ ka ntam, blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mmeyin mʋ.”
73Mʋ́ ɔma a, aha amʋʋ bʋlɩɩ ɩnʋ amʋtɔ akʋ bɛba bɛbla Petro bɛɛ, “Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, anɩyin ánɩ́ fʋa Yesunyɔ na, tsufɛ fʋ tɔɩtɔ dɛ anɩ suna alɩ.”
74Ɩnʋ Petro lɔwa ntam kaka bɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɛka togyitɔ, mmeyin oyin amʋʋ mlɩdɛ mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ amʋ!”
Ɩnʋnʋ batɛ lɔbɔn. 75Petro lɛkaɩn ánɩ́ Yesu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Fɔ́swɩɩ tse sa fɛɛ fʋmeyin mɩ asa batɛ ɔbɛ́lɛ ɔnɔ.” Ɩnʋ ɔlɛdalɩ hɩɛ yesu.

Title: MATEO 27
Content:
Yesu Kpa Ya Pilato
(Marko 15:1; Luka 23:1-2; Yohane 18:28-32)
