Ahʋmɩtɩá ɩmɛka itin dɛ mɩ. 3Nɩ ɩbɔ́wa alɛá nénya ɩlwɩɩ, mɩa Kristonyɔ nsɩnɛ béyinta, mɛnɩ bénya nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata kʋraa a, tɛkɩ nɔ́pʋ ɩwɩ ha. 4Mɩ pɩ Israelfɔ gyi aha ánɩ́ Bulu lɛlɛ pʋbwɛ mʋ abi. Amʋ́ ɔlɛlɛ mʋ numnyam suna. Ɔlɛka ntam ha amʋ́, pʋ mʋ mbla wa amʋ́ ɩbɩtɔ. Olosuna amʋ́ ɔkpa ánɩ́ bɔ́pʋtswɛ mʋ. Ɔlɛbla amʋ́ tɔá alahɩɛá ɔbɔ́pʋha amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́. 5Amʋ́lɛlɩn tsu Israelfɔ anain akpɔnkpɔntɩ amʋtɔ. Mʋ́a ɩdʋn kʋraa a, amʋ́tɔ Kristo amʋ lɛbɛlɩn ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ. Ɩkanfʋ letsia Kristo, (ɔha amʋʋ Bulu lada mʋ ofuli amʋ), ogyi Bulu, atɔ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ ogyipʋ amʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ! Amen!
6Ɩnɩ mosuna ánɩ́ Bulu asʋn amʋʋ ɔlɛblɩ tswɩ amʋ ɩmɛ́ɛba mʋ́tɔ. Tsufɛ megyi Israelfɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ gyi Israelfɔ onutonuto. 7Megyi Abraham abi fɛ́ɛ́ gyi mʋ abi onuto. Tsufɛ Bulu lɛbla Abraham ɔbɛɛ, “Isakɩtɔ fʋ abi-aná bɛ́dalɩ tsu.” 8Ɩnɩ losuna ánɩ́ megyi aha ánɩ́ botsu Abraham abi fɛ́ɛ́tɔ gyi Bulu aha. Abraham abi-aná amʋʋ Bulu lɛhɩɛ ha mʋ amʋ nkʋlɛ gyi Bulu aha. 9Tsufɛ tɔá Bulu lɛhɩɛ Abraham gyi, “Néyinki ba ofieba sɛsɛbrɛ. Nɛ́ba a, fʋ ka Sara lakwɩɩ obiyimbi.”
10Megyi ɩnɩ wʋlɛ. Rebeka lɔkwɩɩ atabi ha anɩ nain Isakɩ. 11Tamɛ brɛá ɔmɔkʋnya kwɩɩ amʋ́, abʋdan bɩ yile ntɛ lalahɛbwɛ a, Bulu lɛbla Rebeka amʋ́ ɩwɩ asʋn. Bulu lɔbwɛ mʋ́ alɩ, mɛnɩ ibósuna anɩá ɔkpa amʋʋ ɔtɔtsʋn mʋ́sʋ hɔ aha amʋ ɩmɛna anɩ bwɛhɛsʋ. Mboun ɩna mʋ nkʋlɛ pɛ apɛ pʋ́ alɩá ɔtɛlɛ mʋ ahasʋ. 12Asa Rebeka ɔbɔ́kwɩɩ nyebi amʋ a, Bulu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔdɛhɛn obósum ɔkʋsʋ.” 13Fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Ntɔdwɛ Yakob dʋn Esau.”
14Sei a, nkalɩ abɛ́blɩ? Abɛ́blɩ anɩaa, Bulu asʋn mɛda ɔkpa loo? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! 15Tsufɛ Bulu lɛbla Mose ɔbɛɛ, “Aha ánɩ́ nówun amʋ́ nwɛ a, amʋ́ nówun nwɛ. Amʋ́á nahɩɛá négyi bʋalɛ a, amʋ́ négyi bʋalɛ.” 16Mʋ́ sʋ megyi ɔha apɛ ntɛ mʋ nsiwa Bulu tɛkɩ. Mboun mʋ onuto nwewun igyi. 17Bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ bɛɛ, Bulu lɛbla Egyipte owie Farao ɔbɛɛ, “Atoku anyɔ anfɩ sʋ nɛyaɩ fʋ iwie, alɩá nɔ́tsʋn fʋsʋ lɛ mɩ tumi suna, pʋ́ alɩá ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bónu mɩ ɩda, kanfʋ mɩ.” 18Ɩnɩ sʋ nɩ Bulu ɔhɩɛá obówun ɔkʋ nwɛ a, otowun mʋ nwɛ. Nɩ ɔhɩɛá ɔbɛ́ha ɔkʋ ɔbɔ́wa klʋntɔ odwin ɛ a, ɔtɛha mʋ ɔtɔwa klʋntɔ odwin.
Bulu Ɔblɔnya Pʋ́ Mʋ Aha Nwewun
19Mlɩtɔ ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́fɩtɛ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ alɩ igyi nɩ mʋ́ a, ntogyi sʋ Bulu dɛ nyankpʋsa ɩpɔn ha? Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ tin Bulu ɔkpa?” 20Tamɛ ndɛ mlɩ fɩtɛ mbɛɛ, fʋgyi ma ánɩ́ fɛ́lɛ Bulu ɩla? Ɔlɔ ɔbɛ́talɩ fɩtɛ mʋ ɔpwɛpʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ fapwɛ mɩ alɩ?” 21Alɩágyialɩá igyi a, atɔ ɔpwɛpʋ tɔpʋ obon pwɛ tɔá odekle. Ɔbɛ́talɩ pʋ obon ipin kʋlɛ pwɛ nlonyɔ. Ɔbɔ́pʋ kʋlɛ bwɛ ɔlɔ́ nun-ntsu, kpa nsuo wa ɩkʋlɛtɔ.
22Alɩ kɛn igyi ha Bulu nɩ. Ɔbʋ ɔkpa lɛ mʋ ɔblɔ suna, mɛnɩ aha bówun mʋ tumi. Tamɛ ɔlɛhɩɛ nya klʋn ha aha amʋʋ olenya ɔblɔ amʋ́sʋ amʋ. Tɛkɩ ɩlɔfʋn ánɩ́ ɔbɛ́hɩ amʋ́. 23Bulu bʋ ɔkpa lɛ mʋ numnyam kpɔnkpɔntɩ amʋ ɔwan aha amʋʋ ɔlɛlɛ yaɩ ánɩ́ obówun amʋ́ nwɛ, ɔwa amʋ́ numnyam amʋsʋ. 24Anɩgyi aha amʋʋ ɔlɛlɛ yaɩ amʋ nɩ. Megyi Yudafɔ nkʋlɛtɔ ɔlɛlɛ aha. Ɔlɛlɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ akʋ ɛ. 25Bulu lɛblɩ mʋ ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Hosea ɔwʋlʋtɔ ɔbɛɛ,
“Nɛ́tɩ aha amʋʋ tɛkɩ bʋmegyi mɩ aha amʋ mɩ aha.
Aha amʋʋ tɛkɩ ntamakle amʋ́ asʋn amʋ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mɩ adwɛpʋ.
26Ɔtɩnɛ amʋʋ tɛkɩ nɛbla amʋ́ mbɛɛ, ‘Megyi mɩ aha mlɩgyi> amʋ a,
ɩnʋfɔ nɛ́tɩ mbɛɛ, ‘Bulu Ɔkɩankpapʋ abi> nɩ.”
27Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yesaia lɔkplʋn bla Israelfɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ Israelfɔ bɛklɛɩ fɛ ɔpʋ ɔnɔ ɩsɩ kʋraa a, amʋ́tɔ aha kpalobi pɛ nɔ́hɔ nkpa. 28Tsufɛ ɔbɩsasʋ anɩ Wie obégyi ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ asʋn, bua mʋ́ wanklaan.” 29Tsufɛ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yesaia legyankpa wanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ mɩ Wie Bulu, tumi fɛ́ɛ́ Owie mesi anɩ abi-aná akʋ yaɩ a, tɛkɩ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ abɛ́ta fɛ Sodom mʋ́a Gomorafɔ.”
Israelfɔ Bulu Máhogyi
30Nkalɩ anɩdɛblɩ ngya? Anɩdɛblɩ anɩaa, aha amʋʋ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ amʋ bʋmɔbɔ mbɔdɩ kʋkʋ, asa Bulu lɛha amʋ́ asʋ! Hogyi sʋ benya mʋ́. 31Tamɛ Israelfɔ amʋʋ amʋ́ ansɩ lɛpɛ, bʋdɛ mbla amʋsʋ gyi, Bulu ɔha amʋ́ asʋ amʋ bʋmɛtalɩ. 32Ntogyi sʋ? Tsufɛ bʋmɛpɛ ansɩ pʋ hogyi dunka mʋ́. Ɩlɔbwɛ amʋ́ fɛ mbla amʋsʋ gyisʋ Bulu ɔbɔ́tsʋn ha amʋ́ asʋ. Ɩnɩ sʋ bosutin “Ibwi amʋʋ ɩtɛlɛ aha da” amʋsʋ dɩda kpla. 33Ibwi anfɩ ɩwɩ asʋn bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
“Bulu ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mlɩkɩ!
Ndɛpʋ Ibwi tswɩ Sion wulutɔ.
Aha bósutin ibwi amʋsʋ dɩda.
Pɛlɩ mɛ́ɛkɩta ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔhɔ mʋ gyi.> ”

Title: ROMAFƆ 10
Content:
1Mɩ apio, tɔá ntekle mɩ klʋntɔ, pʋ́ mpaɩá ndɛbɔ gyi, Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mɩ aha Israelfɔ. 2Nɛ́talɩ gyi amʋ́ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ mbɛɛ, amʋ́ ansɩ lahɩɛ pɛ Bulusum ɩwɩ, tamɛ bʋmeyin ɔkpa ánɩ́ bɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ sum mʋ wanklaan. 3Tsufɛ bʋmeyin ɔkpa ánɩ́ Bulu tɔtsʋn mʋ́sʋ ha aha asʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ bɛyɩrɩ ɩwɩ bʋdɛ amʋ́ ɔkpa dunka, mɛnɩ bégyi asʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ. Mʋ́ alɩ sʋ bʋmɛba ɩwɩasɩ ha ɔkpa amʋʋ Bulu tɔtsʋn mʋ́sʋ ha aha asʋ amʋ. 4Ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ gyi, Kristo lɔmɔ Mose Mbla amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔnɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔhɔ mʋ gyi obégyi asʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ.
Nkpahɔ Bʋ Ɩnʋ Ha Ɔhagyiɔha
5Mose lɔwanlɩn tsu ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛkɩ mbla amʋ ánɩ́ mʋ́sʋ Bulu ɔbɔ́tsʋn tsu mʋá mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa ɩwɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ otegyi mbla amʋsʋ ɔbɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ nya nkpa.” 6Tamɛ hogyisʋ bʋtɔtsʋn gyi asʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ. Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Máfɩtɛ ɩwɩ fɛɛ, ‘Ma ɔbɔ́dʋ yɔ ɔsʋsʋ?> ” (Fɛfɩtɛ alɩ a, ilosuna ánɩ́ fɔ́yɔpʋ Kristo tsua ɔsʋsʋ ba.) 7Ntɛ fɩtɛ ɩwɩ fɛɛ, “Ma ɔbɛ́kplɩ yɔ ɔsʋlʋ ayasɩ?” (Fɛfɩtɛ alɩ a, ilosuna ánɩ́ fɔ́yɔpʋ Kristo tsua afulitɔ ba.) 8Mboun asʋn ánɩ́ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ gyi, “Bulu asʋn amʋ ɩma ɩfɔ fʋ wa. Ɩbʋ fʋ ɔnɔtɔ, ɩbʋ fʋ klʋntɔ dodo.” Asʋn amʋ gyi hogyi asʋn amʋʋ anɩdɛblɩ amʋ nɩ. 9Nɩ fobwii ɔnɔ blɩ fɛɛ, “Yesu gyi anɩ Wie,” fɔpʋ fʋ klʋn fɛ́ɛ́ hogyiá Bulu lɔkʋsʋa mʋ tsu afulitɔ a, Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ fʋ nkpa. 10Tsufɛ ɩklʋn ɔha tɔpʋhɔ Kristo gyi. Fówun Bulu obótsu mʋ ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa. Ɔnɔ ɛ ɔha tɔpʋblɩ ɔbɛɛ, Yesu gyi mʋ wie, mɛnɩ Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mʋ nkpa. 11Alɩ kɛn Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Pɛlɩ mɛ́ɛkɩta ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔhɔ mʋ gyi ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ” nɩ. 12Ɩnɩ sʋ ɩmɛfahʋn ánɩ́ Yudayin fʋgyi, ntɛ fʋmegyi Yudayin. Tsufɛ owie ɔkʋlɛ pɛ asɩ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋbʋ. Ɔbɔ́pʋ mʋ yilebwɛ gyi aha ánɩ́ bosu kpoli mʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋalɛ. 13Alɩ kɛn Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ otosu kpoli anɩ Wie obénya nkpa” nɩ.
14Tamɛ nkalɩ bɛ́talɩ su kpoli ɔha ánɩ́ bʋmɔhɔ mʋ gyi? Nkalɩ bɛ́talɩ hɔ ɔha ánɩ́ bʋmɔkʋnu mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn gyi? Nkalɩ bónu mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn nɩ ɔhaa mɛda mʋ́ ɔkan suna amʋ́? 15Nkalɩ bɛ́talɩ da mʋ́ ɔkan suna amʋ́, nɩ bʋmɔkʋwa amʋ́? Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɩhɩɛ bʋ akɩlɛá fówun ánɩ́ ɔha ɔba bɛda Bulu asʋn wanklaan ɔkan!” 16Tamɛ megyi Israelfɔ fɛ́ɛ́ lɔhɔ Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋ. Tsufɛ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yesaia lɔwanlɩn wa mʋ ɔwʋlʋtɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Wie, ɔhaa mɔhɔ anɩ asʋn blɩhɛ amʋsʋ gyi.” 17Tamɛ asʋn wanklaan amʋ tɛha bʋtohogyi. Ɩna Kristo asʋn anfɩ blɩ sʋ aha bʋtonu mʋ asʋn. Mʋ́ nu sʋ aha bʋtɔhɔ mʋ gyi.
18Mbɛɛ, bɛɛ nu bʋmonu asʋn amʋ? Bonu! Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Amʋ́ ɔmɛ lawie ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́,
amʋ́ asʋn ɛ lawie tsutsuutsu.”
19Ntra fɩtɛ. Israelfɔ bʋmonu mʋ asʋn asɩ? Mʋ́á Mose lɛbla amʋ́ gyankpapʋ gyi,
“Bulu ɔbɛɛ, ‘Nɔ́pʋ ɔmá ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Israelfɔ wa mlɩ ansɩpɛpɛ.
Nóyula ɔmá mimlahɛ pʋwa mlɩ ɔblɔ.> ”
20Brɛ bambatɔ a, Yesaia lɔwa klʋn bla amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu ɔbɛɛ,
‘Aha ánɩ́ bʋmɛdɛ mɩ dunka lɛmɛntɩ mɩ.
Aha ánɩ́ bʋmɛfɩtɛ mɩsʋ nɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna.> ”
21Tamɛ Israelfɔ amʋ mʋ́ a, Bulu lɛblɩ amʋ́ ɩwɩ asʋn ɔbɛɛ, “Ɩnɩá natɛɩ ɩbɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́á nɔ́hɔ amʋ́ atuu o a, bʋtra bʋdɛ asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn wa. Bʋmɛdɛ mɩ bu.”

Title: ROMAFƆ 11
Content:
Bulu Israelfɔ Nwewun
1Ndɛ mlɩ fɩtɛ mbɛɛ, mʋ́ sʋ Bulu lakina mʋ onuto aha lɛlɛ? O-o! Mɩ onuto anfɩ o Israelyin ngyi. Abraham abi-anátɔ notsu. Benyamin abusuantɔ obi ngyi. 2Megyi bɛɛ, Bulu lakina mʋ onuto aha amʋʋ ɔlɛlɛ amʋ́ yaɩ amʋ. Mlɩkaɩn alɩ amʋʋ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ tswɩ ɔbɛɛ, Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Elia lɛkla Israelfɔ ɩwɩ asʋn suna Bulu amʋsʋ. 3Ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Wie! Israelfɔ bamɔ fʋ ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ fɛ́ɛ́. Babwie fʋ afɔdɩɛ-ɩswɩ ɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Ɩlasi mɩ nkʋkʋnʋ nkʋlɛ. Bʋdekleá bɔ́mɔ mɩ ɛ.” 4Bulu lɛha Elia mbuaɩ ɔbɛɛ, “O-o! Megyi fʋ nkʋlɛ ɩlasi. Tsufɛ nalɛ aha mpɩm-sienɔ (7,000) ánɩ́ bʋmɔkʋtswɛ ɔkpɩ Baal kɩ ha mɩ ɩwɩ.” 5Alɩ igyi ndɛ nkɛ anfɩtɔ ɛ nɩ. Bulu lawa awɩtɔlɛ lɛ Israelfɔ kpalobi akʋ yaɩ. 6Nɩ alawa awɩtɔlɛ lɛ akʋ a, mʋmʋ ɩtra megyi ɔha bwɛhɛ sʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ. Tsufɛ nɩ ɩna aha bwɛhɛsʋ mʋ́ a, tɛkɩ mʋ awɩtɔlɛ amʋ ilesian.
7Mʋ́ nkalɩ ilegyi? Israelfɔ ɩbɩ mɛda ɩtɔ amʋʋ bɛpɛ ansɩ bʋdedunka amʋ. Amʋ́tɔ aha kpalobi akʋá Bulu lɛlɛ yaɩ nkʋlɛ ɩbɩ lɛda mʋ́. Ɔlɛha atrahɛ bɔwa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn brɛá ɔdɛ aha tɩ. 8Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu lɛha ɩlɛlɩn amʋ́ ɔwɔlɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ bɔtʋ ndɛ bʋmɛtalɩ pʋ amʋ́ ansibi wun atɔ, pʋ amʋ́ asʋ ɛ nu asʋn.” 9Owie Dawid ɛ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Amʋ́ ɔdwɛ ogyikpa ɩbwɛ mpʋsa, abʋda mʋ́tɔ. Ɩbwɛ agbla, ɩkpa kɩta amʋ́.
Ɩbwɛ ɩma, abʋsrɛɩ dɩda mʋ́tɔ, ɩbwɛ ɩsʋbɩtɩ ha amʋ́.
10Ansɩtɔ iklun amʋ́, mɛnɩ bʋmɛ́ɛtra wun atɔ.
Ha abʋtsia ipiantɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.”
11Mʋ́ sʋ ntra ndɛfɩtɛ mbɛɛ, Yudafɔ basrɛɩ dɩda, bʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ tra kʋsʋ? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Amʋ́ lakpan sʋ Bulu lɔhɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ nkpa. Fówun ɩpɛ amʋ́ ansɩ. 12Sei a, anɩyin ánɩ́ Yudafɔ lakpan sʋ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́ banya atɔ wanklaan. Amʋ́ dɩda lawa labi ha aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ. Nɩ bɛlanya nkpahɔ mʋ́ a, mʋmʋ labiá aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ bénya ɩma blɩtɔ.
Aha Ánɩ́ Bʋmegyi Yudafɔ Nkpahɔ
13Aha ánɩ́ mlɩmegyi Yudafɔ, mlɩ ndɛ asʋn anfɩ bla ngya a. Kristo sumbi ɔyɔpʋ ngyi. Ɔlɔwa mɩ sumbi mlɩ wa. Mɩ gyumagyihɛ legyi mɩ ansɩ. 14Fialɩ nɛ́talɩ ha mɩ aha Yudafɔ ansɩ bɛ́pɛ, fówun Bulu obénya ɔkpa hɔ amʋ́tɔ akʋ nkpa. 15Brɛá Bulu lɛdamli ɔma ha Yudafɔ a, ɩlɛha ɔmá atrahɛ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔbwɛ Bulu anyawie. Nɩ igyi alɩ mʋ́ a, bregyibrɛá Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ amʋ́ ɛ a, ɩbɔ́bwɛ fɛ afuli fɛ́ɛ́ bakʋsʋ tsu afulitɔ.
16Nɩ bɛlɛ tɔkʋtɔ gyankpapʋ ha Bulu igyi a, mʋmʋ ɩtɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi mʋ klɛ. Nɩ Bulu bʋ oyi nlin a, idesuna ánɩ́ oyi amʋ abambi ɛ igyi mʋ klɛ. 17Bɛkpalɩ oyi bambi pʋ bamba tsa mʋ́sʋ. Yudafɔ gyi oyi amʋ. Mlɩ aha ánɩ́ mlɩmegyi Yudafɔ gyi bambi bamba amʋʋ bapʋtsa mʋ́sʋ amʋ, mɛnɩ mlénya oyi amʋtɔ ntsu wanklaan amʋ kʋ. 18Mʋ́ alɩ sʋ a, mlɩmákɩ mlɩaa, mlɩdʋn oyi amʋ onuto abambi amʋʋ Bulu lɛkpalɩ lɛ amʋ. Mlɩmátsu ɩwɩ amʋ́ ansɩtɔ, tsufɛ oyi amʋ nlin tamanun ntsu lɛ mlɩtɔ. Mlɩ mboun tonun ntsu lɛ mʋ́tɔ pʋdan.
19Fialɩ mlɩ akʋ mlɛ́blɩ mlɩaa, “Bɛkpalɩ abambi amʋ, mɛnɩ anɩ ɛ abénya oyikpa.” 20Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔ alɩ. Itsu alɩá Israelfɔ bʋmohogyi sʋ Bulu lɛkpalɩ amʋ́ tsitsa. Mlɩ ɛ mlɩ hogyi sʋ Bulu lapʋ mlɩ tsa mʋ́sʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmáha nwuntɔ ɩwa mlɩ ɔdwɛ. Mlɩha ifu ɩkɩta mlɩ. 21Tsufɛ Israelfɔ amʋʋ bʋgyi oyi amʋ onuto abambi kʋraa bɔbwɛ lakpan, Bulu lɛbɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ, mʋ́ mlɩ? 22Sei a, mlɩlawun ánɩ́ Bulu bʋ awɩtɔlɛ, tamɛ mʋ asʋn bʋ ɔnlɩn. Ɔbʋ ɔnlɩn aha ánɩ́ badɩda hogyitɔsʋ. Tamɛ alawa awɩtɔlɛ ha mlɩ. Ɔbɔ́wa awɩtɔlɛ ha mlɩ nɩ mlɩ ansɩ dɩn mʋsʋ. Nɩ megyi alɩ a, ɔbɛ́bɩtɩ mlɩ ɩsʋ mlɩ ɛ. 23Tamɛ nɩ Yudafɔ amʋʋ besi mʋ hogyi amʋ beyinki bɔhɔ mʋ gyi a, Bulu ɔbɛ́lapʋ amʋ́ tsa oyi amʋsʋ. Tsufɛ ɔbʋ tumiá obéyinkia amʋ́ tsa. 24Mlɩ aha amʋʋ mlɩmegyi Yudafɔ amʋ mʋ́ a, oyi lalahɛ bambi mlɩgyi, bɔpʋ mlɩ tsa oyi amʋsʋ. Tɛkɩ ɩma ɩnʋ alɩ. Israelfɔ mʋ́ a, oyi wanklaan amʋ onuto abambi bʋgyi, bɛkpalɩ amʋ́ tsitsa. Mʋ́ sʋ amʋ́ yinkia yi mʋ́ yintisʋ mɔ́ɔwa ɔnlɩn ha Bulu.
Bulu Towun Aha Fɛ́ɛ́ Nwɛ
25Mɩ apio, asʋn ŋainhɛ kʋ bʋ ɩnʋá ndekleá mlɩbɩ, mɛnɩ mlɩmɛ́ɛkɩ mlɩ ɩwɩá mlɩlɛtɩn ansɩ dʋbɩ. Asʋn amʋ gyi, Yudafɔ amʋ akʋ bʋbʋ asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn. Bɔ́wa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn alɩɩ bɔfʋn brɛá Bulu laha aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ fɛ́ɛ́ baba mʋ wa. 26Mʋ́ ɔma a, Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ nkpa. Bulu asʋn amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Sion wulutɔ Nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ amʋ ɔbɛ́lɩn tsu.
Ɔbɛ́ba bɛha Yakob abi-aná fɛ́ɛ́ bési lalahɛ bwɛ.
27Ɩnɩgyi ntam ánɩ́ nɛ́ka ha amʋ́
brɛá nɛ́lɛ amʋ́ tsu amʋ́ lakpantɔ nɩ.”
28Ɩnɩá Yudafɔ amʋ bʋmɔhɔ asʋn wanklaan amʋsʋ gyi sʋ a, bemli Bulu alupʋ, mɛnɩ ɩbɔ́wa labi ha mlɩ amʋʋ mlɩmegyi Yudafɔ amʋ. Tamɛ ɩnɩá bʋgyi aha ánɩ́ Bulu lɛlɛ sʋ a, amʋ́ anain sʋ otekle amʋ́ asʋn. 29Nɩ Bulu ɔlɛ ɔkʋ ntɛ ɔpʋ mʋ atokiehɛ ha ɔkʋ a, ɔtamatra tsɛ mʋ agywɩɩn. 30Brɛ kʋtɔ a, mlɩ anfɩ mlɩmegyi Yudafɔ anfɩ mlɩmobu Bulu. Tamɛ sei a, Yudafɔ bʋmɛdɛ Bulu bu. Mʋ́ sʋ Bulu lawun mlɩ nwɛ. 31Alɩ kɛn Bulu ɔbɛ́ba bowun Yudafɔ amʋʋ bʋmɛdɛ mʋ bu amʋ ɛ nwɛ, fɛ alɩá alawun mlɩ nwɛ nɩ. 32Tsufɛ Bulu lotsu mʋ́á aha fɛ́ɛ́ bʋbʋ asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn, alɩá ɩbɔ́bwɛ obówun amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ nwɛ sʋ.
Mlɩha Akanfʋ Bulu
33Oo, mlɩkɩ Bulu awɩtɔlɛ wʋlɛ! Mʋ nyansa pʋ́ mʋ asʋnbɩ ma ɔka! Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ bɩ mʋ ɔkpa pʋ́ mʋ asʋngyitɔ? 34Bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
“Ma yin anɩ Wie nwuntɔ?
Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ suna mʋ asʋn? Ɔhaa má ɩnʋ.
35Ma lapʋ tɔkʋ ha mʋ, ɔdɛ ɔkpa kɩá ɔbɛ́laka mʋ ɩkɔ?”
36Bulu lɔbwɛ togyitɔ. Mʋbʋ togyitɔ. Togyitɔ bʋ ɩnʋ ha mʋ. Kanfʋ ɩbwɛ mʋ klɛ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. Amen!

Title: ROMAFƆ 12
Content:
Tsiatɔá Bʋtɔpʋsum Bulu
1Ɩnɩá Bulu hɩɛ ɔdɛ anɩ nwɛ wun alɩ sʋ a, mɩ apio, ndɛ mlɩ kokoli mbɛɛ, mlɩpʋ mlɩ ɩwɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ha Bulu mlɩ nkpatɔ. Ɩbwɛ fɛ igyi ahatɔ wankɩhɛ ha mʋ. Ɩnɩgyi osum ánɩ́ itsu klʋntɔ, ilegyi mʋ ansɩ nɩ. 2Mlɩmáha ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ atsiabi igyi mlɩsʋ. Mlɩha Bulu ɔtsɛ mlɩ agywɩɩn, ɩha mlɩ tsiatɔ ɩtsɛ. Fówun mlɛ́talɩ bɩá Bulu apɛ bʋ alɛ, ɩbʋ ɔdwɛ, ɩlɔfʋn.
3Bulu agyʋma amʋʋ alawa awɩtɔlɛ pʋha mɩ amʋsʋ ndɛ mlɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ bla mbɛɛ, ɔhaa mákɩ mʋ ɩwɩ dafa alɩá ogyi. Ɔhagyiɔha ɔba ansɩ asɩ, ɔkɩá ɔmɔdʋn hogyi amʋʋ Bulu lapʋha mʋ amʋ. 4Nyankpʋsa-oyi ɩwɩ atɔ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩgyi. Ntobi amʋtɔ kugyikʋ bʋ mʋ́ gyʋma ánɩ́ itegyi nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋsʋ. 5Alɩ kɛn ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá anɩtsɔ, tamɛ anɩa Kristonyɔ anɩlabwɛ ɔyʋlʋ ɔkʋlɛ nɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩgyi ntobi ɔtsan-ɔtsan ánɩ́ anɩtsatsa abasʋ, anɩlɔbwɛ ɔyʋlʋ ɔkʋlɛ amʋ. 6Bulu atokiehɛ amʋʋ ɔlɛha anɩ amʋ ɩna ɔtsan-ɔtsan. Ilehian ánɩ́ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ abɔ́pʋ mʋ atokiehɛ amʋ yɔ agyʋma atɔ amʋʋ ɔlɛha anɩ amʋ ɔnɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ ɔkʋ atokiehɛ gyi Bulu ɔnɔ asʋnblɩ a, ɔha amʋ ɔbwɛ mʋ́ alɩá mʋ hogyi losuna mʋ. 7Nɩ ɔkʋ klɛ gyi mʋ aba ahogyipʋ bʋa a, ɔbʋa amʋ́. Nɩ ɔkʋ klɛ gyi atɔ suna a, osuna mʋ́. 8Nɩ ɔkʋ klɛ gyi aha atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn wa a, ɔwa aha atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn. Nɩ ɔkʋ ɛ klɛ gyi atɔ kie a, ɔlɛ ɩwɩtɔ kie mʋ́. Nɩ ɔkʋ klɛ gyi aha ɔnɔ lɩɩ a, ɔwa nsi ɔbwɛ mʋ́. Nɩ ɔkʋ klɛ ɛ gyi aha nwɛ wun a, ɔbwɛ mʋ́ ɔdwɛtɔ.
9Mlɩdwɛ aha tsu mlɩ klʋntɔ. Mlɩkisi lalahɛ kugyikʋ. Mlɩkɩta yilebwɛtɔ kinkiinkin. 10Mlɩha mlɩ ansɩ ɩpɛ mlɩ aba Akristofɔ dwɛsʋ, amlɩbu aba wanklaan. 11Mlɩmáha mlɩ nsiwa bwɛ atɔ ɔnɔ ɩba asɩ. Mlɩha Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ ɔwa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, amlɩsum anɩ Wie. 12Mlɩ ɔkpakɩ amʋ sʋ mlɩnya ansigyi, amlɩlɩɩ kinkin mlɩ ipiantɔ. Mlɩbɔ mpaɩ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. 13Mlɩbʋa mlɩ aba Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ ɩkplantɔ. Mlɩyɩrɩ ɩwɩ hɔ afɔɔ.
14Mlɩyula aha ánɩ́ bʋdɩn mlɩsʋ. Mlɩyula amʋ́, mlɩmálwɩɩ amʋ́. 15Nɩ akʋ bʋdɛ ansigyi nya a, mlɩa amʋ́nyɔ mlɩnya ansigyi. Nɩ akʋ bʋdesu ɛ a, mlɩa amʋ́nyɔ mlɩsu. 16Mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩtsia wanklaan. Mlɩmátsu ɩwɩ. Mlɩpʋ ɩwɩ manta aha ánɩ́ aha bʋtamabu amʋ́. Mlɩmákɩ mlɩ ɩwɩá mlɩdʋn akʋ.
17Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔpʋ lalahɛ gyi mlɩ a, mlɩmápʋ lalahɛ ka mʋ ɩkɔ. Mlɩbɔ mbɔdɩ amlɩbwɛ tɔá ɩbʋ alɛá aha fɛ́ɛ́ bótsula dɩnka mʋ́sʋ. 18Alɩágyialɩá igyi mlɩ mʋ́ a, iwilwii itsia mlɩa ɔhagyiɔha nsɩnɛ. 19Mɩ apio adwɛpʋ, mlɩmápʋ lalahɛ ka mlɩ aba ɩkɔ. Mlɩsi togyitɔ ha Bulu. Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Bulu ɔbɛɛ, ‘Mɩ, mlɩ Wie tɛka ɩkɔ. Mɩ ɔbɛ́ka aha akɔ amʋ́ lakpan sʋ.> ” 20Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ lɛtra blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ akʋn dɛ fʋ olupʋ a, ha mʋ atɔ ogyi. Nɩ ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ mʋ a, ha mʋ ntsu onun. Nɩ fɔbwɛ mʋ́ alɩ a, ɩbɛ́ha pɛlɩ bɛ́kɩta mʋ ɔbɛ́tsɛ.” 21Mlɩmáha lalahɛ igyi mlɩsʋ, mboun mlɩbwɛ yile pʋgyi lalahɛsʋ.

Title: ROMAFƆ 13
Content:
Ɩwɩasɩba Ha Ɔmá Akpapʋ
1Ilehian ánɩ́ ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɛ́ba ɩwɩasɩ ha ɔmá akpapʋ. Tsufɛ Bulu tɛha ɔmá akpapʋ tumi. Ɔmá ɔkpapʋ ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋá megyi Bulu lɛyaɩ mʋ. 2Ɩnɩ sʋ nɩ ɔkʋ ɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ ɔmá ɔkpapʋ ɔkʋsʋ a, alakʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulu tumisʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔha amʋ dɛ ɩsʋbɩtɩ kle ha ɩwɩ. 3Tsufɛ ɔmá akpapʋ bʋmegya yile abwɛpʋ, lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋgya. Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ fʋmedekleá fʋnya ɔmá akpapʋ ifu a, mʋmʋ bwɛ yile abʋkanfʋ fʋ. 4Bulu osumbi ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ bapʋ mʋ yaɩ ɔmá ɔnɔ gyi. Mlɩ yile sʋ bʋdɛ agyʋma yɔ. Tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ dɛ lalahɛ bwɛ a, mʋmʋ obénya amʋ́ ifu, tsufɛ bʋbʋ ɔkpa bɩtɩ aha ɩsʋ. Bulu asumbi bʋgyi. Ɔlɛha amʋ́ ɔkpa ánɩ́ bʋbɩtɩ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ ɩsʋ ha mʋ. 5Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔhagyiɔha ɔba ɩwɩasɩ ha ɔmá akpapʋ. Megyi bɛɛ, bʋdɛ ifu nya ánɩ́ bɛ́bɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ nkʋlɛ sʋ. Mboun amʋ́ klʋn dɛ amʋ́ bla ɔbɛɛ, ilehian ánɩ́ bóbu amʋ́.
6Ɩnɩ kɛn sʋ ilehian ánɩ́ mlɛ́ka tswɩtswɩ ɛ nɩ. Bulu asumbi ɔmá akpapʋ bʋgyi. Bapʋ amʋ́ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋdɛ ɔmásʋ kɩ. 7Mlɩka ɩkɔ kugyikʋá ɩdɩn mlɩsʋ. Mlɩka tswɩtswɩ mʋ́a lampoo. Obú ɔkpasʋ a, mlɩbu amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́. Nɩ igyi kanfʋ ɛ a, mlɩkanfʋ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́.
Abadwɛ
8Mlɩmákɩta ɔhaa ɩkɔ dʋn mlɩ abadwɛ. Nɩ ɔkʋ dɛ mʋ aba dwɛ a, ɔdɛ mbla amʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ gyi. 9Mose Mbla amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mátɔ mbʋa.” “Mámɔ ɔha.” “Máwi atɔ.” “Mápɛ ansɩ fʋ ba atɔsʋ.” Ɩnɩ pʋ́ mbla trahɛ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ nwun gyi mbla kʋlɛ amʋʋ ɩlɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Dwɛ fʋ ba fɛ fʋ ɩwɩ” amʋ. 10Nɩ ɔkʋ dɛ mʋ ba dwɛ a, ɔmɔ́ɔpʋ lalahɛ gyi mʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔdwɛ mʋ aba lagyi mbla amʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
11Mlɩ onuto mlɩyin brɛ oduatɔ anɩbʋ. Brɛ lafʋn ánɩ́ mlétsinki, tsufɛ anɩ nkpahɔ lafʋn ta dʋn brɛ amʋʋ anɩlegyankpa hɔ Kristo gyi amʋ. 12Onye dɛtsʋn, ɔyɩ lakɛ ta. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha asi okluntɔ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ bwɛ, atsu anɩ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ akɔtɔ tsan. 13Mlɩha anɩ tsiatɔ ɩbwɛ fɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋtsie wankɩtɔ. Mlɩmáha ayinta anɩ brɛ yetsia ɔdwɛ ogyikpa, anɩdɛ atɔ dɛdɛ gyi, anɩdɛ nta nun bʋ. Anɩmáwa atsɩ mʋ́a ayin asʋn. Anɩmáwa ɔnsɩpɛ, anɩmátrɛ kɔ. 14Mboun mlɩpʋ anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo tin mlɩ ɩwɩ. Mlɩmátra tsia tsiatɔ dada amʋʋ mlɩ ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ tekle amʋ.

Title: ROMAFƆ 14
Content:
Akristofɔ Ɩlalɛ Ɔkpa Lalahɛsʋ
1Mlɩhɔ mlɩ aba Akristofɔá bʋma ɔwʋnlɩn hogyitɔ wa mlɩtɔ. Nɩ bɛɛ, tɔkʋ bʋ alɛ ntɛ ɩma alɛ a, mlɩmágyi amʋ́ nwɛn. 2Ɔkʋ lohogyiá ɔbʋ ɔkpa gyi togyitɔ, tamɛ ɔkʋ ɛ hogyi ɔnɔ ɩma ɔnlɩn. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔtamagyi iye. 3Ɔkpa má ɩnʋá ɔha ánɩ́ otegyi togyitɔ ɔbɛ́lɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtamagyi tɔkʋ ɩla. Alɩ kɛn ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtamagyi tɔkʋ ɛ ɔmálɛ ɔha ánɩ́ otegyi togyitɔ ɩla nɩ. Tsufɛ Bulu lahɔ amʋ́. 4Fʋgyi ma ánɩ́ fɛ́ha ɔkʋ osumbi pɔn? Mʋ wie nkʋlɛ pɛ bʋ ɔkpa blɩ ɔbɛɛ, otsie wanklaan ntɛ ometsie wanklaan. Ɔbɛ́talɩ tsia wanklaan, tsufɛ Bulu ɔbɛ́talɩ ha mʋ obétsia wanklaan.
5Ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́talɩ blɩ ɔbɛɛ, ɛkɛ kʋ dʋn mʋ́ aba, ɔkʋ ɛ ɔbɛ́blɩ ɔbɛɛ, nkɛ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi kʋlɛ. Ɔhagyiɔha ɔyɔ mʋ klʋntɔ wanklaan, otsu mʋ́á ɩbʋ alɛ. 6Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔlɛ ɛkɛ ɔkʋ ɔbɛɛ igyi ɛkɛ yile a, ɔdɛ mʋ́sʋ gyi pʋtsu Bulu fʋa. Nɩ ɔkʋ ɛ tegyi togyitɔ a, ɔdɛ mʋ́ gyi pʋtsu anɩ Wie fʋa. Nɩ ɔkʋ ɛ tamagyi iye a, mʋ ɛ ɔdɛ mʋ́ kisi pʋtsu anɩ Wie fʋa. Tsufɛ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtɛda Bulu ɩpan mʋ́sʋ. 7Anɩtɔ ɔhaa metsie nkpa ha mʋ ɩwɩ, anɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋ ɛ móowu ha mʋ ɩwɩ. 8Nɩ anɩtsie nkpa a, anɩtsie ha anɩ Wie. Awu ɛ a, anɩlawu ha mʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ anɩlawu o, anɩtsie nkpa o, anɩ Wie bʋ anɩ. 9Tsufɛ Kristo lowu, yinki kʋsʋ ba nkpatɔ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́bwɛ akɩankpapʋ pʋ́ awupʋ fɛ́ɛ́ Owie. 10Ɩnɩ sʋ imehian ánɩ́ fɛ́ha fʋ ba ɩpɔn ntɛ fɛ́kɩ fʋ ba ansɩtɔ kotikoti. Tsufɛ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ abɛ́yɛlɩɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ, obégyi anɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ asʋn. 11Bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Anɩ Wie Bulu ɔbɛɛ,
‘Nanya mbʋ nkpa anfɩ a,
ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɛ́da akpawunu mɩ ansɩtɔ;
ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɛ́lɛ blɩ ɔbɛɛ, Bulu ngyi.> ”
12Mʋ́ sʋ anɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ asʋn ɔnɔ Bulu ansɩtɔ.
Máha Fʋ Ba Ɔdɩda Mʋ Hogyitɔ
13Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha asi aba ɩla lɛ. Mboun abwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ anɩmɔ́ɔbwɛ tɔtɔá ɩbɛ́ha anɩ ba ɔkʋkʋ mɛ́ɛsrɛɩ ntɛ dɩda. 14Sei ɩnɩá namli Okristoyin sʋ nabɩá atogyihɛ kʋkʋ má ɩnʋá mʋ́ ɩwɩ mɛtɩn. Tamɛ nɩ Kristoyin ɔkʋ lohogyiá tɔkʋ ɩwɩ mɛtɩn a, mʋmʋ mʋ wa mʋ́ ɩwɩ mɛtɩn. 15Nɩ fʋtegyi tɔkʋ, ɩdɛ fʋ ba han a, mʋmʋ fʋ bwɛhɛ mɛdɛ ɔdwɛ suna. Máha fʋ atogyihɛ ɩha fʋ ba ánɩ́ Kristo lowu ha mʋ ɔfwɩ. 16Mʋ́ sʋ máha tɔá fʋyin ánɩ́ ɩbʋ alɛ ɩbwɛ tsitsa aha ansɩtɔ. 17Tsufɛ Bulu iwiegyi amʋ imegyi atogyihɛ ntɛ atonunhɛ asʋn, mboun yilebwɛ, iwilwii pʋ́ ansigyi ánɩ́ itsu Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋtɔ asʋn igyi. 18Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ otosum Kristo ɔkpa anfɩsʋ a, mʋ asʋn tegyi Bulu ansɩ. Aha ɛ bʋtobu mʋ.
19Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩha anɩ ansɩ ɩpɛ tɔá ɩbɔ́pʋ iwilwii ba, ɩbɔ́wa apio aba ɔwʋnlɩn hogyitɔsʋ bregyibrɛ. 20Máyinta Bulu gyumagyihɛ fʋ atogyihɛ sʋ. Ɔkpa bʋ ɩnʋá abɛ́talɩ gyi togyitɔ, tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ dɛ tɔá ɩbɛ́ha mʋ ba ɔbɔ́bwɛ lakpan bwɛ mʋ́ a, ɩma alɛ. 21Nɩ ɔkʋ tamagyi iye kʋ, ntɛ nun nta ntɛ bwɛ tɔá ɩbɛ́ha mʋ ba ɔbɛ́dɩda a, ɩbʋ alɛ. 22Mʋ́ sʋ togyitɔá fohogyi tsu ntobi anfɩ ɩwɩ a, ha mʋ́ ɩbwɛ fʋa fʋ Bulunyɔ nsɩnɛ asʋn. Nɩ ɔkʋ opuni mɛdɛ mʋ tsii mʋ bwɛhɛsʋ a, mʋmʋ ɔkla lawa mʋ ogya. 23Tamɛ nɩ mʋ klʋn mɛdɩ mʋ asɩ mʋ atogyihɛ kʋ gyi sʋ, ogyi mʋ́ a, Bulu laha mʋ ɩpɔn dodoodo. Tsufɛ mʋ atɔ amʋ gyi mɛlɩɩ hogyisʋ. Togyitɔá ɔha mɔpʋ hogyi bwɛ igyi lakpan.

Title: ROMAFƆ 15
Content:
Aha Ansɩsʋ Atɔ Bwɛ
1Ilehian ánɩ́ anɩ aha ánɩ́ anɩ hogyi ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn abénya klʋn ha aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ hogyi ɔnɔ ɩma ɔnlɩn. Megyi tɔá iletsia anɩ wʋlɛ abɔ́bwɛ. 2Ilehian ánɩ́ anɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ ɔbɔ́bwɛ tɔá ɩbʋ alɛ ha mʋ ba, mɛnɩ ɩbɛ́ha mʋ ɔbɛ́dan hogyitɔ. 3Tsufɛ Kristo kʋraa mɔbwɛ tɔá mʋ onuto otekle. Mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Asiabi amʋʋ besia fʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩlɛbɛdɩnka mɩsʋ.” 4Asʋn kugyikʋá bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ tsu tɩtɩɩtɩ a, bɔwanlɩn mʋ́ ánɩ́ ibósuna anɩ atɔ, wa anɩ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn, atomi lɩɩ kinkiinkin. Fówun abénya klʋn kɩ ɔkpa ha atɔ amʋʋ anɩ ansɩ dɩn mʋ́sʋ amʋ. 5Bulu tɛha aha bʋtenya klʋn. Mʋtɔwa aha atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn. Ndɛ mʋ kʋlɩ mbɛɛ, ɔha amlɩbwɛ kʋlɛ, fɛ alɩá Kristo Yesu losuna anɩ. 6Ɩnɩ ɔbɛ́ha mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɔ́pʋ ɔmɛ kʋlɛ kanfʋ Bulu, ogyi anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo mʋ Sɩ amʋ nɩ.
Aha Ánɩ́ Bʋmegyi Yudafɔ Asʋn Wanklaan Bla
7Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩhɔ aba atuu, fɛ alɩá Kristo lɔhɔ mlɩ, mɛnɩ ɩbɔ́wa Bulu numnyam. 8Tsufɛ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, Kristo labwɛ Yudafɔ osumpʋ, mɛnɩ ibósuna ánɩ́ Bulu obégyi mʋ tɔ amʋʋ ɔlɛhɩɛ amʋ́ anain amʋsʋ. 9Kristo lɛba, mɛnɩ aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ bɛ́tɩ Bulu ɩdayile, nwɛ amʋʋ olowun amʋ́ amʋ sʋ. Fɛ alɩá Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ ɩlɛblɩ. Asʋn amʋ gyi,
“Anɩ Wie Bulu, ɩnɩ sʋ nɔ́wa fʋ numnyam aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ ansɩtɔ.
Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ.”
10Bulu asʋn amʋ lɛtra blɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Mlɩ aha ánɩ́ mlɩmegyi Yudafɔ, mlɩa Bulu aha mlɩnya ansigyi!”
11Bɛtra wanlɩn bɛɛ,
“Aha ánɩ́ mlɩmegyi Yudafɔ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ anɩ Wie Bulu.
Ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́ abi, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ.”
12Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ Yesaia ɛ lɛblɩ tswɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Ɔha ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́lɩn tsu anɩ nain Yisai abi-anátɔ.
Mʋ obébegyi iwie aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔsʋ nɩ.
Mʋsʋ bɛ́dɩnka ansɩ nɩ.”
13Buluá bʋtɛkɩ ɔkpa ha ogyi. Ndɛ mʋ kokoli mbɛɛ, ɔha ɩwɩ ilwii mlɩ, ansɩ igyi mlɩ amlɩhɔ mʋ gyi. Mʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ ɔha mlɩ tumi, mɛnɩ mʋ ɔkpakɩ mɔ́ɔkpɔn mlɩ.
Tɔá Sʋa Paulo Lɛlɛ Ɩwɩtɔ Wanlɩn Atɔ Alɩ
14Mɩ apio Akristofɔ, mɩ onuto nhɩɛ nyin ánɩ́ aha wanklaan mlɩgyi. Mlɩlabɩ asʋn tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ, mlɛtalɩ tɔɩ kpla aba. 15Tamɛ nawa klʋn nhɩɛ ndɛ mlɩ asʋn bla ɔwʋlʋ anfɩtɔ pʋkaɩn mlɩ. Tsufɛ Bulu lawa awɩtɔlɛ pʋ agyʋma anfɩ wa mɩ ɩbɩtɔ ɔbɛɛ mbwɛ. 16Mʋ́gyi, mba bɔbwɛ Kristo Yesu osumbi aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ osum agyʋma anfɩ yɔ fɛ Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ. Ndɛ aha amʋʋ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ amʋ Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋ bla, mɛnɩ bémli igyi ahatɔá Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ latɩn mʋ́ ɩwɩ, ilegyi Bulu ansɩ. 17Ɩnɩá mɩa Kristo Yesunyɔ anɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ sʋ a, mbʋ ɔkpa tsu ɩwɩ agyʋma anfɩ ndɛyɔ ha Bulu anfɩ sʋ. 18Tsufɛ mmɛ́ɛtalɩ blɩ asʋansʋ tsɩa atɔá Kristo latsʋn mɩ asʋn blɩhɛ pʋ́ mɩ bwɛhɛsʋ bwɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔtɔ, mɛnɩ bóbu Bulu. 19Ɩna ofula mʋ́a osuna amʋʋ nɔbwɛ Bulu Ɔŋɛ amʋ tumitɔ amʋsʋ nɛtalɩ da Kristo asʋn wanklaan amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔkan, tsu Yerusalem alɩɩ yɛdalɩ Iliriko ɔsʋlʋsʋ. 20Tɔá ɩdɩn mɩ klʋnsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́, ndekleá nɔ́bwɛ gyi, nɛ́natɩ da Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan ntɩnɛá bʋmɔkʋnya nu Kristo asʋn kɩ. Mmedekleá nɔ́tʋa ɔkʋ gyumagyihɛsʋ. 21Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
“Aha ánɩ́ bʋmɔkʋnu mʋ nka kɩ bówun mʋ.
Aha ánɩ́ bʋmɔkʋnu mʋ asʋn kɩ ɛ bónu mʋ́ asɩ.”
Paulo Roma Ɔpasua Yɛsɩna
22Ɩnɩ laha mmɔkʋnya ɔkpa ba mlɩ wa bɔtʋ ndɛ nɩ. 23Tamɛ sei mʋ́ a, mɩ agyʋma lamɔ ɔnɔ nfɩ fʋnsʋ. Nfi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ nɩ ndekleá nɛ́ba mlɩ wa bɛkɩ mlɩ. 24Mʋ́ sʋ nabwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ nɩ ndɛtsʋn nɔyɔ Spania a, nɔ́tsʋn kɩ mlɩ. Agyi ɔdwɛ kpalobi a, mlɩlasi mɩ ɔkpa nayɔ ɩnʋ. 25Sei a, nabwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ négyankpa yɔ Yerusalem, yɔbʋa Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ ɩnʋ. 26Tsufɛ Akristofɔá bʋbʋ Makedonia pʋ́ Akaia ɔsʋlʋsʋ bapʋ ɔdwɛ dunka atɔ bʋdɛpʋsɩsɩ Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋgyi ahianfɔ Yerusalem. 27Ɩbʋ amʋ́ ɔdwɛá bɔ́bʋa ahianfɔ. Bawun ánɩ́ ilehian ánɩ́ bɔ́bʋa Yudafɔ ɛ ka ɩkɔ. Tsufɛ banya Ɔŋɛtɔ atɔ, nu nkpahɔ asʋn amʋ tsu amʋ́ wa. Mʋ́ sʋ ilehian ánɩ́ bódunka ɔyɩtɔ atɔ kʋ ha amʋ́ ɛ. 28Nɩ nɔpʋ kɔba ánɩ́ bɔtswɩtswɩ ha mɩ fɛ́ɛ́ wa amʋ́ ɩbɩtɔ a, nɔ́bɔtsʋn mlɩ wa yɔ Spania. 29Nyin ánɩ́ nɩ nɛba a, nɔ́pʋ Kristo oyula kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ ba mlɩ.
30Mɩ apio adwɛpʋ, ndɛpʋ anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo pʋ́ ɔdwɛá Bulu Ɔŋɛ laha mlɩ, ha mlɩ aba kokoli mlɩ mbɛɛ, mlɩlɩɩ mɩ ɔma, amlɩbɔ mpaɩ ha mɩ kinkiinkin. 31Mlɩbɔ mpaɩ mlɩaa, Bulu ɔlɛ mɩ tsu Yudafɔ amʋʋ bʋmɔhɔ mʋ gyi amʋ ɩbɩtɔ. Mlɩbɔ ha mɩ, mɛnɩ Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ Yerusalem ɩnʋ bɔ́hɔ atɔ amʋʋ napʋ nɛya amʋ́ amʋ. 32Fówun nɩ Bulu lotsula a, nɛ́ba mlɩ wa ansigyi kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩtɔ, bɛda ɔkpʋnʋ. 33Buluá ɔtɛha iwilwii, otsia mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ wa. Amen!

Title: ROMAFƆ 16
Content:
Itsiaha
1Ndɛ opio tsɩhɛ Foibe lɛ suna mlɩ. Kenkrea wulutɔ ɔpasuatɔ ahandɛ ɔbʋapʋ ogyi. 2Mlɩhɔ mʋ anɩ Wie Yesu ɩdatɔ alɩá ɩlɛkana ánɩ́ Bulu aha bɔ́bwɛ, amlɩbʋa mʋ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ alɩá odekle. Tsufɛ mʋ onuto alabʋa aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ, alabʋa mɩ ɛ.
3Nɛha Priska mʋa mʋ klu Akwila fɛ́ɛ́ tsia. Mɩa amʋ́nyɔ letsia bwɛ anɩ Wie Kristo Yesu agyʋma. 4Bɔpʋ amʋ́ ɩwɩ ha ánɩ́ bówu mɩ sʋ kʋraa. Ndɛ amʋ́ ɩpan da wanklaan. Megyi mɩ nkʋlɛ. Akristofɔá bʋmegyi Yudafɔ ɔpasua fɛ́ɛ́ bʋdɛ amʋ́ ɩpan da. 5Nɛha ɔpasua amʋʋ betsia fia amʋ́ woyitɔ amʋ ɛ fɛ́ɛ́ tsia.
Nɛha mɩ ɔdwɛpʋ Epaineto tsia. Mʋlegyankpa hɔ Kristo Asia ɔmátɔ fɛ́ɛ́ nɩ. 6Nɛha Maria amʋʋ olowun ipian mlɩ sʋ amʋ tsia. 7Nɛha mɩ aba Yudafɔ Androniko mʋa Yunia tsia. Bawa mɩa amʋ́nyɔ obu kɩ. Bʋgyi Kristo sumbi ayɔpʋá obú bʋ amʋ́sʋ. Begyankpa hɔ Kristo asa nata bɔhɔ.
8Nɛha mɩ pio ɔdwɛpʋ Kristotɔ Amplia tsia. 9Nɛha anɩ Kristo agyʋma ɔyɔba Urbano mʋa mɩ nyawie klakla Staki tsia. 10Nɛha Apele amʋʋ alalɛ suna wanklaan ánɩ́ alapʋ mʋ ɩwɩ ha Kristo amʋ mʋa Aristobulo abusuanfɔ fɛ́ɛ́ tsia. 11Nɛha mɩ ba Yudayin Herodion tsia. Nɛha Narkiso abusuanfɔ ánɩ́ bʋgyi Akristofɔ tsia.
12Nɛha Trifaina mʋa Trifosa, bʋgyi atsɩ amʋʋ bʋdɛ Kristo agyʋmatɔ kinkiinkin amʋ tsia. Nɛha mɩ ɔdwɛpʋ tsɩhɛ Persi, ɔdɛ Kristo agyʋma yɔ kinkiinkin amʋ ɛ tsia. 13Nɛha Rufo mʋa mʋ yin amʋʋ mɩ ɛ ntɛtɩ mʋ mɩ yin amʋ tsia. Rufo gyi anɩ Wie agyʋma ɔyɔpʋá alahɔ ɩda agyʋma amʋtɔ. 14Nɛha Asinkrito, Flegon, Herme, Patroba, Herma pʋ́ apio Akristofɔ amʋʋ bʋbʋ amʋ́ wa amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ tsia. 15Nɛha Filologo, Yulia pʋ́ Nereo mʋa mʋ pio tsɩhɛ pʋ́ Olimpa mʋa Bulu aha amʋʋ bʋbʋ amʋ́ wa amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ tsia.
16Mlɩlata aba puta Bulu ɔdwɛtɔ. Kristo ɔpasua amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋdɛ mlɩ tsia ha.
Tɔá Roma Ahogyipʋ Amʋ Bʋbwɛ
17Apio, nokokoli mlɩ, mlɩkɩ wanklaan, mɛnɩ mlɛ́talɩ wun aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ mlɩtɔ, bʋdɛ mlɩ dasaɩn. Alɩ aha amʋ bʋtɛha aha bʋtɛdɩda hogyitɔ. Amʋ́ atosunahɛ tɛda mʋ́ amʋʋ nosuna mlɩ amʋ mɔ. Mlɩkʋla ɩwɩ lɛ amʋ́sʋ. 18Tsufɛ aha amʋ odu a, megyi anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋdesum. Amʋ́ ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ bʋdesum. Bapʋ amʋ́ ɔnɔwankɩ pʋ́ ahakanfʋ bʋna bʋdɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋmeyin ɔlala mlɛ. 19Tamɛ mlɩ mʋ́ a, ɔhagyiɔha lanu alɩá mlɩlapʋ mlɩ ɩwɩ ha Kristo. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩbʋ mɩ ɔdwɛ, ansɩ dɛ mɩ gyi wanklaan mlɩ sʋ. Tamɛ ndekleá mlɩtɩn ansɩ, amlɩbɩ tɔá ɩbʋ alɛ. Mlɩmáwa ɩbɩ lalahɛtɔ. 20Bulu tɛha anɩ iwilwii. Ɩmɔ́ɔwa ɔpá a, ɔbɛ́tsa Satansʋ manta ɔsʋlʋ tantaantan, mlɛ́lɩɩ mʋsʋ.
Anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ogyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, ɔlɩɩ mlɩ ɔma.
21Mɩ ba agyʋma ɔyɔpʋ Timoteo dɛ mlɩ tsia ha. Alɩ mɩ aba Yudafɔ Lukio mʋa Yason pʋ́ Sosipatro ɛ bʋdɛ mlɩ tsia ha nɩ.
22Mɩ mlɩ pio Okristoyin Tertioá nɔwanlɩn ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ ha Paulo, ndɛ mlɩ tsia ha.
23-24Mɩ woyi mʋ wie Gaio amʋʋ ɔpasua amʋʋ bʋtefia mʋ woyitɔ amʋ dɛ mlɩ tsia ha. Erasto, ogyi wulu kɔbasʋ ɔkɩpʋ mʋa anɩ pio Kwarto ɛ bɛha mlɩ tsia.
Paulo Bulu Kanfʋ
25Mlɩha akanfʋ anɩ Bulu! Mʋ ɔbɛ́talɩ tsʋn Yesu Kristo asʋn amʋʋ nablɩ amʋsʋ ha mlɛ́lɩɩ kinkiinkin hogyitɔ. Ɔlɔpʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ anfɩ ŋain tsu ɔyɩ ɔpá. 26Sei mʋ́ a, alatsʋn mʋ ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ amʋ atɔ wanlɩnhɛsʋ lɛ mʋ́ ɔwan; fɛ alɩá Buluá ɔbʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ laha ɔmá-ɔmá babɩ mʋ́, mɛnɩ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bɔ́hɔ mʋ gyi, bu mʋ.
27Bulu nkʋlɛ gyi Bulu. Mʋ nkʋlɛ bʋ nyansa. Numnyam ánɩ́ ɩlɛkana ɩtsʋn anɩ Wie Yesusʋ ɩtʋ mʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Amen!

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 1
Content:
1Mɩ Kristo Yesu sumbi ɔyɔpʋ Paulo ánɩ́ Bulu lɛtɩ mʋ apɛtɔ pʋ́ anɩ pio Sostene dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn.
2Anɩdɛ mʋ́ wanlɩn sɩsɩ Bulu ɔpasua ánɩ́ ɩbʋ Korinto wulutɔ, Bulu lalɛ amʋ́, bwɛ amʋ́ mʋ aha. Amʋ́a Kristo Yesu babwɛ kʋlɛ, fɛ anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo asumpʋá bʋbʋ ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́. Yesu Kristo gyi anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ Owie.
3Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋgyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, abʋha mlɩ iwilwii.
Anɩa Kristo Ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ Oyula
4Ntɛda Bulu ɩpan bregyibrɛ, alɩá mlɩa Kristo Yesu kʋlɛbwɛ sʋ alawa awɩtɔlɛ ha mlɩ. 5Tsufɛ mʋ́ sʋ mlɩlanya ɩwɩ togyitɔtɔ. Mʋ́a ɩdʋn gyi mlɩ tɔɩ pʋ́ mlɩ asʋnbɩ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. 6Ɩnɩ lasuna ánɩ́ asʋn amʋʋ anɩlɛbla mlɩ tsu Kristo ɩwɩ amʋ bʋ mʋ́tɔ. 7Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔŋɛtɔ atokiehɛ kugyikʋ mɛdɛ mlɩ hian, sei anfɩ mlɩhɩɛ mlɩdɛ ɛkɛá anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo obótsu ɔsʋsʋ ba bɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan ɔkpa kɩ anfɩ. 8Mʋ onuto ɔbɔ́wa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn yɔfʋn ɛkɛ amʋʋ ɔbɛ́sanki ba begyi anɩ asʋn amʋ, mɛnɩ asʋansʋ méetsia mlɩ ɩwɩ. 9Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ Bulu gyi. Mʋlɛtɩ mlɩ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩa mʋ Bi, ogyi anɩ Wie Yesu Kristonyɔ mlɩbɔbwɛ kʋlɛ.
Ɔpasua Amʋtɔ Ɩkʋlɛmábwɛ
10Apio, nɔpʋ anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo kokoli mlɩ ánɩ́ mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩbwɛ kʋlɛ, mɛnɩ mlɩmɛ́ɛdasaɩn. Mlɩha mlɩ agywɩɩn ɩbwɛ kʋlɛ mlɩ asʋn blɩhɛ kugyikʋtɔ. 11Mɩ apio, tɔá sʋá ndɛ asʋn anfɩ blɩ gyi, akʋá botsu Kloe abusuantɔ babla mɩ bɛɛ, asʋn bʋbʋ mlɩ nsɩnɛ. 12Bɛblɩ bɛɛ, mlɩtɔ akʋ mlɩaa, “Paulo anɩbuo.” Abamba bɛɛ, “Apolo anɩbuo.” Akʋ ɛ bɛɛ, “Petro, bʋtɛtra tɩ mʋ Kefa anɩbuo.” Akʋ ɛ bɛɛ, “Kristo anɩbuo.” 13Nfɩtɛ mlɩ, beye Kristotɔ? Paulo bɛda manta oyikpalihɛ amʋsʋ ha mlɩ, ntɛ mʋ ɩdatɔ bɔbɔ mlɩ asu?
14Nɛda Bulu ɩpan ánɩ́ Gaio mʋa Krispu ɔma a, mmɛtra bɔ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋ asu. 15Mʋ́ sʋ ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ blɩ ɔbɛɛ, mɩ ɩdatɔ nɔbɔ mʋ asu. 16Ke! Nakaɩn, nɔbɔ Stefana mʋa mʋ woyitɔ aha ɛ asu. Amʋ́ ɔma a, mmɛ́ɛkaɩn ánɩ́ nɛtra bɔ ɔhaa asu. 17Kristo mɔwa mɩ aha asubɔ. Mboun ɔbɛɛ, mbɛda asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan. Megyi ɔnɔwankɩ pʋ́ anyankpʋsa agywɩɩn nɔ́pʋblɩ mʋ́, tsufɛ nɩ nɔpʋ mʋ́ blɩ mʋ́ a, tumi kʋkʋʋkʋ ɩmɛ́ɛtra tsia Kristo oyikpalihɛ amʋtɔ.
Bulu Tumi Pʋ́ Mʋ Nyansa
18Anɩ Wie Yesu oyikpalihɛsʋ lowu ɩwɩ asʋn amʋ igyi mimlala ha aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛhɩ. Tamɛ igyi Bulu tumi ha anɩ aha ánɩ́ Bulu dɛ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata ha. 19Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
“Néyinta anyansapʋ nyansa.
Mmɔ́ɔhɔ amʋ́ agywɩɩn wanklaan kʋkʋ.”
20Nɩ igyi alɩ a, mʋmʋ ntɔ onyansapʋ gyi? Ntɔ Mose mbla osunapʋ gyi? Ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ nwɛn agyipʋ mɛ? Ɔyɩtɔ ansɩtɩn mɛ, imegyi mimlala Bulu ansɩtɔ?
21Bulu lɔpʋ mʋ onuto nyansa bwɛ mʋ́. Nyankpʋsa mɛ́ɛtalɩ pʋ mʋ nyansa bɩ mʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ alapʋ anɩ mimla ɔkan amʋʋ anɩdɛda amʋ hɔ aha ánɩ́ bahɔ mʋ gyi nkpa. 22Tsufɛ osuna ánɩ́ itsu Bulu wa Yudafɔ bʋtekleá bɔ́pʋbɩá asʋn amʋ bʋ mʋ́tɔ. Grikifɔ ɛ a, nyansa bʋtekleá bɔ́pʋbɩá ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔ. 23Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ ada ɔkan anɩaa, bɛda Kristo manta oyikpalihɛsʋ a, ɩtɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ Yudafɔsʋ, igyi mimlala ɔmá bambasʋfɔ ɛ ansɩtɔ. 24Tamɛ aha ánɩ́ Bulu lalɛ, bʋgyi Yudafɔ pʋ́ Grikifɔ mʋ́ a, Kristo gyi Bulu tumi kpɔnkpɔntɩ pʋ́ mʋ nyansa ha amʋ́. 25Tsufɛ Bulu mimlala igyi ansɩtɩnla dʋn nyankpʋsa nyansa. Mʋ ɩpɔn ɛ kʋraa dʋn nyankpʋsa ɔwʋnlɩn.
26Apio, mlɩkaɩn alɩá mlɩgyi brɛá Bulu lɛtɩ mlɩ. Aha bʋtamabu mlɩ ɔdʋdʋɔ ánɩ́ mlɩlɛtɩn ansɩ. Mlɩ ɔdʋdʋɔ mlɩmegyi ɩwɩ anyapʋ, ɔdʋdʋɔ ɛ bʋmotsu abusuan kpikplitɔ. 27Bulu lɛlɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋma nyansa ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́pʋ amʋ́ sʋpa atɩansɩpʋ. Ɔlɛlɛ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ apɔnpʋ ɛ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́pʋ amʋ́ wa awʋnlɩnpʋ pɛlɩtɔ. 28Ɔlɛlɛ aha ánɩ́ obú ma amʋ́sʋ pʋ́ amʋ́á bʋma labi kʋkʋ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́pʋ amʋ́ wa amʋ́á obú bʋ amʋ́sʋ pɛlɩtɔ. 29Ɔlɔbwɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ alɩ, mɛnɩ ɔhaa móotsu ɩwɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ. 30Bulu sʋ mlɩa Kristo Yesunyɔ mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ, alapʋ Kristo bwɛ anɩ nyansa. Mʋlatsu anɩ ánɩ́ anɩ asʋn da ɔkpa mʋ ansɩtɔ, alabwɛ anɩ mʋ aha. Alahɔ anɩ lɛ lakpan nkpábitɔ, ha anɩlagyi ɩwɩ. 31Mʋ́ sʋ fɛ alɩá Bulu asʋn amʋ lɛblɩ a, “Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔbɛɛ, mótsu ɩwɩ a, ɔpʋ tɔá anɩ Wie labwɛ tsu ɩwɩ.”

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 2
Content:
Kristo Da Manta Oyikpalihɛsʋ
1Mɩ apio, brɛá nɛba bɛda Bulu asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋ ɔkan suna mlɩ a, mmɔpʋ ɔnɔwankɩ ntɛ nyansa kʋkʋ bɛbla mlɩ Bulu asʋn amʋ. 2Tsufɛ brɛá mbʋ mlɩ wa a, nɔbwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ nɔ́tɔɩ tsu Yesu Kristo pʋ́ mʋ oyikpalihɛsʋ lowu nkʋlɛ ɩwɩ. 3Brɛá nɛba a, mɩ awutɔ yɔyɔɔyɔ. Ifu dɛ mɩ, ndɛkpɩnkɩ. 4Megyi mɩ nyansa pʋ́ mɩ ɔnɔwankɩ nɔpʋda asʋn amʋ ɔkan suna mlɩ. Mboun Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ tumi lɛha asʋn amʋ ɩlɔwankɩ mlɩ. 5Ɩlɛba alɩ, mɛnɩ mlénya mlɩ hogyi tsu Bulu tumitɔ, megyi nyankpʋsa nyansatɔ.
Bulu Nyansa
6Tamɛ nɩ nowie aha ánɩ́ badan hogyi amʋtɔ wa a, ntɔpʋ Bulu nyansa bla amʋ́ asʋn amʋ. Megyi ndɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ nyansa, ntɛ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ ɩsʋ agyipʋá bɛ́ba bɔhʋlɩ amʋ́ tumi klɛ. 7Nyansa anfɩ anɩdɛ mʋ́ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ anfɩ igyi nyansa ánɩ́ Bulu lɔpʋŋain asa ɔyɩ lɛbɛlɩn, ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́pʋwa anɩ numnyam. 8Ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ otumipʋ ɔkʋkʋ mɛbɩ nyansa anfɩ. Nɩ bɛbɩ mʋ́ a, tɛkɩ bʋmɛda anɩ Wie Onumnyampʋ amʋ manta oyikpalihɛsʋ. 9Tamɛ fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ a,
“Tɔá ansibi mɔkʋwun kɩ, asʋ mɔkʋnu kɩ,
ɩmɔkʋba nyankpʋsa agywɩɩntɔ ɛ kɩ a,
mʋ́ Bulu lala yaɩ ha mʋ adwɛpʋ nɩ.”
10Tamɛ anɩlabɩ ɩnɩ, tsufɛ alalɛ mʋ́ suna anɩ tsʋn mʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋsʋ. Ɔŋɛ amʋ tokwi togyitɔtɔ kɩ, ɔtɛlɛ Bulu asʋn ŋainhɛá ɩbʋ ɔtɔtɔɔtɔ kʋraa suna anɩ. 11Ɔhaa tamawun mʋ ba nwuntɔ, nkɛtɩ mʋ onuto ɔŋɛ. Alɩ kɛn Bulu Ɔŋɛ amʋ nkʋlɛ towun Bulu nwuntɔ nɩ. 12Anɩ mʋ́ a, Bulu lɔpʋ mʋ Ɔŋɛ wa anɩtɔ, megyi ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ ɔŋɛ bʋ anɩtɔ. Mboun Ɔŋɛá itsu Bulu wa, mɛnɩ abɛ́talɩ nu ɩtɔ amʋʋ Bulu lapʋkie anɩ faan amʋ asɩ.
13Mʋ́ sʋ megyi anɩ onuto nyansa asʋn anɩdɛ mlɩ bla. Mboun asʋn ánɩ́ itsu Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ wa. Mʋ́ anɩdɛpʋlɛ Ɔŋɛtɔ ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn asɩ nɩ. 14Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔma Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ mɛ́ɛtalɩ hɔ tɔá itsu Bulu Ɔŋɛ amʋ wa, tsufɛ igyi mimlala mʋ wa. Ɔha ánɩ́ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ bʋ mʋtɔ tonu asʋn ánɩ́ Ɔŋɛ amʋ dɛblɩ asɩ. 15Mʋtɛtalɩ tɛtɛ togyitɔtɔ nu mʋ́ asɩ. Tamɛ mʋ mʋ́ a, ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ tɛtɛ mʋ asʋntɔ, nu mʋ asɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 16Nkalɩ ɩbɔ́bwɛ asa bɛ́talɩ nu mʋ́ asɩ? Igyi fɛ alɩá Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ bɩ anɩ Wie agywɩɩn?
Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ suna mʋ asʋn?”
Tamɛ Kristo agywɩɩn bʋ anɩtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩ mʋ́ abɛ́talɩ bɩ mʋ agywɩɩn.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 3
Content:
Bulu Asumpʋ
1Apio, brɛá nɛba mlɩ wa a, mmɛtalɩ tɔɩ mlɩ ansɩtɔ fɛ aha ánɩ́ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ bʋ amʋ́tɔ. Nɛbla mlɩ asʋn fɛ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ agywɩɩn ɩdɩn ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ atɔsʋ, bʋmɔkʋdan Kristotɔ. 2Nyɔpʋ-ntsu nɛha mlɩ. Mmɛha mlɩ atogyihɛ onuto. Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, mlɩmɔkʋfʋn atogyihɛ onuto gyi. 3Tsufɛ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ tsiatɔ ɩtra bʋ mlɩtɔ. Mlɩdɛ aba lu, mlɩdɛtrɛ. Nɩ mlɩdɛ ɩnɩ bwɛ mɛ, imosuna ánɩ́ mlɩ agywɩɩn tra dɩn ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ atɔsʋ, mlɩgyi fɛ ɔmátɔfɔ? 4Mlɩtɔ akʋ mlɩaa, “Paulo anɩbuo.” Mlɩtɔ akʋ ɛ mlɩaa, “Apolo anɩbuo.” Mbɛɛ, ɩnɩ medesuna ánɩ́ mlɩgyi fɛ ɔmátɔfɔ?
5Mbɛɛ, ma gyi Apolo, ntɛ ma gyi Paulo, sʋ mlɩdɛtrɛ anɩ sʋ? Bulu asumpʋ kɛkɛ anɩgyi, mlɩlatsʋn anɩ ɩbɩtɔ mli mʋ ahogyipʋ. Anɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ legyi gyʋma ánɩ́ Bulu lɛha mʋ. 6Mɩlodu, Apolo lɔwʋlɩ mʋ́ ntsu, tamɛ Bulu lɛha mʋ́ ɩlɛdan. 7Megyi odupʋ mʋ́a ntsu ɔwʋlɩpʋ lɔbwɛ tɔtɔ. Bulu nkʋlɛ tɔbwɛ, tsufɛ mʋtɛha mʋ́ ɩtɛdan. 8Odupʋ mʋ́a ntsu ɔwʋlɩpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋgyi kɛkɛ Bulu ansɩtɔ. Ɔbɛ́ka okugyiɔkʋ ɩkɔ mʋ bwɛhɛ ɔnɔ. 9Agyʋma ayɔpʋ mɩa Apolo anɩgyi ha Bulu. Mlɩgyi Bulu ndɔ, mlɩgyi mʋ obu ɛ nɩ.
10Bulu lɔwa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ, bwɛ mɩ obu oyipʋ ɔtɩansɩpʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɔpʋ abwi wa obu amʋ ntswɩasɩ, aha bamba bɛtalɩ bʋdɛpwɛ dɩnka mʋ́sʋ nɩ. Tamɛ ɔhagyiɔha ɔkɩ wanklaan obu amʋ pwɛtɔ. 11Tsufɛ ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ wa ntswɩasɩ bamba dʋn mʋ́ amʋʋ ɩda yaɩ, igyi Yesu Kristo amʋ. 12Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔpʋ sika pɛpɛ o, sika fututu o, abwiá ɩbʋ bia o, nyi o, afɩta ntɛ ipi yi dɩnka ntswɩasɩ amʋsʋ a, 13ɔbɩ ánɩ́ kugyikʋ ɩbɛ́lɩn ɔwan ɛkɛ amʋʋ Bulu obégyi anɩ asʋn amʋ. Ogya ɔbɔ́pʋsɔ mʋ́ kɩ bɛɛ, ɔlɔbwɛ mʋ́ wanklaan. 14Nɩ ogya amʋ mɔhɔ obu amʋ yinta a, Bulu ɔbɛ́da mʋ ɩpan. 15Tamɛ nɩ obu amʋ ɩlɔhɔ a, ɔbɛ́hɩɛ hʋlɩ atɔ. Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mʋ nkpa, tamɛ obófuflu fɛ ɔha ánɩ́ alasrɩ dalɩ ogya plɛnplɛntɔ.
16Mlɩmeyin ánɩ́ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa mlɩgyi, Bulu Ɔŋɛ amʋ tsie mlɩtɔ? 17Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ oleyinta mʋ ɔtswɛkpa a, Bulu ɛ obéyinta mʋ, tsufɛ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa lɔwankɩ. Mʋ ɔtswɛkpa amʋ gyi mlɩ a.
18Ɔhaa mámlɛ mʋ ɩwɩ! Nɩ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋ dɛ mʋ ɩwɩ tɩ ɔtɩansɩpʋ ndɛ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ a, ilehian ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mʋ ɩwɩ ɔha mimlahɛ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́bwɛ ɔtɩansɩpʋ onuto. 19Tsufɛ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ ansɩtɩn igyi mimlala Bulu ansɩtɔ. Fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Ɔtɩansɩpʋ agywɩɩn lalahɛ Bulu tɔpʋkɩta mʋ.” 20Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛtra blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu yin ánɩ́ ɔtɩansɩpʋ agywɩɩn itepi ma labi.” 21Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔhaa mápʋ ansɩ dɩnka ɔhaasʋ tsu ɩwɩ. Mlɩbʋ togyitɔ. 22Paulo o, Apolo o, Petro o, ɔyɩ anfɩ o, nkpa ntɛ lowu o, ndɛ o, ɔkɛ o, mlɩbʋ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́. 23Kristo bʋ mlɩ, Kristo ɛ gyi Bulu klɛ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 4
Content:
Kristo Sumbi Ayɔpʋ
1Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔhagyiɔha otsu mʋ́á Kristo asumbi kɛkɛ mɩa Apolo anɩgyi, Bulu lapʋ mʋ asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋ agyʋma wa anɩ ɩbɩtɔ. 2Tɔá ɩhɩɛ dehian gyi, ɔha ánɩ́ bapʋ agyʋma wa mʋ ɩbɩtɔ obégyi ɔnɔkwalɩ. 3Mɩ mʋ́ a, nɩ mlɩtɔ akʋ ntɛ aha bamba bʋdɛ mɩ pɔn ha kʋraa a, imegyi tɔtɔ mɩ ansɩtɔ. Mɩ onuto o mmɔkʋha ɩwɩ pɔn ntɛ asʋ. 4Nyin mɩ klʋntɔ, tamɛ imosuna ánɩ́ mɩ asʋn da ɔkpa. Anɩ Wie Yesu gyi mɩ asʋn ogyipʋ. 5Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩmákɔsɩ lɛ mlɩ aba ɩla, kpɛfʋn anɩ Wie ɔbakɛ amʋ. Mʋ ɔbɔ́wankɩ wʋlɩ okluntɔ atɔsʋ, lɛ anɩ agywɩɩn ɔwan, asa Bulu ɔbɛ́kanfʋ ɔhagyiɔha alɩá ilehian nɩ.
6Mɩ apio, mlɩ sʋ ndɛpʋ mɩa Apolo tsiatɔ suna mlɩ atɔ, mɛnɩ mlónu mʋ́ amʋʋ aha bʋtɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Mlɩmányankɩ tɔá bɔwanlɩn tswɩsʋ” amʋ asɩ. Fówun mlɩmóowun ɔhaa tsu ɩwɩ. 7Ma lɛbla fʋ ɔbɛɛ, fʋdʋn ɔkʋ? Ntɔ fʋbʋá imegyi Bulu lɛha fʋ? Nɩ Bulu lɛha fʋ togyitɔ a, ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛ ɩwɩ tsu fɛ megyi ha bɛha fʋ?
8Mlɩdɛkɩá mlɩlamwɛ! Mlɩlanya ɩwɩ! Mlɩlawuna mlɩdɛ iwie gyi. Mɩ sʋ mʋ́ a, tɛkɩ mlɩdɛ iwie amʋ gyi lɛlɛ, mɛnɩ anɩa mlɩnyɔ abégyi iwie amʋ. 9Ɩdɛ mɩ bwɛ fɛ Bulu laha anɩ sumbi ayɔpʋ anfɩ anɩlabwɛ ɔma agyapʋ fɛ ndoun bakpa bɔyɔmɔ. Tsufɛ anɩlamli atɔ kɩhɛ ha ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́, Bulu-abɔpʋ mʋ́a anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́. 10Kristo sʋ anɩlabwɛ aha mimlahɛ, mlɩ mʋ́ mlɩlatɩn ansɩ. Anɩgyi apɔnpʋ, mlɩ mʋ́ mlɩbʋ ɔwʋnlɩn. Aha bʋdɛ mlɩ bu, anɩ mʋ́ ɔhaa tamabu anɩ. Megyi alɩ mlɩdɛ anɩ kɩ nɩ? Ntɛ megyi alɩ? 11Bɔfʋn sei a, akʋn mʋ́a ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ anɩ, atatidatɔ anɩda. Bʋdɛ anɩ atswɛ fʋlɩ, anɩmá ɔdɩkpa. 12Anɩtɛyɩrɩ ɩwɩ pʋ anɩ ɩbɩ yɔ agyʋma pʋnya anɩ atohianhɛ. Nɩ bɔlwɩɩ anɩ a, anɩtoyula amʋ́. Nɩ bʋdɩn anɩsʋ ɛ a, anɩtotomi. 13Nɩ bɛblɩ anɩ ɩwɩ asʋn lalahɛ a, anɩtɔpʋ ɔdwɛ lɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ. Bɔfʋn sei a, anɩlabwɛ wuna, bʋdɛ ipi pʋtsitsa anɩsʋ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ.
14Mmɛdɛ ɩnɩ wanlɩn pʋsʋpa mlɩ, mboun ndɛpʋtɔɩ kpla mlɩ fɛ mɩ abi adwɛpʋ. 15Tsufɛ nɩ aha mpɩm-du (10,000) losuna mlɩ Kristo ɩwɩ asʋn kʋraa a, ɔbakʋlɛ pɛ abi mlɩgyi ɔŋɛtɔ. Nɔbwɛ mlɩ sɩ Kristo Yesutɔ brɛá nɛda asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan suna mlɩ. 16Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ mlɩ kokoli, mlɩkasɩ mɩ tsiatɔ. 17Ɩnɩ sʋ ndɛ Timoteo wa sɩsɩ mlɩ. Mɩ bi nɩ, ntɔdwɛ mʋ. Ɔbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ Kristotɔ. Mʋ ɔbɛ́ba bɛkaɩn mlɩ tsiatɔ oduá nɔpʋ mbuo Kristo, ndɛpʋsuna ɔpasua kugyikʋá ɩbʋ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ nɩ.
18Mlɩtɔ akʋ bʋdɛ ɩwɩ tsu. Bʋkɩ bɛɛ, fialɩ mmɛ́ɛtra ba mlɩ wa ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 19Tamɛ nɩ anɩ Wie Yesu lotsula a, ɩmɔ́ɔwa ɔpá kʋkʋ nɛ́ba mlɩ wa bɛkɩ bɛɛ, asʋn kɛkɛ ɩwɩ atsupʋ anfɩ bʋdɛblɩ loo, ntɛ lɛlɛ bʋbʋ Bulu tumi. 20Tsufɛ megyi asʋn blɩhɛ kɛkɛ Bulu iwiegyi amʋ igyi, mboun Bulu tumi. 21Nɩ nɛba mlɩ wa a, ntɔ mpʋba? Mpʋ mplɩ ba loo, ntɛ ɔdwɛ mʋ́a ɩklʋn lwiihɛ?

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 5
Content:
Mbʋatɔ Ɩwɩ Asʋn
1Bahɩɛ bɛbla mɩ bɛɛ, mlɩtɔ akʋ bʋdɛ atsɩ mʋ́a ayin asʋn wa. Ɔmátɔfɔ kʋraa bʋmɛdɛ mʋ́ odu bwɛ. Mlɩtɔ ɔkʋ mʋ́ kʋraa laswɩɩ mʋ sɩ mʋ ka, 2ɩbʋ mlɩ ansigyi! Ɩma mlɩ awɩrɛhɔ. Pɛlɩ mɛdɛ mlɩ, mɛnɩ mlégya ɔha anfɩ odu lɛ mlɩ ɔpasuatɔ. 3Ɩnɩá mlɩmɛdɛ mɩ wun o a, mbʋ mlɩtɔ ɔŋɛtɔ. Naha ɔha anfɩ ɔbʋ tsiatɔ anfɩ odu ɩpɔn dodoodo, fɛ mbʋ ɩnʋ. 4Mlɩtɩ ɔpasua amʋ fia anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ɩdatɔ. Nétsia mlɩtɔ ɔŋɛtɔ, anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo tumi ɛ ibétsia mlɩtɔ. 5Ɩnʋ a, mlɩpʋ mʋ wa Ɔbʋnsam ɩbɩtɔ, oyinta mʋ ɔyʋlʋ, mɛnɩ Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mʋ ɔkla nkpa anɩ Wie Yesu ɔbakɛ amʋ.
6Kpaalɩ mlɩdɛ ɩwɩ tsu. Mlɩmeyin ánɩ́ bodobodotu-afa kpalobi tɛha bodobodo amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ itotu? 7Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩlɛ lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋ anfɩ mlɩtɔ, mɛnɩ mlɩ ɩwɩ bɛ́tɩn fɛ bodobodoá bʋmɔwa afa mʋ́tɔ, tsufɛ alɩ mlɩhɩɛ mlɩgyi nɩ. Megyi bodobodoá bʋmɔwa afa mʋ́tɔ, imotu bʋtɔpʋgyi Katsʋn Nkɛ? Bamɔ anɩ Israelfɔsʋ Katsʋn Nkɛtɔ Okufabi, ogyi Kristo amʋ, lɛ anɩ nwunsʋ mbusuo ha anɩ dodoodo. 8Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha apʋ bodobodoá imotu, igyi ɩwɩtɩn mʋ́a ɔnɔkwalɩwa gyi Katsʋn Nkɛ amʋ. Mlɩmáha apʋ bodobodoá ɩlatu, igyi tsiatɔ lalahɛ mʋ́a lakpan gyi mʋ́.
9Nɔwanlɩn wa ɔwʋlʋ kʋá nɔpʋsɩsɩ mlɩtɔ mbɛɛ, mlɩmápʋ mbʋa atɔpʋ gyi mba. 10Megyi ɔyɩtɔ mbʋa atɔpʋ, ɔnsɩpɛ awapʋ, awikplu ntɛ ɩkpɩ atswɛpʋ ɩwɩ asʋn nɛblɩ. Mʋmʋ tɛkɩ mlɛ́dalɩ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ asa mlɩmɔ́ɔwa amʋ́ mba nɩ. 11Tɔá nɔwanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ gyi, mlɩmápʋ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbɛɛ Okristoyin mʋgyi, tamɛ ɔtɔtɔ mbʋa ntɛ ɔbʋ ɔnsɩpɛ, ɔtɔtswɛ ɩkpɩ, otesia mʋ aba, ɔtɔbʋ nta ntɛ otowi atɔ gyi mba. Mlɩa ɔha amʋ nyɔ mlɩmáwa ɩbɩ gyi atɔ kʋraa.
12Ntɔ sʋ négyi aha ánɩ́ bʋma ɔpasua amʋtɔ asʋn? Megyi aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ mʋ́tɔ, bʋdɛ lakpan anfɩ odu bwɛ mboun asʋn lehian ánɩ́ mlégyi? 13Bulu obégyi aha amʋʋ bʋma ɔpasua amʋtɔ amʋ mʋ́ asʋn. Tamɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Mlɩ mʋ́ mlɩgya lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋ lɛ mlɩtɔ.”

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 6
Content:
Bulu Aha Wʋlɛwʋlɛ Nsɩnɛ Asʋngyi
1Nɩ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋ mʋa mʋ ba Okristoyin benya a, ntogyi sʋ mlɩtɔwa klʋn pʋya ɔmátɔfɔ asʋn ogyikpa, mlɩtamapʋ ya Bulu aha abʋblɩ mʋ́? 2Mlɩmeyin ánɩ́ Bulu aha obégyi ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ asʋn? Nɩ mlɩ obégyi ɔyɩtɔ aha asʋn a, mʋ́ ntogyi sʋ mlɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ gyi mlɩ wʋlɛwʋlɛ nsɩnɛ asʋn? 3Ntɛ mlɩmeyin ánɩ́ anɩ obégyi Bulu-abɔpʋ ɛ asʋn? Ntogyi sʋ anɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ gyi ekekegyiɛkɛ asʋn mʋ́? 4Nɩ asʋn ɩda mlɩ nsɩnɛ a, ntogyi sʋ mlɩtɔpʋya ɔmátɔfɔ asʋn agyipʋ amʋʋ mlɩ ɔpasuafɔ bʋtamabu amʋ? 5Ndɛ asʋn anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ pʋsʋpa mlɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔtɩansɩpʋ ɔkʋlɛ kʋraa má mlɩ ɔpasuatɔá ɔbɛ́talɩ gyi mʋ aba nsɩnɛ asʋn? 6Ntogyi sʋ ohogyipʋ ɔbɛ́sama mʋ ba, mʋ́á ɩdʋn kʋraa pʋ mʋ yɛlɩɩ ɔmátɔfɔ ansɩtɔ?
7Alɩ amʋʋ asʋn ɩbʋ mlɩ Akristofɔ wʋlɛwʋlɛ nsɩnɛ amʋ kʋraa ilosuna ánɩ́ mlɩlagyi pɔn dodo. Ntogyi sʋ mlɩ ba ɔpʋ ɩla gyi mlɩ, ntɛ osisi mlɩ mlɩméesikie? 8Mlɩ mboun latsʋn gyankpa mlɩdɛ mlɩ aba sisi, mlɩdɛ lalahɛ pʋgyi mlɩ aba? 9Ntɛ mlɩmeyin ánɩ́ aha lalahɛ bʋmóowie Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ? Mlɩmámlɛ mlɩ ɩwɩ. Aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔwa atsɩ mʋa ayin asʋn, ɩkpɩ atswɛpʋ, mbʋa atɔpʋ, ayin ánɩ́ bʋtekle amʋ́ aba ayin, 10awikplu, ɔnsɩpɛ awapʋ, nta abʋpʋ, aha asiapʋ pʋ́ aha asisipʋ bʋméenya ogyikpa Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ. 11Tɛkɩ brɛ amʋ a, alɩ mlɩtɔ akʋ mlɩgyi nɩ. Tamɛ Bulu labie mlɩ ntsu, alabwɛ mlɩ mʋ aha. Alatsʋn mʋ Ɔŋɛ amʋ pʋ́ anɩ Wie Yesu Kristosʋ tsu mlɩá mlɩ asʋn da ɔkpa mʋ ansɩtɔ.
Mlɩ Ɔyʋlʋ Pʋwa Bulu Numnyam
12Mlɩtɔ ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́talɩ blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mbʋ ɔkpa bwɛ totogyitɔ.” Ee! Tamɛ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, “Megyi mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔbɔ́wa labi.” Ɔkʋ ɛ ɔbɛ́blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mbʋ ɔkpa bwɛ totogyitɔ, tamɛ mmɛ́ɛha tɔtɔ méegyi mɩsʋ.” 13Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́talɩ blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Atogyihɛ bʋ ɩnʋ ha ipu, ipu ɛ bʋ ɩnʋ ha atogyihɛ.” Ee! Tamɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbɛ́hɩ ɛkɛkʋ. Bulu mɔbwɛ nyankpʋsa ha atsɩ mʋ́a ayin asʋn wa. Mboun anɩ Wie bʋ anɩ ɔyʋlʋ, anɩ ɔyʋlʋ ɛ bʋ anɩ Wie. 14Bulu lɔkʋsʋa anɩ Wie Yesu tsu afulitɔ. Ɔbɔ́pʋ mʋ tumi amʋ kʋsʋa anɩ ɛ.
15Ntɛ mlɩmeyin mlɩaa, mlɩ ɔyʋlʋ igyi Kristo nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ ɩwɩ atɔ? Mʋ́ nkalɩ sʋ mpʋ Kristo ɔyʋlʋ yɛda obu-ɔnɔ otsiapʋ ɔyʋlʋ? Ɩtsʋn mɩsʋ! 16Ntɛ mlɩmeyin mlɩaa, nɩ ɔkʋ ɔpʋ ɩbɩ da obu-ɔnɔ otsiapʋ a, mʋa mʋnyɔ ɔyʋlʋ labwɛ kʋlɛ? Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Oyin amʋ mʋa ɔtsɩ amʋ babwɛ ɔyʋlʋ kʋlɛ.” 17Tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ mʋa Kristo bɔbwɛ kʋlɛ a, mʋa mʋnyɔ babwɛ ɩkʋlɛ ɔŋɛtɔ ɛ.
18Mlɩmáplei atsɩ ntɛ ayintɔ. Lakpan kugyikʋá ɔha tɔbwɛ tamakʋsʋ lɩɩ mʋ ɔyʋlʋsʋ. Tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ ɔwa atsɩ mʋ́a ayin asʋn mʋ́ a, alabwɛ lakpan ánɩ́ ɩlɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ mʋ onuto ɔyʋlʋsʋ. 19Ntɛ mlɩmeyin mlɩaa, mlɩ ɔyʋlʋ gyi Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ ɔtswɛkpa obu? Bulu lɔpʋ mʋ ha mlɩ, otsie mlɩtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ megyi mlɩbʋ mlɩ ɩwɩ. 20Ibia kpekplekpe Bulu lɔhɔ mlɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩpʋ mlɩ ɔyʋlʋ wa mʋ numnyam.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 7
Content:
Aklu Mʋ́a Aka, Akpankʋ Pʋ́ Asʋrapʋ Atosunahɛ
1Nayɔ asʋn fɩtɛhɛ amʋʋ mlɩlɔwanlɩn sɩsɩ mɩ amʋtɔ kɩ a,
Ee! Ɩbʋ alɛá oyin mɔ́ɔpʋ ɩbɩ da ɔtsɩ. 2Tamɛ mbʋatɔ ladʋbɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ oyingyioyin onya mʋ onuto ɔka, ɔtsɩgyiɔtsɩ ɛ onya mʋ onuto oklu. 3Ilehian ánɩ́ oklu obégyi ɔkatsia mbla fɛ́ɛ́sʋ ha mʋ ka, ɔka ɛ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mʋ́ alɩ ha mʋ klu. 4Megyi ɔtsɩ bʋ mʋ ɩwɩ, mʋ klu bʋ mʋ. Alɩ megyi oyin ɛ bʋ mʋ ɩwɩ, mʋ ka bʋ mʋ nɩ. 5Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmákina aba ɔdɩkpa ha, nkɛtɩ mlɩ abanyɔ amʋ mlɩlatsula ánɩ́ mlétsia nkɛ kpalobi, mɛnɩ mlétsia bɔ mpaɩ, asa mlɛ́layɔ aba wa. Mlɩlawun aba mʋ́ ɔma, mɛnɩ Ɔbʋnsam mɛ́ɛtalɩ sɔ mlɩ kɩ, nɩ mlɩmɛtalɩ kɩta ɩwɩ.
6Ɔkpa ɩda ánɩ́ mlɔ́bwɛ mʋ́ alɩ, tamɛ megyi ɔhɩɛ igyi. 7Mɩ nkʋlɛ sʋ mʋ́ a, tɛkɩ mlétsia kpankʋ fɛ mɩ, tamɛ ɔhagyiɔha bʋ mʋ́á Bulu lɔpʋkie mʋ. Ɔmɔbwɛ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ kɛkɛ. Ɔhagyiɔha mʋa mʋ klɛ.
8Sei ndɛ akpankʋ mʋa asʋrapʋ bla mbɛɛ, nɩ bótsula tsia mɩ atsiabi a, tɛkɩ ɩbʋ alɛ. 9Tamɛ nɩ mlɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ kɩta ɩwɩ ntɛ gyi mlɩ ɩwɩsʋ mʋ́ a, mlɩtsia aklu mʋ́a aka, dʋn ánɩ́ mlɛ́natɩ da tsʋn.
10Tamɛ aklu mʋ́a aka awie mʋ́ a, mbla kʋ bʋ ɩnʋá megyi mɩ, mboun anɩ Wie Yesu lɔwa ha amʋ́. Ɔbɛɛ, ɔka mákina mʋ klu. 11Tamɛ nɩ ɔmaɩn mʋ klusʋ a, ɔkɩta ɩwɩ ntɛ oyinki yɔ mʋ klu wa. Oklu ɛ mákina mʋ ka.
12Mlɩ aha trahɛ mʋ́ a, mɩ onuto dɛ mlɩ ɩnɩ bla. Megyi anɩ Wie Yesu dɛ mʋ́ blɩ. Nɩ ohogyipʋ yinhɛ tsia ɔtsɩá omegyi ohogyipʋ, tamɛ ɔtsɩ amʋ latsula ánɩ́ mʋa mʋnyɔ bétsia a, ɔmákina mʋ. 13Nɩ ohogyipʋ tsɩhɛ ɛ tsia oyin ánɩ́ omegyi ohogyipʋ, tamɛ alatsula ánɩ́ mʋa mʋnyɔ bétsia a, mʋ ɛ ɔmákina mʋ. 14Tsufɛ ohogyipʋ tsɩhɛ amʋ sʋ Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mʋ klu. Alɩ kɛn ohogyipʋ yinhɛ amʋ sʋ Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mʋ ka ɛ nɩ. Nɩ megyi alɩ a, Bulu móotsu amʋ́ abi ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa mʋ ansɩtɔ. Tamɛ ɩnɩ sʋ Bulu latsu amʋ́á amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa mʋ ansɩtɔ. 15Tamɛ nɩ oklu ntɛ ɔka ánɩ́ omegyi ohogyipʋ dekleá obékina mʋ tsiaba ohogyipʋ a, ohogyipʋ amʋ osi mʋ ɔnatɩ. Mbla kʋkʋ mɛklɩ mʋ, tsufɛ Bulu lɛtɩ anɩ ɔbɛɛ, abétsia iwilwiitɔ. 16Ohogyipʋ tsɩhɛ, fʋyin nɩ fʋ ɔbɔ́hɔ fʋ klu nkpa? Ntɛ ohogyipʋ yinhɛ, fʋyin nɩ fʋ ɔbɔ́hɔ fʋ ka nkpa?
Tsia Alɩá Fʋgyi
17Mʋ́ sʋ ɔhagyiɔha ɔpʋ tɔá anɩ Wie Yesu lɛha mʋ asa Bulu lɛtɩ mʋ tsia. Mʋ́gyi tɔá ntɛbla ɔpasua kugyikʋ nɩ. 18Nɩ ɔkʋ lɛtɩn kete asa Bulu lɛtɩ mʋ a, ɔmálayinki yɛbwɛ mʋ́ ɩwɩ tɔtɔɔtɔ. Nɩ ɔkʋ ɛ mɛtɩn kete asa Bulu lɛtɩ mʋ ɛ a, ɔmáyɛtɩn. 19Ketetɩn ntɛ ketemátɩn megyi tɔtɔ. Bulu mbla amʋsʋ gyi mboun gyi asʋn. 20Ɔhagyiɔha otsia alɩá ogyi asa Bulu lɛtɩ mʋ. 21Ɔkpábi fʋgyi asa Bulu lɛtɩ fʋ? Ɩmáhan fʋ. Tamɛ nɩ ɔkpa ɩba ánɩ́ fégyi ɩwɩ a, kʋsʋ mʋ́sʋ. 22Tsufɛ nɩ ɔkpábi fʋgyi asa anɩ Wie lɛtɩ fʋ a, alaha fagyi ɩwɩ. Alɩ kɛn ɔha ánɩ́ otsie mʋ ɩwɩsʋ asa anɩ Wie lɛtɩ mʋ ɛ gyi ɔkpábi sei ha Kristo nɩ. 23Bulu lɔhɔ mlɩ ibia kpekplekpe. Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩmábwɛ mlɩ ɩwɩ nkpábi ha anyankpʋsa. 24Mɩ apio, alɩágyialɩá ɔhagyiɔha gyi asa Bulu lɛtɩ mʋ a, ɔpʋ mʋ́ alɩ tsia.
Mbitebi Mʋ́a Asʋrapʋ
25Mlɩ mbitebiá mlɩmɔkʋtsia aklu kɩ mʋ́ a, mma mbla kʋkʋá itsu anɩ Wie wa ha mlɩ. Tamɛ anɩ Wie mʋa mʋ nwewun, alaha mɩ nyansa ánɩ́ mlɛ́talɩ hɔ mɩ gyi. 26Asʋn ánɩ́ ndɛ ha mlɩ gyi, ɔyɩtɔ lawa ɔnlɩn sei. Mʋ́ sʋ nahogyiá ɩbʋ alɛá ɔhagyiɔha obétsia alɩá otsie yaɩ. 27Nɩ fʋbʋ ɔka a, mákina mʋ. Nɩ kpankʋ fʋgyi ɛ a, mátepi tsia. 28Tamɛ nɩ fetsia ɔka a, fʋmɔkʋbwɛ lakpan. Nɩ obitebiá ɔmɔkʋtsia oklu kɩ ɛ otsia a, ɔmɔkʋbwɛ lakpan. Asʋn wunhɛá ɩbɛ́ba tɛkɩ ndetsu kʋsʋ aklu mʋ́a akasʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ ɩnɩ blɩ.
29Mɩ apio, mʋ́á ndɛblɩ gyi, brɛ itinbi ɩlasi. Ɩnɩ sʋ tsu sei a, ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ ɔka ɔbwɛ fɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔma. 30Ɔsɩn igyi o, ɔdwɛ igyi o, ɩwɩnya igyi o, ɔbwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ asʋansʋ mɛdɩn mʋsʋ. 31Aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ atɔ pʋbwɛ tɔkʋ bʋmápʋ amʋ́ ansɩ fɛ́ɛ́ dɩnka mʋ́sʋ. Tsufɛ ɔyɩ anfɩ pʋ́ mʋ́tɔ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́ba bɔtsʋn.
32Mmedekleá asʋn ɩhan mlɩ. Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔma ɔka tɔpʋ mʋ ansɩ dɩnka anɩ Wie agyʋmasʋ, mɛnɩ obégyi mʋ ansɩ. 33Tamɛ ɔka mʋ wie mʋ́ tɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka ɔyɩtɔ atɔsʋ, mɛnɩ obégyi mʋ ka ansɩ. 34Mʋ́ sʋ mʋ agywɩɩn tɔbwɛ anyɔ. Alɩ kɛn ɔtsɩ kpankʋ ɛ tesi mʋ ɩwɩ ha anɩ Wie, ɔyʋlʋ mʋ́a ɔŋɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́, mɛnɩ obégyi Bulu ansɩ nɩ. Tamɛ oklu mʋ wie mʋ́ tɔpʋ mʋ ansɩ dɩnka ɔyɩtɔ atɔsʋ, mɛnɩ obégyi mʋ klu ansɩ.
35Mlɩ yile sʋ ndɛ asʋn anfɩ blɩ. Mmɛdɛ mlɩ itin ka. Mboun ndekleá mlɩbwɛ tɔá ɩda ɔkpa, amlɩsi mlɩ ɩwɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ha anɩ Wie Yesu.
36Nɩ oyin ɔfɩtɛ ɔtsɩsʋ, owun ánɩ́ ɔmɛ́ɛtalɩ kɩta ɩwɩ, ɔtsɩ amʋ ɛ dekle ɔdan tsʋn a, ɔyɛkpaɩn mʋ. Megyi lakpan igyi. 37Tamɛ nɩ ɔlabwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ oméetsia mʋ, ɔbɛ́talɩ kɩta ɩwɩ tsia kpankʋ a, ɔbʋ ɔkpa bwɛ tɔá odekle. Nɩ ɔbɛ́talɩ kɩta ɩwɩ a, mʋmʋ ɔkɩta ɩwɩ. Ɩbʋ alɛ dʋn. 38Ɩbʋ alɛá obétsia ɔka. Tamɛ nɩ ometepi tsia a, ɩbʋ alɛ dʋn.
39Mbla lɛklɩ ɔtsɩ, ánɩ́ oméekina mʋ klu yɔfʋn mʋ owukɛ. Tamɛ nɩ oyin amʋ owu a, ɔbʋ ɔkpa tsia oyin ánɩ́ odekle. Tamɛ ilehian ánɩ́ ɔha amʋ ɔbɔ́bwɛ Okristoyin. 40Mɩ nkʋlɛ sʋ mʋ́ a, nɩ otsie kpankʋ a, ansɩ bégyi mʋ dʋn. Nyin ánɩ́ Bulu Ɔŋɛ amʋʋ ɩbʋ mɩtɔ amʋ sʋ natalɩ ndɛ mlɩ asʋn anfɩ bla.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 8
Content:
Ɔkpɩtɔ Atogyihɛ
1Mlɩha ablɩ ɔkpɩtɔ-atɔ gyi ɩwɩ asʋn amʋʋ mlɩlɔwanlɩn sɩsɩ mɩ amʋ.
Mlɩdɛblɩ mlɩaa, “Anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩyin asʋn.” Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔ, tamɛ mlɩbɩá asʋnbɩ tɛha ɔha totsu ɩwɩ, ɔdwɛ ɛ ɩtɛha ɔha tɛdan. 2Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔbɛɛ, mʋyin asʋn dʋbɩ a, ɔmɔkʋnya bɩ tɔá idehian. 3Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔdwɛ Bulu a, Bulu ɛ yin mʋ.
4Mʋ́ sʋ nkalɩ anɩdɛblɩ tsu ɔkpɩtɔ atɔ gyi ɩwɩ? Anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩyin ánɩ́ ɔkpɩ megyi tɔtɔɔtɔ. Anɩyin ánɩ́ Bulu ɔkʋlɛ pɛ ɛ bʋ ɩnʋ, ɔkʋkʋ tra ɔma ɔtɩnɛtɩnɛ. 5Ɩnɩá ɩkpɩ mʋ́a tumi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋbʋ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ o a, 6anɩ mʋ́ anɩyin ánɩ́ Bulu ɔkʋlɛ pɛ bʋ ɩnʋ. Mʋgyi anɩ Sɩ, ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ Ɔbwɛpʋ. Mʋ anɩtsie nkpa ha. Anɩ Wie ɔkʋlɛ pɛ ɛ bʋ ɩnʋ. Mʋgyi Yesu Kristo. Mʋsʋ Bulu lɔtsʋn bwɛ togyitɔ. Mʋ kɛn sʋ anɩtsie nkpa nɩ.
7Tamɛ megyi Akristofɔ fɛ́ɛ́ yin alɩ asʋn anfɩ. Ɩkpɩsum lamanta amʋ́ dodo. Ɩnɩ sʋ nɩ begyi ɔkpɩtɔ-atɔ a, bʋdɛ mʋ́ tsuá basum ɔkpɩ amʋ nɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ ifin lada amʋ́, tsufɛ bʋmɔkʋdan hogyitɔ. 8Megyi tɔá anɩtegyi sʋ anɩa Bulunyɔ nsɩnɛ bɔ́wa alɛ. Ntɔ anɩlegyi o, ntɔ anɩmegyi o, tɔtɔ meyinta anɩ ɩwɩ.
9Tamɛ mlɩkɩ wanklaan ánɩ́ ɔkpa anfɩ mlɩbʋ gyi ɔkpɩtɔ-atɔ anfɩ ɩmɛ́ɛha ɔha ánɩ́ ɔmɔkʋdan hogyitɔ ɔmɛ́ɛdɩda. 10Nɩ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔmɔkʋdan hogyitɔ owun fʋ anfɩ fɛɛ fʋyin asʋn, fʋdɛ atɔ gyi ɔkpɩtɔ a, ɩbʋ alɛ? Mʋmʋ yɛ fʋdɛ mʋ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn wa fɛɛ, ogyi ɔkpɩtɔ atɔ anfɩ mʋ onuto oyin ánɩ́ ɩma alɛ anfɩ nɩ o. 11Mʋmʋ fapʋ fʋ asʋnbɩ mlɛ fʋ pio wa. Faha fʋ pio anfɩ ɔmɔkʋdan hogyitɔ, Kristo lowu ha mʋ anfɩ lafwɩ. 12Nɩ fɔpʋ ɩla gyi fʋ pio Okristoyin ánɩ́ ɔmɔkʋdan hogyitɔ, fɛha mʋ ɔbwɛ tɔá oyin ánɩ́ ɩma alɛ a, Kristo fapʋ ɩla gyi a. 13Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ tɔá négyi ɩbɛ́ha mɩ pio Okristoyin ɔbɔ́bwɛ lakpan a, mméetepi tra gyi iye ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ, mɛnɩ ɩmɛ́ɛha mʋ ɔdɩda.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 9
Content:
Sumbi Ɔyɔpʋ Tumi Pʋ́ Mʋ Gyumagyihɛ
1Mlɩkɩ mlɩaa, mmetsie mɩ ɩwɩsʋ? Ntɛ megyi sumbi ɔyɔpʋ ngyi? Mmɔkʋwun anɩ Wie Yesu kɩ? Megyi mɩ gyumagyihɛ sʋ mlɩlamli anɩ Wie klɛ ndɛ? 2Nɩ mmegyi sumbi ɔyɔpʋ ha akʋ a, mlɩ mʋ́ mlɩyin ánɩ́ sumbi ɔyɔpʋ ngyi. Tsufɛ ɩnɩá mlɩgyi Akristofɔ a, ilegyi adansɩɛ ánɩ́ anɩ Wie sumbi ɔyɔpʋ ngyi.
3Ɩnɩgyi tɔá ntɔpʋlɛ mɩ ɩwɩ ɔnɔ suna aha ánɩ́ bʋtɛlɛ mɩ ɩla nɩ. 4Mɩa Barnaba mʋ́ anɩmágyi atɔ, nun ntsu? 5Anɩmá ɔkpa tsia ohogyipʋ, kpa mʋ buo ɩwɩ, fɛ sumbi ayɔpʋ atrahɛ amʋ pʋ́ anɩ Wie apio mʋ́a Petro aná? 6Ntɛ mɩa Barnabanyɔ mʋ́ ayɔ agyʋma kɩ anɩ ɩwɩsʋ? 7Ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ onuto tɛka ɩwɩ ɩkɔ? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Ɔdɔtɔpʋ ɔmɔmʋ tamagyi mʋ ndɔtɔ-atɔ? Mbwɩ ɔyaɩpʋ ɔmɔmʋ tamagyi mʋ ɔbwɩ yaɩhɛ?
8Anyankpʋsa agywɩɩn ndɛpʋblɩ ɩnɩ? Yɛ Mose Mbla o ɩlɛblɩ alɩ a? 9Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Mose Mbla amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Bʋtamawa ɔnantswieá ɔdɛ ayo da ɔnɔ ɩkan.” Fahogyi fɛɛ, nnantswie ɩwɩ dɛ Bulu hian sʋ ɔlɛblɩ asʋn anfɩ? 10Megyi anɩ sʋ ɔdɛ asʋn anfɩ blɩ? Anɩ sʋ ɔdɛ mʋ́ blɩ a. Bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Ɩflɛ ɔwɔpʋ mʋa atɔ ɔkpɔtɩpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋgyo tɔá bénya tsu agyʋma amʋʋ bayɔ amʋtɔ.” 11Nɩ anɩlabla mlɩ asʋn wanklaan amʋ, igyi ɔŋɛtɔ abiá anɩladu wa mlɩtɔ a, anɩ mʋ́ anɩmá ɔkpa nya anɩ ɔyɩtɔ atohianhɛ tsu mlɩ wa? 12Nɩ akʋ bʋbʋ ɔkpa nya atɔ tsu mlɩ wa a, anɩmá ɔkpa dʋn amʋ́?
Tamɛ anɩmotsu kʋkʋ lɛ ɩnɩtɔ. Anɩlapʋ klʋntɔ pisii hɔ togyitɔ, mɛnɩ anɩmɔ́ɔpʋ tɔtɔɔtɔ tin Kristo asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkpa. 13Mlɩmeyin mlɩaa, Bulu ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ agyʋma ayɔpʋ ɛ bʋbʋ ogyikpa ɩnʋ? Ntɛ mlɩmeyin ánɩ́ afɔdɩɛ-ɩswɩ amʋ asɩ asumpʋ bʋtegyi mʋ́ asɩ atɔ? 14Alɩ kɛn anɩ Wie lɛhɩɛá mʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan adapʋ ɛ bʋgyi atɔ tsu aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ labi nya tsu asʋn amʋtɔ wa nɩ.
15Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ mmɔkʋpʋ alɩ ɔkpa anfɩ mbʋ anfɩ nya tɔtɔ tsu mlɩ wa. Megyi bɛɛ, ndekleá néfi mʋ́ asɩ, sʋ ndɛ asʋn anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ. Ɩbʋ mɩ alɛá nówu, dʋn ánɩ́ nɔ́hʋlɩ ɩtɔ anfɩ nɔ́pʋtsu ɩwɩ anfɩ. 16Tamɛ nɩ ndɛ asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan da a, imegyi tɔá nɔ́pʋtsu ɩwɩ. Tsufɛ ɔhɩɛ igyi ha mɩ. Bulu ɔbɛ́bɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ nɩ mmɛda mʋ́ ɔkan. 17Nɩ mɩ onuto lɛblɩ mbɛɛ nɔ́bwɛ mʋ́ a, tɛkɩ Bulu ɔbɛ́da mɩ ɩpan. Tamɛ megyi mɩ onuto apɛtɔ ndɛ mʋ́ bwɛ. Ɔkpábi ngyi, Bulu lobu mɩ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ pʋ́ agyʋma anfɩ wa mɩ ɩbɩtɔ. 18Ɩkɔka mɔmʋ nénya tsu mʋ́tɔ ngya? Mʋ́gyi nɛ́da asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan, bʋmɛ́ɛka mɩ tɔtɔ. Tɛkɩ mbʋ ɔkpa pʋkle tɔkʋ ha mɩ ɩwɩ, tamɛ mmɔ́ɔbwɛ mʋ́ alɩ.
19Ntsie mɩ ɩwɩsʋ. Mma ɔhaa asɩ, tamɛ nabwɛ ɩwɩ ɔkpábi ha ɔhagyiɔha, mɛnɩ nɛ́kpa aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ba Kristo. 20Ntɔbwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ Yudayin nɩ mbʋ Yudafɔtɔ, mɛnɩ nɛ́talɩ nya Yudafɔ amʋ. Mma Mose mbla asɩ, tamɛ ntɔbwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ mʋ́ asɩ, mɛnɩ nɛ́talɩ nya amʋ́tɔ akʋ. 21Alɩ kɛn nɩ mɩa ɔmátɔfɔá bʋma Mose mbla asɩ anɩna a, ntɔbwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ amʋ́, mɛnɩ nɛ́talɩ kpa amʋ́ ba Kristo nɩ. Ɩnɩ medesuna ánɩ́ mma Bulu mbla amʋ asɩ, tsufɛ ntobu Kristo mbla amʋ. 22Ntɔbwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ hogyi ɔnɔ ma ɔnlɩn, mɛnɩ nɛ́talɩ ha amʋ́ bɛ́dan Kristotɔ. Ntɛdamli ɩwɩ ɔkpa ɔtsan-ɔtsansʋ ha aha fɛ́ɛ́, mɛnɩ nɛ́talɩ kpa amʋ́tɔ akʋ ba Kristo.
23Asʋn wanklaan amʋ sʋ ntɔbwɛ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́, mɛnɩ mɩ ɛ nénya ogyikpa mʋ́tɔ. 24Mlɩkaɩn ánɩ́ nɩ aha bʋsrɩ a, okugyiɔkʋ tɛyɩrɩ ɩwɩ, tamɛ ɔbakʋlɛ tegyi ɩsʋ, bʋtekie mʋ atɔ? Mlɩ ɛ mlɩyɩrɩ ɩwɩ srɩ, mɛnɩ mlégyi ɩsʋ békie mlɩ atɔ. 25Ɔsrɩ otsiipʋ okugyiɔkʋ tɛkɩta ɩwɩ, mɛnɩ ɔbɛ́srɩ pʋhɔ ɩda ánɩ́ ɩtamatsia yɔ. Tamɛ anɩ mʋ́ anɩdɛ ɩnɩ bwɛ, mɛnɩ abɔ́hɔ ɩda ánɩ́ ɩmɔ́ɔfwɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 26Ɩnɩ sʋ megyi kpaalɩ nsrɩ. Mɩ ansɩ dɩn tɔkʋsʋ. Ntamatswɩ atswɛ wa afutɔ. 27Ntesen ansɩtɔ, bwɛ mɩ ɩwɩ ɔkpábi, mɛnɩ nɩ nɛda asʋn amʋ ɔkan suna aha ta a, Bulu mɛ́ɛbla mɩ ɔbɛɛ, nabwɛ tsitsa.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 10
Content:
Ɩkpɩsum Ɩwɩ Ɔlada
1Mɩ apio, ndekleá mlɩbɩ tɔá Bulu lɔbwɛ ha anɩ anain amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɩmbɩ amʋ. Ɔlɛha agyinde lobun amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ, ɔlɛha Ɔpʋ Pɛpɛ bʋnkpatɔ lɛsɛ, ɔlɛkpa amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ tsʋn ɔpʋ amʋtɔ. 2Bulu lɔpʋ agyinde mʋ́a ɔpʋ amʋ bɔ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ asu, pʋsuna ánɩ́ bʋgyi Mose abuopʋ. 3Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ begyi ɔŋɛtɔ atogyihɛ oloku ɔkʋlɛ amʋ. 4Bonun ɔŋɛtɔ ntsu oloku ɔkʋlɛ amʋ tsu bʋta amʋʋ ɩlɛkpa amʋ́ amʋtɔ. Kristo gyi bʋta amʋ nɩ. 5Tamɛ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔma a, Bulu ansɩ megyi amʋ́ ɔdʋdʋɔ ɩwɩ. Ɔlɛhɩ amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋkpan amʋsʋ ɩnʋ.
6Ntobi anfɩ ɩlɛba amʋ́sʋ anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi atosuanhɛ ha anɩ, mɛnɩ amʋ́ lalahɛ amʋ odu bwɛ mɛ́ɛdɩnka anɩ ɔwɔlɩ, 7anɩmóosum ɩkpɩ ɛ fɛ amʋ́. Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ ɩlɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Aha amʋ betsia asɩ gyi atɔ, nun nta, kʋsʋ kɔm.” 8Mlɩmáwa atsɩ mʋ́a ayin asʋn fɛ alɩá amʋ́tɔ akʋ bɔbwɛ, ɩlɛha amʋ́tɔ mpɩm adʋanyɔ-sa (23,000) benya lowu ɛkɛwʋlɛ. 9Mlɩmáha asɔ Kristo kɩ fɛ alɩ amʋʋ amʋ́tɔ akʋ bɔbwɛ, awɔ bodundun amʋ́ mɔ amʋ. 10Mlɩmálɛ Bulu ɩla fɛ alɩá amʋ́tɔ akʋ bɔbwɛ, Bulu lɔpʋ ɔbɔpʋ sɩsɩ, ɔlɔbɔmɔ amʋ́.
11Ntobi anfɩ ɩlɛba amʋ́sʋ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi atosuanhɛ ha anɩ. Bɔwanlɩn mʋ́ tswɩ, pʋda anɩ aha anfɩ ɔyɩ ɔnɔmɔbɩ latʋ anɩ anfɩ ɔla.
12Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ fʋkɩ fɛɛ, fʋlɩɩ kinkiinkin Kristo hogyitɔ a, kɩ wanklaan, mɛnɩ fʋmɛ́ɛdɩda. 13Bɩá fʋ ɩsɔkɩ amʋ mɔtsʋn ɔtsan ha aha trahɛ klɛ. Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ Bulu gyi. Ɔmɛ́ɛha ɩsɔkɩá ɩdʋn fʋ ɩba fʋsʋ. Tamɛ nɩ fowie ɩsɔkɩtɔ a, Bulu obósuna fʋ ɔkpa ánɩ́ fɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ talɩ lɩɩ mʋ́ ɔnɔ, mɛnɩ fɛ́dalɩ mʋ́tɔ.
14Mʋ́ sʋ apio adwɛpʋ, mlɩmáwa ɩwɩ ɩkpɩsumtɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 15Atɩansɩpʋ mlɩgyi. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩ onuto mlɩyɔ asʋn anfɩtɔ amlɩkɩ. 16Nɩ ada Bulu ɩpan, anun anɩ Wie Yesu ɔpʋnʋasɩ ɛwɛ amʋtɔ nta a, imosuna ánɩ́ anɩa Kristo obugya labwɛ kʋlɛ? Nɩ abia bodobodo amʋ ɛ ye aba a, mʋ́ ɛ imosuna ánɩ́ anɩa mʋ ɔyʋlʋ labwɛ kʋlɛ? 17Ɩnɩá anɩ tsɔ o a, bodobodo ipin kʋlɛ anɩtegyi. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩlabwɛ ɔyʋlʋ kʋlɛ fɛ bodobodo ipin amʋ.
18Mlɩpʋkɩ Israelfɔ, megyi aha amʋʋ bʋtegyi afɔdɩɛ atɔ amʋ tɔbwɛ kʋlɛ afɔdɩɛ amʋ bɔtɔ? 19Mʋ́ sʋ nkalɩ mɩ asʋn anfɩ desuna? Blɩ ndɛblɩ mbɛɛ, ɩkpɩ ntɛ atogyihɛ amʋʋ bapʋha amʋ́ igyi amʋ ɩbʋ labi? 20Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Tɔá ndɛblɩ gyi, nɩ akpɩpʋ bɛha ɩkpɩ igyi a, ɔŋɛ lalahɛ bɔpʋha, megyi Bulu. Mʋ́ sʋ mmedekleá mlɩa ɔŋɛ lalahɛ mlɔ́bwɛ kʋlɛ. 21Mlɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ pʋ anɩ Wie ɛwɛ tin ɔnɔ, layɔpʋ ɔŋɛ lalahɛ ɛwɛ ɛ tin ɔnɔ. Mlɩa Kristo mlɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ wa ɩbɩ gyi atɔ, mlɩa ɔŋɛ lalahɛ ɛ amlɩwa ɩbɩ gyi atɔ. 22Nɩ abwɛ mʋ́ alɩ a, anɩmɔ́ɔwa Bulu ɔblɔ fɛ Israelfɔ? Ntɛ anɩkɩá anɩbʋ ɔwʋnlɩn dʋn Bulu?
23Aha bʋtɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Anɩbʋ ɔkpa bwɛ togyitɔ.” Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔ alɩ, tamɛ megyi mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋ labi. Fʋdɛblɩ fɛɛ, “Anɩbʋ ɔkpa bwɛ togyitɔ.” Tamɛ megyi mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ tɔbʋa anɩ. 24Mlɩmákɩ mlɩ nkʋlɛ klɛ, mboun mlɩkɩ mlɩ aba ɛ klɛ.
25Tɔá mlɩbwɛ gyi, mlɩwɩ ibiasʋ iye kugyikʋ. Mlɩmáfɩtɛ mʋ́ ɩwɩ asʋansʋ, mlɩ klʋn ɛ ɩmáha mlɩ pɔn. 26Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Bulu bʋ ɔyɩ mʋ́a mʋ́tɔ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́.”
27Nɩ ɔmátɔyin ɔtɩ fʋ atɔ ogyikpa, iletsia fʋ a, fayɔ. Tamɛ nɩ fɔyɔ a, máfɩtɛ mʋ́ ɩwɩ asʋansʋ, fʋ klʋn ɛ ɩmáha fʋ ɩpɔn. 28Tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ ɔbla fʋ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔkpɩtɔ-atɔ igyi” a, alɩá ɩmɛ́ɛhan ɔha amʋ sʋ mágyi atɔ amʋ. 29Megyi alɩá ɩbɛ́han fʋ sʋ, mboun ɔha amʋ sʋ. Mʋʋ ntogyi sʋ tɔá ɔkʋ desusu ibétin mɩ ɩwɩgyi ɔkpa?
30Nɩ ntɛda Bulu ɩpan atogyihɛsʋ asa ntegyi mʋ́ a, ntogyi sʋ ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mɩ ɩla atɔ amʋ sʋ?
31Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ fʋdegyi o, fʋdenun o, bwɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ pʋwa Bulu numnyam. 32Mlɩmáha mlɩ tsiatɔ itin Yudafɔ pʋ́ Grikifɔ ntɛ Bulu ɔpasua amʋ Kristo wa ba ɔkpa. 33Ntamakle mɩ nkʋlɛ yile. Togyitɔá ntɔbwɛ a, ntɔbɔ mbɔdɩá nɛ́ha aha ansɩ bégyi amʋ́, mɛnɩ Kristo ɔbɔ́hɔ amʋ́ nkpa.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 11
Content:
1Mlɩkasɩ mɩ tsiatɔ, fɛ alɩá mɩ ɛ nɛkasɩ Kristo klɛ.
Alɩá Atsɩ Bɔ́pʋtsia Ɔpasuatɔ
2Mɩ apio, ntɛkanfʋ mlɩ, tsufɛ mlɩ ansɩ dɩn mɩsʋ. Mlɩdɛbwɛ dɩnka Kristo atosunahɛ amʋʋ nɔpʋha mlɩ amʋ sʋ. 3Tamɛ ndekleá mlɩnu mʋ́ asɩ ánɩ́ oyingyioyin bʋ Kristo asɩ, ɔtsɩgyiɔtsɩ bʋ oyin asɩ, fɛ alɩá Kristo ɛ bʋ Bulu asɩ. 4Ɩnɩ sʋ oyingyioyin ánɩ́ obun atɔ nwun asa ɔdɛ mpaɩ bɔ ntɛ ɔdɛ asʋn ánɩ́ Bulu lapʋwa mʋ ɔnɔ blɩ mɛdɛ Kristo bu. 5Tamɛ ɔtsɩgyiɔtsɩá ɔmɛklɩ nwun asa ɔdɛ mpaɩ bɔ ntɛ ɔdɛ asʋn ánɩ́ Bulu lapʋwa mʋ ɔnɔ blɩ ɛ mɛdɛ mʋ klu bu. Igyi fɛ alakpa nwun. 6Nɩ ɔmɔ́ɔpʋ atɔ klɩ nwun a, mʋmʋ ɔkpa mʋ́. Tamɛ nɩ ɔtsɩ ɔkpa nwun, ɩbʋ mʋ pɛlɩ a, ɔpʋ atɔ klɩ mʋ́sʋ. 7Bulu lɔbwɛ oyin fɛ mʋ ɩwɩ, pʋwa mʋ ɩwɩ numnyam. Mʋ́ sʋ mehian ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́pʋ atɔ bun nwun asa obósum Bulu. Tamɛ ɔtsɩ mʋ́ a, Bulu lɔbwɛ mʋ pʋwa oyin numnyam. 8Tsufɛ oyin mɛdalɩ tsu ɔtsɩtɔ, ɔtsɩ mboun lɛdalɩ tsu oyintɔ. 9Megyi ɔtsɩ sʋ Bulu lɔpwɛ oyin, mboun oyin sʋ ɔlɔpwɛ ɔtsɩ. 10Ɩnɩ sʋ ilehian ánɩ́ ɔtsɩ ɔbɛ́klɩ nwun, pʋsuna ánɩ́ ɔbʋ tumi asɩ, tsufɛ Bulu-abɔpʋ bʋdɛ mʋ kɩ. 11Ɩnɩá anɩa Kristonyɔ anɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ sʋ a, ɔtsɩ lehian oyin, oyin ɛ lehian ɔtsɩ. 12Tsufɛ alɩ amʋʋ ɔtsɩ gyankpapʋ lɛdalɩ tsu oyintɔ amʋ a, alɩ kɛn ɔtsɩ ɛ lɔkwɩɩ oyin nɩ. Tamɛ Bulu lɔbwɛ togyitɔ.
13Mlɩ onuto mlɩyɔ asʋn anfɩtɔ amlɩkɩ. Ɩbʋ alɛá ɔtsɩ mɛ́ɛklɩ nwun asa ɔbɔ́bɔ mpaɩ ha Bulu? 14Fɛ alɩá Bulu lɛlɛ ɔyɩtɔ a, ɩma alɛá oyin obési mʋ imi ɩbɔ́wa ɩswɩ fɛ ɔtsɩ klɛ. 15Imi tɩntɩn igyi numnyam ha ɔtsɩ, tsufɛ Bulu lɔpʋ mʋ́ ha mʋ fɛ nwun-abuntɔ. 16Tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ dɛ mʋ́ ɩwɩ nwɛn gyi a, asʋn ánɩ́ mbʋ blɩ gyi, mmotsula dɩnka kʋkʋsʋ dʋn ɩnɩ. Alɩ kɛn Bulu ɔpasua atrahɛ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋmotsula dɩnka mʋ́sʋ nɩ.
Ɔpʋnʋasɩyɔ
(Mateo 26:26-29; Marko 14:22-25; Luka 22:14-20)
17Mmɛ́ɛkanfʋ mlɩ asʋn anfɩ nɛba bɛbla mlɩ anfɩ mʋ́tɔ. Tsufɛ yile kʋkʋ tamadalɩ tsu mlɩ ifiatɔ. Lalahɛ koun ɩtɛtɩ ha mlɩ. 18Gyankpapʋ a, babla mɩ bɛɛ mlɩtamabwɛ kʋlɛ nɩ ɔpasua amʋ befia. Nahogyiá asʋn anfɩ kʋ bʋ mʋ́tɔ. 19Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, ilehian ánɩ́ nwɛngyi bétsia mlɩtɔ, mɛnɩ mlówun ɔnɔkwalɩá ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔ. 20Tamɛ bɛblɩ bɛɛ, nɩ mlefia a, megyi ɔpʋnʋasɩyɔ sʋ mlɩtefia. 21Tsufɛ mlɩtamagyo aba. Akʋ bʋtegyi amʋ́ atɔ, bʋtamaha aba. Mʋ́ sʋ akʋ bʋtonun bʋ, akʋ ɛ bʋtsie akʋn. 22Mlɩ onuto mlɩmá woyiá mlɩtegyi atɔ, nun nta mʋ́tɔ? Ntɛ mlɩdekleá mlɔ́sʋpa Bulu ɔpasua amʋ, amlɩwa ahianfɔ amʋ pɛlɩtɔ? Amansʋ mblɩ tsu ɩnɩ ɩwɩ? Nkanfʋ mlɩ? Ɩnɩtɔ mʋ́ a, ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ, mmɛ́ɛkanfʋ mlɩ!
23Tsufɛ tɔá nosuan tsu anɩ Wie wa kɛn ndɛ mlɩ bla a. Anɩ Wie Yesu lɛlɛ bodobodo ipin onye amʋʋ bɛlɛ mʋ ha amʋ, 24ɔlɛda Bulu ɩpan, biabia mʋ́tɔ, blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ ɔyʋlʋá ndɛpʋha mlɩ nɩ. Mlɩtsia bwɛ ɩnɩ pʋkaɩn mɩsʋ.” 25Alɩ kɛn atogyihɛ amʋ ɔma a, olotsu nta-ɛwɛ amʋ blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Nta-ɛwɛ anfɩ gyi mɩ obugya ánɩ́ Bulu dɛpʋsi ntam pɔpwɛ amʋʋ ɩbʋ mlɩa mʋnyɔ nsɩnɛ amʋsʋ nɩ. Bregyibrɛá mlónun mʋ́ a, mlɩnun mʋ́ pʋkaɩn mɩsʋ.”
26Tsufɛ bregyibrɛá mlɩdɛ bodobodo anfɩ gyi, nun nta tsu ɛwɛ anfɩtɔ a, mlɩdɛ anɩ Wie lowu amʋ ɔkan da kpɛfʋn brɛá obéyinki ba. 27Mʋ́ sʋ ɔha ánɩ́ obégyi alɩ bodobodo anfɩ, nun nta tsu anɩ Wie ɛwɛ anfɩtɔ mábu ɔkpasʋ a, alagyi anɩ Wie ɔyʋlʋ pʋ́ mʋ obugya amʋ ɩwɩ pɔn. 28Ɩnɩ sʋ ilehian ánɩ́ mlɔ́yɔ mlɩ nwuntɔ wanklaan, asa mlégyi bodobodo anfɩ, nun nta ɛwɛ anfɩtɔ. 29Tsufɛ nɩ mlɩmobu anɩ Wie Kristo ɔyʋlʋ, mlɩlegyi bodobodo amʋ, nun nta amʋ ɛ dɩnka ifinsʋ a, Bulu ɔbɛ́ha mlɩ ɩpɔn mʋ́ sʋ. 30Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩtɔ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bapɔn, akʋ bʋdɛlɔ, akʋ mʋ́ kʋraa bawu nɩ. 31Nɩ anɩtɔyɔ anɩ nwuntɔ wanklaan asa a, tɛkɩ Bulu mɛ́ɛha anɩ pɔn. 32Tamɛ nɩ anɩ Wie ɔlɛ anɩ ɩla, bɩtɩ anɩ ɩsʋ a, ɔmɛ́ɛha anɩa ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ ɩpɔn kʋlɛ.
33Ɩnɩ sʋ mɩ apio, nɩ mleyefia ɔpʋnʋ amʋ asɩ a, mlɩtsia gyo aba. 34Nɩ akʋn dɛ ɔkʋ a, ogyi atɔ tsu woyitɔ asa ɔba, mɛnɩ mlɩ ifia amʋ ɩmɛ́ɛtɩ ɩsʋbɩtɩ ha mlɩ. Mɩ onuto nɛ́ba bɛbla mlɩ tɔá mlɩbwɛ tsu asʋn trahɛ amʋ ɩwɩ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 12
Content:
Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ Atokiehɛ
1Sei a, apio, ndekleá nɛ́lɛ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ atokiehɛ asʋn amʋ asɩ wanklaan suna mlɩ.
2Mlɩyin ánɩ́ brɛá mlɩgyi ɔmátɔfɔ a, bosuna mlɩ asunakpan, ɩlɛha mlɩlɔyɔ mlɩdɛ ɩkpɩá bʋtamatɔɩ sum. 3Mʋ́ sʋ ndekleá mlɩbɩ mʋ́á itsu Bulu wa. Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɛpʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ tɔɩ mɛ́ɛtalɩ lwɩɩ anɩ Wie Yesu. Ɔha ánɩ́ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ dɛ mʋ kpa nkʋlɛ ɔbɛ́talɩ blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Yesu gyi mɩ Wie.”
4Bulu atokiehɛ ɔtsan-ɔtsan bʋ ɩnʋ, tamɛ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ kɛn teye mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́. 5Bulusum agyʋma igyi ɔtsan-ɔtsan, tamɛ anɩ Wie amʋ kɛn anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩdesum. 6Ɔkpa ɔtsan-ɔtsansʋ Bulu tɔyɔ agyʋma tsʋn anɩsʋ, tamɛ Bulu amʋ kɛn dɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bwɛ tsʋn anɩ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ. 7Bulu tɛlɛ mʋ Ɔŋɛ amʋ ɔwan tsʋn ɔkpa ɔkʋsʋ anɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋtɔ, mɛnɩ abɔ́pʋkpa aba. 8Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ tɛha ɔkʋ tɔpʋ nyansa tɔɩ kpla aha, ɔtɛha ɔkʋ ɛ tɛbɩ asʋn. 9Ɔtɛha ɔkʋ tɛhɩɛ hɔ Bulu gyi, ɔtɛha ɔkʋ ɛ tɛtsa aha ɩlɔ. 10Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ kɛn tɛha ɔkʋ tumi ɔtɔpʋbwɛ ofula, ɔtɛha ɔkʋ ɛ tɛblɩ asʋn ánɩ́ Bulu lɔpʋwa mʋ ɔnɔ. Ɔtɛha ɔkʋ tɛtalɩ bɩ ɔŋɛá itsu Bulu wa pʋ́ mʋ́á itsu ɔŋɛ lalahɛ wa. Ɔtɛha ɔkʋ tɛblɩ ɔblɩ bamba, ɔkʋ ɛ tonu mʋ́ asɩ. 11Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ nkʋlɛ tɔbwɛ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́, oteye atokiehɛ anfɩ ha ɔhagyiɔha alɩá odekle.
Ɔpasua Amʋ Igyi Nyankpʋsa-oyi Ɔkʋlɛ
12Nyankpʋsa-oyi ɩwɩ atɔ ɩtsɔ, tamɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ lɔbwɛ nyankpʋsa amʋ. Alɩ kɛn igyi Kristo ɛ nɩ. Mʋ ɔpasua amʋ gyi mʋ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ nɩ. 13Anɩtɔ akʋ anɩgyi Yudafɔ, akʋ Grikifɔ, akʋ nkpábi ntɛ adɩhɩɛ, tamɛ bɔpʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ bɔ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ asu wa Kristo ɔyʋlʋ kʋlɛ amʋtɔ, Bulu lɔpʋ Ɔŋɛ amʋ kɛn nuna anɩ fɛ́ɛ́.
14Tamɛ megyi toku kʋlɛ lɔbwɛ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ, mboun ɩwɩ atɔ ɔtsan-ɔtsan. 15Nɩ yabi ɔblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mma nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ ɩwɩ, tsufɛ megyi ɩbɩ ngyi” a, ilosuna ánɩ́ megyi nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ ɩwɩ atɔ ogyi? 16Nɩ ɩsʋ ɛ ɔblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mma nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ ɩwɩ, tsufɛ megyi nsibi ngyi” a, ilosuna ánɩ́ megyi nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ ɩwɩ atɔ ogyi? 17Nɩ nsibi nkʋlɛ gyi nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ a, nkalɩ ɔbɔ́bwɛ obónu asʋn? Ntɛ nɩ ɩsʋ nkʋlɛ gyi nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ a, nkalɩ ɔbɔ́hɔ atɔ afu? 18Tamɛ Bulu lɔpʋ ɩwɩ atɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bwɛ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ, ɔlɔpʋ kugyikʋ yi ɔtɩnɛá odekle. 19Nɩ ɩwɩ ntobi amʋ igyi toku kʋlɛ a, nkalɩ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ ɩbɔ́bwɛ? 20Ɩwɩ ntobi amʋ ɩtsɔ mʋ́, tamɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ lɔbwɛ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ nɩ.
21Mʋ́ sʋ nsibi mɛ́ɛtalɩ bla ɩbɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Fʋma labi ha mɩ!” ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Nwun ɛ mɛ́ɛtalɩ bla yabi ɔbɛɛ, “Fʋma labi ha mɩ!” 22Nɩ akɩ a, ɩwɩ atɔ amʋʋ anɩdɛkɩ anɩaa ɩlɔpɔn amʋ ɩwɩ tehian nɩ. 23Mʋ́ amʋʋ anɩdɛkɩá obú ɩma mʋ́sʋ amʋ anɩtobu dʋn nɩ. Ɔtɩnɛ amʋʋ anɩtamakleá aha bʋwun amʋ ɛ anɩtɔpʋ atɔ tin nɩ. 24Tamɛ anɩtamapʋ atɔ tin anɩ ɩwɩ ntobi amʋʋ ɩbʋ akɩlɛ amʋ. Bulu lɔbwɛ anɩ ɩwɩ atɔ amʋ alɩ, mɛnɩ abóbu mʋ́ amʋʋ ɩma numnyam amʋ, kɩ mʋ́sʋ wanklaan. 25Fówun ɩkʋlɛbwɛ bétsia amʋ́tɔ, mɛnɩ gyɔpɩ okpita bɩna a, bɩna ɛ lakpita gyɔpɩ. 26Nɩ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ ɩwɩ tɔkʋ dɛ ɔsɩn wun a, nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ towun mʋ́. Nɩ bɛkanfʋ mʋ́tɔ kʋ ɛ a, ansɩ tegyi nyankpʋsa amʋ.
27Yoo, ayɔ nkpa. Kristo ɔyʋlʋ kʋlɛ amʋ mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩgyi. Mlɩgyi mʋ ɔpasua amʋ nɩ. Mlɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ gyi mʋ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ ɩwɩ tɔkʋ. 28Bulu lɛhɩhɩɛ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ wa mʋ ɔpasua amʋtɔ. Gyankpapʋ, sumbi ayɔpʋ. Nyɔsɩ, Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ, sasɩ, atɔ asunapʋ. Mʋ́ ɔma a, ofula abwɛpʋ. Amʋ́á bʋbʋ ɩlɔtsa tumi, bʋalɛ agyipʋ, ahandɛ pʋ́ ɔblɩ bamba ablɩpʋ. 29Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ gyi sumbi ayɔpʋ? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ gyi Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ, ntɛ atɔ asunapʋ, ntɛ ofula abwɛpʋ? Ɩmɛ́ɛba mʋ́tɔ alɩ! 30Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋ ɩlɔtsa atokiehɛ? Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ tɛblɩ ɔblɩ bamba, ntɛ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ tɛtalɩ nu ɔblɩ bamba amʋ asɩ? 31Mlɩbɔ mbɔdɩ amlɩdunka atokiehɛ amʋtɔ mʋ́á idehian dʋn.
Nɛlasuna mlɩ ɔkpa ánɩ́ ɩdʋn ɩnɩ tsɩa mʋ́tɔ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 13
Content:
Ɔdwɛ
1Nɩ ntɛtalɩ blɩ anyankpʋsa pʋ́ Bulu-abɔpʋ ɔblɩ fɛ́ɛ́, tamɛ ntamadwɛ mɩ aba a, ngyi fɛ ɔkan ntɛ gbɛmgblɛɩn ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mʋ́ da, ɩdɛlɩn kʋklʋkʋʋ. 2Nɩ mbʋ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋnblɩ, Bulu asʋn ŋainhɛbɩ pʋ́ hogyi kpɔnkpɔntɩá ntɛtalɩ pʋpuli abʋ, tamɛ mma mɩ ba ɩwɩ ɔdwɛ a, mʋmʋ mma labi kʋkʋ. 3Nɩ nɔpʋ mɩ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ kie ahianfɔ, nɔpʋ mɩ ɩwɩ ha mbɛɛ bʋwa mɩ ogya, tamɛ mma mɩ ba ɩwɩ ɔdwɛ a, mma labi ha ɔhaa.
4Aha ɔdwɛpʋ tenya ɩklʋn, ɔbʋ awɩtɔlɛ. Ɔma olu, ɔtamaka ɔnɔtɔ, ɔtamatsu ɩwɩ. 5Otobu atɔ, ɔma ɔnsɩpɛ. Ɔtamakɔsɩ nya ɔblɔ, ɔtamahɔ asʋn wa ɩwɩtɔ. 6Ɔtamatsula asʋkpan, ɔnɔkwalɩ otobuo. 7Otenya klʋn ha togyitɔ, ɔtɔhɔ asʋnsʋ gyi. Mʋ ansɩ tɛdɩnka asʋnsʋ, ototomi ɛ.
8Ɔdwɛ mʋ́ ɩtamata, tamɛ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋnblɩ bɔ́mɔ ɔnɔ. Ɔblɩ bamba blɩ bɛ́ka itin, asʋnbɩ ɛ ɩbɛ́ba bɔtsʋn. 9Tsufɛ anɩmɔkʋnya bɩ togyitɔ ta, anɩmɔkʋnya blɩ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋn ɛ yi. 10Tamɛ ɔŋɛtɔ atokiehɛ anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩmɔfʋn. Nɩ mʋ́á ɩlɔfʋn yi ɩba a, ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔ́fwɩ.
11Igyi fɛ ɩnɩ. Brɛá ngyi kebi a, nɔtɔɩ fɛ kebi. Mɩ atɔ bwɛhɛ pʋ́ mɩ asʋn susuhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ lɔbwɛ fɛ kebi. Tamɛ sei anfɩ nadan a, nasi nyebitɔ bwɛhɛ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bwɛ. 12Sei a, anɩdɛ atɔ kɩ fulaa fɛ ogyasitɔ anɩdɛ mʋ́ kɩ. Brɛ ɩkʋ bɛ́ba a, abówun mʋ́ wanklaan. Sei a, anɩ atɔbɩ mɔfʋn. Ɔma a, abɛ́ba bɛbɩ mʋ́ fɛ alɩá Bulu yin anɩ.
13Ɔnɔkwalɩ a, atoku asa anfɩ obétsia nɩ. Hogyi, ɔkpakɩ pʋ́ ɔdwɛ, tamɛ ɔdwɛ dʋn mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 14
Content:
Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ Atokiehɛ Bamba
1Mlɩdunka ɔdwɛ ɔkpa, amlɩdunka ɔŋɛtɔ atokiehɛ ɛ. Mʋ́á ɩdʋn a, Bulu ɔnɔ asʋnblɩ. 2Tsufɛ nɩ ɔkʋ dɛ ɔblɩ bamba blɩ a, megyi anyankpʋsa ɔdɛbla, Bulu ɔdɛbla. Ɔhaa tamanu mʋ́ asɩ, tsufɛ mʋ ɔŋɛ dɛ asʋn ŋainhɛ blɩ. 3Tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɛ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋn blɩ mʋ́ a, aha ɔdɛbla, ɔdɛpʋbʋa amʋ́ abʋdan hogyitɔ. Ɔdɛpʋwa amʋ́ ɔwʋnlɩn, ɔdɛpʋlwii amʋ́ ɩklʋn ɛ. 4Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɛ ɔblɩ bamba blɩ nkʋlɛ tenya ɔwʋnlɩn Bulusumtɔ. Tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɛ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋn blɩ mʋ́ tɔwa ɔpasua amʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
5Tɛkɩ ndekleá mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɛ́blɩ ɔblɩ bamba, tamɛ nɩ mlɩdɛ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋn blɩ a, ɩbʋ mɩ alɛ dʋn. Tsufɛ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ dʋn ɔblɩ bamba ɔblɩpʋ. Nkɛtɩ nɩ ɔblɩ bamba ɔblɩpʋ amʋ tɛtalɩ lɛ mʋ́ asɩ, mɛnɩ ɔpasua amʋ bénya tɔkʋ tsu mʋ́tɔ. 6Mɩ apio, nɩ naba mlɩ wa sei bɛblɩ ɔblɩ bamba kʋ, mmɛlɛ mʋ́ asɩ a, labi mɔmʋ ɩbɔ́wa ha mlɩ? Tamɛ nɩ nɛblɩ asʋn, nɛ́ha mlɛbɩ asʋn, ntɛ nɛblɩ asʋn lɛsunahɛ kʋ, ntɛ nɛblɩ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋn kʋ, ntɛ suna mlɩ atɔ a, ɩbɔ́wa labi ha mlɩ dʋn.
7Mlɩpʋkɩ ɩtɔá fɛda mʋ́ itotsula, fɛ ɩkwɛ, ɔtɛntɛ ntɛ ɔkpɛ aná. Nɩ fʋmɛda mʋ́ itsula wanklaan a, bʋtamanu mʋ́ asɩ. 8Nɩ klunsi ɔdapʋ mɛbɩ da mʋ́ a, ɔhaa tamanu mʋ́ asɩ, dɩda atɔ yɔ ɩsa. 9Alɩ kɛn nɩ mlɩdɛ ɔblɩá ɔhaa mɛdɛ mʋ́tɔ nu blɩ a, mlɩdɛtɔɩ wa afutɔ nɩ. 10Ɔblɩ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋ ɔyɩtɔ. Kugyikʋ ɩlɔfʋn, ɩbʋ mʋ́ ablɩpʋ anulɛ. 11Tamɛ nɩ ɔkʋ dɛ ɔblɩ kʋ blɩ, mɩ ɛ mmɛdɛ mʋ́tɔ nu a, ntamanu mʋ asɩ, mʋ ɛ ɔtamanu mɩ asɩ. 12Mʋ́ sʋ ɩnɩá mlɩhɩɛ mlɩdɛ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ atokiehɛ amʋ dunka a, mlɩkʋlɩ mʋ́á ɩbɔ́wa ɔpasua amʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.
13Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛblɩ ɔblɩ bamba ɔkʋlɩ Bulu mʋ́ asɩnu, mɛnɩ ɔbɛ́talɩ lɛ mʋ́ asɩ suna mʋ́ anupʋ. 14Tsufɛ nɩ ndɛpʋ ɔblɩ bamba bɔ mpaɩ a, mɩ ɔŋɛ dɛ mʋ́ bɔ, tamɛ mmɛdɛ asʋn ánɩ́ ndɛblɩ asɩ nu. 15Nkalɩ mɛɛ nɔ́bwɛ? Nɔ́bɔ mpaɩ ɔŋɛtɔ brɛ kʋtɔ, pʋ mɩ agywɩɩn ɛ bɔ mʋ́ brɛ bambatɔ. Alɩ kɛn nɔ́wa ɩlʋ ɔŋɛtɔ, pʋ mɩ agywɩɩn wa mʋ́ brɛ kʋtɔ ɛ nɩ. 16Tsufɛ nɩ fʋdɛ Bulu kanfʋ ɔŋɛtɔ pɛ a, nkalɩ ɩbɔ́bwɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔmɛdɛ mʋ́ asɩ nu ɔbɛ́tsa fʋ? Nkalɩ bɛ́tsa fʋ Bulu ɩpan da nɩ bʋmɛdɛ asʋn ánɩ́ fʋdɛblɩ asɩ nu? 17Fialɩ fʋdɛ Bulu ɩpan da wanklaan, tamɛ ɩtamawa fʋ ba ɔwʋnlɩn.
18Nɛda Bulu ɩpan ánɩ́ ntɛblɩ ɔblɩ bamba dʋn mlɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ. 19Tamɛ nɩ afia a, ntekleá nɛ́blɩ asʋn anu pɛá ɔhagyiɔha obónu mʋ́ asɩ, ɩbɔ́bʋa amʋ́ ɛ dʋn ánɩ́ nɛ́blɩ asʋn mpɩm-du (10,000) ɔblɩ bambatɔá ɔhaa monu mʋ́ asɩ.
20Mɩ apio, mlɩmábwɛ agywɩɩn fɛ nyebi. Mlɩbwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ kebi-bɔbwɛ lakpanbwɛtɔ, tamɛ mlɩgywɩɩn fɛ ɔhandɛ. 21Bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
“Nɔ́tɔɩ tsʋn afɔɔsʋ, bɛ́bla mɩ aha ɔblɩ bamba.
Mʋ́ o a, mɩ aha bʋmóonu mɩ ɔmɛ.” Anɩ Wie lɛblɩ.
22Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔblɩ bamba blɩ igyi osuna ha ɔmátɔfɔ, megyi ahogyipʋ. Bulu ɔnɔ asʋn blɩ ɛ igyi osuna ha ahogyipʋ, megyi ɔmátɔfɔ.
23Nɩ ɔpasua amʋ ifia, ɔhagyiɔha dɛ ɔblɩ bamba blɩ, ɔha bamba pʋ́ ɔmátɔyin bɛba mlɩtɔ a, bʋmɛ́ɛblɩ bɛɛ, mlɩ nwun layinta? 24Tamɛ nɩ mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩdɛ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋn blɩ, ɔmátɔfɔ ntɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋtamanu mʋ́tɔ bɛba mlɩtɔ a, amʋ́ onuto bɔ́yɔ asʋn amʋtɔ, nu ɩwɩasɩá babwɛ lakpan. 25Ɩbɛ́ha amʋ́ klʋntɔ asʋn bɛ́lɩn ɔwan. Bɛ́da akpawunu, kanfʋ Bulu bɛɛ, “Lɛlɛ, Bulu bʋ mlɩtɔ.”
Ɔpasua Amʋtɔ Nhɩhɩɛ
26Mɩ apio, nɩ mlɛba befia Bulu osumkpa, mlɩtɔ ɔkʋ tɔwa ɩlʋ, ɔkʋ tosuna atɔ, ɔkʋ towun atɔ, ɔkʋ tɛblɩ ɔblɩ bamba, ɔkʋ ɛ tonu mʋ́ asɩ a, bʋbwɛ mʋ́ pʋwa ɔpasua amʋ ɔwʋnlɩn. 27Nɩ akʋ bɛblɩ ɔblɩ bamba a, bʋbwɛ aha abanyɔ. Nɩ bʋtsɔ kʋraa a, abasa. Bʋblɩ mʋ́ ɩkʋlɛ-kʋlɛ, mɛnɩ ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ́ asɩ. 28Nɩ ɔhaa má ofiakpa ɩnʋá ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ́ asɩ mʋ́ a, bʋkpa ɔnɔ bun, amʋ́a amʋ́ Bulu abʋtɔɩ nklobitɔ. 29Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ abanyɔ ntɛ abasa bʋtɔɩ, atrahɛ abʋyɔ amʋ́ asʋn blɩhɛ amʋtɔ. 30Tamɛ nɩ Bulu ɔlɛ atɔ suna ɔkʋá otsie ofiakpa ɩnʋ a, Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ amʋ osi tɔɩ, ɔha amʋ ɔblɩ tɔá alawun. 31Mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɛ́talɩ blɩ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋn amʋ ɩkʋlɛ-kʋlɛ, mɛnɩ mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlósuan tɔkʋ tsu mʋ́tɔ pʋwa ɩwɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. 32Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ amʋ bʋnya tumi ɔŋɛ amʋʋ ɩdɛ amʋ́ kpa amʋ́sʋ, mɛnɩ bɔ́tɔɩ ha amʋ́ aba ɔkpa. 33Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn lolwii, omegyi basabasa.
34Nɩ ɔpasua amʋ ifia a, atsɩ bʋbwɛ diin. Bʋma ɔkpa tɔɩ. Bʋba ɩwɩasɩ fɛ alɩá Mose Mbla lɛblɩ. 35Nɩ bʋdekleá bónu asʋankʋtɔ a, bʋfɩtɛ amʋ́ aklu woyitɔ, tsufɛ ɩbʋ pɛlɩá ɔtsɩ ɔbɔ́tɔɩ ofiakpa.
36Mlɩlahogyi mlɩaa, mlɩ wa Bulu asʋn amʋ ilotsua asɩ? Ntɛ mlɩ nkʋlɛ latsɔ mʋ́ nu? 37Nɩ ɔkʋ dɛkɩá Bulu ɔnɔsʋ ɔtɔɩpʋ mʋgyi, ntɛ ɔbʋ Ɔŋɛtɔ atokiehɛ kʋ a, ɩwankɩ mʋá anɩ Wie onuto mbla igyi ndɛwanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ. 38Nɩ ɔmɔhɔ asʋn anfɩ a, mlɩ ɛ mlɩmáhɔ mʋ asʋn.
39Mɩ apio, ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩprɩá mlɛ́blɩ Bulu ɔnɔ asʋn, tamɛ mlɩmábla ɔhaa mlɩaa, ɔmáblɩ ɔblɩ bamba. 40Mlɩbwɛ togyitɔ dɩnka mʋ́ ɔkpasʋ wanklaan, ɩfʋn.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 15
Content:
Kristo Kʋsʋ tsu Afulitɔ
1Mɩ apio, sei a, nkaɩn mlɩ asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ nɛda mʋ́ ɔkan suna mlɩ, mlɩlɔhɔ mʋ́sʋ gyi, mlɩ hogyi ɩlɩɩ mʋ́sʋ amʋ. 2Asʋn anfɩ ɔbɛ́ha mlɩ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata, nɩ lɛlɛ mlɩlɔhɔ mʋ́sʋ gyi nɩ. Tamɛ nɩ mlekina mʋ́sʋ hogyi mʋ́ a, mlɩ hogyi labwɛ kpaalɩ!
3Tsufɛ asʋn ánɩ́ ɩhɩɛ dehian bɔpʋha mɩ nɔpʋba mlɩ igyi. Mʋ́gyi, Kristo lobowu anɩ lakpan sʋ, fɛ alɩá Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ. 4Bopula mʋ, Bulu lɔkʋsʋa mʋ tsu afulitɔ ɛkɛ sasɩ fɛ alɩá Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ ɩlɛblɩ. 5Ɔlɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna Petro. Mʋ́ ɔma a, ɔlɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna sumbi ayɔpʋ duanyɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́. 6Ɩnɩ ɔma a, ɔlɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna mʋ abuopʋ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔá bʋdʋn aha lafanu (500) ɔtsawʋlɛ. Amʋ́tɔ akʋ bawu, tamɛ ɔdʋdʋɔ bʋtra bʋtsie nkpa. 7Ɔlɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna Yakobo ɛ. Ɔma a, ɔlɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna sumbi ayɔpʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
8Ɩtrahɛ-trahɛ a, ɔlɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna mɩ onuto anfɩ nesin ɔma ba anfɩ. 9Tsufɛ mɩgyi sumbi ayɔpʋ amʋtɔ ɔkʋsʋ nɩ. Tɛkɩ mmɔfʋn ánɩ́ bɛ́tɩ mɩ sumbi ɔyɔpʋ kʋraa, tsufɛ nɛdɩnka Bulu ɔpasua amʋsʋ. 10Tamɛ Bulu awɩtɔlɛ sʋ ndɛ namli alɩ. Mʋ awɩtɔlɛ amʋ ɩmɔbwɛ kpaalɩ. Tsufɛ nayɔ agyʋma dʋn amʋ́tɔ okugyiɔkʋ. Tamɛ megyi mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn nɔpʋyɔ mʋ́. Mʋ awɩtɔlɛ amʋ dɛ mɩ kpa. 11Ɩnɩ sʋ nɩ mɩlɛtra da asʋn amʋ ɔkan o, amʋ́ o, mʋ́á idehian gyi mlɩlɔhɔ anɩ asʋn amʋsʋ gyi.
Anɩ Kʋsʋ Tsu Afulitɔ
12Nɩ anɩtɛda Bulu asʋn amʋ ɔkan anɩaa, Bulu lɔkʋsʋa Kristo tsu afulitɔ a, ntogyi sʋ mlɩtɔ akʋ mʋ́ bɛɛ, awupʋ bʋmɔ́ɔkʋsʋ tsu afulitɔ? 13Nɩ awupʋ bʋmɔ́ɔkʋsʋ mʋ́ a, idesuna ánɩ́ Bulu mɔkʋsʋa Kristo ɛ. 14Nɩ Kristo mɔkʋsʋ tsu afulitɔ a, tɛkɩ anɩ asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkanda igyi kpaalɩ. Mlɩ mʋ́sʋ hogyi ɛ igyi kpaalɩ. 15Nɩ Bulu tamakʋsʋa awupʋ mʋ́ a, mʋmʋ afunu anɩdɛwa tɩn Bulu ɔnɔ, blɩ anɩaa alakʋsʋa Kristo tsu afulitɔ. Nɩ ɔtamakʋsʋa awupʋ a, mʋmʋ asʋn anfɩ ɩma mʋ́tɔ. 16Nɩ ɔmɔ́ɔkʋsʋa amʋ́ mʋ́ a, mʋmʋ ɔmɔkʋsʋa Kristo ɛ nɩ. 17Nɩ ɔmɔkʋsʋa Kristo a, mʋmʋ kpaalɩ mlɩlahɔ mʋ gyi. Idesuna ánɩ́ mlɩlasin lakpantɔ. 18Mʋmʋ ɩtra desuna ánɩ́ Kristo ahogyipʋá bawu ɛ bafwɩ. 19Nɩ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ nkpa nkʋlɛsʋ anɩ ansɩdɩn Kristosʋ mʋ́ a, mʋmʋ anɩ ɩla bʋ nwɛ dʋn ɔhagyiɔha.
20Tamɛ ɔnɔkwalɩá ɩda gyi, Bulu lakʋsʋa Kristo tsu afulitɔ. Kristo labwɛ aha ánɩ́ Bulu ɔbɔ́kʋsʋatɔ ogyankpapʋ. 21Alɩ amʋʋ lowu lɛba tsʋn nyankpʋsasʋ amʋ a, alɩ kɛn kʋsʋ tsu afulitɔ ɛ ɩlɛba tsʋn nyankpʋsasʋ nɩ. 22Tsufɛ alɩ amʋʋ aha bʋtowu amʋ́a Adam ɩkʋlɛbwɛ sʋ amʋ a, alɩ kɛn amʋ́a Kristo ɩkʋlɛbwɛ sʋ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bénya nkpa nɩ. 23Tamɛ anɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ bʋ mʋ brɛ. Kristo Bulu legyankpa kʋsʋa tsu afulitɔ. Nɩ Kristo oyinki ba a, mʋ ɛ ɔbɔ́kʋsʋa mʋ aha fɛ́ɛ́. 24Mʋ́ ɔma a, Kristo obégyi ɔŋɛtɔ tumi lalahɛ, iwiegyi pʋ́ tumiá ɩdɛ ɔyɩsʋ gyi fɛ́ɛ́sʋ asa ɔyɩ ɔbɔ́mɔ ɔnɔ. Mʋ́ ɔma a, obéyinkia iwiegyi amʋ wa anɩ Sɩ Bulu ɩbɩtɔ. 25Tsufɛ ilehian ánɩ́ Kristo obégyi iwie kpɛfʋn brɛá alagyi mʋ alupʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ, pʋ mʋ ayabi tsa amʋ́sʋ. 26Olupʋ trahɛá ɔbɛ́hɩ gyi lowu. 27Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ ɩlɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Bulu lɔpʋ togyitɔ wa mʋ asɩ.” Ɩnɩ imosuna ánɩ́ Bulu bʋ Kristo asɩ. 28Nɩ Kristo ogyi togyitɔsʋ ta a, ɔbɔ́pʋ ɩwɩ wa Bulu asɩ. Mʋlɛha mʋ tumi dɩnka togyitɔsʋ, fówun Bulu ɛ obégyi togyitɔá ɩbʋ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛsʋ.
29Nɩ Bulu mɔ́ɔkʋsʋa awupʋ a, ntogyi sʋ aha bʋdɛ asu bɔ ha aha ánɩ́ bawu? Ntogyi sʋ bɛ́ha bɔ́bɔ amʋ́ asu ha amʋ́? 30Ntɛ ntogyi sʋ anɩ mʋ́ abɔ́pʋ anɩ nkpa plei bregyibrɛ? 31Mɩ apio, nɛkasɛ, ntefia alowusʋ ekekegyiɛkɛ! Igyi tɔá ntɔpʋtsu ɩwɩá mlɩa anɩ Wie Kristo Yesu mlɩlabwɛ ɩkʋlɛ. 32Mʋ́ sʋ kpaalɩ nɔkɔ Efesofɔá bʋgyi fɛ mbwɩkɩta-atɔ? Nɩ Bulu mɔ́ɔkʋsʋa awupʋ mʋ́ a, “Mʋmʋ mlɩha agyi, awɩ, anun, tsufɛ ɔkɛ sɛsɛbrɛ anɩlawu.” Fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ.
33Mlɩmáha aha ánɩ́ bʋtɛblɩ asʋn anfɩ odu abʋmlɛ mlɩ! Tsufɛ ahandɛ bɛɛ, “Mba lalahɛ gyi teyinta ɔha.” 34Mlɩlabwɛ agywɩɩn wanklaan, amlɩsi lakpan bwɛ. Tsufɛ mlɩtɔ akʋ bʋtepi bʋmeyin Bulu. Ndɛ asʋn anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ pʋsʋpa mlɩ.
Ɔyʋlʋá Abɔ́pʋkʋsʋ Tsu Afulitɔ
35Ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́fɩtɛ ɔbɛɛ, “Nkalɩ Bulu ɔbɔ́kʋsʋa awupʋ? Ɔyʋlʋ mɔmʋ bɔ́pʋkʋsʋ?” 36Ɔha mimlahɛ! Bɩá nɩ fodu atɔ-abi a, ɩtɔplɔ asa ɩtɔkwɛ. 37Megyi itobi amʋʋ fɔpʋwa ɔsʋlʋtɔ amʋ gyi ɔban amʋʋ ɩtɛdan amʋ. 38Bulu tɛha mʋ́ ɔyʋlʋ pɔpwɛá mʋ onuto odekle. Ɔtɛha atɔ-abi kugyikʋ mʋ́ ɔyʋlʋ ɔtsan.
39Alɩ amʋʋ atɔ-abi ɔtsan-ɔtsan bʋ ɩnʋ amʋ a, alɩ togyitɔ ɔyʋlʋ igyi ɔtsan nɩ. Anyankpʋsa, mbwɩ, mbubwi pʋ́ ntsutso aye fɛ́ɛ́tɔ okugyiɔkʋ ɔyʋlʋ ɔtsan.
40Ɔsʋsʋ-atɔ bʋ ɩnʋ, ɔsʋlʋsʋ-atɔ ɛ bʋ ɩnʋ. Mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbʋ ɔyʋlʋ ɔtsan-ɔtsan. Ɔsʋsʋ klɛ numnyam ɔtsan, ɔsʋlʋsʋ klɛ ɛ numnyam ɔtsan. 41Owi numnyam igyi ɔtsan ha ɔtsra. Ɔtsra klɛ ɛ igyi ɔtsan ha ntsrakpabi. Ɔtsrakpabi kugyikʋ na ɔtsan, mʋ́ numnyam ɛ ɩna ɔtsan ha mʋ́ ba.
42Alɩ ɩbɔ́bwɛ brɛá Bulu ɔbɔ́kʋsʋa awupʋ nɩ. Anɩ ɔsʋlʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ itowu, plɔ anfɩ ɩbɔ́tsʋn ɔtsan ha mʋ́á Bulu ɔbɔ́kʋsʋa tsu afulitɔ, tsufɛ mʋ́ mʋ́ imóowu ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 43Anɩ ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ tɔpɔn brɛá bopula mʋ́, tamɛ nɩ Bulu ɔkʋsʋa mʋ́ a, itenya ɔwʋnlɩn, wa numnyam. 44Ɔsʋlʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ igyi sei, tamɛ nɩ Bulu ɔkʋsʋa mʋ́ a, ɩbɔ́bwɛ ɔŋɛtɔ ɔyʋlʋ. Tsufɛ alɩ amʋʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ bʋ ɩnʋ amʋ a, alɩ ɔŋɛtɔ klɛ ɛ bʋ ɩnʋ nɩ. 45Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛbla anɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Adam gyankpapʋ amʋ lɔbwɛ ɔkɩankpapʋ.” Tamɛ Adam trahɛ, ogyi Kristo amʋ mʋ́ gyi Ɔŋɛá ɔtɛha nkpa. 46Ɔsʋlʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ anɩtegyankpa nya asa anɩtebenya ɔŋɛtɔ klɛ. 47Ɔsʋlʋtɔ-ɩsɩ Bulu lɔpʋpwɛ nyankpʋsa gyankpapʋ, ogyi Adam amʋ. Kristo, amʋʋ obuo amʋ mʋ́ otsu ɔsʋsʋ. 48Nyankpʋsa okugyiɔkʋ bʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ fɛ Adam, tamɛ anɩ ɔsʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ mʋ́ ɩbɔ́bwɛ fɛ Kristo klɛ. 49Alɩ amʋʋ anɩgyi fɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ Adam amʋ a, alɩ kɛn abɔ́bwɛ fɛ Kristo amʋʋ otsu ɔsʋsʋ amʋ ɛ ɛkɛkʋ nɩ.
50Apio, tɔá ndɛblɩ gyi, anɩ ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ igyi ɔyʋlʋ mʋ́a obugya anfɩ iméenya ogyikpa Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ. Tɔá iteyinta ɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ nya ogyikpa tɔá ɩtamayintatɔ.
51Tamɛ mlɩyaa asʋ amlɩnu asʋn ŋainhɛ kʋá Bulu lalɛ suna mɩ. Ɔbɛɛ, megyi anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ obówu, tamɛ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔyʋlʋ ɩbɛ́tsɛ. 52Nɩ ɔkpɛ trahɛ ɩfʋlɩ pɛ a, anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ abɛ́tsɛ ɔtsawʋlɛ pɛ. Bulu ɔbɔ́kʋsʋa awupʋ amʋ. Amʋ́ ɔyʋlʋ ɩmɛ́ɛtra yinta, ɔbɛ́tsɛ anɩ nkpa atsiapʋ ɛ fɛ́ɛ́. 53Tsufɛ ilehian ánɩ́ Bulu ɔbɛ́tsɛ anɩ ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ itowu plɔ anfɩ, ha anɩ ɔyʋlʋá ɩtamawu, ɩtamaplɔ. 54Nɩ ɩba mʋ́tɔá Bulu latsɛ tɔá itowu, bwɛ mʋ́ tɔá ɩtamawu, tɔá ɩtɔplɔ ɛ labwɛ tɔá ɩtamaplɔ a, ɩnʋ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ anfɩ ɩbɛ́ba mʋ́tɔ nɩ. Ɔbɛɛ, “Batu lowu asɩ plɩplɩplɩplɩ. Ɩsʋgyi onuto laba.”
55Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ kʋ ɛ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Oo lowu, nkʋnʋ fʋ ɔkpɛ bʋ?
Nkʋnʋ fʋ ɩsʋgyi bʋ?”
56Lakpan igyi ɔkpɛá ɩtɔmɔ, Mose mbla amʋ ɛ ɩtɛha lakpan tumi. 57Nkalɩ kʋraa abɔ́kʋkʋ da Bulu ɩpan? Mʋlaha anɩlatsʋn anɩ Wie Yesu Kristosʋ gyi asʋ.
58Mʋ́ sʋ apio adwɛpʋ, mlɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin, mlɩmákpɩnkɩ. Mlɩsi mlɩ ɩwɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ha Bulu agyʋma bregyibrɛ, tsufɛ mlɩyin ánɩ́ mlɩ gyumagyihɛ mɔ́ɔbwɛ kpaalɩ.

Title: 1 KORINTOFƆ 16
Content:
Ɩtswɩtswɩ Ha Yerusalem Ahianfɔ
1Ɩtswɩtswɩ ha Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ Yerusalem asʋn amʋ ɛ a, mlɩbwɛ mʋ́ fɛ alɩ amʋʋ nɛbla ɔpasua amʋʋ ɩbʋbʋ Galatia ɔmátɔ mbɛɛ, bʋbwɛ mʋ́ amʋ. 2Ɔhagyiɔha ɔkɩ mʋ kɔba alɩá otenya ɔnɔ, ɔlɛ kʋ yaɩ Kwasiedagyikwasieda. Mlɩmágyo mlɩaa, mba asa amlɩtswɩtswɩ mʋ́. 3Nɩ nɛba a, nɔ́wanlɩn nwʋlʋ ha aha ánɩ́ mlɩ onuto mlɛ́lɛ mlɩaa, bʋpʋ atɔ amʋ ya Yerusalemfɔ, pʋlɛ amʋ́ suna amʋ́. 4Nɩ ɩbʋ alɛá nɔ́yɔ a, mʋmʋ bóbuo mɩ yɔ.
Paulo Ɔkpatu Nhɩhɩɛ
5Nɩ nɔkʋsʋ tsu Makedonia a, nɛ́ba mlɩ wa, tsufɛ ndekleá nɔ́tsʋn ɩnʋ asa nɛba. 6Fialɩ nétsia mlɩ wa kpalobi. Fialɩ kʋraa nétsia ɩnʋ nyankpʋ mʋ́a atsalɩ brɛ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́, fówun mlɩlasi mɩ ɔkpa nayɔ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛá nɔ́yɔ. 7Sei mʋ́ a, mmedekleá nɛ́ba bɛka tsʋn mlɩ wa kɛkɛ. Nɩ Bulu lotsula a, nétsia mlɩ wa kpalobi.
8Tamɛ nétsia Efeso nfɩ kpɛfʋn Pentekoste ɛkɛ amʋ. 9Tsufɛ ɔkpa kpɔnkpɔntɩ lafinki ha mɩá nɔ́yɔ agyʋma ánɩ́ ɩbɔ́wa labi. Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá mɩ alupʋ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋbʋ nfɩ mʋ́.
10Nɩ Timoteo owie mlɩ wa a, mlɩmáha ifu ɩkɩta mʋ. Tsufɛ anɩ Wie agyʋma amʋ kɛn ɔdɛyɔ fɛ mɩ. 11Mlɩmáha ɔhaa ɔkɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ kotikoti. Mlɩsi mʋ ɔkpa wanklaan oyinki bɔtʋ mɩ, tsufɛ ntsie ngyo mʋa anɩ apio atrahɛ amʋ.
12Anɩ pio Apolo asʋn amʋ a, nalɩɩ mʋsʋ mbɛɛ, obuo apio amʋ ba mlɩ wa, tamɛ omedekleá ɔbɛ́ba sei. Nɩ onya ɔkpa a, ɔbɛ́ba.
Asʋn Trahɛ
13Mlɩda ɩwɩsʋ, amlɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin mlɩ hogyitɔ. Mlɩwa klʋn, amlɩwa ɩwɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. 14Mlɩpʋ ɔdwɛ bwɛ mlɩ togyitɔ.
15Mɩ apio, mlɩyin ánɩ́ Stefana mʋa mʋ woyitɔ aha gyi agyankpapʋá bɛdamli klʋntɔ Akaia nsaɩntɔ. Basi ɩwɩ ha, bʋdɛ Bulu aha amʋ sum. 16Nokokoli mlɩ, mlɩba ɩwɩasɩ ha amʋ́a aha ánɩ́ bɛ́ba bɛtsɩa amʋ́tɔ, bɔ́pʋ nsi yɔ agyʋma amʋ.
17Ansɩ lagyi mɩ ánɩ́ Stefana mʋa Fortunato pʋ́ Akaiko baba mɩ wa. Tsufɛ bʋdɛ mlɩ ɔbwɛkpa bwɛ. 18Bawa mɩ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn wanklaan, fɛ alɩ amʋʋ bɔwa mlɩ amʋ. Mlɩbu aha anfɩ odu.
19Ɔpasua amʋʋ ɩbʋ Asia amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋdɛ mlɩ tsia ha. Akwila mʋa Priska pʋ́ ɔpasua amʋʋ ɩbʋ amʋ́ woyitɔ amʋ ɛ bɛha mlɩ tsia wanklaan anɩ Wie ɩdatɔ. 20Apio aba amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛha mlɩ itsia gyagyagya.
Mlɩlata aba puta Kristotɔ.
21Mɩ Paulo onuto lapʋ mɩ ɩbɩ wanlɩn ɩnɩ, ndɛpʋha mlɩ tsia.
22Nɩ ɔkʋ tamadwɛ anɩ Wie Yesu a, ɩlwɩɩ dɩn mʋsʋ!
Marana-ta! (Mʋ́ asɩ gyi, “Anɩ Wie, ba!”)
23Anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ogyi mlɩ bʋalɛ.
24Anɩa anɩ Wie Kristo Yesu ɩkʋlɛbwɛ sʋ ntɛhɩɛ dwɛ mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́. Amen!

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 1
Content:
1Mɩ Pauloá ɩna Bulu apɛtɔ nabwɛ Kristo Yesu sumbi ɔyɔpʋ pʋ́ anɩ pio Timoteo dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn.
Anɩdɛ mʋ́ wanlɩn sɩsɩ Bulu ɔpasua ánɩ́ ɩbʋ Korinto wulutɔ pʋ́ Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ Akaia ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
2Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋgyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, abʋha mlɩ iwilwii.
Paulo Bulu Ɩpanda
3Mlɩha akanfʋ Bulu. Mʋgyi anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo mʋ Sɩ pʋ́ mʋ Bulu. Mʋgyi anɩ Sɩá otowun anɩ nwɛ, pʋ́ anɩ Buluá otolwii anɩ klʋn ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ! 4Otolwii anɩ klʋn anɩ asʋn wunhɛ kugyikʋtɔ, mɛnɩ anɩ ɛ abɛ́talɩ pʋ klʋn lwiihɛ amʋʋ anɩlanya tsu mʋ wa amʋ lwii anɩ aba klʋn amʋ́ asʋn wunhɛtɔ. 5Alɩ amʋʋ Kristo lɛhɩɛ wun ipian kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ, anɩ ɛ anɩdɛ mʋ́ kʋ wun amʋ a, alɩ kɛn Bulu na Kristosʋ ɔhɩɛ ɔdɛ anɩ klʋn lwii nɩ. 6Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ anɩdɛ ipian wun a, mlɩ iwilwii pʋ́ mlɩ nkpahɔ sʋ anɩdɛ mʋ́ wun. Tsufɛ Bulu dɛ anɩ klʋn lwii, mɛnɩ anɩ ɛ abólwii mlɩ klʋn, fówun mlɛ́talɩ nya klʋn, tomi wun anɩ ipian amʋ odu kɛn. 7Ifu mɛdɛ anɩ mlɩ sʋ, tsufɛ anɩyin ánɩ́ anɩa mlɩnyɔ dɛ ipian amʋ wun. Mʋ́ sʋ Bulu obólwii mlɩ klʋn fɛ anɩ.
8Apio, ɩbʋ alɛá mlɛ́bɩ ánɩ́ ɩwɩɔsɩn amʋʋ anɩlowun Asia ɔmátɔ amʋ ɔnɔ lɛhɩɛ wa ɔnlɩn. Ilekle ɩdʋn anɩ. Ifu lɛkɩta anɩ, anɩkɩá abówu kokooko. 9Ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn, ɩlɔbwɛ anɩ fɛ baha anɩ lowu ɩpɔn. Tamɛ alɩá anɩmɔ́ɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka anɩ ɩwɩsʋ, mboun Buluá ɔtɔkʋsʋa awupʋsʋ sʋ ɩlɛba alɩ. 10Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, ɔlɛlɛ anɩ tsu lowutɔ. Anɩlahogyiá obétsia lɛ anɩ bregyibrɛ. 11Ɔbɛ́lɛ anɩ, tsufɛ mlɩdɛ mpaɩ bɔ anɩ nwunsʋ. Ɩnɩ sʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛ́da Bulu ɩpan anɩ nwunsʋ.
