Tsufɛ alawa awɩtɔlɛ ha anɩ, mpaɩ amʋʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋdɛbɔ ha anɩ amʋ sʋ.
Paulo Nhɩhɩɛ Tsɛ
12Abɛ́talɩ pʋ ɩbɩ si kantɔ anɩaa, anɩ klʋn mɔkʋha anɩ pɔn anɩ nkpatɔ, titriu anɩa mlɩnyɔ natɩtɔ. Megyi anɩ ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ nyansa anɩlɔpʋ anɩdɛ anɩ agyʋma yɔ, mboun Bulu awɩtɔlɛ sʋ anɩlatalɩ lɛ ɩwɩtɔ anɩdɛ togyitɔ bwɛ ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ. 13-14Tsufɛ megyi asʋn ánɩ́ mlɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ kla, nu mʋ́ asɩ anɩtɔwanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ. Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá mlɩmɛdɛ mʋ́ asɩ nu yi, tamɛ nahogyiá mlóbonu mʋ́ asɩ wanklaan ɛkɛkʋ. Fówun mlɩ ɛ mlɛ́talɩ pʋ anɩ tsu ɩwɩ, fɛ alɩá anɩ ɛ abɔ́pʋ mlɩ tsu ɩwɩ anɩ Wie ɔbakɛ amʋ.
15Mɩ ansɩ dɩn asʋn anfɩsʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɔbwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ nɛ́ba mlɩ wa, mɛnɩ mlénya oyula anyɔ. 16Mʋ́gyi, nɔ́tsʋn mlɩ wa yɔ Makedonia. Nɩ neyinki ɛ nɛ́latsʋn mlɩ wa; fówun mlɛ́talɩ si mɩ ɔkpa, néyinki ba Yudea ɔmátɔ. 17Mlɛ́fɩtɛ mlɩaa, ntogyi sʋ nalatsɛ mɩ agywɩɩn. Ntɛ nabwɛ fɛ ɔyɩtɔ aha amʋʋ bʋtɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Ee” latsɛ amʋ́ ɔnɔ bɛɛ “O-o” amʋtɔ ɔkʋ? 18Alɩ amʋʋ Bulu bʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ, ɔtamawa afunu amʋ a, alɩ mɩ “Ee” igyi mɩ “Ee” nɩ. 19Tsufɛ Bulu mʋ Bi Yesu Kristo amʋ tamablɩ ɔbɛɛ “Ee” latsɛ mʋ́ ɔbɛɛ “O-o.” Mʋ mʋ́ a, “Ee” koun ototsula. Mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn ɔkan mɩa Silas pʋ́ Timoteo anɩlɛda suna mlɩ nɩ. 20Tsufɛ mʋtotsula “Ee” ha Bulu nhɩhɩɛ kugyikʋ ɩtɛba mʋ́tɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ akanfʋ Bulu ta a, anɩtɛblɩ anɩaa, “Amen!” nɩ. 21Bulu tɛha anɩa mlɩnyɔ anɩtɛtalɩ lɩɩ kinkiinkin anɩa Kristonyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ. Mʋgyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɛda anɩ ofuli. 22Mʋ kɛn lɔpʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ wa anɩ klʋntɔ, pʋhɩɛ anɩ nsʋ; isuna ánɩ́ mʋbʋ anɩ. Ɔbɔ́bwɛ tɔá ɔlɛhɩɛ ha anɩ.
23Bulu ɔbɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ nɩ megyi ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla. Alɩá mmɛ́ɛba bowun tsitsa kʋkʋ blɩ tsu mlɩ ɩwɩ sʋ mmɛtra bɔtsʋn ɩnʋ. 24Anɩmedekleá ɩbɔ́bwɛ fɛ anɩdɛ mlɩ hɩɛ alɩá mlɔ́pʋ mlɩ hogyi yɔ agyʋma. Mboun alɩá ansɩ bégyi mlɩ sʋ anɩa mlɩnyɔ anɩdɛ agyʋma yɔ. Anɩyin ánɩ́ mlɩ hogyi sʋ mlɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin dodo.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 2
Content:
1Mʋ́ sʋ nabwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ mmɛ́ɛtra ba bɔwa mlɩ awɩrɛhɔ. 2Tsufɛ nɩ nɛba bɔwa mlɩ awɩrɛhɔ a, ma ɔbɛ́ha ansɩ bégyi mɩ dʋn mlɩ amʋʋ nawa awɩrɛhɔ amʋ? 3Mʋ́ sʋ nɔwanlɩn ɔwʋlʋ gyankpapʋ amʋ sɩsɩ mlɩ nɩ. Fówun nɩ nɛba a, mlɩ amʋʋ mlɛ́ha ansɩ bégyi mɩ amʋ mlɩmɛ́ɛla ha awɩrɛhɔ mboun ɩkɩta mɩ. Tsufɛ mɩ ansɩ dɩn mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ ánɩ́ nɩ ansɩ dɛ mɩ gyi a, mlɩ ɛ ansɩ bégyi mlɩ. 4Megyi ansigyi nɔpʋwanlɩn ɔwʋlʋ amʋ. Asʋn ɩhɩɛ dɛ mɩ han, ndesu asa nɔwanlɩn mʋ́! Tamɛ megyi alɩá nɛ́ha mlégyi awɩrɛhɔ sʋ nɔwanlɩn mʋ́. Mboun alɩá mlɛ́bɩá ntɛhɩɛ dwɛ mlɩ sʋ.
Lakpansikie
5Ɔha amʋʋ ɔlɔpʋ asʋn ba ɔpasua amʋtɔ amʋ mɔkʋpʋ ɔlala gyi mɩ. Nɩ bɛɛ bʋkɩ mʋ́ a, ɔpasua amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ alapʋ asʋn gyi. (Mmedekleá nɔ́dʋn mʋ́ blɩ.) 6Ɩsʋbɩtɩ amʋʋ mlɩ ɔdʋdʋɔ mlɩlɛbɩtɩ mʋ amʋ ɩtsɔ mʋ. 7Ɩlafʋn ánɩ́ mlésikie mʋ, yia mʋ klʋn ngya. Fowun asʋn mɔ́ɔdʋn mʋ, ɩwɩ móowu mʋ. 8Mʋ́ sʋ nokokoli mlɩ, mlɩlɛ suna mʋ ánɩ́ mlɩtra mlɩbʋ mʋ ɩwɩ ɔdwɛ. 9Ndekleá nɛ́bɩ nɩ mlɩtegyi mɩ asʋn amʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɔwanlɩn ɔwʋlʋ amʋ nɩ. 10Nɩ mlesikie ɔkʋ a, mɩ ɛ nasikie mʋ. Nɩ nesikie mʋ ɛ a, mlɩ sʋ nasikie mʋ Kristo ɩdatɔ, nɩ ilehian nɩ. 11Mɛnɩ Ɔbʋnsam oméenya anɩ ɩwɩ ɔkpa, tsufɛ anɩyin ɩkpa ánɩ́ ɔtɔtsʋn mʋ́sʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
Paulo Klʋn Mɛdɩ Mʋ Asɩ
12Brɛá nɛba Kristo asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan ɔdakpa Troa wulutɔ a, nowun ánɩ́ anɩ Wie lafinki ɔkpa ha mɩ. 13Tamɛ mɩ klʋn mɛdɩ mɩ asɩ, tsufɛ mmɔtʋ mɩ pio Tito ɩnʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɛkla amʋ́ ka tsʋn yɔ Makedonia nsaɩntɔ.
Ɩsʋgyi Kristo Ɩdatɔ
14Tamɛ ndɛ Bulu ɩpan da ánɩ́ Kristo ɩsʋgyi sʋ alabwɛ anɩ ndoun, alakpa anɩ buo ɩwɩ, anɩdɛ mʋ ɩsʋgyi amʋ nkɛ gyi. Nɩ ayɔ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ a, ɔtɔtsʋn anɩsʋ bla aha amʋ Kristo asʋn wanklaan amʋ, fɛ alɩá ofobi fanfan tɔwa ɔfan yɔ tsutsuutsu. 15Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, Kristo gyi atɔ tɔhɛ, anɩgyi mʋ́ ɔfan ánɩ́ ɩdɛkʋsʋ ha Bulu, ha aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ nkpa nya pʋ́ amʋ́á bʋdɛfwɩ fɛ́ɛ́. 16Itobon aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛfwɩ, kpa amʋ́ ya lowutɔ, ɩtɔwa aha ánɩ́ ɔdɛ amʋ́ nkpa hɔ ɔfan, kpa amʋ́ ya nkpatɔ. Ma mɛɛ lɔfʋn ha gyʋma anfɩ odu yɔ? Ɔhaa má ɩnʋ. 17Anɩ mʋ́ anɩmegyi fɛ aha ɔdʋdʋɔá bʋdɛ Bulu asʋn amʋ fɛ pʋkle kɔba. Ɩnɩá Bulu lɔwa anɩ sʋ a, anɩtɛblɩ mʋ́ ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ, fɛ Kristo asumbiá bʋlɩɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 3
Content:
Bulu Ntam Pɔpwɛ Asumpʋ
1Asʋn anfɩ anɩdɛblɩ anfɩ ɩtra desuna ánɩ́ anɩdɛ ɩwɩ kanfʋ suna mlɩ loo? Ntɛ ilehian ánɩ́ abɔ́pʋ anɩ adansɩɛ nwʋlʋ ba mlɩ, ntɛ abɔ́hɔ mʋ́ tsu mlɩ wa fɛ alɩá akʋ bʋtɔbwɛ? 2Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Mlɩ onuto tsiatɔ gyi adansɩɛ nwʋlʋá bawanlɩn dɩnka anɩ klʋnsʋ, ɔhagyiɔha dɛ mʋ́ wun kla, pʋbɩ ánɩ́ anɩdɛ agyʋma wanklaan yɔ. 3Mlɩgyi ɔwʋlʋá Kristo lɔwanlɩn, ɩlɔtsʋn anɩsʋ ba. Tamɛ megyi oyipɛ ɔlɔpʋwanlɩn mʋ́, Bulu Ɔkɩankpapʋ amʋ Ɔŋɛ ɔlɔpʋwanlɩn mʋ́. Megyi abwi pɛtɛplɛ anyɔsʋ ɛ ɔlɔwanlɩn mʋ́ dɩnka, mboun anyankpʋsa klʋnsʋ.
4Anɩbʋ ɔkpa blɩ alɩ, tsufɛ Kristo sʋ anɩ ansɩ dɩn Bulusʋ. 5Anɩyin ánɩ́ anɩmɔfʋn ánɩ́ abɛ́talɩ bwɛ tɔtɔ anɩ onuto ɩwɩsʋ. Bulu sʋ anɩlɔfʋn ha togyitɔ bwɛ. 6Mʋlaha anɩlabwɛ mʋ ntam pɔpwɛ amʋ asumpʋ. Megyi ɩbɩ Bulu lɔpʋwanlɩn mʋ́ mʋ́, mboun Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ. Tsufɛ mbla wanlɩnhɛ amʋ ɩtɔpʋ lowu ba, tamɛ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ klɛ amʋ mʋ́ ɩtɔpʋ nkpa ba.
7Mbla dada amʋʋ Bulu lɔwanlɩn dɩnka abwi anyɔsʋ amʋ ɩlɔpʋ lowu ba. Tamɛ mʋ́ numnyam lɛha Mose ansɩtɔ lɛhɩɛ wankɩ asa ɔlɔpʋba Israelfɔ. Brɛá numnyam amʋ ɔnɔ ɩdɛ asɩba o a, bʋmɛtalɩ kɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ. 8Ɩnɩá mbla wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lenya numnyam alɩ a, mʋmʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ gyumagyihɛ numnyam ɩbɛ́hɩɛ dʋn mʋ́! 9Mbla wanlɩnhɛ amʋʋ ɩtɛha anɩtegyi ɩpɔn amʋ kʋraa ɩbʋ numnyam. Mʋmʋ nkalɩ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ gyumagyihɛ amʋʋ ɩhɩɛ bʋ numnyam dʋn mʋ́ amʋ ɩbɔ́bwɛ? Tsufɛ ɩtɛha anɩtegyi asʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ! 10Mʋmʋ idesuna ánɩ́ Bulu mbla dada amʋ ɩtra ma numnyam kʋraa. Pɔpwɛ anfɩ numnyam lagyi mʋ́sʋ. 11Tsufɛ nɩ Mbla dada amʋʋ imetsia wa ɔpá amʋ ɩbʋ numnyam alɩ a, mʋmʋ pɔpwɛ anfɩ ibétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ anfɩ klɛ ɩbɛ́hɩɛ dʋn mʋ́!
12Anɩ ansɩ dɩn ntam pɔpwɛ anfɩsʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩbʋ ɔkpa tɔɩ faan. 13Anɩmegyi fɛ Moseá oletsia pʋ tati bun nwun, mɛnɩ Israelfɔ bʋmóowun mʋ ansɩtɔ wankɩ brɛá mʋ́ ɔnɔ ɩdɛ asɩba. 14Tamɛ mʋ́ o a, Bulu lɛha amʋ́ klʋntɔ lɔwa odwin bɔfʋn ndɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ bʋdɛ Bulu mbla dada amʋ kla amʋ́ ofiakpa a, bʋtamanu mʋ́ asɩ, tsufɛ tati amʋ letin amʋ́ agywɩɩn. Tɔtɔ mɛ́ɛtalɩ bwii tati amʋ lɛ amʋ́ agywɩɩnsʋ, nkɛtɩ amʋ́a Kristo babwɛ kʋlɛ. 15Bɔ́tʋ ndɛ kʋraa nɩ bʋdɛ Mose mbla amʋ kla a, tati amʋ ɩtra bun amʋ́ agywɩɩnsʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ bʋtamanu mʋ́ asɩ. 16Tamɛ nɩ ɔha onya damli klʋntɔ ba anɩ Wie wa pɛ, Kristo labwii tati amʋ lɛ mʋ agywɩɩnsʋ. 17Anɩ Wie amʋʋ asʋn anfɩ ɩdɛtɔɩ tsu mʋ ɩwɩ amʋ gyi Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ nɩ. Ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛá Ɔŋɛ amʋ ɩbʋ a, ɩwɩgyi tetsia ɩnʋ. 18Anɩ Wie dɛ tati amʋ bwii lɛ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ansɩtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩdɛ mʋ numnyam amʋ lɛ suna nɩ. Mʋ Ɔŋɛ amʋ laha anɩdɛ mʋ lɩan, tsufɛ mʋ numnyam amʋ ɩtra dɛwankɩ anɩtɔ tsɩa.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 4
Content:
Ɔlɔtɔ Siadɩɛ
1Bulu lawun anɩ nwɛ pʋ agyʋma anfɩ wa anɩ ɩbɩtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ abatɔ tamawu anɩ. 2Anɩlakina tɔá ɩbʋ pɛlɩ pʋ́ okluntɔ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́. Anɩmɛdɛ aha mlɛ, anɩmɛdɛ Bulu asʋn amʋ ɛ damli bun. Mboun anɩdɛ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ onuto blɩ pʋlɛ ɩwɩ suna aha fɛ́ɛ́, ɩwankɩ amʋ́ alɩá anɩgyi Bulu ansɩtɔ. 3Nɩ tɔkʋ ibun asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ anɩdɛblɩ amʋsʋ kʋraa a, aha amʋʋ bʋdɛfwɩ amʋ nkʋlɛ ibun ha. 4Ɔbʋnsam gyi ɔyɩ lalahɛ anfɩsʋ ogyipʋ. Mʋlapʋ atɔ tin aha anfɩ bʋtamahɔ Bulu gyi anfɩ ansibi. Mʋ́ sʋ bʋmɛdɛ asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ igyi wankɩ amʋ asɩ nu nɩ. Wankɩ amʋ gyi Kristo. Mʋlɛhɩɛ lɩan Bulu numnyam nɩ. 5Tsufɛ anɩmɛna anɩmɛdɛ anɩ onuto ɩwɩ asʋn ɔkan da. Yesu Kristo ɩwɩ asʋn ɔkan anɩdɛda anɩaa, mʋgyi anɩ Wie. Tɔá anɩtɛblɩ tsu anɩ ɩwɩ gyi, Yesu sʋ anɩlabwɛ mlɩ asumpʋ. 6Tsufɛ Bulu amʋʋ ɔlɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Wankɩ ɩdalɩ tsu okluntɔ!” amʋ kɛn laha mʋ wankɩ amʋ ɩdɛwankɩ anɩ klʋntɔ. Ɩlaha anɩlabɩ ánɩ́ mʋ numnyam amʋ ɩdɛwankɩ Yesu Kristo ansɩtɔ.
7Tamɛ anɩgyi fɛ nlɔ pwɛhɛá siadɩɛ bʋ mʋ́tɔ. Siadɩɛ amʋ gyi wankɩ mʋ́a tumi anfɩ ɩdɛwankɩ anɩ klʋntɔ. Idesuna ánɩ́ tumi kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ anfɩ imotsu anɩ, Bulu wa itsu. 8Bʋdɛ anɩ han ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ, tamɛ bʋmɔkʋtalɩ sa anɩ tin. Ɩwɩ dɛ anɩ klɩ, tamɛ ɩmɔkʋkpɔn anɩ. 9Bʋdɩn anɩsʋ, tamɛ Bulu mɔkʋsi anɩ ha. Bʋtɛfɩn anɩ da, tamɛ Bulu sʋ anɩmɔkʋwu. 10Anɩlatsula ɩdɛ anɩ ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ ipian bregyibrɛ. Anɩdewu fɛ Yesu, mɛnɩ mʋ nkpa amʋ ɩbɛ́lɩn ɔwan anɩtɔ. 11Yesu sum sʋ anɩ nkpa atsiapʋ anfɩ anɩtefia lowu bregyibrɛ. Alɩá ɩbɔ́bwɛ mʋ nkpa bɛlɩn ɔwan anɩ ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ idewu anfɩtɔ sʋ. 12Ɩnɩ desuna ánɩ́ lowu dɛ anɩ lala, mlɩ ɛ mlɩdɛ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata nya.
13Tamɛ anɩbʋ mʋ́sʋ anɩdɛ Bulu asʋn amʋ ɔkan da. Tsufɛ anɩlɔhɔ mʋ gyi fɛ alɩá Israel ɩlʋ ɔwapʋ amʋ lɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɔhɔ Bulu gyi. Mʋ́laha sʋ ndɛ mʋ́ ɔkan da nɩ.” 14Anɩyin ánɩ́ alɩ amʋʋ Bulu lɔkʋsʋa anɩ Wie Yesu tsu afulitɔ amʋ a, alɩ kɛn ɔbɔ́kʋsʋa anɩ, ɔbɛ́kpa anɩa mlɩnyɔ fɛ́ɛ́ ba mʋ ɩwɩ wa nɩ. 15Ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔ́wa labi ha mlɩ, mɛnɩ nɩ Bulu hɩɛ ɔdɛ awɩtɔlɛ wa, kpa aha ɔdʋdʋɔ ba Kristo wa a, bɛ́hɩɛ da mʋ ɩpan, wa mʋ numnyam.
Hogyi Pʋtsia
16Mʋ́ sʋ abatɔ tamawu anɩ. Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá anɩ ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ idewu mʋ́, tamɛ Bulu dɛ anɩ ɔkla ɔwʋnlɩn wa ekekegyiɛkɛ. 17Tsufɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn kpalobi anfɩ anɩdewun sei anfɩ ɩbɛ́ha abénya numnyam kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩá ɩtamata, ɩdʋn ɩwɩɔsɩn anfɩ. 18Mʋ́ sʋ anɩmɛdɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn anfɩ anɩdewun anfɩ bu. Mʋ́á nyankpʋsa ansibi tamawun ɔkpa anɩdɛkɩ. Tsufɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn anfɩ ɩbɛ́ba bɔtsʋn. Ansigyi amʋʋ ɩbʋ ɔma, ibétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ amʋ ɔkpa anɩdɛkɩ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 5
Content:
1Anɩ ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ igyi fɛ kantankpa ánɩ́ anɩtsie mʋ́tɔ. Nɩ bobwie mʋ́ a, Bulu ɔbɛ́ha anɩ obu bamba ɔsʋsʋ. Mʋmʋ a, megyi nyankpʋsa leyi mʋ́. Mʋ onuto leyi mʋ́, imóobwie ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 2Tsufɛ sei kʋraa ɩdɛ anɩ ipian ɔsʋlʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ anfɩtɔ. Anɩhɩɛ anɩgyo ɛkɛá ɔbɔ́pʋ anɩ ɔsʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ wa anɩ fɛ atadɩɛ. 3Mʋmʋ anɩmɔ́ɔbwɛ fɛ ɔŋɛá ɩma ɔyʋlʋ, anɩna yaya. 4Ɩdɛ anɩ pian, anɩdɛkɩmɩ brɛ anfɩ anɩtra anɩbʋ anɩ ɔyʋlʋ dada anfɩtɔ. Megyi bɛɛ anɩdekleá awu, adalɩ ɔyʋlʋ anfɩtɔ. Mboun anɩdekleá Bulu ɔwa anɩ ɔsʋsʋ klɛ amʋʋ ɩtamawu plɔ amʋ, mɛnɩ ibégyi mʋ́ anfɩ itowu plɔ anfɩsʋ. 5Bulu onuto lɛla anɩ yaɩ ha mʋ́, ɔlɔpʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ wa anɩtɔ. Mʋ́gyi ibwiá ɔlɛdɩnka mʋ́sʋ nɩ.
6Mʋ́ sʋ anɩtɔwa klʋn bregyibrɛ. Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá brɛ anfɩ anɩbʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ anfɩtɔ a, anɩbʋ ɩfɔ anɩ Wie wa. 7Ɩnɩ sʋ hogyi anɩlapʋ anɩtsie nkpa, megyi tɔá ansibi dewun. 8Ee! Anɩhɩɛ anɩdɛ klʋn wa, tsufɛ tɔá anɩhɩɛ anɩdedunka gyi abɔ́wa ɩfɔ ɔsʋlʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ wa, ayetsia anɩ Wie wa. 9Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ anɩbʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ nfɩ o, ɔtɩnɛ bamba o, tɔá ɩdɩn anɩ klʋnsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́ gyi, abɔ́bwɛ tɔá ibégyi anɩ Wie ansɩ. 10Tsufɛ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ abɛ́yɛlɩɩ Kristo ansɩtɔ, obégyi anɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ asʋn, ka mʋ ɩkɔ anɩ ɔsʋlʋsʋ-ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ bwɛhɛ ɔnɔ. Yile igyi o, lalahɛ igyi o.
Bulu Onyawielɛ
11Anɩhɩɛ anɩyin ánɩ́ ilehian ánɩ́ abénya anɩ Wie ifu. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩdɛtɔɩ kpla aha anɩaa, amʋ́ ɛ bʋnya mʋ ifu. Bulu hɩɛ oyin anɩ. Nahogyiá mlɩ ɛ mlɩyin anɩ mlɩ klʋntɔ. 12Megyi ɩwɩ anɩtra anɩdetsu suna mlɩ. Mboun anɩdɛ mlɩ ɔkpa suna, mɛnɩ mlótsu ɩwɩ anɩ sʋ. Fówun nɩ aha bʋdɛ ɩwɩ tsu tɔá ɔha tɔpʋ ansibi wun sʋ, imegyi tɔá ɩbʋ ɔha klʋntɔ sʋ a, mlénya ɩkʋ bla amʋ́. 13Tsufɛ nɩ bɛɛ anɩ nwun layinta kʋraa a, Bulu asʋn igyi. Tamɛ nɩ bɛɛ anɩ ansɩtɔ da mʋ́ a, ɩda ha mlɩ. 14Ɔdwɛ amʋʋ Kristo bʋ ha anɩ amʋ dɛ anɩ kpa, tsufɛ anɩlanu ɩwɩasɩá mʋ nkʋlɛ lowu ha aha fɛ́ɛ́. Mʋ́ sʋ mʋa aha fɛ́ɛ́ bawu. 15Olowu ha aha fɛ́ɛ́ lɛlɛ, mɛnɩ aha ánɩ́ bénya nkpa pɔpwɛ amʋ bʋmɛ́ɛtra tsia nkpa alɩá bʋdekle. Mboun bétsia nkpa ha Kristo amʋʋ olowu, Bulu lɔkʋsʋa mʋ ha amʋ́ amʋ.
16Ɩnɩ sʋ anɩtra anɩmɛdɛ ɔhaa kɩ fɛ alɩá ɔyɩtɔ aha bʋtɛkɩ mʋ. Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá brɛ amʋ anɩletsia kɩ Kristo fɛ alɩá ɔyɩtɔ aha bʋtɛkɩ mʋ, tamɛ anɩtra anɩmɛdɛ mʋ kɩ alɩ. 17Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ ɔha mʋa Kristo bɔbwɛ ɩkʋlɛ a, alabwɛ ɔha pɔpwɛ. Mʋ tsiatɔ dada amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩlatsʋn. Mʋ tsiatɔ labwɛ pɔpwɛ! 18Nkpa pɔpwɛ anfɩ itsu Bulu wa. Mʋlɔtsʋn Kristosʋ bwɛ anɩ anfɩ anɩgyi mʋ alupʋ anfɩ mʋ anyawie. Alapʋ agyʋma anfɩ wa anɩ ɩbɩtɔ, ɔbɛɛ alɛ aha bamba ɛ anyawie ha mʋ. 19Tsufɛ Bulu lɔtsʋn Kristosʋ ɔdɛ ɔyɩtɔ aha damli bwɛ mʋ anyawie. Ɔtra ɔmɛdɛ amʋ́ lakpan ɩwɩ akunta bu ha amʋ́. Ɩnɩ ɔlɔpʋwa anɩ ɩbɩtɔ ɔbɛɛ, abla aha nɩ.
20Kristo atsɩamɩ anɩgyi, Bulu dɛtɔɩ tsʋn anɩsʋ ha mlɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩlɩɩ Kristo ɔlɩɩkpa anɩdɛ mlɩ kokoli anɩaa, “Mlɩha Bulu ɔbwɛ mlɩ mʋ anyawie!” 21Tsufɛ Kristo mɔbwɛ lakpan kʋkʋ! Tamɛ Bulu lɔpʋ mʋ bɔ afɔdɩɛ anɩ lakpan sʋ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́tsʋn anɩa mʋnyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛsʋ tsu anɩ ánɩ́ anɩ asʋn da ɔkpa mʋ ansɩtɔ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 6
Content:
1Anɩa Bulunyɔ dɛ agyʋma yɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩdɛ mlɩ kokoli anɩaa, mlɩmáha Bulu awɩtɔlɛ amʋʋ mlɩlanya amʋ ɩbwɛ kpaalɩ. 2Tsufɛ Bulu lɛblɩ mʋ asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ ɔbɛɛ,
“Brɛa mɩ brɛ lɔfʋn ánɩ́ nówun aha nwɛ a,
nonu mlɩ ɔmɛ.
Mɩ nkpa ɔhɔkɛ amʋ ɩlɔfʋn a, negyi mlɩ bʋalɛ.”
Mlɩnu! Brɛ amʋ lafʋn a. Ndɛ gyi mlɩ nkpa ɔhɔkɛ amʋ nɩ!
3Anɩmedekleá abétin ɔhaa anɩ Wie wa ba ɔkpa, mɛnɩ ɔhaa méenya asʋansʋ blɩ tsu anɩ agyʋma anfɩ ɩwɩ. 4Mboun anɩ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ a, anɩtɛlɛ suna ánɩ́ Bulu asumbi anɩgyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ. Anɩtotomi anɩ ɩwɩɔsɩn, anɩ ɩkplan pʋ́ anɩ asʋn wunhɛ kugyikʋ ɛtɔ. 5Bɛpɩtɩ anɩ atɔ, wa anɩ obu, bɛkpa bun anɩsʋ da anɩ. Anɩlɔyɔ agyʋma ánɩ́ ɩdʋn anɩ. Nkɛkʋ anɩtamadɩdɩ, nkɛkʋ ɛ anɩtetsia akʋn. 6Anɩlɔtsʋn anɩ tsiatɔsʋ lɛ suna ánɩ́ ifin kʋkʋ má anɩ ɩwɩ. Anɩyin asʋn, anɩtenya ɩklʋn. Anɩbʋ awɩtɔlɛ, Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ tsie anɩtɔ. Anɩtɛhɩɛ dwɛ aha ɛ tsu anɩ klʋntɔ. 7Anɩtɛda Bulu asʋn amʋ ɔkan ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ pʋ́ Bulu tumitɔ. Yilebwɛ gyi ɩsa-akɔtɔá anɩdɛpʋkɔ aha, anɩdɛpʋtin anɩ ɩwɩ ɛ. 8Akʋ bʋtobu anɩ, akʋ ɛ bʋtɔsʋpa anɩ. Akʋ bʋtɛkanfʋ anɩ, akʋ ɛ bʋtɔkpɔɩ anɩ. Anɩ asʋn da ɔkpa, tamɛ bʋdɛ anɩ bu afunupʋ. 9Fɛ anɩmegyi tɔtɔ aha ansɩtɔ, tamɛ aha anɩgyi. Fowun anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩdewu nɩ, tamɛ kɩ, anɩbʋ nkpa. Bʋtesian anɩ mɔ, tamɛ anɩtɛdalɩ mʋ́tɔ. 10Anɩbʋ ɩwɩɔsɩntɔ, tamɛ Kristo sʋ anɩbʋ ansigyitɔ. Ahianfɔ anɩgyi, tamɛ anɩlaha aha bamli ɩwɩ anyapʋ. Anɩmá tɔtɔ, tamɛ anɩbʋ togyitɔ Kristo sʋ.
11Korintofɔ! Anɩtɛhɩɛ nya mlɩ ɩwɩ ansigyi, lɛ ɩwɩtɔ bla mlɩ asʋn. 12Anɩtamakʋla ɩwɩ mlɩsʋ, tamɛ mlɩ mʋ́ mlɩdɛ ɩwɩ kʋla anɩsʋ. 13Ndɛ mlɩ asʋn bla fɛ mɩ onuto abi. Mlɩ ɛ mlɩmápʋ asʋansʋ ŋain anɩ.
Ɔmátɔfɔ Pʋgyi Mba
14Mlɩa ɔmátɔfɔ mlɩmágyi mba. Nkalɩ yile mʋ́a lalahɛ bɛ́talɩ tsia tsukʋlɛ? Nkalɩ wankɩ mʋa oklun ɛ bɔ́bwɛ kʋlɛ? 15Kristo mʋa Ɔbʋnsam bɛ́talɩ bwɛ agywɩɩn kʋlɛ? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Nkalɩ ohogyipʋ mʋa ɔha ánɩ́ ɔma hogyi bɔ́bwɛ kʋlɛ? 16Nkalɩ bɔ́tswɛ ɔkpɩ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa? Tsufɛ anɩgyi Bulu Ɔkɩankpapʋ amʋ ɔtswɛkpa nɩ. Igyi fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
“Bulu ɔbɛɛ, ‘Nétsia mɩ ahatɔ,
mɩa amʋ́nyɔ abɛ́natɩ.
Nɔ́bwɛ amʋ́ Bulu,
amʋ́ ɛ bɔ́bwɛ mɩ aha.> ”
17Bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ ɛ bɛɛ,
“Anɩ Wie Bulu ɔbɛɛ,
‘Mlɩdalɩ amʋ́tɔ, amlɩmaɩn ɩwɩ lɛ amʋ́sʋ.> ”
Bɛtra wanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
“Mlɩmáwa ɩbɩ lalahɛtɔ,
mɩ anhɔ mlɩ.”
18Bɛtra wanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
“Bulu ɔbɛɛ, ‘Nɔ́bwɛ mlɩ Sɩ,
mlɩ ɛ mlɔ́bwɛ mɩ abi.>
Alɩ anɩ Wie Otumipʋ dɛblɩ nɩ.”

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 7
Content:
1Mɩ apio adwɛpʋ, Bulu lahɩɛ ntobiá igyi alɩ yaɩ anɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha afwɩ ɩbɩ lɛ togyitɔá ɩbɔ́kpɔɩ anɩ ɔyʋlʋ pʋ́ anɩ ɔkla fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. Mlɩha anya Bulu ifu, mɛnɩ ɩbɛ́ha anɩ ɩwɩ bɛtɩn, ifin kʋkʋ mɛ́ɛtra tsia anɩ ɩwɩ.
Paulo Ansigyi
2Kokoli, mlɩmákʋla ɩwɩ anɩsʋ! Anɩmɔkʋpʋ lalahɛ gyi ɔhaa. Anɩmɔkʋyinta ɔhaa, anɩmɔkʋsisi ɔhaa ɛ. 3Megyi ɩpɔn ndɛ mlɩ ha sʋ ndɛ asʋn anfɩ blɩ. Tsufɛ nablɩ bɔtsʋn mbɛɛ, anɩtekle mlɩ asʋn. Lowutɔ o, nkpatɔ o, anɩmɛ́ɛtan mlɩsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 4Ntɛtalɩ bla mlɩ mɩ klʋntɔ asʋn, ndɛ ɩwɩ ɛ tsu mlɩsʋ wanklaan. Anɩ ipian fɛ́ɛ́ ɔma a, mlɩlawa mɩ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn. Ansigyi kpɔnkpɔntɩ kʋ labʋla mɩ klʋntɔ.
5Tsufɛ brɛá anɩlowie Makedonia a, anɩmenya ɔkpa da ɔkpʋnʋ. Atsʋn nfɩ asʋn, ayinki nfɩ ɩtrɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ ifu letsia anɩ ayetɔ. 6Tamɛ Buluá otolwii aha amʋʋ ɩwɩ lawu amʋ́ ɩklʋn amʋ lɛkpa Tito ba anɩ, pʋlwii anɩ ɩklʋn. 7Megyi mʋ ɩba amʋ nkʋlɛ lɛha ɩklʋn lolwii anɩ, mboun asʋn ánɩ́ ɔlɔpʋtsua ɩnʋ ba ɛ. Ɔlɛbla anɩ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩhɩɛ mlɩdekleá mlówun mɩ. Alɩá asʋn amʋ ɩlahan mlɩ, mlɩlanu ɩwɩasɩ ánɩ́ mlɩmɛbɩ bwɛ pʋ́ alɩá mlɩlahɩɛ tsula dɩnka mɩ klɛsʋ, sʋ ansɩ lɛtra gyi mɩ tsɩa.
8Tsufɛ nɩ mɩ ɔwʋlʋ amʋtɔ asʋn lɛhan mlɩ kʋraa a, mɩ mʋ́ ɩmɛhan mɩ. Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá ɩlɛhan mɩ brɛ kʋtɔ, tsufɛ nowun ánɩ́ ɩlɛha awɩrɛhɔ lɛkɩta mlɩ kpalobi. 9Ansɩ dɛ mɩ gyi sei. Megyi alɩá ɩlɔwa mlɩ awɩrɛhɔ sʋ. Mboun alɩá awɩrɛhɔsu amʋ ɩlaha mlɩladamli klʋntɔ sʋ. Tsufɛ mlɩ awɩrɛhɔsu anfɩ odu Bulu tekle nɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ mɩ asʋn amʋ imeyinta tɔtɔ tsu mlɩ ɩwɩ. 10Tsufɛ awɩrɛhɔsuá igyi Bulu apɛ tɔpʋ klʋntɔdamli ba. Ɩtɛha anɩtenya nkpa. Mʋ́ odu bʋ ɔsɩn, tamɛ ɩma ɔsɩn. Ɔyɩtɔ awɩrɛhɔsu mʋ́ a, lowu ɩtɔpʋba. 11Mlɩkɩ tɔá awɩrɛhɔsuá igyi Bulu apɛ latɩ ha mlɩ! Ɩlaha mlɩlatsu ɩkʋ lɛ asʋn amʋtɔ, mlɩdesuna ánɩ́ mlɩ asʋn da ɔkpa sʋ ɔblɔ ɛ dɛ mlɩ. Ɩlatsii mlɩ opuni, ɩlaha mlɩhɩɛ mlɩdekleá mlówun mɩ. Mlɩlatsula dɩnka mɩ klɛsʋ. Mlɩhɩɛ mlɩdedunka ánɩ́ mlɛbɩtɩ lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋ amʋ ɩsʋ. Lɛlɛ, mlɩlalɛ suna ánɩ́ mlɩmegyi ɩpɔn asʋn anfɩtɔ.
12Nɔwanlɩn ɔwʋlʋ sɩsɩ mlɩ, tamɛ megyi aha anfɩ sʋ. Megyi ɔha amʋʋ ɔlɔbwɛ ɩla, ntɛ ɔha amʋʋ ɔlɔpʋ ɩla gyi mʋ amʋ sʋ. Alɩá nɛ́lɛ suna mlɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ ánɩ́ mlɩlatsula dɩnka mɩ klɛsʋ mboun sʋ. 13Ɩnɩ lahɩɛ wa anɩ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn.
Mʋ́a ɩdʋn kʋraa a, ansɩ legyi anɩ, brɛá anɩlowun ánɩ́ mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩlaha ansɩ dɛ Tito gyi, tsufɛ mlɩlaha ɩklʋn ladɩ mʋ asɩ. 14Nɩ nɛkanfʋ mlɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ kʋraa a, mlɩmɛha pɛlɩ mɛkɩta mɩ. Alɩ amʋʋ asʋn amʋʋ anɩlɛbla mlɩ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ a, alɩ kanfʋ amʋʋ nɛkanfʋ mlɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ amʋ ɛ laba mʋ́tɔ nɩ. 15Nɩ Tito ɔkaɩn alɩá mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩtɛyaa asʋ ha mʋ, hɔ mʋ asʋn blɩhɛ, pʋ́ alɩá mlɩtenya ifu kpɩnkɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ a, ɔtɛtra nya mlɩ ɩwɩ ɔdwɛ tsɩa. 16Ansɩ ɩhɩɛ dɛ mɩ gyiá nɛ́talɩ pʋ ansɩ dɩnka mlɩsʋ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 8
Content:
Akristofɔ Atokie
1Apio, anɩdekleá mlɩbɩ awɩtɔlɛá Bulu lawa ha ɔpasua amʋʋ bʋbʋ Makedonia ɔmátɔ amʋ. 2Ɩnɩá bʋbʋ ipian mʋ́a asʋn wunhɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔtɔ kʋraa a, bɔpʋ amʋ́ ohian fututuutu lɛ amʋ́ awɩtɔlɛ kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ suna ansigyisʋ tsʋn amʋ́ atokiehɛtɔ. 3Nɛ́blɩ mbɛɛ, bekie atɔ dʋn alɩá bɛtalɩ kʋraa, tsu amʋ́ klʋntɔ. 4Betsia kʋlɩ anɩ ɔkpa bɛɛ, aha amʋ́ ɛ abʋnya ɔkpa wa awɩtɔlɛ ha Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ Yerusalem. Fowun amʋ́ ɛ amʋ́ ɩbɩ bówie osum agyʋma anfɩtɔ. 5Bɔbwɛ dʋn alɩá anɩlosusu. Gyankpapʋ a, besi amʋ́ ɩwɩ ha anɩ Wie, bɛlasi amʋ́ ɩwɩ ha anɩ Bulu apɛtɔ. 6Mʋ́ sʋ anɩlaha Tito amʋʋ olegyankpa bɛha mlɩlɔwa nsi amʋ anɩaa, ɔtra yinki bɛha amlɩwa nsi mɔ mlɩ awɩtɔlɛ agyʋma amʋ ɔnɔ wanklaan. 7Mlɩlafʋn ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ, tsufɛ mlɩhɩɛ mlɩbʋ hogyi, mlɩyin tɔɩ, mlɩlɛtɩn ansɩ. Tɔtɔ tamakpɔn mlɩ, mlɩtɛhɩɛ dwɛ anɩ ɛ. Ndekleá mlɩbɔ mbɔdɩ awɩtɔlɛ agyʋma anfɩ ɛtɔ dʋn ɔhagyiɔha.
8Mmɛdɛ mlɩ hɩɛ mbɛɛ, mlɩbwɛ mʋ́. Mboun ndɛpʋ mlɩ ɔdwɛ kapʋ akʋá bʋdɛprɩá amʋ́ ɛ bɔ́bʋa. 9Tsufɛ mlɩyin alɩá anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo lɔdwɛ aha, wa awɩtɔlɛ. Ɩwɩ onyapʋ ogyi tɛkɩ, tamɛ anɩ sʋ ɔlɔbwɛ ɩwɩ ohiani, mɛnɩ abɔ́tsʋn mʋ ohian amʋsʋ bwɛ ɩwɩ anyapʋ.
10Mɩ agywɩɩn gyi, nɩ mlɔmɔ agyʋma amʋʋ mlɩlefi asɩ ofikʋ amʋ ɔnɔ a, ɩbɔ́wa labi ha mlɩ. Tsufɛ mlɩgyi ɔpasua gyankpapʋá mlɩlɔbwɛ agywɩɩn amʋ, mlɩ kɛn lefi mʋ́ asɩ. 11Mlɩwuna bwɛ mʋ́ ɩmɔ ɔnɔ. Mlɩlɛ ɩklʋntɔ bwɛ mʋ́, fɛ alɩá mlɩlefi mʋ́ asɩ. Mlɩkie mʋ́ mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔnɔ, mɛnɩ ɩbɛ́kana agywɩɩn amʋʋ mlɩlɔbwɛ amʋ. 12Nɩ ɩhɩɛ igyi mlɩ apɛá mlɛ́ha a, mlɩkie tɔá mlɩbʋ. Mʋ́tegyi Bulu ansɩ, megyi mʋ́á mlɩmá.
13Megyi bɛɛ, anɩdekleá abɛ́ha ɩwɩ bólwii akʋ, ɩwɩ ɩklɩ mlɩ mʋ́; mboun alɩá ɩwɩ bólwii mlɩa amʋ́nyɔ fɛ́ɛ́ kɛkɛ. 14Sei mlɩbʋ atɔ tsɔtsɔá mlɛ́talɩ pʋbʋa amʋ́. Mʋmʋ nɩ ɩwa alɛ ha amʋ́, ɩwɩ lɛklɩ mlɩ ɛ a, amʋ́ ɛ bɛ́talɩ bʋa mlɩ, mɛnɩ mlɩa amʋ́nyɔ fɛ́ɛ́ mlénya kɛkɛ. 15Mlɩkaɩn ánɩ́ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔha amʋʋ ɔlɛkpa tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ amʋ menya mʋ́ dʋbɩ. Ɔha amʋʋ ɔlɛkpa kpalobi amʋ ɛ klɛ lɔfʋn mʋ.”
Tito Mʋa Mʋ Aba
16Ada Bulu ɩpan ánɩ́ alaha Tito ɛ latsula dɩnka mlɩ klɛsʋ fɛ mɩ. 17Brɛá anɩlɔwa mʋ anɩaa ɔba mlɩ wa a, olotsula. Mʋ onuto o, ɩbʋ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɔbɛ́tra ba ɩnʋ. 18Anɩdɛ mʋa opio ɔkʋ wa sɩsɩ mlɩ. Ɔpasua amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋdɛ mʋ kanfʋ, asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan da sʋ. 19Makedonia ɔpasua amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ lɛlɛ mʋ ánɩ́ anɩa mʋnyɔ anatɩ ki, ahɔ atokiehɛ amʋ ya Yerusalem. Anɩdɛ atɔ anfɩ bwɛ pʋwa anɩ Wie numnyam, mɛnɩ ibósuna ánɩ́ anɩ onuto latsu dɩnka ɩwɩsʋá abɔ́bwɛ mʋ́.
20Anɩdɛ anɩ ɩwɩ kɩ wanklaan, mɛnɩ ɔhaa mɛ́ɛlɛ anɩ ɩla, tsu alɩá anɩlɔpʋ anɩdɛ atokiehɛ amʋsʋ kɩ. 21Tɔá anɩdesusu gyi, alɩá abɔ́bwɛ mʋ́á ɩda ɔkpa Bulu mʋa anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ ansɩtɔ.
22Ɩnɩ sʋ anɩlapʋ anɩ apio amʋtɔ ɔkʋ manta Tito anásʋ. Anɩlasɔ mʋ kɩ, anɩlawun ánɩ́ ɔhɩɛ ɔbʋ nsi. Alahɔ mlɩ gyi sei. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔhɩɛ odekleá ɔbɛ́tsa anɩ agyʋma amʋ yɔ. 23Nɩ ɔkʋ lɛfɩtɛ mʋsʋ a, mlɩbla mʋ mlɩaa, mɩa mʋnyɔ dɛ agyʋma yɔ pʋsum mlɩ. Makedonia ɔpasua lɔwa apio atrahɛ amʋʋ mʋa amʋ́nyɔ bɛba amʋ. Ɩnɩ desuna ánɩ́ Kristo bʋdɛ numnyam wa. 24Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩlɛ mlɩ ɔdwɛ suna amʋ́. Isuna ɔpasua amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ánɩ́ mlɩ sʋ anɩbʋ ɔkpa tsu ɩwɩ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 9
Content:
Akristofɔá Bʋma Tɔtɔ Bʋa
1Imehian ánɩ́ nɔ́wanlɩn mlɩ ɔwʋlʋ tsu alɩá mlɩdɛ Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ Yerusalem bʋa ɩwɩ. 2Tsufɛ nyin ánɩ́ mlɩhɩɛ mlɩdekleá mlɔ́bʋa amʋ́. Nagyi mlɩ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ suna amʋ́ mbɛɛ, tsu ofikʋ ɔpá Akristofɔá bʋbʋ Akaia ɔsʋlʋsʋ bɛda ɩwɩsʋ yaɩ ánɩ́ bɔ́bʋa. Mlɩ nsiwa laha ogya kʋ lawie amʋ́ ɔdʋdʋɔtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ amʋ́ ɛ bafi mʋ́ asɩ. 3Tamɛ ndɛ apio anfɩ wa sɩsɩ mlɩ, isuna ánɩ́ megyi kpaalɩ negyi mlɩ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ suna amʋ́. Mlɩda ɩwɩsʋ, fɛ alɩá nɛbla mlɩ yaɩ, amlɩka mlɩ tswɩtswɩ fɛ́ɛ́. 4Tsufɛ nɩ Makedonia Akristofɔ amʋtɔ akʋ bobuo mɩ ba ɩnʋ, bowun ánɩ́ mlɩmɔkʋda ɩwɩsʋ fɛ alɩá nɛbla amʋ́ a, abɔ́sʋpa amʋ́ ansɩtɔ, tamɛ mlɔ́sʋpa dʋn mɩ. 5Mʋ́ sʋ nabwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ nɛ́ha Tito mʋa mʋ aba amʋ abʋgyankpa ba mlɩ wa, ɩha amlɩdunka tɔá mlɩlɛhɩɛá mlɛ́ha yaɩ. Tamɛ mlɩha mʋ́ tsu mlɩ klʋntɔ, megyi ɔhɩɛ igyi.
6Mlɩkaɩn ánɩ́ ɔha ánɩ́ odu kpalobi a, kpalobi ɔtɔkpɔtɩ, tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ odu tsɔtsɔ tɔkpɔtɩ tsɔtsɔ. 7Mlɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ ɔhaa mʋ́á ɔbɛ́talɩ tsu mʋ klʋntɔ. Ɩmábwɛ ɔhɩɛ, tsufɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔpʋ ɔdwɛ kie atɔ asʋn Bulu tekle. 8Bulu tɛha mlɩ tɔá mlɩdehian bregyibrɛ, dʋn alɩá ilehian mlɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlénya tɔá ɩdɛ mlɩ hian bregyibrɛ. Ɩbɔ́fʋn mlɩ sian, mlɔ́pʋbwɛ yile ha aha bamba. 9Fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
“Bulu ɔha tɛlɛ ɩwɩtɔ kie ahianfɔ atɔ.
Mʋ yilebwɛ tamata.”
10Bulu tɛha adɔtɔpʋ atɔ-abi bʋtodu, ɔtɛha aha atogyihɛ. Mlɩgyi fɛ amʋ́. Ɔbɛ́ha mlɩ atɔ-abiá mlɔ́pʋ ɩkʋ kie aha, atogyihɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛ́dalɩ tsu mlɩ yilebwɛ amʋtɔ. 11Ɔbɛ́hɩɛ yula mlɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ, mɛnɩ mlɔ́wa awɩtɔlɛ ha aha bregyibrɛ. Ɩnɩ ɩbɛ́ha aha amʋ bɛ́da Bulu ɩpan, atɔ amʋʋ mlɩlapʋtsʋn anɩsʋ ha amʋ́ amʋ sʋ. 12Tsufɛ atoku anyɔ ɔbɛ́dalɩ tsu mlɩ atɔ hahɛ anfɩtɔ. Megyi atɔ amʋʋ mlɩlapʋha Bulu aha amʋʋ atɔ dɛ amʋ́ hian, bʋbʋ Yerusalem amʋ nkʋlɛ, mboun ɩbɛ́ha aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bɛ́hɩɛ da Bulu ɩpan. 13Tsufɛ nɩ mlɛha amʋ́ a, ɩbɛ́ha bɛ́kanfʋ Bulu. Ibósuna ánɩ́ lɛlɛ mlɩdɛ Kristo asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ mlɩlɔhɔ amʋsʋ gyi, mlɩdɛ awɩtɔlɛ ɛ wa ha amʋ́a aha bamba. 14Bɛ́hɩɛ kaɩn mlɩsʋ, bɔ mpaɩ ha mlɩ, tsu awɩtɔlɛ kpɔnkpɔntɩ amʋʋ Bulu lapʋha mlɩ amʋ sʋ. 15Ada Bulu ɩpan ha mʋ atokiehɛ anfɩ ɩdʋn blɩ anfɩ!

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 10
Content:
Paulo Gyumagyihɛ Ɔnɔlɛ
1Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá mlɩtɔ akʋ mlɩtɛblɩ mlɩaa, nɩ mbʋ mlɩ wa a, mɩ asʋn lolwii, tamɛ ntɔwanlɩn mɩ nwʋlʋ tumisʋ. Tamɛ mɩ Paulo ndɛ mlɩ kokoli mbɛɛ, mlɩpʋkɩ alɩá Kristo asʋn lolwii, ɔlɛba ɩwɩasɩ. 2Mlɩtɔ akʋ bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, mɩ bwɛhɛ lalɩan ɔyɩtɔ aha. Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ nɛtra ba ɩnʋ a, nawun ánɩ́ ilehian ánɩ́ mɩ ansɩtɔ bɔ́wa ɔnlɩn. Kokoli, mlɩmáha ampʋ tsiatɔ anfɩ odu ba ɩnʋ. 3Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ anɩbʋ, tamɛ megyi ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ agywɩɩn anɩdɛpʋkɔ ɩsa. 4-5Megyi ɔyɩtɔ akɔtɔ anɩdɛpʋkɔ. Bulu akɔtɔá ɩbʋ tumi anɩdɛpʋbwie okpikplikpa kugyikʋá ɩtɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulusʋ. Anɩtɔpʋyinta afunu asʋn kugyikʋá aha bʋtɔpʋtsu ɩwɩ, ɩtɛha amʋ́ bʋtamabɩ Bulu. Anɩtɔpʋdamli agywɩɩn lalahɛ kugyikʋ, ha itobu Kristo. 6Nɩ mlɩ aha trahɛ amʋ mlɩlapʋ ɩwɩ ha Kristo, mlɩdɛ mʋ asʋnsʋ gyi a, abɛ́bɩtɩ aha amʋʋ bʋdɛ asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn wa amʋ ɛ asʋ.
7Mlɩkɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋʋ ɩda mlɩ ansɩtɔ amʋ. Nɩ mlɩdɛkɩá Kristo bʋ mlɩ a, mʋmʋ mlɩkɩ mʋ́ wanklaan, amlɩbɩá mʋbʋ anɩ ɛ. 8Nɩ ndɛ ɩwɩ tsu tumi amʋʋ anɩ Wie lapʋha anɩ amʋ sʋ dʋbɩ a, ɩma mɩ pɛlɩ. Tsufɛ ɔlɔpʋha anɩ ɔbɛɛ, apʋbʋa mlɩ amlɩdan. Megyi ɔbɛɛ, apʋyinta mlɩ. 9Ɩmábwɛ mlɩ fɛ ndɛ nwʋlʋ wanlɩn, pʋwa mlɩ ifu. 10Tsufɛ akʋ bɛɛ, “Mákpla Paulo. Mʋ asʋn wanlɩnhɛ bʋ odwin, ɔtɔpʋhɩɛ aha. Tamɛ nɩ mʋ onuto ɔbʋ anɩ wa a, ololwii, mʋ asʋn blɩhɛ ɛ ɩma ibia!” 11Ɩwankɩ amʋ́á asʋn ánɩ́ anɩtɔwanlɩn sɩsɩ aha kɛn anɩtɔbwɛ nɩ anɩbʋ amʋ́ wa nɩ.
12Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, amɛndɩ anɩgyiá abɔ́pʋ ɩwɩ kapʋ aha anfɩ bʋdɛ ɩwɩ kanfʋ anfɩ? Amʋ́ wʋlɛwʋlɛ dɛpʋ ɩwɩ kapʋ aba, bʋdɛ ansɩ pʋdɩnka abasʋ. Mimla igyi amʋ́. 13Anɩ mʋ́ anɩmóotsu ɩwɩ dafa, mboun ɔkpa amʋʋ Bulu lɛhɩɛ ha anɩ amʋ ɔnɔ abótsu ɩwɩ fʋn. Mʋ́gyi agyʋma ánɩ́ anɩlabwɛ bɔtʋ mlɩ nɩ. 14Anɩlegyankpa pʋ Kristo asʋn wanklaan amʋ ba mlɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ anɩdɛ mlɩ asʋn bla a, anɩmɔkʋtɔɩ dafa. 15Anɩmɛdɛpʋ ɔhaa agyʋma ɛ tsu ɩwɩ. Mboun anɩdɛ ɔkpa kɩ ánɩ́ mlɩ hogyi bɛ́dan. Agyʋma amʋʋ anɩdɛyɔ mlɩtɔ amʋ ɛ ɩbɛ́klɛɩ tsɩa. 16Mʋmʋ abɛ́talɩ dafa mlɩsʋ yɛda asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan ɔmá bamba ɛsʋ, mɛnɩ ɩmɔ́ɔbwɛ fɛ anɩlapʋ ɔtɩnɛá ɔkʋ lagyankpa yɔ agyʋma tsu ɩwɩ.
17Tamɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔbɛɛ, mótsu ɩwɩ a, ɔpʋ tɔá anɩ Wie labwɛ tsu ɩwɩ.” 18Tsufɛ nɩ Bulu ɔkanfʋ fʋ gyi asʋn, ɩwɩ kanfʋ mʋ́ kpaalɩ igyi.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 11
Content:
Paulo Mʋa Sumbi Ayɔpʋ Afunupʋ
1Mlɩnya klʋn, amlɩnu mɩ mimlala kpalobi anfɩ asɩ! Kokoli, mlɩnya klʋn ha mɩ. 2Mmesi mlɩ tswɩ, fɛ alɩá Bulu tamasi mlɩ tswɩ. Tsufɛ mlɩgyi fɛ obitebiá omeyin oyin, napʋ mlɩ ha oyin ɔkʋlɛ, ogyi Kristo. 3Tamɛ alɩ amʋʋ ɩwɔ amʋ lɔpʋ mʋ alapɛ mlɛ Hawa amʋ a, ifu dɛ mɩá ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́mlɛ mlɩ, mlɩ ansɩ bɛ́dɩnkɩ ɔnɔkwalɩwa pʋ́ ɔdwɛ wankɩhɛ amʋʋ mlɩbʋ ha Kristo amʋsʋ. 4Tsufɛ nyin ánɩ́ nɩ ɔkʋ ɔba bɛda Yesu bamba ɔkʋ ɩwɩ asʋn ɔkan suna mlɩ, imegyi ɔmʋamʋʋ anɩlɛda mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn ɔkan suna mlɩ amʋ a, mlɔ́kɔsɩ hogyi. Nɩ mlenya ɔŋɛ bamba kʋá ɩna ɔtsan ha mʋamʋʋ mlɩlegyankpa nya amʋ ɛ a, mlɔ́hɔ mʋ́ gyi. Alɩ kɛn nɩ mlonu asʋn bamba ánɩ́ ɩna ɔtsan ha mʋamʋʋ anɩlɛbla mlɩ amʋ ɛ a, mlɔ́kɔsɩ hɔ mʋ́sʋ gyi nɩ!
5Mmedehogyiá aha anfɩ bʋdɛ ɩwɩ tɩ “Sumbi ayɔpʋ akpɔnkpɔntɩ” anfɩ bʋdʋn mɩ ɔkpa ɔkʋkʋsʋ. 6Nɩ mmeyin tɔɩ kʋraa a, nyin asʋn ánɩ́ ndɛblɩ. Nahogyiá anɩlaha asʋn anfɩtɔ ɩlawankɩ mlɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ.
7Ɩnɩá nɔpʋ ɩwɩasɩba pʋ́ obú ha mlɩ brɛá nɛda Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan suna mlɩ, mmɔhɔ mlɩ tɔtɔ sʋ yɛ tsitsa nɔbwɛ a? 8Ɔpasua bamba atɔ nɔswɩɩ, pʋba bɔyɔ agyʋma ha mlɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɛtalɩ sum mlɩ, mmɔhɔ mlɩ tɔtɔ nɩ. 9Brɛá mbʋ mlɩ wa, ɩwɩ lɛklɩ mɩ a, mmesi ipian tswɩ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋsʋ. Mboun apio amʋʋ botsu Makedonia ba amʋ lɛha mɩ mɩ atohianhɛ. Ɩnɩ sʋ mmesi ipian dɩnka mlɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋsʋ, mméesi dɩnka ɛ. 10Ɩnɩá ɔnɔkwalɩ nenya ndɛblɩ tsu Kristo ɩwɩ mʋ́ a, ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ ka mɩ itin ɔbɛɛ, mmápʋ asʋn anfɩ tsu ɩwɩ Akaia ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́. 11Ntogyi sʋ? Ntamadwɛ mlɩ loo? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Bulu yin ánɩ́ ntɔdwɛ mlɩ!
12Nɔ́bwɛ mɩ agyʋma fɛ alɩá ndɛ mʋ́ bwɛ dodo. Nɔ́bwɛ mʋ́ pʋtin amʋ́ ɔkpa, nɩ bʋdɛ ɩwɩ tsu bɛɛ, gyʋma kʋlɛ anɩa amʋ́nyɔ anɩdɛbwɛ. 13Afunupʋ bʋgyi. Bapina bwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ Kristo sumbi ayɔpʋ, bʋna bʋdɛ mlɩ mlɛ. 14Tamɛ ɩma wanwan! Tsufɛ Ɔbʋnsam kʋraa tɛkɩ ansɩ bwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ wankɩhɛ! 15Mʋ́ sʋ ɩma wanwan ánɩ́ mʋ asumpʋ anfɩ ɛ bapina bwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ yile abwɛpʋ. Amʋ́ ɔnɔmɔ ɩbɛ́lɛ amʋ́ bwɛhɛ kugyikʋ ɔwan.
Paulo Asʋn Wunhɛ
16Ntra ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, ɔhaa mábu mɩ ɔha mimlahɛ. Tamɛ nɩ mlɩdɛ mɩ bu alɩ o a, mlɩtsu mʋ́ alɩ, mɩ ɛ anya ɔkpa tsu ɩwɩ kpalobi. 17Anɩ Wie tamatɔɩ alɩ, tamɛ nabwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ ɔha mimlahɛ. 18Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋtotsu ɩwɩ fɛ ɔyɩtɔ aha, sʋ mɩ ɛ nótsu ɩwɩ. 19Ee a, ɩnɩá mlɩaa atɩansɩpʋ mlɩgyi o a, mlɩtotsula ha aha mimlahɛ. 20Tsufɛ nɩ ɔkʋ ɔpʋ mlɩ bwɛ nkpábi kʋraa a, mlɩtotsula. Nɩ ɔpʋ mlɩ nya ɩwɩ, ogyi iwie mlɩsʋ, obu mlɩ tɔkʋ odu, ɔda mlɩ ɩsʋtɔ kʋraa a, mlɩtotsula ha mʋ. 21Mlɩaa, mma ansɩtɔ-ɔnlɩn. Ee, natsula. Mɩ klɛ ma ɩnʋ.
Tamɛ togyitɔá ɔkʋ labwɛ ɔdɛpʋtsu ɩwɩ a, mɩ ɛ nɛ́talɩ pʋ́ mɩ klɛ tsu ɩwɩ. (Tamɛ nahogyiá igyi mimlala.) 22Nɩ bɛɛ Hebrifɔ bʋgyi a, mɩ ɛ Hebriyin ngyi. Nɩ Israelfɔ ɛ bʋgyi a, Israelyin mɩ ɛ ngyi. Nɩ bɛɛ, botsu Abraham abi-anátɔ a, ɩnʋ mɩ ɛ notsu nɩ. 23Bɛɛ Kristo asumpʋ bʋgyi? Mblɩ mʋ́ mimlasʋ, ndʋn amʋ́! Nayɩrɩ ɩwɩ yɔ agyʋma dʋn amʋ́. Nadɩ obu dʋn amʋ́. Bada mɩ dʋn amʋ́. Nesian wu brɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔtɔ. 24Yudafɔ banwɛn mɩ mplɩ tse adʋasa-kweba (39) tse nu kɛkɛ. 25Romafɔ ɛ bapɩtɩ mɩ atɔ tse sa kɛkɛ. Bɛda mɩ abwi ɔtsawʋlɛ. Tse sa kɛkɛ ntsusʋ-yibi labun mɩ, nasin ntsutso ɛkɛwʋlɛ owitɔ. 26Mɩ ɔkpa tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ tutɔ a, nafa ntsu akpɔnkpɔntɩ, natsʋn ogyo atswapʋ ɩbɩtɔ dalɩ. Natsʋn ɔmá bambasʋfɔ pʋ́ anɩ pɩ Yudafɔ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbɩtɔ dalɩ. Natsʋn awulusʋ pʋ́ adimbisʋ, nafa ɔpʋ. Natsʋn aha amʋʋ bʋdɛ amʋ́ ɩwɩ tɩ bɛɛ, Akristofɔ amʋ aná fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbɩtɔ dalɩ. 27Nayɔ agyʋma kpekple, ɩlapian mɩ kɩ. Ntamadɩdɩ nkɛkʋ. Ntetsia akʋn mʋ́a ɔmɛwʋlɩ. Ntɛklɩ ɔnɔ, ntɛdɩ atsalɩ, natɩ yaya aná fɛ́ɛ́. 28Ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔma a, tɔá ɩdɩn mɩ klʋnsʋ, ntɔgywɩɩn mʋ́ ɩwɩ ekekegyiɛkɛ gyi ɔpasua amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ alɛwa. 29Ma lɔpɔn, mmotsu kʋkʋ lɛ mʋ asʋntɔ? Ma bɛkpa wa lakpantɔ, ɩmɔwa mɩ ɔblɔ.
30Nɩ bɛɛ ntsu ɩwɩ a, ntobiá ɩtɛha mɩ hogyi tɛba asɩ nɔ́pʋtsu ɩwɩ. 31Bulu, ogyi anɩ Wie Yesu mʋ Sɩ, ɔlɛkana kanfʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ amʋ yin ánɩ́ mmɛdɛ afunu wa. 32Owie dɛhɛn Areta lɛha mʋ ɔmásʋ ɔkɩpʋ lɛyɛtɛ mɩ Damasko wulu ɔnɔ, ɔkɩta mɩ. 33Tamɛ bɔpʋ mɩ wa lakpatɔ, lɛ mɩ tsʋn ikwitɔ, kplɩ mɩ yi buntiá bɔpwɛ wa wulu amʋ ɔma, nɛsrɩ si mʋ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 12
Content:
Paulo Atowunhɛ Pʋ́ Mʋ Atɔ Lɛsunahɛ
1Ilehian ánɩ́ nótsu ɩwɩ, tamɛ tɔtɔɔtɔ ɩma ɩwɩtsutɔ. Tamɛ mblɩ atɔá nowun pʋ́ tɔá anɩ Wie lalɛ suna mɩ. 2Nfi duana (14) nɩ, bɔwan mɩ ya ɔsʋsʋ sasɩtɔ. (Mɩ nyankpʋsa-oyi lɔyɔ ɩnʋ o, mɩ ɔkla o, mmɛ́ɛtalɩ bɩ. Bulu nkʋlɛ yin.) 3-4Fɛ alɩá nakʋblɩ a, bɔwan mɩ ya Paradiso. (Mɩ nyankpʋsa-oyi lɔyɔ ɩnʋ o, mɩ ɔkla o, mmɛ́ɛtalɩ bɩ. Bulu nkʋlɛ yin.) Nonu asʋn ánɩ́ ɩma blɩtɔ, ɔhaa ɛ má ɔkpa blɩ mʋ́. 5Nɛ́talɩ pʋ ɩtɔ amʋʋ nowun amʋ tsu ɩwɩ, tamɛ mmɔ́ɔpʋ mɩ atɔ bwɛhɛ tsu ɩwɩ. Ntobiá ɩtɛha mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔnɔ tɛba asɩ ntɔpʋtsu ɩwɩ. 6Nɩ mbɛɛ nótsu ɩwɩ kʋraa a, mmóotsu ɩwɩ fɛ ɔha mimlahɛ, tsufɛ nɛ́blɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ. Tamɛ mmɔ́ɔbwɛ. Mmedekleá ɔhaa ɔkɩ mɩ dafa alɩá mɩ tsiatɔ gyi, ntɛ asʋn amʋʋ nɔpʋba amʋ.
7Alɩá mmɔ́ɔpʋ ntobi anfɩ ɩbʋ ifu, ɩbʋ wanwan, Bulu lalɛ suna mɩ anfɩ tsu ɩwɩ sʋ a, ɔlɔpʋ owu kʋ wa mɩ awutɔ, igyi Ɔbʋnsam-ɔbɔpʋ. Ɩtɛda wɔ mɩ, mɛnɩ mmóotsu ɩwɩ. 8Nakokoli anɩ Wie Yesu tse sa kɛkɛ mbɛɛ, ɔlɛ ɩtɔ amʋ mɩtɔ. 9Tamɛ asʋn ánɩ́ ɔtɛbla mɩ bregyibrɛ gyi, “Mɩ awɩtɔlɛ pɛ gyi tɔá fehian. Tsufɛ ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔnɔ laba asɩtɔ mɩ tumi tɛhɩɛ lɩn ɔwan.” Ɩnɩ sʋ ɩbʋ mɩ ansigyiá nɔ́pʋ tɔá ɩtɛha mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔnɔ tɛba asɩ tsu ɩwɩ, mɛnɩ Kristo tumi amʋ ɩbɛ́hɩɛ bun mɩsʋ. 10Kristo sʋ ansɩ bégyi mɩ bregyibrɛ. Nɩ mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔnɔ ɩba asɩ, bʋdɛ mɩ sia, mbʋ ɩkplantɔ, bʋdɩn mɩsʋ, ntɛ ɩwɩ dɛ mɩ ɔsɩn. Tsufɛ nɩ mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔnɔ ɩba asɩ a, mʋ́ ntɛlanya ɔwʋnlɩn nɩ.
Korinto Ɔpasua Ɩwɩ Asʋn
11Nabwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ ɔha mimlahɛ, tamɛ mlɩlaha ɩlaba alɩ. Tɛkɩ ilehian ánɩ́ mlɛ́blɩ asʋn wanklaan tsu mɩ ɩwɩ. Tsufɛ ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá mmegyi tɔtɔ, tamɛ ndʋn “sumbi ayɔpʋ akpɔnkpɔntɩ” anfɩ mʋ́. 12Brɛá mbʋ mlɩ wa a, notomi bwɛ tɔá ɩbʋ wanwan pʋ́ osuna mʋ́a ofula ɔtsan-ɔtsan, pʋsuna mlɩ ánɩ́ lɛlɛ sumbi ɔyɔpʋ ngyi. 13Ntɔ dɛ mlɩ han? Tɔá nɔbwɛ mlɩtɔ, mmɔbwɛ ɔpasua bambatɔ gyi, mmesi ɩwɩ tswɩ mlɩsʋ. Kokoli, mlɩsikie mɩ!
14Sei a, otse sasɩ ndɛbwɛá nɛ́ba mlɩ wa a. Mmɛ́ɛba besi ɩwɩ tswɩ mlɩsʋ, tsufɛ mmɛdɛ tɔtɔ fɩtɛ tsu mlɩ wa. Mlɩ onuto ndehian. Kebi tamatsu mʋ sɩ wa akɔnkɔ, mʋ sɩ totsu mʋ wa akɔnkɔ. 15Ɩbʋ mɩ ɔdwɛá néyinta togyitɔá mbʋ mlɩ sʋ, si mɩ ɩwɩ fɛ́ɛ́ kʋraa ha mlɩ. Ɩnɩá ndɛ mlɩ dwɛ dʋbɩ alɩ a, ntogyi sʋ ɔdwɛá mlɩ mʋ́ mlɩbʋ ha mɩsʋ dɛdɩnkɩ?
16Fialɩ mlɩlawun ánɩ́ lɛlɛ, mmɛba besi ɩwɩ tswɩ mlɩsʋ, tamɛ mlɩdɛblɩ mlɩaa, nofwifwi ansɩ. Ndɛpʋ atɔ tsʋn mlɩ omua wa mlɩ ɔnɔ. 17Ɔkpa ɔmɔmʋsʋ? Nɔtsʋn aha amʋʋ nɔwa mlɩ wa amʋtɔ ɔkʋsʋ sisi mlɩ loo? 18Brɛá nokokoli Tito, nɔwa mʋa anɩ pio Okristoyin amʋ mlɩ wa mɛ, olebesisi mlɩ? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Tsufɛ agywɩɩn kʋlɛ mɩa mʋnyɔ anɩdɛpʋbwɛ toku kʋlɛ.
19Fialɩ mlɩdɛ mʋ́ tsu brɛ anfɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩaa, anɩdɛtɔɩ pʋka ɩwɩ lɛ. Megyi alɩ igyi. Akristofɔ anɩgyi, anɩdɛtɔɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ. Mɩ adwɛpʋ, anɩdɛ togyitɔ bwɛ pʋwa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. 20Tsufɛ ifu dɛ mɩá nɛ́ba mlɩmetsie wanklaan. Mʋ́ sʋ mɩ asʋn blɩhɛ bɔ́wɔ mlɩ asʋtɔ. Fialɩ nɔ́bɔtʋ ɩtrɛ, ɔnsɩpɛ, ɔblɔ, olu, ahasia, aha ɩwɩ asʋnblɩ, ɩwɩtsu pʋ́ abasʋda mlɩtɔ. 21Nhɩɛ ndɛ ifu nya ánɩ́ nɩ nɛba ɩnʋ a, mɩ Bulu ɔbɛ́tra ba mɩ asɩ mlɩ sʋ. Nósu, tsufɛ mlɩtɔ akʋ mlɩmɔkʋsi mlɩ lakpan dada amʋ bwɛ, damli klʋntɔ si mbʋatɔ, hakpanla pʋ́ ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ amʋ.

Title: 2 KORINTOFƆ 13
Content:
Ɩkla Pʋ́ Ɔlada
1Otse sasɩ nɛba mlɩ wa a. Bulu asʋn lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Asa mlɛ́ha ɔkʋ ɩpɔn a, mlɩnu adansɩfɔ abanyɔ ntɛ abasa ɔnɔ.” 2Brɛá nɛba mlɩ wa otse nyɔsɩ a, nɛda aha amʋʋ bʋdɛ lakpan bwɛ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔla. Ntra ndɛ amʋ́a aha trahɛ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔla da, tsufɛ nɩ nɛba ɩnʋ a, nɛ́hɩɛ bɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ. 3Tsufɛ mlɩdekleá mlɛ́bɩá lɛlɛ Kristo dɛtɔɩ tsʋn mɩsʋ. Kristo ɔwʋnlɩn ɔnɔ mɔkʋba asɩ mlɩtɔ. Mʋ tumi ɛ ɩhɩɛ tsɔ mlɩtɔ. 4Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá mʋ oyikpalihɛsʋ lowu ilosuna ánɩ́ alapɔn, tamɛ sei a, otsie nkpa Bulu tumitɔ. Brɛá anɩa mʋnyɔ anɩlɔbwɛ kʋlɛ a, anɩlɔpɔn, tamɛ sei anɩa mʋnyɔ anɩtsie nkpa Bulu tumitɔ. Mʋ́ anɩdɛpʋkpa mlɩ nɩ.
5Mlɩyɔ mlɩ nwuntɔ kɩ bɛɛ, ahogyipʋ onuto mlɩgyi? Mlɩkapʋ mlɩ ɩwɩ kɩ bɛɛ, lɛlɛ Kristo Yesu bʋ mlɩtɔ? Mlɩlawun ánɩ́ ɔbʋ mlɩtɔ? Nɩ mlɩmɔkʋwun mʋ mlɩtɔ mʋ́ a, mʋmʋ megyi ahogyipʋ onuto mlɩgyi. 6Nahogyiá mlɛ́ba bɛbɩ ánɩ́ Kristo ahogyipʋ onuto anɩgyi. 7Anɩdɛ Bulu kokoli anɩaa, mlɩmátra bwɛ lalahɛ kʋkʋ. Megyi alɩá ibósuna ánɩ́ anɩgyi Kristo ahogyipʋ onuto sʋ. Tamɛ nɩ aha bʋdɛkɩ bɛɛ megyi Kristo ahogyipʋ onuto anɩgyi o a, ɔha mlɩ mʋ́ amlɩbwɛ tɔá ɩda ɔkpa. 8Tsufɛ anɩ mʋ́ anɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ kʋsʋ lɩɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋsʋ, dʋn ánɩ́ abɛ́ha mʋ́ ɩbɔ́yɔ nkpa wʋlɛ. 9Nɩ anɩ mʋ́ anɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔnɔ laba asɩ, mlɩ klɛ ɩlawa ɔnlɩn a, ansɩ bégyi anɩ. Tɔá anɩdɛ Bulu kʋlɩ gyi, ɔha amlɩlalɩɩ kinkiinkin, amlɩdan Kristo hogyitɔ. 10Ɩnɩ sʋ nagyankpa ndɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ, asa amba ɩnʋ nɩ. Mɛnɩ nɩ nɛba a, mmóobotsu ɩbɩ mlɩsʋ. Tsufɛ ndekleá nɔ́pʋ tumi amʋʋ anɩ Wie lapʋha mɩ amʋ bʋa mlɩ amlɩdan. Mmɔ́ɔpʋyinta mlɩ.
11Apio, ɩtrahɛ a, ansɩ igyi mlɩ. Mlɩbɔ mbɔdɩ amlɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin, amlɩdan Kristo hogyitɔ. Mlɩwa aba ɔwʋnlɩn. Mlɩ agywɩɩn ɩbwɛ kʋlɛ, amlɩtsia iwilwiitɔ, mɛnɩ Bulu amʋʋ ɔtɔdwɛ anɩ, ɔtɛha anɩ iwilwii amʋ obétsia mlɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Nɛha mlɩ itsia gyagyagya.
12Mlɩha aba itsia, amlɩlata aba puta ɔdwɛsʋ.
Bulu aha amʋʋ bʋbʋ nfɩ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛha mlɩ itsia gyagyagya.
13Anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋalɛgyi, Bulu ɔdwɛ pʋ́ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ kʋlɛbwɛ itsia mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.

Title: GALATIAFƆ 1
Content:
1Mɩ sumbi ɔyɔpʋ Paulo dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn. Megyi anyankpʋsa ntɛ ɔhaa lɔwa mɩ. Yesu Kristo mʋa anɩ Sɩ Bulu amʋʋ ɔlɔkʋsʋa mʋ tsu afulitɔ amʋ lɔwa mɩ. 2Ndɛ mʋ́ wanlɩn sɩsɩ ɔpasua ánɩ́ ɩbʋ Galatia ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́. Mɩa Akristofɔá bʋbʋ nfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩdɛ mlɩ itsia ha anɩaa,
3“Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋgyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, abʋha mlɩ iwilwii.”
4Yesu anfɩ lesi ɩwɩ ha bɔmɔ mʋ anɩ lakpan sʋ, mɛnɩ ɔbɛ́lɛ anɩ tsu ɔyɩ lalahɛ anfɩtɔ; fɛ alɩ amʋʋ anɩ Sɩ Bulu lɛhɩɛ yaɩ amʋ. 5Akanfʋ Bulu brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Amen!
Asʋn Wanklaan Kʋkʋ Má Ɩnɩ Ɔma
6Mlɩ Galatiafɔ, mlɩ ɩwɩ lawa mɩ ifu ánɩ́ mlɩlawuna yinki Bulu ɔma. Bulu lɔtsʋn Kristo awɩtɔlɛsʋ tɩ mlɩ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩbɔbwɛ mʋ aha. Mlɩkɩ alɩá mlɩlawuna mlɩdɛ asʋn bamba hɔ mlɩaa, mʋ́gyi asʋn wanklaan amʋ. 7Tamɛ ɩna ɔtsan ha asʋn wanklaan amʋ. Aha akʋ dekleá béyinta mlɩ agywɩɩn, abʋtsɛ Kristo asʋn wanklaan amʋ. 8Tamɛ nɩ anɩ, ntɛ Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ ɔkʋ kʋraa lotsu ɔsʋsʋ ba, bɛda asʋn wanklaan bamba kʋ ɔkan suna mlɩ, ɩna ɔtsan ha mʋ́ amʋʋ anɩlɛbla mlɩ amʋ a, Bulu ɔlwɩɩ mʋ. 9Nakʋ blɩ asʋn anfɩ, tamɛ ntra ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, nɩ ɔkʋ ɔba bɛda Bulu asʋn wanklaan bamba kʋ ɔkan suna mlɩ, ɩna ɔtsan ha mʋ́ amʋʋ anɩlɛbla mlɩ amʋ a, Bulu ɔlwɩɩ mʋ.
10Megyi bɛɛ, ndekleá aha bʋdwɛ mɩ. O-o! Bulu mboun ndekleá ɔdwɛ mɩ. Nɩ ntra ndekleá aha bʋdwɛ mɩ a, tɛkɩ mmegyi Kristo osumbi.
Paulo Sumbi Ɔyɔpʋ Bwɛ
11Mɩ apio, ndekleá ɩwankɩ mlɩá Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ ndɛ mʋ́ ɔkan da amʋ imotsu nyankpʋsa agywɩɩntɔ. 12Megyi ɔhaa wa notsua mʋ́, ntɛ ɔkʋ losuna mɩ. Yesu Kristo onuto lɛlɛ mʋ́ suna mɩ.
13Tsufɛ mlɩlanu mɩ tsiatɔ asʋn, alɩá ngyi brɛá mbuo Yudafɔ-osum amʋ, pʋ́ alɩá nɛhɩɛ dɩnka Bulu ɔpasua amʋsʋ, nɔbɔ mbɔdɩá nɛ́hɩ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́. 14Nɔhɔ gyankpa mɩ abatɔ Yudafɔ-osum amʋtɔ, pʋ́ alɩá nɔwa nsi gyi mɩ anain amandɩɛ kugyikʋsʋ.
15Tamɛ Bulu lɔwa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ. Ɔlɛlɛ mɩ yaɩ tsu brɛá mbʋ mɩ yin ɩwɩtɔ, ɔlɛtɩ mɩ ɔbɛɛ, nyɔ mʋ agyʋma. 16Ɔlɛlɛ mʋ Bi amʋ suna mɩ, mɛnɩ nɛ́da mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn wanklaan ɔkan aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔtɔ. Mmɔyɔ ɔhaa wa mbɛɛ, osuna mɩ asʋn alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ. 17Mmɔyɔ Yerusalem mbɛɛ, noyowun Kristo sumbi ayɔpʋ amʋʋ bʋbʋ ɩnʋ asa nɛba amʋ ɛ. Mboun nɛnatɩ laa yɔ Arabia ɔsʋlʋsʋ, neyinki ba Damasko wulutɔ. 18Yesu lɛlɛ ɩwɩ suna mɩ. Mʋ́ ofi-sasɩtɔ a, nɔyɔ Yerusalem yowun sumbi ɔyɔpʋ Kefa ánɩ́ bʋtɛtra tɩ mʋ Petro, netsia mʋ wa nkɛ duanu. 19Mmɛtra wun sumbi ɔyɔpʋ ɔkʋkʋ dʋn anɩ Wie Yesu mʋ gyama Yakobo.
20Ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn ndɛwanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ. Bulu yin ánɩ́ mmɛdɛ afunu wa.
21Mʋ́ ɔma a, nɔyɔ Siria pʋ́ Kilikia ɔsʋlʋsʋ. 22Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, Akristofɔ ɔpasua amʋʋ ɩbʋbʋ Yudea ɔsʋlʋsʋ amʋ bʋmɔkʋnya bɩ mɩ. 23Mʋ́á bʋdenu tsu mɩ ɩwɩ fɛ́ɛ́ gyi, aha bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Oyin amʋʋ ɔdɩn anɩsʋ amʋ na ɔdɛ hogyi amʋʋ anɩdɛ mʋ́ asʋn blɩ, ɔdɛ anɩ itin ka amʋ kɛn ɔkan da.” 24Ɩna mɩ sʋ bɛkanfʋ Bulu.

Title: GALATIAFƆ 2
Content:
Paulo Mʋa Sumbi Ayɔpʋ Atrahɛ Amʋ
1Nfi duana ɔma a, mɩa Barnaba anɩlɛkpa Tito buo ɩwɩ, yinki yɔ Yerusalem. 2Bulu lɛlɛ suna mɩ ánɩ́ nyɔ ɩnʋ, sʋ nɔyɔ. Alɩá mɩ agyʋma mɔ́ɔbwɛ kpaalɩ sʋ a, negyankpa lɛ asʋntɔ suna ɔpasua ahandɛ amʋ nkʋlɛ ɩtsɛtɔ. Nɛbla amʋ́ asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ nna ndɛ mʋ́ ɔkan da aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔtɔ amʋ. Botsula dɩnka mʋ́sʋ. 3Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá Grikiyin Tito amʋʋ anɩlɛkpa buo ɩwɩ amʋ gyi, tamɛ bʋmɛhɩɛ mʋ bɛɛ, ɔtɩn kete. 4Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá Akristofɔ afunupʋ akʋá bɛkɩ ansɩ bowie anɩtɔ bekleá ɔtɩn kete. Tsufɛ bodunka ánɩ́ béyinta ɩwɩsʋtsia amʋʋ Kristo Yesu laha anɩ amʋ; abʋbwɛ anɩ amli nkpábi ha Yudafɔ mbla amʋ. 5Tamɛ anɩmesi ɩwɩ ha amʋ́ kpalobi kʋraa, mɛnɩ ɔnɔkwalɩá ɩbʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋtɔ ɩmɛ́ɛtsɛ ha mlɩ.
6Ɔpasua ahandɛ amʋʋ bʋbʋ ɩnʋ amʋ bʋmɛbla mɩ asʋansʋ bɛɛ, mpʋtsɩa asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ ndɛblɩ amʋtɔ. (Ɩnɩá ndɛ amʋ́ tɩ ahandɛ kʋraa a, megyi bɛɛ, amʋ́ handɛ amʋ ɩbʋ mɩ labi, tsufɛ Bulu mʋ́ tamakɩ ɔhaa ansɩtɔ.) 7Tamɛ ahandɛ amʋ bowun ánɩ́ Bulu lɔpʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋ ha mɩ ɔbɛɛ, nda mʋ́ ɔkan aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔtɔ, fɛ alɩá ɔlɔpʋha Petro ɛ ɔbɛɛ, ɔda mʋ́ ɔkan Yudafɔtɔ. 8Tsufɛ Bulu lɛha Kefa ánɩ́ bʋtɛtra tɩ mʋ Petro tumi, ogyi mʋ sumbi ɔyɔpʋ Yudafɔtɔ. Mʋ kɛn laha mɩ tumi, ngyi mʋ sumbi ɔyɔpʋ aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔtɔ ɛ nɩ. 9Ɩnʋ a, ɩlɔwankɩ Yakobo mʋa Petro pʋ́ Yohane amʋʋ bʋhɩɛ bʋgyi ɔpasua amʋ ɔtan amʋ́á Bulu lapʋ alɩ agyʋma anfɩ kie mɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ bɔwa mɩa Barnaba ɩbɩ, pʋsuna ánɩ́ anɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ. Botsula ánɩ́ mɩa Barnaba ayɔ agyʋma aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔtɔ, amʋ́ ɛ abʋyɔ agyʋma Yudafɔtɔ. 10Mʋ́á bodunka tsu anɩ wa gyi, akaɩn amʋ́tɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔsʋ. Mʋ́ kɛn gyi tɔá ndekleá nɔ́bwɛ ɛ nɩ.
Paulo Ɩyɩnwa Wa Petro
11Tamɛ brɛá Petro lɛba Antiokia wulutɔ a, nɔwa ɩyɩn wa mʋ aha ansɩtɔ, tsufɛ tɔá ɔlɔbwɛ itepi ma alɛ. 12Brɛá ɔlɛba a, mʋa ahogyipʋá bʋmegyi Yudafɔ bʋtɔwa ɩbɩ gyi atɔ, tamɛ Yudafɔ akʋ benya tsu Yakobo wa ba pɛ, ɔlɛbɩtɩ ɩwɩ lɛ aha amʋtɔ, tsufɛ ɔdɛ ahogyipʋ amʋʋ bɛɛ bʋtɩn kete amʋ ifu nya. 13Ɩnɩá ndɛblɩ a, Yudafɔ atrahɛ amʋ ɛ bʋbuo Petro apinabwɛbi anfɩ. Barnaba o leyinki yɔ obuo amʋ́. 14Nowun ánɩ́ amʋ́ bwɛhɛ amʋ ɩmɛkana ɔnɔkwalɩá ɩbʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɛbla Petro aha amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ansɩtɔ mbɛɛ, “Petro, Yudayin fʋgyi, tamɛ fʋmɛdɛ Yudafɔ amandɩɛsʋ gyi. Ɔmátɔfɔ amandɩɛsʋ fʋdegyi. Ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛ aha amʋʋ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ amʋ hɩɛ fɛɛ, bʋbwɛ Yudafɔ amandɩɛá fakina?”
Hogyisʋ Bulu Tɔtsʋn Hɔ Yudafɔ Pʋ́ Ɔmá Bambasʋfɔ Nkpa
15Yudafɔ lɔkwɩɩ mɩa fʋnyɔ. Megyi aha amʋʋ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ, bʋmeyin Bulu mbla amʋtɔ atsu. 16Tamɛ anɩ Yudafɔ Akristofɔ amʋ mʋ́ anɩyin ánɩ́ megyi Mose mbla amʋsʋ gyi sʋ Bulu totsu ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa mʋ ansɩtɔ, nkɛtɩ Yesu Kristo hogyi. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩlahɔ mʋ gyi, mɛnɩ Bulu ɔbɔ́tsʋn mʋ hogyi amʋsʋ ha anɩ asʋ nɩ. Tsufɛ nɩ mbla amʋsʋ gyi sʋ mʋ́ a, tɛkɩ ɔhaa méegyi asʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ. 17Anɩdedunka ánɩ́ Bulu ɔtsʋn anɩ Kristo hogyisʋ, otsu anɩá anɩ asʋn da ɔkpa mʋ ansɩtɔ. Tamɛ nɩ Yudafɔ akʋ bʋdɛ anɩ mboun kɩ lakpan abwɛpʋ a, mʋmʋ imosuna ánɩ́ asʋkpan Kristo dɛ anɩ suna a? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! 18Nɩ nakina Mose mbla amʋ, layɔ ndɛ mʋ́sʋ gyi a, mʋmʋ ilosuna ánɩ́ ɩtɔ lalahɛ nɔyɔ ndɛbwɛ a. 19Tsufɛ Mose mbla amʋ ilosuna ánɩ́ nawu. Ɩlɛha negyi ɩwɩ, mɛnɩ nétsia nkpa pɔpwɛ ha Bulu. Mɩa Kristonyɔ bɛda manta oyikpalihɛsʋ ɔŋɛtɔ. 20Mʋ́ sʋ ntsie nkpa sei, tamɛ megyi mɩ onuto tsie nkpa ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ. Kristo, ogyi Bulu mʋ Bi amʋ tsie mɩtɔ. Mʋlɔdwɛ mɩ, bowu ha mɩ. Mʋ hogyi sʋ ntsie nkpa. 21Mʋ́ sʋ mmɛdɛ Bulu awɩtɔlɛ amʋ kina. Tsufɛ nɩ Mose mbla amʋ sʋ ɔha obégyi asʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ a, mʋmʋ kpaalɩ Kristo lowu!

Title: GALATIAFƆ 3
Content:
Mbla Amʋsʋ Gyi Ntɛ Kristo Hogyi
1Oo Galatiafɔ aha mimlahɛ! Ma lalɛ mlɩ ansɩ alɩ? Megyi mlɩ onuto ansɩtɔ bɛhɩɛ lɛ suna mlɩ alɩá bɛda Yesu Kristo manta oyikpalihɛsʋ, mɔ mʋ? 2Nfɩtɛ mlɩ asʋn kuakʋlɛ. Mose Mbla amʋsʋ gyi lɛha mlɩlenya Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ loo, ntɛ asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ mlɩlonu, mlɩdɛ mʋ́ hogyi amʋ sʋ? 3Aha mimlahɛ mlɩlɔkʋkʋ mlɩgyi alɩ a? Ɩnɩá mlɩlɔpʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ tsua mlɩ Kristotɔtsia asɩ mɛ, mlɩ onuto tumi mlɩaa, mlɔ́pʋmɔ mʋ́ ɔnɔ ngya? 4Kpaalɩ sʋ mlɩlowun ipian amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ asʋn wanklaan amʋ sʋ? Megyi kpaalɩ sʋ! 5Ntra fɩtɛ mlɩ. Mlɩ Mose mbla amʋsʋ gyi sʋ Bulu lapʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ ha mlɩ, ɔdɛ ofula ɛ bwɛ mlɩtɔ? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Alɩá mlɩlonu asʋn wanklaan amʋ, hɔ mʋ́sʋ gyi sʋ ɔlɔpʋha mlɩ.
6Mlɩpʋkɩ anɩ nain Abraham. Ɩbʋ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ ánɩ́, “Abraham lɔhɔ Bulu gyi. Mʋ́ sʋ Bulu lotsu mʋá mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa.” 7Mʋ́ sʋ ilehian ánɩ́ mlɛ́bɩá aha amʋʋ bɔhɔ Bulu gyi amʋ gyi Abraham abi onuto nɩ. 8Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ yaɩ ánɩ́ Bulu ɔbɔ́tsʋn aha amʋʋ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ amʋ hogyisʋ, tsu amʋ́á amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa. Ɩnɩ sʋ Bulu lɛbla Abraham asʋn wanklaan amʋ dodoodo ɔbɛɛ, “Fʋsʋ nɔ́tsʋn yula ɔsʋlʋsʋ aha fɛ́ɛ́.” 9Abraham lɔhɔ Bulu gyi. Mʋ́ sʋ Bulu loyula mʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ sei anfɩ a, Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋ oyula amʋʋ ɔlɔpʋyula Abraham amʋ yula aha ánɩ́ bahɔ Kristo gyi.
10Tamɛ ɩlwɩɩ dɩn aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ansɩ dɩn Mose mbla amʋsʋ gyisʋ. Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Bulu lalwɩɩ ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ omegyi mbla amʋʋ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu mbla ɔwʋlʋtɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.” 11Sei a, ɩlawankɩ ánɩ́ ɔhaa má ɩnʋá mʋ mbla amʋsʋ gyi sʋ Bulu obótsu mʋ ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa. Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ hogyi sʋ Bulu latsu mʋ ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa obénya nkpa.” 12Mbla amʋsʋ gyi mɛna hogyisʋ, tamɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ otegyi mbla amʋsʋ ɔbɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ nya nkpa.”
13Tamɛ anɩ sʋ Kristo lemli ɔha lwɩɩhɛ brɛá bɛda mʋ manta oyikpalihɛ amʋsʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛlɛ anɩ tsu ɩlwɩɩ amʋʋ mbla amʋ lɛtɩ ha anɩ amʋ asɩ. Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɩlwɩɩ dɩn ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ bɛda manta oyisʋ.” 14Kristo lowu, mɛnɩ Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋ oyula amʋʋ ɔlɛhɩɛ ha Abraham amʋ kɛn yula aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ, mɛnɩ abɔ́tsʋn anɩ Kristo Yesu hogyisʋ nya Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋʋ ɔlɛhɩɛ amʋ.
Mbla Amʋ Pʋ́ Bulu Nhɩhɩɛ
15Mɩ apio, mpʋ ndɛ tsiatɔ asʋn kʋ flo asʋn anfɩ ha mlɩ. Alɩ amʋʋ ɔha ɔdɩnka ibwi mʋ asʋnsʋ ɔbɛɛ, ɔkʋ ogyi mʋ atɔ, ɔhaa má ɔkpa tsɛ mʋ́, ntɛ lɛ ɩkʋ mʋ́tɔ amʋ a, alɩ igyi ntam amʋʋ Bulu lɛka ha Abraham amʋ ɛ nɩ. 16Anɩ nain Abraham mʋa mʋ nanyɔ Bulu lɛka ntam ha. Alɩ asʋn anfɩ imosuna ánɩ́ mʋ aná tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ, mboun mʋ na ɔkʋlɛ pɛ. Mʋ na amʋ gyi Kristo a. 17Asʋn ánɩ́ ndɛblɩ gyi, Bulu lɛka ntam ha anɩ nain Abraham. Ɔlɛdɩnka ibwi mʋ́sʋ pʋsuna ánɩ́ obégyi mʋ́sʋ. Mbla amʋʋ ɔlɔwa ha Mose nfi lafana adʋasa (430) ɔma amʋ ɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ ka ntam amʋʋ ɔlɛdɩnka ibwi mʋ́sʋ amʋtɔ, ntɛ tsɛ mʋ́ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 18Tsufɛ nɩ mbla amʋsʋ gyi sʋ ɔha ɩbɩ bɛ́da agyapadɩɛ amʋʋ Bulu lɛhɩɛ yaɩ amʋ a, mʋmʋ megyi hɩɛ Bulu lɛhɩɛ mʋ́ yaɩ Abraham. Tamɛ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ gyi, kie ɔlɔpʋkie mʋ.
19Mʋmʋ labi mɔmʋ mbla amʋ bʋ? Bulu lɔpʋ mʋ́ ɛ manta mʋ́sʋ, mɛnɩ ibósuna aha tɔá lakpan gyi. Tamɛ ɔlɔwa mbla amʋ ánɩ́ ibétsia alɩɩ yɔfʋn brɛá Abraham mʋ na amʋ ɔbɛ́ba. Mʋgyi mʋ atɔ ogyipʋ nɩ. Ɔlɔpʋ mbla amʋ ha mʋ abɔpʋ bɔpʋ bɔwa Mose ɩbɩtɔ. Mʋlɔbwɛ Bulu mʋa Israelfɔ nsɩnɛ ɔlapʋ nɩ. 20Nsɩnɛ ɔlapʋ tamalɩɩ ha ɔbakʋlɛ, tamɛ ɔbakʋlɛ Bulu gyi.
Labiá Mbla Amʋ Ɩbʋ
21Bulu mbla amʋ ɩlɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ mʋ nhɩhɩɛ amʋʋ ɔlɛhɩɛ yaɩ amʋsʋ? Ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ! Nɩ mbla kʋ ɩbɛ́talɩ ha anɩ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata a, tɛkɩ abɛ́talɩ gyi asʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ, nɩ anɩlegyi mʋ́sʋ. 22Tamɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ ɩlɛblɩá lakpan lagyi ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́sʋ plɩplɩplɩplɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ atɔ amʋʋ Bulu lɛhɩɛ yaɩ amʋ igyi Kristo ahogyipʋ klɛ.
23Tamɛ asa Yesu Kristo hogyi lɛba ɔyɩtɔ a, mbla amʋ ɩlɛklɩ anɩ fɛ obu adɩpʋ. Ɔhaa menya mʋ ɩwɩ, bɔfʋn brɛá Bulu lɛbɛlɛ Kristo hogyi ɔwan. 24Mʋ́ sʋ mbla amʋ lɔbwɛ anɩsʋ ɔkɩpʋ bɔfʋn brɛá Kristo lɛba, mɛnɩ Bulu obótsu anɩ ánɩ́ anɩ asʋn da ɔkpa mʋ ansɩtɔ, tsʋn anɩ Kristo hogyisʋ. 25Ɩnɩá Kristo hogyi laba sʋ a, imehian ánɩ́ mbla amʋ ɔbɛ́tra bwɛ anɩsʋ ɔkɩpʋ.
26Tsufɛ mlɩ Kristo Yesu hogyi sʋ mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩlabwɛ Bulu abi. 27Mlɩ aha ánɩ́ mlɩa Yesu Kristo mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ tsʋn asubɔsʋ mlɩlatsu mʋ tsiatɔ fɛ́ɛ́. 28Mʋ́ sʋ Yudayin ntɛ Grikiyin tra ɔma ɩnʋ. Ɔkpábi ntɛ ɔdɩhɩɛ, ɔtsɩ ntɛ oyin tra ɔma ɩnʋ. Tsufɛ mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ mlɩa Kristo Yesunyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ. 29Ɩnɩá mlɩlabwɛ Kristo klɛ sʋ a, mlɩlabwɛ Abraham abi-aná onuto, pʋ́ mʋ atɔ agyipʋ. Ɩnɩ sʋ ɩtɔ amʋʋ Bulu lɛhɩɛ yaɩ Abraham amʋ igyi mlɩ klɛ.

Title: GALATIAFƆ 4
Content:
1Mlɩyɔ asʋn anfɩtɔ kɩ. Nɩ ɔha owu, si mʋ agyapadɩɛ yaɩ mʋ abi brɛá bʋmɔkʋdan a, bʋgyi fɛ nkpábi. Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá amʋ́bʋ amʋ́ sɩ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́, 2tamɛ ilehian ánɩ́ bɛ́ba ɩwɩasɩ ha amʋ́sʋ ɔkɩpʋ alɩɩ yɔfʋn nfi oduá amʋ́ sɩ losuna ánɩ́ bʋhɔ, asa abʋpʋ atɔ amʋ wa amʋ́ ɩbɩtɔ. 3Alɩ anɩ ɛ anɩgyi asa Kristo lɛba nɩ. Anɩlɔbwɛ nkpábi ha ɔŋɛ, ntɛ tumiá ɩdɛ ɔyɩ anfɩsʋ gyi. 4Tamɛ brɛá brɛ amʋ onuto lɔfʋn a, Bulu lɔwa mʋ Bi sɩsɩ, ɔha tsɩhɛ lɔkwɩɩ mʋ wa mbla amʋ asɩ. 5Bulu lɔwa mʋ ánɩ́ ɔba bɔhɔ anɩ aha amʋʋ anɩgyi nkpábi ha Mose mbla amʋ tsu nkpábitɔ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́bwɛ anɩ mʋ abi onuto.
6Bulu lodunka ánɩ́ obósuna ánɩ́ mlɩlabwɛ mʋ abi. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔpʋ mʋ Bi amʋ Ɔŋɛ wa anɩ ɩklʋntɔ nɩ. Ɔŋɛ amʋ tɛha anɩtokpoli mʋ anɩaa, “Abba, mɩ Sɩ!” nɩ. 7Mʋ́ sʋ opio, fʋtra fʋmegyi ɔkpábi, mboun Bulu mʋ bi. Ɩnɩá mʋ bi fʋgyi sʋ a, mʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi fʋ klɛ.
Galatiafɔ Ɩwɩ Ipian
8Brɛá mlɩmɔkʋnya bɩ Bulu a, mlɩlɔbwɛ nkpábi ha ɩkpɩá bʋmegyi tɔtɔ. 9Tamɛ sei mlɩlabɩ Bulu, ntɛ nɛ́blɩ mbɛɛ, alabɩ mlɩ. Ntogyi sʋ mlɩdekleá mléyinki yesum tumi anfɩ ɩma labi kʋkʋʋkʋ? Ntogyi sʋ mlɛ́tra yinki yɛbwɛ amʋ́ nkpábi fɛ brɛ amʋ? 10Mlɩdɛ amandɩɛ kʋ bwɛ nkɛ kʋtɔ, tsra kʋtɔ, brɛ kʋtɔ pʋ́ nfi kʋtɔ. 11Mlɩ bwɛhɛ anfɩ sʋ ifu bʋ mɩtɔ. Ɩdɛ mɩ bwɛ fɛ ipian amʋʋ ndewun mlɩ sʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbɔ́bwɛ kpaalɩ.
12Mɩ apio, nokokoli mlɩ, nabwɛ mɩ ɩwɩ fɛ mlɩ. Ntra mma mbla kʋkʋ asɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩtsia mɩ atsiabi. Megyi bɛɛ mbɛɛ, mlɩlapʋ lalahɛ kʋkʋ gyi mɩ, sʋ ndɛ ɩnɩ blɩ. 13Mlɩlakaɩn ánɩ́ ɩwɩ ma mɩ ɔnlɩn asa nɛba ɩnʋ bɛda Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan ɛkɛ gyankpapʋ? 14Ɩsɔkɩ kpɔnkpɔntɩ mɩ ɩlɔ amʋ lɔbwɛ ha mlɩ, tamɛ mʋ́ o a, mlɩmobu mɩ tɔkʋ. Mboun mlɩlɔhɔ mɩ fɛ Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ, ntɛ Kristo Yesu onuto kʋraa. 15Ansɩ lɛhɩɛ gyi anɩ alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ! Ntɔ lɛba? Mɩ onuto nowun ánɩ́ nɩ mlɛ́talɩ a, tɛkɩ mlɩloloti mlɩ ansibi wa mɩ alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ. Mʋ́ ntɔ dɛ mlɩ sei? 16Alɩ amʋʋ ndɛ mlɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ bla amʋ sʋ namli mlɩ olupʋ?
17Aha amʋʋ bʋdekleá mlɩgyi Yudafɔ mblasʋ amʋ bʋma mlɩ ɩwɩ agywɩɩn wanklaan kʋkʋ. Tɔá bʋdekle gyi bɛ́maɩn mlɩ lɛ mɩsʋ, mɛnɩ mlékle amʋ́ asʋn. 18Ɩbʋ alɛá aha bódunka ánɩ́ mlɩdwɛ amʋ́, agywɩɩn wanklaan ɔkpasʋ. Megyi brɛá mbʋ mlɩ wa wʋlɛ. 19Mɩ abi adwɛpʋ! Ɩwɩ tra ɩdɛ mɩ ɔsɩn ha mlɩ, fɛ ɔtsɩá ɩkwɩɩ dɛ mʋ dwiin. Nkɛtɩ mlɩlanya Kristo tsiatɔ mlɩtɔ asa ɩwɩ bési mɩ ɔsɩn. 20Ɩhɩɛ dɛ mɩ han ha mlɩ. Nɩ mɩ nkʋlɛ sʋ mʋ́ a, tɛkɩ mbʋ mlɩ wa sei, mɛnɩ nɛ́tsɛ mɩ tɔɩtɔ.
Hagar Mʋa Sara Nfantʋhʋn
21Nfɩtɛ mlɩ aha amʋʋ mlɩdekleá mlóbuo Mose mbla amʋ. Mlɩmonu asʋn ánɩ́ ɩlɛblɩ asɩ? 22Bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, Abraham lɔkwɩɩ abi yinhɛ anyɔ. Ɔkʋlɛ mʋ yin gyi ɔkpábi, onyɔsɩ mʋ yin gyi ɔdɩhɩɛ. 23Ɔkpábi amʋ lɔkwɩɩ mʋ bi kɛkɛ, tamɛ ɔdɩhɩɛ amʋ mʋ́ a, Bulu lɛhɩɛ mʋ yaɩ ánɩ́ mɛ́ha mʋ obi asa ɔlɔkwɩɩ. 24Mlɩha anu asʋn anfɩ asɩ tsʋn ɔkpa anfɩsʋ. Atsɩ abanyɔ anfɩ bʋlɩɩ ha ntam anyɔ ánɩ́ Bulu lɛka. Hagar lɩɩ ha Sinaibʋsʋ klɛ, tsufɛ nkpábi mʋ abi bʋgyi. 25Sinaibʋ amʋ ɩbʋ Arabia ɔmátɔ. Ɩlɩɩ ha ndɛ Yerusalem wulu. Yerusalem pʋ́ mʋ́tɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bʋgyi nkpábi, Mbla amʋ sʋ. 26Sara mʋ́ gyi ɔdɩhɩɛ, ɔlɩɩ ha ɔsʋsʋ Yerusalem. Mʋgyi anɩ yin nɩ. 27Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Ɔtsɩ mákwɩɩpʋ, nya ansigyi!
Ɔtsɩá ɩkwɩɩ mɔkʋdwiin mʋ kɩ, kplʋn, afʋsʋra okitikiti ansigyisʋ.
Tsufɛ ɔtsɩ amʋʋ mʋ klu lesi mʋ tswɩ amʋ obénya abi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ,
dʋn ɔmʋamʋʋ mʋ klu da mʋ wa ekekegyiɛkɛ amʋ.”
28Mɩ apio, sei a, mlɩlabwɛ Bulu aha tsʋn mʋ tɔá ɔlɛhɩɛ yaɩsʋ; fɛ alɩá ɔlɛhɩɛ yaɩ asa bɔkwɩɩ Isakɩ. 29Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, obi amʋʋ bɔkwɩɩ mʋ kɛkɛ, ogyi Ismael amʋ lɛdɩnka Isakɩ amʋʋ bɔkwɩɩ mʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ tumitɔ amʋsʋ. Alɩ kɛn igyi ha anɩ ndɛ nɩ. 30Tamɛ nkalɩ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ? Ɔbɛɛ, “Gya ɔkpábi amʋ mʋa mʋ bi, tsufɛ megyi ɔkpábi mʋ bi amʋ mʋa ɔdɩhɩɛ mʋ bi amʋ obégyi amʋ́ sɩ atɔ.” 31Mʋ́ sʋ apio, megyi ɔkpábi amʋ abi anɩgyi. Ɔdɩhɩɛ amʋ abi anɩgyi.

Title: GALATIAFƆ 5
Content:
Mlɩkɩ Mlɩ Ɩwɩgyisʋ
1Anɩ ɩwɩgyi sʋ Kristo laha anɩlagyi ɩwɩ! Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin. Mlɩmátra tsula abʋbwɛ mlɩ nkpábi ha mbla amʋ.
2Mlɩnu! Mɩ Paulo dɛ mlɩ bla ánɩ́ nɩ mlesi ɩwɩ ha, bɛtɩn mlɩ kete a, ilosuna ánɩ́ tɔ amʋʋ Kristo lɔbwɛ amʋ ɩma mlɩ labi kʋkʋ. 3Ntra ndɛ mlɩ ɔla da mbɛɛ, ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɛha bɛtɩn mʋ kete a, ilehian ánɩ́ obégyi Mose mbla amʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ. 4Ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, mlɩ aha amʋʋ mlɩdɛ mbla amʋsʋ gyi, mɛnɩ Bulu obótsu mlɩá mlɩ asʋn da ɔkpa mʋ ansɩtɔ amʋ mlɩlamaɩn ɩwɩ lɛ Kristosʋ. Bulu awɩtɔlɛ amʋ ɩlatswɩ mlɩ pan. 5Anɩ mʋ́ anɩ ansɩ dɩn ánɩ́ Bulu obótsu anɩ ánɩ́ anɩ asʋn da ɔkpa mʋ ansɩtɔ. Ɩnɩgyi tɔá anɩdɛ ɔkpa kɩ tsʋn Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋʋ ɔdɛ agyʋma yɔ anɩtɔ, tsʋn anɩ hogyisʋ amʋsʋ nɩ. 6Tsufɛ nɩ anɩa Kristo Yesu anɩgyi kʋlɛ a, ketetɩn ntɛ ketemátɩn mehian. Mʋ́a idehian gyi anɩbʋ hogyiá ɩtɛha anɩtɔdwɛ Bulu pʋ́ anɩ aba.
7Tɛkɩ mlɩdɛ mbɔdɩ bɔ asa. Ma koun latin mlɩ ɔkpa ɔbɛɛ, mlɩmátra buo ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ? 8Megyi Bulu bwɛhɛ igyi, tsufɛ mʋlɛlɛ mlɩ. 9Mlɩkaɩn ánɩ́ bodobodotu-afa kpalobi tɛha bodobodo amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ itotu. 10Anɩ Wie laha nahogyi ánɩ́ mlɩmɛ́ɛtra hɔ ɔha bamba atosunahɛ dʋn mɩ nkʋlɛ klɛ. Bulu ɔbɛ́bɩtɩ ɔha amʋʋ ɔdɛ mlɩ agywɩɩn damli amʋ ɩsʋ.
11Mɩ apio, nɩ ntra ndɛ ɔkan da blɩ mbɛɛ, ilehian ánɩ́ aha bɛ́tɩn kete a, mʋmʋ ntogyi sʋ Yudafɔ bʋtra bʋdɩn mɩsʋ? Mʋmʋ nɩ ndɛ Kristo oyikpalihɛsʋ lowu amʋ ɛ ɔkan da a, yɛ ɔhaa mɛ́ɛdɩnka mɩsʋ o. 12Mɩ sʋ mʋ́ a, tɛkɩ aha amʋʋ bʋdɛ mlɩ han bɛɛ, ilehian ánɩ́ mlɛ́tɩn kete amʋ bawuna flo amʋ́ ɩwɩ.
13Mɩ apio, Bulu lɛlɛ mlɩ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩbegyi ɩwɩ. Tamɛ mlɩmátsʋn mlɩ ɩwɩgyi amʋsʋ layotsu mlɩ tsiatɔ dada amʋ. Mboun mlɩpʋ ɔdwɛ sum mlɩ aba, 14tsufɛ Mose mbla amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩlɩɩ mbla kʋlɛ pɛ amʋʋ ɩdɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Dwɛ fʋ ba fɛ fʋ ɩwɩ.” amʋsʋ. 15Tamɛ nɩ mlɩlabwɛ mlɩ ɩwɩ fɛ mbwɩkɩta-atɔ, mlɩdɛ aba fɩnɩ, mlɩdɛ aba lala a, mʋmʋ mlɩkɩ wanklaan; nɩ megyi alɩ mlɛ́hɩ aba.
Tsiatɔ Dada Pʋ́ Ɔŋɛtɔ Atsiabi
16Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, mlɩha Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ ɔkpa mlɩ. Mʋmʋ mlɩmɔ́ɔbwɛ tɔá mlɩ tsiatɔ dada tekle. 17Tsufɛ tɔá anɩ tsiatɔ dada tekle ɩhɩɛ na ɔtsan ha tɔá Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ tekle. Tɔá Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ tekle ɛ ɩhɩɛ na ɔtsan ha tɔá anɩ tsiatɔ dada tekle. Atoku anyɔ anfɩ ɩlɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ abasʋ, mɛnɩ mlɩmɔ́ɔbwɛ tɔá mlɩtekle. 18Nɩ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ dɛ mlɩ kpa a, mʋmʋ mlɩmá Mose mbla amʋ asɩ.
19Tsiatɔ dada bwɛhɛ tɛlɩn ɔwan. Mʋ́gyi; atsɩ mʋa ayin asʋnwa, agywɩɩn lalahɛ bwɛ, ifintotsia, 20ɩkpɩtswɛ, afatɔplei, olu, ɩtrɛ, fʋ nkʋlɛ klɛ dunka, ɔblɔkpan, ɔnsɩpɛ, aba-asɩmanu, ɩwɩmaɩn lɛ fʋ abasʋ, 21ɔkabagya, ntabʋ, pleikpada pʋ́ mʋ́á ɩlɛlɩan ɩnɩ aná. Mʋ́ aná ɩwɩ asʋn ndɛ mlɩ bla, fɛ alɩá nɛbla mlɩ yaɩ. Mbɛɛ, aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔbwɛ ɩnɩ odu bʋméenya Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ agyapadɩɛ kʋkʋ.
22Tamɛ nɩ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ dɛ anɩ kpa a, mʋ́ abi swiehɛá ibétsia anɩtɔ gyi, ɔdwɛ, ansigyi, iwilwii, ɩklʋnya, awɩtɔlɛ, yilebwɛ, ɔnɔkwalɩ, 23ilwii pʋ́ ɩwɩsʋgyi. Mbla kʋkʋʋkʋ má ɩnʋá iletin alɩ ntobi anfɩ ɔkpa. 24Aha ánɩ́ bʋgyi Kristo klɛ bamɔ amʋ́ tsiatɔ dada pʋ́ amʋ́ ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ Kristo Yesu oyikpalihɛ amʋsʋ. 25Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ laha anɩ nkpa pɔpwɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha agyi mʋ asʋnsʋ. 26Anɩmátsu ɩwɩ suna aba, ntɛ wa aba ɔblɔ, ntɛ pɛ ansɩ aba atɔsʋ.

Title: GALATIAFƆ 6
Content:
Ɩkʋ Tsu Lɛ Aba Asʋntɔ
1Mɩ apio, nɩ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋ ɔbwɛ lakpan kʋ a, mlɩ aha amʋʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ dɛ mlɩ kpa amʋ mlɩnya klʋn tɔɩ kpla mʋ pʋtɔɔ. Tamɛ mlɩkɩ mlɩ ɩwɩ wanklaan, mɛnɩ mlɩ ɛ mlɩmɛ́ɛdɩda ɩsɔkɩ amʋ odutɔ. 2Mlɩtsu ɩkʋ lɛ mlɩ aba asʋntɔ. Nɩ mlɩdɛ mʋ́ bwɛ alɩ a, mlɩdɛ Kristo mbla amʋsʋ gyi nɩ. 3Nɩ ɔkʋ dɛ mʋ ɩwɩ kɩ ɔbɛɛ mɔfʋn togyitɔtɔ, tamɛ omegyi tɔtɔ a, ɔdɛ mʋ ɩwɩ mlɛ. 4Mlɩkapʋ mlɩ onuto tsiatɔ kɩ. Nɩ ɩbʋ alɛ a, mʋmʋ mlɛ́talɩ pʋ ɩbɩ si kantɔ mlɩ bwɛhɛ sʋ, mlɩmɔ́ɔpʋ kapʋ ɔha bamba klɛ. 5Tsufɛ anɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ ɔbɔ́sʋra mʋ onuto atɔ sʋrahɛ.
6Bulu asʋn amʋ akasɩpʋ bʋye atɔ wanklaan ánɩ́ bʋbʋ ɩkʋ ha amʋ́ asunapʋ.
7Mlɩmámlɛ mlɩ ɩwɩ. Ɔhaa tamamlɛ Bulu. Ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɔ́kpɔtɩ tɔá olodu. 8Nɩ ɔkʋ lodu tsiatɔ lalahɛ wa mʋ klʋntɔ a, lowu ɔbɔ́kpɔtɩ tsu mʋ́tɔ. Tamɛ nɩ ɔlɛha Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ lodu tsiatɔ wanklaan wa mʋ klʋntɔ a, ɔbɔ́kpɔtɩ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata tsu mʋ́tɔ. 9Mʋ́ sʋ yilebwɛ mákpɔn anɩ. Tsufɛ nɩ abatɔ mowu anɩ a, abɔ́kpɔtɩ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata mʋ́ brɛtɔ. 10Mʋ́ sʋ bregyibrɛá anya mʋ́ ɩwɩ ɔkpa a, mlɩha abwɛ yile ha ɔhagyiɔha, titriu anɩ apio ahogyipʋ.
Itsiaha Pʋ́ Ɔlada
11Mlɩkɩ atɔ wanlɩnhɛ akpɔnkpɔntɩá napʋ mɩ onuto ɩbɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ! 12Aha amʋʋ bʋdedunka ánɩ́ bégyi asʋ aha ansɩtɔ amʋ lɩɩ mlɩsʋ bɛɛ, mlɩha abʋtɩn mlɩ kete nɩ. Megyi tɔtɔ sʋ bʋdɛ ɩnɩ bwɛ. Alɩá Yudafɔ bʋmɛ́ɛdɩnka amʋ́sʋ bɛɛ, bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ Kristo oyikpalihɛsʋ lowu amʋ pɛsʋ ɔha ɔbɔ́tsʋn nya nkpa. 13Kete atɩnpʋ amʋ onuto o bʋtamagyi Mose mbla amʋsʋ. Tamɛ bʋdekleá mlɩtɩn kete, mɛnɩ bɔ́pʋtsu ɩwɩ suna amʋ́ aba ánɩ́ baha mlɩlatɩn kete. 14Mɩ mʋ́ a, ɩmába mʋ́tɔá nótsu ɩwɩ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ tɔtɔɔtɔsʋ, dʋn anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo oyikpalihɛsʋ lowu amʋ. Tsufɛ mʋ lowu amʋ sʋ ɔyɩtɔ tsia ɩtra ma mɩ labi, mɩ ɛ mma labi kʋkʋ ha mʋ́. 15Ketetɩn ntɛ ketemátɩn megyi tɔtɔ. Mʋ́a idehian gyi ɔha obémli ɔha pɔpwɛ. 16Iwilwii mʋ́a nwewun ɩtʋ aha amʋʋ bʋdɛ mbla anfɩsʋ gyi amʋ, pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋhɩɛ bʋgyi Bulu aha!
17Asa nɛ́kpa mɩ asʋn opulu a, mbla mlɩ. Mlɩtɔ ɔhaa mátra wa mɩ tɔɩ. Tsufɛ mɩ ɩwɩ apɩna anfɩ idesuna ánɩ́ Yesu ɔkpábi ngyi.
18Mɩ apio, anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ogyi mlɩ bʋalɛ. Amen!

Title: EFESOFƆ 1
Content:
Itsiaha
1Mɩ Pauloá Bulu apɛ sʋ nabwɛ Kristo Yesu sumbi ɔyɔpʋ, dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ Bulu aha ánɩ́ mlɩlahɔ Kristo Yesu gyi, mlɩa mʋnyɔ mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ, mlɩbʋ Efeso wulutɔ. Ndɛ mlɩ itsia ha.
2Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋgyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, abʋha mlɩ iwilwii.
Ɔsʋsʋ Oyula Ánɩ́ Anɩbʋ Kristotɔ
3Mlɩha akanfʋ anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo mʋ Sɩ pʋ́ mʋ Bulu. Tsufɛ tsʋn anɩa Kristonyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ a, alapʋ ɔŋɛtɔ atɔá ɩbɛ́kpa anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ yula anɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ. 4Asa Bulu lɔbwɛ ɔyɩ a, ɔlɛlɛ anɩ bwɛ mʋ klɛ tsʋn anɩa Kristonyɔ kʋlɛbwɛsʋ, ánɩ́ abwɛ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn, ifin kʋkʋ ma anɩ ɩwɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ.
5Ɩnɩá Bulu tɔdwɛ anɩ sʋ a, ɔlɔbwɛ agywɩɩn yaɩ ɔbɛɛ, mɔ́pʋ anɩ bwɛ mʋ abi tsʋn Yesu Kristosʋ. Ɩnɩ gyi tɔá olekle, igyi mʋ apɛ nɩ. 6Mlɩha akanfʋ Bulu, mʋ awɩtɔlɛ anfɩ ɩbʋ numnyam, ɔlɔwa tsʋn mʋ Bi ɔdwɛpʋsʋ ha anɩ faan anfɩ sʋ. 7Ɔlɔpʋ mʋ Bi amʋ obugya ka anɩ nwunsʋ ɩkɔ, si anɩ lakpan kie anɩ. Awɩtɔlɛ anfɩ Bulu lɛhɩɛ wa ha anɩ anfɩ ɩbʋ ifu dʋbɩ. 8Mʋ nyansa pʋ́ mʋ asʋn-asɩnu lalɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔwan suna anɩ tsʋn ɔkpa tsɔtsɔɔtsɔsʋ.
9Alaha anɩlabɩ mʋ asʋn ŋainhɛá ɔlɛkɩklɩ yaɩ dodoodo ɔbɛɛ, mɔ́bwɛ tsʋn Kristosʋ. 10Mʋ asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋ gyi, nɩ brɛ amʋ ɩfʋn a, mɔ́bwɛ mʋ atɔ bwɛhɛá ɩbʋ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ fɛ́ɛ́ kʋlɛ, pʋwa anɩ Wie Kristo asɩ.
11Bulu tɛha mʋ nwuntɔ-asʋn pʋ́ mʋ apɛ tɛba mʋ́tɔ bregyibrɛ. Mʋ onuto lɛlɛ anɩ ɔbɛɛ abwɛ mʋ abi tsʋn anɩa Kristonyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ. Tsufɛ alɩ ɔlɔbwɛ agywɩɩn yaɩ dodoodo nɩ. 12Ɔlɛlɛ anɩ agyankpapʋ amʋʋ anɩ ansɩ dɩn Kristosʋ amʋ ɔbɛɛ, abɛ́kanfʋ mʋ numnyam.
13Alɩ ilegyi ha mlɩ ɛ nɩ. Brɛ amʋʋ mlɩlonu ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn, igyi asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ ɩlɔhɔ mlɩ nkpa amʋ, hɔ mʋ́sʋ gyi ɔpá mlɩa Kristonyɔ mlɩlɔbwɛ kʋlɛ. Bulu lɔpʋ mʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ hɩɛ mlɩ nsʋ, pʋsuna ánɩ́ mʋbʋ mlɩ, fɛ alɩ amʋʋ ɔlɛhɩɛ yaɩ ɔbɛɛ, mɔ́bwɛ amʋ. 14Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ gyi ntswɩasɩá idesuna ánɩ́ anɩ ɩbɩ bɛ́da agyapadɩɛ amʋʋ Bulu lɛla yaɩ ha mʋ abi amʋ nɩ. Idesuna ánɩ́ alaka anɩ nwunsʋ ɩkɔ, pʋwa mʋ numnyam.
Paulo Mpaɩ
15Mʋ́ alɩ sʋ, tsu brɛá nonuá mlɩlahɔ anɩ Wie Yesu gyi pʋ́ alɩá mlɩtɔdwɛ Bulu aha fɛ́ɛ́ a, 16mmɔkʋsi Bulu ɩpan da mlɩ nwunsʋ. Nɩ ndɛ mpaɩ bɔ a, ntɛkaɩn mlɩsʋ. 17Ntokokoli anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo Bulu, numnyam Ɔsɩ amʋ mbɛɛ, ɔha mʋ Ɔŋɛ amʋ ɔha mlɩ nyansa. Ɩlɛ mʋ ɔwan suna mlɩ, mɛnɩ mlɛ́bɩ mʋ wanklaan. 18Ntɔkʋlɩ mʋ mbɛɛ, obwii mlɩ ansɩ, amlɩwun atɔ wanklaan amʋʋ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩbɛkɩ ɔkpa ha amʋ, mɛnɩ mlɛ́bɩá atɔ amʋʋ ɔlɛla yaɩ ha mʋ aha amʋ ɩhɩɛ bʋ bia. 19Ɔha amlɩbɩ ánɩ́ mʋ tumi dʋn tumi kugyikʋ ha anɩ ahogyipʋ. Mʋ tumi anfɩ ɔma a, kʋkʋ má ɩnʋ. 20Mʋ́ kɛn ɔlɛlɛ suna brɛá ɔlɔkʋsʋa Kristo tsu afulitɔ, pʋ mʋ yɛyaɩ mʋ gyɔpɩsʋ ɔsʋsʋ ɩnʋ nɩ. 21Ɩnʋ Kristo dɛ iwie gyi awie fɛ́ɛ́, tumi kugyikʋ ɔŋɛ lalahɛ pʋ́ ɔmásʋgyi tumi fɛ́ɛ́sʋ nɩ. Mʋ dibia dʋn dibia kugyikʋá ɩbʋ nʋ sei pʋ́ ɔyɩ amʋʋ ɩbɛ́ba amʋtɔ. 22Bulu lɔpʋ togyitɔ wa mʋ asɩ, ɔlɔpʋ mʋ bwɛ togyitɔ nwun ha mʋ ɔpasua. 23Ɔpasua amʋ gyi Kristo ɔyʋlʋ. Kristo wa ɔpasua amʋ tenya tumi kugyikʋ tsu. Mʋtɛha togyitɔ tɔwa alɛ yi ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ.

Title: EFESOFƆ 2
Content:
Tsu Nkpa Dadatɔ Ba Pɔpwɛtɔ
1Asa mlɩlemli Akristofɔ a, asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn mʋ́a lakpanbwɛ sʋ mlɩgyi ɔŋɛtɔ aha wuhɛ. 2Alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, mlɩletsia ɔmátɔfɔ atsiabi. Mlɩlobuo ɔŋɛ lalahɛ fɛ́ɛ́ owie Ɔbʋnsam. Mʋgyi ɔŋɛ lalahɛá ɩdɛ agyʋma yɔ aha amʋʋ bʋtamabu Bulu amʋtɔ nɩ. 3Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩletsia amʋ́ atsiabi, bwɛ lalahɛá anɩ ɔwɔlɩ lekle. Anɩlobuo tɔá anɩ ɔyʋlʋ pʋ́ anɩ agywɩɩn letsia suna anɩ. Tsiatɔ anfɩ sʋ tɛkɩ Bulu ɔbɛ́bɩtɩ anɩ ɩsʋ fɛ aha atrahɛ nɩ.
4-5Tamɛ ɩnɩá Bulu nwewun ɩtsɔ, ɔtɛhɩɛ dwɛ anɩ sʋ a, ɔlɔtsʋn anɩa Kristonyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛsʋ ha anɩ nkpa, brɛ amʋʋ anɩgyi aha wuhɛ mʋ ansɩtɔ anɩ lakpan sʋ amʋ. Mʋ awɩtɔlɛ sʋ ɔlɔhɔ anɩ nkpa. 6Anɩa Kristo Yesunyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛ anfɩ sʋ Bulu lakʋsʋa anɩa mʋnyɔ tsu lowutɔ, alaha anɩ otsiakpa Kristo wa. Anɩa mʋnyɔ abégyi iwie ɔsʋsʋ. 7Bulu lɛlɛ mʋ awɩtɔlɛ kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ anfɩ suna anɩ tsʋn Kristo Yesusʋ, mɛnɩ aha ánɩ́ bɛ́tra lɩn fɛ́ɛ́ bówun ánɩ́ mʋ awɩtɔlɛ lomoni dʋn togyitɔ. 8Bulu awɩtɔlɛ pʋ́ mlɩ Kristo hogyisʋ Bulu lɔtsʋn hɔ mlɩ nkpa. Ɩnɩ motsu mlɩ, Bulu atokiehɛ igyi. 9Megyi mlɩ bwɛhɛ wanklaan kʋkʋ sʋ, mɛnɩ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋ mɔ́ɔpʋ ɩbɩ si kantɔ. 10Bulu labwɛ anɩ alɩ anfɩ anɩgyi. Alabwɛ anɩ aha pɔpwɛ tsʋn anɩa Kristo Yesunyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛsʋ, mɛnɩ abɔ́bwɛ yileá mʋ onuto ɔlɛla yaɩ ha anɩ ɔbɛɛ abwɛ.
Kristotɔ Ɩkʋlɛbwɛ
11Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩkaɩn ánɩ́ tɛkɩ ɔmátɔfɔ mlɩgyi. Brɛ amʋ a, Yudafɔ bʋtɛtɩ mlɩ bɛɛ, “Aha ánɩ́ bʋmɛtɩn kete,” bʋtɛtɩ amʋ́ ɩwɩ kete atɩnpʋ. (Tamɛ ketetɩn amʋ o a, nyankpʋsa ɔyʋlʋsʋ pʋ́ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ atɔ igyi.) 12Mlɩkaɩn ánɩ́ alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ a, mlɩmeyin Kristo. Afɔɔ mlɩgyi. Mlɩmegyi Yudafɔ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. Mlɩmá ogyikpa Bulu nhɩhɩɛ amʋʋ ɔlɛka mʋ́ ɩwɩ ntam ha Yudafɔ amʋtɔ. Mʋ́a ɩdʋn kʋraa a, mlɩ ansɩ mɛdɩn tɔtɔsʋ, mlɩmeyin mʋ ɛ. 13Tamɛ sei a, mlɩa Kristo Yesunyɔ mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ. Ɩnɩ sʋ Kristo latsʋn mʋ obugya amʋʋ ɔlɛtsɛɩ wʋlɩ ha anɩa mlɩnyɔ amʋsʋ, kpa mlɩ aha anfɩ tɛkɩ mlɩbʋ ɩfɔ anfɩ ba Bulu wa. 14Tsufɛ Kristo onuto lapʋ iwilwii wa Yudafɔ pʋ́ ɔmá bambasʋfɔ nsɩnɛ, bwɛ anɩ afʋnka anyɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ kʋlɛ. Alalɛ olu amʋʋ ɩlɔbwɛ bunti wa anɩ nsɩnɛ amʋ. 15Ɔlɛka Yudafɔ mbla pʋ́ amʋ́ amandɩɛtɔ, mɛnɩ afʋnka anyɔ amʋ bɔ́bwɛ ɔpasua pɔpwɛ ɩkʋlɛ mʋtɔ. Fówun mʋa amʋ́nyɔ bɔ́bwɛ kʋlɛ, iwilwii bétsia amʋ́ nsɩnɛ. 16Ɔlɔtsʋn mʋ oyikpalihɛsʋ lowu amʋsʋ lɛ olu lɛ amʋ́ nsɩnɛ. Oyikpalihɛ amʋsʋ ɔlɔtsʋn tswɩ amʋ́a Bulunyɔ ɔnɔ ntsu. 17Brɛá Kristo lɛba a, ɔlɛda Bulu iwilwii asʋn amʋ ɔkan ha aha fɛ́ɛ́. Mlɩ ɔmátɔfɔá mlɩa Bulunyɔ nsɩnɛ bʋ ɩfɔ pʋ́ Yudafɔá amʋ́a Bulunyɔ nsɩnɛ ma ɩfɔ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. 18Kristo sʋ ɔkpa latii ha anɩ afʋnka anyɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́. Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ sʋ abɛ́talɩ ba anɩ Sɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ.
19Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩtra mlɩmegyi afɔɔ. Mlɩa Bulu aha mlɩlabwɛ ɩkʋlɛ, mlɩgyi Bulu woyi abi. 20Mlɩgyi fɛ obuá bayi. Yesu sumbi ayɔpʋ amʋ pʋ́ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ amʋ gyi mʋ́ nkpabi. Kristo Yesu onuto gyi obu amʋ ɔtan. 21Mʋ sʋ obu amʋ ɩtsa aba hogyitɔ. Mʋtɛha mʋ́ itomoni bwɛ Bulu ɔtswɛkpa obu wankɩhɛ. 22Ɩnɩá mlɩa Kristonyɔ mlɩlabwɛ ɩkʋlɛ sʋ a, ɔdɛ mlɩa Yudafɔ amʋ pʋtsa abasʋ, ɔdɛ obuá Bulu obétsia mʋ́tɔ ɔŋɛtɔ yi.

Title: EFESOFƆ 3
Content:
Paulo Ɔma Bambasʋfɔ Bulu Asʋn Bla
1Mɩ Paulo nda obu Kristo Yesu asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ ndɛ ɔkan da mlɩ aha ánɩ́ mlɩmegyi Yudafɔtɔ amʋ sʋ. 2Nyin ánɩ́ mlɩlanu awɩtɔlɛá Bulu lɔwa ha mɩ, pʋ agyʋma anfɩ wa mɩ ɩbɩtɔ ɔbɛɛ, mbwɛ, ɩwa labi ha mlɩ. 3Bulu lɛlɛ mʋ asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋʋ ɔlɛkɩklɩ yaɩ amʋ ɔwan suna mɩ. Mʋ́ nawanlɩn kutuklu a. 4Nɩ mlɛkla ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ a, ɩbɔ́wankɩ mlɩá nanu Kristo ɩwɩ asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋ asɩ. 5Tsu ɔyɩ ɔpá a, Bulu mɔkʋlɛ asʋn ŋainhɛ anfɩ suna nyankpʋsa ɔkʋkʋ. Tamɛ sei anfɩ a, alabɛlɛ mʋ́ ɔwan tsʋn mʋ Ɔŋɛ amʋsʋ suna aha amʋʋ alalɛ, bʋgyi mʋ sumbi ayɔpʋ pʋ́ mʋ ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ wankɩhɛ amʋ. 6Mʋ asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋ gyi, Bulu layula ɔma bambasʋfɔ ɛ fɛ Yudafɔ, tsʋn mʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋsʋ. Amʋ́a Yudafɔ bamli ɔlɛpɛ ɔkʋlɛtɔ atɔ agyipʋ. Alabwɛ amʋ́a Yudafɔ kʋlɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ babwɛ ɔyʋlʋ kʋlɛ. Amʋ́ ɛ bénya atɔ amʋʋ Bulu lɛhɩɛ ánɩ́ ɔbɛ́ha Yudafɔ tsʋn Kristo Yesusʋ amʋ kʋ.
7Ɩna Bulu awɩtɔlɛ pʋ́ mʋ tumisʋ ɔlɔbwɛ mɩ mʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋ osumpʋ. 8Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá kebikʋsʋ ngyi Bulu aha fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. Tamɛ Bulu lɔwa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ ɔbɛɛ, nda Kristo oyula amʋʋ ɩdʋn blɩ amʋ ɩwɩ ɔkan ha aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ. 9Mʋlɔwa mɩ ɔbɛɛ, nha anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ abʋbɩ alɩá ɔdɛpʋ mʋ asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋ yɔ agyʋma. Mʋlɔbwɛ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ, ɔlɔpʋ mʋ asʋn anfɩ ŋain tsu ɔyɩ ɔpá. 10Ɔlɔbwɛ mʋ́ alɩ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́tsʋn mʋ ɔpasua amʋsʋ lɛ mʋ nyansa ɔtsan-ɔtsan suna ɔŋɛ lalahɛ awie pʋ́ atumipʋá bʋbʋ ɔtɩnɛá bʋdɛ iwie gyi fɛ́ɛ́. 11Ɩnɩgyi tɔá Bulu lɛhɩhɩɛ yaɩ asa ɔlɛlɛ ɔyɩ nɩ. Alaha mʋ́ ɩlaba mʋ́tɔ sei tsʋn anɩ Wie Kristo Yesusʋ. 12Ɩnɩá anɩlahɔ mʋ gyi, anɩa mʋnyɔ anɩlabwɛ ɩkʋlɛ sʋ a, abɛ́talɩ wa klʋn yɔ mʋ ansɩtɔ faan, anɩmɛ́ɛtra nya ifu. 13Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ ɩpa bwii ha mlɩ mbɛɛ, mlɩmáha abatɔ iwu mlɩ, ɩwɩɔsɩn anfɩ ndewun ha mlɩ anfɩ sʋ; tsufɛ ɩbɔ́wa labi ha mlɩ.
Kristo Ɔdwɛ
14Ɩnɩ sʋ mɩ akpawunu iyi asɩ, ndɛ anɩ Sɩ amʋ kokoli. 15Mʋtɔ abusuan kugyikʋá ɩbʋ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ lɛlɩn tsu. 16Mʋbʋ oyula akpɔnkpɔntɩ ha mʋ abi. Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ mʋ kokoli mbɛɛ, mʋ Ɔŋɛ amʋ ɔhɩɛ wa mlɩ ɔkla ɔwʋnlɩn tsu mʋ oyula kpɔnkpɔntɩ atokiehɛ amʋtɔ, 17Kristo ɔtsʋn mlɩ hogyisʋ tsia mlɩ klʋntɔ bregyibrɛ. Ndɛ mʋ kʋlɩ mbɛɛ, ɔha amlɩlɛ nlin yɔ ɔtɔtɔ, Bulu-dwɛ pʋ́ mlɩ abadwɛtɔ, amlɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin. 18Fówun mlɩa Bulu aha atrahɛ mlɛ́talɩ bɩá Kristo ɔdwɛ lɛhɩɛ moni, ɩlɛhɩɛ tɛɩ, ɩhɩɛ bʋ ɩswɩ, ɩlɛhɩɛ fʋa, ɩlɛhɩɛ wie ɔtɔtɔ. 19Ntra ndɛ mʋ kokoli mbɛɛ, ɔha amlɩbɩ Kristo ɔdwɛ amʋʋ nyankpʋsa ɔkʋkʋ mɛ́ɛtalɩ nu mʋ́ asɩ yi amʋ. Fówun mlɩ tsiatɔ bɔ́bwɛ fɛ Bulu klɛ.
20Ɩnɩá Bulu tumi dɛ agyʋma yɔ anɩtɔ sʋ a, ɔtɛtalɩ bwɛ atɔ ha anɩ dʋn alɩá anɩtɔkʋlɩ mʋ, ntɛ anɩtosusu. 21Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩha akanfʋ Bulu. Anyankpʋsa otuntufla fɛ́ɛ́ bʋkanfʋ mʋ atɔ akpɔnkpɔntɩ amʋʋ ɔdɛbwɛ Kristo Yesu pʋ́ ɔpasua amʋtɔ amʋ sʋ, tsu sei yɔfʋn brɛá ɩtamata. Amen!

Title: EFESOFƆ 4
Content:
Anɩa Kristonyɔ Ɩkʋlɛbwɛ
1Ɩnɩ sʋ mɩ anfɩ nda obu anɩ Wie agyʋma yɔ sʋ anfɩ ndɛ ɩpa bwii ha mlɩ mbɛɛ, mlɩtsia tsiatɔ oduá ɩlɛkana alɩá Bulu lɛlɛ mlɩ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩbetsia. 2Mlɩba ɩwɩasɩ, amlɩlwii. Mlɩnya klʋn ha aba, amlɩdwɛ aba. 3Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ laha mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩbɔ mbɔdɩ amlɩtsia iwilwiitɔ, mɛnɩ ɩkʋlɛbwɛ amʋ ibétsia mlɩtɔ yɔ. 4Ɔyʋlʋ kʋlɛ ɩwɩ ntobi anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩgyi. Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ kʋlɛ pɛ bʋ ɩnʋ. Alɩ kɛn Bulu lɛlɛ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔbɛɛ, abɛ́kɩ toku kʋlɛ pɛ ɔkpa nɩ. 5Owie ɔkʋlɛ; hogyi kʋlɛ; asubɔ kʋlɛ. 6Bulu ɔkʋlɛ. Mʋgyi anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ Ɔsɩ. Mʋdɛ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ gyi, ɔdɛ agyʋma yɔ tsʋn anɩ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ, otsie anɩ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
7Kristo lɔwa awɩtɔlɛ ye atokiehɛ ha anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔbɛɛ, apʋyɔ mʋ agyʋma, 8fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ,
“Brɛá ɔlɔyɔ ɔsʋsʋ a,
ɔlɛkpa ndoun buo ɩwɩ,
kie aha atɔ.”
9Nɩ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Ɔlɔyɔ ɔsʋsʋ” a, idesuna ánɩ́ Kristo legyankpa kplɩ wie ɔsʋlʋtɔ. 10Mʋmʋ idesuna ánɩ́ ɔha amʋʋ ɔlɛkplɩ wie ɔsʋlʋtɔ amʋ kɛn lɔyɔ ɔsʋsʋ, ɔtɩnɛá ɩlɔfʋa dʋn nɩ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́bʋla ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ fɛ́ɛ́, ha mʋ́ ɩfʋn. 11Kristo onuto lɔbwɛ anɩtɔ akʋ mʋ sumbi ayɔpʋ. Akʋ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ. Akʋ mʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan adapʋ. Akʋ ɛ akpapʋ pʋ́ asunapʋ. 12Kristo lɛlɛ amʋ́ alɩ, mɛnɩ Bulu aha bɛ́talɩ yɔ mʋ agyʋma, pʋwa Kristo ɔyʋlʋ ɩkʋlɛ; igyi mʋ ɔpasua amʋ ɔwʋnlɩn, 13mɛnɩ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ abɔ́bwɛ kʋlɛ hogyitɔ, bɩ Bulu mʋ Bi amʋ. Fówun abɛ́dan, fʋn ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ fɛ Kristo. 14Ɩnɩ sʋ anɩmɛ́ɛtra bwɛ fɛ nyebiá aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔdwɛ bɛ́talɩ pʋ amʋ́ atosunahɛ pɔpwɛ kugyikʋ bɛmlɛ, fɛ alɩá ntsu tɛda ɔklʋn ya ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛá idekle. 15Mboun mlɩha abla aba ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋ ɔdwɛtɔ, mɛnɩ abɛ́dan togyitɔtɔ, bwɛ fɛ Kristo, ogyi ɔpasua amʋ nwun. 16Ɩna mʋsʋ ɔyʋlʋ, igyi ɔpasua amʋ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ ɩtsa aba, ɩdɛ aba wanklaan. Nɩ nyankpʋsa-oyi ɩwɩ ntobi amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩdɛ mʋ́ agyʋma yɔ wanklaan a, Kristo tɛha mʋ́ ɩtɛdan ɔdwɛtɔ.
Nkpa Dada Mʋ́a Pɔpwɛ
17Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ mlɩ ɔla da anɩ Wie ɩdatɔ mbɛɛ, mlɩmátra tsia fɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋmeyin Bulu. Ɩtɔá mɔ́ɔwa labi ha amʋ́ ɩwɩ bʋtɔgywɩɩn. 18Amʋ́ nwuntɔ loklun. Mʋ́ sʋ bʋma nkpa pɔpwɛ amʋʋ itsu Bulu wa amʋ, tsufɛ bʋmeyin tɔtɔ. Ɩklʋntɔ bʋ amʋ́ odwin. 19Lalahɛbwɛ tamawa amʋ́ pɛlɩ, bʋtekle hakpanla kugyikʋ bwɛ. Bʋtɔbwɛ lalahɛ kugyikʋ, bʋtamatalɩ kɩta ɩwɩ.
20Tamɛ mlɩ mʋ́ a, megyi tsiatɔ anfɩ odu mlɩlɛkasɩ tsu Kristo ɩwɩ. 21Nyin ánɩ́ mlɩlanu Yesu ɩwɩ asʋn, basuna mlɩ ɔnɔkwalɩá ɩbʋ mʋtɔ ɛ. 22Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩsi mlɩ tsiatɔ dada amʋʋ mlɩletsia amʋ. Mlɩ ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ lɛmlɛ mlɩ alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ, ɩlɛha mlɩ tsiatɔ leyinta. 23Mlɩha Bulu ɔbwɛ mlɩ klʋn pʋ́ mlɩ agywɩɩn pɔpwɛ. 24Mlɩtsia tsiatɔ pɔpwɛá igyi Bulu atsiabi, mʋ́ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn, ɩna dɩnka ɔnɔkwalɩ ɔkpa amʋsʋ.
25Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ ɔmátra wa afunu. Ɔhagyiɔha ɔbla mʋ ba Okristoyin ɔnɔkwalɩ. Tsufɛ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩgyi nyankpʋsa-oyi ɔkʋlɛ amʋ ɩwɩ atɔ. 26Ɔblɔ ɩkɩta mlɩ a, ɩmáha mlɩ amlɩbwɛ lakpan. Ɩmátsia mlɩtɔ yɔfʋn owi tahɛ. 27Mlɩmátepi ha Ɔbʋnsam ɔkpa ɔmlɛ mlɩ, amlɩbwɛ lakpan. 28Owikplu mátra wi atɔ. Ɔpʋ mʋ ɩbɩ yɔ agyʋma, mɛnɩ obénya tɔkʋ kpa mʋ ɩwɩ, nya ɩkʋ ɛ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋma kʋkʋ. 29Mlɩmáha asʋn lalahɛ kʋkʋ ɩdalɩ tsu mlɩ ɔnɔ. Mboun mʋ́á ɩbɔ́bʋa ɔha, ɩbɔ́bwɛ yile, wa labi, wa mʋ́ anupʋ ɔwʋnlɩn. 30Mlɩmábwɛ tɔá ɩbɛ́han Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ. Tsufɛ mʋ́ Bulu lɔpʋhɩɛ mlɩ nsʋ, pʋsuna ánɩ́ mʋbʋ mlɩ, mɔ́hɔ mlɩ nkpa ɛkɛ amʋ nɩ. 31Mlɩlɛ ɔnsɩpɛkpan, olu pʋ́ ɔblɔkpan, ɩtrɛ, isia pʋ́ lakpan kugyikʋ agywɩɩn lɛ mlɩtɔ. 32Mboun mlɩwa awɩtɔlɛ ha aba. Mlɩwun aba nwɛ, amlɩsi lakpan kie aba fɛ alɩ amʋʋ Kristo sʋ Bulu lesi mlɩ klɛ kie mlɩ amʋ.

Title: EFESOFƆ 5
Content:
Akristofɔ Atsiabi
1Ɩnɩá Bulu abiá ɔtɛhɩɛ dwɛ mlɩgyi sʋ a, mlɩtsia mʋ atsiabi. 2Mlɩdwɛ aba ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ, fɛ alɩá Kristo lɔdwɛ anɩ, tsula bɔmɔ mʋ anɩ sʋ. Ɔlɔpʋ mʋ ɩwɩ bwɛ atɔ hahɛ pʋ́ afɔdɩɛ-abɔtɔá ɩbʋ ɔfan fanfaanfan ha Bulu, ilegyi mʋ ansɩ.
3Bulu latɩn mlɩ ɩwɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmáwa atsɩ mʋa ayin asʋn, wa hakpan, ntɛ ɔnsɩpɛ. 4Mʋ́ ɔma a, ɩma alɛá mlɛ́blɩ asʋn ánɩ́ ɩbʋ pɛlɩ pʋ́ mʋ́á ɩma anulɛ, ntɛ wa ɔplɔɩkpan. Mboun mlɩda Bulu ɩpan bregyibrɛ. 5Ɩwankɩ mlɩá mbʋa ɔtɔpʋ, ɔhakpan ntɛ ɔnsɩpɛ ɔwapʋ ɔkʋkʋ méenya ogyikpa Kristo mʋa Bulu iwiegyi amʋtɔ. (Tsufɛ ɔnsɩpɛ ɔwapʋ gyi fɛ ɔkpɩ ɔtswɛpʋ).
6Mlɩmáha ɔkpa ɔhaa ɔpʋ asʋn ánɩ́ ɩma labi kʋkʋ mlɛ mlɩ. Tsufɛ tsiatɔ lalahɛ anfɩ odu sʋ Bulu tenya ɔblɔ bɩtɩ aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn ɩsʋ nɩ. 7Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmápʋ amʋ́ gyi mba. 8Brɛ amʋ a, okluntɔ mlɩtsie mlɩdɛ lakpan bwɛ. Tamɛ sei a, mlɩa anɩ Wienyɔ mlɩlabwɛ ɩkʋlɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩtsie wankɩtɔ. Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩ tsiatɔ isuna ánɩ́ mlɩtsie wankɩtɔ. 9Tsufɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ wankɩtɔ tɔbwɛ yile. Mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa, ɔbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ. 10Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩbɔ mbɔdɩ amlɩkasɩ tɔá Bulu tekle. 11Mlɩmágyi mba. Labi kʋkʋ ɩma mʋ́tɔ. Mboun mlɩlɛ amʋ́ bwɛhɛ ɔwan. 12Ɩhɩɛ bʋ pɛlɩá bɛ́blɩ ntobiá aha bʋtɔbwɛ ŋaintɔ ɩwɩ asʋn kʋraa. 13Tamɛ nɩ ɩtɔ wankɩhɛ ɩwankɩ wʋlɩ tɔá ɩbʋ okluntɔsʋ a, itemli itowunhɛ. 14Tsufɛ atɔ wankɩhɛ tɛlɛ togyitɔ ɔwan. Mʋ́ sʋ bɛblɩ bɛɛ,
“Ɔdɩdɩpʋ, tsinki.
Kʋsʋ tsu afulitɔ,
Kristo ɔwankɩ wʋlɩ fʋsʋ.” nɩ.
15Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩkɩ mlɩ tsiatɔ wanklaan. Mlɩmátsia nkpa fɛ aha mimlahɛ, mboun mlɩtsia fɛ atɩansɩpʋ. 16Nɩ mlenya brɛá mlɔ́pʋbwɛ ɩtɔ wanklaan a, mlɩmáyinta mʋ́. Tsufɛ lalahɛbwɛ lamoni alɩ brɛ anfɩtɔ. 17Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmábwɛ mimlala. Mboun mlɩbɔ mbɔdɩ amlɩbɩ tɔá anɩ Wie tekle, amlɩbwɛ mʋ́.
18Mlɩmánun nta bʋ, tsufɛ iteyinta ɔha. Mboun mlɩha Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ ɔbʋla mlɩ bregyibrɛ. 19Mlɩpʋ Bulu asʋn wa ɩlʋ, amlɩwa ɩlʋá Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ lɔpʋwa mlɩ klʋntɔ pʋtɔɩ kpla aba; amlɩwa ɩlʋ ɛ tsu mlɩ klʋntɔ kanfʋ anɩ Wie. 20Mlɩda anɩ Sɩ Bulu ɩpan togyitɔtɔ bregyibrɛ, anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ɩdatɔ.
Akristofɔ Aklu Mʋ́a Aka Tsiatɔ
21Mlɩba ɩwɩasɩ ha aba fɛ alɩá mlɩtɛba ɩwɩasɩ ha Kristo.
22Ɔtsɩ, ba ɩwɩasɩ ha fʋ klu fɛ alɩá fʋtɛba ɩwɩasɩ ha Kristo. 23Tsufɛ oklu bʋ tumi mʋ kasʋ, fɛ alɩá Kristo bʋ tumi ɔpasua amʋsʋ. Ɔpasua amʋ gyi mʋ ɔyʋlʋ, Kristo amʋ onuto gyi mʋ́ Ɔlɛpʋ. 24Alɩ amʋʋ ɔpasua amʋ tɛba ɩwɩasɩ ha Kristo amʋ a, alɩ kɛn ɔka ɛ ɔba ɩwɩasɩ ha mʋ klu togyitɔtɔ nɩ.
25Aklu, mlɩdwɛ mlɩ aka fɛ alɩ amʋʋ Kristo lɔdwɛ ɔpasua amʋ, tsula bɔmɔ mʋ mʋ́ sʋ amʋ. 26Kristo lotsula bɔmɔ mʋ pʋtɩn ɔpasua amʋ ɩwɩ ha Bulu. Olebie ɔpasua amʋ ntsu, pʋ mʋ asʋn amʋ gyʋra mʋ́ ɩwɩ. 27Omekleá ifin pʋ́ asʋansʋ bétsia ɔpasua amʋ ɩwɩ, ntɛ mʋ́ ɔtɩnɛkʋ ɩbɔ́kpʋkpʋ tɩa, mɛnɩ ɩbɔ́wa mʋ onuto amʋ akɩlɛ fɛ obitebi, ɔbɛ́kpa mʋ ba mʋ ɩwɩ wa. 28Alɩ kɛn lehian ánɩ́ oyin ɔbɔ́dwɛ mʋ ka fɛ mʋ ɩwɩ nɩ. Oyin ánɩ́ ɔtɔdwɛ mʋ ka tɔdwɛ mʋ onuto ɩwɩ. 29Tsufɛ ɔhaa tamalu mʋ ɩwɩ, bʋla ɔtɛbʋla mʋ ɩwɩ, kɩ mʋ ɩwɩsʋ wanklaan fɛ alɩá Kristo ɛ tɔbwɛ ha ɔpasua amʋ. 30Tsufɛ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩgyi Kristo ɔyʋlʋ ɩwɩ ntobi. 31Fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Ɩnɩ sʋ oyin ɔbɛ́natɩ si mʋ sɩ mʋa mʋ yin, yɛmanta mʋ kasʋ. Fówun amʋ́ abanyɔ amʋ bɔ́bwɛ ɔyʋlʋ kʋlɛ” nɩ. 32Ɔnɔkwalɩ, Bulu asʋn ŋainhɛ anfɩtɔ bʋ odwin. Ndɛkɩ mbɛɛ, Kristo mʋa ɔpasua amʋ ɩwɩ asʋn igyi. 33Mlɩ ɛ mlɩ asʋn igyi. Mʋ́ sʋ ntra ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, oyingyioyin ɔdwɛ mʋ ka fɛ mʋ onuto ɩwɩ, ɔtsɩ ɛ obu mʋ klu.

Title: EFESOFƆ 6
Content:
Abi Mʋ́a Akwɩɩpʋ
1Abi, mlɩa anɩ Wienyɔ mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩbu mlɩ akwɩɩpʋ. Tsufɛ mʋ́gyi tɔá ɩda ɔkpa ánɩ́ mlɔ́bwɛ nɩ. 2Ɩnɩgyi mbla amʋtɔ gyankpapʋá ɔlɛhɩɛ oyula manta mʋ́sʋ nɩ. “Bu fʋ sɩ mʋa fʋ yin, 3mɛnɩ ɩbɔ́wa alɛ ha fʋ. Fówun fɛ́dan fuli nwun fʋ nkpa anfɩtɔ.”
4Abi asɩ, mlɩmátsia wa mlɩ abi ɔblɔ. Mboun mlɩyaɩ amʋ́, amlɩsuna amʋ́ atɔ alɩá anɩ Wie tekle.
Nkpábi Pʋ́ Amʋ́ Awie
5Nkpábi, mlɩbu mlɩ awie. Mlɩnya amʋ́ ifu, amlɩbu amʋ́ tsu mlɩ klʋntɔ fɛ alɩá mlɩtobu Kristo. 6Mlɩmábwɛ yile amʋ́ ansɩtɔ alɩá bɛ́kanfʋ mlɩ sʋ. Tamɛ fɛ Kristo nkpábi a, mlɩbwɛ atɔ tsu mlɩ klʋntɔ fɛ alɩá Bulu tekle. 7Mlɩlɛ ɩwɩtɔ yɔ agyʋma ansigyisʋ ha amʋ́, fɛ Kristo mlɩdɛ mʋ́ yɔ ha, megyi nyankpʋsa. 8Mlɩdɩnka ansɩá anɩ Wie ɔbɛ́ka ɔhagyiɔha ɩkɔ, ɩtɔ wanklaan kugyikʋá ɔlɔbwɛ sʋ. Nɩ ɔkpábi fʋgyi o, fʋtsie fʋ ɩwɩsʋ o.
9Awie, mlɩ ɛ mlɩkɩta mlɩ nkpábi wanklaan, fɛ alɩá nablɩ bɔtsʋn. Mlɩmábwɛ amʋ́ kpounkpoun. Mlɩkaɩn ánɩ́ mlɩa amʋ́nyɔ fɛ́ɛ́ owie amʋ bʋ ɔsʋsʋ. Mʋ mʋ́ ɔtamakɩ ɔhaa ansɩtɔ.
Bulu Akɔtɔ
10Mɩ asʋn trahɛ-trahɛ gyi, apio, mlɩtsʋn anɩa anɩ Wienyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛsʋ amlɩha mʋ ɔwa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn tsu mʋ tumi kpɔnkpɔntɩ amʋtɔ. 11Mlɩdɩda ɩsa-akɔtɔ fɛ́ɛ́á Bulu laha mlɩ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩpʋkɔ Ɔbʋnsam, mɛnɩ mlɛ́talɩ lɩɩ mʋ ɔmlɛn amʋ ɔnɔ. 12Tsufɛ megyi anɩa anyankpʋsa dɛkɔ. Mboun anɩa ɔŋɛtɔ tumi lalahɛ, atumipʋ pʋ́ ɔŋɛ lalahɛá bʋbʋ ɔyɩ klunhɛ anfɩtɔ pʋ́ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ dɛkɔ. 13Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩdɩda Bulu akɔtɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́, mɛnɩ ɛkɛá lalahɛ kʋ ifwie mlɩtɔ a, mlɩmɛ́ɛsrɩ, mlɛ́talɩ lɩɩ mʋ́ ɔnɔ, tra nya ɔŋɛ wa ɔwʋnlɩn lɩɩ kinkiinkin.
14Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩkʋsʋ, amlɩda ɩwɩsʋ. Ɔnɔkwalɩwa ɩbwɛ ɔfɛá ɩklɩ mlɩ osiesʋ. Yilebwɛ ɩbwɛ mlɩ kantɔ-atintɔ. 15Ɩwɩsʋda ha iwilwii asʋn wanklaan amʋtɔ kɩta pʋ́ mʋ́ blɩ ɩbwɛ mlɩ ɩsatɔ ntʋkʋta. 16Ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔma a, mlɩkɩta Kristo hogyi amʋtɔ bregyibrɛ. Ɩbwɛ mlɩ atintɔá mlɔ́pʋtin mlɩ ɩwɩ, mɛnɩ Ɔbʋnsam mbɩn pɩɔnpɩɔn amʋʋ ɩdɛtsʋn amʋtɔ kʋkʋ ɩmɔ́ɔwɔ mlɩ. 17Mlɩpʋ Bulu nkpahɔ amʋ bwɛ mlɩ kʋtʋpa. Mlɩkɩta Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ, ɩbwɛ mlɩ ɩsatɔ ɔdayiá Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ tɛha mlɩ. 18Mlɩha Bulu Ɔŋɛ amʋ ɔkpa mlɩ, amlɩbɔ mpaɩ bregyibrɛ. Mlɩkʋlɩ Bulu, ɔtsa mlɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩdɩnka ansɩ ɩwɩsʋ. Mlɩmási mpaɩ bɔ ha Bulu aha fɛ́ɛ́. 19Mlɩbɔ mpaɩ ha mɩ. Nɩ nobwii ɔnɔ a, Bulu ɔpʋ mʋ asʋn amʋ wa mɩ ɔnɔ; ɔha mɩ antalɩ wa klʋn blɩ asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋʋ ɩbʋ mʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋtɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́. 20Asʋn amʋ ɩwɩ sumbi ɔyɔpʋ ngyi. Mʋ́ ɔkanda sʋ nda obu nɩ. Mlɩbɔ mpaɩ mlɩaa, Bulu ɔha mɩ antalɩ wa klʋn blɩ mʋ́ alɩá ilehian.
Ɩkla
21Osumbi ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ anɩ pio ɔdwɛpʋ Tihiko gyi anɩ Wie agyʋma amʋtɔ. Ɔbɛ́bla mlɩ mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn fɛ́ɛ́, mɛnɩ mlɛ́bɩ alɩá ngyi pʋ́ tɔá ndɛbwɛ. 22Ɩnɩ koun sʋ ndɛ mʋ wa mlɩ wa nɩ. Ndekle mbɛɛ, ɔbɛ́bla mlɩ alɩá togyitɔ ɩdɛ mʋ́sʋ yɔ nfɩ. Ɔtɔɩ kpla mlɩ pʋwa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn.
23Ɔsɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋha mlɩ ahogyipʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ iwilwii. Bʋha amlɩtsia dwɛ aba, mlɩ ansɩ ɩdɩnka Bulusʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. 24Ogyi aha ánɩ́ bʋtamasi anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo dwɛ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋalɛ.

Title: FILIPIFƆ 1
Content:
Itsiaha
1Mɩ Paulo pʋ́ anɩ pio Timoteoá anɩgyi Kristo Yesu asumpʋ dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ Bulu aha ánɩ́ mlɩbʋ Filipi wulutɔ, mlɩa Yesu Kristo mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ. Mlɩa mlɩ ɔpasua ahandɛ pʋ́ amʋ́ abʋapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩdɛ mʋ́ wanlɩn sɩsɩ.
2Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋgyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, abʋha mlɩ iwilwii.
Paulo Atɔkʋlɩ Pʋ́ Ɩpanda
3Ntɛda mɩ Bulu ɩpan nɩ nɛkaɩn mlɩsʋ bregyibrɛ. 4Bregyibrɛá ndɛ mpaɩ bɔ ha mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ a, ansɩ tegyi mɩ. 5Tsufɛ tsu ɛkɛá mlɩlɔtsɔ asʋn wanklaan amʋ nu a, mlɩdɛ anɩ tsa anɩdɛ mʋ́ ɔkan da bɔtʋ ndɛ. 6Nyin ánɩ́ Bulu amʋʋ olefi agyʋma wanklaan amʋ asɩ mlɩtɔ amʋ kɛn ɔbɔ́yɔ mʋ́sʋ alɩɩ yɔfʋn Kristo Yesu ɔbakɛ amʋ. 7Ɩlɛkana ánɩ́ nósusu mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩwɩ alɩ, tsufɛ ntɛhɩɛ dwɛ mlɩ. Ɩnɩá nda obu, ntɛ ndɛkɔ asʋn wanklaan amʋ nwunsʋ, mlɩlɩɩ mɩ ɔma a, anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ Bulu dɛ bʋalɛ gyi. 8Bulu yin ánɩ́ ntosusu mlɩ ɩwɩ, ntɛhɩɛ dwɛ mlɩ fɛ alɩá Kristo Yesu tɔdwɛ mlɩ.
9Ndɛ Bulu kokoli mbɛɛ, ɔha amlɩdwɛ aba dʋn alɩ, amlɩtɩn ansɩ, nu asʋn amʋ ɛ asɩ wanklaan, 10mɛnɩ mlɛ́bɩ tɔá ɩhɩɛ ɩbʋ alɛ. Amlɩtsia nkpa ánɩ́ mʋ́ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn, ɔlala ɩma mʋ́ ɩwɩ alɩɩ yɔfʋn ɛkɛá Kristo ɔbɛ́laba. 11Yesu Kristo ɔha mʋ yilebwɛ ɩbʋla mlɩtɔ, fɛ alɩá oyi toswie abi; ɩpʋ numnyam mʋ́a kanfʋ ha Bulu.
Paulo Ɩkantɔdɩ Lɛha Bulu Asʋn Lɛklɛɩ
12Mɩ apio, ilehian ánɩ́ mlɛ́bɩá ɩkplan anfɩ ɩlatʋ mɩ anfɩ laha asʋn wanklaan amʋ laklɛɩ tsɩa. 13Tsufɛ ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ nfɩ, pʋ́ ɩsa akɔpʋá bʋtogyo owie-woyi aná fɛ́ɛ́ babɩ ánɩ́ Kristo-buo sʋ nda ɩkantɔ. 14Mɩ ɩkantɔdɩ sʋ apio tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bapʋ ansɩ dɩnka anɩ Wiesʋ. Bʋhɩɛ bʋdɛ klʋn wa da asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan, ifu mɛdɛ amʋ́.
15Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá mɩ ɩwɩ olu pʋ́ mɩ ɩwɩ ahin sʋ akʋ bʋdɛ Kristo ɩwɩ asʋn amʋ ɔkan da. Tamɛ amʋ́ akʋ ɛ balɛ klʋntɔ bʋdɛ mʋ́ bwɛ. 16Alɩ aha anfɩ bʋdɛpʋ mɩ ɩwɩ ɔdwɛ da asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan. Tsufɛ bʋyin ánɩ́ Bulu lɔpʋ mɩ ba nfɩá mbɛprɩ mʋ asʋn amʋ nwun. 17Aha amʋʋ bʋmɛdɛ Kristo ɩwɩ asʋn amʋ ɔkan da tsu amʋ́ klʋntɔ amʋ mʋ́ a, amʋ́ nkʋlɛ inya sʋ bʋdɛ mʋ́ bwɛ. Nda ɩkantɔ, sʋ bʋdekleá béyinta mɩ ɩwɩ tsɩa.
18Tamɛ ɩmɛdɛ mɩ han, nɩ yile sʋ bʋdɛ mʋ́ bwɛ o, lalahɛ sʋ o. Mʋ́á ɩdɛ mɩ hian gyi, banya bʋdɛ Kristo asʋn amʋ ɔkan da nɩ. Ɩnɩ sʋ ansɩ ɩhɩɛ dɛ mɩ gyi nɩ. 19Tsufɛ nyin ánɩ́ mlɩ mpaɩ pʋ́ Yesu Kristo Ɔŋɛ amʋ ɔbɛ́kpa mɩ, nɛ́dalɩ ɩkplan anfɩtɔ. 20Nhɩɛ nyin, mbʋ hogyiá mmɔ́ɔbwɛ tɔá ɩbɛ́ha pɛlɩ bɛ́kɩta mɩ. Mboun nɛ́tra wa ɩwɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, mɛnɩ nɩ lowu igyi o, nkpa igyi o, mɩ tsiatɔ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbɔ́wa Kristo numnyam. 21Tsufɛ nɩ ntsie nkpa a, ntsie ha Kristo. Nɩ nowu ɛ a, ɩbɔ́wa mɩ labi dʋn. 22Tamɛ nɩ ntra ntsie ɔyɩtɔ a, négyi gyʋma ánɩ́ ɩbɔ́wa labi ha mɩ. Ɩnɩ sʋ mmowun mʋ́á nlɛ. 23Nagyigya, tamɛ ɩbʋ mɩ alɛá néyetsia Kristo wa mboun. Mʋ́bʋ alɛ dʋn. 24Tamɛ mlɩ sʋ ɩbʋ alɛá nétsia nkpa. 25Nyin alɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ nétsia mlɩ wa abɔ́yɔ agyʋma amʋ, mɛnɩ mlɛ́dan, nya ansigyi mlɩ Kristo hogyi sʋ. 26Mʋmʋ brɛá neyinki ba mlɩ wa a, mlénya ɔkpa kanfʋ Kristo Yesu, ɩtɔ amʋʋ alabwɛ ha mɩ amʋ sʋ.
27Tɔá idehian sei gyi, mlɩha mlɩ tsiatɔ ɩkana Kristo asʋn wanklaan amʋ. Mʋmʋ nɩ nɛba mlɩ wa o, mmɛba o, nónuá mlɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ; mlɩdɛ hogyi amʋʋ ɩbʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋtɔ amʋ ɛ nwun prɩ. 28Mlɩmánya aha ánɩ́ bɔ́kʋsʋ lɩɩ mlɩsʋ ifu ɔkpa ɔkʋkʋsʋ. Mlɩ ɩklʋnwa ɩbɔ́bwɛ osuna ha amʋ́á Bulu onuto ɔbɛ́hɩ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́, tamɛ ɔbɔ́hɔ mlɩ mʋ́ nkpa. 29Tsufɛ megyi Kristo hogyi nkʋlɛ sʋ Bulu lɔpʋha mlɩ. Mboun alɩá mlówun ipian ha mʋ ɛ. 30Ɩsa amʋʋ mlɩlowun ánɩ́ ndɛkɔ amʋ kɛn mlɩdɛkɔ a. Mʋ́ kɛntɔ ntra mbʋ nɩ.

Title: FILIPIFƆ 2
Content:
Kristo Ɩwɩasɩba Kasɩ
1Mlɩa Kristonyɔ mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ alawa mlɩ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn. Mʋ ɔdwɛ lalwii mlɩ klʋn. Mlɩa mʋ Ɔŋɛ amʋ ɩkʋlɛbwɛ sʋ alaha mlɩa mlɩ aba mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ, mlɩdɛ ɩkʋ tsu lɛ mlɩ aba asʋntɔ, mlɩdɛ aba nwɛ wun. 2Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩbwɛ kʋlɛ, amlɩtsula dwɛ aba tsu mlɩ klʋntɔ. Mlɩbwɛ agywɩɩn kʋlɛ, amlɩyɔ agyʋma wa abatɔ pʋha mɩ ansigyi ɩfʋn. 3Mlɩmábwɛ awʋnsɩpʋ. Mlɩmátsu ɩwɩ. Mboun mlɩba ɩwɩasɩ, amlɩtsu mʋ́á mlɩ aba bʋdʋn mlɩ. 4Mlɩmádunka mlɩ nkʋlɛ klɛ. Mlɩdunka mlɩ aba ɛ klɛ. 5Mlɩha mlɩ agywɩɩn ɩbwɛ fɛ Kristo Yesu klɛ.
6Ɩnɩá ɔlɛlɩan Bulu ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ o a,
ɔmɔbwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ obótsu mʋ ɩwɩá mʋa Bulu bʋgyi kɛkɛ.
7Mboun olesi mʋ togyitɔ ɔmagya,
bwɛ mʋ ɩwɩ osumpʋ.
Bɔkwɩɩ mʋ fɛ alɩá bɔkwɩɩ ɔhagyiɔha.
8Mʋ nyankpʋsabwɛtɔ a, ɔlɛba ɩwɩasɩ.
Olobu atɔ alɩɩ wu oyikpalihɛsʋ,
fɛ lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋ.
9Ɩnɩ sʋ Bulu lotsu mʋ fʋa ya ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ,
ha mʋ ɩda ánɩ́ ɩdʋn ada fɛ́ɛ́,
10mɛnɩ ntobiá bʋbʋ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ
pʋ́ ɔsʋlʋ ayasɩ bɛ́da akpawunu ha mʋ.
11Ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɛ́lɛ blɩ ánɩ́ “Yesu Kristo gyi Owie!”
pʋwa anɩ Sɩ Bulu numnyam.
Mlɩwankɩ Fɛ Ntsrakpabi
12Ɩnɩ sʋ apio adwɛpʋ, alɩ amʋʋ mlɩtobu mɩ brɛ amʋʋ mbʋ mlɩ wa amʋ a, ɩnɩá mma mlɩ wa o a, mlɩbɔ mbɔdɩ amlɩbwɛ mʋ́ alɩ. Mlɩpʋ ifu mʋ́a kpɩnkɩ yɔ mlɩ nkpahɔ agyʋma amʋ mɔ ɔnɔ. 13Tsufɛ Bulu onuto dɛ agyʋma yɔ mlɩtɔ. Alaha mlɩlatsula mlɩdɛ mʋ apɛ mʋ́a tɔá otekle bwɛ.
14Mlɩmátɔɩ ntɛ gyi togyitɔá mlɔ́bwɛ ɩwɩ nwɛn, 15mɛnɩ ɔlala méetsia mlɩ ɩwɩ; mlɩ ɩwɩ bɛ́tɩn, fɛ Bulu aha brɛ anfɩ mlɩtsie lakpan kugyikʋ abwɛpʋ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ. Mlɩwankɩ fɛ ntsrakpabi amʋ́ ansɩtɔ. 16Mlɩyɔ mʋ́sʋ amlɩbla aha asʋn amʋʋ ɩtɛha nkpa amʋ, mɛnɩ mlɩ sʋ nɛ́talɩ pʋ ɩbɩ si kantɔ ɛkɛá anɩ Wie Kristo ɔbɛ́laba, ánɩ́ mɩ mbɔdɩ ntɛ mɩ gyumagyihɛ mɔbwɛ kpaalɩ.
17Tamɛ nɩ ɩbɛ́ba mʋ́tɔá bɔ́pʋ mɩ obugya wʋlɩ asɩ fɛ nta, mlɩ hogyi ɩwɩ afɔdɩɛ pʋ́ Bulu agyʋma ánɩ́ mlɩdɛyɔsʋ kʋraa a, ɩbɔ́wa mɩ ɔdwɛ. Ansɩ bégyi mɩa mlɩnyɔ fɛ́ɛ́. 18Mʋ́ sʋ ɩwa mlɩ ɔdwɛ, ansɩ igyi anɩ fɛ́ɛ́.
Timoteo Mʋa Epafrodito
19Nɩ anɩ Wie Yesu lotsula a, ɩmɔ́ɔwa ɔpá nɔ́wa Timoteo mlɩ wa. Nɩ oyinki bɛbla mɩá mlɩtsie wanklaan a, ansɩ bégyi mɩ. 20Mma ɔha ánɩ́ olotsu ɩkʋ lɛ mlɩ asʋntɔ dʋn mʋ. 21Tsufɛ atrahɛ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋdɛ amʋ́ onuto klɛ kɩ, megyi Yesu Kristo klɛ. 22Tamɛ mlɩyin alɩá Timoteo lagyi mʋ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ wanklaan. Alatsa mɩ anɩlada asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan fɛ obi mʋ́a ɔsɩ. 23Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ ɔkpa kɩá nɩ nenya wun tɔá ɩbɛ́ba mɩsʋ nfɩ pɛ a, nɔ́wa mʋ mlɩ wa. 24Nahogyiá anɩ Wie ɔbɛ́kpa mɩ, ɩmɔ́ɔwa ɔpá mɩ onuto nɛ́ba mlɩ wa.
25Tamɛ nɔbwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ nɛ́layinkia Epafrodito sɩsɩ mlɩ. Anɩ pioá mɩa mʋnyɔ anɩdɛ agyʋma yɔ, anɩdɛkɔ asʋn wanklaan amʋ nwunsʋ. Mʋgyi mlɩ biá mlɩlɔwa mlɩaa, ɔba bɛkɩ mɩsʋ nɩ. 26Tsufɛ ɔdɛ mlɩsʋ kaɩn dʋbɩ. Ɩhɩɛ dɛ mʋ han, tsufɛ mlɩlonu mʋ ɩlɔ. 27Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, alalɔ sian wu, tamɛ Bulu lowun mʋ nwɛ. Megyi mʋ nkʋlɛ, mɩa mʋnyɔ fɛ́ɛ́, mɛnɩ awɩrɛhɔ mɔ́ɔdʋn mɩ kɩta. 28Mʋ́ sʋ nhɩɛ ndekleá nɔ́kɔsɩ wa mʋ mlɩ wa, mɛnɩ nɩ mlɛlawun mʋ a, ansɩ bégyi mlɩ. Mɩ ɛ mɩ asʋn susuhɛsʋ bɛ́kala kuka. 29Mlɩhɩɛ pʋ ansigyi hɔ mʋ, fɛ mlɩ ba Okristoyin, amlɩpʋ obú ha mʋa aha ánɩ́ bʋgyi fɛ mʋ. 30Tsufɛ olesi mʋ nkpa ha Kristo agyʋma amʋ. Olekle owu mʋ́tɔ brɛá ɔlɩɩ mlɩ ɩdatɔ, mʋ nkʋlɛ ɔdɛ togyitɔá tɛkɩ nɩ mlɩbʋ nfɩ mlɔ́bwɛ ha mɩ bwɛ.

Title: FILIPIFƆ 3
Content:
Yesu Lowu Hɔ Anɩ Nkpa
1Ɩtrahɛ a, mɩ apio, anɩ Wie sʋ mlɩnya ansigyi. Ɩmɔkʋkpɔn mɩá nɛ́tra wanlɩn asʋn kuakʋlɛ anfɩ sɩsɩ mlɩ. Igyi asʋn ánɩ́ ɩbɛ́kpa mlɩ ɛ. 2Mlɩkɩ aha lalahɛ anfɩ bʋgyi fɛ akɩaɩ anfɩ wanklaan. Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋgyi, bʋdɛ aha han bɛɛ, bʋtɩn kete kpaalɩ. 3Tsufɛ anɩ aha amʋʋ anɩtɔpʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ sum Bulu amʋ gyi kete atɩnpʋ onuto nɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ abɛ́talɩ tsu ɩwɩ ɩtɔ amʋʋ Kristo Yesu labwɛ ha anɩ amʋ sʋ. Anɩtamapʋ ansɩ dɩnka tɔá nyankpʋsa lapʋ ɩbɩ bwɛsʋ. 4Mɩ onuto o mbʋ ɔkpa pʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋ́ anásʋ. Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔbɛɛ, mʋbʋ ɔkpa pʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋ́sʋ a, mɩ mboun bʋ ɔkpa pʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋ́sʋ dʋn. 5Tsufɛ bɔkwɩɩ mɩ, tɩn mɩ kete ɛkɛ kwesɩ. Israelyin ngyi. Benyamin abusuantɔ notsu. Mʋ́ sʋ Hebriyin onutonuto ngyi. Mose mbla amʋsʋ gyi ɔkpasʋ ɛ a, Farisiyin ngyi. 6Nɛhɩɛ wa nsi, dɩnka Kristo ɔpasua amʋsʋ. Negyi Mose mbla amʋsʋ wanklaan, ɔlala metsia mɩ ɩwɩ. 7Tamɛ ntobi anfɩ brɛ amʋ ntɛkɩá ɩbʋ mɩ labi anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ a, Kristo sʋ ndɛ ɩtra megyi mɩ tɔtɔ. 8Mʋ́á ɩdʋn mʋ́ kʋraa gyi, nɩ nɔpʋkɩ alɩá nɔpʋbɩ mɩ Wie Kristo Yesu a, nawun ánɩ́ ɩbʋ labi dʋn togyitɔ. Nawun ánɩ́ nahʋlɩ ntobi anfɩ ntɛkɩá ɩbʋ mɩ labi anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́, alɩá Kristo ɔbɛ́da mɩ ɩbɩ sʋ. 9Ɩnɩ sʋ ɩnɩá mbʋ mʋ wa sʋ a, megyi Mose mbla amʋsʋ gyi ɔbɛ́ha négyi asʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ. Kristo hogyi mboun ɔbɛ́ha négyi asʋ Bulu ansɩtɔ. 10Mɩ agywɩɩn gyi, ndekleá nɛ́bɩ Kristo pʋ́ tumi amʋʋ Bulu lɔpʋkʋsʋa mʋ tsu afulitɔ amʋ tsɩa. Ndekleá nówun ipian fɛ alɩá Kristo lowun ipian wu, 11mɛnɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ a, mɩ ɛ Bulu ɔbɔ́kʋsʋa mɩ tsu afulitɔ!
Srɩ Buo Kristo
12Mmɛdɛblɩ mbɛɛ, mɩ ɩbɩ lada ntobi anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ntɛ Bulu labwɛ mɩ nafʋn. Ntra ndɛ nsi wa alɩá ɩbɔ́bwɛ mɩ ɩbɩ bɛ́da tɔ amʋ sʋ amʋʋ Kristo Yesu ɩbɩ lada mɩ amʋ. 13-14Mɩ apio, mmɛdɛblɩ mbɛɛ, mɩ ɩbɩ lada mʋ́. Ndɛ mʋ́ amʋʋ ɩdɛtsʋn amʋsʋ tan. Mʋ́á ɩda mɩ ansɩtɔ ɔkpa ngya. Mɩ ansɩ lapɛ, mɛnɩ nénya siadɩɛ amʋʋ Bulu ɔbɔ́tsʋn Kristo Yesusʋ tɩ mɩ nɔ́yɛhɔ mʋ wa ɔsʋsʋ amʋ. 15Ilehian ánɩ́ anɩ aha amʋʋ anɩladan hogyitɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ abɔ́hɔ alɩ asʋn anfɩ. Nɩ ɩkʋ mɔwankɩ mlɩ a, Bulu ɔbɔ́wankɩ mʋ́tɔ suna mlɩ. 16Tamɛ mlɩha akɩta ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋʋ Bulu lasuna anɩ amʋtɔ.
17Mɩ apio, mlɩkasɩ mɩ tsiatɔ. Mlɩkasɩ atɔ tsu aha amʋʋ bakasɩ anɩ tsiatɔ amʋ wa. 18Tsufɛ ntetsia bla mlɩ asʋn anfɩ. Napʋ ntsú ntra ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ tsiatɔ losuna ánɩ́ Kristo oyikpalihɛsʋ lowu amʋ alupʋ bʋgyi. 19Aha anfɩ bɛ́hɩ. Amʋ́ apu gyi amʋ́ Bulu. Amʋ́ numnyam ɛ gyi pɛlɩ.
