Ɔsʋlʋsʋ atɔ ɩwɩ pɛ bʋtosusu. 20Tamɛ anɩ mʋ́ a, ɔsʋsʋ gyi anɩ otsiakpa. Ɔtɩnɛ amʋʋ anɩdɛ anɩ Ɔhɔpʋ, ogyi anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ɔkpa kɩá obótsu ba amʋ. 21Mʋbʋ tumi, otegyi togyitɔsʋ. Mʋ ɔbɛ́ba bɛtsɛ anɩ ɔyʋlʋ wuhɛ anfɩ, bwɛ mʋ́ fɛ mʋ numnyam ɔyʋlʋ amʋ.

Title: FILIPIFƆ 4
Content:
1Ɩnɩ sʋ apio adwɛpʋ, ntɔdwɛ mlɩ. Ɩdɩn mɩ ɔwɔlɩá nówun mlɩ, tsufɛ mlɩ sʋ ansɩ dɛ mɩ gyi, nénya ɩpanda ɛ! Mɩ adwɛpʋ, alɩ ilehian ánɩ́ mlɛ́lɩɩ kinkin mlɩ Kristo hogyitɔ nɩ.
Tɔá Bʋbwɛ
2Ndɛ mɩ apio tsɩhɛ Euodia mʋa Sintike kokoliá bʋnu aba asɩ, tsufɛ anɩ Wie abuopʋ bʋgyi. 3Mɩ agyʋmayɔba onuto, ndɛ fʋ ɛ kokoli mbɛɛ, fʋtɔɩ kpla amʋ́ abʋbwɛ kʋlɛ. Tsufɛ bawa nsi tsa mɩa Klement pʋ́ atrahɛ amʋ anɩlada asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan. Bulu lawanlɩn amʋ́ ada wa nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata atsiapʋ ɔwʋlʋtɔ.
4Mlɩhɩɛ nya ansigyi anɩ Wie sʋ bregyibrɛ! Ntra ndɛ mlɩ bla mbɛɛ, mlɩhɩɛ nya ansigyi!
5Mlɩha ɔhagyiɔha owun ánɩ́ mlɩlolwii. Anɩ Wie ɩbabɩ lafʋn. 6Tɔtɔ ɩmáhan mlɩ. Mboun kugyikʋá igyi a, mlɩbɔ mpaɩ kokoli Bulu dɩnka mʋ́sʋ, amlɩda mʋ ɩpan. 7Mɛnɩ Bulu ɔbɛ́ha mlɩ iwilwiiá ɩdʋn blɩ, ɩbɛ́kpa mlɩ klʋn pʋ́ mlɩ agywɩɩn, mlɩa Kristo Yesu ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ.
8Ɩtrahɛ a, mɩ apio, mlɩpʋ mlɩ agywɩɩn dɩnka tɔá igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ, tɔá ɩbɛ́tɩ obú, tɔá ɩda ɔkpa, tɔá mʋ́ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn, tɔá itegyi aha ansɩ pʋ́ tɔá aha bɛ́kanfʋsʋ. Mlɩgywɩɩn tɔá ɩbʋ alɛ, aha bʋtɛkanfʋ aná ɩwɩ. 9Mlɩyɔ mʋ́sʋ amlɩpʋ ntobi anfɩ nasuna mlɩ anfɩ, mʋ́á mlɩlonu tsu mɩ wa pʋ́ mʋ́a mlɩlowun mɩ nɔbwɛ fɛ́ɛ́ wa mlɩ tsiatɔ, mɛnɩ Bulu amʋʋ ɔtɛha iwilwii amʋ ɔbɛ́kpa mlɩ.
Ɩpanda
10Bulu laha ansɩ ɩhɩɛ dɛ mɩ gyi, tsufɛ mlɩlatra kaɩn mɩsʋ. Nawun ánɩ́ mlɩmɔkʋsi mɩ ɩwɩ gywɩɩn, tamɛ talɩ mlɩmɛtalɩ lɛ mʋ́ suna. 11Mmɛdɛ asʋn anfɩ blɩ pʋsuna ánɩ́ mbʋ ɩkplantɔ. Tsufɛ nakasɩ, nabɩ alɩá tɔá mbʋ ɩbɔ́fʋn mɩ, nɩ mbʋ o, mma o! 12Nasuan alɩá nɔ́pʋtsia nɩ mbʋ o, mma o. Nabɩ alɩá tsiatɔ kugyikʋtɔá mbʋ ibégyi mɩ ansɩ. Nɩ ntsie akʋn o, namwɛ o, mbʋ o, mma o. 13Ntɛtalɩ bwɛ togyitɔ, tsufɛ Kristo tɔwa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn.
14Mʋ́ alɩ o a, ɩbʋ alɛá mlɩlatsu ɩkʋ lɛ mɩ ɩkplan anfɩtɔ. 15Mʋ́ ɔma a, Filipifɔ, mlɩyin ánɩ́ brɛá nɔtsɔ mlɩ Yesu Kristo ɩwɩ asʋn wanklaan amʋ bla, nɛdalɩ Makedonia ɔmátɔ a, mlɩ ɔpasua anfɩ nkʋlɛ dɛ mɩ bʋa, mlɩdɛ mɩ atɔ sɩsɩ nɩ. 16Brɛá ntra mbʋ Tesalonika wulutɔ kʋraa, ɩwɩ lɛkplan mɩ a, mlɩletsia sɩsɩ mɩ. 17Megyi bɛɛ ndɛ tɔkʋ kʋlɩ tsu mlɩ wa. Mboun ndekleá mlɩnya tɔkʋ dɩnka awɩtɔlɛ amʋʋ mlɩdɛwa ha mɩ amʋsʋ. 18Mɩ ɩbɩ lada togyitɔá mlɩlɔpʋha Epafrodito mlɩaa, ɔpʋba mɩ. Ɩtsɔ kʋraa dʋbɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ nanya togyitɔá ibéhian mɩ. Ɩtɔ anfɩ mlɩlabwɛ anfɩ igyi fɛ mlɩlaha Bulu igyiá ɩbʋ ɔfan fanfaanfan, ɩlagyi mʋ ansɩ. 19Mɩ Bulu ɔbɛ́ha mlɩ togyitɔá ɩdɛ mlɩ hian tsu mʋ numnyam atɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔá ɩbʋ anɩa Kristo Yesunyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ. 20Numnyam ɩbwɛ anɩ Sɩ Bulu klɛ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Amen!
Ɩkla
21Nɛha Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋgyi Kristo Yesu klɛ fɛ́ɛ́ itsia. Apioá bʋbʋ mɩ wa nfɩ ɛ bɛha mlɩ itsia. 22Bulu aha atrahɛá bʋbʋ mɩ wa nfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋdɛ mlɩ itsia ha. Titriu amʋ́á botsu Roma owie dɛhɛn woyitɔ.
23Anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ogyi mlɩ bʋalɛ.

Title: KOLOSEFƆ 1
Content:
Itsiaha
1-2Mɩ Pauloá Bulu apɛ sʋ nabwɛ Yesu Kristo sumbi ɔyɔpʋ pʋ́ anɩ pio Timoteo dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn.
Anɩdɛpʋsɩsɩ anɩ apioá bʋgyi Bulu aha, bʋbʋ Kolose wulutɔ, bʋbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ha Kristo Yesu, mʋa amʋ́nyɔ ɛ babwɛ kʋlɛ.
Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋgyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, abʋha mlɩ iwilwii.
Ɩpanda Mpaɩ
3Anɩtɛda anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo mʋ Sɩ Bulu ɩpan bregyibrɛá anɩdɛ mpaɩ bɔ mlɩ nwunsʋ. 4Tsufɛ anɩlanuá mlɩlɔhɔ Kristo Yesu gyi, mlɩbʋ ɔdwɛ ɛ ha Bulu aha fɛ́ɛ́. 5Mlɩdɛ ɔkpa kɩ ha tɔá bapʋyaɩ ha mlɩ ɔsʋsʋ, fɛ alɩá mlɩyin tsu brɛá mlɩlegyankpa nu ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋʋ igyi Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋ. 6Asʋn wanklaan amʋ kɛn dɛklɛɩ wa ɔyɩtɔ, ɩdɛ aha tsiatɔ tsɛ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ; fɛ alɩá ɩlɛtsɛ mlɩ tsu ɛkɛá mlɩlonu mʋ́, mlɩlɛbɩá lɛlɛ Bulu tegyi aha bʋalɛ. 7Anɩ osumba ɔdwɛpʋ Epafra gyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔpʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋ ba mlɩ. Yesu Kristo osumbi ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ ogyi, ɔdɛ mlɩ bʋa anɩ ɔfansʋ. 8Mʋlɛba bɛbla anɩ ɔdwɛá Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ lapʋwa mlɩtɔ.
9Mʋ́ sʋ anɩmɔkʋsi mpaɩ bɔ mlɩ nwunsʋ tsu ɛkɛá anɩlonu mlɩ ɩwɩ asʋn anfɩ. Anɩdɛ Bulu kokoli anɩaa, ɔha amlɩbɩ mʋ apɛ kugyikʋ wanklaan. Ɔha mʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ ɔha mlɩ nyansa mʋ́a asʋn-asɩnu fɛ́ɛ́, 10mɛnɩ mlɛ́talɩ tsia tsiatɔá ɩbɔ́wa anɩ Wie numnyam, amlɩgyi mʋ ansɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. Ɔha amlɩbwɛ yile bregyibrɛ, tra bɩ Bulu tsɩa. 11-12Anɩaa, ɔha mʋ tumiá mʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn ɩwa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, amlɩtalɩ tomi, nya klʋn, pʋ ansigyi da anɩ Sɩ Bulu ɩpan. Mʋlaha mlɩlafʋn ánɩ́ mlɩa mʋ aha mlénya agyapadɩɛ amʋʋ alala yaɩ mʋ iwiegyi wankɩhɛtɔ amʋ ɩkʋ. 13Tsufɛ mʋlalɛ anɩ tsu ɔha amʋʋ ɔdɛ oklunsʋ gyi amʋ tumi asɩ, pʋ anɩ ba mʋ Bi ɔdwɛpʋ amʋ iwiegyi amʋtɔ. 14Mʋ Bi anfɩsʋ ɔlɔtsʋn hɔ anɩ, alasi anɩ lakpan kie anɩ nɩ.
Kristo Dʋn Togyitɔ
15Ɔhaa tamawun Bulu, Kristotɔ ɔlɛlɩn ɔwan. Ɔbʋ ɩnʋ asa Bulu lɔbwɛ togyitɔ, ɔdʋn Bulu ɩtɔ bwɛhɛ kugyikʋ. 16Mʋsʋ Bulu lɔtsʋn bwɛ togyitɔá ɩbʋ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ. Mʋ́á bʋtowun pʋ́ mʋ́á bʋtamawun fɛ́ɛ́, ɔŋɛtɔ awie, ɔmásʋgyi tumi, atumipʋ, pʋ ɩsʋ agyipʋ fɛ́ɛ́. Mʋsʋ Bulu lɔtsʋn bwɛ ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́, pʋwa mʋ numnyam. 17Ɔbʋ ɩnʋ asa togyitɔ lefi asɩ. Mʋsʋ atɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩdɛ agyʋma yɔ wa abatɔ. 18Mʋgyi nwun ha mʋ nyankpʋsa-oyi, igyi ɔpasua amʋ, ɔdɛ mʋ́ nkpa ha. Mʋlegyankpa kʋsʋ tsu afulitɔ, ogyi togyitɔ nkpa ogyapʋ. 19Tsufɛ ɩbʋ Bulu ɔdwɛ ánɩ́ mʋ tsiatɔ fɛ́ɛ́ bétsia mʋ Bi amʋtɔ. 20Mʋsʋ Bulu lɔtsʋn yinkia togyitɔ ba mʋ ɩwɩ wa. Ɔlɔtsʋn mʋ obugya amʋʋ ɩlɔwʋlɩ asɩ brɛá bɛda mʋ manta oyikpalihɛ amʋsʋ pʋ iwilwii wa mʋa togyitɔ nsɩnɛ. Mʋ́á ɩbʋ ɔsʋsʋ pʋ́ mʋ́a ɩbʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
21Tɛkɩ mlɩ ɛ mlɩlɛdamli ɔma ha Bulu, mlɩgyi mʋ alupʋ mlɩ asʋn susuhɛ pʋ́ mlɩ bwɛhɛ lalahɛ sʋ. 22Tamɛ sei a, ɩtra megyi alɩ. Kristo lɔbwɛ nyankpʋsa, olowu. Bulu lɔtsʋn mʋ oyikpalihɛsʋ lowu amʋsʋ la mlɩa mʋnyɔ nsɩnɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ ifin pʋ́ asʋansʋ ma mlɩ ɩwɩ, ɔbɛ́kpa mlɩ ba mʋ ansɩtɔ. 23Tamɛ ilehian ánɩ́ mlɔ́hɔ asʋn anfɩsʋ gyi, lɩɩ kinkiinkin. Mlɩmáha abʋtsɛ mlɩ agywɩɩn lɛ ɩtɔ amʋʋ mlɩdɛ mʋ́ ɔkpa kɩ, asʋn wanklaan amʋ lapʋba mlɩ amʋ. Asʋn wanklaan anfɩ osumpʋ mɩ Paulo ngyi nɩ. Asʋn anfɩ ɔkan bʋdɛda ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́ ɛ nɩ.
24Ɩbʋ mɩ ansigyi ánɩ́ ndɛ ipian wun mlɩ sʋ. Tsufɛ ndɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn amʋʋ Kristo lowun sian amʋ kʋ wun ha mʋ ɔpasua, igyi mʋ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ. 25Bulu lɔpʋ mʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋ wa mɩ ɩbɩtɔ, ánɩ́ nda mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔkan suna mlɩ, ampʋsum ɔpasua amʋ. 26Ɔlɔpʋ asʋn anfɩ ŋain bɩmbɩ ɔpá, tamɛ alalɛ mʋ́ ɔwan suna mʋ aha sei. 27Ɩbʋ Bulu ɔdwɛá ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ́ ɔwan suna mlɩá mlɩmegyi Yudafɔ. Asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋ gyi, Kristo tsie mlɩtɔ. Ɩbʋ ibia, ɩbʋ numnyam ɛ. Mʋ́desuna ánɩ́ abénya mʋ numnyam amʋ ɩkʋ nɩ. 28Mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn anɩdɛ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bla, anɩdɛ amʋ́ ɔla da, pʋ nyansa amʋʋ Bulu laha anɩ amʋ suna amʋ́ atɔ; mɛnɩ bɔ́fʋn, abɛ́kpa amʋ́ ba Bulu, amʋ́a Kristo ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ. 29Ɩnɩ sʋ nahɩɛ ndɛprɩ, pʋ Kristo tumi amʋʋ ɩbʋ mɩtɔ amʋ yɔ agyʋma nɩ.

Title: KOLOSEFƆ 2
Content:
1Ndekleá mlɩbɩ ɩprɩá ndɛprɩ ɔwʋnlɩnsʋ, mlɩa ɔpasua amʋʋ ɩbʋ Laodikea pʋ́ aha amʋʋ bʋmɔkʋwun mɩ kɩ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ nwunsʋ. 2Ndɛ mʋ́ bwɛ pʋwa amʋ́ ɔwʋnlɩn, abʋbwɛ kʋlɛ, dwɛ aba, nu asʋn asɩ wanklaan, mɛnɩ bónu Bulu asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋʋ igyi Kristo amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ asɩ. 3Kristotɔ Bulu lɔpʋ mʋ atonyahɛá igyi mʋ nyansa pʋ́ mʋ asʋnbɩ fɛ́ɛ́ wa.
4Ndɛ mlɩ asʋn anfɩ bla, mɛnɩ ɔhaa mɔ́ɔpʋ asʋn ánɩ́ ɩbʋ anulɛ kʋkʋ bɛmlɛ mlɩ. 5Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá mbʋ ɩfɔ mlɩ wa, tamɛ ntosusu mlɩ ɩwɩ bregyibrɛ. Ansɩ ɛ ɩdɛ mɩ gyi ánɩ́ mlɩtsie wanklaan, mlɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin Kristosʋ hogyitɔ. 6Ɩnɩá mlɩlahɔ Kristo Yesu gyi ánɩ́ mʋgyi mlɩ Wie sʋ a, mlɩyɔ mʋ́sʋ mlɩa mʋnyɔ amlɩbwɛ kʋlɛ. 7Mlɩ ɛ mlɩhɩɛ lɩɩ kinkiinkin Kristo hogyitɔ, amlɩnya ɔwʋnlɩn tsu mlɩa mʋnyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ. Mlɩyɔ mʋ́sʋ amlɩhɔ mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn amʋʋ bʋdɛ mlɩ suna, igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ, fɛ alɩá oyi nlin tɔyɔ ɔtɔtɔɔtɔ, yodunka ntsu ha mʋ́ ɩtɛdan, amlɩda Bulu ɩpan ɛ bregyibrɛ.
8Mlɩmáha ɔkpa ɔhaa ɔmlɛ mlɩ, pʋ mʋ ansɩtɩn mʋ́a afunu asʋn ánɩ́ igyi amandɩɛá anyankpʋsa bɔwa kʋkʋ, itsu ɔŋɛ ntɛ tumiá ɩdɛ ɔyɩ anfɩsʋ gyi, imotsu Kristo wa bɛha amlɩmli mʋ nkpábi. 9Tsufɛ Kristotɔ Bulu tsiatɔ onutonuto amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbʋ nyankpʋsa ɔkpasʋ. 10Ɩnɩá mlɩa Kristonyɔ mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ sʋ mlɩlafʋn. Mʋgyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ tumi ɔŋɛtɔ atumipʋ pʋ́ ɩsʋ agyipʋ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
11Mlɩa mʋnyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛ sʋ aladɩnkɩ mlɩ tsiatɔ dada amʋ lɛ mlɩsʋ fɛ alɩ amʋʋ bʋtɛtɩn kete, dɩnkɩ awʋlɩ lɛ mʋ́sʋ amʋ. 12Brɛá bɔbɔ mlɩ asu a, bopula mlɩ tsiatɔ dada amʋ fɛ alɩá bopula Kristo; Bulu lɔkʋsʋa mlɩ ba nkpatɔ fɛ alɩá ɔlɔkʋsʋa Kristo, tsufɛ mlɩlohogyi ánɩ́ Bulu bʋ tumi kʋsʋa mʋ tsu afulitɔ. 13Tɛkɩ mlɩ lakpan pʋ́ mlɩ tsiatɔ dada amʋʋ bʋmɔkʋdɩnkɩ lɛ mlɩsʋ amʋ sʋ mlɩlowu fɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔmɔkʋtɩn kete. Tamɛ sei a, Bulu lakʋsʋa anɩa Kristonyɔ ba nkpa pɔpwɛtɔ, alasi anɩ lakpan fɛ́ɛ́ kie anɩ. 14Ɔlɛdɩnkɩ asʋn amʋʋ bɔwanlɩn wa Mose mblatɔ, ɩdɛ anɩ ɩla lɛ amʋ lɛ anɩsʋ, yɛda mʋ́ manta Kristo oyikpalihɛ amʋsʋ. 15Bulu lɔswɩɩ ɔŋɛtɔ atumipʋ pʋ́ ɩsʋ agyipʋ tumi, ɔlɛkɩta amʋ́ ndoun, lɛ amʋ́ ɔwan, wa amʋ́ pɛlɩtɔ, brɛá olegyi amʋ́sʋ Kristo oyikpalihɛ amʋsʋ.
16Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmáha ɔhaa ɔlɛ mlɩ ɩla mlɩ atogyihɛ, mlɩ atonunhɛ, nkegyi, ɔtsra pɔpwɛ nkɛ, ntɛ Yudafɔ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ aná sʋ. 17Yiyi kɛkɛ ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi ha atɔ amʋʋ ɩbɛ́ba amʋ onuto. Mʋ́ onutonuto amʋ lɛlɩn ɔwan Kristotɔ. 18Mlɩmáha ɔkpa ɔhaa ɔmlɛ mlɩ amlɩba ɩwɩasɩ sum Bulu-abɔpʋ, amlɩhʋlɩ ɩpan ánɩ́ Bulu lɛhɩɛ yaɩ mlɩ. Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔbɛɛ alawun tɔkʋ tsu mʋ́ ɩwɩ kʋraa po a, ɔyɩtɔ ansɩtɩn laha mʋ ɔdɛ ɩwɩ tsu. 19Ɔha anfɩ odu lamaɩn ɩwɩ lɛ Kristo amʋʋ ogyi ɔpasua amʋ nwun amʋsʋ. Tsufɛ ɔpasua amʋtɔ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ anɩlɛtsa abasʋ, Kristo amʋʋ ogyi nwun amʋ dɛ anɩ ɔwʋnlɩn wa, mɛnɩ abɛ́dan alɩá Bulu dekle.
20Mlɩa Kristonyɔ lowu. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩtra mlɩmá ɔyɩtɔ tumi kʋkʋ asɩ. Ntogyi sʋ mlɩtra mlɩdɛ mbla anfɩ anásʋ gyi? 21Bɛɛ, “Mágyi ɩnɩ. Mápʋ ɩbɩ da ɩnɩ, mátsu ɩnɩ ɛ!” 22Nɩ bɔpʋ ntobi anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bwɛ atɔ ta a, iteyinta. Anyankpʋsa onuto mbla pʋ́ amʋ́ atosunahɛ igyi. 23Anɩdɛ mbla anfɩ kɩ fɛ tɔá nyansa bʋ mʋ́tɔ, ɩbɛ́ha abɔ́wa alɛ Bulu ansɩtɔ. Abɛ́ba ɩwɩasɩ ha mʋ, wa ɩwɩ ɔsɩn anɩaa ɩbɛ́ha abɛ́bɩ gyi ɩwɩsʋ. Tamɛ ɩnɩ aná fɛ́ɛ́ ɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ ha anɩméegyi ɩwɩsʋ.

Title: KOLOSEFƆ 3
Content:
Nkpa Pɔpwɛ Tsia
1Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ Bulu lakʋsʋa mlɩa Kristonyɔ ba nkpa pɔpwɛtɔ a, mlɩdunka atɔá ɩbʋ ɔsʋsʋ, ɔtɩnɛ amʋʋ Kristo tsie Bulu gyɔpɩsʋ amʋ. 2Mlɩha agywɩɩn ɩnʋ atɔ ɩwɩ, megyi ɔsʋlʋsʋ klɛ. 3Tsufɛ mlɩlawu, Bulu lapʋ mlɩa Kristonyɔ nkpa onuto ŋain mʋtɔ. 4Ɛkɛá ɔbɛ́lɛ Kristo amʋʋ ogyi mlɩ nkpa onuto amʋ ɔwan suna ɔyɩ a, ɛkɛ amʋ kɛn ɔbɛ́lɛ mlɩa mʋnyɔ ɔwan mʋ numnyamtɔ nɩ.
Tsiatɔ Dada Mʋ́a Pɔpwɛ
5Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmɔ tsiatɔ dada amʋʋ ɩbʋ mlɩtɔ amʋ. Mʋ́gyi; atsɩ mʋa ayin asʋnwa, ifintotsia, ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ mʋ́a pɛlɩla. Ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ atɔ wanklaan ɩmápɛ mlɩ ansɩ, tsufɛ ɔnsɩpɛ igyi fɛ ɔkpɩsum. 6Ntobi anfɩ odu abwɛpʋsʋ Bulu tɛhɩɛ nya ɔblɔ nɩ. 7Mʋ́ aná mlɩtɔbwɛ brɛá mlɩgyi ɔmátɔfɔ nɩ.
8Sei gyi brɛá mlɛ́lɛ ɔblɔ, ɔblɔkpan, olu, abakpɔɩ, asʋkpan blɩ aná lɛ mlɩtɔ nɩ. 9Mlɩmáwa afunu suna aba, tsufɛ mlɩlasi mlɩ tsiatɔ dada amʋ pʋ́ mʋ́ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́. 10Mlɩlalatsu tsiatɔ pɔpwɛ. Bulu gyi mʋ́ Ɔbwɛpʋ, ɔdɛ mʋ́ bwɛ pɔpwɛ lɩan mʋ ɩwɩ brɛ anfɩ mlɩdɛ mʋ bɩ anfɩ. 11Tsiatɔ pɔpwɛ anfɩ mʋ́ a, ɩmɛfahʋn ánɩ́ Grikiyin ntɛ Yudayin fʋgyi. Fɛtɩn kete ntɛ fʋmɛtɩn, ɔkpʋtɔpʋ ntɛ okudasɩyin, ɔkpábi ntɛ ɔdɩhɩɛ fʋgyi. Kristo gyi togyitɔ, ɔbʋ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
12Mʋ́ sʋ ɩnɩá Bulu lalɛ mlɩ pʋbwɛ mʋ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ɩwɩ latɩn pʋ́ mʋ adwɛpʋ a, mlɩha nwewun, awɩtɔlɛwa, ɩwɩasɩba, ilwii pʋ klʋnya itsia mlɩtɔ. 13Mlɩnya ɩklʋn ha aba. Nɩ ɔkʋ mʋa mʋ ba benya a, mlɩsikie aba fɛ alɩá Kristo lesi mlɩ klɛ kie mlɩ. 14Mʋ́á ɩdʋn a, ɔdwɛ tɔbwɛ anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩkʋlɛ. Ɩbwɛ mlɩ tati dɩdahɛ. 15Mlɩha Kristo iwilwii igyi mlɩ klʋnsʋ, tsufɛ mʋ́tɔ Bulu latɩ mlɩ bɔwa; mlɩa mʋ nyankpʋsa-oyi amʋ mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ nɩ. Mlɩda mʋ ɩpan ɛ bregyibrɛ. 16Mlɩha Kristo asʋn amʋ ɩhɩɛ bʋla mlɩ klʋntɔ, ɩha mlɩ nyansa. Mlɩpʋtɔɩ kpla aba, suna aba atɔ. Mlɩwa Israelfɔ ɩlʋ, ɔsankuosʋ ɩlʋ pʋ́ ɔŋɛtɔ ɩlʋ mlɩ klʋntɔ pʋtsu Bulu fʋa, pʋda anɩ Sɩ Bulu ɩpan. 17Mlɩ atɔ bwɛhɛ pʋ́ mlɩ asʋn blɩhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbwɛ anɩ Wie Yesu ɩdatɔ, amlɩpʋ ɩpan ha anɩ Sɩ Bulu tsʋn mʋsʋ.
Akristofɔ Tsiatɔ
18Aka, mlɩba ɩwɩasɩ ha mlɩ aklu alɩá ɩlɛkana ha aha ánɩ́ bʋgyi Kristo klɛ.
19Aklu, mlɩ ɛ mlɩdwɛ mlɩ aka. Mlɩmábwɛ amʋ́ kpounkpoun.
20Abi, mlɩbu mlɩ akwɩɩpʋ, tsufɛ mʋ́ Bulu tekle nɩ.
21Akwɩɩpʋ, mlɩmáwa mlɩ abi ɔblɔ, mɛnɩ ɩwɩ móowu amʋ́.
22Nkpábi, mlɩbu mlɩ ɔsʋlʋsʋ awie togyitɔá mlɔ́bwɛtɔ. Mlɩha amʋ́ ansɩ igyi mlɩ ɩwɩ bregyibrɛ, megyi amʋ́ ansɩtɔ wʋlɛ. Mlɩbwɛ mʋ́ tsu klʋntɔ, tsufɛ mlɩtobu anɩ Wie. 23Mlɩbwɛ togyitɔ tsu mlɩ klʋntɔ, fɛ anɩ Wie mlɩdɛ mʋ́ bwɛ ha, megyi anyankpʋsa. 24Mlɩkaɩn ánɩ́ anɩ Wie ɩbɩtɔ mlénya mlɩ ɩkɔka ánɩ́ alala yaɩ mʋ abi. Tsufɛ Kristo gyi Owieá mlɩdesum. 25Tamɛ nɩ fɔbwɛ tɔá ɩma alɛ a, ɔbɛ́ka fʋ ɩkɔ, tsufɛ ɔtamakɩ ɔhaa ansɩtɔ.

Title: KOLOSEFƆ 4
Content:
1Nkpábi awie, mlɩpʋ tɔá ɩbʋ alɛ, igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ kpa mlɩ nkpábi, tsufɛ mlɩ ɛ mlɩbʋ Owie ɔsʋsʋ.
2Mlɩkɩta mpaɩbɔtɔ. Mlɩdɩnka ansɩ ɩwɩsʋ, ɩpanda ɛ itsia mlɩ klʋntɔ. 3Mlɩbɔ mpaɩ ha anɩ ɛ. Bulu ofinki ɔkpa ha anɩ atalɩ da Kristo ɩwɩ asʋn ŋainhɛ amʋ ɔkan. Mʋ́ sʋ nda obu nɩ. 4Mlɩbɔ mpaɩ mlɩaa, nda mʋ́ ɔkan wanklaan, alɩá ilehian.
5Mlɩkɩ mlɩ natɩtɔ ɔmátɔfɔtɔ. Nɩ ɔkpa ifinki ha mlɩ a, mlɩmáyinta mʋ́. 6Mlɩ ɩtɔɩ ɩwa anulɛ, ɩwa labi, mɛnɩ mlɛ́talɩ lɛ ɔhagyiɔha asʋn fɩtɛhɛ ɔnɔ wanklaan.
Ɩkla
7Anɩa opio ɔdwɛpʋ Tihiko dɛ anɩ Wie agyʋma yɔ. Osumpʋ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ ogyi. Ɔbɛ́bla mlɩ alɩá mɩ ɩwɩ gyi fɛ́ɛ́. 8Nawa mʋ mlɩ wa mbɛɛ, ɔbɛbla mlɩ alɩá anɩ ɩwɩ gyi, ɔwa mlɩ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn. 9Mʋa anɩ pio ɔdwɛpʋ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ Onesimo, ogyi mlɩ pɩ amʋ ɔbɛ́ba bɛbla mlɩ asʋn ánɩ́ ɩlaba nfɩ fɛ́ɛ́.
10Aristarko, mɩ ba ánɩ́ mɩa mʋnyɔ anɩda obu ɔha mlɩ itsia. Alɩ kɛn Marko, ogyi Barnaba mʋ pio amʋ ɛ ɔha mlɩ itsia nɩ. Mlɩhɔ Marko ɔfɔɔ wanklaan, nɩ ɔlɔtsʋn ba mlɩ wa fɛ alɩá nɛbla mlɩ yaɩ. 11Opio Yesu, bʋtɛtra tɩ mʋ Yusto ɛ ɔha mlɩ itsia. Aha abasa anfɩ pɛ gyi Yudafɔá mɩa amʋ́nyɔ anɩdɛ Bulu iwiegyi amʋ ɩwɩ agyʋma yɔ nɩ. Amʋ́ tɛkɩta klʋn wa mɩ ɩwɩtɔ nɩ.
12Epafra, otsu mlɩ wa, ogyi Kristo Yesu osumbi amʋ ɛ ɔha mlɩ itsia. Ɔtɛhɩɛ bɔ mpaɩ ha mlɩ ánɩ́ Bulu ɔwa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, ɔha amlɩfʋn, amlɩtalɩ bwɛ Bulu apɛ kugyikʋ. 13Nɛ́talɩ gyi mʋ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ ánɩ́ ɔhɩɛ ɔdɛ agyʋma yɔ mlɩa Akristofɔá bʋbʋ Laodikea pʋ́ Hierapoli ɩdatɔ. 14Anɩ ɔdwɛpʋ Luka, ogyi ɩlɔ ɔtsapʋ mʋa Dema bɛha mlɩ itsia.
15Nɛha anɩ apio Laodikeafɔ amʋ itsia. Nɛha Nunfa mʋa ɔpasua amʋʋ ɩbʋ mʋ woyitɔ amʋ ɛ itsia. 16Nɩ mlɛkla ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ suna ɔpasua amʋ ta a, mlɩpʋsɩsɩ Laodikeafɔ ɛ. Mlɩkla amʋ́ klɛ amʋʋ nɔpʋsɩsɩ amʋ́ amʋ ɛ. 17Mlɩbla Arkipo mlɩaa, ɔmɔ agyʋma amʋʋ Bulu lɔpʋwa mʋ ɩbɩtɔ amʋ ɔnɔ wanklaan.
18Mɩ Paulo, onutonuto lawa ɩbɩ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ asɩ. Mlɩmátan ánɩ́ nda obu.
Bulu ogyi mlɩ bʋalɛ.

Title: 1 TESALONIKAFƆ 1
Content:
1Mɩ Paulo, mɩa Silwano pʋ́ Timoteo dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ ɔpasua ánɩ́ igyi anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo klɛ, ɩbʋ Tesalonika wulutɔ.
Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋgyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, abʋha mlɩ iwilwii.
Tesalonikafɔ Hogyi
2Nɩ anɩdɛ mpaɩ bɔ ha mlɩ bregyibrɛ a, anɩtɛda Bulu ɩpan mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ nwunsʋ. 3Anɩtetsia kaɩn anɩ Sɩ Bulu mlɩ hogyi gyumagyihɛ. Alɩá mlɩdɛ mbɔdɩ bɔ dwɛ aba, pʋ́ alɩá mlɩlatomi ha mlɩ ansɩ dɩn anɩ Wie Yesu Kristosʋ kinkiinkin. 4Apio, anɩyin ánɩ́ Bulu tɔdwɛ mlɩ, alalɛ mlɩ pʋbwɛ mʋ klɛ. 5Tsufɛ megyi ɔnɔ kɛkɛ anɩlɔpʋ bɛbla mlɩ asʋn wanklaan amʋ. Mboun mlɩlowun Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ tumi ɛ. Ɩnɩ lɛha mlɩlɛbɩ wanklaan ánɩ́ asʋn amʋ igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ. Mlɩlowun tsiatɔ oduá anɩlɔpʋtsia mlɩtɔ ɛ, alɩá ɩbɔ́bʋa mlɩ sʋ. 6Mlɩlɛkasɩ anɩa anɩ Wie tsiatɔ. Tsufɛ asʋn amʋ sʋ mlɩlowun ɩwɩɔsɩn tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ, tamɛ mlɩlɔpʋ ansigyiá itsu Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ wa hɔ mʋ́. 7Mʋ́ sʋ ɩlɛha ahogyipʋá bʋbʋ Makedonia ɔsʋlʋsʋ pʋ́ Akaia ɔmátɔ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛkɩ mlɩ bwɛhɛ, buo mʋ́. 8Tsufɛ megyi Makedonia pʋ́ Akaia wʋlɛ anɩ Wie asʋn amʋ lɛklɛɩ tsu mlɩ wa yɔ. Mboun mlɩ Bulu hogyi asʋn ɛ laklɛɩ yɔ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ asʋansʋ má ɩnʋá abɛ́tra blɩ tsu mʋ́ ɩwɩ. 9Tsufɛ amʋ́ onuto bʋdɛ alɩá mlɩlɔpʋkɩta anɩ brɛá anɩlɛba mlɩ wa blɩ. Alɩá mlɩlesi ɩkpɩ sum ba mlɩdɛ Bulu Ɔkɩankpapʋ Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ amʋ mboun sum. 10Pʋ́ alɩá mlɩgyo brɛá Bulu mʋ Bi Yesu amʋʋ ɔlɔkʋsʋa tsu afulitɔ amʋ ɔbɛ́latsu ɔsʋsʋ ba. Mʋgyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɛ anɩ lɛ tsu Bulu ɔblɔ amʋʋ ɩba amʋtɔ nɩ.

Title: 1 TESALONIKAFƆ 2
Content:
Paulo Tsiatɔ Tesalonika Wulutɔ
1Apio, mlɩ onuto mlɩyin ánɩ́ anɩ mlɩ wa ba mɔbwɛ kpaalɩ. 2Mlɩyin alɩá bɔwa anɩ amʋmʋyɔ, sʋpa anɩ Filipi wulutɔ asa anɩlɛba mlɩ wa. Mlɩyin ánɩ́ akʋ bʋmotsula, bɛhɩɛ kʋsʋ lɩɩ anɩsʋ; tamɛ anɩ Bulu lɔwa anɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, anɩlɛbla mlɩ asʋn wanklaan amʋ. 3Tsufɛ megyi afunu asʋn anɩdɛblɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ mlɩ kokoli. Megyi agywɩɩn lalahɛ kʋkʋ igyi, anɩmɛdɛ mlɩ mlɛ ɛ. 4Bulu lɔhɔ anɩsʋ gyi, ɔlɔpʋ mʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋ wa anɩ ɩbɩtɔ. Mʋ́ anɩdɛblɩ nɩ! Megyi anyankpʋsa ansɩtɔ anɩdɛkɩ blɩ mʋ́, Bulu yin anɩ klʋntɔ. 5Mlɩhɩɛ mlɩyin ánɩ́ megyi ɔnɔ dɛdɛ anɩlɔpʋ ba mlɩ. Anɩmɛba bɔwa afunu kʋkʋ ɛ suna mlɩ, pʋnya tɔkʋ tsu mlɩ wa. Bulu gyi anɩ ɔdansɩyin. 6Anɩmodunka kanfʋ tsu nyankpʋsa ɔkʋkʋ, mlɩ, ntɛ ɔha bamba wa. Kristo sumbi ayɔpʋ anɩgyi. Mʋ́ sʋ tɛkɩ anɩbʋ ɔkpa si ɩwɩ tswɩ mlɩsʋ, 7tamɛ anɩlolwii ha mlɩ, kɩ mlɩ fɛ alɩá abi-oyín tɛkɩ mʋ onuto abisʋ. 8Anɩtɛhɩɛ kle mlɩ asʋn. Mʋ́ sʋ megyi Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋ nkʋlɛ anɩlɔpʋ ba mlɩ, mboun anɩlesi anɩ ɩwɩ ɛ ha mlɩ, tsufɛ mlɩlamli anɩ adwɛpʋ. 9Apio, yɛ mlɛ́kaɩn agyʋma ánɩ́ anɩlɔyɔ ɔpa mʋ́a onye pʋnya tɔá ilehian anɩ? Alɩá anɩméesi ipian tswɩ mlɩsʋ brɛá anɩdɛ Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan da suna mlɩ sʋ anɩlɔbwɛ mʋ́ alɩ.
10Mlɩ ahogyipʋ amʋ pʋ́ Bulu gyi anɩ adansɩfɔ alɩá anɩlɔpʋtsia mlɩtɔ. Anɩ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn, anɩ asʋn da ɔkpa, ɔlala ɛ metsia anɩ ɩwɩ. 11Mlɩyin ánɩ́ anɩlɛkpa mlɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ fɛ alɩá abi-ɔsɩ tɛkpa mʋ abi. 12Anɩlɔwa mlɩ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn, lwii mlɩ klʋn, tɔɩ kpla mlɩ anɩaa, mlɩtsia tsiatɔá ilegyi Bulu ansɩ. Mʋlɛtɩ mlɩ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩbenya mʋ iwiegyi pʋ́ mʋ numnyam amʋ ɩkʋ.
13Tɔá sʋá anɩtɛda mʋ ɩpan bregyibrɛ ɛ gyi, brɛá anɩlɔpʋ mʋ asʋn amʋ ba mlɩ a, mlɩmotsu mʋ́á nyankpʋsa wa itsu. Mboun mlɩlɔhɔ mʋ́ ánɩ́ lɛlɛ, itsu Bulu wa; tsufɛ mʋ́ Bulu dɛpʋyɔ agyʋma mlɩ ahogyipʋ amʋtɔ nɩ. 14Apio, mlɩlamli fɛ Bulu ɔpasua ánɩ́ ɩbʋbʋ Yudea ɔmátɔ, bʋgyi Kristo Yesu klɛ amʋ. Mlɩlowun ipian mlɩ pɩ ɩbɩtɔ, fɛ alɩ amʋʋ amʋ́ ɛ bowun ipian amʋ́ pɩ Yudafɔ ɩbɩtɔ amʋ. 15Yudafɔ lɔmɔ Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ pʋ́ anɩ Wie Yesu. Amʋ́ kɛn lagya anɩ lɛ ɔmá amʋtɔ. Bʋtamakle aha asʋn, bʋtamagyi Bulu ansɩ. 16Bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ anɩsʋ ka anɩ itin bɛɛ, anɩmábla aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ nkpahɔ asʋn amʋ, Bulu ɔhɔ amʋ́ nkpa. Ɩnɩ bwɛ laha amʋ́ lakpan labiayi. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩlaha Bulu lanya ɔblɔ, ɔbɛ́bɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ.
Paulo Lekleá Ɔbɛ́layɛkɩ Tesalonikafɔ
17Apio, anɩlɛnatɩ mlɩ wa ɔpá anɩmɔkʋsi mlɩsʋ kaɩn. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩhɩɛ anɩdɛ ɔkpa dunka ánɩ́ abɛ́la bowun mlɩ ansɩtɔ, tsufɛ anɩdɛ mlɩsʋ kaɩn dʋbɩ. 18Anɩlekleá abɛ́laba mlɩ wa. Mɩ Paulo onuto o nabwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ néyinki ba ɩnʋ ɩta tsefɩnɩ, tamɛ Ɔbʋnsam mɛha ɔkpa. 19Ma sʋ anɩ ansɩ dɩn? Megyi mlɩ sʋ ansɩ dɛ anɩ gyiá abénya ɔkpa tsu ɩwɩ anɩ Wie Yesu ansɩtɔ brɛá ɔbɛ́ba? 20Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, mlɩgyi anɩ numnyam pʋ́ anɩ ansigyi.

Title: 1 TESALONIKAFƆ 3
Content:
Timoteo Tesalonika Yɔ
1Mʋ́ sʋ brɛá anɩmɛbɩ alɩá mlɩ tsiatɔ igyi, ɩdɛ anɩ han a, anɩlɔbwɛ agywɩɩn anɩaa, anɩ mʋ́ abétsia Atene wulutɔ, 2awa anɩ pio Timoteo, ogyi anɩ Bulu agyʋmayɔba Kristo asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkandatɔ sɩsɩ mlɩ. Ɔbɔwa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, ɔtɔɩ kpla mlɩ amlɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin hogyitɔ, 3mɛnɩ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋ méeyinki ɔma asʋn wunhɛ anfɩ sʋ. Mlɩ onuto mlɩyin ánɩ́ igyi tɔá ɩda yaɩ ha anɩ Akristofɔ dodo. 4Tsufɛ brɛá anɩbʋ mlɩ wa a, anɩlɛbla mlɩá bɛ́dɩnka mlɩsʋ. Lɛlɛ bɛdɩnka mlɩsʋ fɛ alɩá mlɩyin. 5Ɩnɩ sʋ brɛá netsia mmetsia a, nɔwa Timoteo mlɩ wa mbɛɛ, ɔbɛ́kɩ alɩá mlɩdɛ hogyi amʋtɔ. Tsufɛ ɩbɛ́talɩ ba ánɩ́ Ɔbʋnsam lasɔ mlɩ kɩ, ha anɩ gyumagyihɛ labwɛ kpaalɩ.
6Timoteo layinki pʋ asʋn wanklaan tsua mlɩ wa ba anɩ sei, tsu mlɩ hogyi pʋ́ mlɩ abadwɛ ɩwɩ. Alabla anɩ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩ ɛ mlɩdɛ anɩsʋ kaɩn dʋbɩ. Mlɩdekleá mlówun anɩ, fɛ alɩ amʋʋ anɩ ɛ anɩdekleá abówun mlɩ amʋ. 7Mʋ́ sʋ apio, mlɩ hogyi lawa anɩ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn, anɩ ipian pʋ́ anɩ asʋn wunhɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ; 8tsufɛ mlɩlɩɩ anɩ Wie hogyitɔ kinkiinkin. Mʋ́ sʋ anɩ klʋn ladɩ anɩ asɩ. 9Ɩpan mɔmʋ abɔ́kʋkʋ da Bulu mlɩ sʋ, ansɩá ɩdɛ anɩ gyi mʋ ansɩtɔ sʋ? 10Anɩtɛhɩɛ bɔ mpaɩ kokoli Bulu ɔpa mʋ́a onye anɩaa, ɔha ayinki bowun mlɩ, mɛnɩ abósuna mlɩ tɔá ɩbɛ́ha mlɩ hogyi bɔ́fʋn.
11Anɩ Sɩ Bulu onuto mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu bʋfinki ɔkpa ha anɩ aba mlɩ wa. 12Anɩ Wie ɔha mlɩ apio aba pʋ́ aha fɛ́ɛ́ dwɛ ɔnɔ ɩwa ɔnlɩn, fɛ alɩ amʋʋ anɩtɔdwɛ mlɩ amʋ. 13Ɔwa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, mɛnɩ anɩ Sɩ Bulu omóowun ɔlala mlɩ ɩwɩ, ifin kʋkʋ ɛ méetsia mlɩ ɩwɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ, anɩ Wie Yesu mʋa mʋ aha fɛ́ɛ́ ɔbakɛ amʋ.

Title: 1 TESALONIKAFƆ 4
Content:
Tsiatɔá Ilegyi Bulu Ansɩ
1Apio, ɩtrahɛ a, anɩlosuna mlɩ tsiatɔ, mɛnɩ Bulu ansɩ bégyi mlɩ ɩwɩ. Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, alɩ mlɩ tsiatɔ gyi nɩ. Sei a, anɩhɩɛ anɩdɛ mlɩ kokoli anɩ Wie Yesu ɩdatɔ anɩaa, mlɩbwɛ mʋ́ dʋn alɩ. 2Tsufɛ mlɩyin mbla amʋʋ anɩlɔwa ha mlɩ anɩ Wie Yesu ɩdatɔ amʋ. 3Bulu dekleá mlɩha mlɩ ɩwɩ ɩtɩn. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmáwa atsɩ mʋ́a ayin asʋn. 4Mlɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ ɔbɩ alɩá ɔbɛ́kɩta ɩwɩ, ɩwɩtɩn pʋ́ obú ɔkpasʋ. 5Ɩmábwɛ ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ ɔkpasʋ, fɛ alɩá aha ánɩ́ bʋmeyin Bulu bʋtɔbwɛ. 6Mlɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋ másisi mʋ ba, swɩɩ mʋ mʋ ka. Tsufɛ anɩ Wie ɔbɛ́bɩtɩ aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔbwɛ mʋ́ odu ɩsʋ. Anɩdɛ mlɩ ɔla da, fɛ alɩá anɩlɔkʋ bla mlɩ yaɩ. 7Tsufɛ Bulu mɛtɩ anɩ ɔbɛɛ, aba bɔtɔ mbʋa; mboun ɔbɛɛ, ifin kʋkʋ mátsia anɩ ɩwɩ. 8Mʋ́ sʋ ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ omegyi atosunahɛ anfɩsʋ a, megyi nyankpʋsa omedebu. Mboun Bulu amʋʋ ɔlɔpʋ mʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ ha mlɩ amʋ.
9Imehian ánɩ́ abɔ́wanlɩn asʋansʋ tsu mlɩ aba akristofɔ-dwɛ ɩwɩ sɩsɩ mlɩ. Tsufɛ Bulu onuto lasuna mlɩ alɩá mlɩdwɛ mlɩ aba dodoodo. 10Ɔnɔkwalɩ a, mlɩdɛ apio ahogyipʋá bʋbʋ Makedonia ɔmátɔ fɛ́ɛ́ dwɛ dodo. Mʋ́ sʋ apio, anɩdɛ ɩpa bwii ha mlɩ anɩaa, mlɩtra dwɛ aba dʋn alɩ. 11Mlɩpʋdɩnka ɩwɩsʋá mlétsia tsiatɔ wanklaan. Mlɔ́pʋ mlɩ ɩbɩ yɔ agyʋma pʋkɩ mlɩ ɩwɩsʋ, fɛ alɩá anɩlɛbla mlɩ, 12mɛnɩ mlɩa aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi ahogyipʋ mlétsia wanklaan, mlɩmɛ́ɛtra pʋ ansɩ dɩnka ɔhaasʋ.
Anɩ Wie Yesu Yinki Ba
13Apio, anɩdekle anɩaa, mlɩbɩ ɔnɔkwalɩá ɩbʋ Akristofɔá bawu ɩwɩ, mɛnɩ mlɩméetsia gyi awɩrɛhɔ fɛ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ansɩ mɛdɩn tɔtɔsʋ. 14Anɩlohogyiá Yesu lowu kʋsʋ tsu afulitɔ. Alɩ kɛn anɩlohogyiá Bulu ɔbɛ́kpa aha amʋʋ bɔhɔ mʋ gyi asa bowu amʋ ba nɩ.
15Anɩ Wie onuto atosunahɛ anɩdɛ mlɩ suna sei a. Anɩ aha ánɩ́ anɩtra anɩtsie nkpa asa anɩ Wie ɔbakɛ ɩbɔ́fʋn a, anɩméegya awupʋ amʋ nkpa yefia mʋ. 16Tsufɛ anɩ Wie ɔbɔ́kplʋn tumisʋ, Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ dɛhɛn ɔbɛ́lɛ ɔnɔ, bɔ́fʋlɩ Bulu ɔkpɛ ɛ brɛá anɩ Wie onuto dɛkplɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ ɔba. Ahogyipʋá bawu bégyankpa kʋsʋ. 17Mʋ ɔma a, anɩ akɩankpapʋ ɛ fɛ́ɛ́ abɔ́yɔ yɛtʋ amʋ́ nwʋlʋtatɔ, anɩ fɛ́ɛ́ abéyefia anɩ Wie afutɔ. Tsu ɛkɛ amʋ a, abétsia anɩ Wie wa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. 18Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩpʋ asʋn anfɩ kɩta ɩklʋn wa aba ɩwɩtɔ.

Title: 1 TESALONIKAFƆ 5
Content:
Ɩwɩsʋda Gyo Anɩ Wie Ɩba
1Apio, imehian ánɩ́ abɔ́wanlɩn brɛ pʋ́ ɛkɛá asʋn anfɩ ɩbɛ́ba sɩsɩ mlɩ. 2Tsufɛ mlɩ onuto mlɩyin ánɩ́ anɩ Wie ɔbakɛ amʋ ɩbɛ́ba bofwie anɩtɔ, fɛ alɩá owikplu tɛba onye. 3Brɛá aha bɛɛ, “Owi lata; asʋn lata.” a, alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ bɛ́hɩ nɩ. Ibófwie amʋ́tɔ fɛ alɩá ɩkwɩɩ tɛkan ɔtsɩ ɔtsawʋlɛ pɛ. Ɔhaa mɛ́ɛdalɩ mʋ́tɔ. 4Tamɛ apio, mlɩ mʋ́ mlɩyin asʋn anfɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmétsie okluntɔ, mɛnɩ ɛkɛ amʋ mɛ́ɛba bofwie mlɩtɔ fɛ owikplu. 5Wankɩ mʋ́a ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ abi mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩgyi. Megyi onye ntɛ okluntɔ abi anɩgyi. 6Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha agyo, anɩmádɩdɩ fɛ aha bamba. Mlɩha adɩnka ansɩ ɩwɩsʋ, akɩ ɩwɩsʋ wanklaan. 7Onye adɩdɩpʋ bʋtɛdɩdɩ. Onye nta abʋpʋ ɛ bʋtɔbʋ nta. 8Tamɛ anɩ mʋ́ a, wankɩtɔ abi anɩgyi. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha agyi ɩwɩsʋ. Mlɩha Kristo hogyi pʋ́ anɩ abadwɛ ɩbwɛ kantɔ-atintɔ tin anɩ kantɔ. Mʋ ɔkpakɩá ɔbɔ́hɔ anɩ nkpa ɩbwɛ kʋtʋpa ánɩ́ ibun anɩ nwun. 9Megyi alɩá Bulu obénya ɔblɔ wa anɩ, bɩtɩ anɩ ɩsʋ sʋ ɔlɛlɛ anɩ. Mboun alɩá ɔbɔtsʋn anɩ Wie Yesu Kristosʋ hɔ anɩ nkpa sʋ. 10Kristo lowu ha anɩ, mɛnɩ mʋ babɩ a, nɩ anɩlawu o, anɩbʋ nkpa o, anɩa mʋnyɔ abétsia. 11Mlɩpʋ asʋn anfɩ kɩta klʋn wa aba ɩwɩtɔ, pʋwa aba ɔwʋnlɩn, fɛ alɩá mlɩdɛ mʋ́ bwɛ dodo.
Ɩkla
12Apio, abwii ɩpa ha mlɩ, mlɩbu mlɩ ɔnɔ alɩɩpʋá bʋhɩɛ bʋdɛ agyʋma yɔ mlɩtɔ, bʋdɛ mlɩ anɩ Wie tsiatɔ suna. 13Gyʋma amʋʋ bʋdegyi amʋ sʋ mlɩhɩɛ bu amʋ́, amlɩdwɛ amʋ́. Iwilwii itsia mlɩa mlɩ aba nsɩnɛ.
14Apio, anɩdɛ mlɩ ɔla da anɩaa, mlɩtɔɩ kpla awʋlɩyɔpʋ. Mlɩwa afupʋ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn. Mlɩbʋa amʋ́á bapɔn, amlɩnya klʋn ha ɔhagyiɔha. 15Mlɩkɩá ɔha mɔ́ɔpʋ lalahɛ ka mʋ ba ɩkɔ. Mboun mlɩbwɛ yile ha aba pʋ́ aha fɛ́ɛ́.
16Ansɩ igyi mlɩ, 17amlɩbɔ mpaɩ bregyibrɛ. 18Mlɩda Bulu ɩpan togyitɔtɔ. Mʋ́gyi tɔá Bulu dedunka tsu mlɩ wa mlɩ nkpatɔ, brɛ anfɩ mlɩa Kristo Yesunyɔ mlɩlabwɛ ɩkʋlɛ anfɩ nɩ.
19Mlɩmákina tɔá Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ tekle bwɛ. 20Mlɩmábu Bulu ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋ asʋn amʋ tɔkʋ odu. 21Mlɩsɔ togyitɔ kɩ, amlɩkɩta mʋ́á ɩbʋ alɛtɔ kinkiinkin. 22Mlɩkina lalahɛ kugyikʋ.
23Bulu tɛha anɩ iwilwii. Ɔtɩn mlɩ ɩwɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. Ɔkɩ mlɩ nyankpʋsa-oyi, mlɩ ɔŋɛ pʋ́ mlɩ ɔklasʋ tsu lalahɛ kugyikʋtɔ, mɛnɩ ɔlala méetsia mlɩ ɩwɩ anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ɔbakɛ amʋ. 24Bulu lɛtɩ mlɩ. Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ ogyi, ɔbɔ́bwɛ mʋ́.
25Apio, mlɩbɔ mpaɩ ha anɩ ɛ.
26Aha ahogyipʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ itsia gyagyagya. Mlɩlata aba puta ɔdwɛsʋ.
27Ndɛ mlɩ bla anɩ Wie ɩdatɔ mbɛɛ, mlɩkla ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ suna ahogyipʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́.
28Anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ogyi mlɩ bʋalɛ.

Title: 2 TESALONIKAFƆ 1
Content:
1Mɩ Paulo pʋ́ Silwano mʋa Timoteo dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ ɔpasua ánɩ́ ɩbʋ Tesalonika wulutɔ, mlɩgyi anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo klɛ.
2Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋgyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, abʋha mlɩ iwilwii.
Ɩpanda
3Apio, ilehian ánɩ́ abɛ́da Bulu ɩpan mlɩ nwunsʋ bregyibrɛ. Tsufɛ mlɩdɛdan hogyitɔ tsɩa. Ɔdwɛá mlɩbʋ ha aba ɛ idemoni tsɩa. 4Mʋ́ sʋ anɩtɔpʋ mlɩ tsu ɩwɩ Bulu ɔpasua kugyikʋ ansɩtɔ; mlɩ nsiwa pʋ́ hogyiá ɩbʋ mlɩtɔ, bʋdɩn mlɩsʋ, ɩsɔkɩ dɛ mlɩ tʋ, mlɩlatomi sʋ.
5Ɩnɩ dɛlɛ suna ánɩ́ Bulu asʋngyi da ɔkpa. Tsufɛ obótsu mlɩá mlɩlafʋn ha mʋ iwiegyi amʋʋ mlɩdɛ ipian wun mʋ́ sʋ amʋtɔ yɔ. 6Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ Bulu gyi. Ɔbɛ́ka aha amʋʋ bʋdɛ mlɩ ɩwɩɔsɩntɔ wa amʋ akɔ. 7Ɔbɛ́ha ɩwɩ bólwii anɩa mlɩ ánɩ́ mlɩdɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn wun, ɛkɛ amʋʋ anɩ Wie Yesu ɔbɛ́kplɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ bɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan mʋa mʋ abɔpʋ atumipʋ amʋ. 8Ogya plɛnplɛntɔ ɔbɛ́ba bɛbɩtɩ aha amʋʋ bʋmeyin Bulu amʋ ɩsʋ. Tsufɛ bʋtamapʋ anɩ Wie Yesu ɩwɩ asʋn wanklaan amʋ bwɛ tɔtɔ. 9Amʋ́ ɩsʋbɩtɩ gyi, amʋ́a anɩ Wie nsɩnɛ bɔ́wa ɩfɔ. Mʋ tumi mɔ́ɔwankɩ wʋlɩ amʋ́sʋ, obéyinta amʋ́ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. 10Ɩsʋbɩtɩ anfɩ ɩbɛ́ba ɛkɛ amʋʋ ɔbɛ́ba, Bulu ɔbɔ́wa mʋ numnyam aha wankɩhɛ ansɩtɔ amʋ. Ifu bɛ́kɩta ahogyipʋ. Mlɩ ɛ mlétsia amʋ́tɔ, tsufɛ mlɩlɔhɔ mʋ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ amʋʋ anɩlegyi suna mlɩ amʋsʋ gyi.
11Mʋ́ sʋ anɩtɔbɔ mpaɩ ha mlɩ anɩaa, Bulu ɔha amlɩfʋn nkpa amʋʋ ɔlɛtɩ mlɩ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩbetsia amʋtɔ. Mʋ tumi ɩha amlɩtalɩ bwɛ yileá mlɩdekleá mlɔ́bwɛ, pʋmɔ mlɩ hogyi agyʋma ɔnɔ. 12Nɩ mlɛtalɩ bwɛ ɩnɩ a, mlɩ sʋ aha bɔ́pʋ numnyam ha anɩ Wie Yesu. Mʋ ɛ ɔbɔ́wa mlɩ numnyam; fɛ alɩ amʋʋ anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo awɩtɔlɛ gyi amʋ.

Title: 2 TESALONIKAFƆ 2
Content:
Yesu Mʋa Mblasʋ Mágyipʋ Amʋ
1-2Mɩ apio, nobwii ɩpa ha mlɩ. Anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ɩba, pʋ́ alɩá abɔ́bwɛ kʋlɛ yefia mʋ asʋn ánɩ́ mlɩlanu ɩmákɔsɩ kpɩnkɩ mlɩ klʋn, ntɛ ɩha opuni itsii mlɩ. Nɩ akʋ bɛɛ, Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ lalɛ suna amʋ́ loo, ntɛ ɩbʋ anɩ asʋn blɩhɛ ntɛ anɩ ɔwʋlʋ ɩkʋtɔ ánɩ́ anɩ Wie ɔbakɛ amʋ laba dodo kʋraa a, mlɩmáhogyi. 3Mlɩmáha ɔhaa ɔmlɛ mlɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. Ɛkɛ kpɔnkpɔntɩ anfɩ ɩmɛ́ɛba, nkɛtɩ aha bakʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulusʋ, ɔha amʋʋ ɔtamagyi Bulu mblasʋ, ɔbɛ́hɩ amʋ lalɩn ɔwan asa. 4Obótsu ɩwɩ fʋa, kʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulu, ɩkpɩ pʋ́ togyitɔá anyankpʋsa bʋtosumsʋ, blɩá ɔdʋn amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́. Obéyetsia Bulu ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ kʋraa, blɩ ɔbɛɛ mʋgyi Bulu.
5Mlɩmɔkʋkaɩn ánɩ́ ntɛbla mlɩ asʋn anfɩ brɛá mbʋ mlɩ wa? 6Mlɩyin tɔá ɩdɛ mʋ ɔkpa tin dodo. Nkɛtɩ mʋ ɔwanlɛbɩ lafʋn. 7Tsufɛ Bulu mblasʋmágyi tumi anfɩ ɩdɛ agyʋma yɔ ŋaintɔ dodoodo, tamɛ ɔkʋ dɛ mʋ́ ɔkpa tin. Mʋ́ sʋ nkɛtɩ ɔha amʋ ladalɩ ɩnʋ. 8Ɩnʋ mblasʋ mágyipʋ amʋ ɔbɛ́lɩn ɔwan nɩ. Tamɛ anɩ Wie Yesu oyinki ba a, mʋ ɔnɔtɔ afu kɛkɛ ɩbɔ́mɔ mʋ. Mʋ numnyam ɛ ɩbɔ́wankɩ wʋlɩ mʋsʋ yinta mʋ. 9Nɩ mblasʋ mágyipʋ anfɩ ɔlɩn ɔwan a, ɔbɔ́pʋ Satan afunu tumi kpɔnkpɔntɩ bwɛ osuna pʋ́ ofula. 10Ɔbɔ́tsʋn owuntɔlɩn ɔkpa ɔtsan-ɔtsansʋ mlɛ aha amʋʋ Bulu ɔbɛ́hɩ amʋ́ amʋ. Bulu ɔbɛ́hɩ amʋ́, tsufɛ bʋmekle ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ asʋn, mɛnɩ Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ amʋ́ nkpa. 11Ɩnɩ sʋ Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋ afunu ɔŋɛá mʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn wa amʋ́tɔ, mɛnɩ bɔ́hɔ afunu asʋnsʋ gyi. 12Ɔbɛ́ha aha anfɩ bʋmɔhɔ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋsʋ gyi, bʋtekle lakpan bwɛ anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩpɔn.
Mlɩ Nkpahɔ Sʋ Bulu Lɛlɛ Mlɩ
13Apioá anɩ Wie tɔdwɛ, ilehian ánɩ́ abɛ́da Bulu ɩpan mlɩ nwunsʋ bregyibrɛ. Tsufɛ tsu brɛá ɔyɩ lɛlɩn ɔpá Bulu lɛlɛ mlɩ ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́tsʋn mʋ Ɔŋɛ amʋ pʋ́ mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋʋ mlɩlahogyi amʋsʋ tɩn mlɩ ɩwɩ, pʋhɔ mlɩ nkpa. 14Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔlɔtsʋn asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ anɩlɛbla mlɩ amʋsʋ tɩ mlɩ ɔbɛɛ, mlɩbetsia anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo numnyam amʋtɔ nɩ. 15Mʋ́ sʋ apio, mlɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin, amlɩkɩta ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋʋ anɩlosuna mlɩ amʋtɔ, mʋ́á anɩlɛbla mlɩ pʋ́ mʋ́á anɩlɔwanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́.
16-17Anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo onuto mʋa anɩ Sɩ Buluá ɔtɔdwɛ anɩ, alawa awɩtɔlɛ wa anɩ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn ánɩ́ ɩmɔ́ɔmɔ ɔnɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Anɩdɛ ɩtɔ wanklaan ɔkpa kɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔwa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn mlɩ asʋn blɩhɛ pʋ́ mlɩ bwɛhɛ kugyikʋtɔ.

Title: 2 TESALONIKAFƆ 3
Content:
Mpaɩbɔ
1Ɩtrahɛ-trahɛ a, apio, mlɩbɔ mpaɩ ha anɩ, anɩ Wie asʋn amʋ ɩkɔsɩ klɛɩ. Aha abʋpʋ obú hɔ mʋ́ fɛ alɩ amʋʋ mlɩ ɛ mlɩlɔhɔ mʋ́ amʋ. 2Mlɩbɔ mpaɩ, Bulu ɔlɛ anɩ tsu awuntɔlɩnpʋ pʋ́ aha lalahɛ ɩbɩtɔ. Tsufɛ megyi aha fɛ́ɛ́ lɔhɔ anɩ Wie gyi.
3Tamɛ anɩ Wie bʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ. Ɔbɔ́wa mlɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, hɔ mlɩ lɛ Lalahɛ Ɔbwɛpʋ amʋ ɩbɩtɔ. 4Anɩ Wie laha anɩlahogyiá mlɩdɛ ntobi amʋʋ anɩlosuna mlɩ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bwɛ, mlɩméesi bwɛ ɛ.
5Ɔkpa mlɩ, amlɩnu ɔdwɛá Bulu bʋ asɩ yɔ ɔtɔtɔɔtɔ; ɔha amlɩtomi fɛ Kristo.
Tsiatɔ Wanklaan
6Apio, anɩdɛ mlɩ ɔla da anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ɩdatɔ anɩaa, mlɩmápʋ Akristofɔ amʋʋ bʋna bʋdɛtsʋn, bʋtamakle agyʋma, bʋmɛdɛ atosunahɛ amʋʋ anɩlosuna mlɩ amʋsʋ gyi wa mba. 7Mlɩ onuto mlɩyin ánɩ́ ilehian ánɩ́ mlétsia anɩ atsiabi. Tsufɛ anɩmɔwa ɔwʋlɩyɔ, natɩ tsʋntsʋn brɛá anɩbʋ mlɩ wa. 8Anɩmegyi atɔ ɔhaa wa, kina mʋ́ ɩkɔ ka. Mboun anɩlɔyɔ agyʋma ɔpa mʋ́a onye kinkiinkin, mɛnɩ anɩméesi ipian tswɩ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋʋkʋsʋ. 9Megyi bɛɛ, anɩmá ɔkpa bla mlɩ anɩaa, mlɩkɩ anɩsʋ, sʋ anɩlɔbwɛ mʋ́ alɩ. Mboun anɩlɔbwɛ mʋ́ suna mlɩ, mɛnɩ mlɩ ɛ mlɔ́bwɛ mʋ́ odu. 10Brɛá anɩbʋ mlɩ wa kʋraa a, anɩlɔwa mbla ha mlɩ anɩaa, “Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔmɔyɔ agyʋma mágyi atɔ.”
11Anɩlanuá mlɩtɔ akʋ bʋtsie kpaalɩ, bʋmɛdɛ agyʋma kʋkʋʋkʋ yɔ. Okengye bʋna bʋdɛwa tsʋn. 12Anɩdɛ amʋ́ ɔla da anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ɩdatɔ anɩaa, bʋsi natɩ tsʋn, abʋyɔ agyʋma nya amʋ́ atogyihɛ.
13Tamɛ apio, mlɩ mʋ́ a, yilebwɛ ɩmáta mlɩ ɔŋɛ. 14Nɩ ɔkʋ megyi asʋn anfɩ anɩlawanlɩn sɩsɩ mlɩ anfɩsʋ a, mlɩkɩ mʋ wanklaan. Mlɩa mʋnyɔ mlɩmágyi mba, mɛnɩ pɛlɩ bɛ́kɩta mʋ. 15Tamɛ mlɩmálu mʋ, mboun mlɩtɔɩ kpla mʋ fɛ mlɩ pio.
Ɩkla
16Iwilwii Owie amʋ onuto ɔha mlɩ iwilwii brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. Anɩ Wie otsia mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ wa.
17Mɩ Paulo onuto lapʋ mɩ ɩbɩ wanlɩn ɩnɩ. Mɩ ɩda anfɩ ntɔwanlɩn wa mɩ nwʋlʋ fɛ́ɛ́ asɩ, pʋsuna ánɩ́ itsu mɩ onuto wa nɩ.
18Anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ogyi mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋalɛ.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 1
Content:
Itsiaha
1-2Mɩ Paulo ánɩ́ anɩ Nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ Bulu mʋa Kristo Yesuá anɩ ansɩ dɩn mʋsʋ lɔbwɛ mɩ sumbi ɔyɔpʋ, dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ fʋ Timoteoá fʋgyi mɩ bi onuto Yesu hogyi amʋtɔ.
Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Kristo Yesu bʋgyi fʋ bʋalɛ, abʋwun fʋ nwɛ ha fʋ iwilwii.
Afunu Atosunahɛ
3Brɛá ndɛnatɩ nɔyɔ Makedonia nsaɩntɔ a, nɛbla fʋ mbɛɛ, fʋtsia Efeso ɔmátɔ, afʋka aha amʋʋ bʋdɛ afunu atɔ suna amʋ itin. 4Mʋ́ ɔma a, da amʋ́ ɔla abʋsi brɛ yinta ha ɔtɛwa pʋ́ anain otuntufla kla tɩntɩntɩn. Nwɛngyi kɛkɛ ɩtɔpʋba. Ɩtamaha aha abʋtsia nkpa Bulu hogyitɔ. 5Tɔá sʋá anɩaa, fʋka amʋ́ itin gyi, alɩá Okristoyin okugyiɔkʋ ɔbɔ́dwɛ mʋ ba. Mʋ klʋn mɛ́ɛha mʋ ɩpɔn, obénya agywɩɩn wanklaan mʋ́a hogyi onuto. 6Akʋ bʋmobuo alɩ ɔkpa anfɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ bafwɩ yɔ bʋdɛ asʋn ánɩ́ ɩma asɩ blɩ. 7Bʋdekleá bɔ́bwɛ Mose mbla asunapʋ, tamɛ bʋmɛdɛ ɩtɔ amʋʋ bʋdesuna amʋ asɩ nu. Ɩdɛ amʋ́ bwɛ fɛ bʋyin mʋ́, tamɛ bʋmeyin mʋ́.
8Anɩyin ánɩ́ mbla amʋ bʋ alɛ, nɩ bɔpʋsuna atɔ ɔkpa wanklaansʋ. 9Tamɛ ɩwankɩ anɩ ánɩ́ megyi yile abwɛpʋ sʋ Bulu lɔwa mbla amʋ. Mboun aha ánɩ́ bʋtamagyi mʋ́sʋ, aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋtɔ bʋ amʋ́ ɔnlɩn, aha ánɩ́ bʋtamanya mʋ ifu, lakpan abwɛpʋ, aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ɩwɩ mɛtɩn, aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔkpɔɩ Bulu, aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔmɔ amʋ́ akwɩɩpʋ pʋ́ aha bamba, 10mbʋa atɔpʋ, ayin ánɩ́ bʋtekle amʋ́ aba ayin pʋ́ atsɩá bʋtekle amʋ́ aba atsɩ, anyankpʋsa ibia agyipʋ, afunupʋ, aha ánɩ́ bɛka ntam bʋtamagyi mʋ́sʋ pʋ́ tsiatɔá ɩmɛkana atosunahɛ wanklaan amʋʋ 11Bulu Onumnyampʋ, ɩkanfʋ gyi mʋ klɛ amʋ lɔpʋha mɩ ɔbɛɛ, nda mʋ́ ɔkan amʋ.
Bulu Paulo Bʋalɛgyi
12Nɛda anɩ Wie Kristo Yesu ɩpan ánɩ́ alawa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, bu mɩ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ ɔbɛɛ, nyɔ agyʋma anfɩ pʋsum mʋ. 13Tɛkɩ mɩtɛblɩ mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn lalahɛ, ntɛdɩnka mʋ ahasʋ, sʋpa amʋ́ nɩ. Tamɛ olowun mɩ nwɛ, tsufɛ mmɔhɔ mʋ gyi alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ, mmeyin tɔá ndɛbwɛ ɛ. 14Oo, hɩɛ kɩ alɩá ɔhɩɛ ɔbʋ awɩtɔlɛ! Ɔlɛha mɩ nenya mʋ hogyi mʋ́a abadwɛá ɩbʋ anɩa Kristonyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛtɔ. 15Asʋn anfɩ ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔ, ilehian ánɩ́ ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɔ́hɔ mʋ́sʋ gyi. Mʋ́gyi, Kristo Yesu lɛba ɔyɩtɔ bɛlɛ lakpan abwɛpʋ. Mɩgyi amʋ́tɔ ɔlalahɛ nɩ. 16Tamɛ ɩnɩ sʋ Bulu lowun mɩ nwɛ, ha Kristo Yesu lɛlɛ mɩ anfɩ ngyi lakpan ɔbwɛpʋ kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ anfɩ nɩ. Mɛnɩ ɔhagyiɔha ɔbɛ́bɩá Bulu tɛhɩɛ nya klʋn ha ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbɛ́ba bɔhɔ mʋ gyi, nya nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata. 17Mlɩha awa Bulu numnyam, akanfʋ mʋ anɩaa, “Fʋgyi Owieá fʋ iwiegyi tamamɔ ɔnɔ. Bulu Ɔkʋkʋnʋ ɔkʋlɛ, bʋtamapʋ ansibi wun fʋ. Fʋbʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́, fʋtamawu! Amen.”
18Mɩ bi Timoteo, atɔ amʋʋ Bulu lɛlɛ suna tsu fʋ ɩwɩ amʋ sʋ ndɛ mbla anfɩ wa ha fʋ. Pʋ asʋn anfɩ yɔ agyʋma, afʋpʋkɔ atosunahɛ wanklaan amʋ nwunsʋ. 19Kɩta fʋ hogyitɔ. Bwɛ tɔá fʋyin fʋ klʋntɔá ɩbʋ alɛ, tsufɛ akʋ babwɛ tɔá bʋyin ánɩ́ ɩma alɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩlaha amʋ́ hogyi lawu. 20Amʋ́tɔ akʋ gyi Himeneo mʋa Aleksandro. Napʋ amʋ́ wa Ɔbʋnsam ɩbɩtɔ. Ɔbɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ, mɛnɩ bɛ́bɩá imehian ánɩ́ fɛ́blɩ Bulu ɩwɩ abususʋ.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 2
Content:
Bulusum Mbla
1Ɩtɔá ndedunka ánɩ́ mlɩgyankpa bwɛ gyi, mlɩkokoli Bulu aha fɛ́ɛ́ nwunsʋ, amlɩbɔ mpaɩ ha amʋ́. Mlɩkʋlɩ Bulu atɔ ha amʋ́, amlɩda mʋ ɩpan ɔhagyiɔha nwunsʋ. 2Ilehian ánɩ́ mlɔ́bwɛ mʋ́ alɩ ha awie pʋ́ ahandɛ ɛ, mɛnɩ asʋtɔ bólwii anɩ, abétsia iwilwiitɔ, atalɩ sum Bulu ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. 3Ɩnɩ bʋ alɛ, anɩ Nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ Bulu tekle nɩ. 4Tsufɛ odekleá ɔbɔ́hɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ nkpa, mɛnɩ bɛ́bɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ. 5Bulu ɔkʋkʋnʋ ɔkʋlɛ bʋ ɩnʋ. Nsɩnɛ ɔlapʋ ɔkʋlɛ pɛ ɛ bʋ Bulu mʋa anyankpʋsa nsɩnɛ. Mʋgyi Kristo Yesu, ogyi nyankpʋsa amʋ. 6Mʋlesi mʋ nkpa ha pʋhɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ nkpa. Asʋn anfɩ Bulu lɔpʋha ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mʋ́ brɛ wanklaantɔ nɩ. 7Ɔnɔkwalɩ ndɛ mlɩ bla, mmɛdɛ afunu wa. Ɩnɩ sʋ Bulu lɛlɛ mɩ ɔbɛɛ, mbwɛ mʋ asʋn ɔkan ɔdapʋ, mʋ sumbi ɔyɔpʋ pʋ́ osunapʋ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ, mɩ ambla amʋ́ ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn tsu Yesu hogyi ɩwɩ nɩ.
8Ndekleá ɔpasua kugyikʋtɔ a, ayin ánɩ́ amʋ́ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn bʋtsu ɩbɩ fʋa bɔ mpaɩ. Ɔblɔ ntɛ nwɛngyi mátsia amʋ́tɔ. 9Atsɩ amʋ ɛ bʋdɩda tati ɔkpa wanklaansʋ. Amʋ́ atɔ dɩdahɛ máwɔ ansibi. Bʋmádʋn imi bwɛ, wa sika atɔ, dɩda atatiá ɩbʋ ibia dʋbɩ. 10Atsɩá bɛɛ bʋtenya Bulu ifu bʋbwɛ yile. Mʋ́ ɔbɛ́ha bɔ́wa akɩlɛ nɩ. 11Ilehian ánɩ́ bétsia asɩ diin, ba ɩwɩasɩ suan atɔ. 12Mmɔkʋha atsɩ ɔkpa mbɛɛ, bʋsuna ayin atɔ, ntɛ bʋgyi ayinsʋ. Mboun bʋtsia diin. 13Tsufɛ Adam Bulu legyankpa bwɛ asa ɔlɔbwɛ Hawa. 14Megyi Adam ɛ Satan lɛmlɛ, mboun Hawa ɔlɛmlɛ, ɔlɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulu mblasʋ. 15Tamɛ Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ ɔtsɩ nkpa tsʋn ɩkwɩɩsʋ. Nɩ ɔlɛtalɩ kɩta mʋ hogyi pʋ́ mʋ abadwɛtɔ, ɔlɛha mʋ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn, oletsia nkpa ɛ wanklaan.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 3
Content:
Ɔpasua Ɔhandɛ Bwɛ
1Asʋn anfɩ bʋ mʋ́tɔ. Nɩ ɔha ɔbwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ mɔ́bwɛ ɔpasua ɔhandɛ a, alakle agyʋma wanklaan. 2Imehian ánɩ́ ɔlala bétsia ɔpasua ɔhandɛ ɩwɩ. Ɔbwɛ ɔka ɔkʋlɛ otsiapʋ, mʋ agywɩɩntɔ da, otegyi ɩwɩsʋ, obú bʋ mʋsʋ, ɔtɔhɔ afɔɔ, otosuna atɔ ɛ wanklaan. 3Ɔmábwɛ nta ɔbʋpʋ ntɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔbʋ ɩyɩn. Ɔbwɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɛba ɩwɩasɩ, mʋ asʋn lolwii. Ɔmábwɛ ɔtrɛpʋ, ɔmábwɛ kɔba ɔdwɛpʋ. 4Ɔbwɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛkɩ mʋ woyisʋ wanklaan, mʋ abi bɛba ɩwɩasɩ, bʋtobu mʋ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. 5Tsufɛ nɩ ɔha meyin mʋ woyisʋ kɩ wanklaan a, nkalɩ ɔbɛ́talɩ kɩ Bulu ɔpasua amʋsʋ? 6Ɔmábwɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɛdamli klʋntɔ ɩmɔkʋwa ɔpá. Nɩ megyi alɩ a, ɩbɛ́ha mʋ obótsu ɩwɩ, Bulu ɔbɛ́bɩtɩ mʋ ɩsʋ fɛ Ɔbʋnsam. 7Ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔma a, ilehian ánɩ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋma ɔpasua amʋtɔ kʋraa bɛ́tɩ mʋ ɩdayile. Nɩ megyi alɩ a, ɔbɛ́kpa wie Ɔbʋnsam yibitɔ sʋpa.
Ɔpasua Ɔhandɛ Ɔbʋapʋ
8Ɔpasua ɔhandɛ ɔbʋapʋ ɛ ɔbwɛ ɔha ánɩ́ obú bʋ mʋsʋ. Ɔma nnonyɔ, ɔtamabʋ nta, ɔma sika ɔnsɩpɛ. 9Ilehian ánɩ́ ɔbɛ́kɩta hogyi asʋn amʋʋ ɩlalɩn ɔwan amʋtɔ wanklaan, mʋ klʋn ɛ mɛ́ɛtra ha mʋ ɩpɔn. 10Mlɩgyankpa pʋ agyʋma ɩkʋ wa mʋ ɩbɩtɔ, pʋsɔ mʋ kɩ bɛɛ, ɔlala ma mʋ ɩwɩ, asa amlɩha mʋ ɔbwɛ ɔpasua ɔhandɛ ɔbʋapʋ. 11Alɩ kɛn mʋ ka ɛ ɔbwɛ ɔtsɩá obú bʋ mʋsʋ, ɔtamablɩ aha ɩwɩ asʋn lalahɛ, otegyi ɩwɩsʋ, ɔbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ togyitɔtɔ nɩ. 12Ɔpasua ɔhandɛ ɔbʋapʋ ɔbwɛ ɔka ɔkʋlɛ otsiapʋ, ɔtɛtalɩ kɩ mʋ abi pʋ́ mʋ woyisʋ wanklaan. 13Aha bʋtobu ɔpasua ɔhandɛ ɔbʋapʋá ɔtɔyɔ mʋ agyʋma wanklaan. Ɩtɛha mʋ ɔtɛtalɩ tɔɩ tsu mʋ hogyiá ɔbʋ Kristo Yesutɔ.
Asʋn Ŋainhɛ Kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ
14Ndɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ fʋ, tamɛ ndɩn ansɩá nɔ́kɔsɩ ba ɩnʋ. 15Mʋmʋ nɩ ndɛ ɔpá wa kʋraa a, ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ ɩbɛ́ha fɛ́bɩ tsiatɔ oduá ilehian ánɩ́ ɔha obétsia Bulu woyi, igyi Bulu Ɔkɩankpapʋ ɔpasua amʋtɔ. Ɔpasua amʋ gyi ɔtan pʋ́ ntswɩasɩ kpekplekpe ha ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋ nɩ. 16Ɔnɔkwalɩ, anɩ Bulusum ɩwɩ asʋn amʋʋ ɩlalɩn ɔwan amʋ lomoni. Mʋ́gyi,
Kristo lɛlɛ mʋ ɩwɩ suna fɛ nyankpʋsa.
Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ lɛlɛ mʋ suna ánɩ́ yile ɔbwɛpʋ ogyi.
Bulu-abɔpʋ bowun mʋ,
aha bɛda mʋ asʋn ɔkan suna ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́.
Ɔyɩtɔ aha bɔhɔ mʋ gyi,
Bulu lotsu mʋ ya ɔsʋsʋ numnyamtɔ.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 4
Content:
Afunu Atɔ Asunapʋ
1Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ lahɩɛ lɛ blɩ ɔbɛɛ, brɛ trahɛ amʋtɔ a, akʋ bési Kristo hogyi. Bɛyaa asʋ nu afunu ɔŋɛ asʋn pʋ́ ɔŋɛ lalahɛ atosunahɛ. 2Apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ afunu atɔ asunapʋ anfɩ bʋgyi. Amʋ́ klʋn tamatra ha amʋ́ ɩpɔn. 3Amʋ́dɛ aha hɩɛ bɛɛ, bʋkisi atogyihɛ kʋ, bʋmátsia aka mʋ́a aklu ɛ nɩ. Tamɛ Bulu onuto lɔbwɛ atogyihɛ amʋ, ánɩ́ ahogyipʋá babɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ bʋda mʋ ɩpan, abʋgyi. 4Togyitɔá Bulu lɛlɛ bʋ alɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩma alɛá abékisi kʋkʋ. Ilehian ánɩ́ abɔ́hɔ kugyikʋ, da mʋ ɩpan. 5Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn pʋ́ mpaɩ amʋʋ anɩlabɔ wʋlɩ atogyihɛ amʋsʋ amʋ laha mʋ́ ɩlamli Bulu klɛ.
Kristo Osumpʋ Wanklaan
6Nɩ fɔpʋ asʋn anfɩ tswɩ apio amʋ ansɩtɔ a, fɔ́bwɛ Kristo Yesu osumbi wanklaan ánɩ́ bapʋ hogyi amʋtɔ asʋn, pʋ́ atosunahɛ wanklaan amʋ bʋla fʋ, fʋdɛ mʋ́tɔ. 7Máyaa asʋ nu atsɩ dɛhɛn ɔtɛ pʋ́ mʋ́á imotsu Bulu ɩwɩ. Mboun hɩɛ fʋ ɩwɩ, afʋsum Bulu wanklaan. 8Tsufɛ nɩ fʋdɛ nyankpʋsa ɔyʋlʋ anfɩ hɩɛ a, labi kpalobi kʋ bʋ mʋ́tɔ. Tamɛ nɩ fɔpʋ Bulusum hɩɛ fʋ ɩwɩ a, ɩbʋ alɛ dʋn. Tsufɛ oyula bʋ mʋ́tɔ ha anɩ sei anfɩ anɩtsie nkpa, pʋ́ nkpa amʋʋ ɩbɛ́ba amʋtɔ. 9Asʋn anfɩ bʋ mʋ́tɔ, ilehian ánɩ́ abɔ́hɔ mʋ́. 10(Nkpa anfɩ sʋ anɩdɛ ɩwɩ lala yɔ agyʋma ɔwʋnlɩnsʋ), anɩ ansɩ dɩn Bulu Ɔkɩankpapʋ, ogyi aha fɛ́ɛ́ Ɔlɛpʋ, titriu ahogyipʋ anfɩsʋ nɩ.
11Suna amʋ́ atɔ anfɩ, afʋha amʋ́ abʋgyi mʋ́sʋ. 12Máha ɔhaa obu fʋ kebi. Mboun fʋ tɔɩtɔ, fʋ nkpatsiatɔ, fʋ ahadwɛ, fʋ Bulu hogyi pʋ́ fʋ ɩwɩtɩn ɩbwɛ atosuanhɛ ha amʋ́. 13Nɩ mlefia a, bɔ mbɔdɩ afʋtsia kla Bulu asʋn suna amʋ́. Da asʋn amʋ ɔkan, afʋsuna amʋ́ atɔ alɩɩ yɔfʋn brɛá nɛ́ba. 14Mákina Bulu atokiehɛ amʋʋ ɔlɔpʋha fʋ tsʋn mʋ ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋsʋ, brɛá ɔpasua ahandɛ bɔpʋ ɩbɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ amʋ. 15Tsia bwɛ ɩnɩ aná, afʋsi ɩwɩ ha mʋ́, mɛnɩ aha bówun ánɩ́ fʋdɛ nkpa yɔ. 16Tsia kɩ fʋ tsiatɔ pʋ́ atosunahɛ amʋ. Tomi bwɛ mʋ́ alɩ, mɛnɩ fɔ́hɔ fʋa asʋn amʋ anupʋ nkpa.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 5
Content:
Tɔá Abɔ́bwɛ Ha Ahogyipʋ
1Mákplʋn wa oyin dɛhɛn. Mboun tɔɩ bla mʋ asʋn fɛ fʋ sɩ. Kɩta nyasubi amʋ fɛ alɩá fɛ́kɩta fʋ apio yinhɛ. 2Kɩta atsɩ dɛhɛn amʋ fɛ fʋ yin, afʋkɩta mbitebi amʋ ɛ fɛ fʋ apio tsɩhɛ. Máwa amʋ́ mba.
3Ɔpasua amʋ bʋkɩ asʋrapʋá bʋhɩɛ bʋma ɔbʋapʋsʋ. 4Tamɛ nɩ ɔsʋrapʋ ɔkʋ bʋ abi ntɛ aná a, ha amʋ́ abʋbɩ tɔá ilehian ánɩ́ bégyankpa bwɛ ha amʋ́ akwɩɩpʋ ntɛ amʋ́ aná Bulusum ɔkpasʋ, pʋka amʋ́ akɔ. Mʋ́gyi amʋ́sʋ kɩ, tsufɛ mʋ́tegyi Bulu ansɩ nɩ. 5Ɔsʋrapʋá ɔhɩɛ ɔma ɔhaa tɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ, tsia bɔ mpaɩ ɔpa onye, kʋlɩ Bulu tɔá ɩdɛ mʋ hian. 6Ɔsʋrapʋá mʋ klɛ gyi nkpagyi kotoo mʋ́ lawu asa ɔna ɔyɩtɔ. 7Bla ɔpasua amʋ asʋn anfɩ, mɛnɩ ɔhaa mɛ́ɛblɩ ɔsʋrapʋ ɔkʋkʋ ɩwɩ asʋn lalahɛ. 8Nɩ ɔkʋ mɛkɩ mʋ abusuanfɔsʋ, titriu mʋ woyitɔ ahasʋ a, mʋmʋ aladamli ɔma ha hogyi amʋ. Ɩnɩ sʋ mʋ lakpan dʋn ɔha ánɩ́ ɔmɔhɔ Bulu gyi.
9Ɔsʋrapʋ oduá mʋ ɩda bétsia asʋrapʋ ada ɔwʋlʋtɔ gyi, ɔsʋrapʋá alahɔ tsu nfi aduesie pʋya, ɔlɔwa ɔnɔkwalɩ ha mʋ klu. 10Ɔbwɛ ɔha ánɩ́ aha bʋyin ánɩ́ ɔlɔbwɛ yile, fɛ abisʋkɩ, afɔɔhɔ, olosum Bulu aha, ɔtɔbʋa aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn wun, ɔlɔbwɛ agyʋma wanklaan kugyikʋ.
11Máwanlɩn asʋrapʋá bʋmɔkʋdan ada wa ɔwʋlʋ amʋtɔ, tsufɛ nɩ amʋ́ ɔwɔlɩ ɩha amʋ́ bɔbwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ bɛlatsia aklu a, bʋmɛ́ɛtra talɩ sum Kristo ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ. 12Ɩnɩ ɩbɛ́ha bégyi pɔn, tsufɛ batʋn amʋ́ ntam ánɩ́ bɛka ha Bulu. 13Ɔma a, bʋtɛbɩ ɔwʋlɩyɔ wa, yinta brɛ natɩ ki aha woyitɔ. Megyi ɔwʋlɩyɔ wʋlɛ, bʋtemli aha ɩwɩ asʋn ablɩpʋ, natɩ wa ɔnɔ aha asʋntɔ, blɩ asʋn ánɩ́ imehian ánɩ́ bɛ́blɩ. 14Ɩnɩ sʋ ndekleá asʋrapʋ amʋʋ bʋmɔkʋdan amʋ bʋwuna tsia aklu kwɩɩ abi, abʋkɩ amʋ́ woyisʋ, mɛnɩ bʋmɛ́ɛha anɩ alupʋ ɔkpa abʋblɩ anɩ ɩwɩ asʋn lalahɛ kʋkʋ. 15Ndɛ asʋn anfɩ blɩ, tsufɛ asʋrapʋ akʋ badamli yɔ bʋbuo Ɔbʋnsam dodo. 16Nɩ Okristoyintse ɔkʋ bʋ asʋrapʋ mʋ abusuantɔ a, ɔkɩ amʋ́sʋ. Ɔmási amʋ́ tswɩ ɔpasua amʋsʋ, mɛnɩ ɔpasua amʋ bénya ɔkpa kɩ amʋ́á bʋma ɔhaasʋ.
17Ilehian ánɩ́ ɔpasua amʋ bɛ́ka ɔpasua ahandɛá bʋdɛ amʋ́ kpa akɔ wanklaan, wa amʋ́ numnyam. Titriu amʋ́á bʋtɔbɔ mbɔdɩ Bulu asʋn amʋ ɔkanda pʋ́ mʋ́ suna ɩwɩ. 18Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ ɩlɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Bʋtamawa ɔnantswieá ɔdɛ ayo da ɔnɔ ɩkan.” Ɩlɛtra blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Agyʋma ɔyɔpʋ bʋtɛka ɩkɔ.” 19Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔda ɔpasua ɔhandɛ asʋn suna fʋ a, máhɔ mʋ́, nkɛtɩ fanu mʋ́ tsu aha abanyɔ-abasa ɔnɔ asa. 20Wa ɩyɩn wa ɔhandɛ amʋʋ ɔdɛ lalahɛ bwɛ amʋ ɔpasua amʋ ansɩtɔ, mɛnɩ atrahɛ bénya ifu.
21Nlɩɩ Bulu mʋa Kristo Yesu pʋ́ Bulu-abɔpʋá alalɛ ansɩtɔ, ndɛ fʋ hɩɛ mbɛɛ, fʋgyi asʋn anfɩsʋ wanklaan. Mákɩ ɔhaa ansɩtɔ ntɛ futi fɩtatɔ kɩ. 22Mákɔsɩ tsia yaɩ ɔha ɔpasua ɔhandɛ. Máwa ɩbɩ ɔha bamba lalahɛbwɛtɔ. Ha fʋ ɩwɩ ɩtɩn bregyibrɛ.
23Fʋ ɔmɛtɔ ɩlɔ amʋ sʋ mátsia nun ntsu wʋlɛ, tsia nun nta kpalobi-kpalobi.
24Akʋ lakpan meŋain. Mʋ́ sʋ bʋtɔkɔsɩ wun mʋ́ bɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩsʋ. Akʋ klɛ ɛ leŋain, ɔma asa ɩtɛlɩn ɔwan. 25Alɩ kɛn yilebwɛ tamaŋain nɩ. Nɩ ɩmɔkɔsɩ lɩn ɔwan kʋraa a, ɩtɛbɛlɩn ɔwan ɔma.

Title: 1 TIMOTEO 6
Content:
1Ilehian ánɩ́ nkpábiá bʋbʋ ɔpasua amʋtɔ bɛ́hɩɛ bu amʋ́ awie, mɛnɩ ɔhaa mɔ́ɔkpɔɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ atosunahɛ amʋ. 2Ilehian ánɩ́ amʋ́á amʋ́ awie bʋbʋ ɔpasua amʋtɔ bóbu amʋ́ awie amʋ dʋn. Sei kʋraa ilehian ánɩ́ bóbu amʋ́ dʋn nɩ. Tsufɛ ahogyipʋ bʋgyi, bʋtɔdwɛ amʋ́ ɛ.
Afunu Atosunahɛ Pʋ́ Atonyahɛ Onuto
Ɩnɩ aná gyi tɔá fʋsuna amʋ́, afʋwa amʋ́ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn abʋbwɛ nɩ. 3Nɩ ɔkʋ losuna atɔ lalahɛ kʋ, mʋ́a anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo asʋn blɩhɛ pʋ́ Bulusum atosunahɛ amʋ ɩmɛna a, 4idesuna ánɩ́ ɔha amʋ dɛ ɩwɩ tsu. Omeyin tɔtɔ, nwɛnkpangyi labʋla mʋtɔ. Mʋ́á ɩtɛdalɩ tsu mʋ́tɔ gyi ɔnsɩpɛ, ɩtrɛ, isia pʋ́ agywɩɩn lalahɛ. 5Asʋn ánɩ́ imedehian ɩwɩ nwɛn aha anfɩ odu bʋtɛnatɩ gyi. Amʋ́ agywɩɩn lawu, bʋtamablɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ. Amʋ́ odu bʋtosusuá Bulusum igyi ɔkpa kʋá fɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ nya ɩwɩ.
6Labi kpɔnkpɔntɩ bʋ Bulusumtɔ nɩ tɔá anɩbʋ yaɩ legyi anɩ ansɩ. 7Tsufɛ anɩmɔpʋ tɔtɔ ba ɔyɩtɔ, anɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ pʋ tɔtɔɔtɔ ɛ natɩ. 8Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ anɩbʋ atogyihɛ pʋ́ atɔ dɩdahɛ a, mlɩha mʋ́ kpan igyi anɩ ansɩ. 9Aha ánɩ́ bʋtekleá bʋnya atɔ a, ɩbwɛbwɛbwɛ bʋtɛkpa wie ɩsɔkɩ pʋ́ ayibitɔ. Amʋ́ mimlala tɛkpa amʋ́ yowie ɩwɩɔsɩn mʋ́a lalahɛtɔ, hɩ amʋ́. 10Tsufɛ kɔbadwɛ tɔpʋ lalahɛ kugyikʋ ba. Mʋ́ ɔma akʋ bagya alɩɩ, bafwɩ dalɩ hogyi amʋtɔ, ɩlaha amʋ́ bʋdɛ awɩrɛhɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ gyi nɩ.
Paulo Asʋn Trahɛ
11Timoteo, fʋ mʋ́ a, Bulu ɔha fʋgyi. Mʋ́ sʋ ha ɩnɩ aná ɩwa ɩfɔ fʋ wa. Hɩɛ fʋ ɩwɩ, afʋbwɛ tɔá ɩda ɔkpa. Bɔ mbɔdɩ afʋha yilebwɛ, Bulusum, hogyi, ɔdwɛ, klʋnya pʋ́ ɩwɩasɩba itsia fʋtɔ. 12Kɔ hogyi ɩkɔ wanklaan amʋ. Fʋ ɩbɩ bɛ́da nkpa amʋʋ ɩtamata, Bulu obékie anɩ mʋ́ ɔma amʋ. Nkpa anfɩ sʋ Bulu lɛtɩ fʋ nɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ fobwii ɔnɔ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ, gyi fʋ hogyi ɩwɩ adansɩɛ nɩ. 13Nlɩɩ Bulu, ogyi togyitɔ nkpa Ɔhapʋ mʋa Kristo Yesuá olegyi ɩwɩ adansɩɛ wanklaan Pontio Pilato ansɩtɔ. Ndɛ fʋ hɩɛ 14mbɛɛ, fʋkɩta mbla anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ wanklaan. Mási mʋ́tɔ kpɛfʋn ɛkɛá anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo ɔbɛ́lɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan. 15Bulu ɔkʋkʋnʋ ɔkʋlɛ amʋ ilehian ánɩ́ abɛ́kanfʋ. Mʋ nkʋlɛ pɛ gyi Otumipʋ, awie fɛ́ɛ́tɔ Owie. Mʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ Kristo suna brɛ wanklaan amʋʋ mʋ onuto ɔlɛhɩɛ yaɩ amʋtɔ. 16Mʋ nkʋlɛ pɛ tamawu, otsie ɔwankɩkpa ánɩ́ ɔhaa tamatalɩ kpʋkpɛ manta mʋ. Ɔhaa mɔkʋwun mʋ kɩ, ɔhaa móowun mʋ ɛ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Mʋ klɛ gyi obu mʋ́a tumi brɛ fɛ́ɛ́! Amen!
17Bla ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ ɩwɩ anyapʋ fɛɛ, bʋmátsu ɩwɩ. Bʋmápʋ ansɩ dɩnka kɔba anfɩ iméetsia yɔ anfɩsʋ. Mboun bʋpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ. Mʋtɛha anɩ togyitɔá abɔ́pʋnya ansigyi ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ. 18Bla amʋ́ fɛɛ, bʋpʋ amʋ́ kɔba bwɛ yile, amʋ́ yilebwɛ imoni. Bʋsankɩ ɩbɩtɔ abʋkie atɔ. 19Nɩ bʋdɛ ɩnɩ bwɛ a, bʋdɛ atonyahɛ yaɩ ha brɛ amʋʋ ɩba amʋ. Amʋ́ ɩbɩ bɛ́da nkpa onuto amʋ.
20Timoteo, kɩta ɩtɔ amʋʋ Bulu laha fʋ amʋ wanklaan. Asʋn ánɩ́ ɩma asɩ, imosuna Bulusum mádalɩ fʋ ɔnɔ. Máwa ɩwɩ mimla nwɛngyiá ɩtamasuna Bulusumtɔ. Akʋ bʋtɔwa afunu bɛɛ, asʋnbɩ igyi. 21Tsufɛ akʋ batsʋn mʋ́sʋ si Kristo hogyi.
Bulu ogyi mlɩ bʋalɛ.

Title: 2 TIMOTEO 1
Content:
1Mɩ Paulo mʋ́ a, Bulu apɛ sʋ ngyi Kristo Yesu sumbi ɔyɔpʋ. Ɔlɔwa mɩ ɔbɛɛ, nyɛda nkpa amʋʋ ɔlɛhɩɛ tsʋn Kristo Yesusʋ amʋ ɔkan.
2Mɩdɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ fʋ, mɩ bi ɔdwɛpʋ Timoteo. Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Kristo Yesu bʋwun fʋ nwɛ, abʋgyi fʋ bʋalɛ ha fʋ iwilwii.
Ɩpanda Pʋ́ Atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn Wa
3Nɛda Bulu ɩpan. Mʋ ndɛpʋ ɩklʋn ánɩ́ ɩmɛdɛ mɩ ɩpɔn ha sum, fɛ mɩ anain. Timoteo, nɩ ndɛ mpaɩ bɔ ɔpa mʋ́a onye a, ntɛkaɩn fʋsʋ bregyibrɛ. 4Nɩ nɛkaɩn ntsúá fɛlɩn brɛá ndɛnatɩ si fʋsʋ a, ntekleá nówun fʋ, mɛnɩ ansigyi bɔ́bʋla mɩtɔ. 5Ntɛkaɩn hogyiá fʋbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ. Hogyi anfɩ odu legyankpa tsia fʋ na Loitɔ nɩ. Ɩlɛtra tsia fʋ yin Eunike ɛtɔ. Nahogyiá mʋ́ odu bʋ fʋtɔ nɩ. 6Ɩnɩ sʋ ndɛ fʋ kaɩn ánɩ́ fʋha Bulu atokiehɛ amʋʋ ɔlɛha fʋ brɛ amʋʋ nɔpʋ ɩbɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ amʋ ɔnɔ ɩwa ogya tsɩa mʋ́tɔ. 7Tsufɛ Bulu mɛha anɩ ɔŋɛá abɔ́pʋnya ifu, mboun mʋ́á ɩtɛha anɩ tumi, ɔdwɛ pʋ́ ɩwɩsʋgyi.
8Mʋ́ sʋ máha anɩ Wie asʋn amʋ blɩ ɩwa fʋ pɛlɩ. Máha mɩ obudɩ ɛ ɩwa fʋ pɛlɩ. Mboun wa klʋn Bulu tumitɔ, afʋtsula wun ɩwɩɔsɩn ánɩ́ ilehian asʋn wanklaan amʋ sʋ. 9Bulu lɔhɔ anɩ nkpa. Ɔlɛtɩ anɩ ɔbɛɛ, abémli mʋ aha wankɩhɛ. Megyi tɔtɔ anɩlɔbwɛ sʋ. Mboun igyi tɔá mʋ onuto ɔlɔbwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́bwɛ asa ɔyɩ lɛbɛlɩn. Ɔbɛɛ, ɔbɔ́wa awɩtɔlɛ ha anɩ, dwɛ anɩ tsʋn anɩa Kristo Yesunyɔ ɩkʋlɛbwɛsʋ. 10Tamɛ sei a, Bulu lalɛ mʋ awɩtɔlɛ amʋ ɔwan tsʋn anɩ Ɔhɔpʋ Kristo Yesu ɩbasʋ. Mʋleyinta lowu tumi, ɔlɛlɛ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata ɔwan suna anɩ tsʋn asʋn wanklaan amʋsʋ.
11Bulu layaɩ mɩ mʋ asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan ɔdapʋ, mʋ́ sumbi ɔyɔpʋ pʋ́ mʋ́ osunapʋ. 12Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn anfɩ odu wun nɩ. Tamɛ mmɛdɛ pɛlɩ nya, tsufɛ nyin ɔha ánɩ́ nahogyi. Nyin ánɩ́ ɔbɛ́talɩ gyo ɩtɔ amʋʋ ɔlɔpʋwa mɩ ɩbɩtɔ amʋ ɩwɩ alɩɩ yɔfʋn mʋ ɔbakɛ. 13Kɩta ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋʋ nosuna fʋ amʋtɔ. Yɔ mʋ́sʋ afʋhɔ Kristo gyi tsɩa. Dwɛ fʋ aba, tsufɛ fʋa Kristo Yesunyɔ mlɩlabwɛ kʋlɛ. 14Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋʋ ɔbʋ anɩtɔ amʋ ɔtsa fʋ, afʋtalɩ gyo ɩtɔ wanklaan amʋʋ ɔlɛha fʋ amʋ ɩwɩ.
15Fʋyin ánɩ́ aha amʋʋ bʋbʋ Asia, Figelo mʋa Hermogene bʋbʋ amʋ́tɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ banatɩ si mɩ. 16Anɩ Wie owun Onesiforo woyitɔ aha nwɛ, tsufɛ mʋletsia wa mɩ ansigyi. Omenya mɩ obudɩ pɛlɩ. 17Brɛá ɔlɛba Roma wulutɔ a, olodunka mɩ kpɛfʋn brɛá olowun mɩ. 18Anɩ Wie owun mʋ nwɛ mʋ ɔbakɛ amʋ! Fʋyin alɩá ɔlɔbʋa mɩ ɔkpa tsɔtsɔɔtsɔsʋ Efeso wulutɔ.

Title: 2 TIMOTEO 2
Content:
Ɩsa Ɔkɔpʋ Wanklaan
1Ɩnɩ sʋ mɩ bi, ha Bulu awɩtɔlɛ amʋʋ ɔlɔpʋtsʋn Kristo Yesusʋ amʋ ɩwa fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn. 2Pʋ asʋn amʋʋ nɛblɩ, fonu aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ amʋ wa aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɩbɩtɔ, mɛnɩ amʋ́ ɛ bɛ́talɩ suna aha bamba.
3Tomi afʋwun ɩwɩɔsɩn amʋʋ anɩdewun amʋ, fɛ Kristo Yesu ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ wanklaan. 4Ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ ɔkʋkʋ tamatra kɩ ɔma, tsufɛ odekleá obégyi mʋ ɔhandɛ ansɩ. 5Alɩ kɛn ɔsrɩ otsiipʋ ɔkʋkʋ tamanya ɩsʋgyi atokiehɛ, nkɛtɩ alagyi ɔsrɩ amʋ mblasʋ nɩ. 6Ɔdɔtɔpʋá ɔbʋ nsi tegyankpa da atɔ pɔpwɛ ɔnɔ. 7Gywɩɩn asʋn anfɩ nabla fʋ anfɩ ɩwɩ. Anɩ Wie ɛ ɔbɛ́ha fónu mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ asɩ.
8Kaɩn Yesu Kristo, Owie Dawid mʋ na amʋsʋ. Mʋ Bulu lɔkʋsʋa tsu afulitɔ. Mʋ́gyi asʋn wanklaan amʋʋ ndɛblɩ amʋ nɩ. 9Asʋn anfɩ sʋ ndɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn wun, bawa mɩ ɩkan fɛ lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋ nɩ. Tamɛ bʋmɔkʋwa Bulu asʋn amʋ mʋ́ ɩkan. 10Aha amʋʋ Bulu lalɛ amʋ sʋ natomi ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ ndɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn wun, mɛnɩ Bulu ɔbɔ́tsʋn Kristo Yesusʋ hɔ amʋ́ nkpa, amʋ́ ɩbɩ bɛ́da numnyam amʋʋ ɩtamata amʋ. 11Asʋn anfɩ bʋ mʋ́tɔ.
“Nɩ anɩa mʋnyɔ awu a,
anɩa mʋnyɔ obétsia nkpa.
12Nɩ atomi wun ɩwɩɔsɩn a,
anɩa mʋnyɔ abégyi iwie.
Nɩ akina mʋ a,
mʋ ɛ obékina anɩ.
13Nɩ anɩmá ɔnɔkwalɩ a,
mʋ mʋ́ a, ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ ogyi.
Tsufɛ ɔtamatu atsʋnɔ tswɩ, lapʋ mʋ ɔdandʋ tsu mʋ́ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”
Agyʋma Ɔyɔpʋá Olegyi Bulu Ansɩ
14Tsia kaɩn amʋ́ asʋn anfɩ. Tɔɩ kpla amʋ́ Bulu ansɩtɔ fɛɛ, bʋmátsia trɛ asʋnsʋ. Labi kʋkʋ ɩma mʋ́tɔ, tsufɛ mʋ́ odu abwɛpʋ bʋtɛhɩ. 15Bɔ mbɔdɩ afʋhɔ ɩda Bulu ansɩtɔ, fɛ agyʋma ɔyɔpʋá mʋ agyʋma ma mʋ pɛlɩ, otosuna ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋ wanklaan. 16Asʋn ánɩ́ ɩma asɩ, imosuna Bulusum ɩmádalɩ fʋ ɔnɔ, tsufɛ ɩtɛha ɔha mʋa Bulunyɔ nsɩnɛ tɔwa ɩfɔ. 17Alɩ amʋʋ ɔlɔ tɛklɛɩ amʋ a, alɩ asʋn anfɩ ablɩpʋ asʋn ɛ tɛklɛɩ nɩ. Amʋ́ akʋ gyi Himeneo mʋa Fileto. 18Bafwɩ dalɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɔkpa amʋsʋ yɔ bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, kʋsʋ tsu afulitɔ laba bɔtsʋn, bʋdɛ akʋ hogyi yinta. 19Tamɛ ntswɩasɩ amʋʋ Bulu lɔwa ha hogyi amʋ ɩlɩɩ kinkiinkin. Asʋn ánɩ́ bɔwanlɩn dɩnka ntswɩasɩ amʋsʋ gyi, “Anɩ Wie yin aha ánɩ́ bʋgyi mʋ klɛ.” Nyɔsɩ ɛ gyi, “Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛtɩ mʋ ɩwɩ ɔbɛɛ Okristoyin a, osi lalahɛ bwɛ.”
20Megyi sika pɛpɛ mʋ́a sika fututu atɔ pɛ tetsia woyi yiletɔ. Oyi mʋ́a ɩsɩ atɔ ɛ tetsia ɩnʋ. Bʋtobu ɩkʋ dʋn kʋ. 21Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔlɛ mʋ ɩwɩ lɛ lalahɛbwɛtɔ a, Bulu tɛlɛ mʋ yaɩ. Alabwɛ ɔha ánɩ́ alasi ɩwɩ ha, ɔbʋ labi. Mʋ Wie Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋ mʋ gyi gyʋma wanklaan kugyikʋ. 22Ɩnɩ sʋ lɛ fʋ ɩwɩ tsu nyasubi mʋ́a mbitebi mbagyitɔ. Fówun fʋa aha amʋʋ bʋtɔpʋ ɩklʋn wankɩhɛ kpoli Bulu amʋ ansɩ bɛ́dɩnka yilebwɛ, hogyi, ɔdwɛ pʋ́ iwilwiisʋ. 23Lɛ fʋ ɩwɩ tsu nwɛngyiá ɩma labi, ɩtɔ wanklaan kʋkʋ mɛ́ɛdalɩ tsu mʋ́tɔtɔ, tsufɛ fʋyin ánɩ́ ɩtrɛ pɛ ɩtɛtɩ. 24Ɩma alɛá anɩ Wie osumpʋ ɔbɔ́bwɛ ɔtrɛpʋ. Mboun ilehian ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́wa awɩtɔlɛ ha ɔhagyiɔha, ɔbɔ́bwɛ osunapʋ wanklaan, otenya klʋn ha aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn bʋ ɔnlɩn. 25Ilehian ánɩ́ obénya klʋn tɔɩ kpla aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulu asʋn amʋsʋ. Fialɩ Bulu obówun amʋ́ nwɛ, ha amʋ́ bɛ́damli klʋntɔ, bɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ, 26ɩha amʋ́ ansɩ ɩba asɩ. Fialɩ ɩbɛ́ha amʋ́ bɛ́dalɩ tsu Ɔbʋnsam amʋʋ ɔbɛɛ bʋgyi mʋ asʋnsʋ, abʋbwɛ mʋ apɛ amʋ ayibitɔ.

Title: 2 TIMOTEO 3
Content:
Nkɛ Trahɛ Amʋtɔ Asʋn
1Tamɛ mɩ bi Timoteo, bɩá ɔyɩtɔ ɩbɔ́wa ɔnlɩn nkɛ trahɛ amʋtɔ. 2Tsufɛ aha bɔ́bwɛ awʋnsɩpʋ, bɔ́bwɛ kɔba adwɛpʋ. Bɔ́hɔ amʋ́ ɩwɩsʋ gyi, bótsu ɩwɩ, bésia aha, bʋmóonu amʋ́ akwɩɩpʋ asʋn, bʋméeyi aha ayɛ, amʋ́ ɩwɩ mɛ́ɛtɩn, 3bʋmɔ́ɔdwɛ aha, bʋméesi asʋn kie, bɔ́bwɛ aha ɩwɩ asʋn ablɩpʋ, bʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ gyi ɩwɩsʋ, bɔ́bwɛ awuntɔlɩnpʋ, bʋmɔ́ɔdwɛ ɩtɔ wanklaan kʋkʋ. 4Bɛ́lɛ aha ha, bʋmóosusu asʋn ɩwɩ, bɛ́kɩ amʋ́ ɩwɩá bʋdʋn ɔhagyiɔha, bɔ́dwɛ ɔyɩtɔ ansigyi si Bulu. 5Bɔ́bwɛ ɩwɩ fɛ Bulu bʋdesum, tamɛ békina mʋ tumi. Lɛ ɩwɩ lɛ aha anfɩ odutɔ. 6Amʋ́ odu bʋtebitiwie aha woyitɔ, damli atsɩá amʋ́ ansɩtɔ ma ɔnlɩn agywɩɩn. Atsɩ amʋ odu a, lakpan lamli amʋ́ atɔ sʋrahɛ, ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ labʋla amʋ́tɔ. 7Bʋtekleá bónu ɔhagyiɔha atosunahɛ, tamɛ bʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ bɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 8Alɩ amʋʋ Yane mʋa Yambre bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ anɩ nain Mosesʋ amʋ a, alɩ aha anfɩ ɛ bakʋsʋ lɩɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋsʋ nɩ. Amʋ́ agywɩɩn lawu. Hogyitɔ ɛ a, bʋma ɔlɩɩkpa. 9Tamɛ bʋmɔ́ɔyɔ nkpa dʋn alɩ, tsufɛ amʋ́ mimla bɛ́lɩn ɔwan, ɔhagyiɔha obówun. Alɩ ɩlɛba Yane mʋa Yambresʋ nɩ.
Paulo Asʋn Trahɛ
10Timoteo, fʋ mʋ́ fʋyin mɩ atosunahɛ fɛ́ɛ́, mɩ tsiatɔ, tɔá ɔkpa ngya, mɩ hogyi, mɩ ɩklʋnya, mɩ aha ɩwɩ ɔdwɛ pʋ́ alɩá notomi wun ipian, 11alɩá aha bɛdɩnka mɩsʋ pʋ́ mɩ asʋn wunhɛ. Mʋ́a ɩlɛba mɩsʋ Antiokia, Ikonion pʋ́ Listra ɔmátɔ. Notomi, anɩ Wie lɛlɛ mɩ tsu mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. 12Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ odekleá obóbuo anɩ Wie Kristo Yesu, ɔbwɛ Bulu apɛ a, aha bʋtɛdɩnka mʋsʋ. 13Tamɛ aha lalahɛ pʋ́ aha asisipʋ mʋ́ a, bɔ́yɔ amʋ́ lalahɛbwɛsʋ dʋn alɩ. Bɛ́natɩ mlɛ aha, aha ɛ bɛ́mlɛ amʋ́. 14Tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ a, kɩta fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋʋ fakasɩ, fʋ onuto fahɔ mʋ́sʋ gyi amʋtɔ kinkiinkin, tsufɛ fʋyin aha amʋʋ bosuna fʋ atɔ amʋ wanklaan. 15Tsu fʋ nyebitɔ ɔpá fɛbɩ Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ. Mʋ́ ɔbɛ́talɩ ha fʋ nyansa fɔ́pʋhɔ Kristo Yesu gyi nɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ fʋ nkpa ɛ nɩ. 16Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ itsu Bulu onuto wa. Ɩbʋ alɛá bɔ́pʋsuna ɔha, pʋkina asʋn ha ɔha, pʋtswii ɔha, pʋbʋla ɔha, ɩbɛ́ha yilebwɛ bɛ́manta mʋ, 17mɛnɩ ɩbɛ́la Bulu ɔha bwɛ wanklaan, ɔbɔ́fʋn ha gyumagyihɛ wanklaan kugyikʋ.

Title: 2 TIMOTEO 4
Content:
1Nlɩɩ Bulu mʋa Kristo Yesuá ɔbɛ́ba begyi akɩankpapʋ pʋ́ awupʋ asʋn. Ɔbɛ́ba begyi iwie ansɩtɔ, ndɛ fʋ ɔla da mbɛɛ, 2fʋda Bulu asʋn amʋ ɔkan. Nɩ fʋbʋ ɔkpa o, fʋma ɔkpa o, mási mʋ́ blɩ. Nya klʋn afʋtswii amʋ́. Kina asʋn ha amʋ́. Wa amʋ́ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn, afʋsuna amʋ́ atosunahɛ wanklaan amʋ. 3Tsufɛ brɛ kʋ ɩba, aha bʋmɛ́ɛtra yaa asʋ nu atosunahɛ wanklaan amʋ. Bɔ́bwɛ tɔá iletsia amʋ́, natɩ dunka atɔ asunapʋ oduá bósuna amʋ́ tɔá bʋdekleá bónu. 4Békina ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋ yobuo ɔtɛ. 5Tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ a, ha fʋ ansɩ ɩba asɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. Tomi afʋwun ɩwɩɔsɩn. Blɩ asʋn wanklaan amʋ wanklaan, afʋbwɛ agyʋma amʋʋ Bulu lɛha fʋ amʋ mɔ ɔnɔ.
6Mɩ mʋ́ a, brɛ lafʋn ánɩ́ bɔ́pʋ mɩ obugya wʋlɩ asɩ fɛ nta ha Bulu fɛ afɔdɩɛ-abɔtɔ. Mɩ lowu lafʋn. 7Nakɔ ɩkɔ wanklaan amʋ ta. Natsii ɔsrɩ amʋ ɛ ta. Nakɩta hogyi amʋtɔ kinkiinkin. 8Sei a, tɔá ɩda gyo mɩ gyi ɩsʋgyi atokiehɛá Bulu tɔpʋha aha ánɩ́ babwɛ yile. Anɩ Wie Yesu, ogyi asʋn ogyipʋ Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ amʋ ɔbɔ́pʋha mɩ ɛkɛ yile amʋʋ obéyinki ba amʋ. Tamɛ megyi mɩ nkʋlɛ ɔbɔ́bwɛ ɩnɩ ha. Ɔbɛ́ha aha amʋʋ bʋdɛ mʋ yinki ba ɔkpa kɩ amʋ ɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Paulo Onuto Ɩwɩ Asʋn
9Bɔ mbɔdɩ afʋkɔsɩ ba mɩ wa, 10tsufɛ ɔyɩtɔ atɔ dɛ Dema ansigyi wa. Mʋ́ sʋ alayinki mɩ ɔma, natɩ ɔyɔ Tesalonika wulutɔ. Kreske ɔyɔ Galatia, Tito ɛ ɔyɔ Dalmatia. 11Luka nkʋlɛ bʋ mɩ wa nfɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ fɛba a, kpa Marko buo ɩwɩ, tsufɛ ɔtɛtsa mɩ agyʋma yɔ. 12Nawa Tihiko sɩsɩ Efeso. 13Tsu mɩ liga pʋ́ mɩ nwʋlʋ amʋʋ nesi tswɩ Karpo wa Troa wulutɔ amʋ ba mɩ. Mátan nwʋlʋ amʋʋ ɩdɩn nwʋlʋ-kpakpasʋ amʋ ɛsʋ.
14Kɔbrɩ atɔ ɔbwɛpʋ Aleksandro lɔpʋ lalahɛ kʋ gyi mɩ. Ɩlɛhan mɩ wanklaan. Anɩ Wie ɔbɛ́ka mʋ ɩkɔ. 15Kɩ fʋ ɩwɩ wanklaan mʋsʋ, tsufɛ ɔlɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ anɩ asʋn blɩhɛ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.
16Brɛá ahandɛ bɛha bɛɛ, nlɛ mɩ ɔnɔ a, ɔhaa mɛlɩɩ mɩ ɔma. Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛsrɩ si mɩ. Bulu osikie amʋ́. 17Tamɛ anɩ Wie lɛlɩɩ mɩ ɔma, ɔlɔwa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. Mʋ́ sʋ nɛtalɩ bla amʋ́ asʋn ánɩ́ ndɛ fɛ́ɛ́, mɛnɩ aha ánɩ́ bʋmegyi Yudafɔ fɛ́ɛ́ bónu. Alɩ Bulu lɔpʋlɛ mɩ tsu lowutɔ nɩ. 18Anɩ Wie ɔbɛ́lɛ mɩ tsu lalahɛ kugyikʋtɔ. Ɔbɛ́kpa mɩ pʋtɔɔ alɩɩ yowie mʋ ɔsʋsʋ iwiegyi amʋtɔ. Numnyam ɩbwɛ mʋ klɛ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. Amen.
Ɩkla
19Nɛha Priska mʋa mʋ klu Akwila pʋ́ Onesiforo woyitɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ itsia. 20Erasto lesin Korinto wulutɔ, Trofimo ɛ dɛlɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ nesi mʋ yaɩ Mileto wulutɔ. 21Bɔ mbɔdɩ afʋba asa atsalɩbɩ ɩfʋn. Eyubulo mʋa Pude, Lino mʋa Klaudia pʋ́ apio amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛha fʋ itsia.
22Anɩ Wie ɔkpa mlɩ, ogyi mlɩ bʋalɛ.

Title: TITO 1
Content:
Itsiaha
1Mɩ Bulu osumbi Paulo, ngyi Yesu Kristo sumbi ɔyɔpʋ dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn.
Bulu lɛlɛ mɩ ɔbɛɛ, mbɛha aha amʋʋ alalɛ amʋ abʋtra nya hogyi tsɩa. Mɩ ansuna amʋ́ abʋbɩ ɔnɔkwalɩá ɩbɛ́ha amʋ́ bétsia tsiatɔá ilegyi mʋ ansɩ. 2Fówun ɩha amʋ́ abʋdɩnka ansɩ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamatasʋ. Bulu tamawa afunu! Mʋlɛhɩɛ mʋ́ yaɩ asa ɔyɩ lɛbɛlɩn. 3Anɩ Nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ Bulu lɛlɛ mʋ asʋn anfɩ ɔwan mʋ onuto brɛtɔ, ɔlɔpʋwa mɩ ɩbɩtɔ ɔbɛɛ, nda mʋ́ ɔkan.
4Ndɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn sɩsɩ fʋ Tito, ánɩ́ fʋgyi mɩ bi onuto Kristo hogyi amʋtɔ.
Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Ɔhɔpʋ Kristo Yesu bʋgyi fʋ bʋalɛ, abʋha fʋ iwilwii!
Tito Gyumagyihɛ Kreta
5Tɔá sʋá nesi fʋ yaɩ Kreta ɔmátɔ gyi alɩá fɔ́mɔ anɩ agyʋma ɔnɔ ɩnʋ, yaɩ ɔpasua ahandɛ wulugyiwulusʋ fɛ alɩá nɛbla fʋ. 6Imehian ánɩ́ ɔlala bétsia ɔpasua ɔhandɛ ɩwɩ. Ɔbwɛ ɔka ɔkʋlɛ otsiapʋ, mʋ abi bʋgyi ahogyipʋ. Bʋbu atɔ; bʋmábwɛ nyebi lalahɛ. 7Ɩnɩá Bulu agyʋmasʋ ɔpasua ɔhandɛ amʋ dɛkɩ sʋ a, ɔlala mátsia mʋ ɩwɩ. Ɔmábwɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtamahɔ aha asʋn, ntɛ ɔtɔkɔsɩ nya ɔblɔ, ntɛ ɔtɔbʋ nta, ntɛ otekle ɩkɔ ntɛ ɔbʋ sika ɔnsɩpɛ. 8Mboun ɔbwɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔhɔ afɔɔ, ɔtɔbwɛ yile, ɔbʋ nyansa, mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa, mʋ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn, otegyi ɩwɩsʋ. 9Ɔbwɛ ɔha ánɩ́ asʋn amʋʋ bosuna mʋ amʋ ɩbʋ mʋtɔ. Ilehian ánɩ́ ɔbɛ́kɩta mʋ́tɔ kinkiinkin, mɛnɩ ɔbɛ́talɩ ha aha bóbuo atosunahɛ wanklaan amʋ, talɩ gyi aha ánɩ́ bégyi atosunahɛ amʋ nwɛn ɛsʋ.
10Tɔá sʋá ndɛ ɩnɩ blɩ gyi, aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bakʋsʋ lɩɩ atosunahɛ wanklaan amʋsʋ, bʋdɛ asʋn ánɩ́ ɩma labi pʋmlɛ aha. Titriu ketetɩn mblasʋ agyipʋ amʋ dɛ ɩnɩ bwɛ nɩ. 11Ilehian ánɩ́ mlɛ́ka amʋ́ itin, tsufɛ bʋdɛ atɔá imehian ánɩ́ bosunatɔ. Ɩnɩ laha abusuan tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bafwɩ ɔkpa. Bʋdɛ mʋ́ bwɛ ɛ pʋdunka sika ɔkpa lalahɛsʋ tsu aha wa. 12Kretafɔ amʋ onuto yebi ɔhapʋ ɔkʋ kʋraa lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Afunupʋ, mbwɩkɩta-atɔ, apotsuapʋ pʋ́ awʋlɩyɔpʋ Kretafɔ bʋgyi.” 13Ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn anfɩ gyi. Mʋ́ sʋ kina ha amʋ́ kinkiinkin, mɛnɩ amʋ́ Kristo hogyi ɔnɔ bɔ́wa ɔnlɩn. 14Abʋsi Yudafɔ ɔtɛ nu, si aha amʋʋ bakina ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ atosunahɛ ɛsʋ gyi. 15Ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn Bulu ansɩtɔ a, togyitɔ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn ha mʋ. Tamɛ tɔtɔ ɩwɩ mɛtɩn ha lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋá ɔtamahɔ Yesu gyi. Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, mʋ agywɩɩn layinta, mʋ klʋn ɛ ɩlasi mʋ ɩpɔn ha sʋ ɔtamabɩ yile ntɛ lalahɛ. 16Bʋtɔpʋ ɔnɔ blɩ bɛɛ bʋyin Bulu, tamɛ amʋ́ bwɛhɛ losuna ánɩ́ bʋmeyin mʋ. Bʋbʋ Bulu nyanya, bʋtamabu mʋ, bʋtamatalɩ bwɛ ɩtɔ wanklaan kʋkʋʋkʋ ɛ.

Title: TITO 2
Content:
Atosunahɛ Wanklaan
1Tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ a, suna amʋ́ tɔá ɩlɛkana atosunahɛ wanklaan amʋ. 2Suna ayin dɛhɛn amʋ abʋgyi ɩwɩsʋ, abʋbwɛ aha ánɩ́ obú bʋ amʋ́sʋ, bʋtegyi ɩwɩsʋ. Bʋhɩɛ kɩta amʋ́ hogyitɔ kinkiinkin. Bʋdwɛ aha wanklaan, abʋhɩɛ tomi. 3Suna atsɩ dɛhɛn ɛ abʋtsia tsiatɔá ɩlɛkana Bulu osumpʋ. Bʋmábwɛ aha ɩwɩ asʋn ablɩpʋ, ntɛ ntakpan anunpʋ. Mboun bʋsuna tɔá ɩbʋ alɛ. 4Amʋ́ atosunahɛ ɩha mbitebi amʋ abʋdwɛ amʋ́ aklu pʋ́ amʋ́ abi. 5Bʋgyi ɩwɩsʋ, abʋha amʋ́ ɩwɩ ɩtɩn. Bʋbwɛ atsɩá bʋtɛkɩ amʋ́ woyisʋ wanklaan, bʋtɔbwɛ yile, bʋtobu amʋ́ aklu, mɛnɩ ɔhaa mɔ́ɔkpɔɩ Bulu asʋn amʋ.
6Tɔɩ kpla nyasubi ɛ abʋgyi ɩwɩsʋ togyitɔá bɔ́bwɛtɔ. 7Fʋ onuto ɛ bɔ mbɔdɩ afʋlɛ tsiatɔ wanklaan suna, fʋ bwɛhɛ kugyikʋtɔ. Ha fʋ ansɩ ɩpɛ, afʋsuna ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋ tsu fʋ klʋntɔ. 8Suna ɔnɔkwalɩ amʋ, mɛnɩ ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ kʋsʋ lɩɩ fʋ atosunahɛsʋ. Fówun pɛlɩ bɛ́kɩta fʋ alupʋ, nɩ bʋmenya ɔlala blɩ tsu anɩ ɩwɩ.
9Suna nkpábi ɛ abʋbu amʋ́ awie ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ. Bʋbwɛ togyitɔ igyi amʋ́ awie amʋ ansɩ. Bʋmátsia lɛ amʋ́ asʋn ɔnɔ. 10Bʋmáwi amʋ́ awie, mboun bʋwa ɔnɔkwalɩ ha amʋ́ togyitɔtɔ, mɛnɩ amʋ́ bwɛhɛ bɛ́ha aha ansɩ bégyi anɩ nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ Bulu atosunahɛ amʋ ɩwɩ.
11Tsufɛ Bulu lalɛ mʋ awɩtɔlɛ ɔwan. Mʋ́gyi, odekleá ɔbɔ́hɔ anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ nkpa. 12Mʋ awɩtɔlɛ amʋ ɩlasuna ánɩ́ ilehian ánɩ́ abési lalahɛ bwɛ, si anɩ ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ ɔmagya, gyi ɩwɩsʋ, bwɛ yile, anɩ asʋn igyi mʋ ansɩ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ. 13Brɛ anfɩ anɩdɛ ɔkpa kɩ ha ɛkɛ yile amʋʋ Bulu Ɔkpɔnkpɔntɩ, ogyi anɩ Ɔhɔpʋ Yesu Kristo ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ numnyam ɔwan anfɩ. 14Mʋlotsula bɔmɔ mʋ anɩ sʋ, mɛnɩ ɔbɛ́lɛ anɩ tsu lakpan kugyikʋtɔ. Ɔtɩn anɩ ɩwɩ, pʋ anɩ bwɛ mʋ onuto aha, anɩ ansɩ ɩpɛ yilebwɛsʋ.
15Suna ɩnɩ aná, afʋtɔɩ kpla amʋ́ abʋgyi mʋ́sʋ. Fʋbʋ ɔkpa wa ɩyɩn wa amʋ́, nɩ bʋmɛdɛbɩ bwɛ. Máha ɔhaa ɔkɩ fʋ ansɩtɔ kotikoti.

Title: TITO 3
Content:
Okristoyin Tsiatɔ
1Tsia kaɩn amʋ́ abʋba ɩwɩasɩ ha ɔmá akpapʋ, abʋgyi ahandɛ mblasʋ, abʋbu amʋ́. Bʋkɩá bɔ́bwɛ tɔá igyi yile bregyibrɛ. 2Bʋmáblɩ ɔhaa ɩwɩ asʋn lalahɛ, bʋmágyi nwɛn ɛ. Mboun bʋbwɛ aha ánɩ́ bolwii, abʋba ɩwɩasɩ ha ɔhagyiɔha. 3Tsufɛ brɛ amʋ a, aha mimlahɛ anɩ ɛ anɩgyi. Asʋtɔ lɔwa anɩ ɔnlɩn. Anɩlɔfwɩ, mli nkpábi ha ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ pʋ́ atɔá ɩtɔwa ɔha ansigyi. Anɩleyinta brɛ susu lalahɛ mʋ́a tɔá ɩdɛ anɩ ansɩ pɛ ɩwɩ. Aha bolu anɩ, anɩ ɛ anɩlolu amʋ́. 4Tamɛ anɩ nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ Bulu lɛlɛ mʋ awɩtɔlɛ pʋ́ ɔdwɛá ɔbʋ ha anɩ ɔwan. 5Ɔlɛlɛ anɩ, tamɛ megyi yile kʋkʋ anɩlɔbwɛ sʋ, mboun mʋ nwewun sʋ. Ɔlɔtsʋn Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋsʋ fwɩ anɩ lakpan lɛ anɩsʋ, ɔlɛlakwɩɩ anɩ, ha anɩ nkpa pɔpwɛ. 6Ɔlɔtsʋn anɩ Ɔhɔpʋ Yesu Kristosʋ, tsɛɩ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ wʋlɩ anɩsʋ. 7Ɔlɔbwɛ anɩ alɩ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́wa awɩtɔlɛ ha anɩ, tsu mʋ́á anɩ asʋn da ɔkpa. Fówun anɩ ɩbɩ bɛ́da nkpa ánɩ́ ɩtamata amʋʋ anɩdɛ mʋ́ ɔkpa kɩ amʋ. 8Asʋn anfɩ bʋ mʋ́tɔ.
Yɩrɩ ɩwɩ afʋsuna mʋ́ wanklaan, mɛnɩ aha amʋʋ amʋ́ ansɩ dɩn Bulusʋ amʋ bétsia bwɛ yile bregyibrɛ. Mʋ́gyi tɔá ɩbʋ alɛ, ɩbɔ́wa labi ha ɔhagyiɔha nɩ. 9Mápʋ ɩwɩ wa mimla nwɛngyi, anain otuntufla kla pʋ mbla amʋ ɩwɩ ɩtrɛtɔ. Labi ma mʋ́tɔ kugyikʋtɔ. 10Tɔɩ kpla ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛtɩ ɩtrɛ wa aha nsɩnɛ tse nyɔ pɛ. Mʋ́ ɔma a, si mʋ asʋn. 11Bɩá ɔha amʋ odu nwuntɔ bʋ oklun. Oyin ánɩ́ lalahɛ mʋdɛbwɛ. Alaha mʋ ɩwɩ pɔn dodo.
Paulo Asʋn Trahɛ
12Nenya wa Artema ntɛ Tihiko fʋ wa pɛ, bɔ mbɔdɩ afʋbɔtʋ mɩ Nikopoli wulutɔ, tsufɛ nabwɛ agywɩɩn ánɩ́ nétsia ɩnʋ atsalɩbɩ. 13Bɔ mbɔdɩ afʋsi mbla osunapʋ Sena mʋa Apolo ɔkpa wanklaan. Tɔtɔ ɩmáhian amʋ́ ɔkpatɔ. 14Ha anɩ pɩ amʋ ɛ abʋbɩ alɩá bʋtɔbʋa aba agyʋma yɔ wanklaan, mɛnɩ bɛ́talɩ kɩ aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔsʋ. Fówun bʋmɔ́ɔbwɛ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ɩwɩ mɔwa labi.
15Aha amʋʋ bʋbʋ mɩ wa nfɩ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛha fʋ itsia. Aha ahogyipʋ amʋʋ bʋtɔdwɛ anɩ amʋ itsia.
Bulu ogyi mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋalɛ.

Title: FILEMON 1
Content:
Itsiaha
1-2Mɩ Pauloá nda obu Kristo Yesu sʋ pʋ́ anɩ pio Timoteo dɛ ɔwʋlʋ anfɩ wanlɩn. Anɩdɛ mʋ́ wanlɩn sɩsɩ fʋ anɩ pio ɔdwɛpʋ, fʋgyi anɩ agyʋmayɔba Filemon. Fʋa anɩ pio tsɩhɛ Apia mʋa anɩ agyʋmayɔba ánɩ́ ogyi ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ Arkipo mʋa Kristo ɔpasua amʋʋ bʋtefia fʋ woyitɔ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́. 3Anɩ Sɩ Bulu mʋa anɩ Wie Yesu Kristo bʋgyi mlɩ bʋalɛ, abʋha mlɩ iwilwii.
Filemon Ɔdwɛ Pʋ́ Mʋ Hogyi
4Opio Filemon, ntɛda Bulu ɩpan fʋ nwunsʋ bregyibrɛá ndɛ mpaɩ bɔ. 5Tsufɛ ndenu alɩá fʋdɛ Bulu aha fɛ́ɛ́ dwɛ, fʋdɛ anɩ Wie Yesu hogyitɔ kinkiinkin. 6Ndɛ Bulu kokoli mbɛɛ, ɔha afʋtalɩ bla aha fʋ hogyi ɩwɩ asʋn, mɛnɩ ɩbɛ́ha fónu ɩtɔ wanklaan ánɩ́ anɩlanya Kristo-buotɔ asɩ. 7Mɩ pio, ɔdwɛá fʋbʋ laha ansɩ dɛ mɩ onuto o gyi. Ɩlawa mɩ atɛtɔ-ɔnlɩn, tsufɛ fʋ awɩtɔlɛ laha Bulu aha klʋn ladɩ amʋ́ asɩ.
Paulo Ɩpabwii Onesimo Nwunsʋ
8-9Ɩnɩ sʋ nɛ́talɩ wa klʋn kʋlɩ fʋ atɔ. Tɛkɩ mbʋ ɔkpa hɩɛ fʋ mbɛɛ, fʋbwɛ tɔá ilehian Kristo sʋ. Tamɛ ɔdwɛ amʋʋ mbʋ ha fʋ amʋ sʋ ndekleá nɔ́kʋlɩ fʋ mboun. Mʋ́ sʋ tsu mʋ́á mɩ oyin dɛhɛn Paulo, ngyi fʋ nyawie Yesu sʋ, sei nda obu dɛ fʋ kʋlɩ. 10Ndɛ fʋ kokoli mbɛɛ, fʋwun mɩ biá nda obu asa nakwɩɩ mʋ, ogyi Onesimo nwɛ. 11Mʋ ɩda amʋ asɩ gyi ɔbʋ labi. Tɛkɩ ɔmɔwa labi ha fʋ brɛá ɔlɛsrɩ si fʋ, tamɛ sei mʋ́ ɔbʋ labi ha mɩa fʋnyɔ.
12Ntɔdwɛ mʋ tsu mɩ klʋntɔ, tamɛ ndɛ mʋ yinkia sɩsɩ fʋ. 13Tɛkɩ ndekleá nɛ́ha mʋ otsia fʋ otsiakpa mɩ wa nfɩ. Ɔtsa mɩ brɛ anfɩ nda obu Bulu asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan da sʋ anfɩ. 14Tamɛ mmedekleá nɔ́bwɛ tɔtɔ tsʋn fʋ ɔma. Mmedekleá nɛ́hɩɛ fʋ ɛ. Ndekleá itsu fʋ klʋntɔ.
15Tsu mʋ́ fɛɛ, Onesimo lɛsrɩ si fʋ brɛ itinbitɔ, mɛnɩ ɔbɛ́la betsia fʋ wa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. 16Ɔtra omegyi ɔkpábi. Alamli opio ɔdwɛpʋ onutonuto ha mɩ. Mʋ́á ɩdʋn a, falanya ɔkpábi pʋ́ opio dʋn mɩ sei.
17Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ fʋyin ánɩ́ fʋ ba gyi mɩ a, mʋmʋ kpla mʋ wa ɩwɩtɔ fɛ alɩá fɔ́bwɛ mɩ. 18Nɩ ɔlɔpʋ ɩla kʋ gyi fʋ, ntɛ ɔdɛ fʋ ɩkɔ kʋ a, bu mʋ́ tswɩ mɩ. 19Mɩ Paulo onuto lapʋ mɩ ɩbɩ wanlɩn ɩnɩ, “Nɛ́ka fʋ.” (Ɩma alɛá nɛ́blɩ mbɛɛ, fʋ onuto amʋ o a, mɩlɔhɔ fʋ nkpa.) 20Ɩnɩ sʋ mɩ pio ɔdwɛpʋ, anɩ Wie sʋ wa labi ha mɩ. Ha klʋn ɩdɩ mɩ asɩ Kristo sʋ.
21Nyin ánɩ́ fónu mɩ ɔmɛ bwɛ dɩnka tɔá nawanlɩnsʋ. Nyin ánɩ́ fɔ́bwɛ mʋ́ dʋn alɩ kʋraa. 22Mʋ́ ɔma a, bɔ mbɔdɩ afʋla ɔdɩkpa yaɩ mɩ, tsufɛ ndɛ ɔkpa kɩá Bulu ɔbɔ́sɔ fʋ ɔnɔ, nɛ́ba mlɩ wa.
Ɩkla
23Epafra ánɩ́ mɩa mʋnyɔ anɩda obu Kristo Yesu sʋ ɔha fʋ itsia. 24Alɩ kɛn mɩ agyʋmayɔba Marko mʋa Aristarko pʋ́ Dema mʋa Luka ɛ bɛha fʋ itsia nɩ.
25Anɩ Wie Yesu ogyi mlɩ bʋalɛ.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 1
Content:
Bulu Asʋn Ɩna Mʋ Bi Amʋsʋ
1Bɩmbɩ amʋ a, Bulu lɔtsʋn ɔkpa ɔtsan-ɔtsansʋ tɔɩ kpla anɩ anain brɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔtɔ tsʋn mʋ ɔnɔsʋ atɔɩpʋsʋ. 2Tamɛ sei anfɩ ɔyɩ ɩba bɔmɔ ɔnɔ anfɩ mʋ́ a, alatɔɩ kpla anɩ tsʋn mʋ Bi amʋsʋ. Mʋgyi ɔha ánɩ́ Bulu lɛlɛá ogyi mʋ atɔ nɩ. Mʋ Bi anfɩsʋ ɔlɔtsʋn bwɛ togyitɔ. 3Mʋsʋ Bulu Ɔkpɔnkpɔntɩ numnyam tɔwankɩ tsʋn. Mʋgyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɛhɩɛ lɩan Bulu, ɔdɛ mʋ asʋn amʋʋ ɩbʋ tumi amʋ pʋkɩ togyitɔsʋ nɩ. Brɛá ɔlɔgyʋra anɩ ta a, oletsia ɔsʋsʋ Bulu Otumipʋ amʋ gyɔpɩsʋ.
Bulu Mʋ Bi Amʋ Lɔfʋa Dʋn
4Bulu lotsu mʋ Bi amʋ fʋa dʋn Bulu-abɔpʋ fɛ́ɛ́. Alɩ kɛn ɔlɛha mʋ ɩda dʋn amʋ́ nɩ. Ɩnɩ losuna ánɩ́ ɔdʋn amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́. 5Tsufɛ Bulu mɔkʋbla mʋ abɔpʋ amʋtɔ ɔkʋkʋʋkʋ kɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Mɩ Bi gyi fʋ,
ndɛ nabwɛ fʋ Sɩ.”
Ntɛ bla amʋ́tɔ ɔkʋkʋ ɔbɛɛ,
“Nɔ́bwɛ fʋ Sɩ,
fʋ ɛ fɔ́bwɛ mɩ Bi.”
6Ɩnɩ ɔma asa Bulu ɔbɔ́wa mʋ Bitɩ amʋ sɩsɩ ɔyɩtɔ a, ɔlɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Mɩ abɔpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋsum mʋ.”
7Tɔá ɔlɛblɩ tsu mʋ abɔpʋ amʋ mʋ́ ɩwɩ gyi,
“Nabwɛ mɩ abɔpʋ fɛ afu.
Nabwɛ mɩ asumpʋ fɛ ogya plɛnplɛn.”
8Tamɛ ɔlɛbla mʋ Bi amʋ mʋ́ ɔbɛɛ,
“Oo Bulu, fʋ iwiegyi mɛ́ɛta ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ!
Yilebwɛ gyi fʋ iwiegyi akɔnfra.
9Yilebwɛ fʋtekle. Fʋtekisi lalahɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ́ sʋ mɩ, fʋ Wie Bulu nalɛ fʋ, da fʋ ofuli.
Napʋ ansigyi wa fʋtɔ dʋn fʋ aba.”
10Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛtra blɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Mɩ Wie, fʋlɔwa ɔsʋlʋ ntswɩasɩ brɛá fefi ɔyɩ asɩ.
Fʋ onuto ɩbɩ fɔpʋbwɛ ɔsʋsʋ.
11Mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbɔ́fwɩ, tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ fétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.
Mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbɔ́bwɛ dada fɛ tatida.
12Fókunta mʋ́ fɛ tati.
Fɛ́tsɛ mʋ́ fɛ atadɩɛ.
Tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ fʋtamatsɛ.
Fʋ nkpa mɔ́ɔmɔ ɔnɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”
13Bulu mɛbla mʋ ɔbɔpʋ ɔkʋkʋ ɔbɛɛ,
“Tsia mɩ gyɔpɩsʋ,
yɔfʋn brɛá nɔ́pʋ fʋ alupʋ bwɛ fʋ ayabi oyikpa.” fɛ alɩá ɔlɛbla mʋ Bi amʋ.
14Ntɔ mɛɛ Bulu-abɔpʋ bʋgyi? Megyi ɔŋɛ bʋgyi, Bulu tɔwa bʋtɔbʋa aha ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́hɔ amʋ́ nkpa?

Title: HEBRIFƆ 2
Content:
Nkpahɔ Kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ
1Ɩnɩ sʋ ilehian ánɩ́ abɛ́kɩta ɔnɔkwalɩ asʋn amʋʋ anɩlanu amʋtɔ kinkiinkin, mɛnɩ ɩmɛ́ɛdalɩ anɩ ɩbɩ. 2Tsufɛ mbla amʋʋ Bulu lɔwa ha anɩ anain tsʋn mʋ abɔpʋsʋ amʋ igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ. Ɩnɩ sʋ aha amʋʋ bɔwa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn, bʋmegyi mʋ́sʋ amʋ benya ɩsʋbɩtɩá ɩda ɔkpa. 3Nkalɩ anɩ mʋ́ abɛ́talɩ srɩ si ɩsʋbɩtɩ amʋ, nɩ akina nkpahɔ kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ anfɩ? Anɩ Wie onuto legyankpa blɩ mʋ́ asʋn. Aha amʋʋ bonu mʋ́ amʋ ɛ begyi mʋ́ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ suna anɩ bɛɛ, ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔ. 4Bulu onuto ɛ lɔbwɛ ofula pʋ́ osuna ɔtsan-ɔtsan mʋ tumitɔ, ɔlɛha aha mʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ atokiehɛ brɛá iletsia mʋ, pʋdɩnka ibwi mʋ́sʋ ánɩ́ ɔnɔkwalɩ igyi.
Nkpahɔ Ɔkpa Osunapʋ
5Bulu mɔpʋ ɔyɩ amʋʋ ɩba, anɩdɛ mʋ́ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ amʋ wa mʋ abɔpʋ ɩbɩtɔ ɔbɛɛ, bʋgyi mʋ́sʋ. 6Mboun fɛ alɩá ɔkʋ lɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ ɔtɩnɛkʋ ɔbɛɛ,
“Oo Bulu, ntɔ nyankpʋsa gyi, sʋ fʋ ansɩ ɩdɩn mʋsʋ alɩ?
Ntɔ nyankpʋsa gyi, sʋ fʋtɛkɩ mʋsʋ?
7Brɛ itinbi kʋtɔ pɛ fɛba mʋ asɩ dʋn fʋ abɔpʋ.
Fɔpʋ numnyam pʋ́ obú dɩnka mʋsʋ.
8Fɛha mʋ ɔdɛ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ gyi.”
Nɩ Bulu asʋn anfɩ dɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Atɔ fɛ́ɛ́” a, idesuna ánɩ́ tɔtɔ mesian ánɩ́ ɔmɛdɛ mʋ́sʋ gyi. Sei anfɩ a, anɩmɔkʋnya wun ánɩ́ ɔdɛ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ gyi. 9Tamɛ anɩlawun Yesu. Bulu lɛba mʋ asɩ dʋn mʋ abɔpʋ brɛ itinbi kʋtɔ. Awɩtɔlɛ Bulu lɔwa bwɛ mʋ́ alɩ, tsufɛ ɔlɛha Yesu lowu ɔhagyiɔha nwunsʋ. Anɩlabɩá sei a, Bulu lapʋ numnyam pʋ́ obú dɩnka mʋsʋ, ɩwɩɔsɩn amʋʋ olowun, wu amʋ sʋ. 10Bulu, atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ Ɔlɛpʋ pʋ́ mʋ́sʋ Ɔkɩpʋ amʋ ɔbɛ́kpa mʋ abi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ba mʋ numnyamtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩbʋ alɛá ɔlɔtsʋn Yesu amʋʋ ogyi amʋ́ Nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ amʋ lowusʋ ha mʋ ɔlɔfʋn, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́hɔ amʋ́ nkpa.
11Yesu amʋʋ ɔtɔgyʋra aha lɛ amʋ́ lakpantɔ amʋ mʋa aha amʋʋ alagyʋra amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ babwɛ Ɔsɩ ɔkʋlɛ abi. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩma mʋ pɛlɩá ɔbɛ́tɩ amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ mʋ apio. 12Ɔlɛbla Bulu ɔbɛɛ,
“Nɛ́kla fʋ bwɛhɛ suna mɩ apio.
Nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ anɩ ofiakpa.”
13Ɔlɛblɩ brɛ bambatɔ ɛ ɔbɛɛ, “Nɔ́pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ.” Ɔlɛtra blɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Kɩ, mɩa abi amʋʋ Bulu lapʋha mɩ amʋ lɩɩ a.”
14Ɩnɩá anyankpʋsa abi amʋʋ Bulu lɔpʋha mʋ amʋ bʋgyi sʋ a, ɔlɔbwɛ mʋ ɩwɩ nyankpʋsa fɛ amʋ́, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́tsʋn mʋ lowusʋ swɩɩ Ɔbʋnsam tumi, yinta mʋ. 15Ɔkpa anfɩ pɛsʋ ɔbɛ́talɩ tsʋn ha aha amʋʋ benya lowu ifu, sʋ bɔbwɛ nkpábi amʋ́ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́ amʋ bégyi ɩwɩ nɩ. 16Tsufɛ ɩda yaɩ ánɩ́ megyi Bulu-abɔpʋ nkpa ɔhɔkpa ɔlɛba, mboun Abraham abi-aná. 17Ɩnɩ sʋ ilehian ánɩ́ ɔbɛ́lɩan mʋ apio togyitɔtɔ, mɛnɩ ɔbɔ́bwɛ amʋ́ igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn ánɩ́ obówun aha nwɛ, wa ɔnɔkwalɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ. Fówun ɔbɛ́talɩ bɔ amʋ́ lakpan ɩwɩ afɔdɩɛ ha Bulu, obésikie amʋ́. 18Bɔsɔ mʋ kɩ, mʋ onuto ɛ ɔlɔtsʋn ɩwɩɔsɩntɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔbɛ́talɩ gyi aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔsɔ amʋ́ kɩ ɛ bʋalɛ.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 3
Content:
Yesu Dʋn Mose
1Ɩnɩ sʋ apio aba ánɩ́ Bulu latɩ mlɩ wa ɔsʋsʋ ayɔpʋtɔ, mlɩpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Yesusʋ. Mʋgyi Bulu sumbi ɔyɔpʋ pʋ́ mʋ igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn amʋʋ anɩdɛ mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ amʋ nɩ. 2Ɔlɔwa ɔnɔkwalɩ ha Bulu, Bulu lɛlɛ mʋ ɔbɛɛ, ɔbɔ́yɔ mʋ agyʋma fɛ alɩ amʋʋ Mose lɔwa ɔnɔkwalɩ ha Bulu, Bulu lɔpʋ mʋ woyi fɛ́ɛ́ wa mʋ ɩbɩtɔ amʋ. 3Tamɛ obú bʋ Yesusʋ dʋn Mose, fɛ alɩá bʋtobu woyi oyipʋ dʋn woyi amʋ. 4Woyigyiwoyi a, ɔha leyi mʋ́, tamɛ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔbwɛpʋ gyi Bulu. 5Mose lɔbwɛ osumpʋ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋá ɔdɛ Bulu woyisʋ kɩ. Ɔlɛbla amʋ́ asʋn ánɩ́ Bulu ɔbɛ́blɩ ɛkɛkʋ. 6Tamɛ Kristo lɔbwɛ obi ɔnɔkwalɩpʋá ɔdɛ Bulu woyisʋ kɩ. Bulu woyitɔ abi anɩgyi, nɩ anɩlɔwa klʋn kɩta mʋ ɔkpakɩtɔ kinkiinkin yɔfʋn mʋ́ ɔnɔmɔkɛ.
Bulu Aha Ɔkpʋnʋda
7Mʋ́ sʋ ɩbʋ Bulu asʋn amʋtɔá Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Ndɛ, nɩ mlonu Bulu ɔmɛ a,
8mlɩmáwa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn, fɛ alɩá mlɩ anain Israelfɔ
bɔbwɛ brɛá bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulusʋ,
sɔ mʋ kɩ ɔsʋlʋkpan amʋsʋ.
9Ɩnʋ mlɩ anain bɔsɔ mɩ kɩ nɩ.
Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá bowun mɩ bwɛhɛ nfi adʋana (40) kɛkɛ.
10Ɩnɩ sʋ nenya ɔblɔ wa amʋ́, blɩ mbɛɛ,
‘Bʋtɛdalɩ mɩ ɔma bregyibrɛ,
kina mɩ asʋnsʋ gyi.>
11Mʋ́ sʋ nenya ɔblɔ ka ntam mbɛɛ,
‘Nɩ bówie mɩ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ɩnʋ fiin! Nɛka nɔtʋn!> ”
12Mɩ apio, mlɩkɩ wanklaan ánɩ́ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋ méenya klʋn lalahɛá ɩtamahɔ Bulu gyi, mɛnɩ ɩmɛ́ɛha mʋ ɔdalɩ Bulu Ɔkɩankpapʋ amʋ ɔma. 13Mboun mlɩtɔɩ kpla aba ekekegyiɛkɛá ɔyɩ lɛkɛ, bɛtɩ mʋ́ “Ndɛ,” fɛ alɩá Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ anfɩ ɩdɛblɩ. Fówun lakpan mɛ́ɛmlɛ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋ, ha mʋ ɔwa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn. 14Tsufɛ nɩ akɩta anɩ hogyitɔ kinkiinkin, fɛ brɛ amʋʋ anɩlɔtsɔ hogyi amʋ yɔfʋn mʋ́ ɔnɔmɔ a, anɩa Kristonyɔ abɛ́kan, bwɛ toku kʋlɛ.
15Fɛ alɩá Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ lɛblɩ. Ɔbɛɛ,
“Ndɛ, nɩ mlonu Bulu ɔmɛ a,
mlɩmáwa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn, fɛ alɩá mlɩ anain Israelfɔ
bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ Bulusʋ.”
16Amɛndɩ lonu Bulu asʋn blɩhɛ, tamɛ bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ mʋsʋ? Megyi aha amʋʋ Mose lɛkpa tsu Egyipte ɔsʋlʋsʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́? 17Amɛndɩ Bulu lenya ɔblɔ wa nfi adʋana (40) kɛkɛ? Megyi amʋ́ kɛn lɔbwɛ lakpan, bowu sin ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ ɩnʋ nɩ? 18Amɛndɩ Bulu lɛka ntam ha ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ bówie mɩ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ɩnʋ fiin! Nɛka nɔtʋn?” Megyi aha amʋʋ bɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ mʋsʋ amʋ? 19Mʋmʋ ɩlawankɩ ánɩ́ amʋ́ Bulu mahógyi sʋ bʋmɔyɔ ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ yɛda ɔkpʋnʋ.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 4
Content:
1Nhɩhɩɛ amʋʋ Bulu lɔbwɛ ɔbɛɛ, mɔ́pʋ mʋ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ha anɩ amʋ ɩtra da. Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha akɩ wanklaan, mɛnɩ ɩmɛ́ɛba ánɩ́ mlɩtɔ ɔkʋ oméenya ɩnʋ yɔ. 2Tsufɛ bɛda asʋn wanklaan amʋ ɔkan suna anɩ, fɛ amʋ́, tamɛ bʋmɔhɔ asʋn amʋsʋ gyi. Mʋ́ sʋ ɩmɔwa labi ha amʋ́. 3Tsufɛ anɩ aha amʋʋ anɩlahɔ mʋ́sʋ gyi amʋ obówie mʋ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ɩnʋ. Aha amʋʋ bʋmɔhɔ mʋ́sʋ gyi amʋ mʋ́ a, Bulu lɛblɩ tswɩ ɔbɛɛ,
“Nenya ɔblɔ, ka ntam mbɛɛ,
‘Nɩ bówie mɩ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ɩnʋ fiin! Nɛka nɔtʋn!> ”
Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá Bulu lɛhɩhɩɛ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ɩnʋ yaɩ tsu brɛá ɔlɛlɛ ɔyɩ ɔpá. 4Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn ɛkɛ sienɔsɩ amʋ ɩwɩ asʋn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Ɛkɛ sienɔsɩ a, Bulu lɛda ɔkpʋnʋ tsu mʋ gyumagyihɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.” 5Fɛ alɩá anɩlanu bɔtsʋn a, Bulu ɔbɛɛ, “Nɩ bówie mɩ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ɩnʋ fiin! Nɛka nɔtʋn!” 6Ɩnɩ desuna ánɩ́ akʋ mʋ́ bówie ɩnʋ. Tamɛ aha amʋʋ begyankpa nu asʋn wanklaan amʋ bʋmenya ɩnʋ yɔ, tsufɛ bʋmobu mʋ. 7Ɩnɩ sʋ Bulu lɛtra hɩɛ ɛkɛ bamba, ɔlɛtɩ mʋ́ “Ndɛ.” Nfi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ɔma a, ɔlɔtsʋn Owie Dawidsʋ tɔɩ tsu alɩ ɛkɛ anfɩ ɩwɩ, fɛ alɩá ɩbʋ Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ ɔbɛɛ,
“Ndɛ, nɩ mlonu Bulu ɔmɛ a,
mlɩmáwa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn.”
8Nɩ amʋ́ ɔkpapʋ Yosua lɛha bɛda ɔkpʋnʋ a, tɛkɩ Bulu mɛtra hɩɛ ɛkɛ bamba. 9Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakɛ kʋá ɩna ɔtsan ɩda gyo Bulu aha, fɛ alɩá Bulu lɛda ɔkpʋnʋ ɛkɛ sienɔsɩ amʋ. 10Tsufɛ ɔha ánɩ́ olowie ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ɩnʋ ɛ lada ɔkpʋnʋ tsu mʋ ɛ mʋ gyumagyihɛ kugyikʋtɔ, fɛ alɩ amʋʋ Bulu lɛda ɔkpʋnʋ tsu mʋ klɛ kugyikʋtɔ amʋ. 11Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩha abɔ mbɔdɩ awie ɔkpʋnʋ ɔdakpa ɩnʋ, mɛnɩ anɩtɔ ɔkʋkʋ méesin ɔkpatɔ fɛ alɩ amʋʋ Israelfɔ bɔwa asʋtɔ-ɔnlɩn, besin ɔkpatɔ amʋ.
12Tsufɛ Bulu asʋn amʋ ɩbʋ nkpa, ɩtɔyɔ agyʋma. Ɩbʋ ogya dʋn ɔdayi ɩya anyɔ kugyikʋ. Ɩtɛka ɔha alɩɩ yowie mʋ ɔkla pʋ́ mʋ́ ɔŋɛ ofiakpa, mʋ ntsakpa pʋ́ mʋ awú nfɔtɔ. Itegyi anɩ agywɩɩn pʋ́ tɔá anɩtekle tsu anɩ klʋntɔ asʋn. 13Tɔtɔɔtɔ tamaŋain Bulu! Togyitɔ da yaya mʋ ansɩtɔ. Mʋ abéyebu anɩ tsiatɔ akunta kugyikʋ suna nɩ.
Anɩ Bulu Igyi Ɔhapʋ Dɛhɛn
14Anɩbʋ igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn kpɔnkpɔntɩá alada fa ɔsʋsʋ yɔ ɔbʋ Bulu wa. Mʋgyi mʋ Bi Yesu. Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩha akɩta Yesu anfɩ anɩdɛ mʋ ɩwɩ adansɩɛ gyi anfɩtɔ kinkiinkin. Anɩmádɩnkɩ ansɩ mʋsʋ. 15Tsufɛ mʋ mʋ́ omegyi ɔha ánɩ́ omóonu anɩ asɩ nɩ anɩmɛtalɩ gyi ɩwɩsʋ. Ogyi ɔha ánɩ́ bɔsɔ mʋ kɩ ɔkpagyiɔkpasʋ fɛ anɩ, tamɛ ɔmɔbwɛ lakpan ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 16Ɩnɩ sʋ mlɩha awa klʋn, ayɔ Awɩtɔlɛpʋ Bulu obia asɩ. Fówun obówun anɩ nwɛ, wa awɩtɔlɛ, kpa anɩ anɩ ohiankɛ.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 5
Content:
1Lɛ bʋtɛlɛ igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn okugyiɔkʋ tsu mʋ aba anyankpʋsatɔ, ɔtɛlɩɩ amʋ́ nwun Bulu ansɩtɔ. Ɔtɔhɔ atɔ hahɛ pʋ́ lakpan afɔdɩɛ-abɔtɔ tsu amʋ́ wa, pʋha Bulu igyi. 2Mʋ onuto ɛ ɔtamatalɩ gyi ɩwɩsʋ brɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ otenya klʋn ha aha ánɩ́ bʋmeyin ɔlala pʋ́ amʋ́á bafwɩ ɔkpa. 3Mʋ́ sʋ ilehian ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha mʋ onuto lakpan, fɛ alɩá ɔtɔbɔ ha mʋ aha. 4Ɔhaa tamawa mʋ ɩwɩ numnyam ɔbɛɛ, Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn mʋgyi. Mboun Bulu tɛtɩ ɔha, bwɛ mʋ mʋ igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn, fɛ alɩá ɔlɔbwɛ Aaron.
5Alɩ kɛn Kristo onuto ɛ mɔwa ɩwɩ numnyam ánɩ́ Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn mʋgyi nɩ. Mboun Bulu lɛbla mʋ ɔbɛɛ,
“Mɩ Bi gyi fʋ.
Ndɛ nabwɛ fʋ Sɩ.”
6Bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋ ɔtɩnɛkʋ ɛ bɛɛ, Bulu ɔbɛɛ,
“Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ fʋgyi brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ,
fɛ Melkisedek.”
7Brɛá Yesu tsie nkpa ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ a, ɔlɔpʋ kokoli mʋ́a isu bɔ mpaɩ, kplʋn kʋklʋkʋʋ, pʋ mʋ atɔ kʋlɩhɛ tswɩ Buluá ɔbɛ́talɩ hɔ mʋ nkpa ansɩtɔ. Mʋ ɩwɩasɩba sum Bulu sʋ Bulu lonu mʋ mpaɩ. 8Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá Bulu mʋ Bi ogyi mʋ́, tamɛ ɔlɔtsʋn ɩwɩɔsɩntɔ asa ɔlɛtalɩ bɩ alɩá Bulu-bu ɩhɩɛ igyi. 9Ɩnɩá ɔlɔbwɛ togyitɔá Bulu lɔwa mʋ bwɛ sʋ a, olemli ɔkpa ánɩ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋtobu mʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ nya nkpahɔá ɩtamata. 10Bulu lɛlɛ mʋ suna ánɩ́ ogyi mʋ igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn, fɛ alɩá ɔlɛyaɩ Melkisedek.
Mlɩmási Hogyi Amʋtɔ
11Mbʋ asʋn tsɔtsɔɔtsɔá abɛ́blɩ tsu Melkisedek asʋn anfɩ ɩwɩ. Tamɛ mʋ́ asɩlɛ suna mlɩ ɩbɔ́wa ɔnlɩn. Tsufɛ sei a, mlɩtra mlɩmɛdɛ asʋn asɩ nu ɔsasʋ. 12Tɛkɩ bɔfʋn alɩ brɛ anfɩtɔ a, mlɩlamli asunapʋ, tamɛ mlɩlɛtra hian ɔha ánɩ́ obósuna mlɩ atɔ gyankpapʋá ɩbʋ Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ. Mʋ́gyi, mlɩlehian atosuanhɛá ɩlɔpɔn fɛ nyɔpʋ-ntsu. Megyi mʋ́á ɩbʋ ɔnlɩn fɛ atɔ wɩhɛ ntɛ atogyihɛ onuto. 13Tamɛ kebi bɔbwɛ tonyɔpʋ. Omeyin tɔá gyi yilebwɛ. 14Ɔhandɛ tegyi tɔá ɩbʋ ɔnlɩn, tsufɛ alatsʋntsʋn ntobitɔ kɩ, alakasɩ bɩ yile mʋ́a lalahɛ.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 6
Content:
1Mʋ́ sʋ mlɩmátra bɩtɩa anɩ ayabi ya ɔma. Mlɩha akasɩ mʋ́á ɩbɛ́ha anɩ abɔ́yɔ nkpa, asi Kristo ɩwɩ atosunahɛ gyankpapʋ amʋtɔ pla lapla. Mehian ánɩ́ abɛ́tra suna atɔ tsu Bulu-hogyi pʋ́ klʋntɔdamli tsu bwɛhɛá ɩtɛtɩ lowu ɩwɩ, 2atosunahɛ tsu asubɔ, ɩbɩ pʋdɩnka ɔhasʋ, Afulikʋsʋ pʋ́ Bulu asʋngyi ɛkɛ trahɛ amʋ ɩwɩ. 3Nɩ Bulu lotsula a, mʋmʋ mʋ́á ɩbɛ́ha abɔ́yɔ nkpa sɔɔn abósuna mlɩ ngya.
4Nɩ aha ánɩ́ bawun Bulu wankɩ amʋ kɩ, bada ɔsʋsʋ atokiehɛ ɔnɔ kɩ, banya Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ amʋ ɛ kɩ, 5bada Bulu asʋn amʋʋ ɩbʋ alɛ amʋ pʋ́ brɛ amʋʋ ɩbɛ́ba amʋtɔ tumi ɔnɔ kɩ, 6mʋ́ ɔma bɛdɩda hogyitɔ a, bʋtamatalɩ tra damli klʋntɔ. Tsufɛ amʋ́ onuto amʋ tra bʋdɛ Bulu mʋ Bi amʋ da manta oyikpalihɛsʋ, tsu mʋ́ lɩɩ bɛɛ, aha bʋbwɛ mʋ ahinla nɩ.
7Anyankpʋsa akʋ bʋgyi fɛ ɔsʋlʋá itonun ntsuá nyankpʋ detswie wʋlɩ mʋ́sʋ. Mʋ́sʋ atɔ tɔwa alɛ, wa labi ha aha amʋ sʋ amʋʋ bɔdɔ mʋ́ amʋ. Bulu toyula alɩ aha anfɩ odu. 8Tamɛ akʋ ɛ bʋgyi fɛ ɔsʋlʋá tʋnkpa mʋ́a awu aná tɔkwɛ mʋ́sʋ, bʋtamawa labi. Nɩ bʋmɛkɩ wanklaan a, Bulu ɔbɔ́lwɩɩ amʋ́, wa amʋ́ ogya.
9Tamɛ apio adwɛpʋ, nɩ ndɛ ɩnɩ blɩ o a, opuni mɛdɛ mɩ tsii. Tsufɛ nyin ánɩ́ mlɩdɛ atɔ wanklaan bwɛ, idesuna ánɩ́ Bulu lahɔ mlɩ nkpa. 10Tsufɛ tɔá ɩda ɔkpa Bulu tɔbwɛ. Ɔmɛ́ɛtan mlɩ gyumagyihɛ pʋ́ ɔdwɛá mlɩlalɛ suna mʋ tsu mʋ ahatsatɔ, mlɩtra mlɩbʋ mʋ́sʋ. 11Nhɩɛ ndekle mbɛɛ, mlɩtɔ okugyiɔkʋ ɔbɔ́wa ɩwɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, bwɛ mʋ́ yɔfʋn mʋ́ ɔnɔmɔ, fówun ɩtɔ amʋʋ mlɩ ansɩ dɩn mʋ́sʋ amʋ ɩbɛ́ba mʋ́tɔ ha mlɩ. 12Mmedekleá mlɩ mli ɔŋɛtɔ awʋlɩyɔpʋ. Mboun mlɩkasɩ aha amʋʋ amʋ́ hogyi pʋ́ amʋ́ ɩklʋnya sʋ amʋ́ ɩbɩ bɛ́da ɩtɔ amʋʋ Bulu lɛhɩɛ yaɩ amʋ.
Bulu Lɛdɩnka Ibwi Tɔá Ɔlɛhɩɛ Yaɩsʋ
13Brɛá Bulu lɛka ntam ha Abraham a, ɔhaa má ɩnʋá ɔdʋn mʋ Bulu. Mʋ́ sʋ mʋ onuto ɩwɩ ɔlɔpʋka ntam. 14Ɔbɛɛ, “Nɛkasɛ, nɛ́hɩɛ yula fʋ. Nɛ́ha fʋ abi-aná bɛ́klɛɩ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ!” 15Abraham lenya klʋn. Mʋ́ sʋ olenya ɩtɔ amʋʋ Bulu lɛka ntam ɔbɛɛ, mɛ́ha mʋ amʋ. 16Nɩ ɔkʋ ɔbɛ́ka ntam a, ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdʋn mʋ ɩda ɔtɔpʋka ntam amʋ. Isuna ánɩ́ nwɛngyi kʋkʋ ma mʋ ntam amʋ ɩwɩ. 17Ɩnɩ sʋ brɛá Bulu dekleá obósuna aha amʋʋ ɔlɛhɩɛ tɔ amʋ ha amʋ ánɩ́ ɔmɛ́ɛtsɛ mʋ agywɩɩn ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ a, ɔlɛtanʋ mʋ ɩwɩ. 18Bulu tamawa afunu! Mʋ tɔ amʋʋ ɔlɛhɩɛ yaɩ amʋ, pʋ́ ntam amʋ igyi atoku anyɔá ɩmɛ́ɛtsɛ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Ɩnɩ sʋ anɩ aha amʋʋ anɩlasrɩ tanʋ mʋ amʋ anɩbʋ tɔá abɔ́pʋwa ɩwɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, akɩta tɔ amʋʋ anɩdɛ ɔkpa kɩ amʋtɔ kinkiinkin. 19Anɩ ɔkpakɩ anfɩ lakɩta anɩ yaɩ, fɛ alɩá ɔtan tɛkɩta obu lɩɩ. Anɩ ɔkpakɩ anfɩ tɛkpa anɩ, anɩtɔtsʋn tati amʋʋ isian ɔsʋsʋ Ɔwankɩkpatɔ Ɔwankɩkpa obu-ɔnɔ amʋtɔ wie mʋ́tɔ. 20Anɩ sʋ Yesu lagyankpa yɔ ɔbʋ obu amʋtɔ ɩnʋ dodo. Alamli igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn ánɩ́ ɔbʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ ha anɩ, fɛ Melkisedek.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 7
Content:
Bulu Igyi Ɔhapʋ Melkisedek
1 Melkisedek anfɩ a, Salem owie ogyi. Ɔlɔbwɛ ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Bulu amʋ igyi ɔhapʋ. Ɛkɛ ɔkʋ Abraham lɔyɛkɔ awie abana akʋ ɩsa, gyi amʋ́sʋ. Brɛá oleyinki ɔba a, olefia Melkisedek. Melkisedek loyula mʋ. 2Abraham leye atɔá olenya tsu ɩsa amʋtɔ idu, ɔlɔpʋ idusɩ ha Melkisedek. Ɩda anfɩ asɩ gyi, “Yilebwɛ Owie.” Mʋ ɩda kʋlɛ ɛ gyi “Iwilwii Owie”, tsufɛ Salem asɩ gyi, “Iwilwii.” 3Bulu asʋn mɛblɩ asʋansʋ tsu Melkisedek akwɩɩpʋ ntɛ mʋ otuntufla, mʋ kwɩɩ ntɛ mʋ lowu ɩwɩ. Ɔlɛlɩan Bulu mʋ Bi amʋ. Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ ogyi brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
4Mlɩkɩ alɩá Melkisedek gyi ɔha kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ ɔkʋ. Anɩ nain Abraham kʋraa leye mʋ atɔá olenya tsu ɩsatɔ idu, pʋ iku-kʋlɛ ha mʋ. 5Mose Mbla lɛha Lewi abi-aná, bʋgyi igyi ahapʋ amʋ ɔkpa ánɩ́ bʋhɔ atɔye idutɔ tsu amʋ́ aha Israelfɔ wa. Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá Abraham abi-aná amʋ́ ɛ bʋgyi. 6Melkisedek anfɩ motsu Lewi abi-anátɔ, tamɛ ɔlɔhɔ Abraham atɔye idutɔ kʋlɛ, yula Abraham mboun amʋʋ Bulu lɛka ntam ha amʋ. 7Nwɛngyi ma mʋ́ ɩwɩ ánɩ́ ɔha ánɩ́ otoyula dʋn ɔmʋá bʋdeyula. 8Yudafɔ igyi ahapʋ amʋʋ bʋtɔhɔ Israelfɔ atɔ idutɔ-kʋlɛ amʋ bʋtowu, tamɛ ɔlɔhɔ Abraham atɔye idutɔ-kʋlɛ anfɩ mʋ́ tra otsie nkpa, fɛ alɩá Bulu asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋ dɛblɩ. 9Nɩ anɩmɔ́ɔwa afunu a, abɛ́talɩ blɩ anɩaa, brɛ amʋʋ Abraham lɔpʋ mʋ atɔ idutɔ-kʋlɛ ha mʋ amʋ a, Lewi abusuan amʋʋ bʋtɔhɔ Israelfɔ atɔ idutɔ-kʋlɛ amʋ ɛ bɛka mʋ́ tsʋn Abrahamsʋ. 10Tsufɛ Lewi bʋ mʋ nain Abraham ɩwɩtɔ, bʋmɔkʋnya kwɩɩ mʋ asa mʋ nain lɔpʋ mʋ atɔ idutɔ-kʋlɛ ha Melkisedek.
11Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá Mose mbla amʋ lɛblɩá Bulu igyi ahapʋ bʋtsu Lewi abusuantɔ. Nɩ bɛ́talɩ ha ɔha ɔbɔ́fʋn a, tɛkɩ Bulu mɛtra lɛ mʋ igyi ɔhapʋ bamba ánɩ́ ogyi fɛ Melkisedek, omotsu Aaron abusuantɔ. 12Nɩ bɛtsɛ igyi ahapʋlɛ mbla amʋ a, mʋmʋ ilehian ánɩ́ bɛ́tsɛ Mose mbla amʋ ɛ. 13Tsufɛ anɩ Wie anfɩ anɩdɛ mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ anfɩ otsu abusuan bambatɔ. Abusuan anfɩtɔ ɔhaa mɔkʋsum afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩ amʋsʋ kɩ. 14Ɔhagyiɔha yin ánɩ́ Yuda abusuantɔ anɩ Wie anfɩ otsu. Mose mɛtɩ abusuan anfɩ ɩda brɛá ɔdɛ abusuan oduá bɔ́bwɛ Bulu igyi ahapʋ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ.
Bulu Igyi Ɔhapʋ Bamba Ánɩ́ Ogyi Fɛ Melkisedek
15Bulu mbla anfɩ tsɛ latra wankɩ anɩ tsɩa, tsufɛ igyi ɔhapʋ bamba labɛlɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan fɛ Melkisedek. 16Mbla dada amʋ ilosuna ánɩ́ Lewifɔ nkʋlɛ ɔbwɛ igyi ahapʋ, tamɛ megyi bɛɛ mʋ anain botsu Lewifɔtɔ sʋ ɔlɔbwɛ igyi ɔhapʋ. Mboun mʋ nkpa ánɩ́ ɩmɔ́ɔmɔ ɔnɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ tumitɔ ɔna ɔlɔbwɛ igyi ɔhapʋ. 17Tsufɛ bɔwanlɩn wa Bulu asʋn amʋtɔ bɛɛ, “Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ fʋgyi brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ, fɛ Melkisedek.” 18Idesuna ánɩ́ balɛ igyiha mbla dada amʋ ibwi, tsufɛ ɩmɔwa ogya, ɩmɔwa labi ɛ. 19Tsufɛ Mose mbla amʋ mɛtalɩ bwɛ tɔtɔɔtɔ ɩfʋn. Sei a, Bulu lapʋ anɩ ɔkpakɩ wanklaan ánɩ́ ɩdʋn mbla dada amʋ yaɩ mʋ́ otsiakpa. Mʋ́á ɩbɛ́kpɩa anɩ manta Bulu.
20Bulu lɛka Yesu ɩwɩ ntam ánɩ́ ɔbɔ́bwɛ mʋ igyi ɔhapʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. Ɔmɛka igyi ɔhapʋ bamba ɔkʋkʋʋkʋ ɩwɩ ntam. 21Yesu ɩwɩ ntam ánɩ́ ɔlɛka brɛá ɔlɔbwɛ mʋ igyi ɔhapʋ gyi,
“Mɩ Bulu, naka mɩ ɩwɩ ntam ánɩ́
igyi ɔhapʋ fʋgyi brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
Mmɛ́ɛlatsɛ mɩ agywɩɩn!”
22Ɩna ntam anfɩ sʋ Yesu labɔbwɛ ɔma ɔlɩɩpʋ ha Bulu nhɩhɩɛá ɩhɩɛ bʋ alɛ dʋn nhɩhɩɛ dada amʋ.
23Bulu igyi ahapʋ amʋʋ betsia nhɩhɩɛ dada amʋ ɔnɔ amʋ bʋhɩɛ bʋtsɔ, tsufɛ bʋtowu si agyʋma amʋ tswɩ. 24Yesu mʋ́ bʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ mʋ Bulu igyiha mɔ́ɔmɔ ɔnɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. 25Mʋ́ sʋ ɔtɛtalɩ hɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔtsʋn mʋsʋ ba Bulu wa fɛ́ɛ́ nkpa plɩplɩplɩ. Tsufɛ otsie Bulu wa, ɔdɛ mʋ kokoli amʋ́ nwunsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.
26Yesu gyi Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn onutoá anɩdehian nɩ. Mʋ ɩwɩ lɛtɩn, tsitsa kʋkʋ ɩma mʋ ɩwɩ. Lalahɛ kʋkʋʋkʋ ɛ ɩma mʋtɔ. Bulu lɛlɛ mʋ lɛ lakpan abwɛpʋ ɔkpasʋ, ha mʋ otsiakpa fʋahɛ ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ. 27Imehian ánɩ́ mʋ mʋ́ obégyankpa bɔ mʋ lakpan ɩwɩ afɔdɩɛ, fɛ igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn atrahɛ amʋ. Amʋ́ mʋ́ betsia bɔ ha amʋ́ onuto lakpan ekekegyiɛkɛ, asa bɔtɔbɔ ha aha. Ɔtsawʋlɛ pɛ mʋ mʋ́ ɔlɔbɔ afɔdɩɛ ha aha fɛ́ɛ́ lakpan, brɛá ɔlɔpʋ mʋ ɩwɩ bɔ afɔdɩɛ aha fɛ́ɛ́ nwunsʋ. 28Mose mbla lɛha aha ánɩ́ bapɔn bɔbwɛ Bulu igyi ahapʋ dɛhɛn. Tamɛ mbla amʋ ɔma a, Bulu lɛka ntam lɛ mʋ Bi. Alaha mʋ Bi amʋ labwɛ mʋ igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn ánɩ́ ɔlɔfʋn brɛ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.

Title: HEBRIFƆ 8
Content:
Anɩ Igyi Ɔhapʋ Dɛhɛn
1Asʋn ánɩ́ ndɛblɩ fɛ́ɛ́ gyi, anɩbʋ Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn ánɩ́ ogyi alɩ, otsie Bulu Otumipʋ amʋ obia gyɔpɩsʋ ɔsʋsʋ. 2Ɔdɛ Bulu igyi ha Ɔwankɩkpatɔ Ɔwankɩkpa onuto ánɩ́ ɩbʋ ɔsʋsʋ ɩnʋ. Mʋ́ mʋ́ a, Bulu onuto leyi mʋ́, megyi nyankpʋsa.
3Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn okugyiɔkʋ mʋ agyʋma gyi, ɔbɔ́pʋ aha amʋ atɔ hahɛ pʋ́ amʋ́ afɔdɩɛ-abɔtɔ ha Bulu. Ɩnɩ sʋ ilehian ánɩ́ anɩ Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ dɛhɛn Kristo ɛ obénya tɔá ɔbɔ́pʋha Bulu. 4Nɩ ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ ɔbʋ a, tɛkɩ ɔmɔ́ɔbwɛ Bulu igyi ɔhapʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Tsufɛ Bulu igyi ahapʋ onuto bʋbʋ ɩnʋá bʋtɛha Bulu igyi Mose mbla ɔnɔ. 5Igyi ahapʋ amʋ bʋtɔtswɛ Bulu igyi ɔhakpa ánɩ́ ɩlɛlɩan ɔsʋsʋ tati-obu amʋ.
